Matthew1:1 Isua Krista chu Davida thlah a ni a, Abrahama aṭanga an inthlah chhâwn dân chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
Matthew1:2 Abrahaman fapa Isaka a nei a, Isakan Jakoba. Jakoban Juda leh a unaute." 
Matthew1:3 Judan Tamari lakah Faresa leh Zera, Faresan Esroma, Esroman Arama." 
Matthew1:4 Araman Aminadaba. Aminadaban Nasona, Nasonan Salmona." 
Matthew1:5 Salmonan Rahabi lakah Boaza, Boazan Ruthi lakah Obeda, Obedan Jesaia." 
Matthew1:6 Jesaian fapa, lal Davida a nei a. Davidan Uria nupui lakah fapa Solomona a nei a." 
Matthew1:7 Solomonan Rehoboama, Rehoboaman Abia, Abian Asafa." 
Matthew1:8 AsafanR Jehosafata, Jehosafatan Jehorama, Jehoraman Uzia." 
Matthew1:9 Uzian Jothama, Jothaman Ahaza. Ahazan Hezekia." 
Matthew1:10 Hezekian Manasea, Manasean Amosa, Amosan Josia." 
Matthew1:11 Babulon sala hruai lai vêl khân Josian Jekonia leh a unaute a nei a. 
Matthew1:12 Babulon-a sala an hruai hnuin Jekonian fapa Sealtiela a nei a. Sealtielan Zerubabela," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabelan Abiuda, Abiudan Eliakima, Eliakiman Azora." 
Matthew1:14 Azoran Zadoka, Zadokan Akima, Akiman Eliuda." 
Matthew1:15 Eliudan Eleazara, Eleazaran Mathana. Mathanan Jakoba." 
Matthew1:16 Jakoban Josefa, Mari pasal chu a nei a; Mari lakah Isua, Krista an tih chu, a lo piang ta a." 
Matthew1:17 Tichuan, Abrahama leh Davida inkârah chhuan sâwm leh chhuan li an awm a, Davida leh Babulon sala hruai inkârah pawh chhuan sâwm leh chhuan li an awm a, Babulon sala hruai leh Krista inkârah chhuan sâwm leh chhuan li bawk an awm a ni." 
Matthew1:18 Isua Krista lo pian dân chu hetiang hi a ni: A nu Mari chu Josefa nupui hual a ni a, an inpâwl hmain Thlarau Thianghlimin nau a paitîr tih hriat a lo ni ta a." 
Matthew1:19 A pasal tûr Josefa chu mi fel tak a ni a, tihmualpho a duh lo va, a rûka ṭhen a tum a." 
Matthew1:20 Nimahsela, chûng thu chu a ngaihtuah lai chuan, ngai teh, a mangah Lalpa tirh vântirhkoh a hmu a. “Josef, Davida fapa, i nupui hual Mari hi neih tîm suh, a nau pai chu Thlarau Thianghlim laka mi a ni asin." 
Matthew1:21 Fapa a hring ang a, a hmingah ISUA sa ang che; ani chuan a mite chu an sualte lak ata a chhandam dâwn si a,” a ti a." 
Matthew1:22 Lalpan zâwlnei hmanga," 
Matthew1:23 “Ngai teh, nula thianghlim chuan nau a pai ang a, Fapa a hring ang a, A hmingah Imanuela an sa ang,” (chu chu ‘Kan hnêna Pathian awm’ tihna a ni) tia a sawi kha a lo thlen theih nân hêng zawng zawng hi a lo awm a ni." 
Matthew1:24 Josefa muhîl chu a lo harh a, Lalpa Vântirhkoh thupêk ang chuan a ti a. Mari chu nupuiah a nei ta a;" 
Matthew1:25 nimahsela, fapa a hrin hma chu a pâwl lo, nau hmingah chuan Isua a sa ta a." 
Matthew2:1 Heroda a lal laia, Judai rama Bethlehem khuaa Isua a lo pianin, ngai teh, khawchhak lam aṭangin mi fingte Jerusalem-ah an lo kal a." 
Matthew2:2 “Khawiah nge Juda-te lal tûr nau lo piang chu? Khawchhak lamah a arsi kan hmu a, amah chibai bûk tûrin kan lo kal a ni,” an ti a." 
Matthew2:3 Chu chu lal Herodan a hriatin a buai ta hle a, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng pawh an buai a." 
Matthew2:4 Tichuan, puithiam lalte leh vântlâng Dân zirtîrtu zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a, Krista pianna tûr hmun a zâwt a." 
Matthew2:5 Anni chuan, “Judai ram Bethlehem khuaa piang tûr a ni. Hetiangin zâwlneiin a ziak kha:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Nang, Bethlehem, Judai rama mi, Judai ram khawpui zîngah i tê ber tawp lo, I chhûng aṭangin awptu a lo chhuak dâwn si a, Ka mi Israel-te vêngtu tûr chu,’ ” an ti a." 
Matthew2:7 Chutichuan, Herodan mi fingte chu a rûkin a ko va, arsi lan hun lai chu ngun takin a zâwt a." 
Matthew2:8 Bethlehem-ah chuan a kaltîr a, “Kal ta ula, naute thu chu ngun takin zâwt chhuak ula; kei pawhin ani chu chibai ka rawn bûk ve theih nân in hmuh hunah mi rawn hrilh leh ang che u,” a ti a." 
Matthew2:9 Lal thu chu an hria a, an kal ta a; khawchhak lama arsi an hmuh khân naute awmna chung zâwn a thlena a din hma chu an hma a hruai zêl ta a." 
Matthew2:10 Arsi chu an hmuhin an hlim êm êm a; 
Matthew2:11 in chhûnga an va luh chuan a nu Mari bula nautê chu an hmu a, lei sia kûnin chibai an bûk a; an robâwmte an hawng a, thilpêk - rangkachak te, beraw te, mura te an pe a." 
Matthew2:12 Heroda hnêna kîr leh lo tûra an manga hrilh an nih avângin an ram panin kawng dangah an haw ta a. 
Matthew2:13 An hâwn hnuin, ngai teh, Lalpa Vântirhkoh Josefan a mangah a hmu a, “Tho la, nautê leh a nu hruai la, Aigupta ramah kal bo rawh; ka hrilh leh hma che zawng chutah chuan awm reng ang che, tihboral tumin Herodan nautê hi a zawng dâwn a ni,” a lo ti a." 
Matthew2:14 Tichuan, a tho va, nautê leh a nu chu a hruai a, a zân a zânin Aigupta ramah an kal ta a." 
Matthew2:15 Heroda thih hma chu chutah chuan an awm ta a. Lalpan zâwlnei hmanga, “Ka fapa chu Aigupta ram ata ka ko chhuak a,” tia a sawi kha a lo thlen theih nân." 
Matthew2:16 Tin, mi fingten an tihder a ni tih Herodan a hriatin a thin a ur ta êm êm a, a hun thu a zawha an hrilh ang khân Bethlehem leh a vêl zawng zawnga mipa naupang kum hnih chin hnuai lam chu a va thahtîr ta vek a." 
Matthew2:17 Zâwlnei Jeremian: 
Matthew2:18 “Rama khuaah thâwm an hria, Lusûn leh ṭap chuah chuah thâwm chu; Rakili chuan a fate a ṭah a, An awm tawh loh avângin a hnem theih loh,” tia a sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Matthew2:19 Heroda chu a thih hnuin, Aigupta ramah chuan Josefan a mangah Lalpa vântirhkoh a hmu a," 
Matthew2:20 “Tho la, nautê leh a nu hruai la, Israel ramah haw tawh rawh; nautê thah tumtute kha an thi tawh e,” a ti a." 
Matthew2:21 Tichuan, a tho va, nautê leh a nu chu a hruai a, Israel ram chu an pan ta a." 
Matthew2:22 Nimahsela, Arkelausa chu a pa Heroda aiawhin Judai ramah a lal tih a hriatin chuta kal chu a hlau va, a mumanga hriattîrna a dawn angin Galili ram lamah a kal ta a." 
Matthew2:23 Khaw pakhat, Nazaret an tihah chuan a va awm a, “Ani chu, ‘Nazaret mi,’ an ti ang,” tia zâwlneite sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Matthew3:1 Chûng lai chuan baptistu Johana chu Judai ram thlalêrah thu hrilin a lo kal a. 
Matthew3:2 “Sim rawh u, vânram chu a hnai tawh e,” a ti a." 
Matthew3:3 Ani hi a ni, zâwlnei Isaian, “Thlalêra mi au aw chuan, ‘Lalpa lamlian chei ṭha ula, A kal nân kawng tluang siam rawh u,’ a ti,” tia a sawi kha." 
Matthew3:4 Chu Johana chuan sanghâwngsei hmul kawr a ha a, savun kâwnghrên a hrêng a, a chaw chu khaukhuap leh ram khawizu a ni." 
Matthew3:5 Chutih lai chuan Jerusalem leh Judai ram hmun tina awmte leh Jordan luidung vêl ram zawng zawnga awmte chuan ani chu an pan huai huai a," 
Matthew3:6 an sualte an puang a, Jordan luiah chuan a lo baptis hlawm a." 
Matthew3:7 Tin, Farisai leh Sadukai tam tak baptisma chang tûra lo kal ve a hmuhin an hnênah, “Rûl thlahte u, thinur lo thleng tûr pumpelh nân tu nge baptisma chang tûra fuih che u?" 
Matthew3:8 In sim ngei a ni tih tilang tûrin thil ti zêl zâwk rawh u. 
Matthew3:9 ‘Kan pa chu Abrahama asin’ in lo ti dah ang e; ka hrilh a che u, Pathian chuan hêng lung hi Abrahama thlahah a din thei a ni." 
Matthew3:10 Tûn apangin thing bul tinah hreipui an dah ta, thing eng pawh rah ṭhaa rah lo chu kiha meia tuah mai tûr a ni." 
Matthew3:11 Kei zawngin sim entîr nân tuiin ka baptis ṭhîn che u a; ka hnunga lo kal tûr erawh chu kei aiin a ropui zâwk a, a pheikhawk keng tlâk pawh ka ni lo ve." 
Matthew3:12 Ani zawngin Thlarau Thianghlim leh meiin a baptis ang che u; a hruiha buh chu zâp faia zêma khung mai tûrin a sisêp chu a keng tawh a, a site erawh chu tihmih rual loh meiah a hâl ral ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew3:13 Chutih lai chuan Galili ram aṭangin Johana hnênah, Jordan luia baptisma chang tûrin Isua chu a lo kal a." 
Matthew3:14 Johana erawh chuan, “Mi baptis tûr i ni zâwk si a, ka hnênah i lo kal a ni maw?” tiin a hnial a." 
Matthew3:15 Nimahsela, Isuan, “Tûnah remti hrâm rawh, hetiang felna zawng zawng hlen chhuah hi kan tân a mawi a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew3:16 Tichuan, a remti ta a. Isuan baptisma a chan zawh chuan tui ata chu a chhuak nghâl a; a tân vân a lo inhawng a, Pathian Thlarau chu ṭhuro anga lo chhukin a chunga fu a hmu a." 
Matthew3:17 Ngai teh, vân aṭanga awin, “Hei hi ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka chu a ni, a chungah ka lâwm êm êm a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:1 Chumi zawh chuan Isua chu Diabola thlêm tûrin thlalêrah Thlarauvin a hruai chho ta a. 
Matthew4:2 Ni sawmli leh zân sawmli chaw a nghei hnuin a ril a lo ṭâm a. 
Matthew4:3 Thlêmtu chu a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Pathian Fapa i nih tak tak chuan hêng lung hi chhanga chang tûrin thu pe rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:4 Ani erawh chuan, “Mihring hi chhang ringawt ringin an nung tûr a ni lo. Pathian ka aṭanga thuchhuak tinrêng an ring bawk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:5 Diabola chuan ani chu khaw thianghlimah a hruai lût a. Tempul chhîpah a dintîr a," 
Matthew4:6 a hnênah, “Pathian Fapa i nih meuh chuan zuang thla rawh. ‘I chungthu-ah zawng vântirhkohte thu a pe ang a, An kutin an dâwm ang chia, Tichuan, lungah i ke i sawh dâwn lo nia,’ tih ziak a ni si,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:7 Isua chuan a hnênah, “‘Lalpa i Pathian fiah suh’ tih ziak a ni bawk asin,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:8 Diabola chuan tlang sâng takah a hruai leh a, khawvêl ram zawng zawng leh a ropuina a entîr a;" 
Matthew4:9 a hnênah, “Lei siin chibai mi bûk la, hêng zawng zawng hi ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:10 Isuan a hnênah, “Setan, kal bo daih rawh, ‘Lalpa i Pathian chu chibai bûk la, ama rawng chauh bâwl rawh,’ tih ziak a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:11 Tichuan, Diabola chuan a kalsan a, vântirhkohten rawng an bâwlsak ta a." 
Matthew4:12 Johana an man tih a hriatin Isua chu Galili ramah a kal ta daih a. 
Matthew4:13 Nazaret chhuahsanin Kapernaum khuaah a zu awm ta reng a, chu chu Zebulun leh Naftali biala dîl kama awm a ni;" 
Matthew4:14 zâwlnei Isaia sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni: 
Matthew4:15 “Zebulun leh Naftali ram Tuipui panna kawng, Jordan râl, Jentail-te chênna Galili." 
Matthew4:16 Thim hnuaia ṭhute chuan êng nasa tak an hmu a, Thihna ram thima chêngte chungah chuan êng a lo chhuak ta,” a tih kha." 
Matthew4:17 Chuta chinah chuan Isuan, “Sim rawh u, vânram chu a hnai tawh e,” tiin a hril ṭan ta a." 
Matthew4:18 Galili dîl kama a lên pahin unau pahnih, Simona, Petera an tih leh Andria chu dîla an lên dêng a va hmu a; sangha man mi an ni rêng a." 
Matthew4:19 An hnênah, “Mi zui rawh u; tichuan, mihring mantuah ka siam ang che u,” a ti a." 
Matthew4:20 An lênte chu an hnutchhiah a, ani chu an zui ta nghâl a." 
Matthew4:21 Chuta ṭang chuan a kal zêl a, unau dang pahnih, Zebedaia fa, Jakoba leh Johana chu a hmu a, an pa Zebedaia hovin lawngah an lên an lo ṭhui ṭha a, anni chu a ko va." 
Matthew4:22 Tichuan, lawng leh an pa chu an kalsan a, Isua chu an zui ta nghâl a." 
Matthew4:23 Isua chuan Galili ram a fang vêl a, an sunagog -ahte zirtîrin, Ram Chanchin ṭha chu a hril a, Israel-te zînga natna tinrêng leh chak lohna tinrênga nâte chu a tidam zêl a." 
Matthew4:24 Tichuan, Suria ram zawng zawngah a chanchin chu a thang ta a; damlo zawng zawng, damlohna leh natna tinrêng tuar te, ramhuai man te, thla-em-ât te leh zeng te, a hnênah an rawn hruai a, a lo tidam hlawm a." 
Matthew4:25 Galili ram aṭang te, Dekapoli khua aṭang te, Jerusalem aṭang te, Judai ram aṭang te leh Jordan râl aṭang te chuan mipui nasa takin amah an zui a." 
Matthew5:1 Mipui chu a hmuhin tlângah a chho va, a ṭhu a, a zirtîrte an lo kal khâwm a;" 
Matthew5:2 thu a sawi a, anmahni a lo zirtîr a:" 
Matthew5:3 “Thlarau lama an pachhiatzia inhriate chu an chan a ṭha e, vânram chu an ta a ni si a." 
Matthew5:4 “Lungngaite chu an chan a ṭha e, thlamuan an la ni dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:5 “Thuhnuairawlhte chu an chan a ṭha e, ram chu an la rochung dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:6 “Felna duha rilṭâma tuihâlte chu an chan a ṭha e, an la tlai dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:7 “Khawngaihna nei mite chu an chan a ṭha e, khawngaih an la hlawh dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:8 “Thinlunga thianghlimte chu an chan a ṭha e, Pathian an la hmu dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:9 “Remna siamtute chu an chan a ṭha e, Pathian fate tih an la ni dâwn si a." 
Matthew5:10 “Felna avânga tihduhdah tuartute chu an chan a ṭha e, vânram chu an ta a ni si a." 
Matthew5:11 “Keimah avânga miin an hau che ua, an tihduhdah che u a, dik lo taka sual tinrêng tia an puh hun che u chuan in chan a va ṭha dâwn êm!" 
Matthew5:12 Lâwm ula, hlim takin awm rawh u, vânah in lâwmman a awm hnem si a; chutiang bawkin in hmaa zâwlneite pawh kha an tiduhdah ṭhîn asin." 
Matthew5:13 “Lei chi in ni e; nimahsela, chi hi da ta ang se, engtia tihal leh tûr nge ni ang? Paih chhuaha, mite rah mai mai chauhvah lo chuan eng atân mah a tlâktlai tawh lo vang." 
Matthew5:14 “Khawvêl êng in ni e. Tlângchhîpa khaw awm chu thuhrûk theih a ni lo. 
Matthew5:15 Miin an khâwnvâr chhit chu khovin an khuh ngai lo, a dahnaah an dah zâwk ṭhîn; tichuan, in chhûnga mi zawng zawng a ên ṭhîn." 
Matthew5:16 Chutiang bawkin in êng chu mi hmuhin êng rawh se; chutichuan, in thil ṭha tihte an hmu ang a, in Pa vâna mi an chawimawi thei ang." 
Matthew5:17 “Dân thu emaw, zâwlneite thu emaw ṭhiat tûra lo kal ka nih ring suh u, ṭhiat tûr ni lovin tifamkim tûra lo kal ka ni zâwk." 
Matthew5:18 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, lei leh vân hi a awm chhûng chu Dân thu-a mi chhun han hlek emaw, thai han hlek emaw, a zaa a thlen kim zet hma chuan a pakhat mah hi a râl tawp lo vang." 
Matthew5:19 Chutichuan, hêng thupêk zînga pawimawh lo ber pakhat pawh hi ngainêpa, chutianga ti ve tûra mite zirtîr apiang chu vânramah chuan mi tê ber an ti ang; amaherawhchu, tu pawh zâwma, zirtîr ve chu vânramah chuan mi lian an ti ang." 
Matthew5:20 In felnain Dân zirtîrtute leh Farisai-te felna a khûm loh chuan vânramah in lût tawp lo vang tih ka hrilh che u a nih hi. 
Matthew5:21 “Hmânlai mite hnênah, ‘Tual i that tûr a ni lo, tual that rêng rêng chu an chungthu rêl tûr a ni,’ tih a nih thu in hria e." 
Matthew5:22 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, mahni unau chunga thinur chu a chungthu rêl tûr a ni; a unau ‘mi chhawihpa,’ ti chu Sanhedrin-a rêl tûr a ni ang; a unau ‘mi â pa,’ ti phei chu hremhmun meia kal tlâk a ni tih ka hrilh che u hi." 
Matthew5:23 Tichuan, i thilpêk maichâma i hlan dâwn laiin i unauvin i chungah lungnih lohna a nei tih i hriat chhuah chuan," 
Matthew5:24 maichâm hmaah i thilpêk chu hnutchhiah la, kal langin, i unau chu rem zet la, chumi hnuah i thilpêk chu hlân rawh." 
Matthew5:25 I khingpui chu kalkawnga in kal dun laiin rem thuai rawh; chutilo chu, rorêltu a mantîr ang chia, rorêltu chuan pulis hnênah a hlân ang chia, tân inah an khung hlauh dah ang che." 
Matthew5:26 Thu dik ka hrilh a che, pawisa pakhat pawh i tlâk kim hma chu chuta ta chu i chhuak tawp lo vang." 
Matthew5:27 “ ‘I uire tûr a ni lo,’ tih a nih in hria e." 
Matthew5:28 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, tu pawh, ngaih châka hmeichhe melhtu chu, a thinlungah a uire tawh reng a ni." 
Matthew5:29 I mit ding lamin a tihtlûk che chuan kher chhuak la, paih daih rawh; i taksa a puma hremhmuna paih a nih ai chuan, i taksa pêng pakhat boral chu i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Matthew5:30 Tin, i kut ding lamin a tihtlûk che chuan, tan la, paih daih rawh; i taksa a puma hremhmuna paih a nih ai chuan, i taksa pêng pakhat boral chu i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Matthew5:31 “ ‘Tu pawh nupui ma chuan mâkna lehkha pe rawh se,’ tih a ni bawk a." 
Matthew5:32 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, uire vâng ni lova nupui ma apiang chuan an nupui chu an uiretîr a ni, mâk hnu nei pawh an uire a ni." 
Matthew5:33 “Hmânlai mite hnênah, ‘dâwtin chhia chham suh la, Lalpa hnênah i chhechham chu i hlen tûr a ni,’ tih a nih in hre bawk a." 
Matthew5:34 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, chhia rêng rêng chham suh u; vân chhâlin chham suh u, chu chu Pathian lalṭhutthlêng a ni si a;" 
Matthew5:35 lei chhâlin chham bawk hek suh u, chu chu a ke nghahchhan a ni si a; Jerusalem chhâl pawhin chham suh u, chu chu Lal ropui tak khawpui a ni si a." 
Matthew5:36 I lu chhâlin i chham tûr a ni hek lo, samzai pakhat pawh i tivârin i tidum thei si lo va." 
Matthew5:37 In thu sawi chu ‘ni,’ emaw, ‘ni lo,’ emaw ni ngawt rawh se, chûng aliam chu sual laka chhuak a ni." 
Matthew5:38 “ ‘Mit aiah mit, ha aiah ha,’ tih a nih in hria a." 
Matthew5:39 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u; mi sual dodâl suh u; i biang ding lam bêngtu hnênah chuan a lehlam pawh dawh rawh. 
Matthew5:40 Tu pawhin i lakah thu pawi siamin i kawr lâk an tum chuan, I puan pawh lâktîr mai rawh." 
Matthew5:41 Tin, km. khat hruai luitu che chu km. hnih zui rawh." 
Matthew5:42 An dîl che chuan pe la, i laka pûk duhtu chu hawisan suh." 
Matthew5:43 “ ‘I vêngte i hmangaih tûr a ni a, i hmêlma chu i haw tûr a ni,’ tih a nih in hria a." 
Matthew5:44 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u: i hmêlmate chu hmangaih la, a tiduhdahtu che chu ṭawngṭaisak rawh," 
Matthew5:45 in Pa vâna mi fate in nih theih nân ani chuan mi sualte leh mi ṭhate chungah ni a chhuahtîr a, mi dik leh dik lote chungah pawh ruah a surtîr ṭhîn." 
Matthew5:46 Nangmahni hmangaihtute chauh in hmangaih hian lâwmman eng nge in hmuh bîk ang? Chhiahkhawntute pawhin chutiangin an ti ve lo vem ni? 
Matthew5:47 Tin, in unaute chauh chibai in bûk hian eng nge in tih hnem chuan bîk? Jentail-te pawhin chutiangin an ti ve lo vem ni?" 
Matthew5:48 Chutichuan, in Pa vâna mi a ṭha famkim angin in ṭha famkim tûr a ni." 
Matthew6:1 “In thil ṭha tihte mi hmuh atân, an hmaa ti lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u; chutilo chu in Pa vâna mi hnêna lâwmman in hmu lo vang." 
Matthew6:2 Chutichuan, khawngaih thilpêk i hlanin, mi vervêkten mi fak an hlawh theih nân sunagog-ah te leh kawtthlêrah te an ti ṭhîn ang hian i hmaah tawtawrâwt hâm suh. Thu dik ka hrilh a che, an lâwmman chu an hmu tawh reng a ni." 
Matthew6:3 Nang erawh chuan khawngaih thilpêk i hlanin, i kut ding lam tih chu i kut vei lamin hre suh se," 
Matthew6:4 i thilpêk chu a rûka a awm theih nân; chutichuan, i Pa, a rûka hmu ṭhîntu chuan a rûl ang che." 
Matthew6:5 “In ṭawngṭai pawhin mi vervêkte angin awm suh u; miin an hmuh theih nân sunagog-ah te, kawtthlêr ṭhuam laiah te ding chunga ṭawngṭai an ngaina si ṭhîn. Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, an lâwmman chu an hmu tawh reng a ni." 
Matthew6:6 Nang erawh chu i ṭawngṭai hunin, i pindan chhûng rilah lût la, kawng khâr la, i Pa, a rûka awm hnênah chuan ṭawngṭai rawh; tichuan, i Pa, a rûka hmu ṭhîntu chuan a rûl ang che." 
Matthew6:7 “In ṭawngṭaiin Jentail-te angin sawi nawn mai mai suh u; an ṭawng tam avângin hriain an ring a ni. 
Matthew6:8 Anmahni angin awm suh u, in dîl hma pawhin in Pa chuan in mamawhte chu a hre si a." 
Matthew6:9 Tichuan, nangni chu hetiang hian ṭawngṭai rawh u: ‘Kan Pa, vâna mi, I hming zahin awm rawh se. I ram lo thleng rawh se." 
Matthew6:10 I duhzâwng vâna tih a nih angin leiah tih ni rawh se. 
Matthew6:11 Vawiinah hian kan ei khawp chaw min pe ang che. 
Matthew6:12 Kan laka bate kan ngaidam angin, kan batte hi min ngaihdamsak ang che." 
Matthew6:13 Thlêmnaah min hruai lût suh la, Mi sual lakah chuan min chhandam zâwk ang che.’ tiin." 
Matthew6:14 An bawhchhiatnaah mite in ngaihdam chuan, in Pa vâna mi pawhin a ngaidam ve ang che u." 
Matthew6:15 In ngaihdam loh erawh chuan in Pain in bawhchhiatnaahte a ngaidam bîk lo vang che u. 
Matthew6:16 “Chaw in nghei hun pawhin mi vervêkte angin ngui hmêl pu suh u; anni zawngin mi hmuha chaw ngheia an lan theih nân an hmêl an tipawr si ṭhîn a. Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, an lâwmman chu an hmu tawh reng a ni." 
Matthew6:17 Nang erawh chuan chaw i nghei hunin, sahriak thih la, i hmai phih rawh." 
Matthew6:18 I Pa, a rûka awm hnênah chauh lo chuan mi hmuhah chaw ngheiin i lang lo vang; tichuan, i Pa a rûka hmu ṭhîntu chuan a rûl ang che." 
Matthew6:19 “Leiah, thîm leh tuiêkin a ei chhiatnaah, rûkruten an reh pawha an rûknaah hian in tân ro khâwl khâwm suh u." 
Matthew6:20 Vânah, thîm leh tuiêkin a ei chhiat lohnaah, rûkruten an reh pawha an rûk hek lohnaah chuan in tân ro khâwl khâwm zâwk rawh u." 
Matthew6:21 In ro awmna apiangah in rilru pawh a awm ṭhin hi. 
Matthew6:22 “Mit hi taksa tân khâwnvâr ang a ni, I mit a dik chuan i taksa chu a pum ên ang;" 
Matthew6:23 i mit a dik loh erawh chuan i pumin i thim vek ang. Tichuan, nangmaha êng awm chu a thim si chuan, chu thim chu a va nasa dâwn êm!" 
Matthew6:24 “Tu man hotu pahnih rawng an bâwl kawp thei lo, pakhat huain pakhat an duh emaw a ni ang a; a nih loh leh pakhat chu an ngaina ang a, pakhat chu an hmusit ang. Pathian rawng leh sum rawng in bâwl kawp thei lo ve." 
Matthew6:25 “Chuvâng chuan, ka hrilh a che u, in nun nân eng nge in ei anga in in ang tih te, in taksa tân eng nge in sin ang tih te lungkham suh u. Ei tûr aiin nunna a pawimawh zâwk a, silhfên aiin taksa pawh a pawimawh zâwk lo vem ni?" 
Matthew6:26 Chunglêng savate hi en ta che u, buh an tuh lo va, an seng lo va, buh inahte an khung khâwm hek lo; mahse, in Pa vâna mi chuan a châwm si a; anni ai chuan in hlu zâwk daih lo vem ni?" 
Matthew6:27 Nangniho zîngah lungkham avângin tu nge mahni nun tisei hret thei? 
Matthew6:28 Silhfên thu engah nge in lungkham ni? Ram tûktinpâr ṭhan dânte hi ngaihtuah teh u, hna an thawk lo va, la an dek hek lo;" 
Matthew6:29 nimahsela, ka hrilh a che u, Solomona meuh pawh a ropui thei ang bera a inthuam khân hêng tûktinpâr pakhat tluk pawh hian chei a ni lo." 
Matthew6:30 “Chutichuan, ram hnim, vawiina nung, a tûka meia tuah leh mai tûr mah Pathianin chuti kauva a chei si chuan, aw, nangni rin tlêmte u, chûngte ai chuan a thuam nasa zâwk dâwn lo che u em ni?" 
Matthew6:31 Chuvângin, eng nge in eia in in anga, eng nge in silha in fên ang tih lungkham suh u." 
Matthew6:32 Jentail-ten chûng chu an buaipui ber a ni: hêng zawng zawng hi nangni pawhin in mamawh tih in Pain a hre reng a ni. 
Matthew6:33 A ram leh a felna chu zawng hmasa zâwk rawh u; tichuan, hêng zawng zawng hi a pêk belhchhah dâwn che u nia." 
Matthew6:34 Chuvângin, a tûk atân lungkham suh u, a tûk chuan ama tân a ngaihtuah chawp dâwn si a. Ni khat hrehawm hi ni khat atân a tâwk e." 
Matthew7:1 “Sawisêl suh u, sawisêla in awm loh nân." 
Matthew7:2 In sawisêlna ang bawkin sawisêl in ni ang a, in tehna ngeiin an tehsak ang che u." 
Matthew7:3 Engtizia nge mahni mita thingtum awm chu hre si lovin in unau mita thil tê tak tê awm chu in hmuh ni? 
Matthew7:4 A nih leh, engtin nge mahni mita thingtum awm reng siin i unau hnênah, ‘I mita thil tê tak tê awm kha mi lâk chhuahtîr rawh,’ i tih theih ang?" 
Matthew7:5 Ngai teh, nangma mit ngeiah thingtum a awm ruau si a. Mi vervêk, i mita thingtum awm kha la chhuak hmasa zet rawh; tichuan, i unau mita thil tê tak tê lâk chhuah tûr chu fiah takin i hmu thei ang." 
Matthew7:6 “Uite chu thil thianghlim pe suh ula, vawk hmaah pawh in tuikeplung vawrh hek suh u; an chîl hrep ang a, an rawn tai thlêr dah ang che u." 
Matthew7:7 “Dîl ula, pêk in ni ang; zawng ula, in hmu ang; kik ula, hawnsak in ni ang." 
Matthew7:8 A dîl apiangin an dawng ṭhîn a, a zawng apiangin an hmu bawk ṭhîn; tu pawh a kik chu an hawnsak dâwn a ni." 
Matthew7:9 A nih leh, nangniho zînga tu pawh hi, a fapain chhang dîl sela, tu nge lung pe ang?" 
Matthew7:10 Sangha dîl ta sela tu nge rûl pe ang? 
Matthew7:11 Chutichuan, nangni mi sual mahin in fate thil ṭha pêk nachâng in hriat chuan in Pa vâna mi chuan a dîltute chu thil ṭha a va pe dâwn êm!" 
Matthew7:12 “Chutichuan, thil eng pawh miin in chunga an tih in duh tûr ang apiang chu, mi chungah pawh ti ve rawh u; chu chu Dân leh zâwlneite thu a ni rêng si a." 
Matthew7:13 “Kawngka zîmah chuan lût rawh u, boralna kawngka chu a zau va, a kawng pawh a nuam a, chumi lama kalte chu tam tak an ni." 
Matthew7:14 Nunna kawngka erawh chu a zîm a, a kawng pawh a chêp a, a hmutute pawh tlêm tê an ni." 
Matthew7:15 “Zâwlnei derte lakah fîmkhur rawh u, chûng chu berâm vun sinin in hnênah an lo kal ṭhîn; an chhûng lamah erawh chuan chinghne koham tak an ni si a." 
Matthew7:16 Anni chu an rahah in hre mai ang. Hlîngbukah grep an lo ngai em ni? Lênhlîngah theipui an lo ngai em ni? 
Matthew7:17 Thing ṭha chu a rah ṭha ṭhîn a, thing chhia chu a rah chhe ṭhîn." 
Matthew7:18 Thing ṭha a rah chhe thei lo va, thing chhia lah a rah ṭha thei hek lo." 
Matthew7:19 Thing tin rah ṭhaa rah lo apiang chu an kit a, meiah an tuah ṭhîn." 
Matthew7:20 Tichuan, anni chu an rahah in hre mai ang." 
Matthew7:21 “‘Lalpa, Lalpa,’ mi ti nazawng chu vânramah an lût lo vang a, ka Pa vâna mi duhzâwng titute erawh chu an lût ang." 
Matthew7:22 Chumi ni-ah chuan mi tam takin, ‘Lalpa, Lalpa, i hmingin thute kan hril a, i hmingin ramhuaite kan hnawt chhuak a, i hmingin thil makte kan ti ṭhîn lo vem ni?’ an la ti ang." 
Matthew7:23 Chumi hunah chuan, ‘Nangni thil sual titute u, ka hre ngai lo va che u, ka hnên ata kal bo daih rawh u,’ tiin anni chu ka la hrilh ang." 
Matthew7:24 “Chutichuan, hêng ka thu hi hriaa, zâwm apiang chu mi fing, lungpui chunga in satu nên tehkhin tûr a ni." 
Matthew7:25 Ruah a lo sûr a, tui te a lo lian a, thli te a lo tleh a, chu in chu a rawn nam sawk sawk a; mahse, lungpui chunga rem tlat a nih avângin a chim lo." 
Matthew7:26 Hêng ka thu hi hriaa zâwm si lote erawh chu mi â ṭiauvut chung maia in satu nên tehkhin tûr a ni. 
Matthew7:27 Ruah a lo sûr a, tui te a lo lian a, thli te a lo tleh a, chu in chu a rawn nam sawk sawk a, a chim ta a, a sawp rup mai a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew7:28 Isuan chûng thu chu a sawi zawh chuan mipuiten a thu zirtîr chu mak an ti hle a," 
Matthew7:29 Dân zirtîrtute ang lova thu nei taka anmahni a zirtîr avâng chuan. 
Matthew8:1 Tlâng ata a lo chhuk hnuin mipui nasa takin Isua chu an zui a. 
Matthew8:2 A hnênah phâr a lo kal a, kûnin chibai a rawn bûk a, “Lalpa, i duh chuan mi tithianghlim thei e,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:3 Ani chuan a han ban a, a dek a, “Duh e, lo thianghlim tawh ang che,” a ti a, a phâr chu a lo thianghlim ta nghâl a." 
Matthew8:4 Isuan a hnênah, “Tu hnênah mah sawi suh; amaherawhchu, puithiam hnênah kal la, va inentîr rawh, i dam ngei tih miten an hriat nân; Mosian thil hlan tûr a ruat kha hlân rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:5 Tin, Kapernaum khua a lo luhin a hnênah sipai za hotu a lo kal a," 
Matthew8:6 “Lalpa, ka naupang a zeng a, inah a mu reng a, a na hle mai,” tiin tidam tûrin ṭhahnemngai takin a ngên a." 
Matthew8:7 Ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka lo kal ang a, ka rawn tidam ang e,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:8 Sipai za hotu erawh chuan a chhâng a, “Lalpa, ka in chhûnga ko lût tlâk che ka ni lo, thu chauh sawi la, ka nau chu a dam mai ang." 
Matthew8:9 Kei pawh mi thuhnuaia awm ka ni a, ka hnuaiah sipaite an awm leh chhâwng a, ‘Kal rawh,’ ka tih chu a kal a, ‘lo kal rawh,’ ka tih chu a lo kal mai a; ka bawih pawhin ‘hei hi ti rawh’ ka tih chu a ti mai ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:10 Isuan chu chu a hriatin mak a ti hle a, a zuitute hnênah chuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Israel zîngah pawh heti êma ring nasa hi tu mah ka hmu lo." 
Matthew8:11 Ka hrilh a che u, chhak leh thlang aṭangin mi tam tak an lo kal ang a, vânramah chuan Abrahama te, Isaka te, leh Jakoba te nên ruai an la kîl ho vang a;" 
Matthew8:12 Ram fate erawh chu pâwn thimah hnawh chhuah an ni ang; chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, ha an ṭhial ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:13 Isuan, sipai za hotu hnênah chuan, “Kal tawh le, i rin angin i chungah lo thleng rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, chumi dâr ngeiah chuan naupang chu a dam ta a." 
Matthew8:14 Petera ina Isua a luhin a pizawn khawsika mu chu a hmu a," 
Matthew8:15 a kut a khawihsak a, a khawsik chu a reh ta a; a tho va, chaw ei a siamsak ta a." 
Matthew8:16 Khua a lo tlai lam chuan a hnênah ramhuai man tam tak an rawn hruai a, thuin ramhuaite chu a hnawt chhuak a, damlo lo kal zawng zawng pawh chu a tidam bawk a." 
Matthew8:17 Zâwlnei Isaian, “Ani chuan kan chak lohnate a la a, kan nâte a phur,” tia a sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Matthew8:18 Mipui nasa tak a vêla awm Isuan a hmuhin Jordan râl lehlama kal tûrin a zirtîrte chu thu a pe a. 
Matthew8:19 Dân zirtîrtu pakhat a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Zirtîrtu, i kalna apiangah ka zui ang che,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:20 Isuan a hnênah, “Sihalten kua an nei a, chunglêng savate pawhin riahhmun an nei; Mihring Fapa erawh hi chuan lu nghahna tûr a nei lo,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:21 A zirtîrte zînga mi dangin a hnênah, “Lalpa, ka pa ka va vui zet ang e aw,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:22 Isua erawh chuan a hnênah, “Mi zui rawh, mitthiin anmahni mitthi chu lo vui mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew8:23 Tin, lawngah a chuang a, a zirtîrte chuan an zui a." 
Matthew8:24 Dîl chu nasa takin a lo fâwn ta a; tichuan, tuifâwnin lawng chu a rawn vûr hlup hlup mai a, ani erawh chu a muhîl a." 
Matthew8:25 An va kaitho va, “Lalpa, min chhanhim rawh, kan boral dâwn hi le,” an ti a." 
Matthew8:26 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Rin tlêmte u, engah nge in hlauh?” a ti a. Tichuan, a tho va, thli leh dîl chu a hau ta a, a lo reh ta ṭhuap mai a." 
Matthew8:27 Mite chuan mak an ti hle a, “He mi hi mi eng nge a nih? Thli leh dîl lam pawhin a thu an awih hi le!” an ti a." 
Matthew8:28 Râl lehlam, Gadarin mite ram chu a va thlenin ramhuai man pahnih, thlân aṭanga lo kalte chuan an rawn pan a; an kawlh êm êm mai a, chumi lam kawngah chuan tu mah an kal ngam lo." 
Matthew8:29 Tin, anni chuan, “Pathian Fapa, kan chungthu-ah rawn inrawlh i tum elo? Hun tiam thlen hmaa min nghaisa tûrin i lo kal em ni?” tiin an lo au va." 
Matthew8:30 Chuta ṭanga hla feah chuan vawk rual an tla sup sup a. 
Matthew8:31 Ramhuaite chuan, “Min hnawh chhuah chuan vawk kawchhûngah sâwn min luhtîr ang che,” tiin an ngên a." 
Matthew8:32 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Va lût ta che u,” a ti a. Tichuan, an lo chhuak a, vawk rual kawchhûngah chuan an lût ta a; tin, ngai teh, vawk rual chu an vaiin dîl kam khâm kovah chuan an tlân liam a, dîlah chuan an boral ta a." 
Matthew8:33 A enkawltute chu an tlânchhia a, khuaah an kal a, thil awmzia zawng zawng, ramhuai mante chunga thil lo thleng te chu an va sawi a." 
Matthew8:34 A khuain Isua hmu tûrin an lo chhuak ta a, amah an hmuh chuan an ram chhuahsan tûrin an ngên chiam a." 
Matthew9:1 Isua chu lawngah a chuang a, râl lehlam a kai a, a chênna khua chu a va thleng a." 
Matthew9:2 Ngai teh, zeng pakhat, a mutna chawpin a hnênah an rawn zâwn a. Isuan an rinzia a hmuhin zeng hnênah chuan, “Ka fa, thlamuang takin awm rawh, i sualte ngaihdam a ni ta e,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:3 Dân zirtîrtu ṭhenkhat chuan, anmahni zîngah, “He mi hian Pathian pawi a sawi a ni,” an ti hlawm a." 
Matthew9:4 Isua chuan an ngaihtuahte chu a lo hria a, “Engah nge in thinlunga sual in ngaihtuah ni?" 
Matthew9:5 ‘I sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh e,’ tih nge sawi awla, ‘Tho la, kein kal tawh rawh,’ tih hi?" 
Matthew9:6 “Khawvêlah hian Mihring Fapa hian sual a ngaidam thei tih ka han hriattîr ang che u,” a ti a; zeng hnênah chuan, “Tho la, i mutna kha la la, i inah haw rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:7 Tichuan, a tho va, a haw ta a." 
Matthew9:8 Mipuiin chu chu an hmuhin an hlau va, chutiang thuneihna mihringte petu Pathian chu an fak a." 
Matthew9:9 Chuta ṭanga a kal pah chuan chhiah khawnna hmuna ṭhu mi pakhat, a hming Mathaia chu Isuan a hmu a, a hnênah, “Mi zui rawh,” a ti a. Ani chu a tho va, a zui ta a." 
Matthew9:10 Isua leh a zirtîrten ina chaw an kîl laiin chhiahkhawntute leh mi sual tam tak an lo kal a, an rawn kîlpui hlawm a." 
Matthew9:11 Farisai-ten chu chu an hmuhin a zirtîrte hnênah, “Engtizia nge in zirtîrtu hian chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte zînga a ei ve le?” an ti a." 
Matthew9:12 Ani chuan a lo hria a, “Mi hrisêlten daktor an ngai lo va, mi bawrhsâwmten an ngai zâwk a ni." 
Matthew9:13 Chutichuan, ‘inthawina aiin khawngaihna ka duh e,’ tih hi eng tihna nge va zir rawh u. Mi dikte lam tûra lo kal ni lovin, mi sualte lam tûra lo kal ka ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:14 Johana zirtîrte chu a hnênah an lo kal a, “Engati nge keini leh Farisai-te hian chaw kan nghei zut a, i zirtîrte lêmin an nghei ve loh?” an ti a." 
Matthew9:15 Isuan an hnênah, “An zîngah moneitu a awm chhûng chuan mo hruaitute chu an lungngai dâwn em ni? Moneitu chu an hnên ata hruai bo hun a lo la awm ang a, chumi hunah erawh chuan chaw an la nghei ve ang." 
Matthew9:16 Tu man puan hlui, puan thar la sûk loh themin an bel ngai lo; a bel phuina tûr chuan a belna lai chu a kai thlêr zâwk ang a, a lo thlêr nasa lehzual ang." 
Matthew9:17 Uain thar pawh savun ip hluiahte an thun ngai hek lo; thun ta sela, savun chu a puakkeh ang a, uain chu a bua ang a, savun ip chu a chhia ang; uain thar chu savun ip tharahte an thun zâwk ṭhîn a ni; tichuan, him takin a awm ve ve ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:18 Chûng thu chu an hnêna a sawi laiin, ngai teh, hotu pakhat a lo kal a, kûnin chibai a bûk a, “Tûn maiah khân ka fanu a thi a; nimahsela, lo kal la, a chungah i kut nghat la, a lo nung leh ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:19 Tichuan, Isua chu a tho va, a zirtîrte nên ani chu an zui ta a." 
Matthew9:20 Hmeichhe pakhat thi pûta kum sâwm leh kum hnih dam lo a hnungah a lo kal a, a puan fêm a dek a;" 
Matthew9:21 “A puan chauh pawh dek ila ka dam mai ang,” a ti rilru a ni." 
Matthew9:22 Isua chu a han lehhawi a, ani chu a hmu a, “Ka fanu, thlamuang takin awm rawh; i rinna hi i dam phah a ni e,” a ti a. Tichuan, hmeichhia chu chumi dâr a chinah chuan a lo dam ta a." 
Matthew9:23 Isuan hotu in chu a va thleng a, phênglâwng tumte leh mipui ri mur mur a va hmuh chuan, “Kiang rawh u naupang hi a thi lo ve, a muhîl a ni zâwk e,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:24 Anni chuan an nuihsan ta mai a. 
Matthew9:25 Mipuite chu hnawh chhuah an nih hnu chuan ani chu a lût a, naupang kut chu a chelh a, a lo tho ta a." 
Matthew9:26 Chumi ram zawng zawngah chuan chu thu chu a thang chhuak ta a. 
Matthew9:27 Chuta ṭanga Isua a kal zêl chu mitdel pahnihin an zui a, “Davida Fapa, min khawngaih rawh,” tiin an au zui zêl a." 
Matthew9:28 Ina a luh chuan mitdelte chu a hnênah an lo kal a, Isuan an hnênah, “Hei hi ka tih theih in ring em?” a ti a." 
Matthew9:29 Anni chuan, “Ring e, Lalpa,” an ti a. Ani chuan an mit chu a dek a, “In rin angin in chungah lo thleng rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:30 Tichuan, an mit chu a lo vâr ta a; Isuan an hnênah, “Tu mah hrilh hauh suh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew9:31 Nimahsela, anni chu an chhuak a, chumi ram zawng zawngah chuan a chanchin an tithang ta a." 
Matthew9:32 An chhuah laiin ramhuai man ṭawngtheilo pakhat a hnênah an rawn hruai a. 
Matthew9:33 Ramhuai chu a hnawh chhuah veleh ṭawng thei lo chu a lo ṭawng thei ta a. Mipui chuan mak an ti hle a, “Israel-te zîngah hetiang hi hmuh a la ni ngai lo,” an ti a." 
Matthew9:34 Farisai-te erawh chuan, “Ramhuai lal avângin a ni ramhuaite a hnawh chhuah ṭhin ni,” an ti a." 
Matthew9:35 Isua chuan Pathian ram Chanchin Ṭha chu hrilin, natna leh chak lohna tinrêng neite tidamin khaw lian leh khaw tête a fang chhuak vek a, an sunagog-ah te a zirtîr a." 
Matthew9:36 Mipuite chu a hmuhin, vêngtu nei lo berâmte anga mangang leh chavaia an awm avângin a khawngaih ta êm êm a." 
Matthew9:37 A zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Buh seng tûr a tam tehlul nên, thawktu lah an tlêm si;" 
Matthew9:38 chutichuan, a buh seng tûra mi tîr tûrin buh neitupa dîl rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew10:1 A zirtîr Sâwmpahnihte chu a ko va, thlarau bawlhhlawhte hnawt chhuak thei tûra thuneihna leh natna leh chak lohna tinrêng tidam thei tûrin thiltihtheihna a pe a." 
Matthew10:2 Tirhkoh Sâwmpahnihte hming chu hêng hi a ni: A hmasa berah Simona, Petera an tih leh a unau Andria te, Zebedaia fa Jakoba leh a unau Johana te, Filipa leh Bartholomaia te," 
Matthew10:3 Thoma leh chhiahkhawntu Mathaia te, Alfaia fa Jakoba leh Thadaia te," 
Matthew10:4 Kanan mi Simona leh a mantîrtu Juda Iskariota te an ni. 
Matthew10:5 Chûng Sâwmpahnihte chu Isuan a tîr chhuak a, thu a pe a, “Jentail-te chu tlawh suh ula, Samari mite khaw engah mah kal hek suh u;" 
Matthew10:6 berâm bo, Israel hnam hnênah chuan kal zâwk rawh u." 
Matthew10:7 In zinnaah, “Vânram chu a lo hnai ta,” tiin hril zêl ang che u." 
Matthew10:8 Damlote tidamin mitthite kaitho ula, phârte tithianghlimin ramhuaite hnawt chhuak ang che u. A thlâwnin in hmu a, a thlâwnin pe ang che u." 
Matthew10:9 In kâwnghrênah rangkachak emaw, tangka emaw, dâr tangka emaw pai suh ula," 
Matthew10:10 zin kawng atân iptê emaw, kawr pahnih emaw, pheikhawk emaw, tiang emaw keng hek suh u; hnathawktu chu ei tûr hmu tlâk a ni si a." 
Matthew10:11 “Khaw lianah emaw, khaw tê-ah emaw, in luhna apiangah, thlenna âwm, mi zawng chhuak ula, in chhuah leh hma chu chutah chuan thleng reng ang che u." 
Matthew10:12 Ina in luhin chibai bûk ang che u. 
Matthew10:13 Chu ina mite chu chibai bûk tlâk an nih chuan in thlamuanna thu chu an chungah thleng rawh se; an tlâk loh erawh chuan in thlamuanna thu chu in chungah lo kîr leh rawh se. 
Matthew10:14 Mi tu pawhin an lo lawm loh che ua, in thu pawh an ngaihthlâk loh chuan, chu in ata emaw, chu khua ata emaw in chhuah hunin in kea vaivut chu thing thla ang che u." 
Matthew10:15 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, rorêl ni-ah chuan chu khaw tuar tûr ai chuan Sodom leh Gomora ram tuar tûr chu a ziaawm zâwk ang." 
Matthew10:16 “Ngai teh u, chinghne zînga berâm lût angin ka tirh che u hi; chuvângin, rûl anga finga, ṭhuro anga pawi khawih lovin awm ang che u." 
Matthew10:17 Amaherawhchu, mite lakah fîmkhur rawh u; Sanhedrin-ah an thlen ang che u a, an Sunagog-ahte an vua ang che u." 
Matthew10:18 Keimah avângin hotute leh lalte hmaah, anni leh Jentail-ten ka thu an hriat theih nân an la thlen ang che u." 
Matthew10:19 Nimahsela, chutia an thlen hunah che u chuan in sawi tûr leh in sawi dân tûr engto suh ang che u; in sawi tûr chu a hun takah chuan hriattîr in ni dâwn si a." 
Matthew10:20 A sawitu chu nangni in ni dâwn si lo va, nangmahnia awm Pa thlarauvin a sawi zâwk dâwn a ni." 
Matthew10:21 “Tin, unaupa in a unaupa tihhlum tûrin a mantîr ang a, pa pawhin a fa a mantîr ang; fate pawhin an nu leh pate an do vang a, an tihlum ang." 
Matthew10:22 Ka hming avângin mi zawng zawngin an hua ang che u; a tâwp thlenga tuar peih apiang erawh chu chhandam an ni ang. 
Matthew10:23 “He khuaah hian an tihduhdah hunah che u chuan khaw dangah tlân ang che u; thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Mihring Fapa a lo kal hmain Israel khuate in fang chhuak hman lo vang." 
Matthew10:24 “Zirlai chu a zirtîrtu chungah a awm lo va, bawih pawh a pu chungah a awm hek lo." 
Matthew10:25 Zirlai chu a zirtîrtu anga a awm leh, bawih chu a pu anga a awm chuan an tân a tâwk a ni. In neitupa mah Belzebula an tih chuan, a chhûngte chu an va ti lehzual dâwn êm!" 
Matthew10:26 “Chutichuan, anni chu hlau suh u; lang leh lo tûra thuhrûk eng mah a awm lo, hriat loh tûra zêp pawh eng mah a awm hek lo." 
Matthew10:27 Thima ka hrilh che u hi, êngah sawi ula, a rûka in hriat hi in chunga chuangin tlângaupui ang che u." 
Matthew10:28 Taksa tihluma thlarau tihlum thei lote chu hlau suh u; hremhmuna thlarau leh taksa tiboral theitu erawh chu hlau rawh u. 
Matthew10:29 Chawngzawng pahnih pawisa pakhatah an hralh ṭhîn lo vem ni? Nimahsela, an zînga pakhat mah in Pa hriat lohvin leiah an tla lo vang." 
Matthew10:30 In samzaite lam pawh hi chhiar vek a ni asin. 
Matthew10:31 Chuvângin, hlau suh u, chawngzawng tam tak aiin in hlu zâwk e." 
Matthew10:32 “Chutichuan, mite hmaa mi ṭan apiang kei pawhin ka Pa vâna mi hmaah ka ṭan ve ang." 
Matthew10:33 Tu pawh mite hmaa mi phat erawh chu, kei pawhin ka Pa vâna mi hmaah ka phat ve ang." 
Matthew10:34 “Leiah hian rem lêntîr tûra lo kal ka nih ring suh u, rem lêntîr tûra lo kal ka ni lo va, khandaih lêntîr tûra lo kal ka ni zâwk e." 
Matthew10:35 Fapa a pa dotîr tûr te, fanu a nu dotîr tûr te, mo a pasala nu dotîr tûr tea lo kal ka ni asin." 
Matthew10:36 Mahni hmêlma tûr chu mahni chhûngkaw zînga mi ngei an ni ang. 
Matthew10:37 Mahni nu emaw, pa emaw, fapa emaw keimah aia hmangaih zâwktu chu ka mi ni tlâk a ni lo." 
Matthew10:38 Mahni kraws pua mi zui lo chu tu mah ka mi ni tlâk an ni lo. 
Matthew10:39 Tu pawhin mahni nun humhim an tum chuan an chân ang a, keimah avânga an nun chân chuan an hmu ang." 
Matthew10:40 “Tu pawh lâwm che u chu kei mi lâwm an ni; tu pawh mi lâwm chu mi tîrtu lâwm an ni. 
Matthew10:41 Zâwlnei chu zâwlnei a nih avânga lâwm apiang chuan zâwlnei lâwmman an hmu ang; mi fel chu mi fel a nih avânga lâwm apiang chuan mi fel lâwmman an hmu ang. 
Matthew10:42 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, hêng mi tê zînga pakhat pawh hi, zirtîr an nih avânga tui vâwt no khat pawh petu tu man an lâwmman tûr an chân tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
Matthew11:1 Isuan zirtîr Sâwmpahnihte chu thu a pêk zawhin chuta ṭang chuan Galili ram khuaahte zirtîr tûr leh thu hril tûrin a kal ta a. 
Matthew11:2 Tin, tân ina awm Johana chuan, Krista thiltihte chu a lo hriatin," 
Matthew11:3 “Lo kal tûra chu i ni nge mi dang kan lo nghâk ang?” tia zâwt tûrin a zirtîrte Isua hnênah a tîr a. 
Matthew11:4 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Kal leh ta ula, in thil hmuh leh in thil hriatte hi Johana va hrilh rawh u." 
Matthew11:5 Mitdelte an mit a vâr a, kebaite keiin an kal a, phârte tihthianghlimin an awm a, bengngawngten an lo hre thei ta a, mitthite kaihthawh an ni a, pachhiate hnênah pawh Chanchin Ṭha hrilh a ni ta bawk." 
Matthew11:6 Tu pawh ka laka beidawng lo chu an nihlawh e,” a ti a." 
Matthew11:7 Chu mite chu an kal tâk veleh, Isuan mipuite hnênah Johana thu a sawi ta a, “Eng ennawm en tûrin nge thlalêrah in kal? Thli chhêm nghîn luang maw?" 
Matthew11:8 A nih loh leh, eng vânga kal nge in nih? Puan nêm sina inchei en tûrin em ni? Ngai teh u, puan nêm sinte chu lal inahte asin an awm." 
Matthew11:9 Eng vânga kal nge in nih? Zâwlnei en tûrin maw? A nih ngei kha, ka hrilh a che u, ani chu zâwlnei ai pawha ropui zâwk a ni: he mi hi alâwm," 
Matthew11:10 ‘Ngai teh, ka tirhkoh i hmaah ka tîr a, Ani chuan i hmaah i kawng a buatsaih ang,’ tia a chanchin an ziaka kha." 
Matthew11:11 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, hmeichhe hrin zîngah Baptistu Johana aia ropui zâwk an la chhuak ngai lo; amaherawhchu, vânrama mi tê ber pawh ani ai chuan an ropui zâwk a ni." 
Matthew11:12 Baptistu Johana lo awm aṭanga tûn thlengin vânram chu an bawh huai huai a, a bei vakte chu an lût ṭhîn." 
Matthew11:13 Johana lo awm thlenga Dân thu leh zâwlnei zawng zawngten an sawi lâwk kha," 
Matthew11:14 in pawm duh a nih chuan ani hi Elija, lo kal tûra chu a ni." 
Matthew11:15 Ngaihthlâkna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. 
Matthew11:16 “Amaherawhchu, tûnlai mite hi eng nên nge ka tehkhin ang? Naupang, dâwrpui hmunahte ṭhu-a, an ṭhiante auva," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Phênglâwng kan tumsak che u a, in lâm lo va, Kan ṭap vak a, in ṭap chuang bawk si lo,’ tite ang hi an ni." 
Matthew11:18 “Johana chu a lo kal a, a eiin a in lo va, ‘Ramhuai a zâwl a nih hi,’ an ti a." 
Matthew11:19 Mihring Fapa hi a lo kal a, a eiin a in a, ‘En teh u, mi vir, uain heh mi, chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte ṭhian saw,’ an ti leh si a. Pathian finzia chu a thiltihah a lang a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew11:20 An sim loh avângin thil mak a tih tamna ber khuate chu a hau ta a. 
Matthew11:21 “Nang, Korazin, i chung a pik e; nang, Bethsaida, i chung a pik e; in zînga thil mak tihte kha Tura leh Sidona tih ni se, saiip sina vut inphulin an sim tih an tilang daih tawh ang." 
Matthew11:22 Nimahsela, ka hrilh a che u, rorêl ni-ah chuan in tuar tûr aiin Tura leh Sidon tuar tûr chu a ziaawm zâwk ang." 
Matthew11:23 Nang pawh, Kapernaum, vân thlenga chawi sân i ni dâwn em ni? Mitthi khaw thlenga nam thlâk asin i nih dâwn? Nangmaha thil mak tihte kha Sodom khuaa tih ni sela chu tûn thlengin a la awm reng tûr." 
Matthew11:24 Nimahsela, ka hrilh a che u; rorêl ni-ah chuan in tuar tûr ai chuan Sodom khaw tuar tûr chu a ziaawm zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew11:25 Chumi lai chuan Isuan heti hian a ti a: “Aw, ka Pa, lei leh vân Lalpa, nangin mi fing leh mi thiamte lakah hêng thu hi i thup a, mi mâwlte hnêna i puan avângin ka fak a che." 
Matthew11:26 A ni, ka Pa, chutiang chu ṭha i tih zâwng tak a ni." 
Matthew11:27 Ka pain engkim mi kawltîr tawh; Pa chauh lo chuan tu man Fapa hi an hre lo; Pa pawh chu Fapa leh an hnêna Fapain a puan duhnate chauh lo chuan tu man an hre lo. 
Matthew11:28 “Nangni thawk rim leh phurrit phur zawng zawngte u, ka hnênah lo kal ula, keiman ka lo chawlhtîr ang che u." 
Matthew11:29 Ka nghâwngkawl bât ula, ka hnênah zir rawh u; thuhnuairawlh tak leh rilru inngaitlâwm tak ka ni si a; tichuan, in thlarau tân chawlhna in hmu ang." 
Matthew11:30 Ka nghâwngkawl chu a nuam a, ka phur pawh a zâng a ni,” tiin." 
Matthew12:1 Chûng lai chuan Isua chu sabat ni-in buhpui hmunahte a kal tlang a; zirtîrte chu an ril a ṭâm a, a vuite chu an thliak a, an ei ta a." 
Matthew12:2 Farisai-ten an hmuhin a hnênah, “En teh, i zirtîrten sabat nia tih thiang lo chu an tih hi,” an ti a." 
Matthew12:3 Ani erawh chuan an hnênah, “A ṭhiante nên an rilṭâm laia Davida thiltih kha in chhiar lo vem ni?" 
Matthew12:4 Pathian inah a lût a, amah leh a ṭhianten ei thian loh, puithiamte chauh ei thian, ‘chhang dah’ an ei thu kha?" 
Matthew12:5 A nih leh sabat ni pawh ni se Tempula puithiam awmte chuan sabat an tihbawrhbân pawhin an thiang tho tih Dân bu-ah in chhiar lo vem ni? 
Matthew12:6 Ka hrilh a che u, Tempul aia ropui zâwk hetah hian a awm." 
Matthew12:7 ‘Inthawina aiin khawngaihna ka duh e,’ tih hi engtihna nge lo hre tawh ula chuan, mi pawisawi lote chu thiam loh in chantîr lo tûr," 
Matthew12:8 Mihring Fapa hi sabat Lalpa a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Matthew12:9 Chuta ṭang chuan a kal a, sunagog-ah a va lût a." 
Matthew12:10 Ngai teh, kut zeng pakhat hi a lo awm a, Isua an hêk theih nân, “Sabat nia tihdam a thiang em?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Matthew12:11 Ani chuan an hnênah, “In zînga tu pawh hian, berâm pakhat nei ula, sabat niin khuarkhurumah tla ta sela, tu nge la chhuak lo vang che u?" 
Matthew12:12 Berâm ai chuan mihring chu a va hlu zâwk êm! Chuvângin, sabat nia thil ṭha tih hi a thiang a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew12:13 Tichuan, chu mi hnênah chuan, “I kut phar rawh,” a ti a. A han phar a, a kut lehlam angin a dam ta viah a." 
Matthew12:14 Chutichuan, Farisai-te chu an chhuak a, amah an tihboral theih dân tûr ngaihtuahin an inrâwn ta a." 
Matthew12:15 Isuan chu chu a hriatin chuta ṭang chuan a kal hrang ta a. Mi tam takin amah an zui a, an za-in a lo tidam hlawm a." 
Matthew12:16 Anni chu a chanchin puang lo tûrin a ti tlat a," 
Matthew12:17 zâwlnei Isaia hmanga a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna tûrin: 
Matthew12:18 “En teh, ka chhiahhlawh, ka thlan, ka duh tak, ka rilruin a lawm êm êma hi: A chungah ka thlarau ka dah ang; tichuan, Jentail-te hnênah rorêlna thu a puang ang." 
Matthew12:19 A hnial lo vang a, a au hek lo vang a, kawtthlêrah pawh tu man a aw an hre bawk lo vang." 
Matthew12:20 Hneh tûra rorêlna a tirh chhuah hma zawng Luang sâwp a titliak fithla lo vang a, Khâwnvâr de sêt sêt pawh a timit lo vang." 
Matthew12:21 Ama hmingah chuan Jentail-ten beiseina an nghat ang,” tih hi." 
Matthew12:22 Chumi lai chuan ramhuai man mitdel ṭawngtheilo pakhat a hnênah an rawn hruai a; a lo tidam a; chutichuan, ṭawngtheilo chu a lo ṭawng thei a, a lo hmu thei ta a." 
Matthew12:23 Mipui zawng zawng chuan mak an ti hle a, “He mi hi Davida Fapa chu a ni dâwn lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Matthew12:24 Farisai-te erawh chuan chu chu an hriatin, “He mi hian ramhuai lal Belzebula vâng lo chuan ramhuai a hnawt chhuak lo vang,” an ti a." 
Matthew12:25 Isuan an ngaihtuahte chu a lo hria a, an hnênah, “Khawii ram pawh mahni indo chu an ṭiau ṭhîn; khawii khua pawh, chhûngkua pawh, mahni indo apiang an ding khawchhuak lo vang." 
Matthew12:26 Setana pawhin Setana vêk a hnawh chhuah chuan mahni indo a ni ang a, a ram chu engtin nge a din khawchhuah ang le?" 
Matthew12:27 Keiin Belzebula vângin ramhuaite hnawt chhuak ni ila, in mite khân tu vângin nge ramhuai an lo hnawh chhuah ṭhin ni? Tichuan, anni khân asin thiam loh chantîr zâwk dâwn che u." 
Matthew12:28 Pathian Thlarau vânga ramhuai hnawt chhuak ka nih si chuan in hnênah Pathian ram chu a lo thleng ta tihna a ni. 
Matthew12:29 A nih loh leh, miin mi chak chu a phuar hmasak zet loh chuan engtin nge a ina lûtin a sum a lâksak theih ang? A phuar hnuah erawh chuan a in chu a ramsak ang." 
Matthew12:30 Ka lama ṭang lo tawh phawt chuan mi do va, mi lâk khâwmpui lo chuan a tidarh a ni." 
Matthew12:31 “Chuvâng chuan ka hrilh a che u, mite sualna zawng zawng leh Pathian pawi an sawi tinrêng te chu ngaihdam a ni ang. Thlarau pawi sawi erawh chu ngaihdam a ni ngai lo vang." 
Matthew12:32 Tu pawh, Mihring Fapa sawisêl chu ngaihdam an ni ang a, Thlarau Thianghlim sawichhia erawh chu, tûn dam chhûngah pawh, hun lo la thleng tûrah pawh ngaihdam a ni lo vang." 
Matthew12:33 “ ‘Thing ṭha chu a rah pawh a ṭha,’ in tih loh vêk leh, ‘thing chhia chu a rah pawh a chhia,’ ti ta law law che u, thing chu a rahah a hriat si a." 
Matthew12:34 Rûl thlahte u, nangnin sual nei reng chungin engtin nge thu ṭha in sawi theih ang? Thinlunga liam khawpa khat hi a ni kâin a sawi chhuah ṭhin." 
Matthew12:35 Mi ṭha chuan a ro bâwm ṭha ata thil ṭhate a phawrh chhuak ṭhîn. 
Matthew12:36 Ka hrilh a che u, miten thu lawilo an sawi apiang, chu thu chu rorêl ni-ah chuan an sawi fiah a la ṭûl ang." 
Matthew12:37 I thu chuan thiam a chantîr ang che a, i thu vêk chuan thiam loh a chantîr bawk dâwn che asin,” a ti a." 
Matthew12:38 Chumi lai chuan Dân zirtîrtute leh Farisai-te zînga mi ṭhenkhatten an chhâng a, “Zirtîrtu, i hnên ata chhinchhiahna thil mak hmuh kan duh e,” an ti a." 
Matthew12:39 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Tûnlai mi, sual tak leh uire hmang takte hian, chhinchhiahna thil mak an zawng a; nimahsela, zâwlnei Jona chhinchhiahna chauh lo chu chhinchhiahna thil mak rêng entîr an ni lo vang." 
Matthew12:40 Jona chu ni thum leh zan thum nghapui kawchhûngah a awm ang khân Mihring Fapa hi ni thum leh zan thum lei chhûngah a awm bawk dâwn a ni. 
Matthew12:41 Ninevi mite chu rorêlna ni-ah chuan tûnlai mite nên hian an ding za ang a, thiam loh an chantîr ang; Jona thu hril avângin an sim si a; ngai teh u, Jona aia ropui zâwk hetah hian a awm asin." 
Matthew12:42 Chhim lam lalnu kha rorêl ni-ah chuan tûnlai mite rual hian a tho ve ang a, thiam loh a chantîr ang; Solomona finna ngaithla tûr mahin kâwlkil ata a lo kal si a; ngai teh u, Solomona aia ropui zâwk hetah hian a awm a ni." 
Matthew12:43 “Thlarau bawlhhlawh chu mi kawchhûng ata a chhuahin chawlhna zawngin tui awm lohna hmunahte a vâk a vâk a, a hmu zo lo va." 
Matthew12:44 Tichuan, ‘Ka in, ka chhuahsan takah khân ka kîr leh mai teh ang,’ a ti a; a va thlen chuan ruaka phiah faia tihfel diamin a va hmu a." 
Matthew12:45 Tichuan, a kal a, amah aia sual hlîr thlarau dang pasarih a rawn hruai a; an lût a, chutah chuan awmhmun an khuar ta a. Chu mihring awmze hnuhnûng zâwk chu a hmasa aiin a lo chhe daih ta a ni. Chutiang bawkin, tûnlai mi, mi sual takte chungah hian a la awm ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew12:46 Mipuite hnêna thu a sawi lai chuan, a nu leh a unaute chu amah biak tumin pâwnah an ding a." 
Matthew12:47 Mi pakhatin a hnênah, “I nu leh i unauten biak tum chein pâwnah sâwn an nghâk a che,” a ti a." 
Matthew12:48 Ani erawh chuan a hrilhtu chu a chhâng a, “Ka nu chu tu nge ni? Ka unaute pawh chu tute nge ni?” a ti a." 
Matthew12:49 A zirtîrte lamah a kut a phar a, “En teh u, ka nu leh ka unaute hi!" 
Matthew12:50 Tu pawh ka Pa vâna mi duhzâwng titute chu ka unaute, ka farnu te, ka nu te an ni asin,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:1 Chumi ni chuan Isua chu in ata a chhuak a, dîl kamah a ṭhu a." 
Matthew13:2 A hnênah mipui nasa tak an lo pung khâwm a; tichuan, lawngah a chuang a, a ṭhu a; mipui zawng zawng chu ṭiauphovah an ding a." 
Matthew13:3 Thu tam tak an hnênah tehkhin thuin a sawi a: “Ngai teh u, buh chi thehtu buh chi theh tûrin a feh a." 
Matthew13:4 A han theh chuan a ṭhen kawngah a tla a, savaten an rawn tlân zo ta mai a." 
Matthew13:5 A ṭhen pialtlêp chung lei pan hmunah a tla a, lei a chhah lo va, a lo ṭo thuai a;" 
Matthew13:6 nimahsela, ni a lo tlângsâng deuh va, a em vuai a, zung a kaih theih loh avângin a râwp ta mai a." 
Matthew13:7 A ṭhen hnimhlîngnei zîngah a tla a, hnim chu a lo ṭhang a, a dîp ral ta a." 
Matthew13:8 Ṭhenkhat chu lei ṭhaah a tla a, ṭhenkhat a lêt za te, ṭhenkhat a lêt sawmruk te, ṭhenkhat a lêt sawmthum tein a lo rah ta a." 
Matthew13:9 Ngaihthlâkna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:10 Zirtîrte chu an lo kal a, a hnênah, “Engati nge an hnênah tehkhin thuin i sawi?” an ti a." 
Matthew13:11 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Vânram thu ril chu nangni hriat atân tih a ni a, an hriat atân tih a ni ve lo." 
Matthew13:12 Tu pawh a nei chu an pêk belhchhah ang a, a ngah lehzual ang; a nei lo chu a neih chhun pawh an lâksak ang." 
Matthew13:13 Chutih avâng chuan an hnênah tehkhin thuin ka sawi a ni; hmu reng chunga an hmuh ṭhin lohva, ngaithla reng chunga an hriat ṭhin lohva, an hriatthiam hek loh nân." 
Matthew13:14 Isaia hrilhlâwkna thu kha an chungah a lo thleng a nih hi: ‘In ngaithla in ngaithla ang a, a ngaihna in hre si lo vang. In hmu in hmu ang a, in hmu fuh si lo vang." 
Matthew13:15 He mite thinlung hi a lo chawlawl ta a. An bengte an chhu chhêt a, an maimitchhîng bawk a, Chuti ni lo se, an mitin an hmu ang a. An bengin an hria ang a, An thinlungin an hre bawk ang a, an hawi kîr leh ang a, Anmahni ka lo tidam tûr,’ a tih ang khân." 
Matthew13:16 “Nangni mit erawh chu a vânnei e, a hmuh ṭhin avângin; in beng pawh a vânnei e, a hriat ṭhin avângin," 
Matthew13:17 thu dik ka hrilh a che u zâwlneite leh mi fel tam tak pawhin in thil hmuhte hi hmuh an lo châk ṭhîn a, an hmu si lo; in thil hriatte pawh hi hriat an lo châk ṭhîn a, an hre si lo." 
Matthew13:18 “Chutichuan, buh chi theh tehkhin thu awmzia chu ngaithla rawh u;" 
Matthew13:19 tu pawhin Pathian ram thu chu an ngaihthlâka, an hriatthiam si loh chuan mi sual chu a lo kal a, an thinlunga theh sa chu a chhuhsak ṭhîn. Chûng mi te chu kawnga tlate chu an ni." 
Matthew13:20 Tin, pialtlêp hmuna tla chu, thu chu ngaithlaa, lâwm taka pawm nghâltu hi a ni;" 
Matthew13:21 mahse, zung a nei lo va, rei lo tê chauh a daih a; thu avânga hrehawmna emaw, tihduhdahna emaw a lo awm veleh a tlu nghâl ṭhîn." 
Matthew13:22 Hnimhlîngnei zînga tla chu thu chu a ngaithla a; nimahsela, khawvêl lungkhamna leh hausak nawmchenna chuan thu chu a dîp a, rah lovin a awm ṭhîn." 
Matthew13:23 Lei ṭhaa tla chu, thu chu ngaithlaa hrethiam hi a ni; chumi chu a rah ta ngei a, ṭhenkhat a lêt za te, ṭhenkhat a lêt sawmruk te, ṭhenkhat a lêt sawmthumtein a pung ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:24 Tehkhin thu dang an hnênah a sawi leh a; “Vânram chu, mi, a lova chi ṭha thehtu nên chuan tehkhin theih a ni." 
Matthew13:25 Zânah mi an muthilh vek hlânin, a hmêlma a lo kal a, buh zîngah chuan buh lem a theh a, a kal bo leh ta a." 
Matthew13:26 Buh chu a lo ṭo va, a vuih hun chuan buh lem chu a lo lang ta a." 
Matthew13:27 In neitu bawihte chu an lo kal a, ‘Ka pu, i lovah chi ṭha i theh lo vem ni? Buh lem saw khawi ata lo awm nge ni le?’ an ti a." 
Matthew13:28 Ani chuan, ‘Hmêlmain a lo theh a nih chu,’ a ti a. Bawihte chuan a hnênah, ‘A nih leh, chûng chu va lâwr khâwm mai ila rem i ti em?’ an ti a." 
Matthew13:29 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, ‘Ti lo ve, buh lem in lâwr khâwm zâwngin buh chu in pawt tel hlauh dah ang e." 
Matthew13:30 Buh seng thlengin ṭo za rawh se; buh seng hunah buh sengtute hnênah, ‘Buh lem chu lâwr khâwm hmasa zet ula, hâl tûrin têl rawh u; buh erawh chu ka buh inah seng lût rawh u,’ ka ti ang e,’” a ti a." 
Matthew13:31 Tehkhin thu dang a sawi leh a; “Vânram chu anṭam chi fang khat miin a lâka, a lova a theh ang hi a ni." 
Matthew13:32 Chi azawnga tê ber a ni a; mahse, a lo ṭhan sân chuan thlai dangte ai chuan a lo lian a, thing a lo ni a; chutichuan, chunglêng savate an lo kal a, a zârahte an riak ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:33 Tehkhin thu dang a sawi leh a: “Vânram chu hmeichhiain dawidim a lâka, chhangphut kho thum khat, zîngah a vaia a fan chhuah vek tûra a phul ang chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:34 Chûng zawng zawng chu Isuan tehkhin thu hmangin mipuite hnênah a sawi a, tehkhin thu lovin an hnênah eng mah a sawi lo; zâwlnei hmanga sawi kha a lo thlen theihna tûrin:" 
Matthew13:35 “Tehkhin thuin ka kâ ka âng ang a, Leilung pian tirh ata thil inthup chu ka sawi chhuak ang,” tih hi." 
Matthew13:36 Mipuite chu a kalsan a, inah chuan a lût a, a zirtîrte a hnênah an lo kal a, “Lova buh lem tehkhin thu kha min hrilh fiah teh,” an ti a." 
Matthew13:37 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Chi ṭha thehtu chu Mihring Fapa hi a ni a, lo chu khawvêl hi a ni." 
Matthew13:38 Chi ṭha chu Ram fate an ni a, buh lem erawh chu mi sual fate an ni; hmêlma, buh lem thehtu chu Diabola a ni." 
Matthew13:39 Buh seng chu khawvêl tâwp hun tûr a ni a, a sengtute chu vântirhkohte an ni." 
Matthew13:40 Tichuan, buh lemte chu an la khâwm a, meia an hâl ang hian khawvêl tâwpah chuan a la awm ang." 
Matthew13:41 Mihring Fapa hian vântirhkohte a tîr chhuak ang a, a ram ata mi titlu thei zawng zawng leh thil sual titu zawng zawng an thiar chhuak ang a," 
Matthew13:42 rawhtuina meiah an paih ang; chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, ha an ṭhial ang." 
Matthew13:43 Chumi hunah chuan mi felte chu an Pa ramah chuan ni angin an êng tawh ang. Ngaihthlâkna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. 
Matthew13:44 “Vânram chu lova ro phûm rûk ang a ni; chu chu miin a hmu a, a chhilh leh a, lâwm êm êmin a kal a, a neih zawng zawng a va hralh a, lo chu a lei ta a." 
Matthew13:45 “Vânram chu sumdâwng mi, tuikeplung ṭha tak zawngtu ang chu a ni leh a;" 
Matthew13:46 ani chuan tuikeplung hlu tak pakhat a hmu a, a neih zawng zawng a va hralh a, a lei ta a." 
Matthew13:47 “Vânram chu lênkhang, tuipuia zâr, sangha chi tinrêng fûn khâwmna ang chu a ni bawk." 
Matthew13:48 Chu chu a khah veleh vaukamah an hnûk chhuak a, an ṭhu a, a ṭha zawng bâwmah an dah khâwm a, a chhia erawh chu an paih a." 
Matthew13:49 Khawvêl tâwpah chutiang bawkin a la awm ang. Vântirhkohte an lo chhuk ang a, mi fel zîng ata mi sualte chu an hlîr ang a," 
Matthew13:50 rawhtuina meiah chuan an paih ang; chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, ha an ṭhial ang." 
Matthew13:51 “Chûng zawng zawng chu in hrethiam em?” a ti a. Anni chuan “Hrethiam e,” an ti a." 
Matthew13:52 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Chuvângin, Dân zirtîrtu, vânram thu zir tawh apiang chu, in neitu, a robâwm ata thil hlui leh thil thar phawrh chhuaktu ang hi a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew13:53 Isuan chûng tehkhin thu chu a sawi zawhin chuta ṭang chuan a kal ta a. 
Matthew13:54 An khua chu a lo thleng a, an sunagog-ah chuan anmahni a zirtîr a; tichuan, mak an ti hle a, “He mi hian he finna leh hêng thil mak tihtheihna hi khawi ata nge a hmuh?" 
Matthew13:55 He mi hi mistiri fapa kha a ni lo vem ni? A nu pawh Mari an tih kha a ni lo vem ni? A unaute pawh Jakoba te, Josefa te, Simona te, Juda te kha an ni lo vem ni? A farnute pawh kan zîngah an awm vek lo vem ni?" 
Matthew13:56 Hêng zawng zawng hi khawi aṭanga a hriat nge?” an ti a. 
Matthew13:57 Amah chu an hmu thiam ta lo va. Isuan an hnênah, “Zâwlnei chu ama khaw lamah leh a chhûngte zîngah lo chuan an chawimawi ṭhîn,” a tihsan a." 
Matthew13:58 An rin loh avângin chutah chuan thil mak a ti tam lo. 
Matthew14:1 Chumi lai vêl chuan lal Heroda chuan Isua chanchin a lo hria a," 
Matthew14:2 a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Chu mi chu Baptistu Johana kha a nih chu; mitthi zîng ata a tho leh ta zuk nia; chuvângin, chûng thiltihtheihna chuan amahah a thawk a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:3 Heroda chuan a unaupa Filipa nupui Herodi avângin Johana chu a man a, a phuar a, tân inah a lo khung reng tawh a;" 
Matthew14:4 Johanan a hnênah “Ani i neih hi a thiang lo ve,” a tihsak avâng khân." 
Matthew14:5 Ani chu tihhlum a duh a, zâwlneia an ruat avângin mipui a hlau si a." 
Matthew14:6 Amaherawhchu, Heroda pian champhaphâk ni-ah Herodi fanu chu a laiah a lâm a, Heroda chu a tilâwm ta a." 
Matthew14:7 Chuvâng chuan a dîl apiang pêk a tiam ta a. 
Matthew14:8 Ani chuan, a nu fuih angin, “Thlêngah tûnah Baptistu Johana lu mi pe rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:9 Lal chuan pawi a ti hle a; mahse, a thutiam avâng leh a chaw kîlpuite avâng chuan pêk tûr thu a pe ta a." 
Matthew14:10 Tichuan, mi a tîr a, tân ina awm Johana lu chu a tantîr a." 
Matthew14:11 A lu chu thlêngin an rawn la a, nula chu an pe a, ani chuan a nu hnênah a kalpui ta a." 
Matthew14:12 Tin, Johana zirtîrte chuan a ruang chu an va hlâwm a, an phûm a; Isua pawh an rawn hrilh a." 
Matthew14:13 Isuan a lo hriatin chuta ta chu lawngin hmun thlalêr lam panin a kal hrang ta a. Mipuiten an hriatin khua aṭangte chuan kea kalin an zui a. 
Matthew14:14 Lawng ata vaukama a chhuah chuan mipui nasa tak a hmu a, a khawngaih ta êm êm a, damlo an rawn hruaite chu a tihdamsak a." 
Matthew14:15 Tlai lam a lo nihin, zirtîrte chu a hnênah an lo kal a, “Hei hi hmun thlalêr a ni a, khua a tlai ta hle si a, khuaahte kalin an ei tûr an dap theih nân mipui hi kaltîr ta che,” an ti a." 
Matthew14:16 Isua erawh chuan, “An kal a ngai lo ve, nangmahnin ei tûr pe rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:17 Anni chuan, “Hetah hian chhang panga leh sangha pahnih chauh lo chu eng mah dang kan nei lo,” an ti a." 
Matthew14:18 Ani chuan, “Ka hnênah han la teh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:19 Hlobet chunga ṭhu tûrin mipui chu thu a pe a, chhang panga leh sangha pahnih chu a la a, vân lam enin mal a sâwm a, a phel a, chhang chu zirtîrte a pe a, zirtîrte chuan mipuite chu an pe a." 
Matthew14:20 An za chuan an ei a, an tlai ta a. An sem bâng chu an la khâwm a, bâwm sâwm leh pahnih khat a ni." 
Matthew14:21 A eitute chu hmeichhia leh naupang tiam lovin patling hlîr pawh sângnga lai an ni. 
Matthew14:22 Mipui chu a ṭîntîr vêl chhûngin râl lehlama lo va kai hmasa tûrin zirtîrte chu lawngah a chuan luihtîr a. 
Matthew14:23 Mipui a ṭîntîr hnu chuan ṭawngṭai tûrin tlângah a kal hrang a; tin, khua a lo thimin chutah chuan amah chauhvin a awm ta a." 
Matthew14:24 Lawng erawh chu dîlah, vaukam aṭanga hla takah a awm tawh a, thliin a ni lo zâwngin a nem a, tuifâwnin a vawrh a vawrh a." 
Matthew14:25 Khawfîng chah dâwn laiin dîl chungah an lam panin a lo kal a. 
Matthew14:26 Zirtîrten dîl chunga a kal an han hmuh chuan, “Hmuithla a nih saw,” tiin an thlaphâng a, hlauvin an au ta chûl a." 
Matthew14:27 Mahse, Isuan anni chu a be thuai a, “Thlamuang takin awm rawh u, keimah ka ni e, hlau suh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:28 Petera chuan a chhâng a, “Lalpa, nang i nih chuan tui chunga i hnêna kal thu mi pe rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew14:29 Ani chuan, “Lo kal ta che,” a ti a. Petera chu lawng ata a chhuak a, Isua lam panin tui chungah chuan kein a kal a." 
Matthew14:30 Nimahsela, thli tleh chu a hmuhin a hlau va, a pil dâwn a, “Lalpa, mi chhanhim rawh,” tiin a au ta a." 
Matthew14:31 Isuan a ban ta nghâl a, amah chu a va chelh a, a hnênah, “Nang rin tlêm, engah nge i rinhlelh le?” a ti a." 
Matthew14:32 Lawnga an luh chuan thli chu a bâng ta mai a. 
Matthew14:33 Lawnga awmte chuan, “Pathian Fapa a lo nih takzet hi,” tiin, amah chu kûnin chibai an bûk a." 
Matthew14:34 Dîl an kân a, Genesaret ramah chuan an kai a." 
Matthew14:35 Chumi hmuna mite chuan ani chu an lo hria a, an kiang vêl ram zawng zawngah chuan mi an tîr a, damlo zawng zawng a hnênah an rawn hruai a;" 
Matthew14:36 a puan fêm tal deh an ngên chiam a; tin, a dek apiang chu an dam ta zêl a." 
Matthew15:1 Chumi lai chuan Jerusalem aṭangin Farisai te leh Dan zirtîrtute chu Isua hnênah an lo kal a. 
Matthew15:2 “Engati nge i zirtîrten upate thu rochhiah an bawhchhiat ṭhin? Chaw an eiin an kut an sil ngai lo,” an ti a." 
Matthew15:3 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Nangni pawhin engati nge in thu rochhiah avânga Pathian thupêk in bawhchhiat ni?" 
Matthew15:4 Pathian chuan, ‘I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; mahni nu emaw, pa emaw sawichhia chu a thi ngei tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
Matthew15:5 Nangni erawh chuan ‘Tu pawh, a nu emaw, a pa emaw hnêna i mi chhawrna tûr zawng zawng chu Pathian hnêna pêk a ni tawh, titu chuan a nu leh a pa a chawimawi a ngai tawh lo’ in ti ṭhîn." 
Matthew15:6 Tichuan, in thu rochhiah avâng hian Pathian thu chu in bawh bo a nih hi." 
Matthew15:7 Vervêkte u, Isaian hetia in chungchâng thu a lo sawi lâwk hi a tidik ngawt mai:" 
Matthew15:8 ‘He mite hian an hmuiin mi chawimawi a, An thinlung erawh chuan mi hlat si." 
Matthew15:9 Thurin ang hrimin mihring thupêkte an zirtîr a, An mi biakna hi a thlâwn mai a ni,’ tih hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:10 Tin, mipui chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Ngaithla ula, hre fiah rawh u." 
Matthew15:11 Kâa lût chuan mihring a tibawlhhlawh lo va, kâa chhuak chuan, chu ngei chuan mihring a tibawlhhlawh zâwk ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:12 Chumi lai chuan a zirtîrte an lo kal a, a hnênah, “Farisai-ten kha thu kha an hriatin an lungnih loh hle kha i hria em?” an ti a." 
Matthew15:13 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, “Kûng eng pawh, ka Pa vâna mi phun loh chu pawh chhuah a ni ang." 
Matthew15:14 Anni chu pawisa suh u, hruaitu mitdel an ni. Mitdelin mitdel vêk a hruai chuan khuarkhurumah an tla dûn ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:15 Peteran a chhâng a, “Tehkhin thu kha min hrilh fiah ta che,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:16 Ani chuan, “Nangni pawh chuti êma mâwl in la ni cheu elo?" 
Matthew15:17 Kâa lût apiang chu pumah a tla thla a, dailênnaah paih chhuah a ni tih in hre lâwm ni?" 
Matthew15:18 Kâa chhuakte erawh chu thinlung aṭanga lo chhuak a ni a, chûng ngei chuan mihring a tibawlhhlawh ṭhîn a ni." 
Matthew15:19 Thinlung aṭang hian ngaihtuahna sual te, tualthahna te, uirena te, inngaihna te, rûkrûkna te, dâwta hêk te, Pathian pawisawina te a lo chhuak si ṭhîn a." 
Matthew15:20 Chûng chu mihring tibawlhhlawhtu chu a ni; kut sil lova chaw ei erawh hi chuan mi a tibawlhhlawh lo ve,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:21 Chuta ṭang chuan Isua a chhuak a, Tura leh Sidon khaw bialah a kal ta a." 
Matthew15:22 Ngai teh, chûng lai rama mi, Kanan hmeichhe pakhat a lo kal a, “Lalpa, Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh, ka fanu ramhuaiin a man tlat a ni,” tiin a au va." 
Matthew15:23 Ani erawh chuan kam khat mahin a chhâng lo. A zirtîrte chuan, “Kan hnungah a au a au si a, kaltîr mai rawh,” tiin an rawn ngên a." 
Matthew15:24 Ani erawh chuan, “Berâm bo, Israel hnam hnênah lo chuan tirh ka ni lo ve,” a ti a, a chhâng a." 
Matthew15:25 Nimahsela, hmeichhia chu a lo kal a, “Lalpa, mi pui rawh,” tia kûnin chibai a rawn bûk a." 
Matthew15:26 Ani chuan, “Fate chaw lâksaka uite hnêna pêk chu a âwm lo ve,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:27 Ani chuan, “A ni khawp mai, Lalpa; nimahsela, uite pawhin an pu dawhkân ata ei nawi tla chu an ei ṭhîn alâwm,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:28 Chu veleh Isuan a chhâng a, “Hmeichhia, i ring nasa êm mai a, i duh ang takin i chungah thleng rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, a fanu chu chumi a chinah chuan a lo dam ta a." 
Matthew15:29 Chuta ṭang chuan Isua a chhuak a, Galili dîl kam a hrût a; tlângah a chho va, chutah chuan a ṭhu ta a." 
Matthew15:30 Kebai te, piangsual te, mitdel te, ṭawngtheilo te leh mi dang tam tak rawn hruaiin mipui nasa tak an lo kal a, a ke bulah an dah a; ani chuan a lo tidam ta hlawm a." 
Matthew15:31 Mipui chuan ṭawngtheilote chu lo ṭawnga, piangsualte chu lo ṭhaa, kebaite chu kea kala, mitdelte mit lo vâr zo ta chu an hmuhin mak an ti hle a; tichuan, Israel-te Pathian chu an fak a." 
Matthew15:32 Isuan a zirtîrte chu a ko va, “Mipuiho hi ka khawngaih êm êm a ni, ka hnênah ni thum an awm tawh a, ei tûr lah an nei tawh si lo, rilṭâma hawtîr mai ka hreh a ni; chutilo chu, kawng lakah an ṭâmchhâwl dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Matthew15:33 Zirtîrte chuan a hnênah, “Thlalêrah mipui heti zozai hraina khawp chhang khawi ata nge kan hmuh ang?” an ti a." 
Matthew15:34 Isuan an hnênah, “Chhang eng zât nge in neih?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Pasarih, sangha tlêm tê nên,” an ti a." 
Matthew15:35 Tichuan, mipui chu leia ṭhu tûrin thu a pe a." 
Matthew15:36 Chhang pasarih leh sanghate chu a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin a phel a, zirtîrte a pe a, zirtîrte chuan mipui chu an pe a." 
Matthew15:37 An vaiin an ei a, an tlai ta hlawm a, an sem bâng chu bâwm sarihah an dah khat a." 
Matthew15:38 A eitute chu hmeichhia leh naupang tiam lovin patling ngawt pawh sângli an ni a. 
Matthew15:39 Mipui chu a ṭîntîr hnuin lawngah a chuang a, Magadan ramah a kal ta a." 
Matthew16:1 Farisai-te leh Sadukai-te a hnênah an lo kal a, amah fiah nân vân ata chhinchhiahna thil mak entîr tûrin an rawn ngên a." 
Matthew16:2 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, “Tlai lam a lo nihin, ‘khua a ṭha dâwn a ni ang, kâwl a sen êm mai,’ in ti ṭhîn." 
Matthew16:3 Zîngah pawh, ‘Vawiin chu khua a chhe dâwn a ni ang, kâwl a sen a, khua a dur êm mai,’ in ti ṭhîn a; khaw awmzia in hrethiam si a, hun chhinchhiahnate erawh chu in hrethiam thei si lo." 
Matthew16:4 Tûnlai mi, mi sual tak leh uire hmang takte hian chhinchhiahna thil mak an zawng ṭhîn a; nimahsela, Jona chhinchhiahna chauh lo chu chhinchhiahna thil mak rêng entîr an ni lo vang,” a ti a. Anni chu a kalsan a, a kal ta daih a." 
Matthew16:5 Zirtîrten râl lehlam an thlen chuan chhang an lo ken theihnghilh a. 
Matthew16:6 Isuan an hnênah, “Farisai-te leh Sadukai-te dawidim lakah chuan invêng ula, fîmkhur rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew16:7 “Chhang kan keng hauh lo mai le,” tiin anmahni zîngah chuan an sawi ta a." 
Matthew16:8 Isuan chu chu a hriatin, “Rin tlêmte u, engati nge chhang in neih loh thu ngawt in buaipui tâk?" 
Matthew16:9 Tûnah pawh in la hrethiam lo cheu maw? Mi sângnga tâna chhang panga leh a bâng in dah zât kha in la hre reng lâwm ni? 
Matthew16:10 Mi sângli tâna chhang pasarih leh a bâng in dah zât pawh kha? 
Matthew16:11 Chhang thu in hnênah ka sawi lo tih engtizia nge in hriat loh? Farisai-te leh Sadukai-te dawidim lakah erawh chuan fîmkhur rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew16:12 Chu veleh, chhang dawidim lakah ni lovin, Farisai-te leh Sadukai-te zirtîrna laka fîmkhur tûrin anmahni a hrilh a ni tih an hre ta a." 
Matthew16:13 Isuan Filipa Kaisari bial a lo thlen chuan, “Miten Mihring Fapa hi tu nge a ni an tih?” tiin a zirtîrte chu a zâwt a." 
Matthew16:14 Anni chuan, “Ṭhenkhatin, ‘Baptistu Johana,’ an ti a, ṭhenkhatin, ‘Elija,’ an ti a, ṭhenkhatin ‘Jeremia emaw, zâwlnei tu-a emaw,’ an ti,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Matthew16:15 Ani chuan an hnênah, “A nih nangnin tu nge nia mi hriat?” a ti a." 
Matthew16:16 Simon Petera chuan a chhâng a, “Krista, Pathian nung Fapa chu i ni e,” a ti a." 
Matthew16:17 Isuan a hnênah, “Simon Barjona, i nihlawh e, mihringin an hrilh lo che a, ka Pa vâna miin a hriattîr che a ni zâwk e." 
Matthew16:18 Tin, nang, Petera i ni tih ka hrilh bawk a che; he lungpui chungah hian ka kohhran ka rem chho vang a, mitthi khaw kulh kawngkhârte chuan a ngam lo vang." 
Matthew16:19 Vânram chabite ka pe ang che a, lei chungah eng pawh i phuar apiang vânah phuar a ni ang a, lei chungah eng pawh i phelh apiang vânah phelh a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew16:20 Chumi zawhah chuan Krista a ni tih tu mah hrilh lo tûrin a zirtîrte chu a ti tlat a. 
Matthew16:21 Chumi a chinah chuan Isuan Jerusalem-a a kal tûr thu te, upate, puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute lakah thil tam tak a tuar tûr thu te, tihhluma a awm tûr leh ni thum ni-a kaihthawha a awm tûr thu te zirtîrte chu a hriattîr ṭan ta a." 
Matthew16:22 Peteran ani chu a hruai hrang a, “Lalpa, ni lul lo ve; chûng chu i chungah thleng tawp suh se,” tiin a zilhhau ta a." 
Matthew16:23 Ani erawh chuan Petera hnênah, “Setan, kal bo daih rawh, ka tân tlûkna i ni, Pathian duh dâna ngaihtuah lovin, mihring duh dânin i ngaihtuah a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew16:24 Isuan a zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Tu pawh mi zui duh chuan, mahni inngaihtuah chang lovin, mahni kraws puin mi zui rawh se." 
Matthew16:25 Tu pawh mahni nun humhim tum chuan an chân ang a, tu pawh keimah avânga nun chân chuan an hmu ang." 
Matthew16:26 Miin khawvêl hi a pumin nei sela, a nun chân si se, a tân sâwtna eng nge awm ang? A nih leh, miin a nun aiah eng nge a pêk ang?" 
Matthew16:27 Mihring Fapa hi vântirhkohte nên, a Pa ropuina nên a lo kal dâwn si a; chumi hunah chuan mi tin an thiltih ang zêlin a rûl ṭheuh vang." 
Matthew16:28 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, heta dingho ṭhenkhat hi, Mihring Fapa a rama lo kal an hmuh hma chu thi lo tûr an awm,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:1 Tin, ni ruk hnuah chuan Isuan Petera te, Jakoba te, Johana te a hruai hrang a, tlâng sâng takah a chhohpui a." 
Matthew17:2 An hmaah chuan a hmêl lan dân chu a lo danglam ta a; a hmêl ni angin a lo êng a, a silhfênte chu a êngin a lo vâr ta sur a." 
Matthew17:3 Ngai teh, Mosia leh Elija chu an hnênah an inlâr a, Isua nên an inbia a." 
Matthew17:4 Petera chuan Isua hnênah, “Lalpa, heta kan awm hi a ṭha e; i duh chuan bawktê pathum ka khawh ang e; i tân pakhat, Mosia tân pakhat, Elija tân pakhat,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:5 A la sawi lai mêkin chhûm vâr tak a lo zîng a, anni chu a khuh a. Chhûm aṭang chuan awin, “Hei hi ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka, ka lawm êm êma chu a ni; ama thu hi ngai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:6 Zirtîrte chuan chu chu an hriatin an bawkkhup a, an hlau êm êm a." 
Matthew17:7 Isuan anni chu a rawn dek a, “Tho ula, hlau suh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:8 An han dâk chhuak a, Isua chauh lo chu tu mah an hmu ta lo va." 
Matthew17:9 Tlâng aṭanga an chhuk laiin Isuan an hnênah, “Mihring Fapa hi mitthi zîng ata a thawh leh hma chu in thil hmuh kha tu mah hrilh suh u,” tiin thu a pe ta a." 
Matthew17:10 Zirtîrte chuan a hnênah, “Dân zirtîrtuten, ‘Elija a lo kal hmasa zet tûr a ni,’ engtiziaa ti si nge an nih le?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Matthew17:11 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Elija chu lo kal tûr rêng a ni, engkim a siam ṭha ang." 
Matthew17:12 Nimahsela, ka hrilh a che u, Elija chu a lo kal tawh reng a; amah chu an hre lo va, a chungah an duh duhin an tih kha. Chutiang bawkin Mihring Fapa pawh hian an kut a tuar ve dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:13 Tichuan, zirtîrte chuan Baptistu Johana thu an hnênah a sawi a ni tih an hre ta a." 
Matthew17:14 Tin, mipui hnên an zu thlen chuan mi pakhat a hnênah a lo kal a, a hmaah a ṭhingṭhi a." 
Matthew17:15 “Lalpa, ka fapa saw khawngaih ang che; thla-em-ât a ni a, a tuar nasa êm mai; vawi tam tak meiah a tlu tawh a, vawi tam tak tuiah a tlu bawk ṭhîn." 
Matthew17:16 I zirtîrte hnênah ka rawn hruai a, an tidam thei si lo,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:17 Isuan a chhâng a, “Tûnlai mi, rinna tlachham leh tihmawhte u, eng chen nge in zîngah ka awm ang a, eng chen nge ka dawhtheih dâwn che u? Ka hnênah han hruai teh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:18 Isuan ramhuai chu a hau va, a chhûng ata a chhuak ta a; chumi dârkâr aṭang chuan naupang chu a dam ta a." 
Matthew17:19 Zirtîrte chu a hnênah a fâlin an lo kal a, “Eng vângin nge keinin kan hnawh chhuah theih loh?” an ti a." 
Matthew17:20 Ani chuan an hnênah, “In rinna a tlêm vâng a ni. Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, anṭam chi fang khat ang rinna in neih chuan, he tlâng hnênah hian, ‘Heta ṭang hian sawtah sâwn insawn rawh,’ in ti ang a, a insawn mai ang. Tih theih loh rêng in nei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Galili ram an fan laiin Isuan an hnênah, “Mihring Fapa hi mihringte kutah mantîr a ni dâwn a, an tihlum ang a," 
Matthew17:23 ni thum ni-ah kaihthawhin a awm ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, an lungngai ta êm êm a." 
Matthew17:24 Kapernaum an lo thlen chuan Tempul chhiah khawntute chu Petera hnênah an lo kal a, “In zirtîrtu hian Tempul chhiah a chawi ve ṭhîn lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Matthew17:25 Ani chuan, “Chawi ṭhîn e,” a ti a. Ina a va luh chuan Isuan a hnênah, “Simon, engtin nge i ngaih? Leia lalten bungraw chhiah emaw, lu chhiah emaw tu lakah nge an lâk ṭhin, an fate lakah nge mi hrang lakah?” tiin a lo sawi khalh a." 
Matthew17:26 Petera chuan, “Mi hrang lakah,” a tih veleh Isuan a hnênah, “Chu! An fate chuan chhiah an âwl alâwm." 
Matthew17:27 Nimahsela nang, dîlah va kal la, nghakuai chiah la, sangha âwk hmasa ber chu la rawh; a kâ keu la, chêng hnih i hmu ang; chu chu la la, kei leh nanga tân anni chu pe rawh; chutilo chuan, anni chu kan tilungni lo dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Matthew18:1 Chumi lai chuan zirtîrte chu Isua hnênah an lo kal a, “Vânramah tu nge ropui ber ang le?” an ti a." 
Matthew18:2 Ani chuan naupang tê hi a ko va, an hmaah a dintîr a," 
Matthew18:3 “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, in inlamlêta naupang tê ang hi in nih loh chuan vânramah in lût tawp lo vang." 
Matthew18:4 Chutichuan, inngaitlâwma he naupang anga awm chu, vânrama ropui ber a ni ang." 
Matthew18:5 Tu pawh ka hming avânga hetiang naupang tê pakhat pawh lâwm chu keimah mi lâwm an ni. 
Matthew18:6 Amaherawhchu, tu pawh hêng mi ringtu zînga tê ber pakhat pawh titlu chu an nghâwngah chhangphut râwt lung lian pui awrhtîrin, tuifinriat thûk laia thlâk ni se an tân a hlâwk daih zâwk ang." 
Matthew18:7 “Tlûknate avângin khawvêl hi a va pik êm! Tlûknate hi awm tûr rêng zawng a ni; nimahsela, tlûkna awmtîrtu chung chu a pik e." 
Matthew18:8 I kutin emaw, i kein emaw a tihtlûk che chuan tan la, paih daih rawh; kut khing hnih emaw, ke pahnih emaw neia kumkhaw meia paih nih ai chuan, piangsualin emaw, ke baiin emaw nunnaa luh chu i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Matthew18:9 I mitin a tihtlûk che chuan kher chhuak la, paih daih rawh; mit khinghnih neia hremhmun meia paih nih ai chuan, mit khing khat chauh neia nunnaa luh i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Matthew18:10 “Hêng mi tête zînga pakhat pawh hi hmusit lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u, vâna an vântirhkohten ka Pa vâna mi hmêl an hmu reng ṭhîn tih ka hrilh che u hi." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 “Engtin nge in ngaih? Miin berâm za nei se, an zînga pakhat chu vâk bo sela, sawmkua leh pakuate chu tlânga hnutchhiahin a bo zawng tûrin tu nge kal lo vang?" 
Matthew18:13 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, a hmuh leh hlauh chuan sawmkua leh pakua vâk bo lote chungah ai chuan a chungah a lâwm zâwk ang." 
Matthew18:14 Chutiang bawkin hêng mi tête zînga pakhat boral pawh hi in Pa vâna mi duhzâwng a ni lo ve. 
Matthew18:15 “I unauvin i chungah thil sual ti sela, kal la, in pahnih chauhva hriatah zilh ang che, a ngaihthlâk che chuan i unau chu i hmin a ni ang." 
Matthew18:16 A ngaihthlâk loh che erawh chuan mi dang pakhat emaw, pahnih emaw hruai ang che; chutichuan, in thu zawng zawng chu hretu pahnih emaw, pathum emaw kâa tihngheh a ni thei ang." 
Matthew18:17 Tin, anni chu a ngaihthlâk duh loh chuan kohhran hnênah thlen ang che; kohhran pawh chu a ngaihthlâk duh loh chuan ani chu i tân Jentail leh chhiahkhawntu ang ni rawh se." 
Matthew18:18 “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, lei chungah eng pawh in phuar apiang vânah phuar a ni ang a, lei chunga eng pawh in phelh apiang vânah phelh a ni ang." 
Matthew18:19 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, lei chungah hian in zînga mi pahnihin inrema eng thu-ah pawh an ṭawngṭai chuan, ka Pa vâna miin a tihsak ang." 
Matthew18:20 Mi pahnih emaw, pathum emaw ka hminga an ṭhut khâwm apiangin an zîngah ka awm si ṭhîn a,” a ti a." 
Matthew18:21 Chumi lai chuan Petera a lo kal a, “Lalpa, ka unauvin vawi eng zât nge ka chungah thil tisual sela ka ngaihdam ang? Vawi sarih thleng em ni ang?” a ti a." 
Matthew18:22 Isuan a hnênah, “Vawi sarih thlengin ka ti lo va che, vawi sarih hmun sawmsarih thlengin ka ti zâwk che a ni." 
Matthew18:23 “Chumi avâng chuan vânram chu, lalber tu emaw a bawihte hnêna sum chungchâng tihfel tum nên chuan tehkhin a ni." 
Matthew18:24 A han tihfel chuan mi pakhat, talent sîngkhat ba a hnênah an rawn hruai a;" 
Matthew18:25 rulhna a neih loh avângin a pu chuan amah leh a nupui nên, a fate leh a neih zawng zawng chu hralha rulh tûr thu a pe a." 
Matthew18:26 Chutichuan, bawih chuan lei siin chibai a bûk a, ‘Ka chungah zahngai rih la, a za-in ka rûl vek ang che,’ a ti a." 
Matthew18:27 Tichuan, chu bawih chu a pu chuan a khawngaih ta êm êm a, a thlah a, a bat chu a ngaidam ta a." 
Matthew18:28 Nimahsela, chu bawih chu a kal chhuak a, a bawihpui zînga pakhat a duli za ba a va hmu a, a man a, a hrawkah a rêk a, ‘I bat kha mi pe rawh,’ a ti a." 
Matthew18:29 A bawihpui chuan, ‘Ka chungah zahngai rih la, ka la rûl ang che,’ tiin kûnin a ngên chiam a." 
Matthew18:30 Nimahsela, a duh lo va, a bat chu a tlâk hma zawng tân inah a khung ta a." 
Matthew18:31 A bawihpuite chuan a thil tih dân chu an hmuhin pawi an ti êm êm a; a thiltih zawng zawng chu an pu an va hrilh a. 
Matthew18:32 Chu veleh a pu chuan ani chu a ko va, a hnênah, ‘Bawih sual, i ngen chiam avângin i bat zawng zawng kha ka ngaidam a," 
Matthew18:33 ka khawngaih che ang khân i bawihpui chu i khawngaih ve tûr a ni lâwm ni?’ a ti a. 
Matthew18:34 A pu chu a thinur ta a, a bat zawng zawng a tlâk hma chuan nghaisatute a pe ta a." 
Matthew18:35 Mi tinin thinlung taka in unaute in ngaihdam loh chuan, ka Pa vâna mi pawhin chutiang bawkin in chungah a ti ve ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:1 Isuan chûng thu chu a sawi zawhin Galili ram ata a chhuak a, Jordan râla Judai ramah chuan a kal ta a." 
Matthew19:2 Mipui nasa takin an zui a, chumi hmunah chuan a lo tidam hlawm a." 
Matthew19:3 Farisai-te a hnênah an lo kal a, amah fiah nân, “Eng vâng pawhin miin a nupui a mâk a thiang em?” an ti a." 
Matthew19:4 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “A tîr ata Siamtu chuan hmeichhia leh mipaah a siam a," 
Matthew19:5 ‘chumi avâng chuan mipain a nu leh pa a thlah ang a, a nupui a vuan ang; tichuan, an pahnih chuan tisa pumkhat an lo ni tawh ang,’ a tih hi in chhiar lo vem ni?"
