Matthew19:6 Chutichuan, pahnih an ni tawh lo va, tisa pumkhat an ni tawh zâwk a ni. Pathianin a zawm tawh avângin mihringin ṭhen suh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:7 Anni chuan a hnênah, “A nih leh, engati nge Mosian inmâkna lehkha pea mâk theih thu a pêk si?” an ti a." 
Matthew19:8 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Mosian in thinlung sak avângin in nupui mâk a phal a ni; nimahsela, a tîr ata chutiang a ni si lo." 
Matthew19:9 Kei chuan ka hrilh a che u, tu pawh uire vâng ni lova a nupui maa mi dang neitu chu a uire a ni. Mâk hnu nei pawh a uire a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:10 Zirtîrte chuan a hnênah, “Chutiang chu nupa chungchânga mipa dinhmun a nih si chuan inneih hi a ṭha lo ve,” an ti a." 
Matthew19:11 Ani erawh chuan, “Chu thu chu mi zawng zawngin an pawm thei lo, a pêkate chauh lo chuan." 
Matthew19:12 Mi tilreh, nu pum chhûng aṭanga chutianga piang rêng an awm a; mihring kuta reh an awm bawk a; vânram avânga tilreha insiam chawp an awm bawk a. Tu pawh a zâwm thei chuan zâwm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:13 Chumi lai chuan an chunga kut nghata a ṭawngṭaisak tûrin a hnênah naupang tê tê an rawn hruai a; zirtîrte chuan an lo hnar a. 
Matthew19:14 Isua erawh chuan, “Naupangte ka hnênah han kaltîr ula, hnar suh u; vânram chu hêng ang mite ta hi a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:15 An chungah a kut a nghat a, chuta ta chu a kal ta a." 
Matthew19:16 Mi pakhat a hnênah a lo kal a, “Zirtîrtu chatuan nun ka neih theih nân eng thil ṭha nge ka tih ang?” a ti a." 
Matthew19:17 Ani chuan, “Thil ṭha engah nge mi zawh? Ṭha chu pakhat chauh a awm, Nunnaa luh i duh chuan thupêkte chu zâwm rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:18 Ani chuan, “A engte hi maw?” a ti a. Isuan, “Tual i that tûr a ni lo; i uire tûr a ni lo; i ru tûr a ni lo; dâwtin i hêk tûr a ni lo;" 
Matthew19:19 i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh, tihte leh, nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte i hmangaih tûr a ni, tihte hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:20 Tlangvâl chuan a hnênah, “Chûng zawng zawng chu ka zâwm ṭhîn, eng nge ka la bâk?” a ti a." 
Matthew19:21 Isuan, “Ṭhat famkim i duh chuan, kal la, i thil neihte hralh la, pachhiate pe rawh; chutichuan, vânah ro i nei dâwn nia; tin, lo kal la, mi zui ang che,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:22 Chu thu chu a hriatin tlangvâl chuan beidawng takin a kalsan ta a, sum ngah tak a ni si a." 
Matthew19:23 Isuan a zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u; mi hausa tân vânram chu luh harsa tak a ni." 
Matthew19:24 Ka hrilh leh a che u, Pathian rama mi hausa an luh aiin hriau benga sanghâwngsei luh tlang a awl zâwk,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:25 Zirtîrten an hriat chuan mak an ti êm êm a, “Chuti chu tu nge chhandam ni thei ang le?” an ti a." 
Matthew19:26 Isuan anni chu a en reng a, an hnênah, “Chu chu mihring tân tih rual a ni lo va, Pathian tân erawh chuan engkim tih theih a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew19:27 Peteran a chhâng a, “Ngai teh, keini lahin engkim kalsanin kan zui ta che a, eng nge kan hmuh ang le?” a ti a." 
Matthew19:28 Isuan an hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Hun Tharah chuan, mihring Fapa a lalṭhutthlêng ropui taka a ṭhut hunah, nangni mi zuitute pawh hi Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih chunga rorêlin lalṭhutthlêng sâwm leh pahnihah in la ṭhu ve ang." 
Matthew19:29 Tu pawh ka hming avânga inte emaw, unaute emaw, farnute emaw, pa emaw, nu emaw, fate emaw, ramte emaw kalsan chuan a lêt za an hmu ang; chatuan nun an la chang bawk ang." 
Matthew19:30 “Mi tam tak hmasa bera awmte chu hnuhnûng ber an la ni ang a, hnuhnûng bera awmte pawh hmasa ber an la ni ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:1 “Vânram chu in neitupa grep huana hnathawktu ruai tûra zîng taka thawk chhuak ang chu a ni. 
Matthew20:2 Hnathawktute nên ni khata duli hlawha an inrem veleh a grep huanah a tîr ta a. 
Matthew20:3 Dâr kaw vêlah a chhuak leh a, dâwrpuia mi dang ding mai mai a hmu a;" 
Matthew20:4 an hnênah, ‘Nangni pawh grep huanah va kal ve tawh u; a âwm tâwk apiang ka pe ang che u,’ a ti a." 
Matthew20:5 An kal ta a. Chhûn laiah leh tlai dâr thum vêlah pawh a chhuak a, chutiang bawkin a ti leh a." 
Matthew20:6 Tlai dâr nga vêlah a va chhuak leh a, mi dang dingte a hmu a, an hnênah, ‘Engati nge nilênga heta in din mai mai?’ a ti a." 
Matthew20:7 Anni chuan, ‘Tu man min ruai hek lo,’ an ti a. Ani chuan, ‘Nangni pawh grep huanah va kal ve rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Matthew20:8 “Tlaiah chuan a huan enkawltu hnênah, ‘Hnathawktute kha ko la, a hnuhnûng bera ṭanin a hmasa ber thlengin an hlawh pe rawh,’ a ti a." 
Matthew20:9 Tlai dâr nga vêla rawihte chu an lo kal a, duli an dawng ṭheuh va." 
Matthew20:10 A hmasa berte chu an lo kal a, dawn tam deuh an inring a; nimahsela, duli bawk an dawng ta a." 
Matthew20:11 An hlawh an han dawn chuan in neitupa chungah an phunnawi ta a. 
Matthew20:12 ‘Hêng hnuhnûng berte hian dârkâr khat chauh an thawk a, keini chhûn ni sa tuara thawk nilêngte tlukin i siam si,’ an ti a." 
Matthew20:13 “Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, an zînga pakhat hnênah chuan, ‘ṭhiana, i chungah ka tidik lo hlei nêm; duli hlawhah kan inrem lo vem ni?" 
Matthew20:14 I ta kha la la, kal mai rawh; ka pêk che ang bawk kha hêng thawk hnuhnûng berte pawh hi ka pe duh a ni." 
Matthew20:15 Ka ta na na na chu ka duh duha ka tih a thiang lo vem ni? A nih loh leh kei ka ṭhat avângin i vui a ni maw?’ a ti a. 
Matthew20:16 Chutiangin hnuhnûng berte chu hmasa ber an la ni ang a, hmasa berte pawh hnuhnûng ber an la ni ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:17 Jerusalem-a a chhoh dâwn laiin Isuan a zirtîr Sâwmpahnihte chu a hruai hrang a, kalkawngah chuan an hnênah," 
Matthew20:18 “Ngai teh u, Jerusalem-ah kan chhoh dâwn hi: Mihring Fapa hi puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute hnênah an mantîr dâwn a ni." 
Matthew20:19 Anni chuan thi tûrin a chungah thu an titlu ang a, nuihza siam nâna hman tûr leh vuak tûr leh khenbeh tûrin Jentail-te hnênah an hlân ang; tin, ni thum nia kaihthawh a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:20 Chumi lai chuan Zebedaia nupui chu, a fate hruaiin Isua hnênah a lo kal a, ṭhingṭhiin chibai a bûk a, thil eng emaw a dîl a." 
Matthew20:21 Ani chuan, “Eng nge i duh?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ka fapa pahnihte hi i ramah, i ding lamah pakhat, i vei lamah pakhat an ṭhut theih nân thu pe ta che,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:22 Isuan a chhâng a, “In thil dîl hi in hre lo va ni. Ka no in tûr chu in in thei dâwn em ni?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Thei ang,” an ti a." 
Matthew20:23 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Ka no chu in in ngei ang; nimahsela, ka ding lam emaw, ka vei lam emawa ṭhuttîr chu ka thu a ni lo va, ka Pa buatsaihsakte tân a ni zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:24 Zirtîr sâwmte chuan chu chu an lo hriatin unau pahnihte chungah chuan an lungni lo ta hle a. 
Matthew20:25 Isua erawh chuan anniho chu a ko va, “Jentail-te chunga rorêltute chu an intilal êm êm ṭhîn a, an miliante pawhin an chungah thu an nei êm êm ṭhîn tih in hria;" 
Matthew20:26 nangni zîngah zawng chutiang tûr a ni lo ve. Tu pawh in zînga mi lian nih duh chu in rawngbâwltuah a awm zâwk tûr a ni. 
Matthew20:27 In zînga ropui ber nih duh pawh chu in chhiahhlawhah a awm tûr a ni. 
Matthew20:28 Mihring Fapa pawh hi rawngbâwlsaka awm tûrin a lo kal lo va, rawngbâwl tûr leh mi tam tak tlan nâna a nun pe zâwk tûra a lo kal ang hian,” a ti a." 
Matthew20:29 Tin, Jeriko khua ata an chhuah laiin mipui nasa takin amah an zui a." 
Matthew20:30 Mitdel pahnih kawng sîra lo ṭhu chuan Isua a kal tih an hriat veleh, “Lalpa, Davida Fapa, min khawngaih rawh,” tiin an au va." 
Matthew20:31 Mipuite chuan an hau va, ngawi tûrin an ti a, mahse anni chuan, “Lalpa, Davida Fapa, min khawngaih rawh,” tiin an au zual sauh va." 
Matthew20:32 Isua chu a ding a, anni chu a ko va, “Eng nge tihsak che u ila in duh?” a ti a." 
Matthew20:33 Anni chuan a hnênah, “Lalpa, mit vâr kan duh,” an ti a." 
Matthew20:34 Isua chuan a khawngaih ta êm êm a, an mit a dek a; tichuan, an hmu thei ta nghâl a, amah chu an zui ta a." 
Matthew21:1 Jerusalem an lo hnaih ta a, Oliv tlânga Bethfage khua an han thlen chuan Isuan a zirtîr pahnih a tîr a, an hnênah," 
Matthew21:2 “In hma zâwn khuaah sâwn va kal ta ula, sabengtung thlun, a kianga a no nên in hmu mai ang; phelh ula, ka hnênah han kai rawh u." 
Matthew21:3 Mi tu pawhin in hnênah eng pawh sawi sela, ‘Lalpan a mamawh a ni,’ in ti ang a, a rawn kaltîr nghâl mai ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew21:4 Zâwlnei hmanga a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna tûrin chûng chu a lo awm a ni: 
Matthew21:5 “Zion fanu chu hrilh rawh u, en teh, i lal chu i hnênah a lo kal e, Thuhnuairawlh taka sabengtung chunga chuangin, Sabengtung no chung ngeiah,” tih thu hi." 
Matthew21:6 Tichuan, zirtîrte chu an va kal a, Isuan thu a pêk ang ngeiin an ti a." 
Matthew21:7 Sabengtung leh a no chu an rawn kai a, an chungah an puante an phah a, ani chu a chuang ta a." 
Matthew21:8 Mipui zînga a tam zâwk chuan kalkawngah an puante an phah a, a ṭhenin hnahchhâwl an sât a, kalkawngah chuan an phah zêl bawk a." 
Matthew21:9 A hma lama kalte leh a hnung lama zuitu mipui chu, “Davida Fapa hnênah, Hosana, Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se; Chungnung berah khian Hosana,” tiin an au va." 
Matthew21:10 Jerusalem a lo luh chuan, a khuain, “He mi hi tu nge ni?” tiin an phu ta mur mur a." 
Matthew21:11 Mipuiho chuan, “He mi hi zâwlnei Isua, Galili ram Nazaret khuaa mi a ni,” an ti a." 
Matthew21:12 Isua chu tempulah a va lût a, chuta englo zuartute leh leitute chu a hnawt chhuak vek a; tangka thlengtute dawhkânte leh ṭhuro zuartute ṭhutthlêngte chu a nam thlûksak a;" 
Matthew21:13 an hnênah, “‘Ka in chu ṭawngṭaina in an ti ang,’ tih ziak a ni; nangni erawh chuan suamhmangte pûkah in siam zâwk a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew21:14 Tempulah chuan mitdelte leh kebaite a hnênah an lo kal a, a lo tidam hlawm a." 
Matthew21:15 Puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtuten thil mak a tihte leh Tempula, “Davida Fapa hnênah Hosana,” tia naupang aute chu an hmuhin an thinur ta hle a, “Hêngho thu sawi hi i hria em?” an ti a." 
Matthew21:16 Isuan an hnênah, “Hria e, ‘Nausênte leh hnute hne laite kâa chhuak chuan fakna i tifamkim ta,’ tih hi in chhiar ngai lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
Matthew21:17 Anni chu a kalsan a, khawpui ata a chhuak a, Bethani-ah a kal a, chutah chuan a riak ta a." 
Matthew21:18 Tin, zîngah khawpui lam a pan leh laiin a ril a lo ṭâm ta a." 
Matthew21:19 Kawng kamah chuan theipui a hmu a, a va pan a, a hnah chauh lo chu eng mah a hmu lo va, “Rah lo kumkhua tawh ang che,” a ti a; theipui chu a vuai ta nghâl mai a." 
Matthew21:20 Zirtîrte chuan chu chu an hmuhin mak an ti hle a, “Engtizia nge theipui hi a vuai nghâl tâk mai?” an ti a." 
Matthew21:21 Isuan a chhâng a, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u; rinna in neiha in rinhlelh loh chuan, theipui chunga tih ang chang hi in ti lo vang a, he tlâng hnênah pawh hian, ‘Insawn la, tuifinriatah inpaih rawh,’ in tih chuan a inpaih mai ang." 
Matthew21:22 Engkim, ring chunga ṭawngṭaia in dîl apiang in hmu ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew21:23 Tempulah a lût a, a zirtîr lai chuan puithiam lalte leh vântlâng upate chu a hnênah an lo chho va, “Eng thuneihnain nge hêng thil hi i tih? Tu nge thu pe che?” an ti a." 
Matthew21:24 Isuan a chhâng a, “Kei pawhin thu ka han zâwt ve ang che u, chu chu mi hrilh chuan tu thuin nge hêng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh ang che u." 
Matthew21:25 Johana baptisma kha khawia ta nge, vâna mi thu nge mihring thu?” a ti a. An inrâwn khâwm a, “ ‘Vâna mi thu,’ kan tih chuan, ‘engah nge a thu in awih loh le?’ min ti dâwn si a;" 
Matthew21:26 ‘mihring thu,’ kan tih chuan kan tân mipui an hlauhawm si, mi zawng zawngin Johana chu zâwlneiah an ngai si a,” an ti a." 
Matthew21:27 Tichuan, Isua chu an chhâng a, “Kan hre lo,” an ti a. Ani chuan an hnênah, “Kei pawhin tu thuin nge hêng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh bîk lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Matthew21:28 Isuan, “A nih leh nangnin engtin nge in ngaih? Mi pakhatin fapa pahnih a nei a, pakhat hnênah chuan a va kal a," 
Matthew21:29 ‘Ka fapa, vawiin chu grep huanah va thawk rawh,’ a ti a. Ani chuan, ‘Ka duh lo,’ tiin a lo chhâng a. Nimahsela, nakinah a rilru a lamlêt a, a kal ta a." 
Matthew21:30 Pakhat hnênah pawh chuan a va kal a, chutiang bawk chuan a ti a. Ani chuan ‘Aw le, ka pa,’ a ti a; nimahsela, a kal ta chuang lo va." 
Matthew21:31 Chu mite pahnih chu a tu zâwk chuan nge an pa duhzâwng ti le?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “A hmasa zâwk chuan,” an ti a. Isuan an hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, chhiahkhawntute leh nawhchizuarte chuan Pathian ram an luh khalh ta che u a nih hi." 
Matthew21:32 Johana chuan kawng dik a rawn kawhhmuh che u a, amah chu in ring si lo va; chhiahkhawntute leh nawhchizuarte erawh chuan amah chu an ring a, nangnin chu chu in hmuh hnu pawhin amah chu ring tûrin in lamlêt si lo va." 
Matthew21:33 “Tehkhin thu dang ngaithla rawh u. In neitu pakhat a awm a, grep huan a siam a, palin a hung a, grep sâwr khur a lai a, vênbûk sâng tak a sa bawk a, thlawh hlawh tûrin huan enkawltute a pe a, ram dangah a kal ta daih a." 
Matthew21:34 A rah lawh a hun dâwn chuan a chanpual la tûrin huan enkawltute hnênah a bawihte a tîr a. 
Matthew21:35 Huan enkawltute chuan a bawihte chu an lo man a, pakhat an vaw nek a, pakhat an tihlum a, pakhat lungin an dêng a." 
Matthew21:36 Bawih dang, a hmasa aia tam zâwk a tîr leh a; anni pawh chu chutiang bawk chuan an lo ti a." 
Matthew21:37 Chumi hnu chuan, ‘Ka fapa hi zawng an zah ang chu maw,’ tiin a fapa chu an hnênah a tîr ta a." 
Matthew21:38 Nimahsela, huan enkawltute chuan a fapa chu an lo hmuhin, ‘He mi hi roluahtu tûr chu a nih hi; hawh u, that ila, a ro luah tûr hi i neihsak ang u,’ an ti hlawm a." 
Matthew21:39 Tichuan, ani chu an man a, grep huan ata chu an theh chhuak a, an tihlum ta a." 
Matthew21:40 Chutichuan, grep huan neitu chu a lo kal hunin, chûng huan enkawltute chu engtin nge a rawn tih tâk ang?” a ti a." 
Matthew21:41 Anni chuan, “Chûng mi sualte chu hrehawm takin a tiboral ang a, grep huan chu enkawltu dang, a lawh hun apianga a rahte chu amah pe zêltu tûrte hnênah thlawh hlawh tûrin a pe ang,” an ti a." 
Matthew21:42 Isuan an hnênah, “Lehkhathu-a, ‘In satute lung duh loh kha, chu ngei chu a kil lung ṭangkai ber a lo ni si, Chu chu Lalpa tih a ni a, Kan hmuhin mak kan ti,’ tih hi in chhiar ngai lo vem ni?" 
Matthew21:43 “Chumi avâng chuan ka hrilh a che u, Pathian ram chu chhuhsak in ni ang a, a rah chhuah tûr hnam hnênah pêk a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew21:44  
Matthew21:45 Puithiam lalte leh Farisai-te chuan a tehkhin thu chu an hriatin anmahni chungthu a sawi tih an hre ta a. 
Matthew21:46 Man an tum a; mahse, mipui an hlau bawk si, zâwlneiah an ngaih tlat avângin." 
Matthew22:1 Mipui hnênah tehkhin thuin Isuan thu a sawi leh a," 
Matthew22:2 “Vânram chu lal tu emaw, a fapa tâna mo lawmna ruai ṭheh nên chuan tehkhin theih a ni." 
Matthew22:3 Ruai ṭheh tûra a sâwmte chu ko khâwm tûrin a bawihte a tîr a; mahse, an lo kal duh lo va." 
Matthew22:4 Ani chuan bawih dangte a tîr leh a, ‘Ka sâwmte hnênah khân, ngai teh u, ruai chu ka peih ta a, ka bâwngpate leh ran châwm thaute ka talh a, engkim peih a ni ta e; ruai ṭheh tûrin lo kal tawh rawh u, ti rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Matthew22:5 Nimahsela, an lo ngaihsak lo va, an kalsan ta mai a, a ṭhen an feh a, a ṭhen an sumdâwnnaah an kal a." 
Matthew22:6 Mi dangte chuan a bawihte chu an man a, zahthlâk takin an sawisa a, an tihlum ta mai a." 
Matthew22:7 Lal chu a thinrim ta a, a sipaite a tîr a, chûng tualthattute chu a tiboral a, an khua pawh a hâlsak ta a." 
Matthew22:8 “Tin, a bawihte hnênah chuan, ‘Ruai chu peih a ni ta, ka sâwmte erawh kha chu lo tel tlâk an ni lo." 
Matthew22:9 Chuvângin, kawng pêng ṭhuamahte kal ula, mi in hmuh apiang ruai ṭheh tûrin va sâwm rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Matthew22:10 Tichuan, bawihte chu an chhuak a, kawngahte chuan an kal a, an hmuh apiang, mi sual leh mi ṭhate pawh an hruai khâwm ta vek a; tichuan, mo lawmna in chu ruai kîltutein a lo khat ta a." 
Matthew22:11 “Lal chu ruai kîltute en tûra a lo luh chuan inneihna thuam inbel lo mi pakhat a rawn hmu a; 
Matthew22:12 a hnênah, ‘ṭhiana, engtizia nge inneihna thuam inbel lova heta i lo luh le?’ a ti a. Ani chu a ngawi ta reng a." 
Matthew22:13 Lal chuan a rawngbâwltute hnênah, ‘A kut leh ke phuar ula, pâwn thimah paih chhuak rawh u, chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, hâ an ṭhial ang." 
Matthew22:14 Sâwmte chu tam tak an ni a, thlante erawh chu tlêm tê an ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew22:15 Chumi lai chuan Farisai-ten a thu sawia an man theih dân tûr an sawi ho va. 
Matthew22:16 An zirtîrte chu Heroda pâwla mite nên a hnênah an tîr a; anni chuan, “Zirtîrtu, mi dik tak i ni a, tihtakzetin Pathian thu i zirtîr ṭhîn a, pawisak chuan tu mah i nei si lo va." 
Matthew22:17 Chuvângin, engtin nge i ngaih min hrilh teh khai, Kaisara hnêna chhiah chawi tûr kan ni nge ni lo?” an ti a." 
Matthew22:18 Isuan an sualzia chu a lo hria a, “Mi vervêkte u, engah nge mi ṭawng awhtîr in tum? Chhiah tangka chu mi han entîr teh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew22:19 A hnênah duli an rawn la a. 
Matthew22:20 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Hei, tu lem leh tu hming nge chuang hi?” a ti a." 
Matthew22:21 Anni chuan, “Kaisara,” an ti a. Ani chuan an hnênah, “Chuti a nih chuan, Kaisara thil chu Kaisara pe ula, Pathian thil chu Pathian pe ta che u,” a ti a." 
Matthew22:22 Chu chu an hriatin mak an ti hle a, amah chu an kalsan a, an kal ta daih a." 
Matthew22:23 Chumi ni vêk chuan Sadukai-ho, thawhlehna a awm lo tite chu a hnênah an lo kal a," 
Matthew22:24 “Zirtîrtu, Mosian, ‘Fa nei lovin mi thi sela, a unauvin a nupui chu rochungin a unau tân chi a thlahsak tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
Matthew22:25 Aw le, kan zîngah unau mipa pasarih an awm a, a upa berin nupui a nei a, chi thlah lovin a thi a, a nupui chu a nau tân a hnutchhiah a;" 
Matthew22:26 chutiang bawkin pahnihna pawh, pathumna pawh, pasarihna thlengin a ni a." 
Matthew22:27 Chu mite thih hnu chuan hmeichhia pawh chu a thi ta a. 
Matthew22:28 Tichuan, thawhlehnaah chûng mi pasarihte zînga tu nupui ber nge ni ang; an za-in an nei ṭheuh si a?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Matthew22:29 Isuan a chhâng a, “Lehkha Thu leh Pathian thiltihtheihna in hriat loh avângin in kal sual ṭhîn a ni." 
Matthew22:30 Thawhlehnaah chuan nupui pasal an innei dâwn tawh lo va, vâna vântirhkohte ang mai an ni zâwk dâwn a ni." 
Matthew22:31 Mitthi thawhlehna thu-ah chuan Pathianin, ‘Kei hi Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian ka ni,’ tia in hnêna a sawi kha in chhiar ngai lo vem ni?" 
Matthew22:32 Ani chu mitthi Pathian a ni lo va, mi nung Pathian a ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Matthew22:33 Mipui chuan chu chu an hriatin a thu zirtîr chu mak an ti hle a. 
Matthew22:34 Sadukai-te chu a chhâng dang tih Farisai-te chuan an hriatin an inhmu khâwm a. 
Matthew22:35 An zînga Dânhremi pakhatin amah fiah nân," 
Matthew22:36 Zirtîrtu, Dânah hian eng thupêk hi nge ropui ber?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Matthew22:37 Ani chuan, “Lalpa i Pathian chu i thinlung zawng zawngin, i nunna zawng zawngin, i rilru zawng zawngin i hmangaih tûr a ni." 
Matthew22:38 Chu chu thupêk ropui leh pawimawh ber chu a ni. 
Matthew22:39 A dawttu, a anpui chu, ‘Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte hmangaih rawh,’ tih hi a ni." 
Matthew22:40 Chûng thupêk pahnihah chuan Dân leh zâwlneite thu zawng zawng a inkhaikhâwm vek a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew22:41 Farisai-te kal khâwm chu Isuan thu a zâwt a," 
Matthew22:42 “Krista chu eng angin nge in ngaih? Tu fapa nge ni?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Davida,” an ti a." 
Matthew22:43 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Davidan engtizia nge thlarauva sawiin ani chu, ‘Lalpa,’ a tih si?" 
Matthew22:44 ‘Lalpa chuan ka Lalpa hnênah, Ka ding lamah lo ṭhu rawh, I hmêlmate i ke hnuaiah ka han dah ang e,’ a ti si a." 
Matthew22:45 Davidan ani chu, ‘Lalpa,’ a tih si chuan, engtin nge a fapa mai a nih theih?” a ti a." 
Matthew22:46 Tu man kam khat mahin an chhâng thei lo va, chumi a chin chu tu man thu dang rêng rêng an zâwt ngam tawh hek lo." 
Matthew23:1 Tichuan, mipuite leh zirtîrte hnênah Isuan thu a sawi a," 
Matthew23:2 “Dân zirtîrtute leh Farisai-te chu Mosia Dân zirtîrtua ruat an ni a. 
Matthew23:3 Chuvângin, an hrilh apiang che u chu ti ula, zâwm zêl ang che u, an thiltih ang erawh chu ti ve suh ang che u; sawi zawng an sawi ṭhîn a, an ti si ṭhîn lo." 
Matthew23:4 Phurrit hrehawm tak tak an siam a, mite an bel ṭhîn a, anni erawh chuan an kut zung hmâwr pawhin an khawih duh si lo." 
Matthew23:5 An thiltih zawng zawng chu mite hmuh atân a ni an tih ṭhin ni; an bân hrên leh chal hrêna bâwm chu an tihlai a, an puan fêm an tibuk ṭhîn a." 
Matthew23:6 Ruai ṭhehna hmuna ṭhutna ṭha ber te, Sunagog-a ṭhutna langsâr ber te, dâwrpui hmuna chibai bûk te," 
Matthew23:7 miten ‘Rabi,’ an tihte an ngaina si ṭhîn." 
Matthew23:8 “Nangni erawh chu, ‘Rabi,’ tihin awm suh u, in zirtîrtu chu pakhat a ni a, in za-in unau in ni si a." 
Matthew23:9 Tin, leiah hian tu mah, ‘ka pa’ ti suh u; in Pa chu pakhat a ni, vâna mi chu." 
Matthew23:10 ‘Hruaitute,’ tihin awm hek suh u, in Hruaitu chu pakhat a ni, Krista chu." 
Matthew23:11 In zînga ropui ber chu in rawngbâwltu a ni tûr a ni. 
Matthew23:12 Tu pawh inngaihlu chu an tlâwm ang a, inngaitlâwm apiang chawimawi an ni ang." 
Matthew23:13 “Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai vervêkte u, in chung a pik e! Vânram kawng chu mite in khârsak si ṭhîn; nangni lah in lût si lo va, a lût tûrte pawh an luh in phal hek lo." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai-te u, in chung a pik e! Saphun pakhat siam tûrin tuifinriat leh khawmual in fang vêl ṭhîn a; in saphuna in siam hnuin nangmahni lêt hniha sualah in siam ṭhîn." 
Matthew23:16 “Nangni hruaitu mitdel, ‘Tempul chhâlin miin chhia chham sela, eng mah a ni lo; Tempul rangkachak chhâla chhia a chham erawh chuan a hlen tûr a ni,’ titute u, in chung a pik e!" 
Matthew23:17 Nangni mi â, mitdelte u, a eng nge ropui zâwk, rangkachak nge rangkachak tithianghlimtu Tempul chu?" 
Matthew23:18 ‘Miin maichâm chhâlin chhia chham sela, eng mah a ni lo; a chunga thilpêk chhâla chhia an chham erawh chuan an hlen tûr a ni,’ in ti bawk a." 
Matthew23:19 Nangni mitdelte u, a eng nge ropui zâwk, thilpêk nge thilpêk tithianghlimtu maichâm chu?" 
Matthew23:20 Chuvângin, maichâm chhâla chhechham chu maichâm leh a chunga awm zawng zawng chhâla chhechham a ni." 
Matthew23:21 Tempul chhâla chhechham chu Tempul leh a luahtu chhâla chhechham a ni. 
Matthew23:22 Vân chhâla chhechham chu Pathian ṭhutthlêng leh a chunga ṭhu chhâla chhechham a ni. 
Matthew23:23 “Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai vervêkte u, in chung a pik e! Pudina te, lêngmasêr te, pardi te sâwma pakhat in pe ṭhîn a; Dân thu pawimawh zâwk - dikna te, khawngaihna te, rinawmna te in ngaihthah si ṭhîn; nimahsela, chûng chu asin in tih tûr ni, a dangte chu ngaihthah chuang lovin." 
Matthew23:24 Hruaitu mitdel, thosi in tel palh hlauva thli faia, sanghâwngsei thli fai lova lem tel si ṭhînte u!" 
Matthew23:25 “Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai vervêkte u, in chung a pik e! No leh thlêng pâwn lam in sil fai ṭhîn a, a chhûng lam erawh chu duhâmna leh insûm lohnain a khat si a." 
Matthew23:26 Nang, Farisai mitdel, no leh a chhûng lam chu sil fai hmasa rawh, a pâwn lam pawh a lo fai dâwn nia." 
Matthew23:27 “Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai vervêkte u, in chung a pik e! Thlân hnawih vâr, a pâwn lama mawi taka lang, a chhûng lam erawh chu mitthi ruh leh bawlhhlawh tinrênga khat ang chu in ni." 
Matthew23:28 Nangni pawh chutiang bawkin pâwn lamah chuan mi hmuhin fel âwm takin in lang a, chhûng lamah erawh chuan vervêkna leh khawlohnain in khat si." 
Matthew23:29 “Nangni Dân zirtîrtu leh Farisai vervêkte u, in chung a pik e! Zâwlnei thlân inte in sa a, mi fel thlânte pawh in cheimawi a." 
Matthew23:30 ‘Kan pi leh pute dam lai khân awm ve pawh ni ila, zâwlneite thisen chhuahnaah zawng kan tel ve lo vang,’ in ti ṭhîn." 
Matthew23:31 Chutiangin zâwlneiho thattute thlah in nihzia in tilang a ni. 
Matthew23:32 In pi leh puten an lo tih ṭan tawh chu hlen law law rawh u. 
Matthew23:33 Rûlte u, rûlrial thlahte u, hremhmun rorêlna chu engtin nge in pumpelh theih ang?" 
Matthew23:34 “Ngai teh u, chumi avâng chuan in hnênah zâwlnei te, mi fing te, Dân zirtîrtute ka rawn tîr dâwn; ṭhenkhat in tihlum ang a, in khêngbet ang; ṭhenkhat sunagog-ah in vua ang a, khaw tinah in tiduhdah zui zêl ang." 
Matthew23:35 Chutichuan, Abela, mi fel tak thisen chhuah aṭangin, Hmun Thianghlim leh maichâm inkâra Barakia fapa Zakaria thisen in chhuah thleng khân, lei chunga mi fel thisen chhuak zawng zawng mawh chu nangniho chungah a tla ang." 
Matthew23:36 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, chûng zawng zawng chu tûnlai mite chungah a thleng dâwn a ni." 
Matthew23:37 “Aw Jerusalem, Jerusalem, zâwlneite thattu, i hnêna tirhte lo dêng hlumtu! Arpuiin a notê a thla hnuaia a awp khâwm angin i fate vawi eng zât nge awp khâwm ka tuma, in duh si loh kha?" 
Matthew23:38 Ngai teh u, in Tempul chu a rauhsan a, a ram ta a ni." 
Matthew23:39 Ka hrilh a che u, ‘Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se,’ in tih hma chuan tûn a chinah mi hmu leh dâwn tawh lo a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew24:1 Isua chu Tempul ata a chhuak a, a kalsan dâwn laiin, Tempul sak dân te chu entîr tûrin zirtîrte an lo kal a." 
Matthew24:2 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, an hnênah, “Hêng zawng zawng hi in hmu maw? Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, lung intiang rêng rêng hi pakhat mah tihchim lohva hnutchhiah a awm lo vang,” a ti a." 
Matthew24:3 Tin, Oliv tlânga a ṭhut laiin zirtîrte chu anmahni chauhvin a hnênah an lo kal a, “Chûng chu engtikah nge a lo awm ang a, i lo kal lehna leh khawvêl tâwp chhinchhiahna thil mak eng eng nge awm ang, min hrilh teh,” an ti a." 
Matthew24:4 Isuan a chhâng a, “Tu man an hruai bo loh nân che u fîmkhur rawh u." 
Matthew24:5 Ka hming chhâlin ‘Krista chu ka ni,’ tiin mi tam tak an lo chhuak dâwn si a, mi an hruai bo ṭeuh ṭeuh vang." 
Matthew24:6 Indo ri te, indo chanchin te pawh in hria ang a, thlaphâng lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u; chûng chu lo thleng tûr rêng a ni; hun tâwp erawh chu a la ni rih lo ve." 
Matthew24:7 Hnam hrang leh hnam hrang an indo vang a, sawrkâr hrang leh sawrkâr hrang an indo bawk ang, hmun hrang hrangah ṭâm a tla ang a, lîr a nghîng bawk ang." 
Matthew24:8 Chûng zawng zawng chu nau vei a inṭan ta tihna a ni. 
Matthew24:9 “Chumi hunah chuan hrehawm tuar tûrin an mantîr ang che u a, an tihlum ang che u; ka hming avângin hnam zawng zawngin an hua ang che u." 
Matthew24:10 Chumi hunah chuan mi tam tak an tlu ang a, an inmantîr tawn ang a, an inhaw tawn ang." 
Matthew24:11 Zâwlnei der tam tak an lo chhuak ang a, mi an hruai bo ṭeuh ṭeuh vang;" 
Matthew24:12 Suahsualna a pun dâwn avângin mi tam zâwk hmangaihna chu a la dai ang. 
Matthew24:13 Nimahsela, a tâwp thlenga chhel taka tuar peih apiang, chûng mite ngei chu chhandam an ni ang." 
Matthew24:14 Ram Chanchin Ṭha hi hnam zawng zawng hriat tûrin khawvêl pum puia hril a ni ang a, chumi zawhah chuan tâwpna chu a lo thleng dâwn a ni." 
Matthew24:15 “Chutichuan, tiṭiautu tenawm zawlnei Daniela hmanga sawi kha, hmun thianghlima ding in hmuh hunah chuan (a chhiar chuan a awmzia hre rawh se)" 
Matthew24:16 Judai rama awmte chu tlângramahte tlân rawh se; 
Matthew24:17 in chunga awm chu in chhûnga englo chuh tûrin chhuk suh se," 
Matthew24:18 Lova feh pawh a silhfên chuh tûrin haw hek suh se. 
Matthew24:19 Nau pai te leh nauno pawmte chu an va khawngaihthlâk dâwn êm! 
Matthew24:20 Thlasik lai emaw, Sabat ni emawa in tlân a ṭûl loh nân ṭawngṭai rawh u." 
Matthew24:21 Chumi hun chu a hrehawm êm êm dâwn a ni; chutianga hrehawm chu leilung pian tirh ata tûn thlengin a la awm ngai lo va, awm pawh a awm leh tawh hek lo vang." 
Matthew24:22 Chûng nite chu tihtawi ni suh sela, mihring tu mah dam khawchhuak an awm lo vang; nimahsela, thlante avângin chûng nite chu tihtawi a ni ang." 
Matthew24:23 “Chutih hunah chuan tu pawhin in hnênah, ‘En teh u, Krista chu heta hi,’ emaw, ‘Sawta saw,’ emaw an tih pawhin awih duh suh ang che u." 
Matthew24:24 Krista der leh zâwlnei derte an lo chhuak dâwn si a; thei ang se thlante meuh pawh an hruai bo theih nân chhinchhiahna leh thil mak ropui tak tak an ti ang. 
Matthew24:25 Ngai teh u, ka hrilh diam tawh che u hi." 
Matthew24:26 Chutichuan, in hnênah, ‘Thlalêrah a awm e,’ an tih chuan kal chhuak suh u, ‘En teh u, pindan chhûngrilah a awm,’ an tih pawhin awih duh hek suh ang che u." 
Matthew24:27 Chhak lamah kâwl a lo phe a, thlang lam thlengin a ên ṭhîn. Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna pawh chutiang chu a ni dâwn si a." 
Matthew24:28 “Khawiah pawh sa ruang awmna apiangah mulukawlhte an awm khâwm ang. 
Matthew24:29 “Tin, chûng hun hrehawm chu a liam veleh ni a thim ang a, thla a êng hek lo vang; vân aṭangin arsite a tla ang a, vân thiltihtheihnate chu tihnghîn a ni ang." 
Matthew24:30 Chutih hunah chuan Mihring Fapa chhinchhiahna chu vânah a lo lang ang a, chumi hunah chuan leia chi tinrêngin ṭapin an âwm an chûm ang a, Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna leh ropuina nasa tak nên vân chhûm zînga a lo kal an hmu ang." 
Matthew24:31 Vântirhkohte chu tawtawrâwt ri ruai ruai nên a tîr chhuak ang a, anni chuan thlante chu kâwlkil li ata vân tâwp aṭanga a tâwp lehlam thlengin an lâwr khâwm ang." 
Matthew24:32 “Tichuan, theipui kûng awm dân aṭang hian zir tûr in nei; a zîk a lo no va, hnah a rawn chhuah chuan nipui a thaw dâwn tih in hre ṭhîn." 
Matthew24:33 Chutiang bawkin, nangni pawhin chûng zawng zawng in hmuh hun chuan ani chu a lo hnai tawh a, a lo thleng ṭêp tawh tih hria ang che u." 
Matthew24:34 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, chûng zawng zawng chu a thlen hma loh chuan tûnlai mite hi an ral hman lo vang." 
Matthew24:35 Lei leh vân a ral ang a, ka thu erawh chu a ral lo vang." 
Matthew24:36 “Nimahsela, chûng lo thlen hun tûr ni leh dâr chu, Pa chauh lo chuan tu man an hre lo; vâna vântirhkohte pawhin, Fapa pawhin an hre lo." 
Matthew24:37 Tin, Nova dam lai ang khân Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna chu a ni ang." 
Matthew24:38 Tuilêt hma, Nova lawnga a luh ni thlengin an eiin an in a, nupui pasal an innei ṭhîn a;" 
Matthew24:39 tui a lo lian a, an zaa a lâk bo vek hma loh chuan eng mah an hre lo, Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna chu chutiang bawk chu a ni ang." 
Matthew24:40 Chumi hunah chuan lovah mi pahnih an awm ang a, pakhat chu lâk a ni ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiah a ni ang." 
Matthew24:41 Hmeichhe pahnihin buh an dêng ang a, pakhat chu lâk a ni ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiah a ni ang." 
Matthew24:42 “Chutichuan, inring rengin awm rawh u, eng ni-ah nge in Lalpa a lo kal dâwn in hre si lo." 
Matthew24:43 Nimahsela, hei hi in hria e, rûkru lo kal tûr in neituin hria sela, a lo inring ang a, a in a reh pawhtîr lo vang." 
Matthew24:44 Chuvângin, nangni pawh inpeih rengin awm rawh u, in beisei loh hunah Mihring Fapa chu a lo kal hlauh dah ang e." 
Matthew24:45 “An puin an chhûngkaw hotu-ah leh an chaw sem huna semsak ṭhîntu atân sum enkawltu rinawm tak leh fing a ruat tûra chu tu nge ni ang? 
Matthew24:46 An pu hâwn huna bawih chutiang ti a rawn hmuh chu a nihlawh e. 
Matthew24:47 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, a neih zawng zawng chunga hotu-ah a rawn siam ang." 
Matthew24:48 Amaherawhchu, bawih sual chuan, ‘Ka pu hi a lo haw lawk dâwn lo ve,’ ti rilruin" 
Matthew24:49 a bawihpuite lo vêl ta sela, zu ruite nên eiin in sela," 
Matthew24:50 chu bawiha pu chu a rin loh ni-ah, a hriat loh dârah a lo kal ang a," 
Matthew24:51 bung hnihah a rawn chhuah ang a, mi vervêkte chan ang a chantîr ang; chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, hâ an ṭhial ang." 
Matthew25:1 “Chumi hnuah chuan vânram chu nula sâwm, an khâwnvâr kenga moneitu hmuak tûra chhuakte nên chuan tehkhin theih a ni ang." 
Matthew25:2 An zînga panga an â a, panga an fing a." 
Matthew25:3 A â-te chuan an khâwnvârte an keng nâ a, a tui an keng tel lo va." 
Matthew25:4 A fingte erawh chuan an khâwnvârte kengin ûmin a tui an keng tel bawk a. 
Matthew25:5 Moneitu chu a lo kal har avângin an za-in an muthlu a, an lo muhîl ta a." 
Matthew25:6 Zân laiah chuan au thâwm a lo awm a, ‘Ngai teh u, moneitu chu a lo kal e, a hmuak tûrin lo chhuak rú khai,’ tiin." 
Matthew25:7 Chu veleh nulaho chu an tho vek a, an khâwnvârte chu an buatsaih a." 
Matthew25:8 A â-te chuan a fingte hnênah, ‘In khâwnvârtui kha min pe ve rawh u, kan khâwnvârte a thi dâwn e,’ an ti a." 
Matthew25:9 Nimahsela, a fingte chuan, ‘Keini leh nangni tân a daih lo dah ang e, a zuartute hnênah kal ula, va lei zâwk rawh u,’ an ti a." 
Matthew25:10 Lei tûra an thang hlânin moneitu chu a lo thleng ta a; tichuan, a inpeihte chu ama rualin mo lawmna ruai ṭheh tûrin an lût a, kawng chu an khâr ta a." 
Matthew25:11 Chumi hnu chuan nula dangte pawh kha an lo thleng a, ‘Ka pu, ka pu, kawng min hawn rawh,’ an ti a." 
Matthew25:12 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, ‘Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, ka hre lo che u a ni,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:13 Chutichuan, inring reng rawh u, a ni leh a dâr chu in hre si lo." 
Matthew25:14 “Chutih hunah chuan vânram chu, mi, ram danga kal dâwna, ama bawihte kova, a sumte an hnêna kawltîr ang chu a ni ang." 
Matthew25:15 Bawih pakhat chu talent nga a pe a, pakhat chu talent hnih, pakhat dang chu talent khat, an tlin tâwk tûr ang zêl ṭheuhvin a pe a; tichuan, a kal ta a." 
Matthew25:16 Talent nga dawngtu chu a va sumdâwng ta nghâl a, talent nga dang a dek chhuak a." 
Matthew25:17 Chutiang bawkin talent hnih dawngtu pawh chuan talent hnih dang a dek chhuak a. 
Matthew25:18 Talent khat dawngtu erawh chuan lei a va lai a, a pu tangka chu a phûm ru ta zâwk a." 
Matthew25:19 “Rei tak hnuah chuan chûng bawihho pu chu a lo hâwng a, an sum enkawl chungchâng a tihfelpui a." 
Matthew25:20 Talent nga dawngtu chu a lo kal a, talent nga dang a rawn keng a, ‘Ka pu, nangin talent nga mi kawltîr a, en teh, talent nga dang ka dek chhuak e,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:21 A pu chuan a hnênah, ‘Bawih ṭha leh rinawm, i ti ṭha e, tlêm te chungah i rinawm a, tam tak chungah ka awmtîr ang che; i pu lâwmna chanpui ve rawh,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:22 Talent hnih dawngtu pawh chu a lo kal a, ‘Ka pu, nangin talent hnih mi kawltîr a, en teh, talent hnih dang ka dek chhuak e,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:23 A pu chuan a hnênah, ‘Bawih ṭha leh rinawm, i ti ṭha e, tlêm te chungah i rinawm a, tam tak chungah ka awmtîr ang che; i pu lâwmna chanpui ve rawh,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:24 “Talent khat dawngtu pawh chu a lo kal a, ‘Ka pu, mi ti kher kher i ni tih ka hria a che, i tuh loh pawh i seng ṭhîn a, a chi i theh loh pawh a rah i seng ṭhîn a ni." 
Matthew25:25 Tichuan, ka hlau va, i talent kha leiah ka phûm ru a; en teh, i ta ngai kha i hmuh leh hi,’ a ti a." 
Matthew25:26 A pu chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, ‘Nang bawih sual leh zawmthawpa, ka tuh loh pawh ka seng a, a chi ka theh loh pawh a rah ka seng ṭhîn tih i hria maw?" 
Matthew25:27 Chuti a nih a hnu, ka tangka kha tangkaa sumdâwngtute hnêna lo dah tûr alâwm, ka lo hâwnin a pung nên keiin ka hmu leh tûr a ni." 
Matthew25:28 Chutichuan, a talent kha lâksak ula, talent sâwm neitu kha pe rawh u." 
Matthew25:29 A nei apiang an pêk belhchhah ang a, a ngah êm êm ang; a nei lo erawh chu a neih chhun pawh an lâksak ang." 
Matthew25:30 Tin, bawih ṭhahnem lo kha pâwn thimah paih chhuak rawh u, chutah chuan an ṭap ang a, hâ an ṭhial ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew25:31 “Tin, Mihring Fapa chu Vântirhkoh zawng zawng nên ropui taka a lo kal hunah chuan, a lalṭhutthlêng ropui takah a ṭhu ang a," 
Matthew25:32 a hmaah chuan hnam tin an inkhâwm ang a, berâm vêngtuin kêl zînga berâmte a hlîr angin anniho chu a hlîr ang a;" 
Matthew25:33 berâmte chu a ding lamah a dah ang a, kêlte erawh chu a vei lamah." 
Matthew25:34 “Chumi hunah chuan Lalber chuan a ding lama mite hnênah, ‘Ka pa vohbîkte u, lo kal ula, khawvêl siam tirh ata in tâna ram buatsaih chu chang rawh u." 
Matthew25:35 Ka ril a ṭâmin nangnin ei tûr mi pe a; ka tui a hâlin in tûr mi pe a; mikhual ka nihin mi thleng a; saruaka ka awmin puan mi sintîr a; 
Matthew25:36 ka dam lohvin mi kan a; tân ina ka tânin mi tlawh a,’ a la ti ang." 
Matthew25:37 “Tichuan, mi felte chuan, ‘Lalpa, engtikah nge rilṭâma kan hmuh che-a chaw kan pêk che? Tuihâlin i awma tui kan pêk che?" 
Matthew25:38 Engtikah nge mikhuala kan hmuh chia kan thlen che? Saruaka i awma puan kan sintîr che? 
Matthew25:39 Engtikah nge dam lovin emaw, tân inah emaw kan hmuh che-a kan tlawh che?’ tiin an la chhâng ang." 
Matthew25:40 Lalber chuan, ‘Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, hêng ka unau tê berte zînga pakhat chunga in tih chu, ka chunga ti in ni,’ tiin a la chhâng ang." 
Matthew25:41 “Chumi zawhah chuan, a vei lama mite hnênah pawh chuan, ‘ânchhe dawngte u, kumkhaw mei, Diabola leh a hote tâna buatsaihah chuan mi kalsan rawh u." 
Matthew25:42 Ka ril a ṭâmin nangnin ei tûr mi pe lo va, ka tui a hâlin in tûr mi pe lo va." 
Matthew25:43 Mikhual ka nihin mi thleng lo va; saruaka ka awmin puan mi sintîr lo va, ka dam loh lai leh tân ina ka tân laiin mi kan lo va,’ a la ti ang." 
Matthew25:44 Anni pawh chuan, ‘Lalpa, engtikah nge rilṭâmin emaw, tuihâlin emaw, mikhualin emaw, saruakin emaw, dam lovin emaw, tân inah emaw kan hmuh che-a rawng kan bâwlsak loh che?’ tiin an la chhâng ang." 
Matthew25:45 Ani chuan, ‘Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, hêng mi tê berte zînga pakhat chunga in ti lo chu ka chunga ti lo in ni,’ tiin a la chhâng ang." 
Matthew25:46 “Chûng mite chu chatuan hremnaah an kal ang a, mi felte erawh chu chatuan nunnaah an kal ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:1 Isuan chûng thu zawng zawng chu a sawi zawh chuan a zirtîrte hnênah," 
Matthew26:2 “Ni hnih hnuah kalhlên kût a lo awm dâwn tih in hria a, Mihring Fapa hi khenbeh tûrin an mantîr dâwn,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:3 Chumi lai chuan Puithiam lalber Kaiafa an tiha in hual chhûng kawtlaiah puithiam lalte leh vântlâng upate chu an kal khâwm a. 
Matthew26:4 Isua chu ngamthlêma mana, an tihhlum theih dân tûr ngaihtuahin an inrâwn a." 
Matthew26:5 “Kût chhûng chuan ni suh se, chutilo zawng vântlâng zîngah buaina a chhuak hlauh dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Matthew26:6 Bethani-a phâr Simona ina Isua a awm laiin," 
Matthew26:7 alabasta bûra hriak rimtui to tak keng hmeichhe pakhat a hnênah a lo kal a, a chaw kîl lai chu a lu-ah hriak chu a leih a." 
Matthew26:8 Zirtîrte chuan chu chu an hmuhin an thinrim a, “Engati nge hetia a tihriral mai mai ni?" 
Matthew26:9 He hriak hi man tam taka hralha, mi retheite pêk theih a ni si a,” an ti a." 
Matthew26:10 Isua erawh chuan chu chu a hriatin an hnênah, “Hmeichhia hi engah nge in tihbuai ni? Ka chunga a thil tih hi thil ṭha ti a ni e." 
Matthew26:11 In zîngah mi retheite chu eng lai pawhin an awm a, kei erawh chu in zînga awm reng tûr ka ni lo." 
Matthew26:12 He hriak rimtui ka taksaa a leih hi, phûm tûra mi buatsaih nâna ti a nih hi." 
Matthew26:13 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, khawvêl pum puia he Chanchin Ṭha hi an hrilhna apiangah he nu thil tih pawh hi, amah hriat reng nân an sawi ve zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:14 Chumi hnu chuan Sâwmpahnihte zînga pakhat, Juda Iskariota an tih chu, puithiam lalte hnênah a kal a," 
Matthew26:15 “Amah chu ka mantîr ang che u a, eng nge min pêk ang?” a ti a. Tangka sawmthum an bûk chhuahsak ta a." 
Matthew26:16 Chumi hnuah chuan mantîr dân tûr remchâng a zawng ta reng a. 
Matthew26:17 Chhang dawidim telh loh Kût ni hmasa berah chuan zirtîrte chu Isua hnênah an lo kal a, “Khawii hmunah nge Kalhlên Kût chaw i ei tûr buatsaih ila i duh?” an ti a." 
Matthew26:18 Ani chuan, “Khawpuiah tu emaw hnênah va kal ula, a hnênah, ‘Zirtîrtu chuan, Ka hun a hnai ta a, ka zirtîrte nên Kalhlên Kût i inah kan hmang ang e, a ti,’ va ti ang che u,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:19 Tichuan, Isuan thu a pêk ang ngei chuan zirtîrte chuan an ti a; Kalhlên Kût chaw chu an buatsaih ta a." 
Matthew26:20 Tlaiah chuan zirtîr Sâwmpahnihte nên chaw an kîl ho va. 
Matthew26:21 An ei laiin ani chuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, in zînga mi pakhatin mi mantîr ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:22 An mangang ta êm êm a, a hnênah, “Lalpa, kei chu ka ni lo vang chu maw?” an ti ta ṭheuh a." 
Matthew26:23 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Thlêng mi zenpuitu ngei chuan mi mantîr ang." 
Matthew26:24 Mihring Fapa hi a chanchin an ziak ang tak khân a kal dâwn a ni; nimahsela, Mihring Fapa mantîrtu tûr mihringa chung chu a pik e; chu mihring chu piang lo se a tân a ṭha zâwk tûr,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:25 A mantîrtu tûr Juda chuan a chhâng a, “Rabi, kei chu ka ni lâwng chu maw?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I ti alâwm le!” a ti a." 
Matthew26:26 An ei laiin Isuan chhang a la a, malsâwmna a sawi a, a phel a, zirtîrte a pe a, “La ula, ei rawh u, hei hi ka taksa a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:27 No pawh chu a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin an hnênah a pe a," 
Matthew26:28 “In za-in in rawh u, hei hi ka thisen thuthlunna, sual ngaihdam nân mi tam tak tâna chhuak tûr chu a ni." 
Matthew26:29 Ka hrilh a che u: Ka Pa rama nangni nên a thar ka in hun a thlen hma chu grep rah tui hi ka in leh tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:30 Hla an sak zawh chuan Oliv tlâng lam panin an chhuak ta a. 
Matthew26:31 Chutah chuan Isuan an hnênah, “Zâninah in za-in kei hi min hawisan vek ang; ‘Berâmpu chu ka vua ang a, berâmte chu an darh ang,’ tih ziak a nih kha." 
Matthew26:32 Nimahsela, kaihthawha ka awm hnuin Galili ramah ka lo kal hmasa ang,” a ti a," 
Matthew26:33 Petera erawh chuan. “An za-in nang an hawisan vek che pawhin kei chuan ka hawisan ve lo vang che,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Matthew26:34 Isuan a hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che, âr a khuan hmain zâninah vawi thum mi phat ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:35 Peteran a hnênah, “I hnênah thih ve a ṭûl pawhin ka phat tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Chutiang bawkin zirtîr zawng zawng chuan an ti ta ṭheuh va." 
Matthew26:36 Chumi zawhah chuan Isua chu anniho nên hmun pakhat Gethsemani an tihah chuan an kal a, a zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Saw laia ka va ṭawngṭai hlânin hetah hian lo ṭhu rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:37 Petera leh Zebedaia fapate pahnih chu a hruai a, thlaphângin a lo mangang ta hle a." 
Matthew26:38 An hnênah, “Ka thlaphâng hle mai a, thihpui tham hial a ni. Hetah hian lo awm ula, lo inrâlring ve rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:39 Hma lamah tlêm a va kal hlek a, lei sia kûnin a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw ka Pa, a theih chuan he no hian mi pêl hrâm teh se; nimahsela, ka thu ni lovin nangma thu thu ni zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:40 Zirtîrte hnênah chuan a lo kal a, an muthlu chu a rawn hmu a; tichuan, Petera hnênah, “E khai, dârkâr khat pawh in inrâlring thei lo a ni maw?" 
Matthew26:41 Thlêmnaa in tlûk luh loh nân invêngin ṭawngṭai rawh u, thlarau zawngin a huam a, tisa erawh chu a chak lo va ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:42 A va kal vawi hnihnaah chuan a ṭawngṭai leh a, “Aw ka Pa, ka in lohva hei hian mi pelh theih lul loh chuan, nangma thu thu ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:43 A lo kîr leh a, an muthlu chu a rawn hmu leh a, an mut a chhuak hle si a." 
Matthew26:44 A kalsan leh a, a vawi thumnaah a thu sawi ngai bawk sawiin a ṭawngṭai leh a." 
Matthew26:45 Chumi zawhah chuan a zirtîrte hnênah a lo kal a, an hnênah, “Muhîlin in la châwl ta reng a ni maw? Ngai teh u, a hun chu a lo thleng ta. Mihring Fapa hi mi sualte kutah hlan a nih dâwn tâk hi!" 
Matthew26:46 Tho teh u, i kal ang u. En teh u, mi mantîrtu tûr chu a lo hnaih tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:47 A la ṭawng lai mêk chuan Juda, Sâwmpahnihte zînga pakhat chu a lo thleng a, a rual chuan puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute leh vântlâng upate tirh mi tam tak, khandaih leh talhtum kengin an lo thleng ta rup a." 
Matthew26:48 A mantîrtu khân chhinchhiahna tûr a lo hrilh diam tawh a, “Ka fawh chu amah chu a ni ang; man ang che u,” tiin." 
Matthew26:49 Tichuan, Isua chu a va pan nghâl a. “Chibai, Rabi,” tiin a fâwp ta ngawih ngawih a." 
Matthew26:50 Isuan a hnênah, “Ṭhiana, i tih tûr chu ti thuai rawh,” a ti a. Chu veleh Isua chu an rawn chelh a, an man ta a." 
Matthew26:51 Isua hote zînga pakhat chuan a kut a thawh a, khandaih a phawi a, Puithiam lalber bawih chu a sât a, a beng a hlawisak a." 
Matthew26:52 Chu veleh Isuan a hnênah, “I khandaih kha a paiah khung leh rawh; khandaih ruaitu zawng zawng chu khandaih vêkin an thi dâwn si a." 
Matthew26:53 Vântirhkoh sîngsarih leh sânghnih aia tam zâwk min rawn tirhsak nghâl tûrin Pa ka ngên thei lovin mi ring em ni? 
Matthew26:54 Mahse, ngên ta ila, hetiang thil lo awm tûr sawina Lehkha Thu kha engtin nge a lo thlen theih ang?” a ti a." 
Matthew26:55 Chumi lai chuan Isuan mipuite hnênah, “Suamhmang man tûr ang ziazângin khandaih leh talhtum kengin min man tûrin in lo thawk a ni maw? Tempulah ni tin ṭhuin mi ka zirtîr ṭhîn a, mi man si lo." 
Matthew26:56 Nimahsela, zâwlnei Lehkha Thute chu a lo thlen theih nân hêng zawng zawng hi a lo awm ta a nih hi,” a ti a. Tichuan, a zirtîr zawng zawngin ani chu an hawisan a, an tlânchhe ta a." 
Matthew26:57 A mantute chuan Isua chu Puithiam lalber Kaiafa ina Dân zirtîrtute leh vântlâng upate lo awm khâwmnaah chuan an hruai a. 
Matthew26:58 Petera chuan hnung feah Puithiam lalber in hual chhûng kawtlai thlengin a zui a; tin, a va lût a, a tâwpna hmuh tumin chhiahhlawhte zîngah a ṭhu ve a." 
Matthew26:59 Puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute leh Sanhedrin mi zawng zawngte chuan Isua an tihhlum theih nân dâwta hêkna an zawng an zawng a. 
Matthew26:60 Hretu der tam tak lo kal mah se thu tling an hmu si lo. 
Matthew26:61 Nakinah erawh chuan mi pahnih an lo kal a, “He pa hian, ‘Tempul hi ṭhiata ni thuma sa leh thei ka ni,’ a ti e,” an ti a." 
Matthew26:62 Tichuan, Puithiam lalber chu a ding chhuak a, a hnênah, “Hêngho hêkna che hi i chhâng thei na nge? An hêkna che hi eng tizia nge?” a ti a." 
Matthew26:63 Isua erawh chu a ngawi reng a. Puithiam lalber chuan, “Pathian nung chhâlin thu ka pe a che: Krista, Pathian Fapa chu i ni nge ni lo min hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:64 Isuan a hnênah, “Chu, i sawi chu, ka hrilh a che u, nakinah, Mihring Fapa hi Thiltitheia ding lama ṭhuin vân chhûm zînga lo kal in la hmu dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:65 Chu veleh Puithiam lalber chuan a silhfênte chu a pawtthlêr a, “Pathian pawi a sawi e, thuhretu dang a ṭûl em ni? Ngai teh u, Pathian pawi a sawi chu tûnah in hre ta a," 
Matthew26:66 engtin nge in ngaih?” a ti a. “Thi tlâk a ni,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Matthew26:67 A hmaiah chil an chhâk a, an hnek a, ṭhenkhatte chuan an bêng a," 
Matthew26:68 “Nang, Krista, tuin nge bêng che sawi rawh,” an ti a." 
Matthew26:69 Petera chu in hual chhûng kawtlaiah chuan a ṭhu a, nula pakhat a lo kal a, “Nang pawh hi Galili mi, Isua hnêna awm kha i nih hi,” a rawn ti a." 
Matthew26:70 Ani erawh chuan, “I thu sawi chu a awmzia ka hre hauh lo mai,” tiin an zaa hmaah a phat a." 
Matthew26:71 In hungna kawngkhâra a va chhuah chuan, nula dangin ani chu a lo hmu a, chuta awmte hnênah chuan, “He mi hi Nazaret Isua hnêna awm ve kha a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:72 “Chu mihring chu ka hre lo,” tiin chhechhamin a phat leh a." 
Matthew26:73 Rei lo te chinah chuta dingte chuan Petera chu, “Nang pawh hi an zînga mi i ni ngei ang, i awphawiah a hriat alâwm,” an rawn ti a." 
Matthew26:74 Ani erawh chuan ânchhe dawn huamin chhia a chham a, “Chu mihring chu ka hre lo ve,” a ti a." 
Matthew26:75 Ar a khuang ta nghâl a, “âr khuan hmain nangin vawi thum mi phat ang,” Isuan a tih kha Petera chuan a hre chhuak a. Tichuan, a chhuak a, a ṭap ta zawih zawih a." 
Matthew27:1 Zîng a lo nih chuan puithiam lalte leh vântlâng upa zawng zawng chuan Isua tihhlum dân tûr an rêl a: 
Matthew27:2 An phuar a, an kai a, Ramawptu Pilata hnênah an hruai a." 
Matthew27:3 A mantîrtu Juda chuan Isua chu thiam loh an chantîr tih a hriat veleh a inchhîr a, tangka sawmthum kha puithiam lalte leh upate a pe kîr leh a." 
Matthew27:4 “Mi pawisawi lo thi tûra ka mantîr kha ka lo tisual a ni,” a ti a. Anni erawh chuan, “Chu chu kan tân eng nge pawi ang? Nangin i tih tihin ti rawh,” an lo tihsan a." 
Matthew27:5 Tichuan, tangka chu Hmun Thianghlimah a paih lût a, a kal a, a va inâwk hlum ta a." 
Matthew27:6 Puithiam lalte chuan tangka chu an la a, “Hei hi Tempul tangka bâwma dah a thiang lo ve, thisen man a ni si a,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:7 Tichuan, an inrâwn a, mikhual phûm nân bêlvawtu hmun an lei ta a." 
Matthew27:8 Chuvângin a ni, chu hmun chu, tûn thlengin ‘Thisen hmun’ an tih tâk ni." 
Matthew27:9 Chutichuan, zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni: “Israel fa tuten emaw Tangka sawmthum an chhiara Man chu an la a," 
Matthew27:10 Lalpan thu a pêk ang khân Bêlvawtu hmun manah an pe a,” a tih hi." 
Matthew27:11 Isua chu Ramawptu hmaah chuan a ding a, Ramawptu chuan, “Juda-te lal i ni maw?” tiin a zâwt a. Isuan a hnênah, “I sawi chu,” a ti a." 
Matthew27:12 Puithiam lalte leh upate hêkna chu a enga mah a chhâng lo. 
Matthew27:13 Tichuan, Pilatan a hnênah, “An hêkna zozai che hi i hre lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
Matthew27:14 Nimahsela, a chhâng hlek lo va, an hêkna pakhat mah a chhân loh avâng chuan mak a ti êm êm a." 
Matthew27:15 Ramawptu chuan kût niin mi tâng pakhat an dîl apiang a chhuahsak ṭhîn a. 
Matthew27:16 Chumi lai chuan mi hmingthang tak Baraba an tih chu lung inah a tâng a. 
Matthew27:17 Tichuan, an lo pung khâwm chu Pilatan, “Tu nge chhuahsak che u ila in duh, Baraba nge Isua, Krista an tiha hi?” a ti a." 
Matthew27:18 Îtsîkna avângin ani chu a hnênah an rawn hlân tih a hre si a. 
Matthew27:19 Rorêlnaa a ṭhut laiin Pilata nupuiin, “Kha mi fel tak chungah khân eng mah ti suh; vawiin hian amah avângin mumangah thil tam tak ka tuar a ni,” tiin a rawn chah bawk a." 
Matthew27:20 Puithiam lalte leh upate chuan Baraba chu chhuaha, Isua chu tiboral tûra ngên tûrin mipuite chu an thlêm thlu ta a." 
Matthew27:21 Ramawptu chuan an hnênah, “Anni pahnih hi a tu zâwk hi nge chhuahsak che u ila in duh?” a ti leh a." 
Matthew27:22 Anni chuan, “Baraba,” an ti a. Pilatan an hnênah, “Isua, Krista an tih hi, engtin nge ka tih tâk ang le?” a ti a. An za-in, “Krawsah khêngbet rawh,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:23 Ramawptu chuan, “Engah maw, eng nge a tihsual ni?” a ti a. Nimahsela, mipui chu, “Krawsah khêngbet rawh,” tiin an au ta tuar tuar a." 
Matthew27:24 Tichuan, Pilatan engtia tih mah a sâwt lo va, buaina a chhuak mai dâwna a hriatin, tui a la a, mipui hmaah chuan a kut a sil a, “He mi fel thisenah hian ka hul e, nangnin in tih tihin ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew27:25 Mipui chuan an za-in, “A thisen mawh chu keimahni chungah leh kan fate chungah awm rawh se,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Matthew27:26 Tichuan, Baraba chu a chhuahsak a; Isua erawh chu sipaite a vuaktîr a, krawsa khenbeh tûrin an kutah a pe ta a." 
Matthew27:27 Tichuan, Ramawptu sipaite chuan Isua chu praitorian-ah an hruai lût a, an pâwla mi zawng zawng a bulah an au khâwm a." 
Matthew27:28 A kawr an hlihsak a, kawrfual senduk an hâktîr a." 
Matthew27:29 Chawimawina atân hlîng an kual a, an khumtîr a, a kut ding lamin tiang an kentîr a, a hmaah an ṭhingṭhi a, “Chibai, Juda-te lal,” tiin nuihza siam nân an hmang ta a." 
Matthew27:30 Ani chu chil an chhâk a, tiang chu an lâksak a, a luah an vua a." 
Matthew27:31 Nuihza siam nân an hman zawhin kawrfual chu an hlihsak a, ama kawr chu an hâktîr leh a, krawsa khenbeh tûrin an hruai ta a." 
Matthew27:32 Kalkawnga an kal laiin Kurini khuaa mi, a hming Simona an hmu a, Isua kraws putsak tûrin an man a." 
Matthew27:33 Golgotha, ‘Luruh hmun’ an tih chu an va thleng a;" 
Matthew27:34 Chutah chuan uain, thil kha nêna pawlh a in tûrin an pe a; a han tem a, a in duh ta lo va." 
Matthew27:35 An khenbeh zawhin a silhfênte chu ṭhumvâwrin an insem a. 
Matthew27:36 Chutah chuan an ṭhu a, amah chu an vêng a." 
Matthew27:37 Amah hêkna, ‘He mi hi Isua, Juda-te lal a ni,’ tih ziak a lu chungah chuan an bel a." 
Matthew27:38 A rual chuan suamhmang pahnih krawsah an khêngbet ve a, a ding lamah pakhat, a vei lamah pakhat." 
Matthew27:39 Mi veivâk nuk nukte chuan an lu an thing a, an tiel a." 
Matthew27:40 “Nang, Tempul hi ṭhiata ni thuma din leh theitu, intidam rawh. Pathian Fapa i nih meuh chuan kraws ata kha lo chhuk ta che,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:41 Chutiang bawkin puithiam lalte chuan Dân zirtîrtute leh upate nên nuihzatin," 
Matthew27:42 “Mi dang mah tidam ṭhîn, mahni lah intidam thei si lo! Israel lal alâwm, tûnah hian kraws ata lo chhuk sela kan ring ang chu!" 
Matthew27:43 Pathian a ring alâwm, amah hi a duh chuan tûnah chhan chhuak ang hmiang, ‘Pathian Fapa ka ni,’ a ti si a,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:44 Suamhmang khenbehte pawh chuan chutiang bawkin an tiel ve a. 
Matthew27:45 Dâr sâwm leh pahnih aṭanga tlai dâr thum thlengin khawvêl pum pui a thim ta vek a. 
Matthew27:46 Tlai dâr thum vêlah chuan Isua chu ring takin a au chhuak a, “Eli, Eli, lema sabakthani” a ti a; chu chu, ‘Ka Pathian, ka Pathian, engah nge mi kalsan?” tihna a ni." 
Matthew27:47 A kianga ding ṭhenkhat chuan chu chu an hriatin, “He mi hian Elija a ko va ni,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:48 An zînga pakhat chu a tlân nghâl a, sponj a la a, uain thûrah a chiah a, tiangah a târ a, Isua chu intîr a tum a." 
Matthew27:49 Mi dangte chuan, “Ngawi rú, amah chhan tûrin Elija a lo kal emaw i en ang u,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:50 Isua chu ring takin a au leh a, a thlarau a thlah ta a." 
Matthew27:51 Ngai teh, Tempul chhûng puanzâr chu a chung lam aṭangin a hnuai lam thlengin a thlêr thla a; lîr a lo nghîng a, lungpuite a khi chat a." 
Matthew27:52 Thlânte a lo inhawng a, mi thianghlim muhîl tawhte taksa tam tak pawh kaihthawh a ni ta a." 
Matthew27:53 A thawhleh hnuah chuan chûngte chu thlân ata lo chhuakin khaw thianghlimah chuan an lût a, mi tam tak hnênah an inlâr a." 
Matthew27:54 Sipai za hotu leh a bula Isua vênga awm vete chuan, lîrnghîng leh thil lo thlengte chu an hmuhin an hlau ta êm êm a, “He mi hi Pathian Fapa a ni ngei mai,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:55 Chutah chuan hmeichhe tam tak, a rawngbâwla Galili aṭanga Isua rawn zuitute chu an awm bawk a, hla tak aṭangin an thlîr a." 
Matthew27:56 Chûng zîngah chuan Magdala mi Mari te, Jakoba leh Josia nu Mari te an tel a, Zebedaia nupui pawh a tel a." 
Matthew27:57 Tlaiah chuan Arimathai khuaa mi hausa pakhat, a hming Josefa a lo kal a, ani pawh chu Isua zirtîr a ni bawk a." 
Matthew27:58 Chu mi chu Pilata hnênah a va kal a, Isua ruang chu a dîl a." 
Matthew27:59 Pilata chuan a lo phal a. Tichuan, Isua ruang chu Josefa chuan a hlâwm a, puan zai sîn fai takin a tuam a," 
Matthew27:60 ama thlân thar, lung a ker kuakah chuan a zalh a; thlân kawngka chu lung lian takin a khâr a, a kalsan ta a." 
Matthew27:61 Chutah chuan Magdala mi Mari leh Mari dang chu an awm ve a, thlân hma zâwnah chuan an ṭhu a." 
Matthew27:62 A tûk, Sabat ni chuan puithiam lalte leh Farisai-te chu a huhovin Pilata hnênah an kal a" 
Matthew27:63 “Ka pu, Tihdertua khân a dam laiin, ‘ni thum chinah ka tho leh ang,’ a tih kan hre reng a ni." 
Matthew27:64 Chuvângin, thlân chu ni thum ni thlenga vêng ṭha tûrin thu pe rawh; chuti lo chu a zirtîrten amah chu an va ru hlauh ang a, vântlâng hnênah, ‘Mitthi zîng ata a tholeh ta a ni,’ an ti dah ang e; tichuan, tihderna hnuhnûng zâwk chu a hmasa ai khân a ṭha lo lehzual ang,” an ti a." 
Matthew27:65 Pilatan an hnênah, “Vêngtute in nei alâwm, kal ula, ṭha in tih ang apiangin vêntîr rawh u,” a ti a." 
Matthew27:66 Chutichuan, an kal a, thlân khârna lung chu an chhinchhiah a, vêngtute chu an vêntîr ta tlat a." 
Matthew28:1 Sabat ni a lo ral a, Pathianni zînga khua a vâr dâwnin Magdala mi Mari leh Mari dang chu thlân en tûrin an kal a." 
Matthew28:2 Ngai teh, lîr nasa takin a lo nghîng a; Lalpa Vântirhkoh vân aṭangin a lo chhuk a, lung chu a rawn lum sawn a, a chungah a ṭhu ta a." 
Matthew28:3 A lan dân chu kâwlphe ang a ni a, a silhfênte chu vûr angin a vâr a." 
Matthew28:4 Amah an hlauh êm avângin vêngtute chu an khûr a, mitthi ang maiin an lo awm ta a." 
Matthew28:5 Vântirhkoh chuan hmeichhiate chu a bia a, “Nangni chuan hlau suh u, Isua an khenbeh kha in zawng tih ka hria e." 
Matthew28:6 Hetah a awm tawh lo ve, a sawi ang ngeiin kaihthawh a ni tawh a, a mutna hmun hi rawn en teh mah u." 
Matthew28:7 Tin, kal thuai ula, a zirtîrte hnênah, ‘Mitthi zîng ata kaihthawh a ni ta, Galili ramah a lo kal hmasa dâwn a, chutah chuan amah in hmu ang,’ ti ang che u. Ngai teh u, ka hrilh tawh che u hi,” a ti a." 
Matthew28:8 Hlau leh lâwm êm êm chungin thlân aṭang chuan hmanhmawh takin an kal a, zirtîrte hrilh tûr chuan an tlân ta a." 
Matthew28:9 Ngai teh, Isuan anni chu a tâwk a, “Chibai u,” a ti a. Tichuan, a kephahte chu an vuan a, kûnin chibai an bûk a." 
Matthew28:10 Isuan an hnênah, “Hlau suh u, kal ta ula, Galili rama kal tûrin ka unaute va hrilh rawh u; chutah chuan mi hmu ang,” a ti a." 
Matthew28:11 An kal lai chuan vêngtu ṭhenkhat chu khawpuiah an va lût a, thil lo thleng zawng zawng chu puithiam lalte an hrilh a." 
Matthew28:12 Upate nên an kal khâwm a, an inrâwn zawhin vêngtute chu tangka tam tak an pe a." 
Matthew28:13 “Zânah kan muthilh hlânin a zirtîrte an lo kal a, amah an ru ta a ni,” ti ang che u." 
Matthew28:14 Ramawptuin chu chu a lo hre ta a nih leh amah chu kan thlêm ang a, hlauhthâwn tûr nei lovin kan siam ang che u,” an ti a." 
Matthew28:15 Chutichuan, tangka chu an la a, an hrilh ang zêl chuan an ti ta a; tichuan, tûn thlengin chu thu chu Juda-te zîngah an la sawi darh ta zêl a ni." 
Matthew28:16 Zirtîr Sâwmpakhatte chu Galili ramah, Isuan tlâng a ruatsakah chuan an kal a." 
Matthew28:17 Amah an hmuh chuan kûnin chibai an bûk a; ṭhenkhat erawh chuan an ringhlel a. 
Matthew28:18 Isuan a rawn pan a, anni chu a bia a, “Lei leh vâna thuneihna zawng zawng pêk ka ni ta." 
Matthew28:19 Tichuan, kal ula, hnam zawng zawng zirtîrah siam rawh u; Pa leh Fapa leh Thlarau Thianghlim hmingah chuan baptis ula, thu ka pêk zawng zawng che u pawm tûrin zirtîr rawh u." 
Matthew28:20 Tin, ngai teh u, kei, kumkhuain, khawvêl tâwp thleng pawhin, in hnênah ka awm zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Mark1:1 Pathian Fapa, Isua Krista Chanchin Ṭha inṭanna chu:" 
Mark1:2 Zâwlnei Isaia lehkhabua: ‘Ngai teh, ka tirhkoh i hmaan ka tîr a, Ani chuan i kawng a buatsaih ang.’" 
Mark1:3 Thlalêra mi au aw chuan ‘Lalpa lamlian chei ṭha ula, A kal nân kawng tluang siam rawh u,’ tia ziak ang khân." 
Mark1:4 Baptistu Johana chuan sual ngaihdam nân sima baptisma chan tûr thu thlalêrah a rawn hril a. 
Mark1:5 Judai ram kil tina mi leh Jerusalem khuaa mi zawng zawng chuan amah an pan a, an sualte an puang a, Jordan luiah chuan a lo baptis hlawm a." 
Mark1:6 Johana chu sanghâwngsei hmul puanin a inthuam a, savun kâwnghrên a hrêng a, khaukhuap leh ram khawizu chawah a ring a." 
Mark1:7 “Kei aia ropui zâwk ka hnungah a lo kal a, kei hi chu kûna a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlâk pawh ka ni lo." 
Mark1:8 Keiin tuiin ka baptis che u a, ani erawh chuan Thlarau Thianghlimin a baptis ang che u,” tiin thu a hril a." 
Mark1:9 Chûng hun lai chuan Isua chu Galili rama Nazaret khua aṭangin a lo kal a, Jordan luiah chuan Johanan a lo baptis a." 
Mark1:10 Tui ata a lo chhuah veleh, vân inhawnga Thlarau, ṭhuro anga lo chhuk a hmu a, vân aṭang chuan aw a lo chhuak a." 
Mark1:11 “Nang, ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka chu i ni; i chungah ka lâwm êm êm e,” a rawn ti a." 
Mark1:12 Thlarau chuan ani chu thlalêrah a tîr chhuak nghâl a. 
Mark1:13 Chutah chuan ni sawmli Setana thlêmin a awm a; ramsate zîngah a awm ve a, vântirhkohten a rawng an bâwlsak a." 
Mark1:14 Tin, Johana chu an man hnuin Isua chu Pathian Chanchin Ṭha hrilin Galili ramah a kal ta a." 
Mark1:15 “Hun chu a lo thleng ta; Pathian ram pawh a hnai e; sim ula, Chanchin Ṭha hi ring rawh u,” a ti zêl a." 
Mark1:16 Galili dîl kama a kal lai chuan Simona leh a unaupa Andria chu dîla an lên dêng a va hmu a, sangha man mi an ni rêng a." 
Mark1:17 Isuan an hnênah, “Mi zui rawh u; tichuan, mihring man mi-ah ka lo siam ang che u,” a ti a." 
Mark1:18 An lênte chu an hnutchhiah a, ani chu an zui ta nghâl a." 
Mark1:19 A va kal leh hlek a, Zebedaia fa, Jakoba leh Johana te unau chu a hmu a, lawngah lên an lo ṭhui ṭha a." 
Mark1:20 Anni pawh chu a ko ve nghâl a, an pa Zebedaia leh inhlawhfate chu lawngah an kalsan a, Isua chu an zui ta a." 
Mark1:21 Tin, Kapernaum khuaah an lût a, Sabat ni chuan Sunagog-ah a zirtîr ta nghâl a." 
Mark1:22 Dân zirtîrtute ang lova thunei taka anmahni a zirtîr avâng chuan a zirtîrna chu mak an ti êm êm a. 
Mark1:23 An sunagog-ah chuan thlarau bawlhhlawh pai mi pakhat a lo awm ve a, a au chhuak ta phut a," 
Mark1:24 “Nazaret Isu, kan chungthu-ah rawn inrawlh i tum elo? Min tiboral tûrin i lo kal em ni? Tu nge i nih ka hria Pathian mi thianghlim chu i ni,” a ti a." 
Mark1:25 Isua chuan a hau va, “Ngawi la, a chhûng ata lo chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
Mark1:26 Thlarau bawlhhlawh chuan a sawisa nek a, ring taka auvin a chhûng ata chu a lo chhuak ta a." 
Mark1:27 An za chuan mak an ti êm êm a. “Hei eng nge ni ta ngai? Zirtîrna thar a nih hi; thlarau bawlhhlawhte pawh thu nei takin thu a pe a, an awih mai hi,” an inti hlawm a." 
Mark1:28 Galili ram kil tinah a chanchin chu a thang ta thuai a. 
Mark1:29 Sunagog ata chu a chhuak a, Jakoba leh Johana te nên Simona leh Andria in lam chu an pan nghâl a." 
Mark1:30 Simona pizawn chu khawsikin a lo mu reng a, a chanchin an hrilh vat a." 
Mark1:31 Ani chuan a va pan a, a kut a chelh a, a kai tho ta a. A khawsik chu a reh ta mai a, chawei a siamsak ta a." 
Mark1:32 Chumi tlai, ni tlâk hun chuan, damlo zawng zawng leh ramhuai mante a hnênah an rawn hruai a," 
Mark1:33 a khuain kawngka bulah chuan an lo awm khâwm ta hmur a. 
Mark1:34 Mi tam tak, nat tinrênga nate chu a tidam a, ramhuai tam tak a hnawt chhuak bawk a, amah an hriat avângin ramhuaite chu an ṭawng a phal lo." 
Mark1:35 Tin, zîng takah, khua a la ên hmain a tho va, a chhuak a, hmun fianrialah a kal a, chutah chuan a va ṭawngṭai a." 
Mark1:36 Simona leh a ṭhiante chuan an zawng a; 
Mark1:37 an va hmuh chuan, “Miin an rawn zawng huai huai che asin,” an ti a." 
Mark1:38 Ani chuan, “Hmun dangah, khaw ṭhenawmahte i kal ang u, chûngahte pawh chuan thu ka hril zêl tûr a ni; chu chu ka lo chhuah chhan a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Mark1:39 Tichuan, Galili ram zawng zawnga an sunagog-ah lûtin thu a hril zêl a, ramhuaite pawh a hnawt chhuak a." 
Mark1:40 A hnênah phâr a lo kal a, a hmaa ṭhingṭhiin tihdam a ngên chiam a, “I duh chuan mi tithianghlim thei e,” a ti a." 
Mark1:41 Ani chuan a lo khawngaih êm êm a, a han ban a, a dek a, “Ka duh e, lo thianghlim tawh ang che,” a ti a." 
Mark1:42 A phâr chu a lo dam ta nghâl a, a lo thianghlim ta a." 
Mark1:43 Khauh takin thu a pe a, a kaltîr ta nghâl a." 
Mark1:44 “Tu hnênah mah sawi hauh suh; amaherawhchu, puithiam hnênah va inentîr la, i dam ngei tih an hriatna tûrin inthen nâna Mosia thupêk ang khân thil hlân rawh,” a ti a." 
Mark1:45 Ani chu a kal ta a, chu thu chu a sawi a sawi ta mai a, a puang darh ta zâwk a; tichuan, Isua chu khuaah pawh a langin a lût thei ta lo va, hmun fianrialah a awm ta zâwk a; hmun tin aṭangin miin an rawn pan tho va." 
Mark2:1 Ni eng emawti hnuah chuan Kapernaum-ah a lo lût leh a, ina a awm thu a darh ta a." 
Mark2:2 Tichuan, pâwnah pawh kawngka bul thleng khat tlatin mi tam tak an lo pung khâwm a, an hnênah chuan thu a hril ta a." 
Mark2:3 Mi paliin zeng pakhat an rawn zâwn a, a hnên an rawn panpui a." 
Mark2:4 Mipui avâng chuan an hnaih hlei thei lo va, a awmna zâwn in chung chu an ṭhiat a; tin, an ṭhiat zawhin zeng chu a zâwnna chawpin an zu thlâk a." 
Mark2:5 Isuan an rinzia a hmuhin zeng hnênah chuan, “Ka fapa, i sualte ngaihdam a ni ta e,” a ti a." 
Mark2:6 Chutah chuan Dân zirtîrtu ṭhenkhat ṭhu ve an awm a," 
Mark2:7 “He mi hian engah nge hetianga a tih le? Pathian pawi a sawi a ni; mi pakhat, Pathian chauh lo chuan, tu nge sualte ngaidam thei?” an ti rilru hlawm a." 
Mark2:8 Chutiang chuan an ngaihtuah tih Isuan a hre nghâl mai a, an hnênah, “Engah nge rilrua chutiang in ngaihtuah ni?" 
Mark2:9 Zeng hnênah hian, ‘I sualte ngaihdam a ni ta,’ tih nge awl a, ‘Tho la, i mutna kha la la, kein kal tawh rawh,’ tih?" 
Mark2:10 Khawvêlah hian Mihring Fapa hian sual a ngaidam thei tih ka han hriattîr ang che u,” a ti a; zeng hnênah chuan," 
Mark2:11 “Tho la, i mutna kha la la, i inah haw rawh, ka ti a che,” a ti a." 
Mark2:12 Tichuan, a tho va, a mutna chu a la a, an vaia hmuhin a chhuak ta nghâl a; an za chuan mak an ti êm êm a, “Hetiang hi kan la hmu ngai rêng rêng lo,” tiin Pathian an fak a." 
Mark2:13 Tin, dîl lamah chuan a kal leh a, mipuiin an rawn pan dûl dûl a, ani chuan a lo zirtîr a." 
Mark2:14 A kal pahin, Alfaia fapa Levia chu chhiah khawnna hmuna ṭhu a hmu a, “Mi zui rawh,” a ti a. Ani chu a tho va, a zui ta a." 
Mark2:15 Tin, a inah ruai a ṭheh a, Isua leh a zirtîrte chu chhiahkhawntute leh mi sual tam takin chawhlui an rawn kîlpui hlawm a, tam takin amah an zui ve tawh a ni." 
Mark2:16 Farisai-te zînga Dân zirtîrtute chuan chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte a kîlpui an hmuh chuan a zirtîrte hnênah, “Engtizia nge chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte zînga a ei ve le?” an ti a." 
Mark2:17 Isuan chu chu a hriatin an hnênah, “Mi hrisêlten daktor an ngai lo va, mi bawrhsâwmten an ngai zâwk a ni. Mi felte lam tûr ni lovin mi sualte lam tûra lo kal ka ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Mark2:18 Johana zirtîrte leh Farisai-te chaw nghei ni chuan tute emaw an lo kal a, a hnênah, “Engati nge Johana zirtîrte leh Farisai zirtîrten chaw an nghei a, i zirtîrte lêmin an nghei ve loh?” an rawn ti a." 
Mark2:19 Isuan, “An zîngah moneitu a awm chhûng chuan mo hruaitute chuan chaw an nghei ngai em ni? Moneitu chu an awmpui chhûng chu chaw an nghei ngai lo." 
Mark2:20 Moneitu chu an hnên ata hruai bo hun a la awm ang a, chumi hunah erawh chuan an la nghei ve ang." 
Mark2:21 “Tu man puan hlui, puan thar la sûk lohvin an bel ngai lo, bel ta sela, a thar chuan puan hlui chu a kai ṭet ang a, a thlêr chu a nasa lehzual ang." 
Mark2:22 Uain thar pawh tu man savun ip hluiah an thun ngai lo, thun ang sela, uain chuan savun ip chu a tâwn keh ang a, uain chu a bua ang a, savun ip pawh chu a chhia ang; uain thar chu savun ip tharahte an thun zâwk ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Mark2:23 Sabat ni vawi khat chu buhpui hmunahte an kal tlang a, a zirtîrte chuan kal pahin a vuite chu an thliak a." 
Mark2:24 Farisai-te chuan a hnênah, “En teh, engtizia nge sabat nia tih thiang lo an tih ni?” an ti a." 
Mark2:25 Ani chuan, “Rilṭâma ei tûr an neih loh laia Davida leh a ṭhiante thil tih kha in chhiar ngai na nge?" 
Mark2:26 Abiathara Puithiam lalber a nih laia Pathian ina a luha, puithiamte chauh ei thian chhangdah chu a ei a, a ṭhiante pawh a pêk ve thu kha?” a ti a." 
Mark2:27 Amah vêkin, “Sabat hi mihring tâna siam a ni a, mihring hi sabat tâna siam a ni lo." 
Mark2:28 Tichuan, Mihring Fapa hi sabat chungah lam pawh hian Lal a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark3:1 Tin, sunagog-ah a lût a, chutah chuan mi pakhat kut zeng a lo awm a." 
Mark3:2 Amah an hêk theih nân sabat nia a tihdam dâwn leh dâwn loh an châng a. 
Mark3:3 Ani chuan kut zeng hnênah chuan, “A laiah hian lo chhuak teh,” a ti a." 
Mark3:4 “Sabat ni-ah tihṭhat nge thiang tihchhiat? Mi nun chhan nge thiang tihhlum?” tiin anni chu a zâwt a; mahse anni chu an ngawi reng a. 
Mark3:5 An thinlung sakzia a hriatin pawi a ti êm êm a, thinur taka anmahni a en vêl hnuin chu mi hnênah chuan, “I kut phar rawh,” a ti a." 
Mark3:6 A han phar chhuak a, a kut chu a lo dam ta a. Farisai-te erawh chu an chhuak a, amah an tihboral theih dân tûr ngaihtuahin Heroda pâwla mite nên chuan an inrâwn ta nghâl a." 
Mark3:7 Isua chu a zirtîrte nên dîl kam lamah an kal kiang a; Galili ram aṭangin mipui nasa takin an zui a. Judai ram aṭang te," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem aṭang te, Idumea ram aṭang te, Jordan râl aṭang te leh Tura leh Sidon bial aṭang te chuan mipui nasa takin a thiltihte an hria a, amah an rawn pan bawk a." 
Mark3:9 Mipuiin an rawn nêk chêp luat loh nân lawnglêng lo buatsaih tûrin a zirtîrte chu a hrilh a; 
Mark3:10 mi tam tak a tihdam tawh avângin na nei apiangin amah deh tumin an bawh huai huai si a. 
Mark3:11 Thlarau bawlhhlawhte pawh chuan amah an hriatin an bawkkhup a, “Nang Pathian Fapa chu i ni,” tiin an au ṭhîn a." 
Mark3:12 Tu nge a nih erawh chu an sawi a khap tlat a. 
Mark3:13 Tin, tlângram lamah a chho va, a mi duhzâwngte chu a ko va, anni chu a hnênah an lo kal a." 
Mark3:14 A hnêna awma, thu hrila, a tirh tûr," 
Mark3:15 ramhuaite pawh hnawt chhuak thei tûr mi sâwm leh pahnih a ruat a. 
Mark3:16 Chûngte chu: Simona, Petera a vuah tâk te," 
Mark3:17 Zebedaia fa Jakoba leh Jakoba unau Johana ‘Boanergia’ tia a vuah tâk te (chu chu ‘Khawpui ri fate’ tihna a ni)," 
Mark3:18 Andria te, Filipa te, Bartholomaia te, Mathaia te, Thoma te, Alfaia fa Jakoba te, Thadaia te, Kanan mi Simona te," 
Mark3:19 a mantîrtu Juda Iskariota te chu an ni. 
Mark3:20 Tin, inah a haw a, mipui an lo pung khâwm leh ta chiam a, chaw pawh an ei hlei thei lo va." 
Mark3:21 A chhûngte chuan an hriatin, “A â ta a nih chu,” an ti a, amah hruai tûrin an lo thawk a." 
Mark3:22 Jerusalem aṭanga Dân zirtîrtu lo chhuk thlate pawh chuan, “Belzebula a zâwl a nih hi,” te an ti a, “Ramhuai lal avângin alâwm ramhuaite a hnawh chhuah ṭhin,” te an ti bawk a." 
Mark3:23 Anni chu a ko va, tehkhin thuin an hnênah, “Setanan Setana vek engtin nge a hnawh chhuah theih ang?" 
Mark3:24 Ram pawh inṭhena mahni an indo chuan chu ram chu a ding thei lo. 
Mark3:25 Chhûngkua pawh inṭhena mahni an indo chuan chu mite chhûng chu an ding khawchhuak thei lo vang. 
Mark3:26 Setana pawh mahni inbeiin inkhing ta sela, a ding chhuak thei lo vang, a ral mai zâwk ang." 
Mark3:27 Mi chak chu an phuar hmasak zet loh chuan a ina lûtin a sum an lâksak mai thei hek lo, an phuar hnuah erawh chuan a in chu an ramsak thei tawh ang." 
Mark3:28 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u; miin sualna zawng zawng leh thil pawi tinrêng an sawite chu ngaihdam theih a ni ang. 
Mark3:29 Thlarau Thianghlim pawi sawi meuh erawh chu, tu mah, engtikah mah ngaihdam an ni lo vang, chatuan sual chu an ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark3:30 “Thlarau bawlhhlawh a zâwl a ni,” an tih avâng khân chu chu a sawi a ni." 
Mark3:31 A nu leh a unaute chu an lo thleng a, pâwnah an ding a, amah an kohtîr a." 
Mark3:32 A vêla mipui ṭhute chuan a hnênah, “En teh, pâwna saw, i nu leh i unaute leh i farnuten an ko va che,” an ti a." 
Mark3:33 Ani erawh chuan a chhâng a, “Ka nu leh ka unaute chu tute nge ni?” a ti a;" 
Mark3:34 a kianga ṭhute chu a han en vêl a, “En teh u, ka nu leh ka unaute hi." 
Mark3:35 Tu pawh Pathian duhzâwng ti chu, chu mite ngei chu, ka unau te, ka farnute, ka nu te an ni e,” a ti a." 
Mark4:1 Dîl kamah chuan a zirtîr leh ta a; mipui nasa tak an lo pung khâwm a, dîla lawngah chuan a chuang a, a ṭhu a; mipui zawng zawng chu dîl kam khawmualah chuan an awm a." 
Mark4:2 Tehkhin thuin thu tam tak a zirtîr a, a zirtîr lai chuan an hnênah, “Ngai thla teh u." 
Mark4:3 Buh chi thehtu buh chi thehin a feh a; 
Mark4:4 a han theh chuan a ṭhen kalkawngah a tla a, savaten an rawn tlân zo ta mai a." 
Mark4:5 A ṭhen pialtlêp chung lei pan hmunah a tla a, lei a chhah lo va, a lo ṭo thuai a;" 
Mark4:6 tin, ni a lo tlângsâng deuh va, a em vuai a, zung a kaih loh avângin a râwp ta mai a." 
Mark4:7 A ṭhen hnimhlîngnei zîngah a tla a, hnim chu a lo ṭhang a, a dîp ral a, a rah thei ta lo va." 
Mark4:8 Ṭhenkhat chu lei ṭhaah a tla a, a ṭo va, a ṭhang lian a, a rah ta a; a let sawmthum te, a let sawmruk te, a let za te a lo haw ta a,” a ti a." 
Mark4:9 “Ngaihthlâkna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se,” a ti bawk a." 
Mark4:10 A fâla a awm hnu chuan Sâwmpahnihte leh a ṭhuihruai dangte chuan tehkhin thute chu an zâwt fiah a. 
Mark4:11 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Pathian ram thu ril chu in hnêna pêk a ni a; pâwna mite tân erawh chuan tehkhin thu veka sawi a ni:" 
Mark4:12 ‘En fo siin an hmu fuh lo vang a, Ngaithla ngaithla siin a ngaihna an hre hek lo vang; Chuti ni lo sela chu an lo hawi kîr ang a, Ngaihdam an ni tûr,’ tih ang kha a nih theih nân,” a ti a." 
Mark4:13 Amah vêk chuan, “He tehkhin thu hi in hrethiam lo maw? Engtin nge tehkhin thu dang rêng rêng in hriatthiam theih ang?" 
Mark4:14 Buh chi thehtu chuan thu chu a theh a. 
Mark4:15 Kalkawnga tlate chu hetiang hi an ni: thu chu an hriatin Setana a lo kal thuai a; anmahnia thu theh chu a lâk zawhsak nghâl mai ṭhîn. 
Mark4:16 Chutiang bawkin pialtlêp hmuna thehte chu hetiang hi an ni: thu chu an hriat veleh lâwm takin an pawm nghâl a; 
Mark4:17 nimahsela, anmahniah chuan zung a kai lo va, rei lo tê chauh an daih a, chumi hnuah chuan thu avânga hrehawm emaw, tihduhdahna emaw a lo awm veleh an tlu nghâl mai ṭhîn." 
Mark4:18 Hnimhlîngnei zînga thehte pawh chu hêng mite ang hi an ni: thu chu an hria a. 
Mark4:19 Mahse, khawvêl lungkhamna te, hausak nawmchenna te, thil dang châkna te a lo lût a, thu chu a rawn dîp ral a, a rah ta ṭhîn lo." 
Mark4:20 Lei ṭha a thehte erawh chu: thu chu hriaa, pawma, a lêt sawmthum te, a lêt sawmruk te leh a lêt za tea rah tate hi an ni,” a ti a." 
Mark4:21 Amah vêkin an hnênah, “Khâwnvâr hi khova khuh tûrin emaw, khum hnuaia dah tûrin emaw an rawn chhi ngai em ni? A dahnaa dah tûr a ni dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Mark4:22 Eng mah puan loh tûra thuhrûk a ni hek lo. 
Mark4:23 Ngaihthlâkna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se,” a ti a." 
Mark4:24 Tin, amah vêkin an hnênah, “In thil ngaihthlâk chu ngai ngun rawh u, in tehna ngaiin an tehsak ang che u, an pe tam zâwk mah ang che u." 
Mark4:25 A nei an pêk belhchhah ang a, a nei lo chu a neih chhun pawh an lâksak ang,” a ti a." 
Mark4:26 Amah vekin an hnênah, “Pathian ram chu miin a lovah chi a theh a," 
Mark4:27 zânah a mutsan a, chhûnah a tho va, chi chu engtia lo ṭiaka, lo ṭhang nge tih a hre lo ang hi a ni." 
Mark4:28 Lei chuan amahin rah a rawn chhuahtîr mai ṭhîn, a tîr berah a kûng, a dawtah a vui, chumi zawhah a vuia a fang pum chu." 
Mark4:29 A rah chu a lo hmin a, seng a lo hun tâk avângin a favahin a ât nghâl ṭhîn,” a ti bawk a." 
Mark4:30 Tin, amah vêkin, “Pathian ram chu eng nên nge kan teh anga, eng tehkhin thu hmangin nge kan sawi fiah ang?" 
Mark4:31 Anṭam chi fang ang hi a ni, an theh lai chuan leia chi zawng zawnga tê ber a ni a," 
Mark4:32 an han theh hnu chuan thlai dang zawng zawng aia lianin a lo ṭhang a, zâr lian tak takte a rawn chhuah a, chunglêng savate pawh a bukah chuan an riak thei ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Mark4:33 Chutiang tehkhin thu tam tak hmang chuan an hriatthiam tâwk tûrin thu chu an hnênah a sawi ṭhin a; 
Mark4:34 tehkhin thu lo chuan an hnênah thu a sawi ngai lo; ama zirtîrte hnênah erawh chuan fianrialah engkim a hrilh fiah ṭhîn. 
Mark4:35 Chumi nia khua a lo tlai lam chuan an hnênah, “Râl lehlamah sâwn i kai ang u,” a ti a." 
Mark4:36 Mipuite chu an kalsan a, a chuanna lawng chuan ani chu an kalpui a, lawng dangte pawh an tel ve a." 
Mark4:37 Tin, thlipui na tak a lo tleh ta a, tuifâwnte chu lawngah a rawn invawrh lût a, a khat dâwn ta mai a." 
Mark4:38 Ani chu lawng mei lamah lukham khamin a lo muhîl a. An han kai tho va, “Zirtîrtu, kan boral dâwn hi, pawi i ti lo vem ni?” an ti a." 
Mark4:39 Ani chu a lo tho va, thli chu a hau va, dîl hnênah pawh chuan, “Ngawi la, awm hle hle rawh,” a ti a. Thli chu a bâng a, a lo reh ta ṭhup mai a." 
Mark4:40 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Engah nge in hlauh? Rinna rêng in la nei na nge?” a ti a." 
Mark4:41 An hlau ta êm êm a, “He mi hi tu nge ni le! Thli leh dîl lam pawhin a thu an awih hi?” an inti a." 
Mark5:1 Dîl râl Gerasin mite ram chu an va thleng a. 
Mark5:2 Lawng ata a chhuak chu thlarau bawlhhlawh pai mi pakhat, thlân hmun aṭanga lo kal chuan, a rawn pan vat a." 
Mark5:3 Chu mi chu thlânahte a chêng ṭhîn a, tu mahin khaidiat pawhin an phuar thei lo va," 
Mark5:4 khaidiata phuarin kawlte buntîr ṭhîn mah se, khaidiatte chu a pawt chat a, kawlte chu a tisawm ṭhîn; tu mah tudawl thei an awm lo." 
Mark5:5 A chhûn a zân mai hian thlânahte leh tlângahte chuan a au a au ṭhîn a, lungte pawhin a inzai ṭhîn a." 
Mark5:6 Hla tak aṭangin Isua chu a hmu a, a lam panin a tlân a, kûnin chibai a bûk a." 
Mark5:7 Aw ring takin a au va, “Isu, Chungnungbera Pathian Fapa, kan chungthu-ah rawn inrawlh i tum elo? Mi nghaisa lul lo tûrin Pathian hmingin ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
Mark5:8 Ani lah chuan, “Thlarau bawlhhlawhpa, a chhûng ata kha lo chhuak rawh,” a lo ti si a." 
Mark5:9 “I hming eng nge ni?” tiin a zâwt a. Ani chuan, “Ka hming chu Sângruka a ni, kan tam êm êm a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark5:10 Chumi ram ata tichhuak lo tûrin a ngên chiam a. 
Mark5:11 Chumi tlâng pangah chuan vawk rual tam deuh mai an tla a. 
Mark5:12 A hnênah chuan, “Vawk hnênah sâwn min kaltîr la, an kawchhûngah kan va lût ang e,” tiin an ngên a." 
Mark5:13 Isuan a phalsak ta a. Tichuan, thlarau bawlhhlawh chu an lo chhuak a, vawk kawchhûngah chuan an lût a. Vawk rual chu sânghnih lai an ni, khâm kovah chuan an tlân liam a, dîlah chuan an tla hlum ta a." 
Mark5:14 A vêngtute chu an tlânchhia a, khua leh a chhehvêla mite chu an va hrilh a. Tichuan, eng thil nge lo thleng ta tih en tûrin an lo kal hlawm a." 
Mark5:15 Isua hnên an lo thlen chuan ramhuai man, Sângruka kha, puan sina rilru pangngai pua lo ṭhu an va hmu a; hlauhawm an ti êm êm a." 
Mark5:16 Chûng hmutute chuan ramhuai man chunga thil thlengte leh vawk chanchinte chu an lo hrilh bawk a. 
Mark5:17 Chûng mite chuan Isua chu an bial ata chhuak tûrin an ngên a. 
Mark5:18 Isua chu lawnga a chuan dâwn laiin ramhuai mana khân a hnêna awm reng a ngên a; 
Mark5:19 mahse, a phal lo va, “I inah, i chhûngte hnênah haw la, Lalpan i tân thil a tihsak che leh a khawngaihzia che hi va hrilh zâwk tawh,” a ti a." 
Mark5:20 Ani chu a kal a, Dekapoli khuaahte chuan Isuan thil a tihsakte chu a tlângaupui ta a, mi zawng zawngin mak an ti hle a." 
Mark5:21 Tin, Isua chu lawnga râl lehlama a kai leh chuan mipui nasa tak a hnênah an lo pung khâwm a; dîl kamah chuan a awm a." 
Mark5:22 Sunagog hotu zînga pakhat, a hming Jaira chu a lo kal a, amah a han hmuh chuan a ke bulah a bawkkhup a," 
Mark5:23 “Ka fanu naupang tê a thi lek lek a, a lo harh a, a lo dam leh theih nân a chungah i kut va nghat teh,” tiin a ngên chiam a." 
Mark5:24 Isua chuan a zui ta a, mipui nasa takin amah chu an zui ve a, an nêk huai huai bawk a." 
Mark5:25 Hmeichhe pakhat, kum sâwm leh pahnih thi pût tawh hi a awm a." 
Mark5:26 Daktor tam takin nasa takin an enkawl tawh a, a neih zawng zawng a hman ral hnu pawhin ṭhat lam pan ahnêkin a zual zâwk mah si a." 
Mark5:27 Isua chanchin a lo hriat veleh chuan hnung lamah mipui kârah chuan a lo kal a, a puan chu a va dek a." 
Mark5:28 “A puan chauh pawh dek ila ka dam ngei ang,” a ti a ni." 
Mark5:29 Tichuan, chawplehchilhin a thi pût chu a lo hul ta a, a na chu a dam ta tih a taksaah chuan a inhre ta a." 
Mark5:30 Isua pawh chuan amah aṭangin thiltihtheihna a chhuak tih a inhre nghâl a, mipui zîngah chuan a hawi vêl a, “Tu nge ka puan dek kha?” a ti a." 
Mark5:31 A zirtîrte chuan “Mipuiin an nêk huai huai che i hmu si a, engtizia nge ‘tu nge mi dek?’ i tih le?” an ti a." 
Mark5:32 Ani erawh chuan a dektu hmuh tumin a en vêl a. 
Mark5:33 Tichuan, a chunga thil lo thleng ta chu hriain hmeichhia chu hlau leh khûr chungin a lo kal a, a hmaah a bawkkhup a, engkim dik takin a hrilh ta a." 
Mark5:34 Ani chuan, “Ka fanu, i rinna hi i dam phah a ni e, thlamuang takin kal ta la, i natna ata chu lo dam hlen tawh ang che,” a ti a." 
Mark5:35 A la ṭawng lai mêk chuan Jaira in aṭanga lo kalte chuan, “I fanu a thi ta. Engah nge zirtîrtu hi i la tihhah cheu dâwn?” an rawn ti a." 
Mark5:36 Isua erawh chuan an thu sawi chu a lo hre ve a, sunagog hotupa hnênah chuan, “Hlau suh, ring mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Mark5:37 Petera te, Jakoba te, Jakoba unau Johana te chauh lo chu mi dang tu mahin an zui ve a phal ta lo va." 
Mark5:38 Sunagog hotupa in chu an va thleng a, ri mur mur leh ṭap tuar tuara chiau vawng vawngte chu a va hmu a." 
Mark5:39 A luh pah chuan an hnênah, “Engati nge in buaia in ṭah vak vak le? Naupang chu a thi lo ve, a muhîl a ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Mark5:40 Anni chuan an nuihsan mai a. Tichuan, an za-in a hnawt chhuak a, naupang nu leh pa leh amah zuitute chu a hruai a, naupang mutna hmunah chuan an lût a." 
Mark5:41 Tin, naupang kut chu a chelh a, a hnênah, “Talitha, kum,” a ti a, chu chu, “Mami, tho rawh,” tihna a ni." 
Mark5:42 Hmeichhe naupang chu a lo tho va, a kal thei ta mai a, amah chu kum sâwm leh pahnih mi a ni. Mak an ti nasa êm êm a." 
Mark5:43 Ani erawh chuan an hnênah, “Hei hi tu man hre suh se,” a ti tlat a. “Ei tûr pe rawh u,” a ti bawk a." 
Mark6:1 Chu hmun chu a chhuahsan a, an khaw lamah a kal ta a, a zirtîrte pawh chuan an zui zêl a." 
Mark6:2 Sabat ni a lo ni a, sunagog-ah chuan a han zirtîr ṭan ta a; mi tam tak an awm a, a thu an hriat chuan mak an ti êm êm a, “Hêng hi khawi aṭanga a hriat nge? A dawn hi eng finna nge ni-a, chuti kauva thiltihtheihna a neih le?" 
Mark6:3 Mari fa, Jakoba te, Josea te, Juda te, Simona te unaupa mistiri kha a ni lo vem ni? A farnute pawh kan zîngah an awm lo vem ni?” te an ti a; amah chu an hmu thiam ta lo va." 
Mark6:4 Isua chuan an hnênah, “Zâwlnei chu ama khaw lamah te, a laichîn te leh a chhûngte zîngah lo chuan an chawimawi ṭhîn.” a tihsan a." 
Mark6:5 Tin, damlo tlêm te chunga kut nghata a tihdam chauh lo chu chutah chuan thil mak rêng a ti thei lo." 
Mark6:6 An rin loh avâng chuan mak a ti hle a.
