Mark6:7 Tin, zirtîr chung zêlin khuate a fang vêl a. Sâwmpahnihte chu a ko va, pahnih zêla inkawpin a tîr chhuak a, thlarau bawlhhlawhte chunga thuneihna pawh a pe bawk a;" 
Mark6:8 kalkawng atân tiang chauh lo chu chhang pawh, iptê pawh, an kâwnghrênah pawisa pawh pai lo tûrin a ti tlat a," 
Mark6:9 pheikhawk an bun a phal a, kawr pahnih an hâk erawh chu a phal lo." 
Mark6:10 An hnênah chuan, “In chhuahsan leh hma chu in va thlen in ngaiah chuan chêng reng ang che u." 
Mark6:11 Khawii khua pawhin an lawm loh che ua, in thu an ngaihthlâk loh chuan, chu khua in chhuahsan dâwnah, an tihdik lohzia hriattîr nân in kephaha vaivut chu thing thla ang che u,” a ti bawk a." 
Mark6:12 Tichuan, an kal chhuak a, “Sim rawh u,” tiin thu an hril a." 
Mark6:13 Ramhuai tam tak an hnawt chhuak a, damlo tam tak hriak an hnawih a, an tidam bawk a." 
Mark6:14 Isua hming chu a than tâk êm avângin Lal Heroda chuan a lo hre ve ta a. Mi ṭhenkhat, “Baptistu Johana kha mitthi zîng ata a lo tho leh ta a, hêng thiltihtheihnate hian amahah a thawk a nih chu,” tite an awm a," 
Mark6:15 mi dangin, “Elija a nih chu” an ti a; a ṭhenin, “Zâwlnei, hmânlai zâwlnei zînga pakhat ang kha a nih chu,” te an ti a." 
Mark6:16 Heroda erawh chuan a lo hriatin, “Johana, a lu ka tansak kha a ni ang, a lo tho leh ta a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Mark6:17 He Heroda hi a ni, a unau Filipa nupui, Herodi, nupuia neihsaktu, chumi avâng chuan Johana chu a mantîr a, tân inah a khung a ni." 
Mark6:18 Johana chuan Heroda hnênah, “I unau nupui i chhuhsak hi a thiang lo ve,” a ti a." 
Mark6:19 Chuvâng chuan, Herodi chuan a hal ta riau a, tihhlum pawh a duh a; mahse, a thei si lo;" 
Mark6:20 Herodan Johana chu mi fel leh mi thianghlim a nih a hria a, a ṭih êm êm a, a hum tlat a ni; a thu a ngaihthlâk chuan a inngaihtuah buai hle ṭhîn a; mahse, châk takin a ngaithla ṭhîn." 
Mark6:21 Heroda chuan a mi ropui te, sipai hotu lian te, Galili rama mi liante a sâwm a, a pian champhaphâk ruai a ṭheh lai chuan hun remchâng a lo awm ta a." 
Mark6:22 Herodi fanu chu a lo lût a, a lâm a, Heroda leh a ruai kîlpuite chu a tilâwm ta hle a; lal chuan nula hnênah chuan, “I duh apiang mi dîl rawh, ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Mark6:23 “Eng pawh mi dîl apiang, ka ram chanve hial pawh ka pe ang che,” tiin a tiam bawk a." 
Mark6:24 Ani chu a chhuak a, a nu hnênah chuan, “Eng nge ka dîl ang?” a va ti a. A nu chuan, “Baptistu Johana lu le,” a lo ti a." 
Mark6:25 Hmanhmawh takin lal hnênah chuan a kîr leh a, “Thlêngah Baptistu Johana lu mi pe nghâl rawh,” a ti a. Lal chuan pawi a ti êm êm a;" 
Mark6:26 mahse, a thutiam leh a ruai kîlpuite avâng chuan a hnial hreh a." 
Mark6:27 Lal chuan vêngtu sipai pakhat a tîr ta nghâl a; tân inah chuan Johana lu chu a tan a," 
Mark6:28 thlêngin a rawn la a, nula chu a pe a, ani chuan a nu a pe leh a." 
Mark6:29 Chu chu a zirtîrten an hriatin an va kal a, a ruang chu an hlâwm a, thlânah an zalh ta a." 
Mark6:30 Tirhkohte kha Isua hnênah an lo kal khâwm a, an thil tih apiangte leh an thu, zirtîr zawng zawng chu an hrilh vek a." 
Mark6:31 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Keimahniho chauhvin fianrialah kal hrang ila, in châwl rih dâwn nia,” a ti a. Mi tam tak an insûl zut zut a, chaw takngial pawh an ei hman si lo va." 
Mark6:32 Tichuan, fianrial pan chuan lawngin an kal ta a." 
Mark6:33 An chhuak chu mi tam takin an hmu a, anni an ni tih an hriat chuan khawmual lamah, khaw tin aṭangin, an tlân khâwm a, an lo lehkhalh a." 
Mark6:34 Lawng ata a lo chhuah chuan mipui nasa tak a hmu a, vêngtu nei lo berâm ang an nih avângin a khawngaih ta êm êm a, ṭhahnemngai takin a zirtîr ta a." 
Mark6:35 Khua pawh a lo tlai ta hle a, a zirtîrte chu a hnênah an lo kal a, “Hei hi hmun thlalêr a ni a, khua pawh a lo tlai ta a," 
Mark6:36 kan kiang vêl lovahte leh khuaahte mahni ei tûr eng emaw tal an zawn theih nân anniho hi kaltîr ta che,” an rawn ti a." 
Mark6:37 Ani erawh chuan, “Nangmahnin ei tûr pe zâwk rawh u,” tiin a lo chhâng a. Anni chuan, “Chhang duli zahnih man leiin ei tûr kan pe em ni ang?” an ti a." 
Mark6:38 Ani chuan, chhang eng zât nge in neih, han en teh u,” a ti a. An neih zât an han hriat chuan, “Tlang nga, sangha pahnih nên,” an ti a." 
Mark6:39 Ani chuan an vaiin hlobet hring hmunah chuan a pâwl pâwla ṭhuttîr tûrin zirtîrte chu thu a pe ta a; 
Mark6:40 za te, sawmnga tein an ṭhu ta hlawm a." 
Mark6:41 Ani chuan chhang panga leh sangha pahnih chu a la a, vân lam enin malsâwmna a sawi a, chhang chu a phel a, mipui hnêna sem tûrin zirtîrte chu a pe a; sangha pawh chu a sem ṭheuh va." 
Mark6:42 An zavai chuan an ei a, an tlai ta ṭheuh va;" 
Mark6:43 chhang leh sangha sem bâng chu bâwm sâwm leh pahnihah an dah khat a. 
Mark6:44 Chhang eitute chu patling hlîr pawh sângnga an ni. 
Mark6:45 Mipuite chu a ṭintîr vêl chhûngin râl lehlam Bethsaida-a lo va kal hmasa tûrin a zirtîrte chu lawngah a chuan luihtîr ta nghâl a. 
Mark6:46 Mipui chu a thlah fel hnu chuan ṭawngṭai tûrin tlângah a kal ta a. 
Mark6:47 Khua a lo thim a, lawng chu dîl laiah a awm tawh a, ani erawh chu amah chauhvin khawmualah a la awm a." 
Mark6:48 Thliin a ni lo lama a nem avâng chuan mangang taka lawng an kar chu a hmu a; khawfîng chah dâwn vêlin dîl chungah chuan an lam panin a kal a, kal pelh a tum a." 
Mark6:49 Dîl chunga a kal an hmuh chuan hmuithla emaw an ti a," 
Mark6:50 hlauvin an au ta chûl a. “Thlaphâng suh u, keimah ka ni e, hlau mah ta che u,” a ti a." 
Mark6:51 Lawngah chuan a chuang lût ve ta a, thli pawh chu a bâng ta mai a. Tichuan, mak an ti êm êm a," 
Mark6:52 chhang thu kha a awmzia an hre si lo va, an rilruin a man pha lo va ni." 
Mark6:53 Dîl an kân a, Genesaret ramah chuan an va kai a, lawng chu an thlung a." 
Mark6:54 Lawng ata chu an chhuak a, miten ani chu an lo hre nghâl a." 
Mark6:55 Chumi bial pumah chuan an tlân ta sung sung a, a awma an hriatna apiangah damlote chu an mutna chawpin an zâwn khâwm a." 
Mark6:56 Khaw tê-ah te, khaw lianah te, lovah te, khawiah pawh a kalna apiangah damlote chu an bazâr hmunahte an muttîr a, a puanfêm pawh deh theih an ngên hlawm a; tin, a dek apiang chu an dam ta zêl a." 
Mark7:1 Farisai-te chu, Dân zirtîrtu ṭhenkhat Jerusalem aṭanga lo kalte nên a hnênah an lo kal ho va;" 
Mark7:2 a zirtîr ṭhenkhatten kut bawlhhlawha chaw an ei chu an hmu a, chu chu ‘kut sil loh’ tihna a ni." 
Mark7:3 Farisai-te bâkah Juda-ho zawng zawng pawhin upate thu rochhiah zâwmin kut an sil zet loh chuan eng mah an ei ngai lo. 
Mark7:4 An bazâr kai haw pawh an insil zet loh chuan eng mah an ei ngai lo. Thil dang tam tak pawh zawm tûr dawn chhâwn an nei - no sil te, bêl sil te, khum sil ang te hi." 
Mark7:5 Chutichuan, Farisai-te leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan, “Engati nge i zirtîrte hian upa thu rochhiah zâwm lovin kut bawlhhlawha chaw an ei ni?” an ti a." 
Mark7:6 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Nangni mi vervêkho thu Isaian hetia a lo hril lâwk hi a tidik zet mai: ‘He mite hian an ṭawngkam chauhvin mi chawimawi a. An thinlung erawh chuan mi hlat si." 
Mark7:7 Thurin ang hrimin mihring thupêkte an zirtîr a, An mi biakna hi a thlâwn mai a ni,’ a tih kha." 
Mark7:8 Pathian thupêkte in hlamchhiah a, mihring thu rochhiah te chu in vuan tlat a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Mark7:9 Amah vêkin, “Nangmahni thu rochhiah in kenkawh theih nân Pathian thupêk hêl dân in thiam teh e." 
Mark7:10 Mosia chuan, ‘I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh, mahni nu emaw, pa emaw sawichhia chu a thi ngei tûr a ni,’ a ti a;" 
Mark7:11 nangni erawh chuan, miin a nu emaw, a pa emaw hnênah, ‘Mi chhawrna tûr zawng zawng Korban (chu chu ‘Pathian hnêna pêk’ tihna a ni) a ni tawh,’ a tih chuan" 
Mark7:12 a nu tân emaw, a pa tân emaw eng mah a tihsak in phal tawh ṭhîn lo." 
Mark7:13 Tichuan, in thu rochhiah avâng hian Pathian thu chu in bawh bo a nih hi, chutiang chu tam tak in ti ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Mark7:14 Mipuite chu a ko khâwm leh a, an hnênah, “In za-in ka thu hi ngaithla ula, hei hi hre fiah rawh u;" 
Mark7:15 pâwn lam aṭanga mihring chhûnga lût eng mahin amah a tibawlhhlawh thei lo, mihring chhûng lam aṭanga lo chhuak zâwk chu a ni amah tibawlhhlawh ṭhîntu chu,” a ti a." 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Mipui chu ina a luhsan hnuin a zirtîrte chuan tehkhin thu chu an zâwt fiah ta a. Ani chuan, “Nangni pawh chuti êma mâwl in ni maw?" 
Mark7:18 Eng pawh pâwn lam ata mihring chhûnga lût apiang," 
Mark7:19 a thinlung chhûnga lût lovin a pum chhûngah a lût zâwk a, dailênnaah a chhuah leh mai avângin amah chu a tibawlhhlawh thei lo tih in hre lâwm ni?” a ti a. (Chutiang chuan ei tûr tinrêng hi a sawi thiang ta vek a ni.)" 
Mark7:20 Mihring chhûng lam aṭanga lo chhuak chuan chumi ngei chuan, mihring hi a tibawlhhlawh ṭhîn a ni." 
Mark7:21 Mihring thinlung chhûng lam aṭang chuan ngaihtuahna sual - inngaihna te, rûkrûkna te, tualthahna te, uirena te," 
Mark7:22 awhna te, suahsualna te leh bumna te, hurna te, îtsîkna te, Pathian pawi sawina te, chapona te, ho taka chêtna te a lo chhuak si ṭhîn a." 
Mark7:23 Hêng thil sual zawng zawng hi chhûng lam aṭanga lo chhuak a ni a, mihring a tibawlhhlawh ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark7:24 A tho va, chuta ṭang chuan Tura bialah a kal ta a; in pakhatah a va awm a, tu ma hriat a duh lo na a, a inthup hlei thei si lo." 
Mark7:25 Thlarau bawlhhlawh pai fanu nei nu pakhat pawh chuan a chanchin a lo hriat veleh a rawn pan a, a ke bulah chuan a bawkkhup a." 
Mark7:26 Chu nu chu Grik a ni a, Suria rama Foiniki biala piang a ni. A fanu kawchhûng ata ramhuai chu hnawt chhuak tûrin a ngên a." 
Mark7:27 Isua erawh chuan a hnênah, “Fate chu tlai phawt rawh se, fate chaw lâksaka, ui hnêna pêk chu a dik lo ve,” a lo tihsan a." 
Mark7:28 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “A ni khawp mai, Lalpa; nimah sela, dawhkân hnuaia uite pawhin fate ei nawi tlate chu an ei ṭhîn alâwm,” a ti a." 
Mark7:29 “I thu sawi avâng chuan haw ta la, ramhuai chu i fanu kawchhûng ata a chhuak tawh e,” a ti a." 
Mark7:30 Ani chu a hâwng a, a fa chu khuma a mu a va hmu a, ramhuai chuan a lo chhuahsan tawh a ni." 
Mark7:31 Tura bial aṭang chuan a chhuak leh a, Sidon tlawhin Dekapoli bial chu kal tlangin Galili dîl a lo thleng leh a." 
Mark7:32 Bengngawng pakhat, ṭawng pawh ṭawng fiah thei lo hi a hnênah an rawn hruai a, a chunga kut nghat tûrin an ngên a." 
Mark7:33 Isua chuan mipui zîng ata chu a hruai hrang a, a kut zung chuan a beng kuate chu a khawihsak a," 
Mark7:34 a leiah chil a hnawmsak a, vân lam enin a thaw huai a, a hnênah, “Effata,” a ti a, (chu chu ‘lo inhawng rawh,’ tihna a ni.)" 
Mark7:35 Tichuan, a beng chu a lo vâr a, a lei phuarna te pawh chu a lo inphelh a, fiah takin a ṭawng thei ta a." 
Mark7:36 Tu mah hrilh lo tûrin anniho chu a ti tlat a; nimahsela, a khap nasat veleh an tlângaupui zual sauh zêl a." 
Mark7:37 Mak an ti nasa êm êm a, “Thil a va han ti ṭha ṭhîn tak êm! Bengngawng beng a tivâr a, ṭawngtheilote pawh a ṭawngtîr hi,” an ti a." 
Mark8:1 Chutih lai vêl chuan mipui nasa tak an lo pung khâwm leh a, ei tûr eng mah an nei lo va. A zirtîrte chu a ko va," 
Mark8:2 “Mipuiho hi ka khawngaih êm êm a ni, ka hnênah ni thum an awm tawh a, ei tûr lah an nei ta si lo;" 
Mark8:3 rilṭâma ka hawtîr mai chuan kawng lakah an ṭâmchhâwl mai ang, ṭhenkhatte phei chu an lo kalna a hla hle si a,” a ti a." 
Mark8:4 A zirtîrte chuan, “Tu nge hetiang hmun thlalêrah hêngho puarna khawp chhang hmu thei ang?” tiin an chhâng a." 
Mark8:5 Ani chuan, “Chhang eng zât nge in neih?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Pasarih,” an ti a." 
Mark8:6 Tichuan, mipui chu leia ṭhu tûrin thu a pe a, chhang pasarih chu a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin a phel a, an hnêna sem tûrin a zirtîrte a pe a; mipui chu an sem ta a." 
Mark8:7 Nghatê tlêm an nei bawk a, chûng pawh chu malsâwmna a sawi zawhin a semtîr a." 
Mark8:8 Tichuan, an ei a, an tlai ta hlawm a. An sem bâng chu bâwm sarihah an dah khat a." 
Mark8:9 Mipuite chu sângli lai an ni; anniho chu a ṭîntîr a," 
Mark8:10 ani pawh chu a zirtîrte nên lawngah an chuang ve nghâl a, Dalmanutha ram an va thleng a." 
Mark8:11 Farisai-te an lo kal a, an rawn hnial a. Amah fiah nân vân ata chhinchhiahna thil mak an phût a." 
Mark8:12 Thaw ipikthlâk a ti hle a, “Engati nge tûnlai mite hian chhinchhiahna thil mak an zawn? Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, tûnlai mite hi chhinchhiahna thil mak rêng rêng entîr an ni lo vang,” a ti a." 
Mark8:13 Anni chu a kalsan a, lawngah chuan a chuang leh a, râl lehlam panin a kal ta a." 
Mark8:14 A zirtîrte chuan chhang an lo ken theihnghilh a, lawngah chuan chhang tlang khat chauh lo chu a dang rêng an nei lo." 
Mark8:15 Ani chuan, “Farisai-te dawidim leh Heroda dawidim lakah chuan invêng ula, fîmkhur rawh u,” tiin anni chu a han zilh a." 
Mark8:16 “Chhang kan nei hauh lo mai le,” tiin an inbia a." 
Mark8:17 Isuan a lo hriatin, “Engati nge chhang in neih loh thu ngawt in buaipui tâk? In la man lovin in la hrethiam lo ta cheu a ni maw? In va ngawng ve maw le!" 
Mark8:18 Mit nei siin in hmu lo maw? Beng nei siin in hre lo maw? In theihnghilh ta em ni? 
Mark8:19 Chhang pangaa mi sângnga ka hrai ṭum khân eng zât nge bâng kha?” a ti a. 
Mark8:20 “Bâwm sâwm leh pahnih,” an ti a. “A nih leh, mi sângli chhang pasariha ka hrai khân eng zât nge bâng kha?” a ti a. “Bâwm sarih,” an ti a." 
Mark8:21 Tichuan, an hnênah, “In la hrethiam lo ta cheu maw?” a ti a." 
Mark8:22 Bethsaida chu an lo thleng a, a hnênah mitdel an rawn hruai a, amah dek tûrin an ngên a." 
Mark8:23 Ani chuan mitdel kut chu a chelh a, khua ata chu a kai chhuak a. A mitah chil a chhâk a, a khawih a, “Khua i hmu thei em?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Mark8:24 Ani chu a han dâk a, “Mi ka hmu, thing angin an kal zut zut mai,” a ti a." 
Mark8:25 A mit chu a khawihsak leh a, a han meng vak a, a lo dam felin engkim fiah takin a hmu thei ta a." 
Mark8:26 “Khuaah pawh lût lovin haw nghâl rawh,” a ti a." 
Mark8:27 Isua leh a zirtîrte chu Filipa Kaisari chhehvêl khuaahte chuan an kal ta a. Kawngah chuan a zirtîrte hnênah, “Miten tu nge nia mi sawi?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Mark8:28 Anni chuan, “ ‘Baptistu Johana,’ ti che an awm a, a ṭhenin ‘Elija,’ an ti che a, ṭhenkhat erawh chuan, ‘Zâwlnei tu-a emaw’ te an ti che,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Mark8:29 Ani chuan, “A nih, nangnin tu nge nia mi hriat?” tiin a zâwt a. Petera chuan, “Krista chu i ni,” a ti a." 
Mark8:30 Tichuan, a chanchin chu tu mah hrilh tawp lo tûrin a ti a." 
Mark8:31 Tin, Mihring Fapa chuan thil tam tak tuar ngei tûr a nih thu te, upate, puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtuten an duh loh tûr thu te, an thah ngei tûr thu te, ni thum china a thawhleh ngei tûr thu te chu a zirtîr ṭan ta a." 
Mark8:32 Chûng thu chu chiang takin a sawi a. Petera erawh chuan ani chu a hruai hrang a, a zilhhau ta a." 
Mark8:33 Ani chuan a hawisan a, a zirtîrte lam chu a hawi a, “Setan, kal bo daih rawh, Pathian duh dâna ngaihtuah lovin mihring duh dânin i ngaihtuah a nih hi,” tiin Petera chu a hau ve ta thung a." 
Mark8:34 Mipui chu a zirtîrte nên chuan a ko va, an hnênah, “Tu pawh mi zui duh chuan mahni inngaihtuah chang lovin mahni kraws puin mi zui rawh se." 
Mark8:35 Tu pawh mahni nun humhim tum chuan an chân ang a, tu pawh keimah avâng leh Chanchin Ṭha avânga nun chân chuan an humhim ang." 
Mark8:36 Miin khawvêl hi a pumin nei vek sela a nun chân si se, a tân eng nge sâwt ang?" 
Mark8:37 Miin a nun aiah eng nge a pêk theih ang? 
Mark8:38 Tûnlai mi, uire hmang leh sual tak zînga ka thu leh kei mi zahpui apiang chu Mihring Fapa pawh hian Vântirhkoh thianghlimte nêna a Pa ropuina nên a lo kal hunah chuan anni chu a zahpui ve ang,” a ti a." 
Mark9:1 “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, heta dingho ṭhenkhatte hi, Pathian ram thiltihtheihna nêna lo thleng an hmuh hma loh chu thi lo tûr an awm,” a ti bawk a." 
Mark9:2 Tin, ni ruk hnu chuan Isuan Petera te, Johana te leh Jakoba te chu tlâng sâng takah hruaiin anmahni chauh a chhohpui a; an hmaah chuan a hmêl lan dân a lo danglam ta a." 
Mark9:3 A silhfênte pawh chu, leia puan su tu rêng rêngin an sûk vâr theih loh khawpin a lo vâr ta sur mai a." 
Mark9:4 Elija leh Mosia chu an hnênah an rawn inlâr a, Isua nên an inbia a." 
Mark9:5 Petera chuan Isua hnênah, “Rabi, heta kan awm hi a ṭha e; bâwktê pathum kan khawh ang e, i tân pakhat, Mosia tân pakhat, Elija tân pakhat,” a ti a." 
Mark9:6 An hlauh êm avângin sawi tûr ahleih pawh an hre lo va ni. 
Mark9:7 Tin, chhûm a lo zîng a, anniho chu a rawn khuh a, chhûm aṭang chuan aw a lo chhuak a, “Hei hi ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka chu a ni, ama thu hi ngai rawh u,” tiin." 
Mark9:8 Tichuan, an han en vêl thuai a, an zîngah chuan Isua chauh lo chu tu mah dang an hmu ta lo va." 
Mark9:9 Tlâng ata chu an chhuk laiin Mihring Fapa chu mitthi zîng ata a thawhleh hma chuan an thil hmuhte chu tu mah hrilh hauh lo tûrin a ti a. 
Mark9:10 Tichuan, chu thu chu an vawng reng a, ‘Mitthi zîng ata thawhleh,’ tih chu eng tihna ni ang maw tiin an sawi ho ṭhîn a." 
Mark9:11 Anni chuan, “Engtizia nge Dân zirtîrtuten, ‘Elija a lo kal hmasa zet tûr a ni’ an tih le?” tiin Isua chu an zâwt a." 
Mark9:12 Ani chuan, “Elija chu engkim siam ṭha tûra lo kal hmasa rêng tûr alâwm. Engtizia nge Mihring Fapa hi thil tam tak tuara hmuhsitin a awm dâwn a ni tih ziak a nih si le?" 
Mark9:13 Nimahsela, ka hrilh a che u, Elija chu a lo kal tawh a, a chanchin ziak ang ngei khân a chungah an duh duhin an tih kha,” a ti a." 
Mark9:14 Tin, zirtîrte hnên an zu thleng a, an vêla mipui nasa tak chu an hmu a, Dân zirtîrtute nên an lo inhnial a." 
Mark9:15 Amah an hmuh veleh mipui zawng zawng chuan mak an ti hle a; a hnên lamah an tlân a, chibai an bûk a." 
Mark9:16 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Hêngho nên hian eng thu-ah nge in lo inhnial?” a ti a." 
Mark9:17 Mipui zînga pakhat chuan a chhâng a, “Zirtîrtu, ka fapa, ramhuai ṭawngtheilo pai chu, i hnênah ka rawn hruai a;" 
Mark9:18 a man apiangin a paih tlu ṭhîn a; a chil phuante a tla a, a hâte a ṭhial a, a khawng tlat mai ṭhîn. I zirtîrte hi hnawt chhuak tûrin ka ti a, an thei si lo,” a ti a." 
Mark9:19 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ṭhangthar, rinna tlachhamte u, eng chen nge in hnêna ka awm anga, eng chen nge ka dawh theih dâwn che u? Ka hnênah han hruai teh u,” a ti a." 
Mark9:20 A hnênah chuan an hruai a, ramhuai bawlhhlawh chuan Isua a hmuh veleh naupang chu a sawisa ta nghâl a; tichuan, leiah a tlu a, chilphuan tla zawih zawihin a tâl ta awrh awrh mai a." 
Mark9:21 A pa chu, “Eng chen nge hetianga a awm tawh?” tiin a zâwt a. Ani chuan, “A naupan têt ata a ni." 
Mark9:22 Meiah te, tuiah te amah tiboral tûrin a nam thlu fo ṭhîn; nimahsela, nangin engtin emaw tal i tih theih chuan khawngaih takin mi pui ang che,” a ti a." 
Mark9:23 Isua chuan a hnênah, “I theih chuan â maw! Ringtu tân chuan engkim hi tih theih asin,” a ti a." 
Mark9:24 Naupang pa chuan, “Ka ring e. Rinna ka tlâkchham avâng hian min pui ang che,” tiin a au chhuak ta nghâl a." 
Mark9:25 Mipui an lo tlân khâwm tup tup chu a hmuhin Isua chuan ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu a hau va, “Nang, ramhuai ṭawngtheilo leh bengngawng, thu ka pe a che, a chhûng ata kha lo chhuak la, lût leh tawh suh,” a ti a." 
Mark9:26 Ramhuai chu a au chhuak a, a nghaisak nek hnuin a lo chhuak ta a. Naupang chu thi ang maiin a awm a, mi tam tak phei chuan, “A thi ta a ni,” an ti hial a." 
Mark9:27 Isua erawh chuan a kut a chelh a, a kai tho va, a lo ding chhuak ta mai a." 
Mark9:28 Isua chu inah a lût a, a zirtîrten, “Engati nge keinin kan hnawh chhuah theih loh le?” tiin a fâlin an zâwt a." 
Mark9:29 Ani chuan, “Hetiang hi zawng ṭawngṭaina chauh lo chuan engti dang mahin a hnawh chhuah theih loh,” a ti a." 
Mark9:30 Tin, chuta ta chu an chhuak a, Galili ram chu an kal tlang a; chu chu tu ma hriat a duh lo," 
Mark9:31 a zirtîrte chu thil zirtîr a nei a ni; an hnênah chuan, “Mihring Fapa hi mihringte kutah mantîr a ni dâwn a, an tihlum ang; mahse, an tihhlum hnu ni thum chinah a tho leh ang,” a ti a." 
Mark9:32 Anni chuan a thu sawi chu a ngaihna an hre lo va, amah lah chu an zâwt ngam bawk si lo." 
Mark9:33 Kapernaum chu an lo thleng a, in chhûnga a luh hnu chuan an hnênah, “Kalkawngah khân eng thu-ah nge in inhnial le?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Mark9:34 Kawngah chuan, ‘kan zîngah tu nge ropui ber ang?’ tia an lo inhnial avâng khân an ngawi ta reng hlawm a." 
Mark9:35 Ani chu a ṭhu tê tê a, Sâwmpahnihte chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Tu pawh hmasa ber nih duh chu hnuhnûng berah an awm tûr a ni, mi zawng zawng rawngbâwltuah an awm bawk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark9:36 Naupang tê a kai a, an zîngah chuan a dintîr, a kuangkuah a, an hnênah," 
Mark9:37 “Tu pawh ka hming avânga hetiang naupang tê pakhat pawh lâwm chu kei mi lâwm an ni; tu pawh kei mi lâwm chu kei mi lâwm ni lovin mi tîrtu lâwm an ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Mark9:38 Johana chuan, “Zirtîrtu, tu emaw i hminga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak kan hmu a, kan zînga a zui ve loh che avângin khap kan lo tum asin,” tiin a han hrilh a." 
Mark9:39 Isua erawh chuan, “Khap suh u, tu mah ka hminga thil mak ti si-a mi rêl zui nghâl thei an awm lo." 
Mark9:40 Min dodâl lo chu kan lamṭang an ni ngai e. 
Mark9:41 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Krista mi in nih avânga tui in tûr no khat pe apiang che u chuan an lâwm man tûr an chân tawp lo vang." 
Mark9:42 “Tu pawh hêng ringtu zînga tê ber pakhat pawh titlu chu, an nghâwngah chhangphut râwtna lung lian pui awrhtîrin tuifinriatah thlâk ni se an tân a ṭha zâwk ang." 
Mark9:43 I kutin a tihtlûk che chuan tân mai rawh, kut pahnih neia Gehena mei mit thei lova kal ai chuan piangsuala nunnaa luh i tân a ṭha zâwk." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 I ke pawhin a tihtlûk che chuan tân mai rawh, ke pahnih neia Gehena-a paih nih ai chuan ke bûla nunnaa luh i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 I mit pawhin a tihtlûk che chuan kher chhuak mai rawh, mit khing hnih neia," 
Mark9:48 thil lungin a kher rengna hmun leh meiin a kan rengna hmun Gehena-a paih nih ai chuan, mit khing dela Pathian rama luh chu i tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Mark9:49 Mi tin meia tih thianghlim an ni dâwn si a. 
Mark9:50 Chi hi a ṭha e; nimahsela, chi pawh hi da ta se, engin nge in tihal leh ang? Nangmahni ngeiah chi nei ula; tichuan, inngeih dial dial rawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark10:1 Tin, a tho va, chuta ṭang chuan Judai ramah leh Jordan râlah te a kal a, mipuiin an lo bawh ruih ruih a; tichuan, a tih dân pângngaiin a lo zirtîr ṭhîn a." 
Mark10:2 Farisai-te a hnênah an lo kal a, amah fiah nan, “Miin a nupui a mâk a thiang em?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Mark10:3 Ani chuan, “Mosian engtin nge thu a pêk che u?” a ti a." 
Mark10:4 Anni chuan, “Mosian inmâkna lehkha ziakin inmâk a phal,” an ti a." 
Mark10:5 Isua erawh chuan, “In thinlung khauh avângin asin chu thupêk chu in tân a ziak ni." 
Mark10:6 Nimahsela, thilsiam ṭân tirh aṭang rêngin mipa leh hmeichhia a siam a." 
Mark10:7 Chumi avâng chuan mipain a nu leh pa a thlah ang a, a nupui a vuan ang; tichuan, an pahnih chuan tisa pumkhat an lo ni tawh ang," 
Mark10:8 pahnih an ni tawh lo va, pumkhat an lo ni tawh zâwk a ni." 
Mark10:9 Pathianin a zawm tawh avângin mipain ṭhen suh se,” a ti a." 
Mark10:10 Inah a zirtîrten chûng thu chu an zâwt leh a. 
Mark10:11 Ani chuan, “Tu pawhin a nupui a ṭhena, mi dang a neih chuan a nupui chu a uiresan a ni:" 
Mark10:12 hmeichhia pawhin a pasal a ṭhena, mi dang a neih chuan a pasal a uiresan a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark10:13 Tin, a deh atân a hnênah naupangte an rawn hruai a, zirtîrte erawh chuan an lo hnar a." 
Mark10:14 Nimahsela, Isuan a hmuhin a lungni lo êm êm a, an hnênah, “Naupangte ka hnênah han kaltîr ula, hnar suh u, Pathian ram chu hêng ang mite ta a ni si a." 
Mark10:15 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Pathian ram chu naupang anga lâwm lo apiang; tu mah a chhûngah an lût tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
Mark10:16 Anni chu a lo kuah a, an chungah kut nghatin mal a sâwm ta a." 
Mark10:17 Isua chu zin tûra a chhuah laiin mi pakhat a lo tlân a, a hmaah a ṭhingṭhi a, “Zirtîrtu Ṭha, chatuan nun ka chan theih nân eng nge ka tih tûr?” tiin a rawn zâwt a." 
Mark10:18 Isuan a hnênah, “Engati nge Ṭha mi tih? Tu mah ṭha an awm lo, Pathian chauh lo chu." 
Mark10:19 Thupêkte chu i hria alâwm, ‘Tual that suh, uire suh, ru suh, dâwtin hêk suh, bum suh, i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,’ tihte hi,” a ti a." 
Mark10:20 Ani chuan, “Zirtîrtu, chûng zawng zawng chu ka tleirâwl tirh ata ka zâwm ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Mark10:21 Isuan ani chu a han en chiang a, a ngaina ta hle a, a hnênah, “Kawng khat i la bâk e; kal la, i neih apiang va hralh la, pachhiate pe rawh; chutichuan, vânah ro i nei dâwn nia; tin, lo kal la, mi zui ang che,” a ti a." 
Mark10:22 Chûng thu avâng chuan a ngui ta hle a, lungngai takin a kal ta a, sum ngah tak a ni si a." 
Mark10:23 Isua chu a han hawi vêl a, a zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Sum ngahte tân Pathian rama luh a va harsa dâwn êm!” a ti a." 
Mark10:24 Zirtîrte chuan a thu sawi chu mak an ti êm êm a; Isua chuan anni chu a chhâng leh a, “Naute u, Pathian rama luh hi a harsa teh asin:" 
Mark10:25 Pathian rama mi hausa an luh aiin hriau benga sanghâwngsei kal tlang a awl zâwk,” a ti a." 
Mark10:26 Mak an ti lutuk a, “Chuti chu tu nge chhandam ni thei ang le?” an inti a." 
Mark10:27 Isuan anni chu a en a, “Pathian tân tih loh, mihring tân chuan tih rual a ni lo rêng a; Pathian tân erawh chuan engkim tih theih a ni asin,” a ti a." 
Mark10:28 Peteran a hnênah, “Ngai teh, keini lahin engkim kalsanin kan zui ta si che a,” a ti hman chauh va;" 
Mark10:29 Isuan a lo chhâng a, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, tu pawh keimah avâng leh Chanchin Ṭha avânga in emaw, unaute emaw, farnute emaw, nu emaw, pa emaw, fate emaw, ramte emaw kalsan chuan," 
Mark10:30 tûn dam chhûng la la hian in te, unau te, farnu te, nu leh pa te, fa te a lêt za an hmu ngei ang, tihduhdahna te leh hun lo thleng tûra chatuan nun nên." 
Mark10:31 Nimahsela, mi tam tak hmasa bera awmte chu hnuhnûng ber an la ni ang a, hnuhnûng bera awmte pawh hmasa ber an la ni ang,” a ti a." 
Mark10:32 Tin, Jerusalem-a chho tûrin kawngah chuan an kal a, Isuan hma a hruai a, anni chuan mak an ti hle a, a zuitute pawh chu an zâm hle a. Isuan Sâwmpahnihte chu a hruai hrang leh a, a chunga thil lo thleng tûr zawng zawng chu a hrilh a;" 
Mark10:33 “Ngai teh u, Jerusalem-ah kan chhoh dâwn hi. Mihring Fapa hi puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute hnênah mantîr a ni dâwn; anni chuan thi tûrin a chungah thu an titlu ang a, Jentail-te hnênah an hlân ang." 
Mark10:34 Anni chuan an lo nuihzat ang a, chil an chhâk ang a, an vua ang a, an tihlum ang; mahse, ni thum chinah a tho leh ang,” a ti a." 
Mark10:35 Zebedaia fapa Jakoba leh Johana chuan ani chu an rawn hnaih a, “Zirtîrtu, kan dîl tûr apiang che min tihsak kan duh e,” an ti a." 
Mark10:36 Ani chuan, “Eng nge tihsak che u ila in duh?” a ti a." 
Mark10:37 Anni chuan, “I ropuinaah chuan i ding lamah pakhat, i vei lamah pakhat min ṭhuttîr ang che,” an ti a." 
Mark10:38 Isua erawh chuan, “In thil dîl hi in hre lo va ni. Ka no in tûr chu in in thei dâwn em ni? Baptisma ka chan tûr pawh in chang thei dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Mark10:39 Anni pawh chuan, “Thei ang,” an ti a. Isuan, “Ka no in tûr chu in in ang a, baptisma ka chan tûr pawh chu in chang ve ang;" 
Mark10:40 nimahsela, ka ding lam emaw, vei lam emawa ṭhuttîr chu ka thu a ni lo va, an buatsaihsakte tân a ni zâwk,” a ti a." 
Mark10:41 Zirtîr dang sâwmte chuan chu chu an lo hriatin Jakoba leh Johana chungah chuan an lungni lo ta êm êm a. 
Mark10:42 Isua erawh chuan anniho chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Jentail-te chunga rorêltua ruatte chu an chungah an intilal êm êm ṭhîn a, an mi liante pawhin an chungah thu an nei êm êm ṭhîn tih in hria." 
Mark10:43 Nimahsela, nangni zîngah zawng chutiang tûr a ni lo ve, tu pawh in zînga ropui ber nih duh chu in rawngbâwltuah a awm tûr a ni." 
Mark10:44 Tu pawh in zînga hmasa ber nih duh pawh chu, mi zawng zawng chhiahhlawhah a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Mark10:45 Mihring Fapa meuh pawh rawngbâwlsaka awm tûrin a lo kal lo va, rawngbâwl tûr leh mi tam tak tlan nân a nun pe tûrin a lo kal zâwk a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark10:46 Jeriko khua an lo thleng a, a zirtîrte leh mipui nasa tak nên Jeriko aṭang chuan an chhuak a; Timaia fapa, kutdawh, mitdel, Bartimaia chu, kawng sîrah a lo ṭhu a." 
Mark10:47 Nazaret Isua a ni tih a hriat chuan, “Isu, Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,” tiin a au ta vak a." 
Mark10:48 Mi tam takin an hau va, ngawi tûra an tih pawhin, a hma aia ringin, “Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,” tiin a au zual sauh va." 
Mark10:49 Isua chu a ding a, “Han ko teh u,” a ti a. Mitdel chu an ko va, “Ngaihṭha takin awm la, tho rawh, a ko va che,” an ti a." 
Mark10:50 Ani chuan a puan a paih lawk a, a zuang tho va, Isua hnên lam chu a pan ta a," 
Mark10:51 Isuan a lo bia a, “Eng nge tihsak che ila i duh?” a ti a. Mitdel chuan, “Raboni, hmuh theih ka duh,” a ti a." 
Mark10:52 Tichuan, Isuan, “Kal rawh le, i rinna i dam phah a ni e,” a ti a. Khua a lo hmu thei ta nghâl mai a, kalkawngah chuan a zui ve ta a." 
Mark11:1 Tin, Jerusalem an lo hnaih ta a, Oliv tlânga Bethfage khua leh Bethani khua an thlen dâwn chuan a zirtîrte zînga pahnih a tîr a," 
Mark11:2 “In hma zâwn khuaah sâwn va kal ta ula, khua in luh veleh, tu ma la chuanna ngai loh, sabengtung no thlun in va hmu mai ang; phelh ula han kai rawh u." 
Mark11:3 Mi tu pawhin, ‘Engati nge khatia in tih mai?’ an tih che u chuan, ‘Lalpan a mamawh a ni, a rawn dahtîr leh thuai ang,’ ti ang che u,” a ti a." 
Mark11:4 An kal ta a, sabengtung no, kawngka bula thlun, pâwn lam kawtthlêra ding chu an va hmu a, an phelh ta a." 
Mark11:5 Chuta ding tute emaw chuan an lo hmu a, “Engtizia nge sabengtung kha in phelh tâk mai?” an ti a." 
Mark11:6 Anni erawh chuan Isua hrilh ang tak khân an sawi a; tichuan, an kal an phal ta a." 
Mark11:7 Sabengtung no chu Isua hnênah an rawn kai a, a chungah an puante an phah a, Isua chu a chuang ta a." 
Mark11:8 Mi tam takin kalkawngah an puante an phah a, a ṭhenin rama mi chhâwl sâtin an phah bawk a." 
Mark11:9 A hmaa kalte leh a hnunga zuitute chu “Hosana! Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se," 
Mark11:10 Ram lo thleng tûr, kan pa Davida ram chu Chawimawiin awm rawh se, Chungnung berah khian Hosana,” tiin an au va." 
Mark11:11 Tin, Jerusalem-a Tempulah chuan a va lût a, engkim a en vêl zawh chuan khua pawh a tlai lam ta a, Sâwmpahnihte nên Bethani lamah an kal leh ta a." 
Mark11:12 A tûkah chuan Bethani aṭanga an chhuak chu a ril a lo ṭâm ta a. 
Mark11:13 Hla takah, theipui hnah nei hluah hi a hmu a, a rah a awm mial law maw tiin a va pan a, a va thlen chuan a hnah chauh lo chu eng mah a hmu lo va, theipui rah hun a ni lo rêng a." 
Mark11:14 Tichuan, Isuan thing hnênah chuan, “Tûn a chinah chuan, kumkhuain i rah tu man ei tawh suh se,” a ti a. A zirtîrte pawh chuan chu chu an hria a." 
Mark11:15 Jerusalem chu an lo thleng a, Tempulah chuan a lût a, chuta englo zuartute leh leitute chu a hnawt chhuak ta a, tangka thlengtute dawhkânte leh ṭhuro zuartute ṭhutthlêngte chu a nam thlûksak a." 
Mark11:16 Tempulah chuan tu man bungrua an kal tlangpui pawh a phal lo bawk a. 
Mark11:17 An hnênah chuan, “ ‘Ka in chu hnam tin tân ṭawngṭaina in an ti ang,’ tih ziak a ni lâwm ni? Nangni erawh chuan suamhmangte pûkah in siam ta zâwk a nih hi,” tiin a zirtîr ta a." 
Mark11:18 Puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan an lo hria a, amah tihhlum dân tûr an zawng ta a, a zirtîrna chu mipui zawng zawngin an ngaihsân êm avângin ani chu an hlau hle a ni." 
Mark11:19 Tlaiah chuan khawpui ata chu a kal chhuak ṭhîn a. 
Mark11:20 Tin, zîngah an kal pahin theipui kûng kha a zung nên lam a thi ta tih an hmu a." 
Mark11:21 Petera chuan a hre chhuak a, a hnênah, “Rabi, en teh, theipui ânchhia i lawh kha a lo thi dêr mai!” a ti a." 
Mark11:22 Isuan a chhâng a, “Pathian ring rawh u." 
Mark11:23 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, tu pawhin he tlâng hnênah hian, ‘Insawn la, tuifinriatah inpaih rawh,’ ti ang sela, a thinlunga ringhlel hauh lova, a sawi ang chuan a lo thleng ngei ang tih a rin tlat chuan tihsak a ni ang." 
Mark11:24 Chuvângin, ka hrilh a che u, in ṭawngṭaia in thil dîl apiang hmu tawhah inngai ula, tihsak in ni ang." 
Mark11:25 Ṭawngṭai tûra in din hun pawhin mi chunga thu pawi eng emaw in neih chuan ngaidam rawh u; in Pa vâna mi pawhin in bawhchhiatnate a ngaihdam ve theih nân,” a ti a." 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Jerusalem chu an thleng leh a; Tempul a fan vêl laiin puithiam lalte, Dân zirtîrtute leh upahote a hnênah an lo kal a." 
Mark11:28 “Eng thuneihnain nge hêng thil hi i tih? Tu nge thu pe che?” tiin an zâwt a. 
Mark11:29 Isuan, “Thu kam khat ka han zâwt ang che u; mi chhâng ula, kei pawhin tu thuin nge hêng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh ang che u." 
Mark11:30 Johana baptisma kha, vâna mi thu nge mihring thu? Mi chhang rawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark11:31 An inrâwn tlâng a, “Vâna mi thu kan tih chuan, ‘Engah nge a thu in awih loh?’ min ti dâwn si a;" 
Mark11:32 ‘mihring thu’ kan ti mai emaw chu ni ang?” an inti a. Mahse, mi zawng zawngin Johana chu zâwlnei ni ngeiah an pawm tlat avângin mipui chu an hlau bawk si a." 
Mark11:33 Tichuan, Isua chu an chhâng a, “Kan hre lo,” an ti a. Isua pawh chuan, “Kei pawhin tu thuin nge hêng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh bîk lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Mark12:1 Tehkhin thuin an hnênah thu a sawi ta a. “Tu-in emaw grep huan a siam a, palin a hung a, grep sâwr khur a siam a, vênbûk sâng tak a sa bawk a, thlawh hlawh tûrin huan enkawltute a pe a, ram dangah a kal ta daih a." 
Mark12:2 A lawh hun chuan a chan ai la tûrin huan enkawltute hnênah chuan bawih pakhat a tîr a. 
Mark12:3 Anni chuan an lo man a, an vêl a, kut ruakin an hawtîr ta a." 
Mark12:4 Bawih dang an hnênah a tîr leh a, ani pawh chu a lu an vuak pawhsak a, zahthlâk takin an sawisa a." 
Mark12:5 Bawih dang a tîr leh a, chu phei chu an lo that a. Bawih dangte pawh a tîr zêl a, a ṭhen an lo vêl a, a ṭhen an lo that a." 
Mark12:6 Mi dang tirh âwm pakhat, a fapa duh tak chauh a nei tawh a, ‘Ka fapa hi chu an lo zah ang chu maw,’ tiin a hnuhnûng berah a tîr ta a." 
Mark12:7 Nimahsela, huan enkawltute chuan, ‘He mi hi ro luahtu tûr chu a ni, hawh u, i that ang u, a ro luah tûr hi kan ta a ni mai ang,’ an inti a." 
Mark12:8 Tichuan, ani chu an man a, an that a, grep huan ata chu an paih chhuak ta a." 
Mark12:9 Huan neitupa chuan engtin nge a rawn tih ang? A lo kal ang a, huan enkawltute chu a rawn tiboral ang a, huan chu mi dang a pe ang." 
Mark12:10 He Lehkha Thu hi in chhiar lâwm ni? ‘In satute lung duh loh kha Chu ngei chu a kil lung ṭangkai ber a lo ni si," 
Mark12:11 Chu chu Lalpa tih a ni a, Kan hmuhin mak kan ti,’ tih kha?” a ti a." 
Mark12:12 Chu tehkhin thu chu anmahni demin a sawi tih an hriatin man an tum a; amaherawhchu, mipui an hlau bawk si a, ani chu an kalsan a, an kal bo ta a." 
Mark12:13 A thu sawiah a inṭawngâwk thei dah law maw tiin a hnênah Farisai-te leh Heroda pâwla mi ṭhenkhat an tîr a. 
Mark12:14 A hnên an lo thlen chuan, “Zirtîrtu, mi dik tak i ni a, pawisak chuan tu mah i nei lo tih kan hria e, tu mah zah bîk pawh nei chuang lovin Pathian thu dik tak i zirtîr ṭhîn; Kaisara hnêna chhiah chawi tûr kan ni nge ni lo?" 
Mark12:15 Kan pe ang nge pe lo vang?” an ti a. 
Mark12:16 Ani erawh chuan an vervêkzia chu a lo hmuhin “Engah nge ṭawngawhtîr min tum? Duli mi han lâk ula, ka lo en teh ang,” a ti a. Anni chuan an rawn la a, an hnênah, “Hei, tu lem leh tu hming nge chuang hi?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Kaisara,” an ti a." 
Mark12:17 Isua chuan, “Kaisara ta chu Kaisara pe ula, Pathian ta chu Pathian pe ta che u,” tiin a chhâng a. Mak an ti nasa êm êm a." 
Mark12:18 Sadukai-ho, thawhlehna a awm lo titute pawh chu a hnênah an lo kal ve a;" 
Mark12:19 “Zirtîrtu, Mosian, ‘Tu pawhin fa nei lovin nupui thihsan se, a nupui chu a unaupain rochungin a unaupa tân chuan chi a thlahsak tûr a ni,’ tiin min ziaksak a." 
Mark12:20 Aw le, unau mipa pasarih an awm a, a upa ber chuan nupui a nei a; mahse, fa nei lovin a thi a." 
Mark12:21 A dawttu chuan a nupui chu a rochung a, chi thlah lovin a thi ve leh ta a; a pathumna pawh chutiang chu a ni a." 
Mark12:22 Unau pasarihte chuan nupuiah an nei ṭheuh va; mahse, tu man chi rêng an thlah lo. A tâwpah hmeichhia pawh chu a thi ve ta a." 
Mark12:23 Thawhlehnaah chuan tu nupui ber nge ni ang, an pasarihin nupuiah an nei ṭheuh si a?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Mark12:24 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Lehkha Thu leh Pathian thiltihtheihna in hriat loh avâng hian a ni rêng lâwm ni in kal sual ṭhin?" 
Mark12:25 An lo thawhleh hun chuan nupui pasal an innei tawh dâwn hlei nêm, vâna vântirhkohte ang mai an ni zâwk dâwn asin." 
Mark12:26 Mitthite kaihthawha an awm tûr thu-ah chuan - Mosia lehkhabua hnimbuka meialh thu kha in chhiar ngai lo vem ni? Pathianin a hnênah, ‘Kei hi Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian ka ni,’ a tih kha," 
Mark12:27 Ani chu mitthi Pathian a ni lo va, mi nung Pathian a ni zâwk; in bo nasa tawh a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Mark12:28 Dân zirtîrtu zînga pakhat a lo kal a, an thu sawite chu a ngaithla a, a chhâng ṭha hle tih a hriat chuan a hnênah, “Thupêk zawng zawngah a eng hi nge pawimawh ber?” tiin a han zâwt ve a." 
Mark12:29 Ani chuan a chhang a, “Aw Israel, ngai teh, Lalpa kan Pathian chauh hi Lalpa chu a ni." 
Mark12:30 Lalpa i Pathian chu i thinlung zawng zawngin, i nunna zawng zawngin, i rilru zawng zawngin, i chakna zawng zawngin i hmangaih tûr a ni,’ tih hi a pawimawh ber a," 
Mark12:31 a dawttu chu, ‘Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte pawh hmangaih ve rawh,’ tih hi a ni. Hêng aia thupêk pawimawh zâwk rêng hi a awm lo,” a ti a." 
Mark12:32 Dân zirtîrtu pawh chuan, “A ni tak e, Zirtîrtu, Lalpa chauh hi Pathian chu a ni a, amah chauh lo chu tu mah dang an awm lo," 
Mark12:33 amah chauh chu ngaihtuahna zawng zawng leh hriatna zawng zawng leh chakna zawng zawnga hmangaih leh mahni inhmangaih anga vêngte hmangaih hi pumhâl thilhlan leh inthawina zawng zawng aiin a ṭha zâwk êm êm tih hi, i sawi dik ngei mai,” a ti a." 
Mark12:34 Ngun taka ngaihtuahin a chhâng a ni tih Isuan a hriatin, “Pathian ram chu i hlat lo ve,” a ti a. Chuta chin chu tu man eng mah an zâwt ngam ta lo va." 
Mark12:35 Isuan Tempula a zirtîr pah chuan a sawi zêl a, “Dân zirtîrtute hian engtizia nge Krista chu Davida fapa nia an sawi?" 
Mark12:36 Amah Davida ngei khân Thlarau Thianghlima sawiin, ‘Lalpa chuan ka Lalpa hnênah, Ka ding lamah lo ṭhu rawh, I hmêlmate i ke hnuaiah ka han dah ang e,’ a ti si a." 
Mark12:37 Amah Davida ngeiin ani chu ‘Lalpa,’ a tih si chuan engtin nge a fapa a nih theih ang?” a ti a." 
Mark12:38 Mipui pung khâwm nasa tak chuan a thu chu an ngaithla tui hle a. A zirtîr pah chuan an hnênah, “Dân zirtîrtu, kawrfual haa lên vêl chînga, dâwr hmuna chibai bûk ngainaa," 
Mark12:39 sunagog-a ṭhutna langsâr ber leh ruai ṭhehna hmuna ṭhutna pawimawh ber ngiat ṭhînte lakah hian fîmkhur rawh u. 
Mark12:40 Hêngho, hmeithai sum ei zawhsaka, mi hmuh atân maia rei tak tak ṭawngṭai chîng site hian hrem an tuar nasa ber ang,” a ti a." 
Mark12:41 Tin, thawhlâwm bâwm zâwnah chuan a ṭhu a, miten bâwma tangka an thlâk lai chu a lo thlîr reng a. Mi hausa tak takte chuan an rawn thlâk ṭeuh ṭeuh va." 
Mark12:42 Hmeithai rethei tak pakhat hi a lo kal ve a, dar pawisa pahnih a rawn thlâk a (chu chu pawisa pakhat hu a ni.)" 
Mark12:43 Isuan a zirtîrte chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, mi dang zawng zawng aiin he hmeithai rethei tak hian thawhlâwm bâwmah a thlâk tam zâwk." 
Mark12:44 Mi dangte hi chuan an neih liam an rawn thlâk a; ani hi chuan tlachham chung chungin, a neih zawng zawng, intunnunna tûra a neih chhun chu, a rawn thlâk a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Mark13:1 Tempul ata chu an kal chhuah laiin a zirtîrte zînga pakhat chuan, “Zirtîrtu, en teh, a lungte hi a lianin, a in sakte hi a mawi teh a nia!” a ti a." 
Mark13:2 Isuan a chhâng a, “Hêng in lian pui pui hi i hmu maw? Lung intiang rêng rêng pakhat mah tihchim lohva hnutchhiah a awm lo vang,” a ti a." 
Mark13:3 Tempul zâwn, Oliv Tlânga a ṭhut laiin Petera te, Jakoba te, Johana te, Andria te chuan a fâlin thu an zâwt a;" 
Mark13:4 “Chûng chu engtikah nge a lo awm ang a, chûng zawng zawng lo thlen dâwn chuan chhinchhiahna thil mak eng eng nge lo awm ang? Min hrilh teh,” an ti a." 
Mark13:5 Tichuan, Isuan a hrilh ta a; “Tu man an hruai bo loh nân che u fîmkhur rawh u." 
Mark13:6 Ka hming chhâlin, ‘Keimah hi ka ni,’ tiin mi tam tak an lo chhuak ang a, mi an hruai bo ṭeuh vang." 
Mark13:7 Indo ri te, indo chanchinte in hriat hunah pawh thlaphâng suh ang che u, chûng chu lo thleng tûr rêng a ni; hun tawp erawh zawng a ni rih lo ve." 
Mark13:8 Hnam hrang leh hnam hrang an indo vang a, sawrkâr leh sawrkâr an indo vang, hmun hrang hrangah lîr a nghîng ang a, ṭâm a la tla ang. Chûng chu nau vei a inṭan ta tihna a ni." 
Mark13:9 “Nangni zawng inring rawh u; Sunagog-ahte leh a rorêltute hnênah an hlân ang che ua, an vua ang che u, keimah avângin hotute leh lalte hmaah, ka thu an hriat theih nân, an dintîr ang che u." 
Mark13:10 Chanchin Ṭha hi hnam zawng zawng hnênah hril hmasak ngei tûr a ni si a. 
Mark13:11 An man che u a, in chungthu rêl tûra an hlan hun che u chuan in sawi tûr enghelh lâwk suh ang che u, chumi huna lo lang apiang chu in sawi mai dâwn nia, a sawitu chu nangni in ni dâwn si lo, Thlarau Thianghlim a ni zâwk dâwn si a." 
Mark13:12 Tihhlum tûrin unau leh unau an inmantîr ang a, pa pawhin a fa; fate pawhin an nu leh pate an do vang a, an tihhlumtîr bawk ang." 
Mark13:13 Keima hming avângin mi tam takin an hua ang che u a; nimahsela, a tâwp thlenga chhel taka tuar peih apiang, chûng mite ngei chu chhandam an ni ang." 
Mark13:14 “Tiṭiautu tenawm chu a din lohna tûra ding in hmuh hunah erawh chuan (a chhiar chuan a awmzia hre rawh se), Judai rama awmte chu tlângramahte tlân rawh se." 
Mark13:15 In chunga awm chu ina lûtin a chhûnga englo chuh tûrin chhuk suh se; 
Mark13:16 lova feh pawh a silhfên chuh tûrin haw hek suh se. 
Mark13:17 Chûng huna naupaite leh nauno pawmte chu an va khawngaihthlâk dâwn em! 
Mark13:18 Thlasik khaw chên laia a lo thlen loh nân ṭawngṭai rawh u. 
Mark13:19 Chumi huna hrehawm lo thleng chu, Pathianin leilung a siam tirh ata la awm ngai lo, engtik maha awm leh tawh hek lo tûr chu a ni." 
Mark13:20 Lalpan chûng nite chu titawi lo se mihring tu mah an dam khawchhuak lo vang; a mi thlante avângin a titawi a ni. 
Mark13:21 “Chutih hunah chuan, tu pawhin in hnênah, ‘En teh u, Krista chu heta hi,’ emaw, ‘En teh u, sawta saw,’ emaw an tih pawhin awih suh ang che u." 
Mark13:22 Krista der leh zâwlnei derte an lo chhuak dâwn si a, thei ang sela thlante meuh pawh hruai bo tûrin chhinchhiahna leh thil makte an ti ang." 
Mark13:23 Nangni zawng fîmkhur rawh u, engkim ka hrilh diam tawh che u hi." 
Mark13:24 “Chûng hun hrehawm chu a liam hun chuan ni a thim ang a, thla a êng hek lo vang a," 
Mark13:25 vân aṭangin arsite a tla ang a, vâna thiltihtheihnate chu tihnghîn a ni ang." 
Mark13:26 Chutih hunah chuan Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna nasa tak nên ropui takin chhûm zînga lo kal an hmu ang. 
Mark13:27 Chutichuan, vântirhkohte chu a tîr chhuak ang a, a mi thlante chu kâwlkil li ata leilung tâwp aṭanga vân tâwp thlengin a lâwr khâwmtîr ang." 
Mark13:28 “Tichuan, theipui kûng awm dân aṭang hian zir tûr in nei; a zîk a lo nova, hnah a rawn chhuah chuan nipui a thaw dâwn tih in hre ṭhîn." 
Mark13:29 Chutiang bawkin, nangni pawhin chûng zawng zawng lo thleng in hmuh hun chuan ani chu a lo hnai tawh a, a lo thleng ṭêp tawh tih hria ang che u." 
Mark13:30 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, chûng zawng zawng chu a lo thlen hma chuan tûnlai mite hi an ral hman lo vang." 
Mark13:31 Lei leh vân a ral ang a, ka thu erawh chu a ral tawp lo vang." 
Mark13:32 “Nimahsela, chûng thil lo thlen hun tûr, ni leh dâr chu; Pa chauh lo chuan tu man an hre lo, vâna vântirhkohte pawhin, Fapa pawhin an hre lo." 
Mark13:33 Fîmkhur ula, inring reng rawh u, chumi hun chu in hre si lo." 
Mark13:34 Mi ram danga zin dâwna, a bawihte hnêna an hna pual ṭheuhva mawhphurhtîra, kawngkhâr vêngtu pawh inring renga awm tûra hrilh diama kal ta daih ang hi a ni." 
Mark13:35 Chuvângin, inring reng rawh u. In neitupa hâwn hun tûr chu tlai lamah nge, zânlaiah nge, âr khuanah nge, kâwl ênah nge tih in hre si lo;" 
Mark13:36 a lo haw thut mai zawngin muhîlin a rawn hmu hlauh dah ang che u. 
Mark13:37 Tichuan, in hnêna sawi hi mi zawng zawng tâna sawi ka ni, inring reng rawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark14:1 Tin, ni hnih hnuah Kalhlên Kût leh Chhang Dawidim telh loh Kût a awm dâwn a; puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan amah chu ngamthlêma mana tihhlum theihna kawng an zawng a," 
Mark14:2 “Kût lai chuan ni suh se, mipui zîngah buaina a chhuak dah ang e,” an ti a ni." 
Mark14:3 Bethani-ah, phâr Simona ina chaw a kîl laiin alabasta bûra nard hriak rimtui hlîr hlak, to tak kengin hmeichhe pakhat a lo kal a, alabasta bur chu a tikeh a, a lu-ah a leih ta a." 
Mark14:4 Chuta mi ṭhenkhat chu an lungni lo hle a, anmahni zîngah, “Engati nge hriak rimtui hi a tihriral tâk mai chu le?" 
Mark14:5 Duli zathum aia tam man a ni si a; hralha, mi retheite pêk zâwk âwm,” tiin chu nu chu an sawisêl a." 
Mark14:6 Isua erawh chuan, “Eng mah tih suh u, engah nge in tihbuai? Ka chunga a tih hi thil ṭha ti a ni e." 
Mark14:7 In zîngah mi retheite eng lai pawhin an awm a, in duh hun hunah thil ṭha in tihsak thei a; kei erawh chu in zînga awm reng tûr ka ni lo." 
Mark14:8 A tih theih ang chu a ti ta a, ka taksa hi phûm tûrin hriak a lo hnawih lâwk a nih hi." 
Mark14:9 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, khawvêl pum puia chanchin Ṭha hi an hrilhna apiangah, he nu thil tih pawh hi amah hriat reng nân an sawi ve zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Mark14:10 Tin, Sâwmpahnihte zînga mi pakhat, Juda Iskariota kha Isua mantîr tumin puithiam lalte hnênah a va kal a." 
Mark14:11 Chu chu an lo hriatin an lâwm hle a, pawisa pêk an tiam ta a. Tichuan, mantîr dân tûr remchâng a zawng ta a." 
Mark14:12 Chhang Dawidim telh loh Kût ni hmasa ber, Kalhlên Kût berâmno an talh ṭhinna ni-ah chuan, a zirtîrten, “Khawi hmunah nge Kalhlên kût chaw i ei tûr va buatsaih i la i duh?” an ti a." 
Mark14:13 Tichuan, zirtîrte zînga mi pahnih a tîr a, “Khawpuiah va kal ta ula, pa pakhat hlumbêla tui chawiin a lo tâwk ang che u; ani chu zui ula," 
Mark14:14 a luhna in neitu hnênah chuan, ‘Zirtîrtu chuan, Ka zirtîrte nêna Kalhlên Kût chaw kan eina tûr pindan chu khawiah nge? a ti e,’ va ti ang che u." 
Mark14:15 Amah ngei chuan pindan chungnung zau tak, engkim awm, peih diam a entîr ang che u, chutah chuan kan tân va buatsaih tawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark14:16 Tichuan, zirtîrte chu an chhuak a, khawpuiah chuan an va kal a, an hnêna a sawi ang ngei khân an va hmu a, Kalhlên Kût chaw chu an buatsaih ta a." 
Mark14:17 Khua a lo tlai lam chuan Sâwmpahnihte nên an va kal ta a. 
Mark14:18 Chaw an kîl a, an ei lai chuan Isuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, in zînga pakhat, mi kîlpuitu ngei hian, mi mantîr dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark14:19 An mangang ta hle a, a mal malin a hnênah, “Kei chu ka ni lâwng chu maw?” an ti ta ṭheuh va." 
Mark14:20 Ani chuan, “Sâwmpahnihte zînga mi, thlêng mi zenpuitu ngei hi a ni." 
Mark14:21 Mihring Fapa mantîrtu tûr mihring chung chu a pik e. Chu mihring chu piang lo se a tân a ṭha zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Mark14:22 Chutia an ei lai chuan Isuan chhang a la a, malsâwmna a sawi a, a phel a, an hnênah a pe a, “La rawh u, hei hi ka taksa a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark14:23 No pawh chu a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin an hnênah a pe a, nova mi chu an za chuan an in ta ṭheuh va." 
Mark14:24 Ani chuan, “Hei hi ka thisen, thuthlunna, mi tam tak tâna chhuak tûr chu a ni." 
Mark14:25 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Pathian rama a thar ka in hun a thlen hma zawng, grep rah tui hi ka in leh tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Mark14:26 Hla an sak zawh chuan Oliv tlâng panin an chhuak ta a. 
Mark14:27 Isuan an hnênah, “In za-in mi hawisan vek ang. ‘Berâmpu chu ka vua ang a, berâmte chu an darh ang,’ tih ziak a nih kha." 
Mark14:28 Nimahsela, kaihthawha ka awm hnuin Galili ramah ka lo kal hmasa ang,” a ti." 
Mark14:29 Petera erawh chuan, “An vaiin hawisan vek che mah se kei zawngin ka hawisan hauh lo vang che,” a ti a." 
Mark14:30 Isuan a hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che, zâninah, zânin la la hian, âr vawi hnih a khuan hmain nangin vawi thum mi phat ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Mark14:31 Ani erawh chuan khauh takin, “I thihnaah chuan thi ve dâwn pawh ni ila, ka phat tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Chutiang bawkin an za chuan an ti ta ṭheuh va." 
Mark14:32 Huan pakhat, Gethsemani an tih chu, an thleng a, a zirtîrte hnênah, “Ka ṭawngṭai hlânin hetah hian lo ṭhu rawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark14:33 Petera te, Jakoba te, Johana te chu a hruai a. Nasa takin a thlaphâng a, a mangang ta êm êm a." 
Mark14:34 An hnênah, “Ka thla a phâng hle mai a! Thihpui tham hial a ni; hetah hian awm ula, lo inrâlring rawh u” a ti a." 
Mark14:35 Hma lamah tlêm a va kal hlek a, leiah a bawkkhup a, chumi hun chuan amah a pelh mial theih nân a ṭawngṭai a." 
Mark14:36 “Abba, ka pa, engkim i ti thei a, he no hi mi lâk sawnsak rawh; nimahsela, keima thu ni lovin nangma thu thu ni zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
Mark14:37 A lo kîr a, anniho muthlu chu a rawn hmu a; Petera hnênah “Simon, i muthlu a ni maw? Dârkâr khat chauh pawh i inrâlring thei na nge?" 
Mark14:38 Thlêmnaa in tlûk luh loh nân invêngin ṭawngṭai rawh u; thlarau zawngin a huam a, tisa erawh chu a chak lo va ni,” a ti a." 
Mark14:39 A kal leh a, a thu sawi ngai sawiin a va ṭawngṭai leh a." 
Mark14:40 A lo kîr leh chuan an muthlu chu a rawn hmu leh a, an mut a chhuah êm avângin chhân ngaihna pawh an hre lo." 
Mark14:41 A lo kîr vawi thumnaah chuan, “In la muthluin in la inthlahdul ta cheu a ni maw? A tâwk ta e, a hun chu a lo thleng ta; ngai teh u, Mihring Fapa hi mi sualte kûtah hlan a nih dâwn tâk hi." 
Mark14:42 Tho teh u, i kal ang u. En teh u, mi mantîrtu tûr pawh a lo hnaih tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Mark14:43 Chutia a la ṭawng lai mêk chuan Juda, Sâwmpahnihte zînga pakhat kha a lo thleng ta nghâl a, ama rual chuan puithiam lalte, Dân zirtîrtute leh upate tirh mi tam tak, khandaih leh talhtum kengin an lo thleng ta rup a." 
Mark14:44 A mantîrtu tûr khân chhinchhiahna tûr a lo hrilh lâwk tawh diam a, “Ka fawha chu amah chu a ni ang, man ula, ngun taka vêngin hruai ang che u,” tiin." 
Mark14:45 A lo thlen veleh Isua chu a rawn pan nghâl, a, “Rabi,” tiin a fâwp ta ngawih ngawih a." 
Mark14:46 Isua chu an chelh a, an man ta a." 
Mark14:47 A kianga dingte zînga pakhat chuan khandaih a phawi a, puithiam lalber bawih chu a sât a, a beng a hlawisak a." 
Mark14:48 Chûngho chu Isuan a bia a, an hnênah, “Suamhmang man tûr ang ziazângin khandaih leh talhtum kengin min man tûrin in lo thawk a ni maw?" 
Mark14:49 In zîngah tempulah ni tin mi ka zirtîr ṭhîn a, mi man si lo. Lehkha Thu chu lo thlêng tûr rêng a ni e,” a ti a." 
Mark14:50 Zirtîrte chuan amah chu an hawisan a, an tlânchhiatsan ta a." 
Mark14:51 Tlangvâl pakhat, puan zai sîn chauh sin hian a lo zui ve a, ani pawh chu an man a;" 
Mark14:52 mahse, a tâl pût a, saruakin a tlân bo ta a." 
Mark14:53 Isua chu Puithiam lalber hnênah an hruai a, puithiam lal te, upaho te leh Dân zirtîrtu te an lo kal khâwm a." 
Mark14:54 Petera pawh chuan hnung fêah Puithiam lalber in hual chhûng kawtlai thlengin a rawn zui a; chhiahhlawhte zîngah chuan meilum aiin a ṭhu ve ta a. 
Mark14:55 Puithiam lalber leh Sanhedrin-a tel zawng zawng chuan Isua tihhlum theihna tûr thu an zawng ta a; mahse, an hmu hlei thei lo." 
Mark14:56 Mi tam takin dâwtin an rawn hêk a; nimahsela, an hêkna thu chu a inhmu thei si lo." 
Mark14:57 Mi ṭhenkhat an lo ding chhuak a, dâwtin an hêk a," 
Mark14:58 “‘He Tempul, kuta sak hi ka ṭhiat ang a, a dang, kuta sak ni lo, ni thum chhûngin ka din leh ang,’ a tih keimahni ngei hian kan hria,” an rawn ti a." 
Mark14:59 Chu thilah pawh chuan an hêkna thu chu a inhmu thei chuang lo. 
Mark14:60 Puithiam lalber chu a laiah a va ding chhuak a, Isua chu a zâwt a, “Hêngho hêkna che hi i chhâng thei na nge?” a ti a." 
Mark14:61 Ani erawh chu a ngawi reng a, a enga mah a chhâng lo. Puithiam lalber chuan a hnênah, “Faktlâka Fapa, Krista chu i ni em?” tiin a zâwt leh a." 
Mark14:62 Tichuan, Isuan a chhâng ta a, “Ka ni asin, Mihring Fapa hi Thiltitheia ding lama ṭhu-a, vân chhûmte nên a lo kal in la hmu dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Mark14:63 Chu veleh Puithiam lalber chuan a silhfênte chu a pawtthlêr a, “Thuhretu dang engah nge kan ngaih tawh ang?" 
Mark14:64 Pathian pawi a sawi dân chu in hre ta, engtin nge in ngaih?” a ti a. Tichuan, an za-in Isua chu tihhlum tlâkah an ngai a." 
Mark14:65 A ṭhen phei chuan amah chu chil an chhak ta pang a, a hmai te an tuam a, an hnek a, ‘Tu nge ti che sawi teh, an ti a. Vêngtute chuan an kai a, an bêng sawk sawk a." 
Mark14:66 Petera chu in chhâwng hnuai lam in hung chhûng kawt laiah chuan a awm reng a. Puithiam lalber chhiahhlawh zînga nula pakhat a lo kal a; 
Mark14:67 Petera meilum ai chu a rawn hmu a, a han en chiang a, “Nang pawh hi he Nazaret mi Isua hnêna awm kha i nih hi,” a ti a." 
Mark14:68 Ani erawh chuan, “I thu sawi awmzia chu ka hre hauh lo mai, a ngaihna pawh ka hre lo ve,” tiin a phat a. Pâwn lam a pan a (ar a khuang a)." 
Mark14:69 Nula khân a enzui a, a bula dingte hnênah chuan, “An zînga mi a ni maw le,” a ti leh a." 
Mark14:70 Ani chuan a phat leh a. Chumi hnu lawkah Petera kianga dingte chuan, “An zînga mi i nih ngei hi, Galili mi i ni alâwm,” an ti a." 
Mark14:71 Ani erawh chuan ânchhe dawn huamin chhia a chham a, “Chu mihring in sawia chu ka hre hauh lo,” a ti a," 
Mark14:72 âr chu a khuang leh ta nghâl a. Isuan a hnêna, “âr vawi hnih a khuan hmain nangin vawi thum mi phat ang,” a tih thu kha Petera chuan a hre chhuak a; lungchhe takin a ṭap chhuak ta a." 
Mark15:1 Zîng a lo nih veleh puithiam lalte chu upate, Dân zirtîrtute leh Sanhedrin pum pui chuan ro an rêl a; Isua chu an hlîng a, an kai a, Pilata kutah an hlân ta a." 
Mark15:2 Pilata chuan ani chu a lo zâwt a, “Juda-te lal i ni maw?” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Chu, i sawi chu,” a ti a." 
Mark15:3 Puithiam lalte chuan an hêk mawlh mawlh a. 
Mark15:4 Tichuan, Pilatan a zâwt leh a, “An hêkna zozai che hi i hre na nge, a enga mah i chhân loh?” a ti a." 
Mark15:5 Isua erawh chuan a enga mah chu a chhâng ta chuang lo va, Pilata chuan mak a ti hle a." 
Mark15:6 Kût niin mi tâng pakhat an ngen apiang Pilatan a chhuahsak ṭhîn a. 
Mark15:7 Helho tâng zînga pakhat, Baraba an tih chu, hel laia tual an thahnaa a tel ve avângin tân inah a tâng reng a." 
Mark15:8 Mipuite chu an han chho va, a tih ṭhin ang kha tihsak leh tûrin Pilata chu an ngên a." 
Mark15:9 Ani chuan, “Juda-te lal hi chhuahsak che u ila in duh em?” a lo ti a." 
Mark15:10 Puithiam lalte chuan îtsîkna avângin a kutah an rawn hlân a ni tih a hre si a. 
Mark15:11 Puithiam lalte chuan mipui chu Baraba chhuahsak dîl tûrin an fuih a. 
Mark15:12 Tichuan, Pilatan anniho chu, “Chuti chu Juda-te lal in tiha hi engtia ka tih nge in duh?” tiin a zâwt leh a." 
Mark15:13 Anniho chu an au leh a, “Krawsah khêngbet rawh,” an ti a." 
Mark15:14 Pilata chuan, “Engah maw? Eng nge a tihsual?” a ti a. Nimahsela, anniho chu ring lehzualin, “Krawsah khêngbet rawh,” tiin an au ta tuar tuar a." 
Mark15:15 Tichuan, Pilatan mipui tihlungawi a duh a, Baraba chu a chhuahsak ta a; Isua erawh chu sipaite a vuaktîr a, krawsa khenbeh tûrin an hnênah a pe ta a." 
Mark15:16 Sipaite chuan in hual chhûngah, praitorian an tihah chuan an hruai lût a, an pâwla mi zawng zawng an au khâwm a." 
Mark15:17 Ani chu kawrfual senduk an hâktîr a, chawimawina atân hlîng an kual a, an khumtîr a." 
Mark15:18 “Chibai, Juda-te lal!” tiin chibai an bûk ṭan ta a." 
Mark15:19 Tiangin a lu-ah an vua a, chil an chhâk a, ṭhingṭhiin chibai an bûk el huai huai a." 
Mark15:20 Chutia nuihza siam nâna an hman zawh chuan kawrfual senduk chu an hlihsak a, ama kawr an hâktîr leh a, krawsa khenbeh tûrin an hruai chhuak ta a." 
Mark15:21 Thingtlâng lam aṭanga lo kal mi pakhat, Simona, Kurini khaw mi, Aleksandara leh Rufa pa, lo ding chu Isua kraws putsak tûrin an man a." 
Mark15:22 Golgotha, ‘Luruh hmun’ an tih thleng chuan an hruai a," 
Mark15:23 Mura pawlh uain an pe a; mahse, a duh lo va." 
Mark15:24 Tichuan, krawsah an khêngbet ta a. An chan ṭheuh tûr hriat theih nân ṭhumvâwrin a silhfênte chu an insem a." 
Mark15:25 An khenbeh hun chu zîng dâr kua vêl a ni. 
Mark15:26 Amah an hêkna thu ziak an târ a, ‘Juda-te lal,’ tiin." 
Mark15:27 Ama rual chuan suamhmang pahnih an khêngbet bawk a, a ding lamah pakhat, a vei lamah pakhat." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Mi vei nuk nukte chuan an lu thingin, “Uai! Nang, Tempul ṭhiata ni thuma din leh theitu," 
Mark15:30 intidam la, kraws ata kha lo chhuk ta che,” tiin an tiel a." 
Mark15:31 Chutiang bawkin puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan, “Mi dang mah tidam ṭhîn, mahni lah intidam thei si lo." 
Mark15:32 Amah kan rin theih nân kan hmuhah, Krista, Israel lal chu, tûnah hian kraws ata lo chhuk ang hmiang!” tiin hmusit takin an tiel bawk a. Ama ruala khenbehte pawh chuan chutiang bawkin an ti a." 
Mark15:33 Chhûn dâr sâwm leh pahnih a lo ni a, tlai dar thum thlengin khawvêl pum pui a thim ta vek a." 
Mark15:34 Tlai dâr thumah chuan Isua chu ring takin a au va, “Eloi, Eloi, Lema Sabakthani,” tiin (chu chu, “Ka Pathian, Ka Pathian, engah nge mi kalsan?” tihna a ni)." 
Mark15:35 A kianga ding ṭhenkhatte chuan chu chu an hriatin, “Ngai teh u, Elija a ko va ni,” an ti a." 
Mark15:36 Mi pakhat a tlân a, uain thûrah sponj a chiah a, tiangah a târ a, Isua chu intîr a tum a, “Ngawi rú, amah la thla tûrin Elija a lo kal emaw i en ang u,” a ti a." 
Mark15:37 Isua chu aw ring takin a au va, a hnuk a chat ta a." 
Mark15:38 Tin, Tempul chhûng puanzâr chu a chung lam aṭangin a hnuai lam thlengin a thlêr thla ta a." 
Mark15:39 A hma zâwna sipai za hotu ding pawh chuan chutia a hnuk chat ta chu a hmuh chuan, “He mi hi Pathian Fapa a lo nih ngei hi le!” a ti a." 
Mark15:40 Hmeichheho pawhin hla tak aṭangin an thlîr ve reng a, chûng zîngah chuan Magdala khaw mi Mari te, Jakob naupang zâwka nu Mari te, Josea nu te, Salomi te an tel a." 
Mark15:41 Hêng mite hi Galili rama a awm laia amah zuia a rawngbâwlsak ṭhîntute an ni; tin, a ruala Jerusalem-a chho ve hmeichhe dang pawh tam tak an awm." 
Mark15:42 Juda-te Inrinni a ni a, (chu chu Sabat ni atâna an inbuatsaih ni a ni.)" 
Mark15:43 Josefa, Arimathai khuaa mi, rorêltu zînga tel, mi zahawm tak, Pathian ram beisei mi ve bawk kha, tlai lam a lo nih chuan a lo kal ve a, huai takin Pilata a va luh chilh a, Isua ruang chu a dîl a." 
Mark15:44 Pilata chuan a thi ta mai tih a hriat chuan mak a ti hle a, sipai za hotu chu a ko va, a thihna chin a zâwt a." 
Mark15:45 Sipai za hotu ka aṭanga a hriat hnu chuan a ruang chu Josefa a pe ta a. 
Mark15:46 Tichuan, puan zai sîn a lei a, amah chu a la thla a, puan zai sîn chuan a tuam a, lung ker thlânah a zalh a, thlân kawngka chu lungin a khâr ta a." 
Mark15:47 Tin, Magdala mi Mari leh Josea nu Mari pawh chuan an zalhna chu an en reng a." 
Mark16:1 Sabat ni a lo ral a, Magdala mi Mari te, Jakoba nu Mari te, Salomi te chuan a ruang va hnawih atân hriak rimtui an lei a." 
Mark16:2 Pathianni zîngah thlânah an va kal a, ni pawh a chhuak tawh a." 
Mark16:3 “Thlân kawngka ata lung chu tuin nge min lum sawnsak ang,” an intih lai mêkin," 
Mark16:4 (lung lian tak a ni rêng a) an han dâk a, lung chu lum sawn sa-in an hmu ta a." 
Mark16:5 Thlânah chuan an lût a, tlangvâl pakhat puan vâr sin, ding lam panga ṭhu an hmu a, an bîng ta chûk chûk a." 
Mark16:6 Tichuan, ani chuan an hnênah, “Hlau suh u, Nazaret Isua, an khenbeh kha, in zawng a ni âwm a, kaihthawh a ni tawh a, hetah a awm tawh lo; en teh u, an zalhna chu hei hi a ni." 
Mark16:7 Nimahsela, kal ula, a zirtîrte leh Petera hnênah chuan, ‘A hrilh che u ang ngei khân Galili-ah a lo kal hmasa dâwn a, chutah chuan in hmu ang,’ tiin va hrilh rawh u,” a ti a." 
Mark16:8 An khûr a, an thauvah a man tâk avâng chuan thlân ata chu an chhuak a, an tlânchhe ta a; tu ma hnênah eng mah an sawi lo, an hlau êm a ni." 
Mark16:9 (Tin, Pathianni zînga a thawhleh khân Magdala mi Mari, a kawchhûng ata ramhuai pasarih a hnawh chhuahsak hnênah khân a inlâr hmasa ber a. (Tichuan, an hnêna a thu hrilh zawng zawng chu hmeichhiate chuan Petera leh a ṭhiante hnênah an va sawi vat a." 
Mark16:10 Ani chu Isua ṭhiante hnênah a kal a, mitthi ngaia an ṭap lai chu a va hrilh a. Chumi hnu chuan, Isua ngeiin, anmahni hmangin, chatuan chhandamna thu ril thianghlim leh chhe thei lo chu, chhak leh thlang, ram tinah a theh darh ta a. Amen)" 
Mark16:11 Nimahsela, a nung leh a, hmuh pawh a hmu tih an han hriat pawhin an awih chuang lo." 
Mark16:12 Chumi hnu chuan an zînga mi pahnih, thingtlâng khaw lam pan laite hnênah pawh, hmêl danglam puin a inlâr a." 
Mark16:13 Anni pawh chuan mi dangte chu an rawn hrilh a; mahse, an lo awih chuang lo." 
Mark16:14 Chumi hnu chuan Sâwmpakhatte hnênah, chaw an kîl laiin a inlâr a, a tholeh hmutute thu an awih loh avângin an rin loh leh an thinlung sak kawngah chuan a zilhhau ta a." 
Mark16:15 An hnênah, “Khawvêl ram zawng zawngah kal ula, thil siam tinrêng hnênah Chanchin Ṭha hi hril rawh u." 
Mark16:16 Tu pawh a ringa, baptisma chang chu chhandam an ni ang a, tu pawh a ring lo chuan thiam loh an chang ang." 
Mark16:17 Hêng chhinchhiahna thil makte hi ringtute zîngah a awm zêl ang: Ka hmingin ramhuaite an hnawt chhuak ang a, ṭawng thartein an ṭawng ang a," 
Mark16:18 kutin rûlte an man ang a, thihna tûr eng pawh in mah se, eng mah an ti lo vang; damlote chungah kut an nghat ang a, an dam zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Mark16:19 Chutichuan, an hnêna thu a sawi zawhin Lalpa Isua chu vâna hruai chhohvin a awm a, Pathian ding lamah a han ṭhu ta a." 
Mark16:20 Anni pawh chu an chhuak a, ram tinah thu an hril ta a, Lalpan anmahni a thawhpui a, an thu chu chhinchhiahna thil maktein a tinghet zui zêl a. Amen.)" 
Luke1:1 Kan zînga thil lo thleng chanchin, a tîr aṭanga mita hmutute leh thu rawngbâwltuten min hrilh chhâwn ang kha, mi tam takin ziak chhuah an tum ta a;" 
Luke1:2 chuvângin, Theofil zahawm ber, a bul aṭangin engkim ngun takin keimah ngeiin ka chhui a," 
Luke1:3 mumal nei deuhvin ziaksak che ila a ṭha ang ka ti a ni," 
Luke1:4 an thu zirtîr che kha a dikzia i hriat theih nân. 
Luke1:5 Judai rama Heroda a lal lai khân Abija pâwla mi puithiam pakhat, a hming Zakaria a awm a; a nupui chu Arona thlah zînga mi a ni a, a hming chu Elizabeti a ni." 
Luke1:6 An pahnih chuan Pathian mit hmuha mi fel an ni a, sawisêlbova Lalpa thupêkte leh a Dân zawng zawng zâwm mi an ni a." 
Luke1:7 Nimahsela, Elizabeti chu a chin avangin fa an nei thei lo va, anmahni pawh an upa tawh hle a." 
Luke1:8 An pâwl rawngbâwl huna Pathian hmaa puithiam hna a thawh ve lai chuan, puithiamte tih dân pângngai angin," 
Luke1:9 Tempul chhûnga lûta, rimtui hâltu tûr ṭhumvâwra an en chu a chungah a tla a." 
Luke1:10 Rimtui a hâl lai chuan mipui zawng zawng chu pâwnah an ṭawngṭai a. 
Luke1:11 Rimtui hâlna maichâm ding lama dingin Lalpa tirh vântirhkoh pakhat a hnênah a rawn inlâr a. 
Luke1:12 Zakarian a hmuh chuan a phu zawk a, a hlau ta hle a." 
Luke1:13 Nimahsela vântirhkoh chuan, “Zakari, hlau suh, i ṭawngṭaina chu hriat a ni e. I nupui Elizabeti chuan fapa a hrinsak ang che, a hmingah Johana i sa dâwn nia." 
Luke1:14 Nang lâwmin i hlim ang a, mi tam tak pawh a lo pian avângin an lâwm bawk ang." 
Luke1:15 Lalpa ngaihin mi lian a ni ang a, uain leh zu a in tûr a ni lo va; a nu pum chhûng aṭang rêngin Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat ang a." 
Luke1:16 Israel thlahte zînga mi tam tak chu Lalpa an Pathian lamah a hawi kîrtîr leh ang. 
Luke1:17 Pate chu an fate ngaihsaktîr tûr te, mi tihmawhte chu mi felte rilru put ang pu tûr te, Lalpa tâna mite inpeih tûra lo buatsaih tûrtein Elija thlarau dawn leh a thiltihtheihna neiin Lalpa hmaah chuan a lo kal hmasa dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke1:18 Vântirhkoh hnênah Zakaria chuan, “Chu chu engtin nge ka hriat chian theih ang? Kei putar ka ni a, ka nupui pawh a upa hle tawh si a,” a ti a." 
Luke1:19 Vântirhkoh chuan, “Kei hi Pathian hmaa ding ṭhîn Gabriela ka nih hi, nangmah be tûr leh chûng thu lâwmawm chu hrilh tûr che-a tirh ka ni." 
Luke1:20 Ngai rawh, a hun taka lo thleng ngei tûr thil ka sawite hi i awih lo vei a, a lo thlen tak tak hma chu i ngawi reng ang a, ṭawng pawh i ṭawng thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke1:21 Mipui chuan Zakaria chu an lo nghâk ṭhuap a. Tempul chhûnga chuti chen chen a awm ta chu mak an ti hle a. 
Luke1:22 A lo chhuah chuan an hnênah eng mah a sawi thei lo va, Tempul chhûngah inlârna a hmu a ni tih an hre ta a; an hnênah zaizirin thu a sawi a, a ṭawng thei ta hauh lo va." 
Luke1:23 A rawngbâwl hun bi a lo kim tâk hnu chuan in lamah a haw ta a. 
Luke1:24 Chûng hnu chuan a nupui Elizabeti chuan nau a pai ta a. 
Luke1:25 “Mi zînga ka hming chhia chhilh nân Lalpan mi khawngaih a, heti hian mi tihsak ta,” a ti a. Thla nga a inkhûrkhung a." 
Luke1:26 A thla ruknaah chuan Galili rama khaw pakhat Nazaret an tiha awm, nula thianghlim pakhat, Davida thlaha mi, Josefa nupui hual hnênah chuan." 
Luke1:27 Pathianin vântirhkoh Gabriela chu a tîr a; chu nula hming chu Mari a ni. 
Luke1:28 Inah chuan a va lût a, a hnênah, “Chibai, vohbîk, Lalpa i hnênah a awm,” a ti a." 
Luke1:29 A thu sawi chuan a timangang ta êm êm a, a chibai bûkna chu eng tihna tak ni ang maw tiin a inngaihtuah a." 
Luke1:30 Vântirhkoh chuan, “Mari, hlau suh, Pathian duhsakna i dawng e." 
Luke1:31 Ngai teh, nau i pai ang a, fapa i hring ang; a hmingah Isua sa ang che." 
Luke1:32 Ani chu mi ropui tak a la ni ang a, Chungnungbera Fapa an ti ang; Lalpa Pathianin a thlahtu Davida lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhuttîr ang a;" 
Luke1:33 Jakoba thlahte chungah chatuanin a lal ang, a ramin kin ni a nei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke1:34 Mari chuan Vântirhkoh hnênah, “Pasal ka la nei si lo va, engtin nge ni ang?” a ti a." 
Luke1:35 Vântirhkoh chuan a chhâng a, “Thlarau Thianghlim chu i chungah a lo awm ang a, Chungnungbera thiltihtheihna chuan a hliahkhuh ang che; chuvângin, nau lo piang tûr chu mi thianghlim, Pathian Fapa an ti ang." 
Luke1:36 Tin, ngai teh, i laichînnu, a ching an tih ṭhin, Elizabeti pawhin a tar hnuin mipa a pai ta, tûn thla hi a thla rukna a ni tawh." 
Luke1:37 Pathian thuchhuak rêng rêngin tih theih loh a nei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke1:38 Mari chuan, “Ngai teh, Lalpa bawihnu ka ni, i thu ang chuan ka chungah lo thleng rawh se,” a ti a, vântirhkoh chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Luke1:39 Chûng lai chuan Mari chu a tho va, tlângrama Juda-ho khaw pakhat panin a chho ta vang vang a;" 
Luke1:40 Zakaria in a han thlenga, Elizabeti chu chibai a bûk a." 
Luke1:41 Mari chibai bûkna aw chu a hriatin a pum chhûnga nautê chu a lo chê a. Elizabeti chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, ring takin a au va," 
Luke1:42 “Nang hi hmeichhia azawngah i vânnei ber e; i rîla rah pawh a vânnei e; 
Luke1:43 Engtizia kher nge ka Lalpa nu ka hnênah i lo kal le? 
Luke1:44 Ngai teh, i chibai bûkna aw ka hriat veleh a lâwm avângin nautê pawh ka pum chhûngah a che asin." 
Luke1:45 I hnêna Lalpain thu a sawi kha a thleng ngei dâwn tih i rin avângin i nihlawh e,” a ti a." 
Luke1:46 Tin, Marin, “Thinlung takin Lalpa ka chawimawi a." 
Luke1:47 Min chhandamtu Pathian chungah ka lâwm êm êm a ni," 
Luke1:48 A bawihnu tlâwm tak hi a rawn ngaihsak a. Ngai rawh, tûn chinah chuan ṭhangthar zêl pawhin nihlawh min ti ang." 
Luke1:49 Thiltitheia khân thil ropui tak min tihsak ta. A hming pawh a thianghlim e. 
Luke1:50 A khawngaihna chu ṭhang lo thar zêl thlengin Amah ṭihtute tân a dai ngai lâwng. 
Luke1:51 A bânin a chakzia a lantîr a, thinlunga chapote chu a vai darh a," 
Luke1:52 An ṭhutthlênga lal ṭhute chu a hnûk thla a, Rethei daikilkâra mite a chawi kâng a." 
Luke1:53 Rilṭâmte chu thil tui tinrêngin a hrai tlai a, hausate erawh chu kut ruakin a kaltîr a." 
Luke1:54 Min thlahtute hnêna a tiam ang khân a chhiahhlawh Israel-te pui tûrin a lo thawk ta. 
Luke1:55 Abrahama leh a thlahte a khawngaihna kha kumkhuain a hre reng a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Luke1:56 Mari chu thla thum lai a châm a, a haw leh ta a." 
Luke1:57 Elizabeti nau hrin chu a lo hun ta a, fapa a hring a." 
Luke1:58 A ṭhenawmte leh a laichînte chuan Lalpan a khawngaihzia an hriat chuan an lâwmpui hle a. 
Luke1:59 A ni riat ni chuan nausên serh tan tûrin an lo kal khâwm a, nau hmingah a pa hming vêk, Zakaria, sak an tum a;" 
Luke1:60 mahse, a nu chuan, “Ni lo ve, Johana sak tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke1:61 Anni chuan, “I laichînte zîngah he hming pu hi tu mah an awm hlei nêm,” an ti a." 
Luke1:62 A pa chu a hmingah eng nge sak a duh tih zaizirin an zâwt ve a. 
Luke1:63 Ani chuan ziakna phêk a han dîl a, “A hming chu Johana a ni,” tiin a ziak a." 
Luke1:64 An za chuan mak an ti hle a. Chu veleh a ka leh a lei chu phelh a lo ni ta nghâl a. Pathian fakin a lo ṭawng chhuak thei leh ta a. 
Luke1:65 An ṭhenawm zawng zawng chuan an hlau va, chûng thu chu Judai tlângramah chuan an sawi ta huai huai a." 
Luke1:66 A hria apiang chuan an ngaihven a. “Chu nau chu engtin tak la awm ang maw!” an ti a. Lalpa pawhin amah a awmpui zêl a. 
Luke1:67 A pa Zakaria chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo khat a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Luke1:68 “Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, A mite tlawhin a rawn tlan ta si a." 
Luke1:69 A chhiahhlawh Davida chhûngte zîngah Kan tân chhandamtu ropui tak a din ta. 
Luke1:70 Hmânlai zâwlnei thianghlimte kâa A sawi tawh ang khân. 
Luke1:71 Kan hmêlmate leh min hawtute laka Min humtu tûr chu. 
Luke1:72 Min thlahtute a khawngaihzia a tilang a, a thuthlung thianghlim a hre reng a ni." 
Luke1:73 Kan pu Abrahama hnênah thu a tiam tlat a, kan hmêlmate laka min chhan a," 
Luke1:74 Thlaphâng lova a rawng kan bâwla, Kan dam chhûng zawng," 
Luke1:75 A hmaa thianghlim leh fel taka kan awm a tiam kha. 
Luke1:76 Mama, nang zawng chungnungbera zâwlnei i ni ang a, Lalpa kawng buatsaihin i kal hmasa dâwn a ni," 
Luke1:77 An sualte ngaidamin a mite a chhandam tih hriattîr tûrin. 
Luke1:78 Kan Pathian khawngaihna nasa tak avâng hian chung lam ni chhuak chuan mi rawn tlawh dâwn," 
Luke1:79 Thih hlau rêng rênga awmte leh thim zînga ṭhute chhun ênga, Thlamuanna kawnga kan kête pêntîr tûrin,” a ti a." 
Luke1:80 Nausên chu a lo ṭhang lian a, thlarau lamah a lo puitling deuh deuh va, Israel mipui hmuha a rawn lan hma kha chuan thlalêrah a awm reng a ni." 
Luke2:1 Chûng lai chuan Kaisara, Augasta chuan khawvêl zawng zawnga mite hming ziak vek tûrin thu a pe a." 
Luke2:2 Chu chu Suria ram awptu Kurinia a nih laia chhiarpui hmasa ber a ni. 
Luke2:3 Tichuan, mi zawng zawng mahni khua ṭheuhvah hming ziak tûrin an kal ta a." 
Luke2:4 Josefa pawh, Davida chhûngte leh a thlah a nih avângin, Galili ram Nazaret khua aṭang chuan, a nupui hual Mari, rit tawh tak nên chuan, hming ziak tûrin Judai rama Davida khua Bethlehem an tihah chuan an kal ve ta a." 
Luke2:5  
Luke2:6 Chuta an awm lai chuan a hrin a lo hun ta a; fa tîrah mipa a hring a. 
Luke2:7 Puanin a tuam a, khualbûka an len ve tâk loh avângin ran chaw pêkna thlêngah a muttîr a." 
Luke2:8 Chu lai ramah chuan berâmputen berâm an vêng a, zânah an riah chilh a." 
Luke2:9 Lalpa tirh vântirhkoh an hmaah a lo ding a, Lalpa ropuina chuan an vêl chu a chhun êng ta pup a; an hlau êm êm a." 
Luke2:10 Vântirhkoh erawh chuan an hnênah, “Hlau suh ula, ngai rawh u, mi tin tân Chanchin Ṭha lâwmawm êm êm ka rawn thlen che u a ni." 
Luke2:11 Vawiin hian in tân Davida khuaah Chhandamtu a piang ta, Lalpa Krista chu." 
Luke2:12 Nausên, puana tuam, ran chaw pêkna thlênga mu in va hmuh chuan ani chu a ni tih hria ang che u,” a ti a." 
Luke2:13 Thâwklehkhatan vântirhkoh kiangah chuan vân mipuiho an lo awm ta chiam a, Pathian an fak a:" 
Luke2:14 “Chungnung berah khian Pathian chu ropui takin awm sela, Leiah hian a lawm êm êm mihringte zîngah rem lêng rawh se,” an ti a." 
Luke2:15 Vântirhkohten vâna an kalsan tâk veleh berâmpute chuan, “Hawh u, Bethlehem-ah kal ila, Lalpa thu min hrilh lo thleng chu i va en ang u,” an ti a." 
Luke2:16 Tichuan, hmanhmawh takin an kal a, Mari te, Josefa te, ran chaw pêkna thlenga nausên mu te chu an va hmu a." 
Luke2:17 An va hmuh chuan nausên chanchin vântirhkoh sawi kha an hrilh a. 
Luke2:18 A hria apiang chuan berâmpute thu sawi chu mak an ti hle a; 
Luke2:19 Mari chuan chûng chu a vawng reng a, a ngaihtuah neuh neuh ṭhîn a." 
Luke2:20 Vântirhkoh hrilh ang ngeia engkim an hmuha an hriat avâng chuan berâmpute chu Pathian chawimawi leh fak chung zêlin an kîr leh ta a. 
Luke2:21 Tin, ni riat a lo tlina a serh an tan ni chuan, a hmingah, chhûla a awm hma rênga vântirhkoh sak tawh sa Isua an sa a." 
Luke2:22 Mosia Dân anga an inthenna ni a lo thlen chuan nausên chu Lalpa hnêna hlân tûrin Jerusalem-ah an chhohpui a. 
Luke2:23 Lalpa Dân thu-ah, “Fa tîr mipa tawh phawt chu Lalpa chanvo tûr a ni,” tih a ni a." 
Luke2:24 Tin, Lalpa Dân angin ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârva no pahnih emaw inthawi nân an hlân tûr a ni." 
Luke2:25 Jerusalem-ah chuan mi pakhat, a hming Sumeona a awm. Ani chu mi fel leh sakhaw mi tak a ni a, Israel thlamuantu tûr chu a thlîr reng a; a chungah Thlarau Thianghlim a awm a." 
Luke2:26 Lalpa Hriakthiha chu a hmuh hma chuan a thi lo vang tih Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo hrilh tawh rêng a. 
Luke2:27  
Luke2:28 Thlarau hruaiin tempulah chuan a lo kal a, nausên Isua chu a nu leh pain Dânin a phût tihsak tûra an rawn hruai luh lai chuan a lo pawm a, Pathian a fak a:" 
Luke2:29 “Aw Lalber, tûnah i thu ang ngeiin I bawih hi thlamuang takin i chhuahtîr dâwn ta a," 
Luke2:30 I chhandamna mi tin hmuha i siam kha," 
Luke2:31 ka mit hian a hmu ta e. 
Luke2:32 Jentail-te hnêna i êng tilang tûr leh I mi Israel-te ropuina tûr chu,” a ti a." 
Luke2:33 A nu leh pa chuan nausên chungchâng a sawi chu mak an ti hle a. 
Luke2:34 Sumeona chuan anni chu mal a sâwm a, a nu Mari hnênah: “Ngai rawh, Israel zînga mi tam tak Tlûkchhiat nân leh din chhuah nân He nautê hi ruat a ni, Chhinchhiahna, an hnial luai luai tûra chu." 
Luke2:35 Nang pawh, ngûnhnâma chhun angin i thin a la nâ ang, Mi tam tak rilru chhûngril tihlan a ni dâwn si a,” a ti a." 
Luke2:36 Zâwlnei pakhat, Annii, Fanuela fanu, Asera hnam, tar tawh tak a awm bawk a. A pasal nên kum sarih an inneih hnuin," 
Luke2:37 kum sawmriat leh pali a hmeithai tawh a. Ani chuan Tempul kalsan lovin chaw te a nghei ṭhîn a, a chhûn a zân ṭawngṭaiin Pathian a be ṭhîn a." 
Luke2:38 Chutih lai chuan ani chu a lo kal a, Pathian hnênah lâwmthu a sawi a, Jerusalem chhanchhuahna beiseitu apiang hnênah nausên chanchin chu a sawi ta a." 
Luke2:39 Lalpa Dân ang zêla thil an tih zawh vek hnu chuan Galili ramah, an khua Nazaret-ah chuan an haw leh ta a." 
Luke2:40 Nausên pawh chu a ṭhang lian zêl a, a fing deuh deuh va, Pathian khawngaihna a chungah a awm reng a." 
Luke2:41 A nu leh pate chu kum tin Jerusalem-ah Kalhlên Kût hmang tûrin an kal ṭhîn a. 
Luke2:42 Ani chu kum sâwm leh pahnih a nihin dân pangngai anga Kût hmang tûrin an chhohpui a. 
Luke2:43 Kût an ṭiak a, an hâw ta a, naupang Isua erawh chu a nu leh pa te hriat lohvin Jerusalem-ah a châm a." 
Luke2:44 An pâwlte zîngah a awm a ni ang chu tiin ni khat an kal hman tawh a, an laichînte leh an hmêlhriatte zîngah an han zawn chuan an hmu ta lo va." 
Luke2:45 Zawng zêl chungin Jerusalem-ah an kîr leh ta a. 
Luke2:46 Ni thum ni chuan tempulah, zirtîrtuho bula a lo ṭhu ve chu an han hmu ta a; an thu a lo ngaithla a, thute a lo zâwt bawk a." 
Luke2:47 Anni chuan a finzia leh a chhân thiamzia an hriatin mak an ti hle hlawm a. 
Luke2:48 A nu leh a pa chuan an han hmuh chuan mak an ti êm êm a, a nu chuan, “Mama, engati nge hetia min tih? I pa nên thlaphâng takin kan zawng kan zawng che asin le,” a ti a." 
Luke2:49 Ani erawh chuan, “Engah nge mi zawn? Ka Pa ina awm ngei tûr ka ni tih in hre lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Luke2:50 An hnêna a thu sawi chu a ngaihna an hre lo va. 
Luke2:51 An rual chuan a haw ve ta a, Nazaret an thleng a, an thu a awih êm êm zêl a; tin, a nu chuan chûng thu zawng zawng chu a rilruah a vawng reng a." 
Luke2:52 Tin, Isua chu a lo ṭhang lian telh telh a, a fing deuh deuh va, Pathian khawngaihna leh mite duhsakna a dawng zêl a." 
Luke3:1 Tiberia Kaisara a lal kum sâwm leh panga kum chuan, Pontia Pilata chu Judai ram awptu a ni a, Heroda chu Galili ram lal a ni. A unau Filipa chu Ituria leh Trakonitis ram lal a ni a, Lusania chu Abilene ram lal a ni;" 
Luke3:2 Anna leh Kaiafa chu Puithiam lalber an ni a; thlalêrah, Zakaria fapa Johana hnênah, Pathian thu a lo thleng a." 
Luke3:3 Jordan lui ruam ram a fang vêl a, sual ngaihdam nân sima baptisma chan tûr thu a hril zêl a;" 
Luke3:4 zâwlnei Isaia lehkhabua, “Thlalêra mi au aw chuan Lalpa lamlian chei ula, A kal nân kawng tluang siam rawh u." 
Luke3:5 Kawr tin chhûn khah vek a ni ang a, Tlâng tin mual tin râwt hniam a ni ang. A kawite chu a lo ngîl ang a, A bumbohte chu a lo rual bawk ang." 
Luke3:6 Pathian chhandamna chu mi tinin an hmu ang,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Luke3:7 Tichuan, mipui lo kalte hnênah chuan, “Rûl thlahte u, thinur lo thleng tûr pumpelh nân tu nge baptisma chang tûra fuih che u?" 
Luke3:8 In sim ngei a ni tih tilang tûrin thil ti zâwk rawh u. ‘Kan pa chu Abrahama asin,’ in lo ti rilru mai dah ang e; ka hrilh a che u, Pathian chuan hêng lung hi Abrahama thlahah a din thei asin." 
Luke3:9 Tûn apangin hreipui chu thing bul tinah an dah ta; thing eng pawh rah ṭhaa rah lo chu kiha meia tuah mai tûr a ni,” a lo ti a." 
Luke3:10 Mipui chuan, “Chuti chu eng nge kan tih tûr le?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Luke3:11 Ani chuan, “Tu pawh, kawr pahnih nei chuan a nei ve lo pe rawh se; chutiang bawkin ei nei chuan a nei ve lo pe rawh se,” a ti a." 
Luke3:12 Chhiahkhawntute pawh baptisma chang tûrin an lo kal a, “Zirtîrtu, eng nge kan tih tûr?” an ti a." 
Luke3:13 Ani chuan “Chhiah bi tûr aia tam phût suh u,” a ti a." 
Luke3:14 Sipaite pawh chuan, “Anih, keini hi, eng nge kan tih ve tûr?” an ti a. Ani chuan “Tihluihnain emaw, dâwtin emaw tu ma thil lâksak suh ula, in hlawhah lungawi rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke3:15 Mite beisei chu a sâng hle a, Johana chu ‘Krista a ni mai âwm e,’ tia an ngaihtuah rilrûk lai chuan," 
Luke3:16 Johana chuan an za-in a hrilh a, “Kei zawngin tuiin ka baptis che u a; nimahsela, kei aia ropui zâwk a lo kal dâwn a, kei hi chu a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlâk pawh ka ni lo. Ani zawngin Thlarau Thianghlim leh meiin a baptis ang che u." 
Luke3:17 A hruiha buh zâp faia zêma khung mai tûrin a sisêp chu a keng tawh a, a site erawh chu tihmih rual loh meiah a hâl ral ang,” a ti a." 
Luke3:18 Chutiang chuan fuihna thu dang tam tak nên mite hnênah Chanchin Ṭha chu a hril ṭhîn a. 
Luke3:19 Lal Heroda pawh kha, a nau nupui Herodi nêna an chungchâng thu-ah leh thil sual dang a tih zawng zawng chungthu-ah a zilhhau va." 
Luke3:20 Heroda chuan ama thil sual tih tâk zawng zawng belhchhahin Johana chu tân inah a khung a. 
Luke3:21 Tin, mi zawng zawngin baptisma an chang a. Isua pawhin a chang ve a, a ṭawngṭai laiin vân a lo inhawng a," 
Luke3:22 Thlarau Thianghlim chu taksa neiin ṭhuro angin a chungah a lo chhuk a, “Nang, ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka chu i ni, i chungah ka lâwm êm êm e,” a rawn ti a." 
Luke3:23 Rawng a bâwl ṭan chuan Isua chu kum sawmthum laia upa a ni tawh a, mi ngaih chuan Josefa fapa a ni. Chu mi chu Helia fa a ni a," 
Luke3:24 ani chu Matthata fa a ni; ani chu Levia fa a ni; ani chu Melkia fa a ni; ani chu Jannaia fa a ni; ani chu Josefa fa a ni; 
Luke3:25 ani chu Mattathia fa a ni; ani chu Amosa fa a ni; ani chu Nahuma fa a ni; ani chu Eslia fa a ni; ani chu Naggaia fa a ni; 
Luke3:26 ani chu Maatha fa a ni; ani chu Mattathia fa a ni; ani chu Semeia fa a ni; ani chu Joseka fa a ni; ani chu Joda fa a ni; 
Luke3:27 ani chu Joana fa a ni; ani chu Resa fa a ni; ani chu Zerubabela fa a ni; ani chu Salathiela fa a ni; ani chu Neria fa a ni; 
Luke3:28 ani chu Melkia fa a ni; ani chu Addia fa a ni; ani chu Kosama fa a ni; ani chu Elmadama fa a ni; ani chu Era fa a ni; 
Luke3:29 ani chu Isua fa a ni; ani chu Eliezara fa a ni; ani chu Jorima fa a ni; ani chu Matthata fa a ni; ani chu Levia fa a ni; 
Luke3:30 ani chu Simeona fa a ni; ani chu Juda fa a ni; ani chu Josefa fa a ni; ani chu Jonama fa a ni; ani chu Eliakima fa a ni; 
Luke3:31 ani chu Melea fa a ni; ani chu Menna fa a ni; ani chu Mattatha fa a ni; ani chu Nathana fa a ni; ani chu Davida fa a ni; 
Luke3:32 ani chu Jesaia fa a ni; ani chu Obeda fa a ni; ani chu Boaza fa a ni; ani chu Sala fa a ni; ani chu Nasona fa a ni; 
Luke3:33 ani chu Aminadaba fa a ni; ani chu Admina fa a ni; ani chu Arnia fa a ni; ani chu Esroma fa a ni; ani chu Faresa fa a ni; ani chu Juda fa a ni; 
Luke3:34 ani chu Jakoba fa a ni; ani chu Isaka fa a ni; ani chu Abrahama fa a ni; ani chu Tera fa a ni; ani chu Nahora fa a ni; 
Luke3:35 ani chu Seruga fa a ni; ani chu Hragaia fa a ni; ani chu Falega fa a ni; ani chu Ebera fa a ni; ani chu Sala fa a ni; 
Luke3:36 ani chu Kainana fa a ni; ani chu Arfaksada fa a ni; ani chu Sema fa a ni; ani chu Nova fa a ni; ani chu Lameka fa a ni; 
Luke3:37 ani chu Methusela fa a ni; ani chu Enoka fa a ni; ani chu Jareda fa a ni; ani chu Mahalaleela fa a ni; ani chu Kainana fa a ni;
