Luke17:21 ‘En teh u, heta hi,’ emaw, ‘sawta saw,’ emaw an ti hek lo vang. Ngai teh u, Pathian ram chu in zîngah hian a awm zâwk a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke17:22 A zirtîrte hnênah chuan, “Mihring Fapa dam lai hunte hi ni khat tal hmuh in duh ni a lo la thleng dâwn; nimahsela, in hmu si lo vang." 
Luke17:23 In hnênah, ‘En teh u, sawta saw le,’ emaw, ‘en teh u, heta hi le,’ emaw an la ti ang; kal chhuak suh ula, zui duh hek suh u." 
Luke17:24 Mihring Fapa lo kal ni chuan, kâwlphein kâwlkil a dêt tawn zawr zawr ang hi a la ni dâwn." 
Luke17:25 Amaherawhchu, tûnlai mite hian an hnâwl ang a, thil tam tak a tuar hmasa zet tûr a ni." 
Luke17:26 “Nova hun laia thil awm dân ang khân Mihring Fapa lo kal ni-ah pawh a la awm ve ang. 
Luke17:27 Nova lawnga a luh ni thleng khân mite chuan an eiin an bâr a, nupui pasal an innei a; tui a lo lian a, an zaa a rawn tihboral tâk kha." 
Luke17:28 “Chutiang bawkin Lota dam laiin thil a awm kha; an eiin an in a, an leiin an hralh a, thil an phun a, in an sa a;" 
Luke17:29 nimahsela, Sodom khua ata Lota a chhuah ni chuan vân aṭangin mei leh kât a sûr a, an za-in a tihhlum vek kha." 
Luke17:30 Mihring Fapa lo kal hun chuan chutiang bawk chu a la ni ang. 
Luke17:31 Chumi hunah chuan in chungah mi an awm chuan, in chhûnga sum chuh tûrin chhuk suh se." 
Luke17:32 Lova awm chu hâwng hek suh se. Lota nupui hre reng rawh u. 
Luke17:33 “Mahni nun chhan tum apiang chuan an chân ang a, mahni nun chân apiang chuan an hum ang." 
Luke17:34 “Ka hrilh a che u, chumi zânah chuan mi pahnih khum khatah an mu ang a, pakhat chu kal bopui a ni ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiah a ni ang." 
Luke17:35 Hmeichhe pahnihin buh an dêng ang a, pakhat chu lâk a ni ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiah a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Anni chuan an lo chhâng a, “Lalpa, khawiah maw?” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Sa ruang awmna apiangah mulukawlhte pawh an awm khâwm ang,” a ti a." 
Luke18:1 Tin, beidawng lova ṭawngṭai fan fan tûr a nihzia tehkhin thuin a hrilh a:" 
Luke18:2 “Khaw engah emaw rorêltu pakhat a awm a; Pathian a ṭih lo va, mihring lah a pawisa hek lo." 
Luke18:3 Chumi khuaah chuan hmeithai pakhat a awm a, ‘Ka khingpui nêna kan thubuai min chinfelsak rawh,’ tiin a hnênah a lo kal chhên a." 
Luke18:4 Ani chuan eng emaw chhûng chu a lo duh lo va, nakinah erawh chuan a rilruin, Pathian ṭih lovin mihring pawisa lo mah ila," 
Luke18:5 he hmeithai hian mi tibuai êm a, ka tihfelsak mai teh ang; chuti lo chu a lo kal fo âwm si a, a ninawm lutuk dâwn,’ a ti a,” a ti a." 
Luke18:6 Lalpa chuan a sawi zêl a, “Rorêltu fel lo thu sawi chu hre rawh u," 
Luke18:7 A mi thlan, a chhûn a zâna amah autute thu chu Pathian chuan a chinfelsak thuai dâwn lâwm ni? A muangchâng dâwn em ni?" 
Luke18:8 Ka hrilh a che u, a rawn chinfelsak thuai ang. Amaherawhchu, Mihring Fapa hian a lo kal hunah khawvêlah rinna a rawn hmu ang em ni?” a ti a." 
Luke18:9 Fel inti hlea, mi dangte hmusit ṭhînte hnênah he tehkhin thu hi a sawi a." 
Luke18:10 “Mi pahnih tempulah ṭawngṭai tûrin an chho va; pakhat chu Farisai a ni a, pakhat chu chhiahkhawntu a ni." 
Luke18:11 Farisai chu a ding a, hetiang hian a ṭawngṭai a, ‘Aw Pathian, mi dang anga mi bum hmang, Dân bawhchhia, uire leh he chhiahkhawntu ang pawh hi ka nih loh avângin lâwmthu ka hrilh a che." 
Luke18:12 Chawlhkâr tin vawi hnih chaw ka nghei ziah a, ka neih apiangah sâwma pakhat ka pe ṭhîn,’ tiin." 
Luke18:13 Chhiahkhawntu erawh chu hnung feah a ding a, vân lam pawh a en ngam lo va, ‘Aw Pathian, kei mi sual hi mi khawngaih rawh,’ tiin a âwm a inchûm a inchûm ta zâwk a." 
Luke18:14 “Ka hrilh a che u, a hmasa aiin chu mi zâwk chu thiam changin a in lamah a haw thla ta a. Inngaihlu apiang an tlâwm ang a, inngaitlâwm apiang chawimawi an ni ang,” a ti a." 
Luke18:15 A deh atân nausênte lam pawh an rawn hruai a, zirtîrte erawh chuan an lo hnar a." 
Luke18:16 Nimahsela, Isuan anni chu a ko va, “Naupangte ka hnênah han kaltîr ula, hnar tawh suh u; Pathian ram chu hetiang mite ta a ni si a." 
Luke18:17 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Pathian ram chu naupang anga lâwm lo apiang tu mah a chhûngah an lût tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke18:18 Tin, hotu pakhatin a hnênah, “Zirtîrtu Ṭha, chatuan nun ka chan theih nân eng nge ka tih ang?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Luke18:19 Isuan, “Engati nge Ṭha mi tih? Tu mah ṭha an awm lo, Pathian chauh lo chu." 
Luke18:20 Thupêkte chu i hria alâwm uire suh, tual that suh, ru suh, dâwtin hêk suh, i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh, tihte hi,” a ti a." 
Luke18:21 Ani chuan, “Chûng zawng zawng chu ka tleirâwl chhuah tirh ata ka zâwm ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Luke18:22 Chu chu a hriatin Isuan a hnênah, “Kawng khat i la bâk e; i neih zawng zawng hralh la, pachhiate sem rawh; chutichuan, vânah ro i nei dâwn nia; tin, lo kal la, mi zui ang che,” a ti a." 
Luke18:23 Chûng thu a han hriat chuan a lungngai ta hle a, mi hausa tak a ni si a." 
Luke18:24 Isuan ani chu a hmuhin, “Sum ngahte tân Pathian rama luh a va harsa êm!" 
Luke18:25 Pathian rama mi hausa an luh aiin, hriau benga sanghâwngsei luh tlang a âwl zâwk si a,” a ti a." 
Luke18:26 A lo ngaithlatute chuan, “Chuti chu tu nge chhandam ni thei ang le?” an ti a." 
Luke18:27 Ani erawh chuan, “Mihring tih theih loh hi Pathian chuan a ti thei asin,” a ti a." 
Luke18:28 Petera chuan, “Ngai teh, kan in leh lo kalsanin kan zui ta che a,” a han ti a." 
Luke18:29 Isuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, Pathian ram avânga in emaw, nupui emaw, unaute emaw, nu leh pa emaw, fate emaw kalsan tawh phawt chuan tûnah ngei pawh hian," 
Luke18:30 a aia tam daih an hmu ngei ang, hun lo la thleng tûra chatuan nunna nên,” a ti a." 
Luke18:31 Sâwmpahnihte chu a hruai hrang a, an hnênah, “Ngai teh u, Jerusalem-ah kan chhoh dâwn hi; Mihring Fapa chungchâng thu zâwlneite hmanga ziak zawng zawng kha a thleng kim dâwn." 
Luke18:32 Jentail-te hnênah an hlân ang a; anni chuan an lo nuihzat ang a, zahthlâk takin an sawisa ang; chil an chhâk ang a;" 
Luke18:33 an vua ang a, an tihlum ang; ni thum ni-ah a tho leh ang,” a ti a." 
Luke18:34 Chûng thu chu a ngaihna an hre lo, an laka thup a ni a, a thu sawi chu an man lo va ni." 
Luke18:35 Jeriko khua a lo thlen dâwn chuan mitdel pakhat hi kawng sîrah kut dawhin a lo ṭhu a. 
Luke18:36 Mipui kal thâwm a hriat chuan eng nge ni ta tih a zâwt a. 
Luke18:37 “Nazaret Isua a lo kal a ni,” an ti a." 
Luke18:38 Tichuan, “Isu, Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,” tiin a au ta a." 
Luke18:39 Kal hmasate chuan an hau va, ngawi tûra an tih pawhin a hma aia ringin, “Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,” tiin a au zual sauh va." 
Luke18:40 Isua chu a ding a, a hnêna han hruai tûrin a hrilh a." 
Luke18:41 A kiang hnai a lo thlen chuan, “Eng nge tihsak che ila i duh?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Lalpa, hmuh theih ka duh,” a ti a." 
Luke18:42 Tichuan Isuan, “Hmu thei tawh ang che, i rinna hi i dam phah a ni e,” a ti a." 
Luke18:43 Thâwklehkhatan khua a hmu thei ta a. Pathian fak chung zêlin amah chu a zui ve ta a. Mi zawng zawngin chu chu an hmuhin Pathian an fak a. 
Luke19:1 Jeriko-ah chuan a lût a, a chhûnpelh dâwn a." 
Luke19:2 Chutah chuan pa pakhat, a hming Zakaia a awm a; chhiahkhawn hotu a ni a, mi hausa tak a ni." 
Luke19:3 Isua chu tu nge ni tih hmuh a tum a, mipui avâng chuan a hmu thei lo va, pa tawi tak a ni si a." 
Luke19:4 Tichuan, a kalna tûr kawngah a tlân khalh a, a en tûrin theipui kûngah a lâwn a." 
Luke19:5 Chumi hmun Isuan a va thlen chuan a dâk a, a hnênah, “Zakai, lo chhuk thuai rawh, vawiin hian i inah ka thleng dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke19:6 A lo chhuk ta sawk sawk a, hlim takin amah chu a thleng ta a." 
Luke19:7 Chu chu an hmuhin an za chuan, “Mi sual hnêna thleng tûrin a luh tâk saw,” tiin an phunnawi a." 
Luke19:8 Zakaia chu a ding a, Lalpa hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Lalpa, ka sum zâtve pachhiate ka pe ang a; tu thil pawh dik lo taka lâksak ka lo neih chuan a lêt liin ka rûl leh ang,” a ti a." 
Luke19:9 Isuan a hnênah, “Vawiinah he inah hian chhandamna a lo thleng ta, ani pawh Abrahama fapa a ni si a." 
Luke19:10 Mi bote zawnga chhandam tûrin Mihring Fapa hi a lo kal a ni rêng a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke19:11 Chûng thu chu an ngaihthlâk lai chuan Jerusalem pawh an hnaih tâk avâng leh, Pathian ram chu lo thleng mai dâwna an rin avângin tehkhin thu a sawi ta a:" 
Luke19:12 Heti hian a sawi a, “Mi lian pakhat, a lal theihna tûr thu laa lo kîr leh tûrin khaw lam hla takah kal a tum a." 
Luke19:13 A bawihte sâwm a ko va, rangkachak tangka pakhat a pe ṭheuh va, an hnênah, ‘Ka thang chhûngin lo peipung rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:14 Tin, chu khuaa mite chuan an hua a, ‘He pa hi lal atân kan duh lo ve,’ ti tûrin palai an tîr zui ve nghâl a." 
Luke19:15 “Lalna thu chu laa a lo kîr leh chuan, tangka a pêk a bawihte kha, an peipun zât hriat nân a kohtîr a." 
Luke19:16 A lo kal hmasa ber chuan, ‘Ka pu, i rangkachak tangka kha sâwmin a pung e,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:17 Ani chuan, Bawih ṭha, i ti ṭha e, tlêm tê chungah i rinawm a, khaw sâwm chunga hotu-ah ṭhu ang che,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:18 A dawta lo kal pawh chuan, ‘Ka pu, i rangkachak tangka kha pangain a pung e,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:19 Ani chuan, ‘Nang pawh, khaw nga chunga hotu-ah ṭhu rawh,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:20 “A dang pawh a lo kal a, ‘Ka pu, en teh, i rangkachak tangka kha, thlanhrûkna puanin ka lo fûn ṭha khiau asin." 
Luke19:21 Mi khirh tak i nih avângin ka hlau che a ni; i dah loh pawh i la ṭhîn a, i tuh loh pawh i seng ṭhîn si a,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:22 “Ani chuan, ‘Bawih sual, i ṭawngka chhuak aṭang ngeiin ka thiam lo va che. Mi khirh tak ka niha, ka dah loh pawh ka lâk ṭhina, ka tuh loh pawh ka seng ṭhin i hria maw?" 
Luke19:23 Chuti a nih ahnu, ka tangka chu engah nge tangkaa sumdâwngtute hnênah i dah mai loh? Ka lo hâwnin a pung nên keiin ka rawn ṭhîng tûr alâwm,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:24 Tin, a kianga dingte hnênah, ‘A rangkachak tangka kha lâksak ula, rangkachak tangka sâwm neitu kha pe rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Luke19:25 Anni chuan, “Ka pu, ani zawngin sâwm a nei alâwm,’ an ti a." 
Luke19:26 Ka hrilh a che u, a nei apiang an pêk belhchhah ang a, a nei lo chu a neih chhun pawh lâksak a ni ang." 
Luke19:27 Tin, hêng, ka hmêlma, an lal atâna mi duh lotute hi, rawn hruai ula, ka hmaah that rawh u,’ a ti a,” a ti a." 
Luke19:28 Chûng thu chu a sawi zawh chuan Jerusalem panin hma a hruai chho ta a. 
Luke19:29 Oliv tlâng an tiha awm Bethfage leh Bethani khua a thlen dâwnin zirtîrte zînga pahnih a tîr a. 
Luke19:30 “Kan hma zâwn khuaah sâwn va kal ta ula, in va luhin sabengtung no thlun, tu ma la chuan ngai lohna in va hmu ang; phelh ula, han kai rawh u." 
Luke19:31 Miten, ‘Engah nge in phelh tâk mai?’ an tih che u chuan, ‘Lalpan a mamawh a ni,’ tiin chhâng ang che u,” a ti a." 
Luke19:32 Tichuan, a tirhte chu an kal ta a, an hnêna a sawi ang ngeiin an va hmu a." 
Luke19:33 Sabengtung chu an phelh lai chuan a neitute chuan, “Sabengtung kha engah nge in phelh tâk mai?” an ti a." 
Luke19:34 Anni chuan, “Lalpan a mamawh a ni,” an ti a." 
Luke19:35 Isua hnênah an rawn kai a, sabengtung chungah chuan an puante an phah a, a chungah Isua chu an chuantîr ta a." 
Luke19:36 A kalkawngah chuan an puante an phah zêl a. 
Luke19:37 Jerusalem thlen dâwn hnaih, Oliv tlâng liam thlâk dâwnah chuan zirtîrho zawng zawng chu thil mak an hmuh zawng zawngte avângin an lâwm a, aw ring takin an au va, Pathian an fak ta a." 
Luke19:38 “Lalpa hminga lal lo kal chu Fakin awm rawh se, Vânah rem lêng sela, Chungnungbera hnênah ropuina awm rawh se,” an ti a." 
Luke19:39 Mipui zînga Farisai ṭhenkhat erawh chuan a hnênah, “Zirtîrtu, i zirtîrte hi khap rawh,” an ti a." 
Luke19:40 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ka hrilh a che u, hêngho hi an ngawih chuan hêng lung tal hi an au chhuak ang,” a tihsan a." 
Luke19:41 Tin, a lo hnaih deuhva, khawpui a han hmuh chuan a ṭah ta a," 
Luke19:42 “Aw, nang lul hian vawiinah tal hian muanna kawng hi hre hman hrâm la ṭha tûr!" 
Luke19:43 I râlten leikulh an siam hnan hun che a lo thleng dâwn, an hual ang chia, kil tin aṭangin an bei dâwn a che;" 
Luke19:44 i chhûnga fanaute nên lam an paih thal dêr ang che u; i chhûngah lung intiang rêng rêng an zuah lo vang, Pathianin a rawn kan lai che i hriat loh avângin chûng chu i chungah a lo thleng dâwn,” tiin." 
Luke19:45 Tempulah chuan a va lût a, englo zuartute chu a hnawt chhuak a," 
Luke19:46 an hnênah, “ ‘Ka in chu ṭawngṭaina in a ni ang,’ tih ziak a ni a, nangni erawh chuan suamhmangte pûkah insiam tâk zâwk hi,” a ti a." 
Luke19:47 Ni tin Tempulah chuan a zirtîr ṭhîn a, puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan, vântlâng hotute nên, amah tihboral an tum a;" 
Luke19:48 nimahsela, mipuiten a thu ngaihthlâk an kham theih loh avângin a tih dân tûr an hre thei lo a ni." 
Luke20:1 Ni khat chu Tempula Chanchin Ṭha hrila a zirtîr lai chuan puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chu, upate nên a hnênah an lo chho va." 
Luke20:2 “Eng thuneihnain nge hêng thil hi i tih? Tu-in nge thu pe che min hrilh rawh,” an rawn ti a." 
Luke20:3 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Kei pawhin thu ka zâwt ve ang che u:" 
Luke20:4 Johana baptisma kha, vâna mi thu nge mihring thu, min hrilh rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke20:5 An inberâwn a, ‘Vâna mi thu kan tih chuan, ‘engah nge a thu in awih loh,’ min ti si ang a," 
Luke20:6 ‘leia mi thu,’ kan tih lahin mipui hian an za-in lungin min dêng mai awm si a, Johana chu zâwlnei ni ngeiah an pawm tlat hlawm si,” an ti a." 
Luke20:7 Tichuan, “Khawi lam zâwk thu nge kan hre lo,” an ti a." 
Luke20:8 Isua chuan, “Kei pawhin tu thuin nge hêng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh bîk lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Luke20:9 Vântlâng hnênah he tehkhin thu hi a hrilh ta a: “Mi pakhatin grep huan a siam a, huan enkawltute a thlawh hlawhtîr a; ram dangah rei tak a thang bo va." 
Luke20:10 A lawh hun chuan a chan ai la tûrin bawih pakhat huan enkawltute hnênah chuan a tîr a; nimahsela, huan enkawltute chuan an lo vêl a, kut ruakin an hâwtîr a." 
Luke20:11 Bawih dang a tîr leh a, chu pawh chu an lo vêl a, zahthlâk takin an sawisa a, kut ruak bawkin an hawtîr leh ta a." 
Luke20:12 A ṭum thumnaa a tirh lek phei chu, thisen an lo chhuahsak a; huan ata an theh chhuak a." 
Luke20:13 “Grep huan neitupa chuan, ‘Engtin nge ka tih ang aw? Ka fapa duh tak hi ka tîr mai teh ang; ani hi zawng an lo zah êm ang chu maw,’ a ti a." 
Luke20:14 Huan enkawltute chuan an lo hmuhin, ‘He mi hi ro luahtu tûr chu a ni, i that ang u khai, keinin a ro chu kan nei hlauh dâwn nia,’ an ti hlawm a." 
Luke20:15 Grep huan ata chu an theh chhuak a, an tihlum ta a." 
Luke20:16 Tichuan, grep huan neitupa chuan engtin nge anni chu a rawn tih ang? A lo kal ang a, huan enkawltute chu a rawn tiboral ang a, huan chu mi dangte a pe ang,” a ti a. Thu ngaithlatute chuan, “Chu êm chu ni lo ve!” an ti a." 
Luke20:17 Nimahsela, anniho chu a en a, “In satute lung duh loh kha, Chu ngei chu a kil lung ṭangkai ber a lo ni si,’ tih ziak hi eng tihna nge ni?" 
Luke20:18 Chu lung chunga tlu apiang an keh sawm ang a, a delh lek phei chu a râwt dip ang,” a ti a." 
Luke20:19 Chutih lai chuan Dân zirtîrtute leh puithiam lalte chuan, chu tehkhin thu chu anmahni demin a sawi tih an hriat avângin man nghâl mai an duh a; amaherawhchu, vântlâng an hlau si." 
Luke20:20 Tichuan, remchâng an melh ta rân a: Ramawptu rorêlna leh a thuneihnaah an thlen theih nân a ṭawng sual palh man tûrin enthlatu, mi dik anga lang tûrin an tîr a." 
Luke20:21 Chûng mite chuan, “Zirtîrtu, i thu sawi leh i thu zirtîr hi a dik tih kan hria; tu mah zah bîk nei chuang lovin Pathian thu dik tak i zirtîr ṭhîn." 
Luke20:22 Kaisara hnênah chhiah chawi tûr kan ni nge ni lo?” tiin an zâwt a. 
Luke20:23 An ngamthlêm a ni tih a hmu tlang a, an hnênah," 
Luke20:24 “Duli mi han entîr teh u. Tu lem leh tu hming nge chuang?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Kaisara,” an ti a." 
Luke20:25 Ani chuan, “A nih ahnu, Kaisara ta chu Kaisara pe ula, Pathian ta chu Pathian pe ta che u,” a ti a." 
Luke20:26 Tichuan vântlâng hmaa a thu sawia man an tum chu an hlawhchham ta a; a chhânna chu mak an ti hle a, an ngawi ta daih a." 
Luke20:27 Sadukai-ho, ‘thawhlehna a awm lo,’ tite zînga ṭhenkhat Isua hnênah an lo kal a." 
Luke20:28 “Zirtîrtu, Mosian, ‘Tu pawh nupui nei si, fa nei lovin thi sela, a unaupa chuan a nupui chu rochungin a unaupa tân chi a thlahsak tûr a ni,’ tiin min ziaksak a." 
Luke20:29 Aw le, unau mipa pasarih an awm a, a upa ber chuan nupui a nei a, fa nei lovin a thi a;" 
Luke20:30 a pahnihna chuan a rochung a," 
Luke20:31 pathumna pawhin; chutiangin pasarihte chuan an rochung ṭheuh va, fa nei lovin an thi zêl a." 
Luke20:32 Chumi hnu chuan hmeichhia pawh chu a thi ve ta a; 
Luke20:33 tichuan, thawhlehnaah chuan chu nu chu tu nupui ber nge ni ang? An pasarih khân nupuiah an nei ṭheuh si a?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Luke20:34 Lalpan an hnênah, “He khawvêl mite hi nupui pasal an innei ṭhîn a;" 
Luke20:35 khawvêl lo la awm tûra thawhlehnaa tel tlâka ruatte erawh chu nupui pasal an innei dâwn tawh hlei nêm; 
Luke20:36 thih pawh an thi leh thei dâwn tawh lo, vântirhkohte ang an ni; thawhlehna changtute an ni a, Pathian fate an ni." 
Luke20:37 Mitthi kaihthawh thu chu Mosia pawhin a tilang alâwm. Hnimbuk meialh thu-ah khân Lalpa chu, ‘Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian,’ tia a sawi kha." 
Luke20:38 Ani chu mitthite Pathian a ni lo va, mi nungte Pathian a ni zâwk e. Ani tân chuan an nung vek a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke20:39 Dân zirtîrtu ṭhenkhat chuan, “Zirtîrtu, i sawi dik hle e,” an lo ti bawk a," 
Luke20:40 thu dang chu an zâwt ngam tawh lo. 
Luke20:41 An hnênah, “Krista chu Davida fapa engtiziaa ti nge an nih?" 
Luke20:42 Fakna Hla bu-ah Davida ngeiin: 
Luke20:43 ‘Lalpa chuan ka Lalpa hnênah, ka ding lamah lo ṭhu rawh, I hmêlmate i ke nghahchhanah ka han siam ang e,’ a ti a." 
Luke20:44 Davidan ani chu, ‘Lalpa,’ a tih si chuan, engtin nge a fapa a nih theih ang?” a ti a." 
Luke20:45 Vântlâng hriatin a zirtîrte hnênah chuan," 
Luke20:46 “Dân zirtîrtute lakah fîmkhur rawh u. Anni chuan kawrfual haa lên vêl an chîng a, dâwr hmuna chibai bûk an ngaina a, sunagog-a ṭhutna langsâr ber leh ruai ṭhehna hmuna ṭhutna ṭha ber an ngiat ṭhîn." 
Luke20:47 Hêngho, hmeithai sum ei zawhsaka, mi hmuh atân maia rei tak tak ṭawngṭai chîng site hian hremna an tuar nasa ber ang,” a ti a." 
Luke21:1 Thawhlâwm bâwma mi hausate thawhlâwm thlâk chu a thlîr reng a. 
Luke21:2 Hmeithai rethei tak pakhatin dâr pawisa pahnih a rawn thlâk ve chu a hmu a. 
Luke21:3 Tichuan, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, he hmeithai rethei tak hian mi dang zawng ai khân a thlâk tam a ni." 
Luke21:4 Mi dangte hi chuan an neih liama mi an rawn thlâk a, ani erawh hi chuan tlachham chungin, intunnunna tûra a neih chhun chu a rawn thlâk a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Luke21:5 Lung mawi tak tak leh thilpêk khâwma Tempul an chei mawizia thu mi ṭhenkhatin an sawi laiin Isuan," 
Luke21:6 “Hêng in thil hmuhte hi, lung intiang rêng rêng hi pakhat mah tihchim lohva hnutchhiah a awm loh hun a lo thleng dâwn,” a ti a." 
Luke21:7 Anni chuan a hnênah, “Zirtîrtu, chûng chu engtikah nge a lo awm ang? Chûng lo thlen dâwn hun chhinchhiahna thil mak eng eng nge awm ang?” tiin an zâwt a." 
Luke21:8 Ani chuan, “Hruai bo in nih loh nân fîmkhur rawh u. Ka hming chhâlin, ‘Keimah hi ka ni,’ ‘a hun a thleng dâwn ta,’ tiin mi tam tak an lo chhuak ang; an hnung zui suh ang che u." 
Luke21:9 Indo ri te leh hel vânga buai thâwmte in hriat hunin, hlauvin mangang suh ang che u; chûng chu thleng hmasa tûr rêng a ni, hun tâwp erawh chu a ni nghâl mai lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke21:10 Tin, an hnênah, “Hnam hrang hrang an indo vang a, sawrkâr hrang leh sawrkâr hrang an indo bawk ang." 
Luke21:11 Lîr a nghîng vak vak ang a, hmun hrang hrangah ṭâm a tla ang a, hrite a lêng bawk ang; vân ata hlauhawmte leh chhinchhiahna mak tak tak a lo awm ang." 
Luke21:12 Nimahsela, chûng thilte chu a lo thlen hmain an man ang che u a, sunagog-ah te hruaiin tân inah te an khung ang che u a, an tiduhdah dâwn che u a ni. Ka hming avângin lalte leh Ramawptute hmaah an hruai ang che u." 
Luke21:13 Ka thuhretute in nih târlanna remchâng a ni hlauh dâwn. 
Luke21:14 Chhânna tûr ngaihtuah lâwk a ngai lo tih hre sa rawh u; 
Luke21:15 in khingpuite tluk loh tûr leh hnial theih loh tûr finna leh mi chhân thiamna keiin ka pe dâwn si che u a. 
Luke21:16 In nu leh pate, in unaute, in laichînte leh in ṭhiante hial pawhin an mantîr ang che u a; a ṭhen phei chu an tihlum ang che u." 
Luke21:17 Ka hming avângin mi tinin an hua ang che u. 
Luke21:18 Nimahsela, in samzai pakhat pawh a boral lo vang." 
Luke21:19 Chhel takin ding tlat ula; tichuan, in him ang." 
Luke21:20 “Sipaihoten Jerusalem an hual in hmuh hun chuan, a chhiat a hnai ta tih hria ang che u." 
Luke21:21 Chutih hunah chuan Judai rama awmte chu tlângramahte tlân se; khawpui chhûnga awmte chuan chhuahsan sela, thingtlânga awmte chu a chhûngah lût suh se." 
Luke21:22 Chûng nite chu hremna ni chu a ni e, thu ziak zawng zawng a thlen kim nân." 
Luke21:23 Chûng huna nau paite leh nauno pawmte chu an va khawngaihthlâk dâwn êm! He ramah hian hrehawm nasa tak a thleng dâwn si a, he chite chungah hian thinurna a lo thleng dâwn a ni." 
Luke21:24 Khandaiha sâm an ni ang a, Jentail ram tinah sala hruai darhin an awm ang; tin, Jentail-te hun a tâwp hma zawng Jerusalem hi Jentail-te rah beh a ni ang." 
Luke21:25 “Tin, ni-ah te, thlaah te, arsi-ah te khian chhinchhiahna mak tak tak a lo awm ang a; leiah pawh tuifinriat fâwn leh rûm hum hum an hriatin hnam tin tihngaihna hre lovin an mangang ang a;" 
Luke21:26 Vân thiltihtheihnate chu tihnghîn a ni ang a, khawvêla thil hlauhawm lo thleng tûr an suangtuahin, hlauva thlabârin mite an thidang ang." 
Luke21:27 Chutih hunah chuan Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna leh ropuina nasa tak nên chhûm zînga lo kal an hmu ang. 
Luke21:28 Chûng thil chu a lo thlen chuan en chho ula, dâk chhuak ang che u; in tlanna chu a lo hnai ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke21:29 An hnênah tehkhin thu a sawi bawk a, “Theipui kûng leh thing dangte pawh hi en teh u." 
Luke21:30 A lo chawr no in hmuhin nipui a lo thaw ṭan ta tih in hre mai ṭhîn. 
Luke21:31 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawhin chûng zawng zawng lo thleng in hmuh hun chuan, Pathian ram chu a lo hnai ta tih hre mai ang che u." 
Luke21:32 Thu dik ka hrilh a che u, chûng thil zawng zawng chu a lo thlen hma loh chuan tûnlai mite hi an ral hman lo vang." 
Luke21:33 Lei leh vân a ral ang a, ka thu erawh chu a ral tawp lo vang." 
Luke21:34 “Tichuan, nawmsak bâwl te, zu ruih te, ni tin khawsak engtona te in rilrua a khah lutuk loh nân fîmkhur rawh u." 
Luke21:35 Thanga âwk phut ang maiin a rawn nang dah ang che u. Lei pum pui chunga chêngte chungah chutiangin a lo thleng dâwn si a. 
Luke21:36 Chûng thil lo thleng tûrte tuar chhuaka, Mihring Fapa hmaa in din theih nân eng lai pawhin ngaihvenin ṭawngṭai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke21:37 Chhûnah chuan Tempulah a zirtîr a, zânah erawh chuan a chhuak a, Oliv tlâng an tihah chuan a riak ṭhîn." 
Luke21:38 Mi zawng zawng pawh a thu ngaithla tûrin zîngah Tempulah an lo kal ṭhîn. 
Luke22:1 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh kût, Kalhlên Kût an tih chu a lo hnai ta a." 
Luke22:2 Puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chuan amah tihhlum dân tûr kawng an dap ta a; vântlâng an hlau si a. 
Luke22:3 Sâwmpahnihte zînga chhiar tel, Juda, Iskariota an tiha chhûngah Setana a lût a;" 
Luke22:4 tichuan, a va kal a, puithiam lalte leh vêngtu sipai hotuten an man dân tûr a va sawipui ta a." 
Luke22:5 Anni chu an lo lâwm hle a, pawisa pêk an tiam a." 
Luke22:6 Ani pawh chuan a remti a, mipui awm loh laia mantîrna hun remchâng a zawng ta a." 
Luke22:7 Chhang dawidim telh loh kût ni, Kalhlên Kût berâmno an talh ni chu a lo thleng a." 
Luke22:8 Tichuan, Petera leh Johana chu a tîr a, “Kalhlên Kût chaw kan ei tûr va buatsaih rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke22:9 Anni chuan “Khawiah nge va buatsaih ila i duh?” an ti a. 
Luke22:10 Ani chuan, “Ngai teh u, khawpuia in va luhin pa pakhat, hlumbêla tui chawiin a rawn tâwk ang che u, a luhna inah zui lût ang che u." 
Luke22:11 Tin, in neitupa hnênah, ‘Zirtîrtuin, ka zirtîrte nêna Kalhlên Kût chaw kan eina tûr pindan chu khawiah nge, a ti a che,’ ti ang che u." 
Luke22:12 Ani chuan pindan chungnung zau tak, engkim awm a kawhhmuh ang che u; chutah chuan buatsaih rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke22:13 Tichuan an kal a, an hnêna a sawi ang ngei khân an va hmu a, Kalhlên Kût chaw chu an buatsaih ta a." 
Luke22:14 Tin, a ei a lo hun chuan ani leh a zirtîrte chuan chaw chu an kîl ta a." 
Luke22:15 An hnênah, “Ka tuar hmain he Kalhlên Kût chaw hi eipui che u ka duh tak meuh a ni." 
Luke22:16 Ka hrilh a che u, Pathian rama a tak tak a thlen hma loh chu kût chaw hi ka ei leh tawh dâwn lo,” a ti a." 
Luke22:17 Tin, no a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin, “Hei hi la ula, in rawh u." 
Luke22:18 Ka hrilh a che u, tûn a chinah Pathian ram a lo thlen hma loh chu grep rah tui hi ka in leh dâwn tawh lo,” a ti a." 
Luke22:19 Tin, chhang a la a, lâwmthu a sawi zawhin a phel a, an hnênah a pe a, “Hei hi ka taksa a ni, in tâna pêk chu; min hriat reng nân hetiang hian ti ṭhîn rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke22:20 Zanriah ei zawh chuan chutiang bawkin no chu a la a, “He no hi ka thisena thuthlung thar, in tâna chhuak chu a ni." 
Luke22:21 “Nimahsela, ngai teh u, mi mantîrtu tûr chuan he dawhkân hi a kîl ve reng a ni." 
Luke22:22 Mihring Fapa hi Pathian ruat angin a kal dâwn; amaherawhchu, a mantîrtu tûr mihring chung chu a pik e,” a ti a." 
Luke22:23 Anni chuan an zîngah chutiang ti tûr chu tu tak ni ang maw, tiin an inzâwt a." 
Luke22:24 An zîngah tu nge ropui bera ngaih tûr ni ang tih inhnialna a lo chhuak bawk a. 
Luke22:25 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Jentail-ho lalte chu an intilal êm êm a, an chunga thuneitute lah chuan ‘Hotuṭhaa’ tih hming te an invuah a." 
Luke22:26 Nimahsela, nangni zîngah zawng chutiang tûr a ni lo ve. In zînga ropui ber chu tê ber angin awm sela, hotu ber chu rawngbâwltu angin awm zâwk rawh se." 
Luke22:27 Tu nge ropui zâwk, chaw kîltu nge a rawngbâwltu? Chaw kîltu chu a ni lo vem ni? Nimahsela, kei zawng in zîngah rawngbâwltu angin ka awm hi." 
Luke22:28 “Harsatna ka tawh chhûng zawng nangnin mi awmpui a. 
Luke22:29 Ka Pain ram mi ruatsak ang bawkin kei pawhin ram ka ruatsak a che u; tichuan, ka ramah chuan ka dawhkânah in eiin in bâr ang a," 
Luke22:30 lalṭhutthlênga ṭhuin Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih ro in rêlsak ang. 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon, ngai teh, Setanan buh thlei angin thlei a tum che u a ni; nimahsela, i rin a bo loh nân ka ṭawngṭaisak a che." 
Luke22:32 Tin, i lo hawi kîr leh hunah i unaute tinghet ang che,” a ti a." 
Luke22:33 Ani chuan, “Lalpa, i hnênah chuan tâng tûr leh thi tûr pawhin kal ve zêl ka inhuam asin,” a ti a." 
Luke22:34 Ani chuan, “Peter, ka hrilh a che, ‘Ani chu ka hre lo ve,’ tia vawi thum mi phat hma chu zâninah âr a khuang lo vang,” a ti a." 
Luke22:35 An hnênah, “Tangka ip te, iptê te, pheikhawk te keng lova ka tirh che u khân tlâkchham in nei rêng em?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Nei hauh lo,” an ti a." 
Luke22:36 Ani chuan, “Tûnah zawng tangka ip nei chuan keng sela, iptê pawh keng rawh se; khandaih nei lo chuan a puan hralh sela, lei rawh se." 
Luke22:37 Ka hrilh a che u, ‘Ani chu mi sual zîngah an chhiar tel ta,’ tih Lehkha Thu kha ka chunga thleng ngei tûr a ni. Ka chungthu an ziak kha a thleng kim dâwn ta,” a ti a." 
Luke22:38 Anni chuan, “Lalpa, en teh, hei khandaih pahnih chu a awm e,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “A tâwk e,” a ti a." 
Luke22:39 Tin, ani chu a chhuak a, a dân pângngaiin Oliv tlângah chuan a kal ta a; a zirtîrte pawh chuan an zui ve a." 
Luke22:40 A hmun a va thlen chuan an hnênah, “Thlêmnaa in luh loh nân ṭawngṭai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke22:41 Lung den phâk chin vêlah a va kal hrang a, a ṭhingṭhi a, a ṭawngṭai a." 
Luke22:42 “Ka Pa, rem i tih zâwng a nih chuan he no hi mi lâk sawnsak rawh; nimahsela, keima thu ni lovin, nangma thu ni zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
Luke22:43 Vân ata vântîrhkoh pakhat, a tiharh tûrin a hnênah a lo lang a." 
Luke22:44 A thlaphâng êm êm a, ṭhahnemngai lehzualin a ṭawngṭai a; a thlan chu thisen far lian tak angin a far a." 
Luke22:45 A ṭawngṭai zo chu zirtîrte hnênah a lo kal a, an lungngai tawngkhawng muthlu chu a rawn hmu a, an hnênah, “Engati nge in mutthlûk le?" 
Luke22:46 Tho ula, thlêmnaa in luh loh nân ṭawngṭai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Luke22:47 Tin, a la sawi lai mêkin mipui an lo thleng a, Sâwmpahnihte zînga tel Juda an tih khân hma a rawn hruai a, fawh tumin Isua a rawn pan a." 
Luke22:48 Nimahsela, Isuan a hnênah, “Juda, Mihring Fapa hi fâwpin em ni i mantîr dâwn?” a ti a." 
Luke22:49 A vêla mite chuan thil lo thleng tûr chu an hmuhin, “Lalpa, khandaih kan lek mai dâwn aw?” an ti a." 
Luke22:50 An zînga pakhat chuan Puithiam lalber bawih chu a sât a, a beng ding lam a hlawisak a." 
Luke22:51 Isua chuan a chhâng a, “Khaih khaih, a tâwk e,” a ti a. A beng chu a khawihsak a, a tidam ta a." 
Luke22:52 Puithiam lalte, Tempul pulis hotute leh upa lo kalte hnênah chuan Isuan, “Suamhmang man tûr ang ziazângin khandaih leh talhtum kengin in lo thawk a ni maw?" 
Luke22:53 Ni tin Tempulah in zînga ka awm ṭhin lai khân mi man si lo; nimahsela, tûn hi in chêt hun a ni, thim lal chêt hun chu,” a ti a." 
Luke22:54 An man ta a, Puithiam lalber inah an hruai lût a." 
Luke22:55 Petera chuan hnung feah a zui a. Tin, in hual chhûng kawtlaiah mei an chhêm a, an ṭhu khâwm a, Petera pawh chu an zîngah chuan a ṭhu ve a." 
Luke22:56 Mei ênga a ṭhu chu chhiahhlawh nula pakhat hian a han hmu a, a en vang vang a, “He pa hi a hnêna awm ve kha a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Luke22:57 Ani erawh chuan, “Hmeichhia, ani chu ka hre lo ve,” a ti a, a phat ta a." 
Luke22:58 A hnu lawkah mi dangin a rawn hmu ve a, “Nang pawh an zînga mi i nih hi,” a ti a. Petera chuan, “Mihring, ka ni awzâwng lo mai,” a ti a." 
Luke22:59 Darkâr khat vêl hnuah chuan mi dangin, “He pa hi a hnêna tel kha a nih ngei hi maw, Galili mi a ni alâwm,” a ti tlat a." 
Luke22:60 Petera chuan, “Mihring, i thu sawi chu ka hre hauh lo,” a ti a. A ṭawng lai mêk chuan âr a lo khuang nghâl a." 
Luke22:61 Lalpa chu a lo hawi a, Petera chu a en a. Petera chuan “Zâninah âr a khuan hmain vawi thum mi phat ang,” Lalpan a hnêna a tih kha a hre chhuak a." 
Luke22:62 Pâwnah a chhuak a, a ṭap ta zawih zawih a." 
Luke22:63 Isua chelhtute chuan nuihza siam nân an hmang a, an bêng sawk sawk a." 
Luke22:64 A mit an tuam a, “Tu nge bêng che, sawi teh,” te an ti a." 
Luke22:65 Ṭawng chhe pui puiin an hau va. 
Luke22:66 Tin, ni a lo chhuah chuan vântlâng upaho, puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute chu an ṭhu khâwm a; an Sanhedrin-ah chuan Isua chu an rawn hruai a. “Krista chu i nih leh nih loh min hrilh rawh,” an ti a." 
Luke22:67 Ani chuan, “Hrilh che u mah ila, in awih chuang lo vang;" 
Luke22:68 zâwt che u mah ila mi chhâng chuang lo vang. 
Luke22:69 Nimahsela, tûn aṭang chuan Mihring Fapa hi Pathian thiltihtheihna ding lamah a ṭhu tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Luke22:70 An zavai chuan, “Chu, nang hi Pathian Fapa i ni maw?” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Nangman, ‘i ni’ min ti alâwm le!” a ti a." 
Luke22:71 Anni chuan, “Hretu dang tu nge kan ngaih tawh ang? Keimahni ngeiin ama kamchhuak kan hre ta alâwm,” an ti a." 
Luke23:1 An za chuan an tho va, Pilata hnênah an hruai ta a." 
Luke23:2 “He mi hian kan chite hel tûrin a fuih a, Kaisara hnêna chhiah chawi a khap a, amah hi Lal, Krista chu niin a insawi tih kan hre chhuak a ni,” tiin an hêk a." 
Luke23:3 Pilata chuan a hnênah, “Juda-te lal i ni maw?” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Chu, i tih chu,” a ti a." 
Luke23:4 Pilata chuan puithiam lalte leh mipuite hnênah chuan, “He mi chungah hian thu pawi eng mah ka hmu lo ve,” a ti a." 
Luke23:5 Nimahsela, anni chuan, “Hel tûra mite fuihpawrhin Judai ram khaw tinah mi a zirtîr ṭhîn tih kan hria, Galili ramah a ṭan a, hetah pawh a lo thlen tâk hi,” tiin an bei lehzual sauh va." 
Luke23:6 Pilatan chu chu a han hriat chuan Galili mi a nih leh nih loh a zâwt a: 
Luke23:7 Heroda biala mi a ni tih a hriat chuan Heroda hnênah a tîr ta a; ani pawh chu Jerusalemah a lo awm lai tak a ni. 
Luke23:8 Herodan Isua a lo hmuhin a lâwm hle a, a chanchin a hriat fo avângin hmuh a châkna a rei hle tawh rêng a; a thil mak tih eng emaw tal hmuh pawh a beisei a." 
Luke23:9 Thu tam tak a zâwt a; nimahsela, a eng mah a chhâng lo." 
Luke23:10 Puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute pawh chu an ding ve a, an hêk chiam a." 
Luke23:11 Tin, Heroda pawh chuan, a sipaite nên, Isua chu an hmusit hle a, nuihza siam nân an hmang a, puan ropui tak an sintîr a, Pilata hnênah a tîr kîr leh ta a." 
Luke23:12 Pilata leh Heroda chu tûn hma chuan an intai hle ṭhîn a, chumi ni aṭang chuan an inngeih leh ta a." 
Luke23:13 Pilata chuan puithiam lalte leh Dân zirtîrtute leh vântlângho chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah," 
Luke23:14 “He mi hi mite hel tûra fuihah in rawn puh a, in hma ngeiah ka chhuahchhâl a, in hêkna thu-ah thil pawi eng mah a khawih ka hmu lo." 
Luke23:15 Heroda pawhin a hmu hek lo, kan hnênah a rawn tîr kîr leh ta mai a nih hi. Ngai rawh u, thihna khawp meuh eng mah tih a nei lo va;" 
Luke23:16 tichuan, ka han zilh hlek ang a, ka chhuah mai dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Nimahsela, an za chuan an au rual a, “He mi hi chu tiboral la, Baraba kha min chhuahsak rawh,” an ti a." 
Luke23:19 Chu mi chu khawpuia helna avâng leh tual thah avânga tân ina tâng a ni. 
Luke23:20 Pilata chuan Isua chu chhuah a duh a, an hnênah thu a sawi leh a;" 
Luke23:21 mahse, “Khêngbet rawh, krawsah khêngbet rawh,” tiin anniho chu an au ta tuar tuar a." 
Luke23:22 Tin, ani chuan a vawi thumnaah, “Engah maw? Eng nge a tihsual? Thihna khawp meuh eng mah pawi a khawih ka hmu lo; ka zilh ang a, ka chhuah mai dâwn,” a ti a." 
Luke23:23 Anni chu ring takin an au va, krawsa khêngbet tûrin an ngên lui tlat a, an aw chuan a vau dai ta a." 
Luke23:24 Pilata chuan an ngên ang chuan thu a titlu ta a. 
Luke23:25 Helna leh tual thah avânga tân ina mi tâng an dîl kha a chhuah a, Isua erawh chu an duh duha tih tûrin a pe ta a." 
Luke23:26 Tichuan, an hruai ta a; Simona, Kurini khaw mi, thingtlâng lam aṭanga lo kal chu an man a, Isua hnungah kraws chu an puttîr a." 
Luke23:27 Tin, vântlâng mipui nasa tak leh lungchhiaa ṭap ṭap hmeichhiaten an zui dûl dûl a." 
Luke23:28 Isua chuan an lam a hawi a, “Jerusalem nute u, mi ṭah suh u, nangmahni leh in fate tân ṭap zâwk rawh u." 
Luke23:29 ‘Hmeichhe ching te, nau pai ngai lo pum te, nau hnêk loh hnute te chu a nihlawh e,’ an tih hun a lo thleng dâwn." 
Luke23:30 Chûng hunah chuan tlâng hnênah, ‘min delh rawh,’ an ti ang a, mual hnênah pawh, ‘min khuh rawh,’ an la ti ang." 
Luke23:31 Thinghring mah hetiang hian an ti a, a ro chu engtin tak la ti ang maw,” a ti a." 
Luke23:32 Tihhlum tûr mi dang, mi sual pahnih a rual chuan an hruai ve a." 
Luke23:33 Luruh an tih hmun chu an va thleng a; mi sualte pawh chu a ding lamah pakhat, a vei lamah pakhat an khêngbet bawk a." 
Luke23:34 Isuan, “Ka Pa, anniho hi ngaidam rawh, an thiltih hi an hre lo a ni e,” a ti a. A silhfênte chu ṭhumvâwrin an insem a." 
Luke23:35 Vântlângho chuan dingin an thlîr a. Hotute pawh chuan, “Mi dang mah a tidam ṭhîn a, Pathian mi ruata, Krista chu a nih meuh chuan amah pawh intidam ang hmiang,” tiin an ṭawng el a." 
Luke23:36 Sipaihote pawh chuan an nuihzat a, a hnênah an kal a, uain thûr an pe a," 
Luke23:37 “Juda-te lal i nih zet chuan intidam ta che,” an ti a." 
Luke23:38 A chungah chuan, “He mi hi Juda-te lal a ni,” tih ziak an târ a." 
Luke23:39 An khenbeh ve mi sual pakhat zâwk pawh chuan a ân khum a, “Krista chu i ni lo vem ni? Intidam la, keini pawh min tidam ve ta che,” a ti a." 
Luke23:40 Nimahsela, pakhat chuan a lo khak a, a zilhhau va, “Pathian meuh pawh i hlau na nge, thuhmun renga an hrem che hi?" 
Luke23:41 Keini pahnih hi zawng hrem âwm rêng kan ni, kan thiltih man kan hmu a nih hi; he mi hi zawngin eng mah a tisual si lo,” a ti a." 
Luke23:42 Tichuan, “Isu, i ram i thlen hunah mi hre reng ang che,” a ti a." 
Luke23:43 Ani chuan a hnênah, “Thu dik ka hrilh a che, ka hnênah vawiinah hian paradis-ah i awm ve ang,” a ti a." 
Luke23:44 Chhûn dâr sâwm leh pahnih vêl aṭanga tlai dâr thum thlengin khawvêl a lo thim ta vek a; 
Luke23:45 ni a êng ta lo va, Tempul chhûng puanzâr chu a laiah a thlêr thla a." 
Luke23:46 Isua chu ring takin a au va, “Ka pa, ka thlarau i kutah ka kawltîr a che,” a ti a. Chu chu a sawi zawh chuan a hnuk a chat ta a." 
Luke23:47 Sipai za hotu chuan thil lo thleng chu a hmuhin Pathian a fak a, “He mi hi mitakzet a ni phawt mai,” a ti a." 
Luke23:48 Chûng thil en tûra mipui lo kal khâwmte chuan thil lo thleng chu an hmuhin an lungngai a, an âwmte chûm chûmin an haw leh ta a." 
Luke23:49 A hmêlhriathote erawh chu hla feah an ding reng a, Galili ram aṭanga amah zuitu hmeichhiate nên khân chûng thil chu an thlîr ho va." 
Luke23:50 Tin, mi pakhat, a hming Josefa, rorêltu zînga tel, mi dik leh ṭha tak a awm a." 
Luke23:51 Ani chuan an rorêl leh an thil tih chu a remtihpui ve lo rêng a. Juda-te khua Arimathai-a awm a ni, Pathian ram beisei ve ṭhîntu a ni bawk a." 
Luke23:52 Chu mi chu Pilata hnênah a kal a, Isua ruang a va dîl a." 
Luke23:53 Tin, a la thla a, puan zai sînin a tuam a, tu mah la zalh ngai lohna lung ker thlânah a zalh ta a." 
Luke23:54 Chumi ni chu Juda-te Inrinni a ni a; mahse, Juda-te sabat ni a inṭan lek lek tawh a." 
Luke23:55 Galili ram aṭanga rawn zuitu hmeichheho pawh chuan an zui ve zêl a, thlân leh a ruang an zalh dân chu an en a." 
Luke23:56 Tin, an haw a, rimtuite leh hriak rimtuite an siam a." 
Luke24:1 Thupêk angin sabat ni chuan an châwl a, Pathianni chuan vârṭianah rimtui an siamte chu kengin thlânah chuan an va kal a." 
Luke24:2 Thlân kawngka ata lung chu lum sawnin an hmu a," 
Luke24:3 an han luh chuan Lalpa Isua ruang rêng an hmu ta lo va. 
Luke24:4 Chutia hrilhhai taka an awm lai chuan, mi pahnih puan vâr taka inthuam an kiangah an lo ding a." 
Luke24:5 An hlau va, lei bihin an kun tlat a. Chu mite chuan an hnênah, “Engati nge mitthi zîngah mi nung in zawn?" 
Luke24:6 Hetah a awm tawh lo, kaihthawh a ni ta. Galili rama a awm laia in hnêna a sawi kha hre reng rawh u;" 
Luke24:7 ‘Mihring Fapa hi mi sualte kuta mantîr a ni ang a, krawsah an khêngbet ang a, ni thum ni-ah a tho leh tûr a ni,’ a tih ṭhin kha?” an ti a." 
Luke24:8 A thu sawi kha an hre chhuak leh ta a. 
Luke24:9 Thlân ata chu an hâwng a, Sâwmpakhatte leh mi dangte chu chûng thu chu an hrilh a." 
Luke24:10 Chûng thu tirhkohte rawn hrilhtute chu Magdala mi Mari te, Joani te, Jakoba nu Mari te leh an zînga kal ve hmeichhe ṭhenkhatte an ni." 
Luke24:11 Nimahsela, chûng thu chu thu tak takah an lo ngaihsak lo va, an awihsak hek lo." 
Luke24:12 Petera erawh chu a tho va, thlânah chuan a va tlân a, kûna a han bih chuan puan zai sîn awmte chauh chu a hmu a; tichuan, thil awm dân chu mak ti tak chungin in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Luke24:13 Ngai teh, chumi ni tak chuan an zînga pahnih chu khaw pakhat Emmau an tihah chuan kal tûrin an chhuak a. Chu khua chu Jerusalem aṭanga km. sâwm leh pakhat vêla hla a ni." 
Luke24:14 Thil lo thleng zawng zawng chu an sawi dûn a. 
Luke24:15 Chutia an titia thu an sawi dun lai chuan amah Isua ngei chuan a rawn hnaih a, an kal tlâng ta a;" 
Luke24:16 nimahsela, a hmêl an hriat theih loh nân an mit chu tihvaih a ni a." 
Luke24:17 An hnênah chuan, “Kal paha in sawi kha eng thu nge?” a ti a. Ngui takin an ding ta a." 
Luke24:18 A hming Kleopa zâwk chuan a chhâng a, “Nangmah chauh hi i ni âwm e, Jerusalem tlawh si tûnlai chanchin hre lo chu!” a ti a." 
Luke24:19 Ani chuan, “Eng chanchin maw?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “E le, Nazaret Isua chanchin hi; Pathian leh mi zawng zawng mit hmuha thu-ah leh thil tiha zâwlnei thiltithei tak chanchin kha." 
Luke24:20 Ani chu kan puithiam lalte leh kan rorêltuten tihhlum tûrin an pêka, krawsah an khenbeh tâk thu kha." 
Luke24:21 Keini lahin Israel-te tlantu tûra kha a nih kan lo beisei vei nên. Chu mai pawh a ni lo, vawiin hi a ni thumna a ni a;" 
Luke24:22 kan pâwla hmeichhe ṭhenkhat pawh tûkin zîngah khân thlânah an va kal a, a ruang an va hmu si lo;" 
Luke24:23 ‘Vântîrhkoh inlâr kan hmu a, chu mite chuan, ‘a nung leh ta an ti,’ te an rawn ti a, min timangang nasa mai a." 
Luke24:24 Kan awmpui zînga ṭhenkhat pawh thlânah an va kal ve a, hmeichheho sawi ang chiah khân thil an va hmu a; mahse, amah chu an hmu bîk si lo,” an ti a." 
Luke24:25 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Mi â te u, zâwlneite thu sawi tinrêng awih kawnga ngawngte u!" 
Luke24:26 Kristan chûng thil chu tuarin a ropuinaah a lût tûr a ni rêng lâwm ni?” a ti a. 
Luke24:27 Tichuan, Mosia aṭanga ṭanin zâwlnei zawng zawng thu chhuiin, Lehkha Thua a chanchin ziakna apiang anmahni a hrilh fiah a." 
Luke24:28 An kalna tûr khua chu an thleng dâwn ta a; ani erawh chu kal zêl tûr ni âwm takin a lang a. 
Luke24:29 Kâin an chelh a, “Kan hnênah riak ve mai rawh, khua a tlai ta a, ni pawh a tlâk dâwn tawh hi,” an ti a. Tichuan, an hnêna riak tûrin a lût ta a." 
Luke24:30 Zanriah an han kîl ho va, chhang a la a, malsâwmna a sawi a, a phel a, an hnênah a pe a." 
Luke24:31 An mit chu a lo vâr a, a hmêl an hre ta a; ani erawh chu a ral ta mai a." 
Luke24:32 Anni chuan, “Kalkawnga min biak laia Lehkha Thute min hrilh fiah lai khân kan thinlung a harh huai rêng lâwm ni kha?” an inti a." 
Luke24:33 Tichuan, an tho va, Jerusalem-ah an kîr leh ta nghâl a. Sâwmpakhatte leh an ṭhiante awm khâwm chu an han hmu a." 
Luke24:34 “Lalpa chu a lo tho leh ngei alâwm, Simona hnênah pawh a inlâr asin,” an lo ti a." 
Luke24:35 Anni pawh chuan kalkawnga thil lo thleng leh chhang a phela, amah an lo hriat tâk dânte chu an sawi a." 
Luke24:36 Chûng thu chu an sawi laiin Isua ngei chu an zîngah a lo ding a, an hnênah, “In chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Luke24:37 Râpthlâk an ti a, an hlau ta êm êm a, thlarau hmuah an inruat a." 
Luke24:38 Ani chuan, “Engati nge chuti êm êma in hlauh? Engtizia nge in inngaihtuah buai tâk?" 
Luke24:39 Ka kut te, ka kephah te hi en ta che u, keimah ngei kha ka ni alâwm. Mi dek ula, en rawh u; kei mi hmuh ang hian thlarauvin tisa leh ruh a nei hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Luke24:40 A sawi zawhin a kut te, a kephah te a entîr a," 
Luke24:41 an lâwm lutuk chuan an la awih ta lo cheu va; mak an tih êm avângin an hnênah, “hetah englo ei tûr in nei êm?” a ti a." 
Luke24:42 Sangha hem hmin hrang khat an pe a. 
Luke24:43 A la a, an hmaah chuan a ei ta a." 
Luke24:44 An hnênah chuan, “In zînga ka awm lai khân hêng thu hi ka hrilh ṭhin che u kha, Mosia Dânah te, zâwlnei Lehkhabu-ah te, Fakna Hla bu-ah te ka chanchin an ziak apiang chu a thleng tûr a ni, tiin,” a ti a." 
Luke24:45 Tichuan, Lehkha Thu hrethiam thei tûrin an rilru a hawnsak ta a." 
Luke24:46 An hnênah, “Krista chuan a tuar ngei tûr a ni, ni thum ni-ah mitthi zîng ata a tho leh bawk tûr a ni;" 
Luke24:47 ‘simna leh sual ngaihdamna thu chu Jerusalem-a ṭanin hnam tin hnênah ama hminga hril tûr a ni tih ziak a nih kha. 
Luke24:48 Hêng thil hi a hretute in ni e. 
Luke24:49 Ngai teh u, Pa thil tiam chu in chungah ka rawn tîr dâwn e." 
Luke24:50 Chung lam aṭanga thiltihtheihnaa thuam in nih hma loh chuan khawpuiah hian awm reng ang che u,” a ti a." 
Luke24:51 Tin, Bethani dai kiang thlengin a hruai chhuak a, a bân a phar a, anni chu mal a sâwm a." 
Luke24:52 Chutia mal a sâwm lai chuan anni chu a ṭhen a, vâna hruai chhoh a ni ta a." 
Luke24:53 Chibai an bûk a, hlim takin Jerusalem-ah an kîr leh ta a; tin, Tempulah chuan Pathian fakin an kal fo ṭhîn a." 
John1:1 A tîrin Thu a awm, Thu chu Pathian hnênah a awm a, Thu chu Pathian a ni." 
John1:2 Ani chu a tîr aṭangin Pathian hnênah a awm. 
John1:3 Engkim amah hmanga siam a ni a; thil siam rêng rêng amah tel lo chuan eng mah siam a awm lo. 
John1:4 Amahah chuan nunna a awm a, chu nunna chu mihringte tâna êng a ni." 
John1:5 êng chu thim zîngah a lo êng a, thimin chu chu a ngam lo." 
John1:6 Pathianin mi pakhat a rawn tîr a, a hming chu Johana a ni." 
John1:7 Ani chu êng thu chu hriattîr tûra lo kal a ni, mi zawng zawngin a thuchah chu an hriata an rinna tûrin." 
John1:8 Ani chu êng chu a ni lo, êng thu chu hriattîr tûra lo kal a ni." 
John1:9 Chu êng chu êng tak tak, khawvêla lo kala, mi tin rawn êntu chu a ni." 
John1:10 Khawvêlah a awm a, amah hmanga khawvêl chu siam a ni a, khawvêlin amah chu a hre si lo." 
John1:11 Ama ram ngeiah a lo kal a, ama miten an lo lâwm si lo." 
John1:12 Mi ṭhenkhat erawh chuan an lo lâwm a, amah an ring a, an hnênah Pathian fate nih theihna a pe a." 
John1:13 Chûng mite chu thisen hrin an ni lo va, tisa duhzâwnga hrin pawh an ni lo va, mipa duhzâwnga hrin an ni hek lo, Pathian hrin an ni zâwk e." 
John1:14 Tin, thu chu tisaah a lo chang a, kan zîngah a lo awm ta a. A ropuizia kan hmu, Pa Fa mal neih chhun ropuina chu, khawngaih leh thutakin a khat." 
John1:15 Johanan a chanchin a hril a, “ ‘Ka hnunga lo kal tûr chu keimah aiin a ropui zâwk,’ ka tih kha he mi hi a ni, ka awm hmaa awm tawh a ni si a,” tiin a au va." 
John1:16 A khawngaihna famkim aṭangin khawngaihna kan dawng ṭheuh, khawngaihna hlîr khawngaihna hlîr." 
John1:17 Dân chu Mosia hmanga pêk a ni a, khawngaihna leh thutak erawh chu Isua Krista zâra lo thleng a ni." 
John1:18 Tu man Pathian an hmu ngai lo va, Pa Fa neih chhun, a ângchhûnga awm chuan a chanchin a hriattîr ta a ni." 
John1:19 Jerusalem khuaa Juda-ten, “Tu nge i nih?” tia zâwt tûra Puithiamte leh Levia chite an tirh laia Johana thu lo sawi chu hei hi a ni." 
John1:20 Zêp lovin, “Kei zawng Krista chu ka ni lo,” tiin chiang takin a inpuang a." 
John1:21 “A nih leh tu nge i nih le? Elija i ni em?” tiin an zâwt leh a. Ani chuan, “Ka ni lo,” a ti a. “Zâwlnei kha i ni em?” an ti a; “Ni lo,” tiin a chhâng leh a." 
John1:22 Anni chuan, “Min tîrtute kan chhân theih nân tu nge i nih min hrilh teh, i chanchin eng nge sawi tûr i neih?” an ti a." 
John1:23 Ani chuan, “ ‘Lalpa kawng tingîl rawh u,’ tia, Thlalêra au aw, zâwlnei Isaian a sawi kha ka ni e,” a ti a." 
John1:24 Chûng mite chu Farisai-te tirh an ni. 
John1:25 Anni chuan, “Krista tal, Elija tal, Zâwlnei tal chu i nih si loh chuan, engati nge i baptis si le?” tiin an zâwt leh a." 
John1:26 Johana chuan, “Kei chuan tuiin ka baptis a, in zîngah mi pakhat, in hriat loh a ding a ni." 
John1:27 Ani chu ka hnungah a lo kal a; mahse, a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlâk pawh ka ni lo ve,” a ti a." 
John1:28 Chûng thil chu Johanan a baptis-na hmun Jordan lui râla Bethani khuaah an ti a ni. 
John1:29 A tûkah chuan Johanan Isua amah a rawn panin a hmu a, “En teh u, Pathian Berâmno, khawvêl sual la botu saw." 
John1:30 Saw mi saw a ni, ‘Ka hnunga lo kal tûr, keimah aia ropui zâwk, ka awm hmaa awm tawh,’ ka tiha kha." 
John1:31 Amah chu ka lo hre si lo; nimahsela, Israel-ten amah an hriat theih nân kei hi tuia baptisma chantîrin ka lo kal a ni,” a ti a." 
John1:32 Hei hi Johanan thu a hriattîr dân chu a ni, “Thlarau chu ṭhuro angin vân aṭanga lo chhuka, a chunga fu rengin ka hmu a." 
John1:33 Amah chu ka la hre lo va; nimahsela, tuia baptis tûra mi tîrtu khân ka hnênah, ‘Mi, a chunga Thlarau lo chhuka, fu ta reng i hmuh chu Thlarau Thianghlima baptistu tûr chu a ni ang,’ a ti a." 
John1:34 Chu chu ka hmu ta a, he mi hi Pathian Fapa a ni tih ka hriattîr a che u,” tiin." 
John1:35 A tûk lehah chuan Johana chu a zirtîrte pahnih nên an ding a. 
John1:36 Isua a vei a vei chu an thlîr a, “En teh u, Pathian Berâmno saw!” a ti a." 
John1:37 A zirtîr pahnihten a sawi chu an hriat chuan, Isua chu an zui ta a." 
John1:38 Isua chu a han lehhawi a, amah an rawn zui chu a hmu a, an hnênah, “Eng nge in zawn?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Rabi, (chu chu zirtîrtu tihna a ni) khaw nge i awm?” an ti a." 
John1:39 “Rawn en ta che u,” a ti a. Tichuan, a hnênah an kal a, a awmna chu an va hmu a, chumi ni chuan a hnênah an awm ta a. Tlai dâr li vêl a ni." 
John1:40 Johana thu sawi hriaa Isua zuitu pahnihte chu, pakhat chu Andria, Simon Petera unau a ni a." 
John1:41 Ani chuan a hmasa berin a unau Simona a va zawng hmu a, “Mesia, (chu chu Krista tihna a ni) kan hmu ta,” a va ti a." 
John1:42 Tin, Isua hnênah a rawn hruai a. Isuan ani chu a lo en a, “Johana fapa, Simona i ni, Kifa tih i ni ang,” a ti a. Kifa chu Petera tih nên thuhmun a ni a, lungpui tihna a ni." 
John1:43 A tûkah chuan Isuan Galili rama kal a tum a, Filipa a hmu a, a hnênah, “Mi zui rawh,” a ti a." 
John1:44 Filipa chu Andria leh Petera awmna khua, Bethsaida khuaa mi a ni." 
John1:45 Filipa chuan Nathanaela a hmu a, a hnênah, “A chanchin Dân lehkhabua Mosian a ziak, zâwlneite pawhin an ziak kha, amah chu kan hmu ta, Nazaret Isua, Josefa fapa chu,” a ti a." 
John1:46 Nathanaela chuan, “Nazaret khua aṭangin thil ṭha a chhuak thei em ni?” a ti a.Filipa chuan, “Rawn en ta che,” a ti a." 
John1:47 Isuan Nathanaela lo kal a hmuh chuan a chanchin a lo sawi a, “En teh u, Israel mi tak, mi bum tumna rêng nei lo saw,” a ti a." 
John1:48 Nathanaela chuan, “Engtin nge mi hriat le?” a ti a. Isuan, “Filipan a koh hma che-a, theipui bula i awm lai khân ka hmu che asin,” a ti a." 
John1:49 Nathanaela chuan, “Rabi, Pathian Fapa i ni. Israel-te lalber i nih hi,” tiin a chhâng a." 
John1:50 Isuan, “Theipui bulah ka hmu che asin,’ i hnêna ka tih avângin i ring a ni maw? Hêng aia thil ropui zâwk hi i la hmu ang,” a ti a." 
John1:51 Tin, an hnênah, ‘Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, vân inhawnga, Pathian vântirhkohte Mihring Fapa chunga chhuk leh chho in la hmu ang,” a ti a." 
John2:1 Ni thum ni chuan Galili rama Kana khuaah inneihna a awm a, chutah chuan Isua nu a awm ve a." 
John2:2 Isua leh a zirtîrte pawh inneihnaah chuan an sâwm a. 
John2:3 Uainin a daih ta lo va, Isua nu chuan a hnênah, “Uain an tlachham ta e,” a ti a." 
John2:4 Isuan a chhâng a, “Ka nu, engah nge i lo inrawlh ve duh? Ka hun a la thleng lo a ni e” a ti a." 
John2:5 Isua nu chuan rawngbâwltute hnênah, “In hnêna a sawi apiang chu ti zêl rawh u,” a ti a." 
John2:6 Juda-ten an sakhaw dân, sil fai dân an tih chu an nei a, chumi dân ang chuan lung tuibêl paruk, ṭîn nga emaw, ṭîn sarih dawng vêl emaw ṭheuh chutah chuan an hûng a." 
John2:7 Isuan an hnênah, “Tuibêlahte hian tui chhûng rawh u,” a ti a. A vaiin khat takin an chhûng ta a." 
John2:8 Tichuan, an hnênah, “Thâl ula, fatu hotu hnênah kalpui rawh u,” a ti a. An kalpui ta a." 
John2:9 Fatu hotu chuan tui uaina chang ta chu a lo tem a, khawia mi nge tih a hre lo va; tui thâl chhuaktute erawh chuan an hria a. Fatu hotu chuan moneitu chu a ko va," 
John2:10 a hnênah, “Mi tinin uain ṭha an sem hmasa phawt a, tam deuh an in hnuin a narân deuh an sem ṭhîn a ni a; nang zawngin tûn thlengin uain ṭha i la vawn hi!” a ti a." 
John2:11 Isuan he chhinchhiahna thil mak a tih hi Galili rama Kana khuaah a ti a, a ropuizia a lantîr a, zirtîrte chuan amah an ring ta a." 
John2:12 Chumi hnu chuan, Isua chu a nu nên, a unaute leh a zirtîrte nên Kapernaum khuaah an chhuk a, chutah chuan ni tlêm tê chauh an châm a." 
John2:13 Juda-te Kalhlên Kût hun a thleng lek lek tawh a, Isua chu Jerusalem-ah a chho ta a." 
John2:14 Tempulah chuan bâwng te, berâm te, pârva te an lo zuar chu a hmu a, tangka thlengtute an dawhkân bula ṭhu a hmu bawk a." 
John2:15 Vuakna hruihrual ang a siam a, an berâm nên, bâwng nên, ran dang zawng zawng nên chuan a hnawt chhuak ta vek a; tangka thlengtute dawhkânte chu a nam thlûksak a, an pawisate chu a tihdarhsak a." 
John2:16 Ṭhuro zuartute hnênah chuan, “Hêng hi la chhuak rawh u, ka Pa in sumdâwnna hmunah siam suh u,” a ti a." 
John2:17 A zirtîrte chuan, ‘I in tâna ka ṭhahnemngaihna chuan mi ei zo vang,’ tih ziak a nih thu an hre chhuak leh ta a." 
John2:18 Juda-te chuan an rawn chhuahchhâl a, “Hêng thil hi tihtheihna i nei tih entîr nân eng chhinchhiahna thil mak nge min entîr dâwn?” an ti a." 
John2:19 Isuan, “He Tempul hi ṭhiat ula, ni thum chhûngin ka tungding leh ang,” a ti a." 
John2:20 Juda-te chuan, “Ni thum chhûngin i tungding leh ang maw? He in sak nân hian kum sawmli leh kum ruk a duh asin,” an ti a." 
John2:21 Nimahsela, Isuan Tempul a sawi hi ama taksa thu a sawi a ni." 
John2:22 Mitthi zîng ata kaihthawha a awm khân chu thu chu a sawi tih zirtîrten an hre chhuak leh a; Lehkha Thu leh Isua thu sawi chu an ring ta a. 
John2:23 Jerusalem-a Kalhlên Kût Isuan a hman laia chhinchhiahna thil mak a tihte hmutu tam tak chuan amah an ring ta a. 
John2:24 Nimahsela, Isuan anni chu a ring ve lo, mi zawng zawng a hriat chian êm avângin." 
John2:25 Mi chanchin tu man an hrilh a ngai lo, an thinlung chhûnga awm chu a hre si a." 
John3:1 Mi pakhat, a hming Nikodema a awm a, Juda-te hotu, Farisai pâwla mi a ni." 
John3:2 Zân khat chu Isua hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Rabi, Pathian tirh zirtîrtu i ni tih kan hria, Pathian an hnêna a awm loh chuan tu man chhinchhiahna thil mak i tih ang hi an ti thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
John3:3 Isuan a chhâng a, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh ang che, mi tu mah, piangthar lo chuan Pathian ram an hmu thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
John3:4 Nikodema chuan, “Putar pui tawh engtin nge a pianthar theih ang? A nu pumah lûtin a piang nawn leh thei awm si lo va?” a ti a." 
John3:5 Isuan, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh ang che, tuiah leh thlarauva piang lo chu tu mah Pathian ramah an lût thei lo vang." 
John3:6 Tisa chuan tisa a hring a, thlarau chuan thlarau a hring a ni." 
John3:7 ‘I piangthar tûr a ni,’ ka tih hi mak ti suh." 
John3:8 Thli khawiah pawh a duh duhin a tleh ṭhîn, a ri i hria e; nimahsela, khawi aṭanga lo kal nge tih leh, khawiah nge a kal dâwn tih i hre si lo. Tu pawh Thlarauva piang chu chutiang chu an ni,” a ti a." 
John3:9 Nikodeman, “Chu chu engtin nge a nih theih?” a ti a." 
John3:10 Isuan, “Nang, Israel-te zirtîrtu i ni a, chu chu i hre lo maw?" 
John3:11 Thu dik tak ka hrilh ang che; kan hriat chu kan sawi a, kan hmuh chu kan hriattîr ṭhîn, tu man kan thu hriattîr in pawm duh chuang si lo." 
John3:12 Khawvêl thil ka hrilh che u mah in awih si lo va, vân thil lek phei chu hrilh che u ila engtin nge in awih ang?" 
John3:13 Tu mah vânah an lâwn ngai lo, Mihring Fapa, vân aṭanga lo chhuka chauh lo hi chu,” a ti a." 
John3:14 Mosian thlalêra rûl a khai kân ang khân Mihring Fapa hi khai kânin a awm bawk tûr a ni," 
John3:15 amah ring apiangin chatuan nun an neih nân. 
John3:16 Pathianin khawvêl a hmangaih êm êm a; tichuan, a Fapa mal neih chhun a pe a, amah ring tawh phawt chu an boral lohva, chatuan nun an neih zâwk nân." 
John3:17 Pathian chuan khawvêl thiam loh chantîr tûrin a Fapa khawvêlah a tîr si lo, amah azâra khawvêl chhandama an awm theih nân a tîr a ni zâwk." 
John3:18 Tu pawh Pathian Fapa ring chu thiam lohvin an awm lo va, tu pawh ring lo chu thiam lohvin an awm tawh reng a ni; Pathian Fapa mal chu an rin loh avângin." 
John3:19 Thiam loh an chan dân chu hetiang hi a ni: êng chu khawvêlah a lo kal a; nimahsela, miten êng ai chuan thim an duh zâwk, thil sual an tih avângin." 
John3:20 Thil sual ti apiangin êng an haw ṭhîn a, êngah pawh an lo kal lo, an thiltihte a lan loh nân." 
John3:21 Thil dik ti apiang êngah an lo kal ṭhîn, an thiltihte chu Pathian thu zâwma ti an nih a lan nân." 
John3:22 Chumi hnu chuan Isua leh a zirtîrte chu Judai ramah an kal a. Chutah chuan eng emaw chen a châm a, baptisma a chantîr a." 
John3:23 Johana pawhin Salim bula Ainon hmunah a baptis a, chutah chuan tui a tam avângin. Mi an lo kal ṭhîn a, a lo baptis zêl a." 
John3:24 Johana chu tân ina khung a la ni si lo va. 
John3:25 Johana zirtîr ṭhenkhatte leh Juda pakhat sil fai thu-ah an lo inhnial ta a. 
John3:26 Johana hnênah an kal a, “Zirtîrtu, Jordan râla i hnêna awm, a chanchin i sawi khân tûnah hian a baptis ve a, mipuiin an pan ruih ruih mai,” an ti a." 
John3:27 Johanan a chhâng a, “Pathianin a pêk loh chuan tu man eng mah an dawng thei lo." 
John3:28 ‘Kei chu Krista ka ni lo va, a hmaa kal tûra tirh ka ni,’ ka tih kha nangmahni ngei ka thuhretute in ni alâwm." 
John3:29 Mo pasal chu moneitu chu a ni, mo neitu ṭhian, a thu lo ngaichâng rengtu chuan moneitu aw a hriatin a hlim ṭhîn. Chutiang chuan kei pawh ka lâwm a kim ta a ni." 
John3:30 Ani chu ropui tial tial tûr a ni a, kei erawh chu tê tial tial tûr ka ni,” a ti a." 
John3:31 Chung lam aṭanga lo chhuka chu mi zawng zawng aia ropui a ni. Lei aṭanga lo chhuaka chu lei mi a ni a, lei thil a sawi ṭhîn; vân aṭanga lo chhuk chu engkim chunga mi a ni. Vân aṭanga lo chhuk chuan," 
John3:32 thil a hmuh leh a hriatte chu a sawi a; nimahsela, tu man a thuhriattîr chu an pawm si lo." 
John3:33 Tu pawh a thu hriattîr pawm chuan Pathian chu a dik tih an tilang chiang ṭhîn a ni. 
John3:34 Pathian tirha chuan Pathian thu a sawi ṭhîn a, Pathianin Thlarau chu teh kherin a pe si lo va." 
John3:35 Pain Fapa a hmangaih a, a kutah engkim a dah tawh." 
John3:36 Tu pawh Fapa ring chuan chatuan nun an nei tawh; Fapa thu awih lo chuan nun an nei lo vang a, an chungah Pathian thinur chu a awm reng zâwk a ni." 
John4:1 Farisai-ten Johana aiin Isuan zirtîr tam zâwk a siam a, a baptis tih an hria tih Isuan a hriat chuan," 
John4:2 Isua tak chuan a baptis lo va, a zirtîrten an baptis zâwk a ni." 
John4:3 Judai ram a chhuahsan a, Galili ramah a kîr leh ta a." 
John4:4 Samari ram a kal tlang a ngai a. 
John4:5 Samari rama khaw pakhat, Sukar an tih chu a va thleng a, chu chu Jakoban a fapa Josefa ram a pêk kianga awm a ni." 
John4:6 Jakoba tuichhunchhuah pawh chutah chuan a awm a. Isua chu a kal hah êm avângin tuichhunchhuah sîrah chuan a ṭhu chawt a. Chhûn lai tak a ni. 
John4:7 Samari hmeichhia tui chawi tûrin a lo kal a. Isua chuan, “In tûr mi pe rawh,” a lo ti a." 
John4:8 A zirtîrte chu ei tûr leiin khuaah an kal tawh a ni. 
John4:9 Hmeichhia chuan, “Nang Juda mi i ni a, kei Samari hmeichhia ka ni a, engtiziaa in tûr mi dîl nge maw i nih le?” a ti a (Juda-te leh Samari miten eng mah an inhman ṭâwm ngai lo va)." 
John4:10 Isuan a chhâng a, “Pathian thilpêk leh i hnêna, ‘In tûr mi pe rawh,’ titu hi hria ni la chuan, a hnênah i dîl zâwk ang a, ani chuan tui nung a pe tûr che a ni,” a ti a." 
John4:11 Hmeichhia chuan, “Ka pu, khai chhuahna tûr eng mah i nei si lo va, tuichhunchhuah a thûk vei nên, khawi ata nge tui nung chu i neih?" 
John4:12 Kan pu Jakoba aiin i ropui zâwk em ni? Ani chuan he tuichhunchhuah hi min pe a, amah leh a fate leh a ran rualte pawhin heta mi hi an in ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
John4:13 Isuan, “Tu pawh he tui in apiang an tuihâl leh ang;" 
John4:14 tu pawh an hnêna ka pêk tûr tui in erawh chu an tuihâl leh tawh lo vang. An hnêna ka pêk tûr chu, an kawchhûngah tuihnaah a lo chang ang a, chatuan thlengin a kang lo vang,” a ti a." 
John4:15 Hmeichhia chuan, “Ka pu, chu tui chu mi pe rawh, ka tuihâl tawh loh nân leh hêng thleng thlenga tui chawi tûra ka lo kal tawh loh nân,” a ti a." 
John4:16 Isuan, “I pasal va ko la, hetah lo kîr leh ang che,” a ti a." 
John4:17 Hmeichhia chuan, “Pasal ka nei hlei nêm,” a ti a. Isuan, “ ‘Pasal ka nei hlei nêm,’ i tih hi i ti dik e;" 
John4:18 Pasal panga i nei tawh a, tûna i neih lai hi i pasal a ni lo rêng a ni. I sawi chu a dik e,” a ti a." 
John4:19 Hmeichhia chuan, “Ka pu, zâwlnei i ni tih ka hre ta." 
John4:20 Min thlahtute chuan he tlângah hian Pathian chibai an bûk ṭhîn a, nangni erawh chuan, ‘Miten Jerusalem-ah ngei Pathian chibai an bûk tûr a ni,’ in ti a,” a ti a." 
John4:21 Isuan, “Hmeichhia, ka thu awih rawh, he tlângah kher lo pawh, Jerusalem-ah kher lo pawh Pa chibai in bûk hun a thleng dâwn." 
John4:22 Nangnin in hriat loh chibai in bûk ṭhîn, keinin kan hriat chu chibai kan bûk ṭhîn; chhandamna chu Juda-te hnên ata lo chhuak a ni si a." 
John4:23 Nimahsela, a hun a thleng dâwn, tûnah pawh a thleng tawh mêk, Pathian chibai bûktu tak takten thlarau leh thutakin Pa chibai an bûk tawh ang. Chutiang mi chu Pain amah chibai bûk tûrin a zawng a ni." 
John4:24 Pathian chu thlarau a ni a, amah chibai bûktuten thlarau leh thutakin chibai an bûk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
John4:25 Hmeichhia chuan, “Mesia, Krista an tih chu, a lo kal dâwn tih ka hria. A lo kal hun chuan engkim min la hrilh ang,” a ti a." 
John4:26 Isuan a chhâng a, “Kei, a betu che hi amah chu ka ni,” a ti a." 
John4:27 Chumi lai chuan zirtîrte chu an lo thleng tawh a, hmeichhia a bia an rawn hmuh chuan mak an ti hle a. Nimahsela, tu mahin, “Eng nge i duh?” emaw, “Engah nge hmeichhia i biak?” emaw an ti lo." 
John4:28 Hmeichhia chuan a tuibêl a kalsan a, khuaah a kîr a, khuaa mite hnênah chuan," 
John4:29 “Mi pakhat, ka thiltih apiang mi hrilh thei vektu a awm a, lo kal ula, va en teh u, Krista a ni thei âwm emaw,” a ti a." 
John4:30 Tichuan, khua ata chu an chhuak a, Isua hnênah an kal ta a." 
John4:31 Chumi hlân chuan zirtîrte chuan, “Zirtîrtu, ei rawh,” tiin an ngên a." 
John4:32 Ani lah chuan, “In hriat loh chaw ei tûr ka nei e,” a ti mai si a." 
John4:33 Zirtîrte chuan, “Tuten emaw chaw an rawn pe em ni chu le?” tiin an inzâwt ta hlawm a." 
John4:34 Isuan an hnênah, “Mi tîrtu duhzâwng tih leh a hna thawh zawh chu ka chaw a ni." 
John4:35 ‘Thla li-ah buh seng a hun ang,’ in ti ṭhîn a ni lâwm ni? Dâk chhuak ula, lote en vêl rawh u, buhte chu seng mai theihin a êng tawh tih ka hrilh che u hi." 
John4:36 Buh sengtu chuan hlawh a hmu nghâl tawh a, chatuan nun atân a seng khâwm mêk a ni, a phuntu leh a sengtu chu an hlim dun theih nân." 
John4:37 ‘Mi pakhatin a tuh a, mi dangin a seng a,’ tih thu hi a dik a ni." 
John4:38 In thawhrim rah ni lo seng tûrin ka tirh che u hi, mi dangin an thawk a, an thawhrim rah in seng a ni,” a ti a." 
John4:39 Hmeichhiain, “Ka thiltih apiang mi hrilh thei vek,” a tih avâng khân chumi khuaa Samari mi tam takin Isua an ring ta a." 
John4:40 Samari mite Isua hnên an lo thlen chuan an hnênah châm tûrin an ngên a, chu khuaah chuan ni hnih a châm ta a." 
John4:41 A thu an hriat chuan mi dang tam tak pawhin an ring ta a. 
John4:42 Tin, hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Tûnah zawng i thu sawi avânga ring kan ni ta lo, keimahni ngeiin a thu sawi kan hria a, he mi hi khawvêl chhandamtu a ni ngei tih kan hre ta,” an ti a." 
John4:43 Ni hnih hnu chuan chuta ṭangin Galili ramah a kal ta a. 
John4:44 Amah Isua ngeiin, “Zâwlnei chu ama ram lamah chawimawiin a awm lo,” a lo ti tawh si a." 
John4:45 Galili ram a va thlen erawh chuan, Galili mite chuan an lo lâwm hle a; Jerusalem-a Kalhlên Kût chhimin an han kal a, kût laia a thiltih engkim an han hmuh avângin." 
John4:46 Isua chuan Galili rama Kana, tui uaina a chantîrna khua kha a va thleng leh a. Kapernaum-ah sawrkâr milian tak pakhat fapa damlo a awm a." 
John4:47 Chu mi chuan Isua, Judai ram aṭangin Galili ramah a lo kal tih a hriatin a hnênah a han kal a, a fapa thi lek lek tidam tûrin Kapernaum-a chhukah a sâwm a." 
John4:48 Isuan a hnênah, “Chhinchhiahna leh thil mak tih in hmuh loh chuan in ring tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
John4:49 Chu mi chuan, “Ka pu, ka fapa chu a thih hmain lo kal hrâm rawh,” a ti a." 
John4:50 Isuan, “Kal mai rawh; i fapa chu a dam ta,” a ti a. Ani chuan Isua thu sawi chu a ring a, a kal ta a." 
John4:51 A zu haw chu kawngah a chhiahhlawhten an lo hmuak a, “I fapa chu a dam ta e,” an lo ti a." 
John4:52 A fapa lo dam leh ṭan hun chu a zâwt hlawm a. Anni chuan, “Nimin chhûn dâr khatah khân a khawsikin a thlah ta a ni,” an ti a." 
John4:53 Naupang pa chuan chumi lai tak chu Isuan, “I fapa chu a dam ta,” a hnêna a tih hun kha a ni tih a hre ta a. Tichuan, an chhûngin an ring ta a." 
John4:54 Chu chu Isua Judai ram aṭanga Galili rama a kal hnua chhinchhiahna thil mak a tih vawi hnihna a ni. 
John5:1 Chumi hnu chuan Juda-te kût pakhat a awm a, Isua pawh Jerusalem-ah a han kal ve a." 
John5:2 Jerusalem-ah chuan berâm kawngkhâr bulah dîl pakhat, Hebrai ṭawnga Beth-zatha an tih chu a awm a; hulhliap panga a nei a." 
John5:3 Chutah chuan dam lo tam tak, mitdel te, kebai te, zeng te an awm hlawm a." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Mi pakhat, kum sawmthum leh kum riat damlo tawh pawh a lo awm a." 
John5:6 Isuan chuta a mu chu a hmu a, rei tak dam lovin a awm tawh tih a hria a, a hnênah, “Dam i duh em?” a ti a." 
John5:7 Damlo chuan, “Ka pu, tui a phûl huna dîla mi dah thlatu tu mah ka nei ve si lo va, luh ka tum chhûngin mi dangin mi luh khalh zêl a ni,” a ti a." 
John5:8 Isuan, “Tho la, i mutphah la la, kein kal rawh,” a ti a." 
John5:9 Chu mi chu thâwklehkhatah a lo dam ta mai a; a mutphah chu a la a, kein a kal ta a. Chumi ni chu sabat a ni a." 
John5:10 Juda-te chuan lo dam ta-a hnênah, “Sabat ni a nih hi; kan dânah i mutphah i ken a thiang lo ve,” an ti a." 
John5:11 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Mi tidamtu ngeiin, ‘I mutphah la la, kein kal rawh,’ mi ti alâwm,” a ti a." 
John5:12 Anni chuan, “ ‘I mutphah la la, kein kal rawh,’ titu chu tu nge ni?” an ti a." 
John5:13 Damlo tihdama chuan tu nge a nih a hre si lo; chutah chuan mipui tam tak an awm a, Isua lah chu a kal bo ta mai si a." 
John5:14 Chumi hnu chuan Isuan Tempulah a hmu a, a hnênah, “Hei, i lo dam tâk hi; sual leh tawh suh, chutilo zawng, i chungah thil ṭha lo lehzual a lo thleng dah ang e,” a ti a." 
John5:15 Chu mi chuan amah tidamtu chu Isua a ni tih Juda-te chu a va hrilh ta a. 
John5:16 Chumi avâng chuan Juda-te chuan Isua an tinawmnah ṭan ta a, sabat nia mi a tihdam avângin." 
John5:17 Isuan anniho chu a chhâng a, “Tûn thlengin ka Pa chuan hna a thawk reng a, kei pawhin amah angin ka thawk zêl a ni,” a ti a." 
John5:18 Chuvâng chuan, Juda-te chuan amah tihhlum an tum lehzual sauh va, sabat a bawhchhia chauh pawh ni lovin, Pathian chu, ‘Ka Pa a ni,’ tia Pathian tluka a insiam avângin." 
John5:19 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh che u hi, Fapain ama thuin eng mah a ti thei lo; Pa tih a hmuh chauh loh chu; Pa tih ang chu Fapa pawhin a ti ve a ni." 
John5:20 Pain Fapa a hmangaih a, a thiltih engkim a entîr si a. Hêng aia thil ropui zâwk hi a la entîr ang, mak in tih atân." 
John5:21 Pain mitthite a kai tho va, a tinung ang bawkin, Fapa pawhin a duh apiang a tinung ṭhîn." 
John5:22 Pain tu chungthu mah a rêlsak lo, Fapa hnênah rorêlna chu a hlân vek a ni;" 
John5:23 mi zawng zawngin Pa an zah angin Fapa an zahna tûrin. Tu pawh Fapa zah lo chuan amah tîrtu Pa pawh a zah lo va ni. 
John5:24 “Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, tu pawh ka thu hriaa, mi tîrtu ring chuan chatuan nun a nei tawh, thiam loh changin a awm lo vang a, thihna ata nunnaah a lût tawh zâwk a ni." 
John5:25 Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, a hun a thleng dâwn, tûnah pawh a thleng tawh mêk; mitthiten Pathian Fapa aw an hriat hun chuan, a hriate chu an nung ang." 
John5:26 Pa chu nunna hnâr a ni ang bawkin, Fapa pawh chu nunna hnâr nihna a pe a." 
John5:27 Mihring Fapa a nih avângin rorêl theihna a pe bawk a. 
John5:28 “Chu chu mak ti suh u, thlâna mitthi zawng zawngin a aw an hriat hun a lo thleng dâwn si a;" 
John5:29 tin, thlân aṭangin an lo chhuak ang, thil ṭha titute chu nun nei tûrin an tho leh ang a, thil ṭha lo titute erawh chu thiam loh chang tûrin an tho leh ang." 
John5:30 “Keimah maiin eng mah ka ti thei lo; Pathianin mi hrilh ang zêlin ro ka rêl a, ka rorêl pawh a dik a ni, keima duhzâwng tih tum lova, mi tîrtu duhzâwng chauh tih ka tum zâwk avângin." 
John5:31 Mahni chanchin hriattîr ni ila, ka thu hriattîr chu a dik lo vang." 
John5:32 Nimahsela, mi dang, ka thu hriattîrtu a awm, ka thu a hriattîr chu a dik tih pawh ka hria." 
John5:33 Johana hnênah mi in tîr a, ani chuan thutak a lo hriattîr a." 
John5:34 Mihring hriatpui ka ngai lo ve; amaherawhchu, chhandama in awm theih nân chûng chu ka sawi a ni." 
John5:35 Johana chu khâwnvâr alh êng tak ang a ni a, a ênga hlim taka han awm rih pawh in duh a." 
John5:36 Nimahsela, Johana thu hriatpuina aia hriatpuitu pawimawh zâwk ka nei, Pain hna thawh zawh tûra mi pêk te, tûna ka thiltih laite hian Pain kei mi tîr ngei tih a hriattîr a ni." 
John5:37 Pa mi tîrtu ngei pawh chuan ka thu a hriattîr bawk a ni, a aw in hre ngai lo, a hmêl in hmu ngai hek lo." 
John5:38 A thu pawh in thinlungah in vawng reng lo, a mi tirha hi in rin loh avângin." 
John5:39 Lehkha Thu ngun takin in zir ṭhîn, a chhûngah chatuan nun awma in rin avângin. Chu chu ka thu hriattîrtu a ni si a." 
John5:40 Chuti chung pawhin nun nei tûrin ka hnênah in lo kal duh si lo. 
John5:41 “Mihring chawimawina ka zawng lo," 
John5:42 nangni erawh chu ka hria a che u, in thinlungah Pathian hmangaihna rêng in nei lo tih ka hria e." 
John5:43 Ka pa thuin ka lo kal a; nimahsela, mi lo lâwm si lo; mahni thuin tu emaw lo kal sela in lo lâwm si ang." 
John5:44 Pathian tak awm chhun fak hlawh tum si lovin, infak tawn in lâwm a, engtin nge in rin theih ang?" 
John5:45 Ka Pa hnêna ka hêk che u ring suh u. A hêktu tûr che u chu Mosia a ni, in innghahna bera kha." 
John5:46 Mosia chu ring ni ula kei pawh mi ring tûr, ka chanchin asin a ziak ni." 
John5:47 A thu ziak chu in rin miau si loh chuan, ka thu sawi engtin nge in rin theih ang?” a ti a." 
John6:1 Chumi hnu chuan Galili dîl, Tiberia dîl an tih râlah a kal ta a," 
John6:2 dam lote chunga chhinchhiahna thil mak a tihte an hmuh avângin mipui nasa takin an zui a. 
John6:3 Isua chu tlângah a chho va, a zirtîrte nên an ṭhu a." 
John6:4 Juda-te Kalhlên Kût chu a hnai tawh a. 
John6:5 Isua chu a han hawi vêl a, mipui nasa takin amah an rawn pan chu a hmu a, Filipa hnênah, “Hêngho hraina daih tûr chhang khawiah nge kan lei ang?” a ti a." 
John6:6 Chu chu Filipa fiah nân a sawi a ni; a tih tûr chu amahin a hre vek si a. 
John6:7 Filipan a chhâng a, “Mi tinin tlêm têa an chan ṭheuh tûr pawh duli zahnih man chhangin a daih lo vang,” a ti a." 
John6:8 A zirtîrte zînga pakhat, Andria, Simon Petera unaupa chuan," 
John6:9 “Hetah hian mipa naupang pakhat barli chhang tlang nga leh sangha pahnih nei a awm; nimahsela, hêng zozai tân hian chu chu eng tham nge ni ang?” a ti a." 
John6:10 Isuan, “Mipuite hi ṭhuttîr rawh u,” a ti a. Chu laiah chuan hlobet hmun a awm duai a. Patlingte chu an ṭhu a, sângnga lai an ni a." 
John6:11 Isuan chhang chu a la a, lâwmthu a sawi a, chuta ṭhuhote chu a sem ta a; an duh tâwk an chang ṭheuh va." 
John6:12 An kham hnu chuan a zirtîrte hnênah, “Eng mah rîral awm lo tûrin sem bâng kha dah ṭha rawh u,” a ti a." 
John6:13 Tichuan, an la khâwm a, barli chhang tlang nga eitute hnêna sem bâng chu bâwm sâwm leh pahnih a la khat a." 
John6:14 Mipuiten chhinchhiahna thil mak a tih chu an hmuh chuan, “He mi hi zâwlnei, khawvêla lo kal tûra chu a nih ngei hi!” an ti a." 
John6:15 Isuan amah mana lala siam luih tumin an lo kal dâwn tih a hria a; chuvângin, tlângah amah chauhvin a kal hrang leh ta a." 
John6:16 Tlai a lo nih chuan a zirtîrte chu dîlah an chhuk a; 
John6:17 lawngah an chuang a, Kapernaum lam panin dîl chu an kân dâwn a. Khua a lo thim ta a, Isua lah chu an hnênah a lo la thleng si lo." 
John6:18 Thli na tak a tleh avângin tui a lo fâwn nasa ta hle a. 
John6:19 Km. li vêl lawng an kar hnu chuan, Isuan tui chunga kala lawng a rawn pan chu an hmu a; tichuan, an hlau ta a." 
John6:20 Isuan an hnênah, “Keimah ka ni alâwm, hlau suh u,” a ti a." 
John6:21 Lawnga chuan luhtîr an duh a, nimahsela, lawng chuan an pan khawmual chu a thleng ta nghâl mai a." 
John6:22 A tûkah chuan, dîl râla mipui la awmte chuan lawng pakhat chauh lo chu lawng dang a awm lo tih an hmu a, Isua chu a zirtîrte hnênah lawngah a chuang ve lo va, a zirtîrte chu anmahni chauhvin an kal tih an hria a." 
John6:23 Lalpan lâwmthu a sawi zawha chhang an eina hmun kiangah khân, Tiberi khua aṭanga lo kal lawng dangte chu a lo thleng hlawm a." 
John6:24 Mipuiten Isua leh a zirtîrte chutah chuan an awm tawh lo tih an hmuh chuan, lawngahte chuan an chuang a, Isua zawngin Kapernaum-ah an kal ta a." 
John6:25 Mipuiten Isua chu râl lehlama an va hmuh chuan, “Zirtîrtu, eng laiin nge heta i lo thlen?” an ti a." 
John6:26 Isuan a chhâng a, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, chhinchhiahna thil makte in hmuh avânga mi zawng in ni lo va, chhang in ei puar avâng zâwk khân a nih hi." 
John6:27 Chaw dangral mai ûmin phe phe suh u, chatuan nun daih tûr chaw chu ûmin phe zâwk rawh u. Chu chaw chu Mihring Fapain a pe ang che u, Pa Pathianin amah a chhinchhiah tawh si a,” a ti a." 
John6:28 Tichuan annin, “Pathian hna kan thawh theih nân eng nge kan tih tûr?” an ti a." 
John6:29 Isuan, “Pathian hna in thawh tûr chu hei hi a ni, a mi tirh hi ring rawh u,” a ti a." 
John6:30 Anni chuan, “Kan hmuha kan rin theih nân eng chhinchhiahna thil mak nge i tih ang? Eng nge i tih dâwn le?" 
John6:31 Min thlahtuten thlalêrah manna kha an ei a, Lehkha Thu-in, ‘Vân aṭangin anni chu ei tûr a pe,’ a tih ang khân,” an ti a." 
John6:32 Isuan, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, vân aṭanga chhang Mosian a pe lo che u; ka Pa zâwkin chhang tak, vân ata chu, a pe che u a ni." 
John6:33 Pathian chhang pêk chu vân aṭanga lo chhuka, khawvêl hnêna nun petu hi a ni,” a ti a." 
John6:34 Anni chuan, “Lalpa, chu chhang chu min pe fo rawh,” an ti a." 
John6:35 Isuan, “Kei hi nunna chhang chu ka ni; ka hnêna lo kal tawh phawt chu an rilṭâm lo vang, kei mi ring chu an tuihâl ngai lo vang." 
John6:36 Nangnin mi hmuh hnu pawhin mi la ring si lo tih ka hrilh che u hi. 
John6:37 Pain mi pêk apiang ka hnênah an lo kal ang a, ka hnêna lo kal tawh phawt chu ka hnawt chhuak lo vang." 
John6:38 Mahni duh zâwng ti tûr ni lovin, mi tîrtu duhzâwng ti tûr zâwkin vân aṭanga lo chhuk ka ni si a." 
John6:39 Mi tîrtu duhzâwng chu hei hi a ni: anin mi pêk zawng zawng tu mah hloh lovin ni kin ni-ah kaitho zâwk ila. 
John6:40 Ka pa duhzâwng chu hei hi a ni: Fapa hmua amah chu ring apiangin chatuan nun nei sela, anni chu ni kin ni-ah ka kaitho vang,” a ti a." 
John6:41 “Vân aṭanga chhang lo chhuk chu ka ni,” a tih avângin Juda-te chu a chungah an phunnawi ta a." 
John6:42 “He mi hi Josefa fapa Isua a ni lo vem ni? A nu leh pa pawh kan hria alâwm. Engtizia nge ‘Vân aṭanga lo chhuk ka ni,’ a tih tâk ni?” an ti a." 
John6:43 Isuan a chhâng a, “Phunnawi tawh suh u." 
John6:44 Pa, mi tîrtuin a hîp loh chuan tu mah ka hnênah an lo kal thei lo; keiin ni kin ni-ah a lo kala chu ka kaitho vang." 
John6:45 Zâwlneiten, ‘Mi zawng zawng Pathianin a zirtîr ang,’ tiin an ziak a. Mi tin, Pa thu hriaa, a hnên aṭanga zir chu ka hnênah an lo kal ṭhîn." 
John6:46 Pa hmu tawh an awm tihna a ni lo; Pathian hnên aṭanga lo kal hi Pa hmutu awm chhun chu a ni. 
John6:47 Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u, a ringtu chuan chatuan nun a nei tawh." 
John6:48 Kei hi nunna chhang chu ka ni. 
John6:49 In thlahtuten thlalêrah mana an ei a; mahse, an thi a." 
John6:50 Vân aṭanga chhang lo chhuk erawh hi chu a ei apiang an thi lo vang. 
John6:51 Kei hi vân aṭanga chhang nung lo chhuk chu ka ni. He chhang hi tu pawhin an ei chuan kumkhuain an nung reng ang. Chhang ka pêk tûr chu ka taksa hi a ni, khawvêl nun nâna ka pêk chu,” a ti a." 
John6:52 Chutichuan, Juda-te chu nasa takin an inhnial ta a. “Engtin nge he pa hian a tisa ei tûrin min pêk theih ang?” an ti a." 
John6:53 Isuan, “Thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u; Mihring Fapa tisa in eia, a thisen in in loh chuan nangmahniin nun in nei lo ve." 
John6:54 Tu pawh ka tisa eia, ka thisen in chuan chatuan nun a nei tawh, keiin ni kin ni-ah amah chu ka kaitho bawk ang." 
John6:55 Ka tisa hi chaw tak a ni a, ka thisen hi in tûr tak a ni." 
John6:56 Tu pawh ka tisa eia, ka thisen in chu keimahah a awm reng a, kei pawh amahah ka awm reng a ni." 
John6:57 Pa, nung chuan mi tîr a, Pa avâng chuan kei pawh ka nung a, chutiang bawkin tu pawh mi ei chu keimah avângin an nung ve ang." 
John6:58 Hei hi vân aṭanga chhang lo chhuk chu a ni; in thlahtuten chhang an ei ang kha a ni lo, an thih tho kha. He chhang eitu hi chu chatuanin a nung reng ang,” a ti a." 
John6:59 Kapernaum-a sunagog-ah a zirtîr laiin Isuan he thu hi a sawi a ni. 
John6:60 A zirtîrte zînga tam takin chu chu an hria a, “Hei hi thu khirh tak a ni, tu nge hrethiam ang?” an ti a." 
John6:61 Chu mi thu-ah a zirtîrte an phunnawi tih Isuan a rilruin a hria a, an hnênah, “Hei hian a tilungni lo che u elo?" 
John6:62 Mihring Fapa hi tûn hmaa a awmnaa a kîr chho hmu ta ula, engtin nge ni ang?" 
John6:63 Nunna petu chu thlarau a ni; tisa chu a ṭangkai lo. In hnêna thu ka sawite hi thlarau leh nunna a ni. 
John6:64 Chuti pawhin ṭhenkhatin in la ring duh si lo,” a ti a. Isuan a tîr aṭangin tute nge ring duh lo tûr leh tu nge amah mantîrtu tûr a hre reng si a." 
John6:65 “Chuvâng tak chuan a ni, in hnênah, ‘Pain kal theihna a pêk loh chuan tu mah ka hnênah an lo kal thei lo,’ ka tih kha,” a ti a." 
John6:66 Chuta chinah chuan a zuitute zînga tam takin an bânsan a, an zui ve ta lo va." 
John6:67 Tichuan, Isuan Sâwmpahnihte hnênah chuan, “Nangni pawh kal bo ve in duh em?” a ti a." 
John6:68 Simon Peteran a chhâng a, “Lalpa, tu hnênah nge kan kal ang? Chatuan nunna thu i nei alâwm," 
John6:69 Pathian mi thianghlim chu i ni tih kan ring a, hriat pawh kan hria asin,” a ti a." 
John6:70 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Nangni Sâwmpahnihte hi keima thlan in ni lâwm ni? In zînga pakhat Diabola a ni lehnghâl vei nên!” a ti a." 
John6:71 Simon Iskariota fapa Juda thu kha a sawi a ni, Sâwmpahnihte zînga pakhat a ni nain amah mantîrtu tûr a ni si a." 
John7:1 Chumi zawhah chuan Isuan Galili ram a fang a; Juda-ten amah thah an tum avângin Judai ram chu a fang duh lo va ni. 
John7:2 Juda-te Bâwkte Kût chu a hnai tawh a. 
John7:3 Isua unaute chuan a hnênah, “He hmun hi chhuahsan la, Judai ramah kal rawh, i zirtîrten i thiltih hi an hmuh theih nân." 
John7:4 Tu man hmingthan duh siin a rûkin thil an ti ngai lo. Hêng thil hi i tih rau rau chuan khawvêl hmuhah intârlang rawh,” an ti a." 
John7:5 A unaute pawh chuan amah an ring si lo. 
John7:6 Isuan an hnênah, “Ka hun a la thleng lo, nangni hun erawh chu eng lai pawhin a thleng reng a ni." 
John7:7 Khawvêlin a haw thei lo che u, kei erawh chu mi hua a ni, an thiltihte a ṭha lo tih ka hriattîr ṭhîn avângin." 
John7:8 Kûtah chuan han kal rawh u. Kei chu tûnah chuan, Kûtah hian ka han kal rih lo vang; ka hun a la thlen loh avângin,” a ti a." 
John7:9 Chutiang chuan a sawi a, Galili ramah chuan a awm ta zêl a." 
John7:10 A unaute Kût hmang tûra an chhoh tâk hnu chuan ani pawh chu langsâr lovin, a rûkin a han chho ve a." 
John7:11 Juda-ten Kût lai chuan amah an zawng a, “Khawiah nge a awm?” an ti a." 
John7:12 Mipui chuan a chungchâng thu an sawi sup sup a. Ṭhenkhatin, “Mi ṭha a ni,” an ti a, a ṭhenin, “Ni lo ve, mipui a hruai sual zâwk a ni,” an ti a." 
John7:13 Juda-te an hlauh avângin a lang erawh chuan tu man a chungchâng an sawi lo. 
John7:14 Kût vânglai tak chuan Isua tempulah a chho va, a zirtîr ta a." 
John7:15 Juda-te chuan, “He mi hian zir si lovin engtin nge lehkha a thiam?” an ti a, mak an ti hle a." 
John7:16 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Ka thu zirtîr hi keima zirtîrna a ni lo va, mi tîrtu zirtîrna a ni zâwk." 
John7:17 Tu pawh Pathian duhzâwng tih duh chuan, ka thu zirtîr hi Pathian hnên ata nge keima phuahchawp tih an hre mai ang." 
John7:18 Mahni phuahchawp thu sawitu chuan mahni ropuina a zawng a ni. Mahni tîrtu ropuina zawngtu erawh chu a rinawm a, amahah dik lohna rêng rêng a awm lo." 
John7:19 Mosian, Dân chu a pe lo che u em ni? Nimahsela, in zînga tu mahin Dân chu in zâwm si lo. Engati nge mi thah in tum?” a ti a." 
John7:20 Mipui chuan an chhâng a, “Ramhuai i zâwl a nih hi; tuin nge thah tum che?” an ti a." 
John7:21 Isuan anni chu a chhâng a, “Thil pakhat ka ti a, in za-in mak in ti a." 
John7:22 Mosian serh tan thu a pêk che u avângin (Mosia tihchhuah a ni lo va, in thlahtute tihchhuah a nih zâwk kha,) sabat ni pawhin serh in tan ṭhîn." 
John7:23 Mosia Dân bawhchhiat loh nân sabat ni pawha serh tan a nih chuan, engah nge sabat nia mi ka tihdam tâk avânga ka chunga in thinur bîk?" 
John7:24 Pâwn lam lan dân ngawt enin thu peih mai suh u; a nih dân dik tak enin rêl zâwk rawh u,” a ti a." 
John7:25 Jerusalem-a mi ṭhenkhatte chuan, “He mi hi thah an tum chu a ni lâwm ni?" 
John7:26 En teh u, vântlâng hriatin thu a sawi a, tu mahin an kalh si lo. Hotute hian amah hi Krista chu ni ngeiin an hre ta tihna em ni ang?" 
John7:27 He mi hi khawia mi nge a nih kan hre si a; Krista chu a lo kal hun chuan khawia mi nge a nih tu man an hre dâwn si lo,” an ti a." 
John7:28 Isuan chutia Tempula a zirtîr lai chuan aw ring takin, “Kei mi hria a, khawia mi nge ka nih pawh in hria e. Nimahsela, mahni thu-a lo kal ka ni lo. Mi tîrtu erawh chu mi dik tak a ni, ani chu in hre lo." 
John7:29 Kei chuan ka hria, mi tîr a, a hnên aṭanga lo kal ka nih avângin,” a ti a." 
John7:30 Tichuan, man an tum a, nimahsela, a hun a la thlen loh avângin tu man an khawih lo." 
John7:31 Mipui zînga mi tam takin amah an ring a, “Krista a lo kal hunah he mi tih aia tam zâwk chhinchhiahna thil mak a rawn ti dâwn chuang em ni?” an ti a." 
John7:32 Farisai-te chuan a chungchâng mipuiin an sawi rûk sup sup chu an hria a, puithiam lalte leh Farisai-te chuan Isua man tûrin vêngtute an tîr ta a." 
John7:33 Tichuan, Isuan, “Rei lo tê in hnênah ka la awm rih ang a, chumi hnu chuan mi tîrtu hnênah ka kal ang." 
John7:34 Nangnin mi zawng ang a, mi hmu lo vang, ka awmna tûrah chuan in kal thei dâwn si lo va,” a ti a."
