Acts3:1 Chawhnu dâr thum, ṭawngṭai hun pangngaiah chuan Petera leh Johana chu Tempulah an chho va." 
Acts3:2 Pa pakhat, a pian tirh ata kebai hi an rawn zâwn a. Tempula kalte hnêna kut lo dawh tûrin kawngkhâr, ‘Mawi,’ an tih bulah ni tin an dah ṭhîn a." 
Acts3:3 Chu mi chuan Petera leh Johana Tempula lût tûr chu a hmu a, kut a lo dawh a." 
Acts3:4 Anni chuan an en reng a, Petera chuan a hnênah, “Min han en teh,” a ti a." 
Acts3:5 Ani chuan eng emaw dawn beiseiin a han en a. 
Acts3:6 Petera chuan, “Tangka leh rangkachak eng mah ka nei lo; nimahsela, ka neih chhun ka pe ang che, Nazaret Isua Krista hmingin kein kal tawh rawh,” a ti a." 
Acts3:7 A kut ding lam a vuan a, a kai tho va, a ke leh a kheimit te chu a lo chak ta nghâl a." 
Acts3:8 Tichuan, ani chu a zuang tho va, a ding a, kein a kal ta a. Kea kala zuangin Pathian fak chung zêlin Tempulah chuan an rualin a lût ve ta a." 
Acts3:9 Mipui zawng zawngin kea a kal leh Pathian a fak an hmuh chuan," 
Acts3:10 Tempul kawngkhâr, Mawi bula kutdawh ṭhu ṭhîn kha a ni tih an hria a, a chunga thil thleng chu mak an ti êm êm a, a ngaihna an hre lo va." 
Acts3:11 Tin, ani chuan Petera leh Johana a la vawn reng laiin mipui chu Solomona hulhliap an tihah chuan an lo tlân khâwm a, mak an ti êm êm a." 
Acts3:12 Peteran chu chu a hmuhin mipui hnênah chuan, “Nangni Israel mite u, engati nge hei hi mak in tih? He mi hi keimahni theihna emaw, kan ṭhat bîk vâng emawa kan kaltîr ang êm chuan engati nge min en reng?" 
Acts3:13 Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian, min thlahtute Pathian chuan a chhiahhlawh Isua a chawimawi ta a nih hi. Ani chu in mantîr a, rorêltu Pilatan chhuah a tum pawhin in hnial tlat a nih kha." 
Acts3:14 Mi thianghlim leh fel tak kha in duh lo va, tual that kha chhuahsak che u in ngên ta zâwk a." 
Acts3:15 Nunna petu chu in thahtîr a; nimahsela, Pathianin ani chu mitthi zîng ata a kaitho leh ta a, chumi thuhretute chu kan ni." 
Acts3:16 “Isua hminga thiltihtheihna leh chu hming rinna chuan in hmuh leh in hriat ṭhina hi a tidam ta a; amah rinna avâng chuan he mi hi in zaa in hmuh ang hian a dam ta viah a. 
Acts3:17 Tûnah hian unaute u, nangni leh in hotute pawhin in thiltih kha in hre tak tak lo a ni tih ka hria e. Krista chuan a tuar tûr a ni tih" 
Acts3:18 Pathianin a zâwlnei zawng zawng hmanga a lo sawi lâwk kha hetiang hi a thlentîr dân a lo ni. 
Acts3:19 Chuvângin, in sualte sim ula, hawi kîr leh rawh u." 
Acts3:20 Chutichuan, Lalpa hnên ata harhtharna hun a lo thleng ang a, in tâna a ruat Mesia, Isua chu, a rawn tîr ang." 
Acts3:21 Amaherawhchu, engkim siam thar hun a thlen hma chuan vânah ani chu a awm rih tûr a ni; siamtharna thu chu Pathianin a zâwlnei thianghlimte kâa hmasâng ata a sawi daih tawh kha." 
Acts3:22 “Mosia pawh khân, ‘Lalpa in Pathianin keimah ang hi in unaute zînga mi, zâwlnei pakhat a dinsak ang che u; eng pawh in hnêna a sawi apiang in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Acts3:23 Chu zâwlnei thu ngaithla lo apiang chu Pathian mite zîng ata tihboral zêl tûr a ni,’ a tih kha." 
Acts3:24 Samuela leh a hnua zâwlnei zawng zawngte khân tûnlai chanchin hi a ni an lo hrilh lâwk ni. 
Acts3:25 “Zâwlneite thu leh in thlahtute hnêna thuthlung rochungtute in ni asin. Abrahama hnênah chuan, ‘I thlahah chuan khawvêla hnam tinin malsâwmna an dawng ang,’ a tih kha." 
Acts3:26 Pathianin a chhiahhlawh chu a thlang a, in sualte hawisantîr ṭheuh tûr che u leh malsâwm tûr che uin in hnênah a rawn tîr hmasa a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts4:1 Petera leh Johanan mipuite hnêna thu an sawi lai chuan, puithiam chu Tempul pulis hotupa nên, Sadukai-hote nên an hnênah an lo kal a." 
Acts4:2 Isua thawhlehna thu sawiin mitthi thawhlehna thu mipui an zirtîr avâng chuan an lungni lo êm êm a. 
Acts4:3 Tichuan, an man a, tlai lam a nih avângin a tûk thlengin tân inah an khung ta a." 
Acts4:4 Nimahsela, an thu ngaithlatute zînga tam tak chuan an ring ve ta a, an za chuan sângnga lai an tling a." 
Acts4:5 A tûkah chuan Juda hotu te, upa te, Dân zirtîrtu te Jerusalemah an inkhâwm a;" 
Acts4:6 chûng chu Puithiam lalber Ana te, Kaiafa te, Johana te, Aleksandara te, puithiam lal thlahho te nên an ni." 
Acts4:7 Petera leh Johana chu a laiah an dintîr a; “Engtia tidam thei nge in niha, tu hmingin nge he thil hi in tih?” tiin an chhâl a." 
Acts4:8 Tichuan, Petera chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, an hnênah, “Mipui hotute leh upate u," 
Acts4:9 vawiinah hian kebai tihdam thu-ah engtia dam nge a nih min zâwt a ni bawk a," 
Acts4:10 nangni zawng zawng leh Israel mi zawng zawngin hre teh u; Nazaret Isua Krista, in khenbeh, Pathianin mitthi zîng ata a kaihthawh leh tâka hming khân he mi hi tihdam a ni a; tûnah hetah in hmaah dam varin a ding ta a nih hi." 
Acts4:11 Ani hi alâwm, nangni in satuten in duh loh lung kha, a kil lung pawimawh ber a lo ni ta si a." 
Acts4:12 Tu dang hnênah mah chhandamna a awm lo, vân hnuaia mihring hming sak zîngah min chhandam thei hming dang rêng rêng a awm lo,” a ti a." 
Acts4:13 Petera leh Johana huaizia chu an hmuhin, lehkha thiam lo leh mi mâwl mai an nih an hriatin, mak an ti hle a; Isua hnêna awm ṭhîn an ni tih an hre ta a." 
Acts4:14 Tin, an mi tihdam, an kianga ding chu an enin eng mah sawisêl tûr a awm si lo." 
Acts4:15 Tichuan, Sanhedrin ata an chhuahtîr hnu chuan an inrâwn a," 
Acts4:16 “Hêng mite hi engtin nge kan tih tâk ang? An thil mak tih hi Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngin an hriat tâk hi; keini pawhin kan hnial thei si lo. 
Acts4:17 Amaherawhchu, miin an hriat darh lehzual loh nân tu hnênah mah he hminga thu sawi leh tawh lo tûrin i vau ang u,” an ti a." 
Acts4:18 Tichuan, anni chu an ko leh a, Isua hminga thu sawi lo tûr leh zirtîr tawh tawp lo tûrin thu an pe a." 
Acts4:19 Nimahsela, Petera leh Johana chuan an hnênah, “Pathian mit hmuhah Pathian thu zawm aiin mihring thu zawm chu a dik zâwk dâwn emaw chu, ngaihtuah teh u." 
Acts4:20 Keini zawng thil kan hmuh leh kan hriat hi sawi lovin kan awm thei lo,” an ti a." 
Acts4:21 Tin, anni chuan nasa takin an vau va, an chhuah ta a. An thiltih avânga mi zawng zawngin Pathian an chawimawi ṭheuh si avângin hremna remchâng an hmu lo va ni." 
Acts4:22 Mak taka an tihdam chu kum sawmli aia upa zâwk mah a ni. 
Acts4:23 Petera te chu an chhuak a, an ṭhiante hnênah an va kal a, puithiam lalte leh upaten an hnêna an sawi chu an hrilh vek a." 
Acts4:24 An thu ngaithlatute chuan a rualin ring takin Pathian an au va, “Aw Lalber, nang, vân te, lei te, tuifinriat te leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng siamtu," 
Acts4:25 Thlarau Thianghlimin min thlahtu i chhiahhlawh Davida kâin hêng thu hi i sawi a: ‘Jentail-te engati nge an thinur? Mipuiin engati nge thil sâwt lo an rêl? 
Acts4:26 Lei lalten an er a, hotute pawh a chungah an inrâwn khâwm a, Lalpa leh a hriak thiha chungah chuan,’ tiin." 
Acts4:27 “Chutiang tak chuan he khuaah hian i chhiahhlawh thianghlim Isua, i hriak thiha chungah chuan, Heroda leh Pontia Pilata te chu Jentail-te leh Juda-te nên an inthurual ta ngei a." 
Acts4:28 Nangin i ruat lâwk ang thlentîr i tum chu tihlawhtling tûrin an pung khâwm a lo ni. 
Acts4:29 Lalpa, ngai teh, tûna an mi vau dân hi, i thu hril ngam tûrin i bawihte hi huaisenna pe ang che." 
Acts4:30 Mite tidam tûrin i kut phar la, i chhiahhlawh thianghlim Isua hmingin chhinchhiahna te leh thil makte tihtîr bawk ang che,” an ti a." 
Acts4:31 Chutia an ṭawngṭai zawh chuan an awmkhâwmna hmun chu a lo nghîng a, an za-in Thlarau Thianghlimin an khat a, huai takin Pathian thu an hril ta a." 
Acts4:32 Ringtuho chu thinlung hmun khat leh rilru hmun khat puin an awm a, an zînga tu mahin an thil neihte chu, ‘ka ta bîk a ni,’ an ti lo, engkim an inṭâwm zâwk a." 
Acts4:33 Tirhkohte chuan thiltihtheihna nasa tak neiin Lalpa Isua thawhlehna thu an hril ṭhîn a, an za-in Pathian duhsak an hlawh a." 
Acts4:34 An zînga tu mah tlachham an awm lo. In emaw, ram emaw nei apiangin an hralh a, a man chu an rawn keng a." 
Acts4:35 Tirhkohte hnênah an hlân a, an châkkhai daih ṭheuhvin an insem ṭhîn." 
Acts4:36 Tin, Josefa, tirhkohten Barnaba an tih (chu chu ‘Thlamuanna fa,’ tihna a ni), Levia chi, Kupra thliarkâra mi pawh chuan," 
Acts4:37 ram a nei a, a hralh a, a man chu rawn kengin tirhkohte hnênah a hlân a." 
Acts5:1 Mi dang pakhat, a hming Anania a awm a, a nupui chu Sapfiri a ni. Ram a hralh a," 
Acts5:2 a man chu a nupui hriatpuiin anmahni tân an dah hrang a, a ṭhen chauh rawn kengin tirhkohte hnênah a rawn hlân a." 
Acts5:3 Nimahsela, Peteran, “Anani, Thlarau Thianghlim bum tûr leh ram man a ṭhen zêp tûrin engati nge Setanan i thinlung a luah le?" 
Acts5:4 I hralh hma zawng khân i ta a ni a, i hralh hnu pawhin a man chu i thu thu-a i tih tûr a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge hetiang thil ti tûra rilru i put le? Mihring i bum a ni lo va, Pathian i bum a ni zâwk e,” a ti a." 
Acts5:5 Ananian chûng thu chu a hriat chuan a tlu a, a thi ta a. A hria apiangin an hlau ta êm êm a." 
Acts5:6 Tlangvâlho an lo thawk a, an tuam a, an zâwn chhuak a, an phûm ta a." 
Acts5:7 Dârkâr thum lai hnuah chuan a nupui chu thil awmzia hre lovin a lo lût ve a. 
Acts5:8 Petera chuan a hnênah, “Mi hrilh teh, ram chu heti zât chiah hian maw in hralh?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e, heti zât chiah hian,” a ti a." 
Acts5:9 Petera chuan, “Engati nge Lalpa Thlarau fiah tuma in inthurual ni? Ngai rawh, i pasal phûmtute pawh kawngka bul an lo thlen leh tawh saw; nang pawh an zâwn chhuak ang che,” a ti a." 
Acts5:10 Tichuan, thâwklehkhatah a ke bulah chuan a tlu a, a thi ve ta mai a. Tlangvâlte chu an lo lût a, ani chu thi-in an rawn hmu a, an zâwn chhuak a, a pasal kiangah an phûm ve ta a." 
Acts5:11 Kohhran mi zawng zawngte leh chûng thu hria apiangte chuan an hlau ta êm êm a. 
Acts5:12 Tirhkohte chuan mipui zîngah chhinchhiahna leh thil mak tam tak an ti zêl a. Anniho chu an za-in lungrual takin Solomona hulhliapah an inkhâwm ṭhîn a. 
Acts5:13 An zîngah chuan tu mah mi dang an tel ve ngam lo nâ a, mite chuan an ngaisâng êm êm a." 
Acts5:14 Lalpa ringtute erawh chu, a hmei a pa, an zînga tel an pung tial tial a." 
Acts5:15 Chutichuan, dam lote pawh kawtthlêrahte an zâwn chhuak a, khumah te, mutphahah te an muttîr a. Petera hlim chuan a kal vêl pahin an zînga ṭhenkhat tal a hliah theih nân an ti a ni." 
Acts5:16 Jerusalem kiang vêl aṭang pawhin mi an lo kal a, damlo te, ramhuai bawlhhlawh man te an rawn hruai a, chûngho zawng zawng pawh chu an lo dam ta zêl a." 
Acts5:17 Tin, Puithiam lalber leh a hote zawng zawng, Sadukai pâwla mite chu an lo thawk a; tirhkohte chu an îtsîk êm êm a," 
Acts5:18 an man a, vântlâng tân inah an khung a." 
Acts5:19 Nimahsela, zânah Lalpa tirh Vântirhkoh pakhatin tân in kawngkhâr chu a rawn hawng a, a hruai chhuak a; an hnênah," 
Acts5:20 “Kal ta ula, Tempulah va ding ula, mipuite hnênah hêng nunna thu leh a awmzia zawng zawng hi va sawi tawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts5:21 Chu thu chu an hriatin an kal a, zîngah chuan Tempulah an lût a, mi an zirtîr ta a. Puithiam lalber leh a hote chuan Israel upate, Sanhedrin mi zawng zawng an khâwm a, tirhkohte chu va hruai tûrin tân inah mi an tîr a." 
Acts5:22 An tirhte chu an va kal a; mahse, tân inah chuan anni chu an hmu si lo. An lo kîr leh a," 
Acts5:23 “Tân in chu him taka inkhârin, a vêngtute pawh kawngkhâr bula dingin kan hmu a; nimahsela, kan han hawng a, a chhûngah tu mah kan hmu si lo,” tiin an rawn sawi a." 
Acts5:24 Tempul pulis hotu leh puithiam lalten an hriat chuan, “Engtizia nge ni ta le?” tiin an buai hle a." 
Acts5:25 Chutih lai chuan mi pakhat a lo kal a, an hnênah, “Ngai teh u, tân ina mi in khungte khân Tempulah sâwn mi an zirtîr ka ti,” a rawn ti a." 
Acts5:26 Tichuan, Tempul pulis hotu chu a hote nên an va kal a, tirhkohte chu tilui lovin an rawn hruai a, an man luih mai chuan mipuiin lungin an dêng ang tih an hlau a ni." 
Acts5:27 An rawn hruai thlen chuan Sanhedrin hmaah chuan an dintîr a. Puithiam lalber chuan an hnênah," 
Acts5:28 “He hming hian zirtîr tawh hauh lo tûrin thu kan pe che u a; ngai teh u, in thu zirtîrin Jerusalem in tihkhah vek tawh hi; chu pa thisen mawh chu kan chunga bel in tum a nih hi le!” tiin a chhâl a." 
Acts5:29 Petera leh tirhkohte erawh chuan, “Mihring thu aiin Pathian thu kan zâwm zâwk tûr a ni." 
Acts5:30 Min thlahtute Pathian chuan, thinga khai kânga in tihhlum tâk Isua kha a kaitho leh ta a." 
Acts5:31 Israel-te sual simtîra ngaihdam an nih theih nân Amah ngei kha Pathianin Lal leh Chhandamtu atân a ding lamah a chawimawi ta a. 
Acts5:32 A thu zâwmtute hnêna Pathian pêk Thlarau Thianghlim leh keini hi chûng thuhretutechu kan ni,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Acts5:33 Chûng an thu hriat chuan an thin a khei ta riau va, tirhkohte chu tihhlum an tum ta a." 
Acts5:34 Nimahsela, Farisai pakhat, a hming Gamaliela, Dân zirtîrtu, mi zawng zawng ngaihsân tak chu Sanhedrin-ah chuan a ding a, tirhkohte chu chhuahtîr rih tûrin vêngtute chu a hrilh a." 
Acts5:35 Rorêltute hnênah chuan, “Israel mite u, he mite chunga in thil tih tumah hian fîmkhur rawh u." 
Acts5:36 Hmân deuh tawhah khân Theuda chu mi ropui tak nia inchhâlin a lo kal a, mi zali vêl laiin an zui a. Ani chu an that a, amah zuitute zawng zawng chu an darh vek a, eng mah an ni ta lo va." 
Acts5:37 Chumi hnu chuan, chhiarpui lai khân, Galili rama mi Juda kha a lo kal leh a, ani pawhin mipui a hîp leh hle a. Nimahsela, ani pawh an that a, amah zuitu zawng zawng pawh an darh leh ta vek bawk a." 
Acts5:38 Chuvângin, tûnah hian ka ti a che u, he mite hi khawih suh ula, awmtîr mai mai rawh u. Hêng an thiltih tum leh an thiltihte hi mihring tihchhuah mai a nih chuan a tâwp leh mai ang." 
Acts5:39 Pathian tihchhuah a nih erawh chuan in tiboral thei lo vang; Pathian dodâl in lo ni hlauh dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Acts5:40 Tichuan, a thu chu an zâwm a, tirhkohte chu an ko va, an vua a, Isua hminga thu sawi tawh hauh lo tûrin thu an pe a, an chhuah ta a." 
Acts5:41 Chutichuan, chu Hming avânga mualpho tuar tlâka ruat an nih avângin, lâwm êm êm chungin Sanhedrin ata chu an chhuak a." 
Acts5:42 Ni tin, Tempulah leh in lamah Isua kha Mesia chu a nih thu hril leh zirtîr an bâng chuang lo." 
Acts6:1 Chûng laia zirtîrte an pun zêl lai chuan an ni tin thil semah an hmeithaite an ngaihthah bîk tiin Grik ṭawng hmang Juda-te chu Hebrai-hote chungah an phunnawi a. 
Acts6:2 Sâwmpahnihte chuan zirtîrhote chu an ko khâwm vek a, “Pathian thu hril thlahthlama ni tin khawsakna lam kan buaipui hi a dik lo vang." 
Acts6:3 Chutichuan, unaute u, in zînga mi hming ṭha, Thlarau Thianghlima khat, mi pasarih thlang ula, an hnênah hêng hna hi kan hlân ang e;" 
Acts6:4 keini erawh chu ṭawngṭai leh thu rawngbâwlah kan inpumpêk tlat ang e,” an ti a." 
Acts6:5 Chu thu chuan mipui zawng zawng chu a tilâwm a; tichuan, Stefana, ringtu nghet tak leh Thlarau Thianghlima khat leh Filipa te, Prokora te, Nikanora te, Timona te, Parmena te, Nikola, Juda saphun, Antiokei khuaa mite an thlang a." 
Acts6:6 Chûng mite chu tirhkohte hmaah an dintîr a, tirhkohte chuan an lu chunga kut nghatin an ṭawngṭai a." 
Acts6:7 Tichuan, Pathian thu chu a darh zêl a, Jerusalem-ah chuan zirtîr an pung nasa êm êm a, puithiamte zînga mi tam tak pawhin Rinna chu an pawm ve ta a." 
Acts6:8 Stefana chu Pathian khawngaihna leh thiltihtheihnain a khat a, mi zîngah thil mak leh chhinchhiahna ropui tak tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
Acts6:9 Nimahsela, Kurini khua leh Aleksandria khua ata Juda ṭhenkhat ‘Sal chhuak pâwl’ Sunagog an tiha tel ve ṭhînte leh Kilikia ram leh Asia rama Juda-te an lo thawk a, Stefana chu an rawn hnial a." 
Acts6:10 A finna leh a sawipuitu Thlarau chu an hnial hneh si lo va. 
Acts6:11 Tichuan, “Mosia leh Pathian pawi a sawi kan hria,” ti tûrin mite an tham a." 
Acts6:12 Mipuite leh upate leh Dân zirtîrtute chu an fuihpawrh a, Stefana chu an bei a, an man a, Sanhedrin hmaah an hruai ta nghâl a." 
Acts6:13 Hretu der an rawn thawhpui a, chûng chuan, “He mi hian kan Tempul thianghlim leh kan Dân hi a sawichhiat a bâng duh lo." 
Acts6:14 ‘Nazaret Isuan kan Tempul hi a ṭhiat ang a, Mosia Dân min pêkte hi a tidanglam vek dâwn,’ a tih kan hria a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts6:15 Rorêltute zawng zawng chuan Stefana chu an en ṭhuap a, a hmêl chu vântirhkoh hmêl angin an hmu a." 
Acts7:1 Puithiam lalber chuan, “Hêng thu hi a dik em?” a ti a." 
Acts7:2 Ani chuan, “Ka unaute leh ka pute u, ngaithla rawh u. Kan pu Abrahama chu Haran khuaa a awm hma, Mesapotamia rama a awm lai khân, ropuina Pathian chu a hnênah a inlâr a." 
Acts7:3 I ram leh i laichînte hi chhuahsan la, ram ka la kawhhmuh tûr che lamah kal rawh,’ a rawn ti a." 
Acts7:4 Tichuan, Kaldai ram ata a chhuak a, Haran-ah awmhmun a khuar a. Chuta ṭang chuan a pa thih hnuah tûna in awmna ramah hian Pathianin a pêm luhtîr a." 
Acts7:5 Pathian chuan ram luah tûr hniak khat pawh a pe lo va; mahse, Abrahama chu fa nei lo a ni chungin, amah leh a thlahte hnênah he ram hi pêk a tiam a." 
Acts7:6 Pathianin hetiang hian a hrilh a ni, ‘I thlahte chu mi ramah an la mikhual ang a, kum zali lai mi bawihah awmin tihduhdah an ni bawk ang." 
Acts7:7 Bawiha siamtu tûr hnam chu keimah ngeiin ka la ngaihtuah ang a, chumi hnuah an chhuak ang a, he hmunah hian ka rawng an la bâwl ang,’ a ti a." 
Acts7:8 Pathianin a hnênah serh tan thu kha a thlung a. Chutiang tak chuan fapa Isaka a neih khân, a ni riat ni-ah a serh a tansak a. Isaka chuan fapa Jakoba a nei a, Jakoban fapa sâwm leh pahnih, thlahtute kha, a nei a." 
Acts7:9 “Tin, thlahtute khân Josefa chu an îtsîk a, Aigupta ram lamah an hralh a; nimahsela, Pathian a hnênah a awm a," 
Acts7:10 hrehawm a tuar zawng zawng ata chu a chhan chhuak zêl a. Aigupta rama lal Farawa mit hmuha mi fing tak leh duhawm tak a nihtîr a; Farawa chuan Aigupta ram chungah leh a chhûngkaw chunga hotu-ah a siam ta a. 
Acts7:11 Tin, Aigupta leh Kanan ram pumah ṭâm a lo tla a, an tuar na hle a; kan pute chuan ei tûr an nei ta lo va." 
Acts7:12 Jakoban Aigupta ramah buh a awm tih a hriat chuan, kan pute chu a tîr chhuak a, chu chu an kal hmasak ber a ni." 
Acts7:13 An kal vawi hnihnaah Josefa chu a unaute hnênah a inhriattîr a, Farawa pawhin Josefa chhûngte chu a hre ve ta a." 
Acts7:14 Tichuan, Josefa chuan a pa Jakoba leh a unaute zawng zawng a kohtîr a, an vaiin sawmsarih leh panga lai an ni a." 
Acts7:15 Jakoba te chu Aigupta ramah an chhuk a, ani leh kan pute chu an thi a." 
Acts7:16 An ruang chu Sekem khaw thlengin an rawn zâwn a, Abrahaman Sekem khuaa Hamora fate laka tangka suma a lei thlânah an phûm ta a." 
Acts7:17 Abrahama hnêna Pathian thutiam kha a thlen dâwn lai chuan kan mite chu Aigupta-ah chuan an pung chak hle a, an tam ta êm êm mai a." 
Acts7:18 Aigupta ramah chuan lal dang, Josefa hre lo a lo lal ta a." 
Acts7:19 Chu mi chuan kan chite chu vervêk takin a bei a, kan pute chu a tiduhdah a, an fa sênte thi tûrin a paihtîr zêl a." 
Acts7:20 Chumi lai chuan Mosia a lo piang a, nausên duhawm bîk tak mai a ni a, anmahni inah thla thum an awmpui a;" 
Acts7:21 an in ata an dah chhuah hnu chuan Farawa fanuin a chhar a, ama fa atân a nei ta a." 
Acts7:22 Mosia chu Aigupta ram finna zawng zawng a zirtîr a; tichuan, thu sawi thei tak leh thil ti thei tak a lo ni ta a." 
Acts7:23 Mosia chuan kum sawmli a nih kum khân, a unau Israel fate chu tlawh ṭûlin a hre ta a." 
Acts7:24 A va tlawh chuan an zînga pakhat chu Aigupta miin a lo tiduhdah lai a hmu a, a chhan a, a phuba a lâksak a, a tiduhdahtu chu a that ta a." 
Acts7:25 Mosia chuan ama kutin Pathianin anmahni a chhanhim dâwn tih a unauten an hria emaw a ti a; nimahsela, an lo hre si lo." 
Acts7:26 “A tûkah chuan mi pahnih insual lai a rawn hmu a, ṭhelh tumin, ‘Pute u, unau in ni alâwm, engati nge in insual tâk mai?’ a ti a." 
Acts7:27 A ṭhenawm bei hmasatu zâwk chuan Mosia chu a nam kiang a, ‘Kan chunga hotu-ah leh rorêltuah tuin nge siam che?" 
Acts7:28 Nimina Aigupta mi i thah ang khân mi thah ve i tum a ni maw?’ a ti a. 
Acts7:29 Chu thu avâng chuan Mosia chu a tlân bo va. Midian ramah a va châm ta reng a, chutah chuan fapa pahnih a nei a." 
Acts7:30 “Tin, kum sawmli a vei hnuin Sinai thlalêrah hnimbuka meialh zîngah Vântirhkoh a hnênah a inlâr a." 
Acts7:31 Mosian a thil hmuh chu mak a ti êm êm a; fiah tumin a va hnaih a, Lalpa awin," 
Acts7:32 ‘Kei hi i pute Pathian, Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te Pathian chu ka nih hi,’ a rawn ti a. Tichuan, Mosia chu a khûr a, a fiah ngam ta lo va." 
Acts7:33 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, ‘I pheikhawk kha phelh rawh, i dinna kha hmun thianghlim a ni." 
Acts7:34 Aigupta rama ka mite an tihretheihzia ka hmu reng a, an rûm pawh ka hre reng a, anmahni hruai chhuak tûrin ka lo chhuk ta a ni. Hawh teh, Aigupta ramah ka tîr ang che,’ a ti a." 
Acts7:35 “Chu Mosia, ‘hotu-ah leh rorêltuah tuin nge siam che,’ tia an hnara ngei chu, Pathianin hotu leh chhanchhuaktu atân hnimbuka a hnêna inlâr vântirhkoh hmangin a rawn tîr ta a ni." 
Acts7:36 Ani chuan anni chu a hruai chhuak a, Aigupta ramah te, Tuipui Senah te, thlalêrah te kum sawmli chhûng lai thil mak leh chhinchhiahnate tiin a hruai a." 
Acts7:37 Chu Mosia chu Israel fate hnêna, ‘Pathianin keimah ang in unaute zînga mi zâwlnei a la siamsak ang che u,’ titu kha a ni." 
Acts7:38 Amah chuan thlalêra pung khâwm zîngah Sinai tlânga amah betu vântirhkoh chu a lo chhâwn a, kan pute hnêna thu sawi ṭhîna, min pêk chhâwn tûr thu nungte pawh dawngtu a nih kha." 
Acts7:39 Kan pute chuan a thu an zâwm duh lo va, an hnâwl a, Aigupta lama kîr leh an duh a." 
Acts7:40 Arona hnênah, ‘Kan hma hruaitu atân pathiante min siamsak teh khai; he Mosia, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi engtin nge a awm tâk pawh kan hre si lo,’ an ti a." 
Acts7:41 Chutichuan, bâwngno lim an siam a, chu milim hnênah chuan inthawina an hlân a, anmahni kutchhuak chu an hlimpui ta a." 
Acts7:42 “Tichuan, Pathianin anmahni a hawisan a, vâna arsite an biak theihna tûrin a kalsan a, zâwlnei Lehkhabua: ‘Israel chhûngte u, kum sawmli chhûngin thlalêrah khân inthawina ran mi hlân em ni?" 
Acts7:43 Moleka puan in in zâwn a, In Pathian Refana arsi lemte in siam a. Chûng lemte chu chibai in bûk a, chuvângin, Babulon piah lamah ka tântîr ang che u,’ tih ziak ang khân." 
Acts7:44 “Kan pute chuan thlalêrah khân Pathian chênna puan in an nei a, Mosia hnêna Pathianin siam dân tûr a hrilh laia a lem a entîr ang taka siam a ni." 
Acts7:45 Chu ngei chu kan puten an chhawm zêl a, Pathianin kan pute hmaa Jentail-te a hnawh chhuaha, Josua hova Kanan ram an luh khân an luhpui a, Davida hun thleng khân a awm ta reng a." 
Acts7:46 “Davida chuan Pathian duhsakna a dawng a, Jakoba Pathian tân in sak phalna a dîl a." 
Acts7:47 Nimahsela, Solomona zâwkin in chu a saksak ta a." 
Acts7:48 Amaherawhchu, Chungnungbera zawng kuta sak inahte a awm ngai lo, zâwlneiin:" 
Acts7:49 Lalpan, ‘Vân ka ṭhutthlêng a ni a, lei ka ke nghahchhan a ni. In eng ang nge mi saksak anga, ka chawlhhmun pawh khawiah nge?" 
Acts7:50 Hêng thil zawng zawng hi ka kuta ka siam a ni lo vem ni?’ tia a sawi ang khân. 
Acts7:51 “Mi tihmawh, serh tan lohho ang mai, thinlung sak leh beng tululte u; Thlarau Thianghlim in dodâl fo va, in pute ang bawkin nangni pawhin in ti ṭhîn." 
Acts7:52 In puten zâwlneite zîngah tu nge an tihduhdah loh? Mi fel tak, lo kal tûra thu hrilhlâwktute kha an that a, tûnah nangniho hi, chu mi fel tak mantîrtu leh thattute chu in ni." 
Acts7:53 Vântirhkohte pêk Dân dawngtu, zâwm duh si lote u,” a ti a." 
Acts7:54 Chûng thu chu an hriatin an thin a khei ta hle a, a chungah thinurin an ha an ṭhial a." 
Acts7:55 Nimahsela, Stefana chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, vân lam a thlîr reng a, Pathian ropuina leh Pathian ding lama Isua ding a hmu a." 
Acts7:56 “Ngai teh u, vân inhawng ka hmu a, Pathian ding lama Mihring Fapa ding pawh ka hmu,” a ti a." 
Acts7:57 Chutichuan, ring takin an au va, an beng an hup a, Stefana chu an beih rawn a," 
Acts7:58 khua ata chu an nam chhuak a, lungin an dêng ta a. Thuhretute chuan an puante chu tlangvâl pakhat, Saula an tih, ke bulah chuan an dah a." 
Acts7:59 Stefanan, “Lalpa Isu, ka thlarau la ang che,” tia Lalpa a koh lai chuan lungin an dêng ruih ruih a." 
Acts7:60 A ṭhingṭhi a, ring takin, “Lalpa, he an thiltih sual mawh hi anmahni phurhtîr suh ang che,” a ti a. Chu thu chu a sawi zawh chuan a muhîl ta a." 
Acts8:1 Saula pawh chuan Stefana thah chu a remti ve rêng a. Chumi ni aṭang chuan Jerusalem-a kohhran chu nasa takin an tiduhdah ta a. Tichuan, tirhkohte chauh lo chu Judai leh Samari ram khaw tinah an darh ta vek a." 
Acts8:2 Pathian ngaihsak ṭhenkhatten Stefana chu an phûm a, nasa takin an ṭah a." 
Acts8:3 Saula erawh chu kohhranho nuai bo tumin inahte a lût a, a hmei a pain a hnûk chhuak a, tân inahte a khung a." 
Acts8:4 Tin, a darhte chu hmun tinah an kal a, Chanchin Ṭha an hril zêl a." 
Acts8:5 Filipa chu Samari khawpuiah a chhuk a, an hnênah Krista thu a hril a." 
Acts8:6 Mipuiten Filipa thu sawi an hriata, a thil mak tihte an hmuh chuan a thusawite chu an bengkhawn tlâng hle a." 
Acts8:7 Ramhuai bawlhhlawhte chu ring taka auvin mi tam tak kawchhûng ata an lo chhuak a, zeng leh kebai tam tak pawh tihdam an ni a." 
Acts8:8 Chu khua chu an lâwm ta êm êm a. 
Acts8:9 Chu khuaah chuan mi pakhat, Simona an tih, dawithiam a awm a. Mi ropui tak niin a insawi a, Samari mite chuan a dawi chu mak an ti êm êm a." 
Acts8:10 Mi zawng zawngin, a lian a têin a thu chu an bengkhawn hle ṭhîn, “He mi hi Pathian thiltihtheihna, ‘Ropui,’ an tih kha a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Acts8:11 A mitdawivaih thiam chu hun rei tak mak ti taka a lo siam tawh avângin a thu chu an ngaichâng ṭhîn a ni. 
Acts8:12 Pathian ram Chanchin Ṭha leh Isua Krista hming Filipan a hril chu an rin tâkah chuan, a hmei a pain baptisma an chang ta hlawm a." 
Acts8:13 Simona meuh pawhin a ring ve ta a, baptisma a chang a, Filipa chu a kawp ta tlat a, chhinchhiahna leh thil mak ropui tak a tihte chu a hmu a, mak a ti êm êm ṭhîn a." 
Acts8:14 Jerusalem-a tirhkoh awmte chuan Samari khaw miten Pathian thu an awih ta tih an hriat chuan an hnênah Petera leh Johana an tîr a. 
Acts8:15 Anni chu an zu kal a, Thlarau Thianghlim an dâwn theih nân an ṭawngṭaisak a." 
Acts8:16 An zînga tu mahin Thlarau Thianghlim chu an la dawng rih lo; Lalpa Isua hmingin baptisma an chang chauh a la ni si a. 
Acts8:17 Tichuan, tirhkohten an lu chungah kut an nghat a, Thlarau Thianghlim an dawng ta a." 
Acts8:18 Tirhkohten an chunga kut an nghahin Thlarau Thianghlim pêk an ni tih Simona chuan a hmuhin pawisa pêk a tum a," 
Acts8:19 “Hetiang thiltihtheihna hi mi pe ve rawh u, an chunga kut ka nghahna apiangin Thlarau Thianghlim an dawn ve theih nân,” a ti a." 
Acts8:20 Nimahsela, Peteran a hnênah, “I tangka nên hian boral rawh u: Pathian thilthlâwn pêk tangka suma lei i tum avângin." 
Acts8:21 I rilru put dân Pathian mit hmuhah a dik lo va, hêng thilah hian tel vena leh chanvo i nei ve lo." 
Acts8:22 Amaherawhchu, i sual hi sim la, Lalpa hnênah ṭawngṭai la, i ngaihtuahna sual hi a ngaidam mial mahna che." 
Acts8:23 Awhna rilru chhe tak i pu a, sualin a phuar tlat che tih ka hmu a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts8:24 Simona chuan, “I thil sawite chu eng mah ka chunga a lo thlen loh nân nangnin Lalpa hnênah mi dîlsak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts8:25 Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu an hriattîra an sawi hnu chuan, Petera leh Johana chu Jerusalem lamah an haw leh ta a. An haw pah chuan Samari rama khaw tam takah Chanchin Ṭha an hril a." 
Acts8:26 Lalpa tirh vântirhkohvin Filipa chu a bia a, “Tho la, Jerusalem aṭanga Gaza khaw zuk chhun, chhim lam thlalêr kal tlang kawngah khuan kal rawh,” a ti a." 
Acts8:27 Tichuan, a tho va, a kal ta a. Tin, Ethiopia rama mi pakhat an lalnu Kandaki hnuaia mi tilreh lal tak, a sum zawng zawng enkawltu chu Jerusalemah Pathian be tûrin a han kal a;" 
Acts8:28 a haw lamah chuan tawlailîra ṭhu chungin zâwlnei Isaia lehkhabu a chhiar a. 
Acts8:29 Thlarauvin Filipa hnênah, “Tawlailîr saw pan la, va pawh rawh,” a ti a." 
Acts8:30 Tichuan, Filipa chu a va tlân a, mi tilrehin zâwlnei Isaia lehkhabu a chhiar chu a ngaithla a, “I chhiar chu a awmzia i hria em?” a ti a." 
Acts8:31 Ani chuan, “Tu ma mi hrilh fiah lohvin engtin nge ka hriat ang?” a ti a. Filipa chu a bula ṭhu-a chuang ve tûrin a sâwm a." 
Acts8:32 Lehkha Thu a chhiar lai chu hei hi a ni: “Berâm talh tûr angin ani chu an hruai a, Berâmno a hmul mêttu hmaa a ngawi reng angin, Ani pawhin a ka a âng lo," 
Acts8:33 Tihmualpho a ni a, dik lo taka rêlsak a ni, A thlahte chanchin tuin nge la sawi ang? Khawvêl aṭangin a nun an lâksak ta si a,” tih hi." 
Acts8:34 Mi tilreh chuan Filipa hnênah, “Zâwlnei hian tu thu nge a sawi, ama thu nge mi dang thu? Mi hrilh teh,” a ti a." 
Acts8:35 Filipa chuan Lehkha Thu aṭang chuan sawi ṭanin, Isua chanchin a hrilh ta a." 
Acts8:36 Chutia kalkawnga an kal lai chuan tui awmna an thleng a, mi tilreh chuan, “En teh, heta hi tui a awm a, baptisma ka chan engin nge dâl?” a ti a." 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Tichuan, tawlailîr chu a tiding a, Filipa leh mi tilreh chu an pahnihin tuiah chuan an chhuk a; Filipa chuan a baptis ta a." 
Acts8:39 Tui ata an lo chhuah chhoh chuan Lalpa Thlarauvin Filipa chu a la bo ta a. Mi tilreh chuan a hmu ta lo va; nimahsela, hlim takin a kal ta zêl a." 
Acts8:40 Filipa chu Azota khuaah miin an lo hmu a, Kaisari khua a thlen hma chu khaw tinah a kal a, Chanchin Ṭha a hril zêl a." 
Acts9:1 Saula erawh chuan Lalpa zirtîrte chu thah atân a la vau ta zêl a. 
Acts9:2 Kawnga mite, a hmei a pa, a hmuh apiang mana, Jerusalem-a a rawn hruai theihna tûrin Damaska khaw sunagog hotute pêk tûr lehkha Puithiam lalber a va dîl a." 
Acts9:3 Damaska pana a kal laiin, a thlen dâwn ruaiah, thâwklehkhatan vân aṭangin êng a vêlin a lo êng ta phut a." 
Acts9:4 Leiah a tlu a; aw a hria a, “Saula, Saula, engati nge mi tihduhdah?” a rawn ti a." 
Acts9:5 Ani chuan, “Lalpa, tu nge i nih?” a ti a. Aw chuan, “Isua, i tihduhdah hi ka ni e;" 
Acts9:6 tho la, khuaah lût la, i tih tûr an lo hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
Acts9:7 A kalpuite chu hrilhhai takin an ding a, aw chu an hre na a, tu mah an hmu si lo." 
Acts9:8 Saula chu a lo tho va, a han meng a, eng mah a hmu thei ta lo va; tichuan, an kai a, Damaska-ah chuan an hruai lût a." 
Acts9:9 Ni thum khaw hmu lovin a awm a, eng mah a eiin a in lo." 
Acts9:10 Damaska-ah chuan zirtîr pakhat, Anania a awm a. Lalpa chu a hnênah a inlâr a, “Anani,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Lalpa, heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Acts9:11 Lalpa chuan, “Tho la, kawtthlêr, ‘ngîl,’ an tihah chuan kal la, Juda inah Tarsa khuaa mi Saula zawng chhuak rawh. Ani chu a ṭawngṭai mêk a," 
Acts9:12 mi pakhat, Anania lo lûta, a mit tivâr tûra a chunga kut a nghat a hmu a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts9:13 Anania erawh chuan, “Lalpa, chu mi chuan Jerusalem-a i mi thianghlimte nasa takin a tiduhdah tih mi tam takin mi hrilh a." 
Acts9:14 Hetah pawh i hming lamtu zawng zawng man theihna thu puithiam lalte hnên aṭanga hmua lo kal a ni asin,” a ti a." 
Acts9:15 Lalpa chuan, “Kal mai rawh, he mi hi Jentail-te, lalte leh Israel-te hnêna ka hming pu lûttu atâna ka mi ruat a ni asin." 
Acts9:16 Ka hming avângin hrehawm engtia nasa nge a la tuar dâwn amah ka la hriattîr ang,” a ti a." 
Acts9:17 Tichuan, Anania chu a chhuak a, inah chuan a va lût a, a chunga kut nghatin, “Unau Saul, i mit a vâr leh theih nân leh Thlarau Thianghlima i khah theih nân, i lo kalna kawnga i hnêna inlâr Lalpa Isua khân i hnênah mi rawn tîr a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts9:18 Thâwklehkhatah a mit a vâr leh ta a. Tichuan, a tho va, baptisma a chang ta a." 
Acts9:19 Chaw a ei a, a lo harh leh ta a. Damaska-ah chuan zirtîrte hnênah ni eng emaw zât a châm a." 
Acts9:20 Sunagog-ahte chuan Isua chu Pathian Fapa a ni tih a hril ṭan ta nghâl a. 
Acts9:21 A thu sawi hria zawng zawngin mak an ti hle a, “He mi hi Jerusalem-a he Hming lamtute tiduhdahtu kha a ni lâwm ni? Puithiam lalte hnêna hruai atân he Hming lamtute man tumin hetah pawh a lo kal a ni lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Acts9:22 Saula thu sawi chuan mi a hneh deuh deuh va, Isua chu Mesia a ni tih chiang takin a hrilh fiah ṭhin avângin Damaska-a Juda-te chu a tidang a, a tibuai zo ta a." 
Acts9:23 Ni rei tak chhûng chu Saula thah tumin Juda-te an inrâwn khâwm ṭhîn a. 
Acts9:24 Amah an phiar tih Saulan a lo hria a. Thah tumin chhûn leh zân kulh kawngkaahte an châng reng a. 
Acts9:25 Nimahsela, a zirtîrten ani chu an hruai a, zânah kulh bang pâwnah bâwmin an thlâk thla ta a." 
Acts9:26 Tin, Saulan Jerusalem a lo thlen chuan zirtîrte zînga tel a tum a, anni erawh chuan zirtîr a nih ve an ring thei lo va, an za-in an hlau hle a." 
Acts9:27 Nimahsela, Barnaba chuan tirhkohte hnênah a kalpui a, kalkawnga Lalpa a hmuha, Lalpan amah a biak thu te, Damaska-a Isua hminga huai taka thu a hril chanchin te a hrilh hlawm a." 
Acts9:28 Tichuan, Saula chu Jerusalem-ah chuan an zîngah a chêng ve ta a. Lalpa hmingin huai takin thu a hril ṭhîn a." 
Acts9:29 Grik ṭawng hmang Juda-te hnênah pawh thu a sawi a, a hnial a, anni chuan thah an lo tum ta mai a." 
Acts9:30 Unauten chu chu an hriatin Kaisari khuaah an hruai chhuk a, Tarsa khuaah an kaltîr ta daih a." 
Acts9:31 Judai ramah te, Galili ramah te, Samari ramah te, ram pumah kohhran mite chu muang takin an awm a, an intinghet deuh deuh va, Lalpa ṭih takin an khawsa a. Thlarau Thianghlimin a thlamuan a, an lo pung ta telh telh a." 
Acts9:32 Petera khaw fang chuan Luda khuaa mi thianghlimte a zu tlawh a. 
Acts9:33 Chutah chuan mi pakhat Ainia, a zen avânga kum riat lai khuma mu tawh a hmu a." 
Acts9:34 Petera chuan a hnênah, “Aini, Isua Krista chuan a tidam a che, tho la, i khum kha siam fel rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a tho ta nghâl a." 
Acts9:35 Luda leh Saron phaia awm zawng zawngten Ainia chu an hmu a, Lalpa lam an hawi ta hlawm a." 
Acts9:36 Tin, Joppa khuaah zirtîr pakhat, Tabiti a awm a, a Grik hming chu Dorki a ni, chu chu sazukla tihna a ni. Thil ṭha ti leh retheite thil pe-a inhmang zo mi a ni." 
Acts9:37 Chûng lai chuan a dam lo va, a thi ta mai a. An bual fai a, pindan chungnungah an zalh a." 
Acts9:38 Luda chu Joppa khaw kiang lawka awm a ni a. Luda khuaah Petera a awm tih zirtîrten an hriat chuan, “Khawngaih takin lo kal thuai teh,” tia ngên tûrin a hnênah mi pahnih an tîr a." 
Acts9:39 Tichuan, Petera chu a tho va, an rual chuan a kal ve ta nghâl a. A va thlen chuan pindan chungnungah an hruai chho va, hmeithai zawng zawng chu a kiangah an ding a, an ṭap a. Dorkiin a dam laia kawr leh thawmhnaw dang a siamsakte chu an entîr a." 
Acts9:40 Petera chuan an vaiin a chhuahtîr vek a, ṭhingṭhiin a ṭawngṭai a, ruang lam chu a hawi a, “Tabit, tho rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, Tabiti chu a lo meng a, Petera chu a hmu a, a ṭhuchhuak ta a." 
Acts9:41 Petera chuan a ban a, a kai tho va, mi thianghlimte leh hmeithaite chu a ko va, damin an hnênah a hruai ta a." 
Acts9:42 Chu chu Joppa khaw pum puiin an hria a, mi tam takin Lalpa an ring ta a." 
Acts9:43 Petera chu Joppa-ah chuan ni rei tak a châm a, savun siamtu Simona inah a thleng a." 
Acts10:1 Tin, Kaisari khuaah mi pakhat, Kornelia a awm a, Itali Sipai pâwl an tiha sipai za hotu a ni." 
Acts10:2 Ani chu Pathian ngaihsak mi a ni a, a chhûngte zawng zawng nên Pathian ṭih mi an ni. Juda mi retheite hnêna phal taka thilpêk pe ṭhîn mi a ni a. Pathian hnênah a ṭawngṭai fo ṭhîn." 
Acts10:3 Ni khat chu tlai dâr thum vêlah fiah takin inlârna a hmu a. Pathian tirh Vântirhkoh pakhat a hnênah a lo lût a, “Korneli,” a rawn ti a." 
Acts10:4 Kornelia chuan ani chu a en reng a, a hlau va, “Lalpa, eng nge ni?” a ti a. Vântirhkoh chuan, ‘I ṭawngṭaina leh i thil pêkte kha Pathianin a hre reng a." 
Acts10:5 Tûnah hian Joppa-ah mi tîr la, mi pakhat, Simona, Petera an tih chu kohtîr rawh." 
Acts10:6 Tuipui kamah, savun siamtu Simona inah a thleng a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts10:7 A betu Vântirhkoh chu a kal veleh, Kornelia chuan a chhiahhlawhte zînga mi pahnih leh sipai pakhat, Pathian ngaihsak tak, a tirhkah bîk ṭhinte zînga mi chu a ko va." 
Acts10:8 Thil awmzia zawng zawng chu a hrilh a, Joppa-ah chuan a tîr ta a." 
Acts10:9 Tin, a tûk chhûn laiah chûng miten khua an thlen dâwn chuan, Petera chu ṭawngṭai tûrin in chung zâwlah a lâwn chho va." 
Acts10:10 A ril a ṭâm hle a, chaw ei a duh a; mahse, ei tûr an siam lai chuan zêlin a awm ta a." 
Acts10:11 Vân inhawng a hmu a, bâwm, puan hlai tak ang, a kil li-a hlin hi leia lo uai thla a hmu a." 
Acts10:12 Bâwm chhûngah chuan ran ke pali nei te, bawkvâka kal leh tleng chi te, chunglêng sava tinrêngte a awm a." 
Acts10:13 Aw hian, “Peter, tho rawh, talh la, ei rawh,” a rawn ti a." 
Acts10:14 Petera erawh chuan, “Ni lo ve, Lalpa, thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh eng mah ka ei ngai hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Acts10:15 Aw chuan, “Pathianin a tihthianghlim tawh chu nangin bawlhhlawh ti suh,” a rawn ti leh a." 
Acts10:16 Chutiangin vawi thum a rawn ti a. Bâwm chu vâna khai chhoh a ni leh ta a. 
Acts10:17 Peteran a thil hmuh chu a ngaihna hre lova a awm lai chuan, Kornelia mi tirhte kha Simona in zâwt chhuakin, a kawt kawngkhâr bulah an lo ding a," 
Acts10:18 “Hetah hian Simon Petera a thleng em?” tiin an lo zâwt a. 
Acts10:19 Peteran a inlârna hmuh chu a ngaihtuah laiin, Thlarauvin a hnênah, “Mi pathumin an zawng a che." 
Acts10:20 Tho la, chhuk rawh, eng mah ringhlel lovin anmahni zui ang che; anni chu ka tirh an ni e,” a ti a." 
Acts10:21 Chutichuan, Petera chu a chhuk a, mite hnênah chuan, “In zawn chu ka ni e. Eng nge in lo kal chhan?” a ti a." 
Acts10:22 Anni chuan, “Pathian ṭih mi, Juda hnam zawng zawngin an fak, sipai za hotu fel tak Kornelia chu vântirhkoh thianghlimin a bia a, i thu sawi a ngaihthlâk theih nân, a ina kala sâwm tûr chein a hrilh a, keini hi min rawn tîr a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts10:23 Chu mite chu a ko lût a, a riahtîr ta a. A tûkah chuan Petera chu a tho va, chu mite chu a zui ta a, Joppa-a unau ṭhenkhatte pawhin Petera chu an zui ve a." 
Acts10:24 A tûk lehah chuan Kaisari chu an thleng ta a. Kornelia chuan a laichîn unaute leh a ṭhian ṭhate a lo sâwm khâwm a, Petera te chu an lo nghâk reng a." 
Acts10:25 Peteran in a luh dâwn chuan Kornelia chuan a lo hmuak a, a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, chibai a bûk a." 
Acts10:26 Petera chuan ani chu a kai tho va, “Tho rawh, kei pawh mihring mai ka nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts10:27 Inbe zêl chungin an lût a, mi tam tak awm khâwm chu a va hmu a." 
Acts10:28 An hnênah chuan, “Juda-te tân hnam dang zînga chêttlat leh anmahni tlawh a thian lohzia nangni ngeiin in hria e. Nimahsela, tu mah thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh ka ti tûr a ni lo tih Pathianin chiang takin mi hriattîr a ni." 
Acts10:29 Chuvângin, mi rawn sâwm veleh hnial lovin ka lo kal a nih hi. Eng nge mi rawn sâwm chhan le?” a ti a." 
Acts10:30 Kornelia chuan, “Vawiin hi a ni lina a ni ta, tûn ang hun tlai dâr thumah ka ṭawngṭai laiin, ngai teh, mi pakhat puan vâr sin ka bulah a lo ding a," 
Acts10:31 ‘Korneli, i ṭawngṭaina leh i thil pêkte Pathianin a hre reng e." 
Acts10:32 Chutichuan, Joppa-ah mi tîr la, Simon Petera kohtîr rawh. Tuipui kamah savun siamtu Simona inah a thleng a ni,’ a ti a." 
Acts10:33 Chuvângin, i hnênah mi ka rawn tîr ta nghâl a ni; i lo kal thei hi a ṭha e. Tûnah hian Lalpan thu a pêk apiang che ngaithla tûrin Pathian hmaah kan za hian kan lo awm khâwm a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts10:34 Petera chuan, “Pathianin mi duhsak bîk a neih lohzia ka hre chiang ta." 
Acts10:35 Hnam tin zîngah tu pawh amah ṭiha, thil dik taka ti apiang a lâwm zâwng mi an ni." 
Acts10:36 Israel fate hnênah Pathian chuan thu a rawn thlen a, remna Chanchin Ṭha chu Isua Krista hmangin a rawn puang ngei a; mahse, Isua chu mi zawng zawng Lalpa a ni." 
Acts10:37 Johanan baptisma thu a hril hnua Galili rama inṭan, Judai ram puma thil lo thleng thu kha in lo hre tawh phawt ang a." 
Acts10:38 Nazaret Isua chu Pathianin Thlarau Thianghlim leh thiltihtheihnain a thuam a, Pathian chuan a awmpui reng a, thil ṭha tia zin vêlin Diabola sawisak zawng zawng a tidam zêl a." 
Acts10:39 Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a a thil tih zawng zawng hretute kan ni; ani chu krawsa khêngbetin an tihlum a nih kha. 
Acts10:40 Mahse, Pathianin ni thum ni-ah a kaitho leh a, a inlârtîr a." 
Acts10:41 Mi tin hmuhah erawh chuan a inlâr lo, Pathianin hretu atâna a lo ruat lâwk keiniho chauh hian kan hmu; a thawhleh hnu khân kan eiin kan in ho va." 
Acts10:42 Chu chu tlângaupui tûr leh, Ani chu mi nung leh mitthi chunga rorêltua Pathian ruat chu a ni tih mite hriattîr tûrin thu min pe a ni." 
Acts10:43 Zâwlnei zawng zawng pawhin, amah ring apiang a hming avângin an sual ngaihdam a ni ang tih an lo hril ṭhîn a nih kha,” a ti a." 
Acts10:44 Peteran chûng thu chu a sawi laiin, a ngaithlatu zawng zawng chungah chuan Thlarau Thianghlim a lo thleng a." 
Acts10:45 Serh tanho zînga ringtu, Petera rawn zuitute chuan, Thlarau Thianghlim thilpêk, Jentail-te hnênah pawh pêk a ni ve chu mak an ti êm êm a:" 
Acts10:46 ṭawng hriat lohtea thu an sawi leh Pathian an fak chu an hre si a. 
Acts10:47 Peteran, “Hêng mite hian kan dâwn ang bawk khân Thlarau Thianghlim an dawng si a, tui hmanga baptisma an chan tuin nge khap thei ang?” a ti a." 
Acts10:48 Tichuan, Isua Krista hminga baptisma chan tûr thu a pe a. Chûng zawhah chuan châm rih tûrin an ngên a." 
Acts11:1 Judai ram tina tirhkohte leh unau awmte chuan Jentail-te pawhin Pathian thu an awih ve tih an hre ta a. 
Acts11:2 Peteran Jerusalem a thlen chhoh leh chuan, ‘serh tan a ṭûl,’ tituten an lo sawisêl a," 
Acts11:3 “Serh tan lohte i tlawh a, an zîngah chaw te i ei mai a,” an ti a." 
Acts11:4 Nimahsela, Petera chuan a bul aṭanga indawt zêlin an hnênah a hrilh fiah a." 
Acts11:5 “Joppa-ah ka awm a, ka ṭawngṭai laiin zêlin ka awm a, bâwm, puan hlai tak ang kil li-a hlin, vân ata ka bula lo uai thla ka hmu a." 
Acts11:6 Ka en reng a, ka ngaihtuah a, leia mi ran ke pali nei te, ramsa te, bawkvâk leh tleng chi te, chunglêng sava te a chhûngah chuan ka hmu a." 
Acts11:7 “Tin, awin, ‘Peter, tho la, talh la, ei rawh,’ mi han tiin ka hre bawk a." 
Acts11:8 Kei chuan, ‘Ni lo ve, Lalpa, thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh eng mah rêng ka kaah a lût ngai lo,’ ka ti a." 
Acts11:9 Vân ata aw chuan, ‘Pathianin a tihthianghlim tawh chu nangin bawlhhlawh ti suh,’ mi han ti leh a." 
Acts11:10 Chutiang hlîr chuan vawi thum a lo awm a, a vaiin vânah khai chhoh a ni leh ta a." 
Acts11:11 Chutih lai chuan mi pathum, Kaisari aṭanga ka hnêna an rawn tirhte chu ka thlen in kawtah an lo ding reng tawh a." 
Acts11:12 Thlarauvin hreh lova anmahni zui tûrin mi hrilh a. Hêng unau paruk pawh hian mi zui ve a, Kornelia inah chuan kan va lût a." 
Acts11:13 Ani chuan a ina Vântirhkoh a hmuh thu leh a hnêna, ‘Joppa-ah mi tîr la, Simon Petera kohtîr rawh," 
Acts11:14 ani chuan thu a hrilh ang chia, a thu sawi avâng chuan nang leh i chhûngte zawng zawng chhandam in ni ang,’ a tih thute mi lo hrilh a." 
Acts11:15 Thu chu ka han sawi ṭan a, Thlarau Thianghlim chu, a tîra kan chunga a lo thleng ang bawk khân an chungah a lo thleng ta a." 
Acts11:16 Lalpan, ‘Johanan tuiin a baptis ṭhîn a, nangni erawh chu Thlarau Thianghlima baptis in ni ang,’ a tihte kha ka hre chhuak leh ta a." 
Acts11:17 Keini, Lalpa Isua Krista ringtute min pêk ang thilpêk thuhmun reng Pathianin an hnênah pawh a pêk ve miau si chuan, kei tehlul hian Pathian ka hnial thei dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Acts11:18 Chûng thu an hriat chuan an ngawi ta a, “Chuti a nih chuan Pathianin Jentail-te pawh sima nung tûrin kawng a hawnsak ve ta a nih chu,” tiin Pathian an fak ta a." 
Acts11:19 Stefana avânga tihduhdahte kha Foiniki ramah te, Kupra thliarkârah te, Antiokei khaw thleng tein an kal darh a. Juda-te hnênah chauh lo chuan tu hnênah mah thu an hril lo." 
Acts11:20 An zînga ṭhenkhat chu Kupra thliarkâra mi leh Kurini khaw mite an ni a. Chûng mite chuan Antiokei an thlen chuan Grik mite hnênah pawh thu an sawi a. Lalpa Isua Chanchin Ṭha an hrilh ve ta a. 
Acts11:21 Lalpan anni chu a pui a, mi tam takin an ring a, Lalpa lam an hawi ta a." 
Acts11:22 An chanchin chu Jerusalem-a Kohhran beng a lo thleng a, anni chuan Barnaba chu Antiokei-ah an tîr ta a." 
Acts11:23 A zu thlen chuan Pathian khawngaihna hnathawh chu a hmu a, a lâwm hle a. Rinawm taka Lalpa vuan tlat tûrin an za-in a fuih a." 
Acts11:24 Barnaba chu mi ṭha tak, Thlarau Thianghlim leh rinnaa khat a ni. Tichuan, mi tam tak Lalpa hnênah hruai an ni ta a." 
Acts11:25 Tin, Barnaba chu Saula zawng tûrin Tarsa lamah a kal leh ta a." 
Acts11:26 A han hmuh chuan Antiokei-ah a rawn hruai a, kum khat zet kohhran mite zîngah an tel ve a, mi tam tak an zirtîr ṭhîn a. Antiokei khuaah hian a ni, zirtîrte chu, ‘Kristian,’ an tih hmasak ber ni." 
Acts11:27 Chûng lai chuan Jerusalem aṭangin zâwlnei ṭhenkhat Antiokei-ah an lo kal a. 
Acts11:28 An zînga mi pakhat Agaba chu a ding a, Thlarau hriattîrin ram tina ṭâmpui mitthi a tlâk tûr thu a hrilh lâwk a. Klaudia lal laiin ṭâm chu a tla ta a." 
Acts11:29 Zirtîrte chuan an theih ang tâwk ṭheuhva thawhin Judai rama unau awmte ṭanpuina thawn an tum a. 
Acts11:30 An tum ang chuan an ti a, upate hnênah Barnaba leh Saula kutah an thawn ta a." 
Acts12:1 Tin, chutih lai chuan lal Herodan kohhranho zînga mi ṭhenkhat a tiduhdah ṭan ta a." 
Acts12:2 Jakoba, Johana unaupa chu, khandaihin a sât hlum a." 
Acts12:3 Chu chuan Juda-te a tilâwm tih a hriatin Petera pawh chu man a tum leh ta zêl a (Chu chu Chhang dawidim telh loh Kût lai a ni). 
Acts12:4 Petera chu a man a, tân inah a khung a, sipai pâwl li, pali zêla inchhâwkin a vêntîr a. Kalhlên kût zawha mipui hmaa hruai chhuah a tum a ni." 
Acts12:5 Nimahsela, ani chu Kohhran miten ṭhahnemngai takin Pathian hnênah an ṭawngṭaisak a." 
Acts12:6 Herodan hruai chhuah a tum dâwn zân chuan Petera chu a bân khing hniha hlinin sipai pahnih kârah a muhîl a. A dangte chuan kawngkhâr bula dingin an vêng tlat bawk a. 
Acts12:7 Ngai teh, Lalpa tirh Vântirhkoh pakhat a lo ding a, rip chhûng chu a lo êng ta a; Petera chu a nâkah a bêng harh a, “Tho thuai rawh,” a ti a. Khaidiat pawh chu a bân ata a tla ta a." 
Acts12:8 Vântirhkoh chuan “Insiam la, i pheikhawk bun rawh,” a ti a. Chutiang chuan a ti a. Vântirhkoh chuan “I kawr ha la, mi zui rawh,” a ti leh a." 
Acts12:9 Petera chuan a zui chhuak ta a. Vântirhkoh thiltih chu a tak a ni tih a hre lo va, zêla awm emaw a inti a ni." 
Acts12:10 Vêngtu hmasa ber leh a dawttu chu an kal pêl a, khawpui lama kal chhuahna tûr thîr kawngkhâr chu an va thleng a, chu kawngkhâr chu amahin a inhawng ta a, an kal chhuak a, kawtthlêr pakhata an kal laiin vântirhkoh chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Acts12:11 Petera chu a lo harh chiang a, “Lalpan a vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a, Heroda kut ata leh Juda-ten ka chunga thleng ngei tûra an ngaih lak ata mi chhan chhuak a ni tih tûnah ka hre chiang ta,” a ti a." 
Acts12:12 Thil awmzia a hriat fiah hnu chuan, Johan Marka nu Mari inah chuan a va kal a, chutah chuan mi tam tak an awm khâwm a, an lo ṭawngṭai a." 
Acts12:12 Thil awmzia a hriat fiah hnu chuan, Johan Marka nu Mari inah chuan a va kal a, chutah chuan mi tam tak an awm khâwm a, an lo ṭawngṭai a." 
Acts12:13 Petera chuan kawngkhâr chu a kik a, nula pakhat, Rodi chu kawng hawng tûrin a va kal a." 
Acts12:14 Petera aw a hriat chuan a lâwm lutuk a, kawng hawng lovin a tlân lût leh a, kawngkhâr bulah Petera a ding tih a va hrilh a." 
Acts12:15 Anni chuan, “I â ta a nih hi,” an lo ti a. Ani chu a ṭang tlat a; mahse anni chuan, “Amah vêngtu Vântirhkoh a nih chu,” an ti leh zêl a." 
Acts12:16 Petera chuan kawngkhâr chu a kik leh ṭhîn a. Kawng an han hawn chuan amah chu an hmu ta a, mak an ti êm êm a." 
Acts12:17 Ani chuan anniho chu ngawi tûrin a kutin a zâp a, Pathianin tân in ata a hruai chhuah dânte chu a hrilh ta a. “Hêng thu hi Jakoba leh unaute va hrilh rawh u,” a ti a. A chhuak a, hmun dangah a kal ta a." 
Acts12:18 Khua a lo vâr chuan vêngtu sipaite chu, “Khawiah nge Petera a awm tâk?” tiin an buai chhe ta mai a." 
Acts12:19 Heroda pawhin a zawng chiam a; mahse, a hmu si lo va; vêngtute chu a chhuahchhâl a, anni chu tihhlum tûrin thu a pe a. Heroda chu Judai ram ata Kaisari-ah a kal chhuk a, chutah chuan a châm ta reng a." 
Acts12:20 Heroda chu Tura leh Sidon mite chungah a thinur hle a. Anni chu thu khat vuain amah be tûrin an lo kal a, lal upa Blasta chu lamṭangah an siam a. An ramin Heroda rama pûr chaw ṭhîn an nih avângin inrem an ngên a." 
Acts12:21 Inbiakna tûr ni-ah chuan Heroda chu lal kawr ha-in lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu a, an hnênah thu a sawi a." 
Acts12:22 “Pathian aw a ni, mihring aw a ni lo,” tiin mipuite chu an lo au ṭhîn a." 
Acts12:23 Ani chuan chawimawina chu Pathian hnêna a pêk loh avângin Lalpa tirh vântirhkohvin chawplehchilhin a man a, rûlhûtin a ei a, a thi ta a." 
Acts12:24 Pathian thu erawh chu a darh a, ringtu an pung ta zêl a." 
Acts12:25 Barnaba leh Saulan an rawngbâwl hna an zawh chuan Johan Marka hruaiin Jerusalem aṭangin an kîr leh ta a. 
Acts12:25 Barnaba leh Saulan an rawngbâwl hna an zawh chuan Johan Marka hruaiin Jerusalem aṭangin an kîr leh ta a. 
Acts13:1 Tin, Antiokei kohhran mite zîngah chuan zâwlneite leh zirtîrtute an awm a. Chûngte chu: Barnaba te, Sumeona, Nigera an tih te, Kurini mi Lukia te, lal Herodan unauva a neih Manaina te, Saula te an ni a." 
Acts13:2 Chaw ngheia Lalpa an biak ho laiin Thlarau Thianghlimin, “Barnaba leh Saula hi anmahni ka ruat chhan ti tûrin mi tihhransak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts13:3 Chutichuan, chaw an nghei a, an ṭawngṭai a, an chungah kut an nghat a, an tîr chhuak ta a." 
Acts13:4 Chutichuan, Thlarau Thianghlim tirh chhuahin Selukai khuaah an chhuk a, chuta ṭang chuan Kupra thliarkârah lawngin an kal a." 
Acts13:5 Salamis khua an thlen chuan Juda-ho sunagog-ahte Pathian thu an hril a. Johana pawh anmahni ṭanpuitu atân an hruai ve a. 
Acts13:6 Thliarkâr chu a pumin, Pafos khaw thlengin an fang chhuak a. Dawithiam, zâwlnei der, Juda mi pakhat, Bar-Isua an hmu a." 
Acts13:7 Chu mi chu Ramawptu fing tak Sergia Paula hnêna awm a ni. Chu Ramawptu chuan Barnaba leh Saula chu lêngah a sâwm a, Pathian thu hriat a duh a." 
Acts13:8 Eluma, dawithiam (chu chu a hming awmzia a ni) chuan Ramawptu chu rinna thu chu awih lohtîr a tum a, anni chu a lo dodâl a." 
Acts13:9 Saula, Paula an tih bawk chu, Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, ani chu a en reng a," 
Acts13:10 “Nang bumna tinrêng leh suahsualna tinrênga khatpa, nang Diabola fapa, nang thil ṭha zawng zawng dodâltu, Lalpa kawng tluang tihbuai i bâng lo vang maw?" 
Acts13:11 Hre rawh, tûnah Lalpa kut i tuar dâwn a ni, i mit a del ang a, khaw êng i hmu rih lo vang,” a ti a. Chu veleh chhûm leh thimin amah chu a bawh a, kaitu tûr zawngin a phar ta ruai a." 
Acts13:12 Ramawptu chuan chu chu a hmuhin a ring ta a, Lalpa thu an zirtîrna chuan a hneh hle a ni." 
Acts13:13 Paula leh a ṭhiante chu Pafos aṭang chuan lawngin an chhuak a, Pamfulia rama Perga khua an thleng a. Johana khân anni chu a hawsan a, Jerusalem-ah a kîr leh ta a." 
Acts13:14 Perga aṭang chuan Pisidia rama Antiokei khuaah an kal zêl a, sabat niin sunagog-ah inkhâwmin an ṭhu ve a." 
Acts13:15 Dân bu leh Zâwlnei Lehkhabu chhiar hnu chuan sunagog hotute chuan mi an tîr a, “Unaute u, min fuihna tûr thu eng emaw in neih chuan sawi rawh u,” an va ti a." 
Acts13:16 Tichuan, Paula chu a ding a, kutin a zâp a, a sawi ta a: “Nangni Israel mite leh Pathian ṭihtute u, ngaithla rawh u." 
Acts13:17 Hêng Israel mite Pathian hian kan pute kha a thlang a, an mikhualna Aigupta rama an awm chhûng khân hnam ropui takah a din a, chuta ṭang chuan a thiltihtheihna ropui tak hmangin a hruai chhuak a." 
Acts13:18 Kum sawmli chhûng lai thlalêrah dawhthei takin a hruai a. 
Acts13:19 Tin, Kanan rama hnam sarih a tihtlâwm hnu khân an ram chu a luahtîr a." 
Acts13:20 Chûng chuan kum zali leh sawmnga chhûng lai a awh a. Chûng hnuah chuan rorêltute a pe ṭhîn a, zâwlnei Samuela thleng khân." 
Acts13:21 Chumi hnu chuan lal an dîl a, Pathianin Benjamina chi a mi, Kisa fapa Saula, kum sawmli chhûng atân a pe leh a." 
Acts13:22 A lalna a tihtâwp hnuah Pathianin Davida a laltîr a, ‘Ka mi duhzâwng tak, Jesaia fapa Davida ka chhar ta, ani chuan ka duhzâwng apiang a ti ang,’ a ti a." 
Acts13:23 Chu mi thlahte zîng aṭang chuan, Pathianin a thutiam ang zêlin, Israel-ho hnênah Chhandamtu Isua a rawn pe ta a." 
Acts13:24 Isuan rawng a bâwl ṭan hmain Johanan, sima baptisma chan tûr a nih thu Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah a lo hril hmasa a." 
Acts13:25 Johana chuan, a rawngbâwlna a hlen chhuah dâwn lai khân, ‘Nangnin tu-ah nge mi ruat? Ani chu ka ni lo ve. Ngai teh u, ka hnungah a lo kal mêk a ni, a pheikhawk phelhsak tlâk pawh ka ni lo ve,’ a ti a." 
Acts13:26 “Ka unau, Abrahama thlahte leh nangni Pathian ṭih zawng zawngte u, chu Chhandamtu chanchin chu kan zaa hnênah a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Acts13:27 Jerusalem-a awmte leh an rorêltuten ani chu an hre lo va, sabat ni apianga an chhiar ṭhin zâwlneite thu an hriatthiam loh avângin ani chu thiam loh an chantîr a, zâwlneite thu chu an thlen kimtîr ta a ni." 
Acts13:28 Thihna khawp meuh a chungah eng mah an hmuh loh pawhin tihlum tûrin Pilata an ngên a. 
Acts13:29 A chanchin ziak zawng zawng kha a thlen zawhin kraws ata an la thla a, thlânah an phûm a." 
Acts13:30 Nimahsela, Pathianin ani chu mitthi zîng ata a kaitho leh ta a." 
Acts13:31 Galili ram aṭanga Jerusalem-a ama ruala chho vete hnênah ni rei tak chhûng a inlâr ṭhîn a; chûng mite chu tûnah hian Israel mite hnêna a thuhretute an ni. 
Acts13:32 Keini pawh hi Pathianin min thlahtute hnêna a lo tiam Chanchin Ṭha chu hriattîr tûr che u-in kan lo kal a ni," 
Acts13:33 keini an thlahte hnêna Isua kaithova a rawn hlen tâk thu hi. pahnihnaah: ‘Nang zawng ka fapa i ni e, Vawiin hian fa-ah ka neih ta a che,’ tih ang khân." 
Acts13:34 Tin, a ruang pawh ṭawih lova a kaihthawh tûr thu: ‘Davida hnêna ka thutiam thianghlim, Thlâwn lo tûr chu ka pe ang che,’ tia a sawi ang khân." 
Acts13:35 Chuvângin, hmun dangah pawh, ‘I mi thianghlim hi a ṭawih i phal lo vang,’ a ti bawk a." 
Acts13:36 Davida zawng a dam chhûngin Pathian duhzâwnga rawng a bâwl hnuah a muhîl a, a thlahtute bulah an phûm a, a ṭawih ral tawh alâwm." 
Acts13:37 Pathianin a kaihthawha erawh kha chu a ṭawih ve lo. 
Acts13:38 Chutichuan, unaute u, hre rawh u; amah avânga sual ngaihdamna thu hi kan rawn hrilh che u a ni. Mosia Dâna thiam in chan theih lohna zawng zawngah khân," 
Acts13:39 Isua ringtu apiang thiam chantîr an ni ta. 
Acts13:40 Chuvângin, fîmkhur rawh u, chutilo chuan, zâwlneite lehkhabua sawi kha in chungah a thleng dah ang e:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Pathian hmusittute u, en rawh u, mak ti ula, boral rawh u. In dam chhûngin thil kawng khat ka tih hi; chu thil chu miin hrilh che u mah sela, in awih chuang tawp lo vang,’ tih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts13:42 An inkhâwm bâng lo chhuak chuan sabat leha chûng thu chu sawi leh tûrin an ngên a. 
Acts13:43 Inkhâwm an ṭîn fel hnu chuan, Juda tam tak leh Juda saphun Pathian ngaihsak tam takin Paula leh Barnaba chu an zui a, anni chuan Pathian khawngaihnaa awm reng tûrin an lo fuih a." 
Acts13:44 Sabat lehah chuan Lalpa thu ngaithla tûrin a khua thawin an rawn inkhâwm a. 
Acts13:45 Nimahsela, Juda-ten mipui an hmuh chuan an îtsîk ta êm êm a; Paula thu sawi chu an hnial kalh a, nasa takin an sawichhia a." 
Acts13:46 Paula leh Barnaba chuan huai takin, “Pathian thu hi nangni hnêna hril hmasak tûr rêng a ni; nimahsela, in hnar a, chatuan nun nei tlâk lova in inngaih ahnu chuan, hre rawh u, Jentail-te lam kan hawi ang." 
Acts13:47 Chutianga ti tûrin Lalpan thu min pe a ni: ‘Jentail-te êng atân ka ruat a che, kâwlkil thlenga mite chhandamna atân,’ tih ziak ang khân,” an ti a." 
Acts13:48 Jentail-ten chu thu chu an hriat chuan an lâwm a, Lalpa chu an fak a, chatuan nun nei tûra ruat apiang chuan an ring ta a." 
Acts13:49 Lalpa thu chu chumi ram pumah chuan a darh ta a. 
Acts13:50 Nimahsela, Juda-te chuan miliannuho Pathian ngaihsakte leh khuaa mi pawimawhte chu an fuihpawrh a, Paula leh Barnaba chu an bei a, an ram ata an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Acts13:51 Anmahni an demzia tihlan nân tirhkohte chuan an kephah ata vaivut an thing thla a, Ikonion khuaah an kal ta a." 
Acts13:52 Zirtîrhote chu Thlarau Thianghlimin an khat a, an lâwm ta êm êm a." 
Acts14:1 Chutiang bawk chuan Ikonion-ah pawh Juda-te sunagog-ah tirhkohte chu an inkhâwm a, an thu sawi avângin Juda leh Grik tam takin an ring a." 
Acts14:2 Ring duh lo Juda-te chuan Jentail-te an fuihpawrh a, unaute chu an huattîr a." 
Acts14:3 Mahse, tirhkohte chu rei fe an châm a, Lalpa thu chu huai takin an hril ṭhîn a. A khawngaihna thu an hril ṭhin chu nemngheh nân Lalpan anmahni hmangin chhinchhiahna leh thil mak tam tak a ti a." 
Acts14:4 Khuaa mipuite chu an inṭhen a, a ṭhenin Juda-te an ṭan a, a ṭhenin tirhkohte an ṭan a." 
Acts14:5 Jentail-te leh Juda-te leh an rorêltute chuan, sawisak hrepa lunga den an tum tih" 
Acts14:6 tirhkohten an hriatin, Lukaoni rama Lustra khuaah te, Derbe khuaah te leh a vêl ramah te an tlânsan ta a." 
Acts14:7 Chûngahte pawh chuan Chanchin Ṭha an hril zêl a. 
Acts14:8 Tin, Lustra-ah chuan piangsual pakhat, ṭhu reng hi a awm a, a pian tirh ata kein a la kal ngai lo va." 
Acts14:9 Chu mi chuan Paula thu sawi chu a ngaithla a, Paulan ani chu a en reng a, damna tûra rinna a nei tih a hriatin," 
Acts14:10 ring takin, “I kein ding chhuak rawh,” a ti a. Ani chu a zuang tho va, kein a kal thei ta a." 
Acts14:11 Mipuiten Paula thiltih chu an hmuhin, Lukaoni ṭawngin ring takin, “Pathiante chu mihring angin kan zîngah an lo chhuk ta a nih hi!” an ti a." 
Acts14:12 Barnaba chu Zeusa an ti a, Paula chu thusawitu ber a nih avângin Hermea an ti a." 
Acts14:13 An Pathian Zeusa Tempul chu kawtchhuahah a awm a, chuta puithiam chuan bâwngpa leh pangpâr ṭhite khaw kulh kawngkaah chuan a rawn la a; mipuite nên chuan tirhkohte hnêna inthawina hlan an tum ta a." 
Acts14:14 Tirhkoh Barnaba leh Paulan chu chu an hriat chuan, an puan an pawtthlêr a, mipui zîngah chuan an zuang lût a, an au va," 
Acts14:15 “Pute u, hêng thil hi engah nge in tih? Keini pawh nangmahni ang mihring bawk kan nih hi. Hêng thil lawilo hi in hawisana, vân te, lei te, tuifinriat te leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng siamtu Pathian Nung lam in hawi theihna tûrin Isua Chanchin Ṭha kan rawn hrilh che u a ni." 
Acts14:16 Pathian chuan tûn hmain hnam tin anmahni dân anga an awm a phal a. 
Acts14:17 Chuti chung pawhin chhui chhuah theih loh tûrin amah a inthup ngai lo; a thil ṭha tihin a inhriattîr a, vân aṭangin ruah a pe che u a, a hun tê-ah in thlaite a rahtîr a, ei tûr a pe che u a, in rilru a tihlim êm êm ṭhîn a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts14:18 Chûng thu chu sawiin mipuite chu an hnêna inthawina hlân lo tûrin an khap thei ta hrâm a. 
Acts14:19 Nimahsela, Antiokei leh Ikonion aṭangin Juda ṭhenkhat an lo kal a, mipuite chu an rawn hmin a, Paula chu lungin an dêng a, a thi emaw tiin khua ata an hnûk chhuak a." 
Acts14:20 Mahse, zirtîrten an din hual laiin ani chu a lo tho va, khuaah chuan a lût leh ta a. Tin, a tûkah chuan Barnaba nên Derbe-ah an kal ta a." 
Acts14:21 Chu khuaah chuan Chanchin Ṭha an hril a, mi tam tak zirtîrah an siam hnuin Lustra-ah an kîr leh a, Ikonion-ah te, Antiokei-ah te an kal zêl a." 
Acts14:22 “Hrehawm tam tak tuarin Pathian ramah kan lût tûr a ni rêng a ni,” tiin zirtîrte rilru an tinghet a, rinna chu vuan tlat tûrin an fuih a." 
Acts14:23 Kohhran tinah upate an ruat zêl a, chaw ngheiin an ṭawngṭai a, an rin Lalpa hnênah an kawltîr zêl a." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia ram chu an fang chhuak a, Pamfulia an lo thleng leh a." 
Acts14:25 Perga-ah thu an hril a, Atalia khuaah an chhuk a;" 
Acts14:26 lawngin an kal a, Antiokei an thleng leh ta a. He khua hi an hna thawh tâk thawk tûra unauten Pathian khawngaihnaa an kawltîra, an zin chhuah ṭanna kha a ni." 
Acts14:27 An thlen chuan kohhran mite chu an ko khâwm a, Pathianin anmahni hmanga thil a tih zawng zawng leh Jentail-te tân pawh Isua rinna kawng a inhawn thu te an hrilh a." 
Acts14:28 Zirtîrte hnênah chuan rei fe an châm ta a. 
Acts15:1 Judai ram aṭangin mi ṭhenkhat an lo chhuk a, “Mosia Dân anga serh in tan kher loh chuan chhandam in ni thei lo vang,” tiin unaute chu an rawn zirtîr a." 
Acts15:2 Chutichuan, Paula leh Barnaba te nên nasa takin an inhnial a, an inkalh tlat avângin Paula leh Barnaba leh an zînga mi ṭhenkhat, Jerusalem-a tirhkohte leh upate hnêna kal chhova, chu thu chu sawi tûrin an ti ta a." 
Acts15:3 Tichuan, kohhran mite chuan an thlah a, Foiniki ram leh Samari ram an fang chhuak a, chûnga unau awmte hnênah chuan Jentail-ten Pathian thu an awih tâk thu chu an sawi zêl a; chu chuan a tilâwm hle hlawm a." 
Acts15:4 Jerusalem an han thlen chuan kohhran mite, tirhkohte leh upate chuan an lo lâwm a; Pathianin anmahni hmanga thil a tih zawng zawng an hnênah an hrilh a." 
Acts15:5 Nimahsela, Farisai pâwla mi, ringtu ṭhenkhat an ding chhuak a, “Jentail-te chu an serh tan tûr a ni a, Mosia Dân pawh zâwm tûrin phût tlat tûr a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts15:6 Chu thu ngaihtuah tûr chuan tirhkohte leh upate chu an inkhâwm a; 
Acts15:7 Rei tak an ngaihtuah hnuin Petera a ding a, an hnênah, “Unaute u, Jentailten keima ka aṭanga Chanchin Ṭha an hriata an rinna tûrin Pathianin hmâna in zîng ata mi thlan kha in hria e." 
Acts15:8 Rilru hretu Pathian chuan keini min pêk ang bawka an hnêna Thlarau Thianghlim pein, Jentail-te pawh a duh a ni tih a tihlan kha." 
Acts15:9 Keini leh anni a thlei hrang lo va, an rin avângin an rilru a tithianghlim a." 
Acts15:10 Chutichuan, min thlahtute leh keini zawh tawh loh nghâwngkawl kha, tûnah zirtîrte kova bah luihtîr tumin engati nge Pathian in hnial le?" 
Acts15:11 Anmahni ang bawkin keini pawh Lalpa Isua khawngaihna avânga chhandam tûr niin kan inring si a,” a ti a." 
Acts15:12 Tichuan, mipui zawng zawng chu an ngawi ta a, Barnaba leh Paula chuan anmahni hmanga Jentail-te zînga chhinchhiahna leh thil mak Pathianin a tihte an sawi chu an ngaithla ṭhuap a." 
Acts15:13 An ngawih tâk hnu chuan Jakoban a sawi ve a, “Unaute u, ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Acts15:14 Sumeona khân Pathianin Jentail-te ngaihsakin ama hming pu tûra an zînga mi a lâk chhuah ṭan thu a sawi a. 
Acts15:15 Chu thu leh zâwlnei thu ziak hi a inrem a ni: 
Acts15:16 ‘Chûng hnu chuan ka kîr leh ang a, Davida bâwkte chim kha ka tungding leh ang; A chhe laite ka siam ṭha ang a, ka din thar leh ang." 
Acts15:17 Tichuan, mi dangte pawhin Lalpa an zawng ang a, Jentail ka hming pu zawng zawngte nên." 
Acts15:18 Hmasâng aṭanga hêng thu hriattîrtu Lalpa chuan a ti a ni,’ tih hi." 
Acts15:19 “Chuvângin, hetiang hian ti ila ka ti a ni: Jentail-te zînga Pathian thu awihte chu tibuai lo ila;" 
Acts15:20 milem biakna thil bawlhhlawh laka inthiarfihlîm tûr te, inngaih bânsana, sa rehhlum sa leh sa thisen ei lo tûrin lehkha i thawn zâwk ang u." 
Acts15:21 Mosia Dân chu hmasâng aṭangin khaw tinah an puang a, sunagog-ah te sabat ni apiangin an chhiar ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Acts15:22 Tichuan, tirhkohte leh upate chuan, kohhran mi zawng zawng nên, an zîng ata mi thlan chhuaha, Paula leh Barnaba ruala Antiokeia tirh nghâl ṭhain an hria a. Juda, Barsaba an tih leh Sila an thlang a, anni chu unaute zînga hruaitu deuhte an ni." 
Acts15:23 Hetiang hian lehkha an ziak a, an kentîr a: “Tirhkohte leh upate leh in unaute hian, Antiokeia mi te, Suria rama mi te, leh Kilikia rama Jentail unau awmte chu chibai kan bûk e." 
Acts15:24 Kan zînga mi ṭhenkhat in hnêna lo kalin, kan thu hmu si lovin an tibuai che u a, in rilru an timangang tih kan lo hria a." 
Acts15:25 Kan duh tak Barnaba leh Paula, kan Lalpa Isua Krista hming avânga thih huamte rual hian," 
Acts15:26 thukhat vuain, kan aiawh kan thlante in hnêna rawn tirh ṭhain kan hria a." 
Acts15:27 Tichuan, Juda leh Sila hi kan rawn tîr a ni; anni pawhin hêng thu bawk hi ṭawngkain an hrilh ang che u." 
Acts15:28 Thlarau Thianghlim leh keinin hêng thil pawimawh zual lo hi chu in chungah phurrit dang nghat lo ila ṭhain kan hria. 
Acts15:29 Milem biakna thil ei lo ula, sa thisen leh sa reh hlum sa ei lo ula, inngaih bânsan bawk ula kan ti: hêng thil lakah hian in inthiar fihlîm chuan in tân a ṭha ang, Dam takin,” tiin an ziak a." 
Acts15:30 Tichuan, an kaltîr ta a, Antiokei an thleng thla a, mipui an ko khâwm a, lehkha chu an pe a." 
Acts15:31 An han chhiar a, fuihna thu avâng chuan an lâwm ta hle a." 
Acts15:32 Juda leh Sila chu zâwlnei an ni bawk a, unaute chu thu tam takin an fuih a, an tinghet a." 
Acts15:33 Rei fe an châm hnuin, anmahni tîrtute hnêna thlamuang taka kîr leh tûrin unaute chuan an hâwntîr ta a." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Paula leh Barnaba erawh chu Antiokei-ah chuan mi dang tam takte nên an awm ta reng a, Lalpa thu an hril a, an zirtîr ṭhîn a." 
Acts15:36 Ni eng emaw zât hnuah chuan Paulan Barnaba hnênah, “Kal leh ila, Lalpa thu kan hrilhna khaw tina unau awmte kha tlawh ila, engtin nge an awm tâk i kan teh ang,” a ti a." 
Acts15:37 Barnaba chuan Johan Marka kha hruai leh a duh a. 
Acts15:37 Barnaba chuan Johan Marka kha hruai leh a duh a. 
Acts15:38 Paula erawh chuan, Pamfulia ram aṭanga anmahni a kîrsana, an hnathawhnaa a kal ve zêl tâk loh avâng khân ani chu hruai leh mi niin a ngai lo va." 
Acts15:39 Tichuan, hmaisen khawpa an inhnial tâk avângin anni pawh chu an lo inṭhen ta a. Barnaba chuan Marka chu a hruai a, Kupra thliarkâr lamah lawngin an kal ta a." 
Acts15:39 Tichuan, hmaisen khawpa an inhnial tâk avângin anni pawh chu an lo inṭhen ta a. Barnaba chuan Marka chu a hruai a, Kupra thliarkâr lamah lawngin an kal ta a." 
Acts15:40 Paula erawh chuan Sila a thlang a, unauten Lalpa khawngaihnaa an kawltîr hnuin an zin chhuak ve ta a." 
Acts15:41 Suria ram leh Kilikia ram chu an fang chhuak a, kohhran mite chu an tinghet zêl a." 
Acts16:1 Derbe khua tlawhin Lustra an thleng a, chutah chuan zirtîr pakhat Timothea a awm a, a nu chu ringtu Juda a ni a, a pa erawh chu Grik mi a ni." 
Acts16:2 Lustra leh Ikonion-a unaute chuan ani chu an fak hle a. 
Acts16:3 Paulan zinpui atân a duh a, a pa chu Grik mi a ni tih an hre vek a, chûng lai vêla Juda-te avâng chuan a serh a tansak a." 
Acts16:4 Khaw tinah an kal pahin Jerusalem-a tirhkohte leh upate thu rêl kha zâwm tûrin an hrilh zêl a. 
Acts16:5 Tichuan, kohhran mite chu rinnaah an tinghet a, ni tin an pung deuh deuh a." 
Acts16:6 Asia rama thu hril lo tûrin Thlarau Thianghlimin a tih avângin Frugia leh Galatia inrina lai vêl chu an fang chhuak a. 
Acts16:7 Musia ramri an thleng a, Bithunia rama luh an tum a, chu pawh chu Isua Thlarauvin a phal lo va." 
Acts16:8 Tichuan, Musia ram chu an kal tlang a, Troas khua an thleng thla a." 
Acts16:9 Paulan zânah inlârna a hmu a, Makedonia rama mi pakhat dingin, “Makedonia ramah lo kai la, min pui rawh,” tiin a lo ngên a." 
Acts16:10 Chu inlârna chu a hmuh zawh chuan Makedonia rama kal kan tum ta nghâl a, an hnêna Chanchin Ṭha hril tûrin Pathianin min ko niin kan hre ta a." 
Acts16:11 Troas aṭang chuan lawngin kan chhuak a, tluang takin Samothraki khua kan thleng a, a tûkah Neapolis khua kan thleng leh a." 
Acts16:12 Chuta ṭang chuan Filipi khuaah kan kal a. Chu khua chu Makedonia ram bial khaw pawimawh tak, Rom sawrkâr khua a ni. Chutah chuan ni eng emaw zât kan châm a." 
Acts16:13 Sabat ni chuan kulh kawngkhâr pâwn lui kamah ṭawngṭaina hmun nia kan rinah chuan kan kal a; hmeichhe lo kal khâwmho hnênah chuan ṭhuin thu kan sawi a. 
Acts16:14 Thuatira khuaa mi nu pakhat, Ludi, Pathian ṭih, puan senduk zuartu chuan kan thu sawi a ngaithla ve a. Paula thusawite zâwm tûrin Pathianin a rilru a hawnsak a." 
Acts16:15 A chhûngte nên baptisma an chang a, “Lalpa ring takzeta mi ruat chuan, ka inah lo thleng rawh u,” tiin min ngên a, min chelh ta a." 
Acts16:16 Ni khat chu ṭawngṭaina hmuna kan kal lai chuan bawih nula pakhat, ramhuai pai, aien thiam hian min tâwk a. A aien thiam chu a pute chuan an hlâwkpui hle a." 
Acts16:17 Chu mi chuan Paula leh keini chu min zui a, “Hêng mite hi Pathian Chungnungbera bawihte an ni a, chhandamna kawng an rawn hrilh che u a nih hi,” tiin a au a au va." 
Acts16:18 Chutiang chuan ni tam tak a ti a, Paula chuan a ngaithei ta lo va, a hawi a, ramhuai hnênah chuan, “Isua Krista hmingin thu ka pe a che; a kawchhûng ata lo chhuak rawh,” a ti a. Chutih lai tak chuan a lo chhuak ta nghâl a." 
Acts16:19 A pute chuan an sum hnâr a chat ta tih an hriatin Paula leh Sila chu an man a; hotute hmaah, vântlâng pun khâwmnaah chuan an hnûk lût a." 
Acts16:20 Tichuan, rorêltute hnênah an hruai a, “Hêng mite hi Juda an ni a, kan khua an rawn tibuai a ni." 
Acts16:21 Keini Rom mite zawm ve leh tih ve thiang lo dân dang an hril a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts16:22 Tichuan, mipuite pawh chu tirhkohte bei tûrin an lo thawk ve a; rorêltute chuan an kawrte an hlihsak a, tianga vuak thu an pe a." 
Acts16:23 An vuak nek hnuah tân inah an khung a, vêngtu hnênah chuan anni chu him taka vêng tûrin thu an pe a." 
Acts16:24 Chuti taka thu an pêk khauh avâng chuan anni chu tân in chhûngrilah a khung a, an keahte thing kawl a buntîr a." 
Acts16:25 Zânlai vêlah chuan Paula leh Sila chu Pathian hnênah an ṭawngṭai a, hla an sa a, mi tângten an ngaithla a." 
Acts16:26 Thâwklehkhatah lîr nasa takin a lo nghîng a, tân in lungphûmte lamin a nghîng a, kawngkhâr zawng zawngte a inhawng a, tângho kawl bunte pawh chu a inphelh nghâl ta vek a." 
Acts16:27 Tân in vêngtu chu a lo harh a, mi tângte chu an tlân chhuak ta vek emaw a ti a, a ngûnhnâm a phawi a, intihhlum a tum a." 
Acts16:28 Paula chu ring takin a au va, “Eng mah intih suh, kan za-in hetah kan la awm vek alâwm,” a ti a." 
Acts16:29 Chu veleh êng a lam a, a zuang lût a, hlauva khûr chungin Paula leh Sila hmaah chuan a bawkkhup a." 
Acts16:30 Anni chu pâwnah a hruai chhuak a, “Pute u, chhandam ka nih theih nân eng nge ka tih tûr?” a ti a." 
Acts16:31 Anni chuan, “Lalpa Isua ring la; tichuan, chhandam i ni ang, nang leh i chhûngte nên,” an ti a." 
Acts16:32 Amah leh a ina awm zawng zawng chu Lalpa thu an hrilh a. 
Acts16:33 Chumi zân, chumi dârkâr la la chuan Paula te chu a hruai a, an vuakna hliamte chu a silsak a, an chhûngin baptisma an chang ta nghâl a." 
Acts16:34 Tin, a inah a hruai a, ei tûr a hlui a, Pathian an rin tâk avângin an chhûngin an hlim ta êm êm a." 
Acts16:35 A tûk zîngah rorêltuten, “Kha mite kha chhuah rawh,” tia hrilh tûrin tân in vêngtu hnênah pulis an tîr a." 
Acts16:36 Tân in vêngtu chuan an thu chu Paula a hrilh a, “Rorêltute chuan chhuah tûr che uin mi an rawn tîr a, tûnah lo chhuak ula, thlamuang takin kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts16:37 Nimahsela, Paula chuan an hnênah, “Rom mi kan ni a, thiam loh chang pawh kan ni si lo va, vântlâng hmuhin min vua a, tân inah min khung a. Tûnah a rûkin min chhuah an tum vei em ni? A ni tawp lo vang, anmahni ngei lo kal sela, min va hruai chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
Acts16:38 Pulis-te chuan chûng thu chu rorêltute an va hrilh a. Rom mi an ni tih an hriat chuan an hlau ta a. 
Acts16:39 An va kal a, thupha an chawi a, an hruai chhuak a, an khua ata kal chhuak tûrin an ngên a." 
Acts16:40 Tichuan, tân in ata chu an chhuak a, Ludi inah an kal a, unaute chu an hmuh chuan an thlamuan a, an chhuak ta a." 
Acts17:1 Tin, Amfipoli leh Apolonia khua an kal tlang a, Thesalonika khua an thleng a, chutah chuan Juda-te sunagog a awm a." 
Acts17:2 Paula chu a tih dân pângngaiin a inkhâwm ve a; sabat vawi thum Lehkha Thu aṭangtea chhuipuiin," 
Acts17:3 Krista chu thihna tuar tûr a nihzia leh mitthi zîng ata tho leh tûr rêng a nihzia hrilh fiahin a kawhhmuh ṭhîn a. “He Isua, a chanchin kan hrilh che u hi, Krista chu a ni e,” a ti a." 
Acts17:4 Tichuan, an zînga mi ṭhenkhatin an ring a, Paula leh Sila chu an pâwl ve ta a. Pathian ngaihsak Grik mi tam tak leh miliannu ṭhahnem takin an zui bawk a." 
Acts17:5 Juda-te chuan an îtsîk êm êm a, khawlaia mi sual tei mai maite chu an khâwm a, a khuain an chawk buai a, tirhkohte chu vântlâng hmaa hruai chhuah tumin Jasona in an rawn ṭhâwng a." 
Acts17:6 Anni chu an hmu lo va, Jasona leh unau ṭhenkhatte chu khaw hotute hnênah an hnûk lût a, “Khawvêl chawk buaitute kha hetah pawh an lo kal a," 
Acts17:7 Jasona hian a lo thleng vei a. Hêngho hian an za-in, ‘Isua, lal dang a awm,’ tiin Kaisara thu kalhin thil an ti ṭhîn a ni,” tiin an au va." 
Acts17:8 Chûng thu chuan khaw hotute leh mipui chu a tibuai hle a. 
Acts17:9 Jasona leh mi dangte hnên aṭangin an aia hrên tûr thil an la a, an chhuah ta a." 
Acts17:10 Unaute chuan a zân a zânin Paula leh Sila chu Beroia khuaah an kaltîr ta vat a. An va thlen chuan Juda-te sunagog-ah an inkhâwm a. 
Acts17:11 Anni chu Thesalonika mite ai chuan an lo inhawng zâwk a. Châk takin thu an dawng a, an thu sawi chu a dik leh dik loh fiah nân ni tin Lehkha Thute an chhiar ṭhîn." 
Acts17:12 An zînga tam takin an ring ta a, Grik miliannu te leh mipa tam tak pawhin an ring ta bawk a." 
Acts17:13 Nimahsela, Thesalonika khuaa Juda-ten Paulan Beroia khuaah pawh Pathian thu a hril tih an hriat chuan, an lo kal a, mipui an fuihpawrh a, an tibuai leh ta a." 
Acts17:14 Chutichuan, Paula chu tuipui thlengin lawnga kal tûrin unaute chuan an hruai ta nghâl a. Sila leh Timothea erawh chu an la châm zêl a." 
Acts17:15 Paula hruaitute chuan Atheni khua an hruai thleng a, Sila leh Timothea chu Paula chuan a rang thei ang bera a hnêna lo kal tûrin a chah a, an haw leh ta a." 
Acts17:16 Paulan Atheni-ah a lo nghâk a, chu khua chu pathian limin a khat tih a hmuh chuan a vei ta êm êm a." 
Acts17:17 Tichuan, sunagog-ah Juda-te leh Pathian ngaihsakte chu Pathian thu a chhuipui ṭhîn a, vântlâng punkhâwmnaa lo kalte pawh a hmuh apiang ni tin thu a sawipui bawk ṭhîn." 
Acts17:18 Tin, Epikuria mi ṭhenkhat leh Stoik mi fing ṭhenkhatte pawhin an rawn hnial a, “He bengchhengpa hian eng nge a sawi?” an ti a. Isua thu leh thawhleh thu a sawi avângin a ṭhen chuan, “Hnam dang pathiante thuhriltu a ni âwm e,” an ti a." 
Acts17:19 Tichuan, an hruai a, Areopagi-ah chuan an kalpui a. “He zirtîrna thar i sawi hi eng nge a nih kan ngaithla thei ang em?" 
Acts17:20 Kan beng hriatah thil danglam tak i rawn sawi a, chûng thil awmzia chu hriat kan duh e,” an ti a." 
Acts17:21 Atheni mi zawng zawng leh mikhualte pawh thil dang ti lo lêkin thil thar sawi leh ngaihthlâk an chîng ṭhîn rêng a. 
Acts17:22 Paula chu Areopagi-a mite hmaah chuan a ding a, a sawi a: “Nangni Atheni khaw mite u, engkimah sakhaw mi tak in ni tih ka hria." 
Acts17:23 Ka lên paha chibai in bûkate ka en laiin maichâm pakhat, a chunga, ‘Hriat loh Pathian tân, tia ziak ka hmu a. Hre lova chibai in bûk ṭhina thu chu keiin ka rawn hrilh che u a ni." 
Acts17:24 Pathian, khawvêl leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng siamtu chu, lei leh vân lal a nih avângin, kuta sak tempulahte a awm lo va." 
Acts17:25 Thil tlachhama mihringte kuta rawngbâwlsak ngai lah a ni hek lo; amah ngei chu engkim hnêna nunna te, thâwkna te leh thil zawng zawng petu a ni zâwk si a." 
Acts17:26 Lei chung hmun tina awm tûrin thlahtu pakhat aṭangin hnam tin a din a, an tân hun bi te a thliahsak a, an awmna tûr rite pawh a khamsak a." 
Acts17:27 Pathian an zawna, an dap an dapa, an hmuh fuh hlauh theih nân a ti a ni; ani chuan min hlat lo ṭheuh si a." 
Acts17:28 ‘Amah avângin kan nung, kan che, kan awm a ni si a,’ tia an sawi ang khân. Nangni zînga hla phuahtu ṭhenkhat pawhin, ‘Keini pawh a thlahte kan ni,’ tia an sawi ang kha a ni." 
Acts17:29 Tichuan, Pathian thlahte kan nih si chuan, Pathian chu rangkachak emaw, tangkarua emaw, lung emaw, mihring themthiam leh remruata chherte ang emaw hi ni-ah kan ngai tûr a ni lo." 
Acts17:30 Chutianga Pathian kan hriat loh laite kha ani chuan a haider a; mahse, tûnah hian hmun tina mi sim tawh tûrin a ti a ni." 
Acts17:31 Khawvêl pum pui hi dik taka ro a rêlsak hun tûr nî a ruat fel tawh a; a rêltu tûr pawh a ruat tawh: mi tin hriat atân chu mi chu mitthi zîng ata a kai tho a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts17:32 Mitthi zîng ata thawhlehna thu an hriat chuan, a ṭhenin an nuihzat a, a ṭhenin, “He thu hi ngaihthlâk leh kan duh e,” an ti a." 
Acts17:33 Tichuan, Paula chu an zîng ata a chhuak ta a." 
Acts17:34 Paula chu an zui zêl a, an ring ta a. Chûng zîngah chuan Areopagi rorêltu zînga mi Dionusia te, hmeichhe pakhat Damari te leh mi dang tam tak pawh an tel a." 
Acts18:1 Chûng hnu chuan Paulan Atheni a chhuahsan a, Korinth khuaah a kal ta a." 
Acts18:2 Juda mi pakhat Akuila a hmu a, ani chu Ponto rama piang a ni. Rom lal Klaudian Juda zawng zawng Rom khua ata a hnawh chhuah avângin a nupui Priskili nên Itali ram aṭanga lo thleng hlim an ni. An hnênah a lêng a," 
Acts18:3 a hna thawh ang thawk ve an nih avângin a thlen chilh a, a thawhpui ve ṭhîn a; puan in an siam ṭhîn a ni." 
Acts18:4 Sabat ni apiangin sunagog-ah thu a sawi a; Juda-te leh Grik-te chu rintîr tumin a bei ṭhîn a. 
Acts18:5 Sila leh Timothea chu Makedonia ram aṭanga an lo thlen thlâk chinah chuan Paula chu thuhril hnaah a inpumpêk ta a; Isua kha Krista chu a ni tih Juda-te hnênah a hrilh fiah ṭhîn a. 
Acts18:6 Nimahsela, Juda-ten an dodâl a, an sawichhiat tâkah chuan Paulan a puan a thing a, “In boral pawhin nangmahni mawh a ni ta e, kei zawng ka thiang ta. Tûn achinah chuan Jentail-te lam ka hawi tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Acts18:7 Chuta ṭang chuan a kal chhuak a, mi pakhat, Tita Justa inah a lût a, ani chu Pathian ngaihsak tak a ni a; a in pawh sunagog bula awm a ni." 
Acts18:8 Sunagog hotu Krispa leh a chhûngte zawng zawngin Lalpa an ring a. Korinth khuaa mi tam tak pawhin an hria a, an ring a, baptisma an chang ta a." 
Acts18:9 Zan khat chu Paulan inlârna a hmu a, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Hlau suh, ngawi lovin thu sawi zêl rawh." 
Acts18:10 Kei i hnêna ka awm avângin tina tûr chein tu man i chungah kut an lek lo vang, he khuaah hian mi tam tak ka nei si a,” a ti a." 
Acts18:11 Paula chu an zîngah Pathian thu zirtîrin kum khat leh thla ruk a awm ta a. 
Acts18:12 Galiova chu Akaia ram awptu a nih laiin Juda-ten inthurualin Paula an beih rawn a, rorêlnaah an hruai a." 
Acts18:13 “He mi hian kan Dân kalh zâwnga Pathian be tûrin mi a thlêm ṭhîn a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts18:14 Paula chuan chhân a han tum a; mahse, Galiova chuan Juda-te hnênah, “Aw Juda-te u, he thil hi thu chhia emaw, thil sual tih thu emaw ni se, in thu ka lo ngaithla tûr." 
Acts18:15 Nimahsela, thu leh hmingte leh in Dân chungchânga in buaina thu mai a nih chuan, nangnin ngaihtuah rawh u. Kei zawngin chutiang thil chu ka ngaihtuah duh lo ve,” a lo ti a." 
Acts18:16 Rorêlna in aṭang chuan a chhuahtîr ta a. 
Acts18:17 Mahse, mi dang zawng zawng chuan sunagog in hotu Sosthena chu an man ta a, rorêlnaah chuan an vua a. Chu pawh chu Galiova chuan engah mah a ngai lo va." 
Acts18:18 Paula chu ni rei tak a la châm a, chumi hnu chuan unaute chu ṭha takin a ṭhen a. Suria ram lam panin lawngin a chhuak ta a, a rual chuan Priskili leh Akuila te pawh an kal ve a. Paulan thutiam a neih avângin Kenkriai khuaah a lu a mêt a." 
Acts18:19 Efesi khua an thleng a, chutah chuan anni chu a hnutchhiah a. Sunagog-a kalin Juda-te chu Pathian thu a chhuipui a." 
Acts18:20 Anni chuan châm deuh rih tûrin an ngên a; mahse, a remti lo va." 
Acts18:21 “Pathianin rem a tih chuan in hnênah ka lo kal leh dâwn nia,” tiin ṭha takin a ṭhen a, Efesi ata chu lawngin a chhuak leh ta a." 
Acts18:22 Kaisari a thleng a, Jerusalem-ah a chho ta a, kohhran mite chibai a bûk a, chumi zawh chuan Antiokei-ah a haw ta a." 
Acts18:23 Rei fe a chawlh hnuin a kal leh a, Galatia ram leh Frugia ram a fang chhuak a, zirtîrho zawng zawngte chu a tinghet zêl a." 
Acts18:24 Tin, Juda pakhat, Apolova, Aleksandria khuaa piang chu Efesi khuaah a lo kal a, thu sawi thiam, Pathian thu hre tak a ni." 
Acts18:25 Lalpa kawng an lo hrilh tawh a, ṭhahnemngai takin Isua chanchin chiang taka sawiin mi a zirtîr ṭhîn a; mahse, Johana baptisma chauh a la hria." 
Acts18:26 Sunagog-ahte pawh huai takin thu a sawi a, a thu sawi an hriat chuan Priskili leh Akuila chuan an hruai hrang a, Pathian kawng uluk takin an hrilh fiah a." 
Acts18:27 Akaia rama kal a tum tih an hriat chuan unauten an lo puiha, amah an lo lawm theih nân zirtîrte hnênah lehkha an ziaksak a. A zuk thlen chuan ringtute chu Pathian khawngaihna azârah nasa takin a ṭanpui a." 
Acts18:28 Vântlâng hriatin Juda-te chu a hnial dang ṭhîn a: Lehkha Thu hmangin Isua chu Krista a nihzia a kawhhmuh ṭhîn. 
Acts19:1 Apolova Korinth-a a awm hlânin Paulan tlângram bial kal tlangin Efesi a lo thleng a, zirtîr ṭhenkhatte a rawn hmu a." 
Acts19:2 An hnênah, “Ringtu in nih tirh khân Thlarau Thianghlim in chang em?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Chang lo, Thlarau Thianghlim a awm tih pawh kan hre hlei nêm!” an ti a." 
Acts19:3 Ani chuan, “A nih leh eng baptisma nge in chan le?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Johana baptisma kha,” an ti a." 
Acts19:4 Paula chuan, “Johana khân sim entîr nân baptisma a chantîr ṭhîn a, a hnunga lo kal tûr Isua chu lo ring tûrin Israel mite a hrilh ṭhîn a nih kha,” a ti a." 
Acts19:5 Chu chu an hriatin Lalpa Isua hmingin baptisma an chang ta a. 
Acts19:6 Chutia Paulan an chunga kut a nghah lai chuan Thlarau Thianghlim an chungah a lo thleng a, ṭawnghriatlohvin an ṭawng a, Pathian thu te an sawi ta a." 
Acts19:7 An vaiin patling sâwm leh pahnih lai an ni.
