Acts19:8 Paula chu sunagog-ah a inkhâwm ṭhîn a, thla thum lai huai takin thu a sawi a; Pathian ram thu a chhuipui a, hmin a tum hlawm a." 
Acts19:9 Ṭhenkhat erawh chu an khauh hle a, an ring duh lo va. Mipui hmaa kawng thu an sawichhiat tâkah chuan a kalsan a, zirtîrhote chu a hruai hrang a, ni tin, Turana sikulah Pathian thu a chhuipui ṭhîn a." 
Acts19:10 Chutiang chuan kum hnih lai a ti a; chuvâng chuan, Asia rama mi zawng zawng, Juda-te leh Grik-te chuan Lalpa thu an hre ta a." 
Acts19:11 Pathianin Paula kut hmangin thil mak tam tak a ti ṭhîn a. 
Acts19:12 Chutichuan, a inhrûkna leh a puan sin lai te chu damlote hnênah an keng a, an lo dam ta a, an kawchhûng ata ramhuai bawlhhlawhte pawh an chhuak a." 
Acts19:13 Tin, thiam zuara vâk vâk Juda ṭhenkhatten, “Paula hril ṭhin Isua hmingin chhuak tûrin thu kan pe a che,” tiin ramhuai paite chungah Lalpa Isua hming an lam vei ṭhîn a." 
Acts19:14 Juda puithiam lal pakhat Skeva chuan chutiang ti ve ṭhîn fapa pasarih a nei a. 
Acts19:15 Ramhuai bawlhhlawh chuan an hnênah, “Isua ka hria, Paula pawh ka hria e; nangni hi tute nge maw in nih le?” a ti a." 
Acts19:16 Ramhuai bawlhhlawh pai chuan anni chu a zuan a, an za chuan a hneh ta a; a sawisa a, chu in aṭang chuan saruak leh hliam phungin an tlân chhuak ta a." 
Acts19:17 Chu thu chu Efesi mi zawng zawng, Juda-te leh Grik-ten an lo hriat chuan an za-in an hlau va, Lalpa Isua hming chu an chawimawi ta a." 
Acts19:18 Ringtute zînga tam tak chuan an sual rawn inpuangin an thil lo tih ṭhinte an sawi chhuak a. 
Acts19:19 Dawithiam tam tak pawhin an lehkhabute an rawn la khâwm a, mi zawng zawng hmaah an hâl a, a man an chhût a, chêng sîng nga niin an hria." 
Acts19:20 Chuti kauva nasa chuan Lalpa thu chu a darh a, a hneh ta zêl a." 
Acts19:21 Chûng hnuah chuan Paulan Makedonia ram leh Akaia ram fan chhuah zeta, Jerusalem-a kal a rilrûk a. “Chuta ka kal zawhah Rom khua pawh ka tlawh bawk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts19:22 Makedonia lamah chuan amah puitu pahnih, Timothea leh Erasta chu a kaltîr a, ani erawh chu Asia ramah chuan a la awm ta rih a." 
Acts19:23 Chûng lai chuan Kawng avângin an buai ta êm êm a. 
Acts19:24 Demetria, tangkaraw chher mi, tangkaruaa pathiannu Artemi Tempul lem siamtu chuan mi themthiam tam tak a ruai ṭhîn a, an hlâwk êm êm a." 
Acts19:25 Anni chu an thawh ang thawk ve mi dangte nên a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Pute u, he hna hi kan sum hnâr a ni tih in hria a." 
Acts19:26 Efesi-ah chauh hian ni lovin, Asia ram zawng zawng deuhthawah he Paula hian, ‘Kuta siam pathiante chu Pathian an ni lo ve,’ tiin mipui tam tak a hneh a, a hruai kawi zo ta tih nangni ngeiin in hmuin in hre bawk a." 
Acts19:27 Tichuan, kan hna thawh hi a lân ang tih a hlauhawm chauh a ni lo va, pathian ropui tak Artemi Tempul hi miten an rawn ngainêp ang a, Asia ram pum leh khawvêlin an biak ṭhin hi, a ropui tehlul nên, a tlâwm ang tih a hlauhawm bawk a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts19:28 Chûng thu chu an hriat chuan an thin a rim ta êm êm a, “Efesi-a Artemi hi ropui tak a ni,” tiin an au va." 
Acts19:29 Tichuan, a khuain an buai ta a, Gaia leh Aristarka, Makedonia ram mi, Paula zinpuite chu an man a, inthurualin ennawm siamna hmunah an tlânpui a." 
Acts19:30 Paulan mipui zînga zuan luh ve a tum a; mahse, zirtîrhoten an phal lo va." 
Acts19:31 Asia ram hotu liante zînga ṭhenkhat chu Paula ṭhiante an ni a, anni pawh chuan mi an rawn tîr a, ennawm siamna hmuna kal ve lo tûrin an rawn ngên bawk a." 
Acts19:32 Mipuite lah chu a ṭhen thu khatin an au va, a ṭhen thu dangin an au va, an kal khâwm chu an buai zo ta a, mi tam tak phei chuan an inkhâwm chhan pawh an hre lo va." 
Acts19:33 Juda-te chuan Aleksandara chu hma lamah an nawr phei avângin mipui zînga ṭhenkhat chuan amah avâng emaw an ti a. Aleksandara chuan ngawi tûrin kutin a han zâp a, mipui hnênah chuan an thiam thu sawi a tum a." 
Acts19:34 Nimahsela, ani chu Juda a ni tih an hriat veleh, dârkâr hnih dâwn lai, “Efesi-a Artemi hi ropui tak a ni,” ti hlîrin an au ta dual dual a." 
Acts19:35 Khawpui ziaktu chuan mipuite a ngawihtîr hnu chuan, “Efesi mite u, Artemi ropui tak leh a lim thianghlim vân aṭanga lo tla Tempul enkawltu chu Efesi khaw mite hi in nih tu nge hai awm?" 
Acts19:36 Hêng thil hi hnial rual a nih loh ahnu, ngawi ula, thu hnu dâwn lovin eng mah ti suh u." 
Acts19:37 Hêng in mi rawn hruaite hi Tempul rawk hmang an ni lo va, kan pathiannu sawichhetu lah an ni hek lo." 
Acts19:38 Demetria leh a ṭhianten tu lakah pawh thu pawi an neih chuan thubuai sawina a inhawng reng a, Ramawptute pawh an awm a, an thubuai chu rawn thlen ang hmiang." 
Acts19:39 Chu bâk sawi tûr in neih chuan inkhâwm pângngaiah sawi fel tûr a ni. 
Acts19:40 Vawiin thil hi hel tuma buaina siamah min puh pawh a hlauhthâwnawm alâwm, kan pun khâwm chhan sawi tûr mumal pawh kan hre si lo,” a ti a." 
Acts19:41 Chûng thu a sawi zawh chuan pungkhâwmte chu a ṭîntîr ta a. 
Acts20:1 Buai chu a reh hnuin Paulan zirtîrte a ko khâwm a, a fuih a, chibai a bûk a, Makedonia rama kal tûrin a chhuak ta a." 
Acts20:2 Chu ram chu a fang chhuak a, zirtîrhote chu nasa taka a fuih zawhin Grik ram a thleng ta a." 
Acts20:3 Thla thum a thang hnu chuan Suria ram lama lawnga haw an tum a; nimahsela, Juda-ten thah an tum avângin Makedonia ram tlawh kual zâwnga haw a tum leh ta zâwk a." 
Acts20:4 Pura fapa Sopatera, Beroia khaw mi te, Thesalonika khaw mi Aristarka leh Sekunda te, Derbe khaw mi Gaia te, Timothea te, Asia rama mi Tukika te leh Trofima ten an zui a." 
Acts20:5 Chûngho chu an kal hmasa a, Troas khuaah min lo nghâk a." 
Acts20:6 Keini pawh Chhang dawidim telh loh Kût zawhah chuan Filipi khua aṭangin lawngin kan chhuak a, ni nga hnuah Troas kan thleng ve a, chutah chuan ni sarih kan châm a." 
Acts20:7 Pathiannia chhang phel tûra kan inkhâwmin, Paula chuan a tûka kal a tum avângin an hnênah thu a sawi a, zanlai thlengin a sawi a." 
Acts20:8 In chhâwnga pindan kan inkhâwmnaah chuan khâwnvâr tam tak a awm a. 
Acts20:9 Tlangvâl pakhat, Eutuka an tih chu, tukverhah a ṭhu a, Paulan thu a sawi rei tâk êm avângin a mut a chhuak ta hle a, a muthlu a muthlu a; in chhâwng thumna aṭang chuan a tla ta a, thi-in an chhar a." 
Acts20:10 Paula chu a tlân thla a, a bawh a, a pawm a, “Thlaphâng teh suh u, a la nung e,” a ti a." 
Acts20:11 An kal chho leh a, chhang an phel a, a ei a, rei tak, khawvâr thleng zakin thukhawchâng a sawipui a; tichuan, a kal chhuak ta a." 
Acts20:12 Tlangvâl chu damin in lamah an hruai hâwng a, an thlamuang ta êm êm a." 
Acts20:13 Keini chu Asso khaw panin lawngin kan lo kal hmasa a, Paula chuan kea lo kal a tum avângin Asso khuaah lawnga lo chuantîr kan tum a, chu chu ama remruat dân a ni." 
Acts20:14 Asso khuaa min rawn fin chuan lawngah a lo chuang ve a, Mitulene khua kan thleng a." 
Acts20:15 Chuta ṭang chuan lawngin kan kal leh a, a tûkah Kio thliarkâr zâwn kan thleng a, a tûk lehah Samo thliarkâr kan lût a, a tûk lehah chuan Mileto khua kan thleng ta a." 
Acts20:16 Paulan Asia rama a awm rei loh nân Efesi chu lawnga kal pelh a tum a, a theih chuan Jerusalem-ah Pentikos Kût hman a tum a, a kal hmanhmawh deuh a ni." 
Acts20:17 Mileto aṭang chuan Efesi-ah mi a tîr a, kohhran upate a kohtîr a." 
Acts20:18 An lo thlen chuan an hnênah, “Asia ram ka luh tirh ni aṭangin in hnêna ka awm chhûng zawnga ka awm dân kha in hria e." 
Acts20:19 Juda-ten mi phiar avânga hrehawm mi delhtu phur chungin, thuhnuairawlh tak leh mittui nên Lalpa rawng ka bâwl ṭhin kha." 
Acts20:20 In tâna sâwt tûr chu eng mah zêp lovin, vântlâng zîngah leh inahte ka hrilh ṭhîn che u a, ka zirtîr bawk ṭhin che u kha." 
Acts20:21 Juda-te leh Grik-te hnênah pawh, sima Pathian lam hawi tûr leh kan Lalpa Isua ring tûrin urhsûn takin thu ka hril ṭhîn." 
Acts20:22 Tûnah hian hre rawh u; Thlarauvin mi tirh tlat avângin Jerusalem-ah ka kal dâwn a, chutah chuan ka chunga thil lo thleng tûr chin ka hre lo ve." 
Acts20:23 Amaherawhchu, Thlarau Thianghlimin lung in tân leh hrehawm tuar ka hmabâk tih chauh khaw tinah mi hrilh ṭhîn." 
Acts20:24 Lalpa Isua hnên ata ka hmuh rawngbâwl hna thawh tûr ka hmabâk, Pathian khawngaihna Chanchin Ṭha puan darh tûr hi ka hlen theih phawt chuan, ka nun pawh hi thlâkhlelh tûrah ka ngai lo." 
Acts20:25 Tûnah hian hre rawh u, nangni zawng zawng, Pathian ram thu hrila ka vah ka vah ṭhinnate hian ka hmêl in hmu leh tawh lo vang tih ka hria e." 
Acts20:26 Chuvângin, mi zawng zawng thisenah ka fihlîm tih vawiin hian ka hriattîr a che u." 
Acts20:27 Pathian remruat dân zawng zawng eng mah zêp lovin ka hrilh vek tawh che u kha. 
Acts20:28 Pathian kohhran, ama tâna thisena a lei chu châwm tûrin nangmahni leh in berâmte tân fîmkhur rawh u; Thlarau Thianghlimin an chunga hotu-ah a dah che u hi." 
Acts20:29 Ka kal hnuin chinghne kawlhte in zîngah an lo lût ang a, berâmte chu an zuah lo vang tih ka hria." 
Acts20:30 Nangni zînga mi ngei pawh hi zirtîrhote mahni lama ṭantîr tumin thu hran sawi in la awm ang. 
Acts20:31 Chuvângin, invêng ngun rawh u, kum thum meuh a chhûn a zâna mittui nên mi tin ka zilh ṭhin che u kha hre reng rawh u." 
Acts20:32 Tûnah hian Pathian hnênah leh a khawngaihna thu-ah ka hlân a che u; chu chuan a tipuitling thei che u a, mi thianghlimte zîngah rochan a neihtîr thei bawk ang che u." 
Acts20:33 Tu ma tangka emaw, rangkachak emaw, silhfên emaw ka awh ngai loh kha." 
Acts20:34 Hêng kutte hian keimah leh ka ṭhiante mamawh a thawh chhuah ṭhin kha nangmahni ngeiin in hria e. 
Acts20:35 Chutianga thawkrimin mi chak lote in ṭanpui tûr a ni tih kawng engkimah ka tihhmuh ṭhin che u kha; kan Lalpa ngeiin, ‘Lâk aiin pêk a hlâwk zâwk,’ a tih kha hre reng rawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts20:36 Chûng thu a sawi zawh chuan an za-in a ṭhingṭhitpui a, an ṭawngṭai a." 
Acts20:37 An vaiin an ṭap ta a, Paula nghâwngah an kuah a, an fâwp ngawih ngawih a." 
Acts20:38 An lung tichhetu ber chu a hmêl an hmuh leh tawh loh tûr thu a sawi chu a ni. Tichuan, lawng thlengin amah chu an thlah ta a." 
Acts21:1 Kan inthlah fel hnu chuan lawngin kan chhuak a, ngîl takin Kaw thliarkâr kan thleng a, a tûkah Rodo thliarkâr kan thleng a, chuta ṭang chuan Patara khua kan thleng a." 
Acts21:2 Foiniki rama kal tûr lawng pakhat kan hmu a, kan chuang a, kan kal leh ta a." 
Acts21:3 Kupra thliarkâr kan hmu a, vei lamah kan pêl a. Suria ram panin Tura khua kan thleng a, chutah chuan lawng bungrua thiar chhuah tûr a ni." 
Acts21:4 Zirtîrhote kan zawng chhuak a, an hnênah ni sarih kan châm a, anni chuan Thlarauvin a hrilh anga Paula chu Jerusalem-a kal lo tûrin an ti a." 
Acts21:5 Nimahsela, chûng zawhah chuan kan chhuak a, kan kal chu zirtîrte chuan an vaiin, an nupui fanaute nên kawtchhuah thlengin min thlah a, tuipui kamah chuan kan ṭhingṭhi a, kan ṭawngṭai a." 
Acts21:6 Chibai kan inbûk a, lawngah kan chuang a, anni chu in lamah an haw leh ta a." 
Acts21:7 Tura aṭang chuan lawngin Tolemai khua kan thleng a, unaute chibai kan bûk a, an hnênah ni khat kan châm a." 
Acts21:8 A tûkah kan chhuak leh a, Kaisari khua kan thleng a, Chanchin Ṭha hriltu Filipa inah kan lût a; ani chu upa pasarihte zînga mi kha a ni. A inah kan thleng ta a." 
Acts21:9 Fanu, nula thianghlim pali a nei a, Pathian thu an hril ṭhîn a." 
Acts21:10 Ni rei tak kan châm a, kan châm chhûng chuan Judai ram aṭangin zâwlnei pakhat Agaba a lo chhuk a." 
Acts21:11 Kan hnênah a lo kal a, Paula kâwnghrên chu a la a, a ke leh a kut a inphuar a, “Jerusalem-a Juda-ten hetiang hian he kâwnghrên neitu hi an phuar ang a, Jentail-te kutah an pe ang, Thlarau Thianghlimin a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts21:12 Chûng thu chu kan hriatin keini leh chu khuaa mite chuan Paula chu Jerusalem-a kal lo tûrin kan ngên chiam a. 
Acts21:13 Paula chuan, “Engtizia nge in ṭah in ṭaha, mi tihlungchhiata mi tihzâm in tum? Lalpa Isua hming avâng chuan Jerusalem-a phuar chang ka huam hlei nêm, thih pawh ka huam asin,” tiin min chhâng a." 
Acts21:14 Thlêm thlûk rual a nih loh ahnu chuan, ‘Lalpa thu thu ni rawh se,’ kan ti a, kan bâng ta a." 
Acts21:15 Chûng hnuah chuan kan insiam a, Jerusalem-ah kan chho ta a." 
Acts21:16 Kaisari khuaa zirtîr ṭhenkhatten min zui a, kan thlenna tûr Nasona inah min hruai a; ani chu Kupra thliarkâra zirtîr hmasate zînga mi a ni." 
Acts21:17 Jerusalem kan thlen chuan unauten hlim takin min lo lâwm a. 
Acts21:18 A tûkah chuan Paula hovin Jakoba hnênah kan lêng a. Kohhran upa zawng zawng pawh an lo awm a. 
Acts21:19 Paulan anni chu chibai a bûk zawhin a rawngbâwlna hmanga Pathianin Jentail-te zînga thil a tih apiang chu kimchang takin a hrilh a. 
Acts21:20 Unaute chuan chûng thu chu an hriatin Pathian an fak a. Paula hnênah chuan, “Unaupa, Juda-te zîngah ringtu an tam tâkzia i hmu a, kan Dân ngaina tak vek an ni si a." 
Acts21:21 Nangin Jentail-te zînga Juda awm zawng zawng chu Mosia Dân bânsana, an fate serh tan lo tûr leh Juda-te dân zâwm lo tûrin i zirtîr ṭhîn tih mi sawi an hria a ni." 
Acts21:22 Engtin nge ni ta ang le? I lo thleng tih an hre ngei dâwn si a. 
Acts21:23 Tichuan, i hnênah kan sawi ang hian ti ta che: Thutiam nei lai kan zîngah mipa pali an awm a." 
Acts21:24 Chûng mite chu hruai la, an zîngah inthian ve la, lu an meh man tumsak rawh; tichuan, mi zawng zawngin i chanchin an hriat hi dâwt a ni a, nangmah ngei pawh Dân zâwmin Dân ang takin i la awm zêl zâwk a ni tih an hre dâwn nia." 
Acts21:25 Jentail-te zînga ringtute chungchâng thu zawng, milem biakna thil ei lo tûr te, sa thisen ei lo tûr te, sa reh hlum sa ei lo tûr te leh, inngaih bânsan tûra kan thu rêlte kan thawn kha,” an ti a." 
Acts21:26 Tichuan, a tûkah Paulan chu mite chu a hruai a, an rual chuan a inthian ve ta a. Tin, Tempulah a lût a, an inthen zawh hun tûr ni leh an hming kima inthawina a hlansak hun tûr ni puithiam a hriattîr a." 
Acts21:27 Ni sarih a tlin dâwn ruaiin Asia rama Juda-ten Paula chu Tempulah an hmu a. Mipui zawng zawng an fuihpawrh a, Paula chu an man ta a." 
Acts21:28 “Israel mite u, min pui rawh u. He mi hi kan chi te, kan Dân te leh he hmun kalh zâwnga ram tina mi zawng zawng zirtîr ṭhîna kha a nih hi, tûnah pawh Tempulah hian Grik mite a luhpui a, he Hmun Thianghlim hi a tibawlhhlawh a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts21:29 Efesi khaw mi Trofima chu khawpuiah amah nên an hmuh hmasak tawh avângin, Paulan ani chu Tempulah a hruai lût emaw an ti a ni." 
Acts21:30 A khuain an buai zo ta a, mipui an lo tlân khâwm tup tup a; Paula chu an man a, Tempul ata an hnûk chhuak a, kawngte an khâr ta nghâl a." 
Acts21:31 Ani chu thah an tum lai chuan Jerusalem khaw pum a buai tih sipai hotu lalberin a lo hria a. 
Acts21:32 Ani chu sipaite leh sipai za hotute hruaiin an zîngah a tlân thla a. Mipui chuan sipai hotu lalber leh sipaite chu an hmuh veleh Paula vuak an bâng ta a. 
Acts21:33 Sipai hotu lalber chuan a rawn hnaih a, Paula chu a man a, khaidiat pahnihin a hlintîr a, tu nge a niha, eng nge a tih a zâwt a." 
Acts21:34 Mipui zînga a ṭhen thu khatin an au va, a ṭhen thu dangin an au bawk si a, buai avâng chuan a eng mah chu a hre chiang thei ta lo va; kulhbîng chhûngah a hruaitîr ta a." 
Acts21:35 Kailâwn an thlen chuan mipuiin an bawh nasat êm avângin Paula chu sipaiten an chawi kâng a. 
Acts21:36 Mipui tam takin, “Tiboral rawh u,” tia auvin an zui hum hum si a." 
Acts21:37 Kulhbînga an hruai luh dâwn lai chuan Paulan sipai hotu lalber hnênah, “I hnênah thu kam khat ka sawi thei ang em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Grik ṭawng i thiam a ni maw?" 
Acts21:38 Chuti chu, Aigupta mi pakhat hmân deuhva helna chawk chhuaka mi thah chîng sângli rual thlalêra hruai chhuaktu kha i ni lo maw?” a ti a." 
Acts21:39 Paula chuan, “Kei zawng, Juda mi, Kilikia rama Tarsa khaw mi ka ni, khaw narâna mi ka ni lo; khawngaih takin mipui hnênah hian thu mi sawitîr rawh,” a ti a." 
Acts21:40 A remtih veleh Paula chu kailâwnah chuan a ding a, mipui chu ngawi tûrin a kutin a zâp a, an ngawi ta ṭhuap a, Hebrai ṭawngin thu a sawi ta a." 
Acts22:1 “Unaute leh pute u, tûna in hnêna ka thiam thu sawi hi ngaithla teh u,” a han ti a." 
Acts22:2 Hebrai ṭawngin thu a sawi tih an hriat chuan an ngawi lehzual a. Ani chuan," 
Acts22:3 “Juda mi, Kilikia rama Tarsa khuaa piang ka ni; nimahsela, he khawpuia sei lian hi ka ni. Gamaliela hnênah min thlahtute Dân khermei taka zawm ka zir a, vawiina nangniho ang bawk hian Pathian tân ṭhahnem ka ngai ṭhîn a." 
Acts22:4 He kawnga mite hi tihlum hial khawpin ka tiduhdah ṭhîn a, a hmei a pain ka man a, tân inah ka khung ṭhîn." 
Acts22:5 Puithiam lalber leh upate rorêl ṭhu khâwm pawhin mi hriatpui alâwm. An hnên aṭangin Damaska khuaa unaute pêk tûr lehkha ka la a, chuta awmte chu hrem atân phuar chunga Jerusalem-a rawn hruai tûrin ka kal a." 
Acts22:6 “Tichuan, ka kal a, Damaska ka thlen dâwn ruai chuan, chhûn lai tak a ni a, vân aṭangin êng nasa tak mai ka vêlah a lo êng ta phut a." 
Acts22:7 Leiah ka tlu a, aw ka hria a, aw chuan, ‘Saula, Saula, engah nge mi tihduhdah?’ mi ti a." 
Acts22:8 Keiin, ‘Lalpa, tu nge i nih?’ ka ti a. Ani chuan ‘Isua, i tihduhdah hi ka ni,’ a ti a." 
Acts22:9 Ka ṭhiante chuan êng chu an hmu na a, mi betu aw erawh chu an hre lo." 
Acts22:10 Tin, keiin, ‘Lalpa, eng nge ka tih ang?’ ka ti a. Lalpa chuan, ‘Tho la, Damaska-ah lût rawh, tah chuan thil engkim i tih tûra ruatte chu an lo hrilh ang che,’ a ti a." 
Acts22:11 Chu êng ropui avâng chuan khua rêng ka hmu thei ta lo va, ka ṭhianten mi kai a, Damaska-ah kan lût ta a." 
Acts22:12 Mi pakhat, Anania, Dân ang thlapa Pathian be mi, chu khuaa Juda zawng zawngten an fak chu" 
Acts22:13 ka hnênah a lo kal a, ka kiangah a ding a, ka hnênah, ‘Unau Saul, i mit lo vâr rawh se,’ mi ti a. Chu veleh ka hmu leh thei ta a, amah ka han en a." 
Acts22:14 “Ani chuan, ‘Min thlahtute Pathianin a duhzâwng hriaa, Mi Feltak chu hmua, a aw ngei hre tûrin a thlang ta a che." 
Acts22:15 I thil hmuh leh hriat thu-ah khân mi zawng zawng hnênah thuhretu i ni dâwn si a. 
Acts22:16 Muangchâng lovin tho la, a hming lamin baptisma chang la, i sualte tlêng fai rawh,’ mi ti a." 
Acts22:17 “Tin, Jerusalem-a ka haw leha, Tempula ka ṭawngṭai laiin, zêlin ka awm a." 
Acts22:18 Lalpa ka hmu a, ani chuan, ‘Hmanhmawh la, Jerusalem hi chhuahsan rawh; ka chanchin i hril an pawm dâwn lo ve,’ mi ti a." 
Acts22:19 Keiin, ‘Lalpa, sunagog tina lûta, nangmah ringtute ka vuaka, tân ina ka khung ṭhin kha anmahni ngeiin an hre si a." 
Acts22:20 I thuhretu Stefana thisen an chhuah lai khân, kei pawh an zîngah ka ding a, ka remtihpui a, a thattute puan ka lo vênsak bawk a,’ ka ti a." 
Acts22:21 Ani chuan ‘Kal rawh, hla takah Jentail-te hnênah ka tîr dâwn che a ni,’ mi ti ta a,” a ti a." 
Acts22:22 Chumi a sawi thleng chuan an ngaithla a, ring takin, “Mi hetiang hrep hi khawvêl ata tiboral rawh u, nung tlâk a ni lo ve,” an ti a." 
Acts22:23 An au va, an puante an hlîp a, vaivut an vawrh a." 
Acts22:24 Sipai hotu lalber chuan Paula chu kulhbîngah a hruai luhtîr a, a chunga chuti taka an au chhan chu a hmuh chhuah theih nân hruihruala vuaka, dâwp tûrin thu a pe a." 
Acts22:25 Vuak tûra savun hruia an phuar zawhin, Paulan a kianga ding sipai za hotu hnênah, “Rom mi, thiam loh chantîr pawh la ni si lo hi vuak a thiang em ni?” a ti a." 
Acts22:26 Sipai za hotu chuan chu thu chu a hriat veleh, sipai hotu lalber hnênah a kal a, “Engtin nge i tih dâwn? He mi hi Rom mi a lo ni reng mai,” a ti a." 
Acts22:27 Sipai hotu lalber chu a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Rom mi i ni maw? Mi hrilh rawh,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
Acts22:28 Sipai hotu lalber chuan, “Kei chuan Rom mi nihna nei tûrin sum tam tak ka sêng asin,” a ti a. Paula erawh chuan, “Kei zawng Rom mi rênga piang ka ni,” a ti a." 
Acts22:29 Tichuan, sawisa chunga dâwp tumte chuan Paula chu an ṭînsan ta nghâl a, sipai hotu lalber pawh chuan Rom mi a lo phuar mai tih a han hriatin a hlauthâwng hle a." 
Acts22:30 A tûkah chuan Juda-ten Paula chungah thu eng nge an neih hriat chian tumin, sipai hotu lalber chuan puithiam lalte leh Sanhedrin mite inkhâwm tûrin thu a pe a. Paula chu a phelh a, a hruai chhuk a, an hmaah a dintîr a." 
Acts23:1 Paula chuan rorêltute chu a han en chiang a, “Unaute u, vawiin thleng hian Pathian hmaa ka awm dânah, ka chhia leh ṭha hriatnaah mahni inthiam lohna eng mah ka nei lo,” a ti a." 
Acts23:2 Puithiam lalber Anania chuan Paula kianga dingte hnênah, “A ka kha bensak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Acts23:3 Paula chuan, “Nang, bang hnawih vârpa. Pathianin a bêng zâwk ang che. Dân anga mi ngaihtuah tûrin i ṭhu a, dân lo anga mi ben tûr i ti maw?” a ti a." 
Acts23:4 A kianga dingte chuan, “Puithiam lalber i hau vei maw?” an ti a." 
Acts23:5 Paula chuan, “Puithiam lalber a ni tih ka hre lo va ni, ‘In hnam rorêltu chungah thu ṭha lo sawi suh,’ tih ziak a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Acts23:6 Paulan a ṭhen Sadukai te, a ṭhen Farisai te an ni tih a hria a, Sanhedrin-ah chuan a au va, “Unaute u, kei pawh Farisai ka ni a, Farisai fapa pawh ka ni. Mitthi thawhleh beiseina thu-ah rorêlna hmaah ka ding a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts23:7 Chu chu a sawi zawh chuan Farisai-te leh Sadukai-te chu an inhnial a, Sanhedrin mite chu an inṭhen ta a." 
Acts23:8 Sadukai-te chuan, “Thawhlehna rêng a awm lo, vântirhkoh te, thlarau te pawh a awm hek lo,” an ti a. Farisai-te erawh chuan chûng chu an ring si a." 
Acts23:9 Tichuan, an râwl a ring ta hle a, Farisai lama mi Dân zirtîrtu ṭhenkhat an ding a, an ṭang ta tlat a, “He mi chungah hian thil dik lo eng mah kan hmu lo ve, Thlarauvin emaw, vântirhkohvin emaw an bia a ni mahna,” an ti a." 
Acts23:10 An inhnial nasat deuh deuh avângin, sipai hotu lalber chuan Paula chu an pawh sawm a hlau va, zuk kala, an zîng ata Paula la chhuaka, kulhbînga hruai tûrin sipaite chu thu a pe a." 
Acts23:11 Chumi zân chuan Lalpa chu Paula kiangah a lo ding a, “Huai takin awm rawh; Jerusalem-a ka thu i hril ang bawk hian, Rom khuaah pawh i hril tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts23:12 A tûk zîngah chuan Juda-te chu Paula phiarin an inkhâwm a, an thah hma chu eng mah eia in lo tûrin chhia an chham a." 
Acts23:13 Chutianga phiartute chu sawmli aia tam mah an ni. 
Acts23:14 Puithiam lalte leh upate hnênah an kal a, “Paula kan thah hma chuan eng mah ei lo tûrin chhia kan chham ta vek a ni." 
Acts23:15 Chuvângin, tûnah nangni leh rorêltuten a thu chiang lehzuala ngaihtuah tum angin, Paula chu in hnêna hruai thla tûrin sipai hotu lalber hnênah han sawi rawh u; a lo thlen thlâk hmaa that tûrin kan inpeih reng a ni,” an ti a." 
Acts23:16 Nimahsela, Paula farnua fapain thah tuma an lo chân rûk tûr thu chu a lo hria a, a han kal a, kulhbîng chhûngah a lût a, Paula a hrilh a." 
Acts23:17 Paula chuan sipai zahotu zînga pakhat a ko va, “He tlangvâl hian sipai hotu lalber hnênah thu eng emaw sawi tûr a nei e,” a ti a." 
Acts23:18 Tichuan, sipai hotu lalber hnênah chuan a va hruai a, “Mi tâng, Paula khân mi ko va, he tlangvâl hi i hnêna rawn hruai tûrin mi ngên a, i hnênah thu eng emaw sawi tûr a nei a ni âwm e,” a ti a." 
Acts23:19 Sipai hotu lalber chuan a kutah a vuan a, a kai hrang a, a rûkin, “Eng nge mi hrilh tûr i neih chu?” a ti a." 
Acts23:20 Ani chuan, “Paula thu hi chiang lehzuala ngaihtuah tûr angin naktûkah Sanhedrin hmaa hruai chhuk tûrin Juda-ten dîl che an remti tlâng a." 
Acts23:21 Nimahsela, an thu lo awih suh ang che. An zînga mi sawmli aia tamin an châng reng a, chu mite chuan an thah hma chu eng mah eia in lo tûrin chhia an chham a. Tûnah hian i thu nghâkin inpeih sa-in an awm reng a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts23:22 Sipai hotu lalber chuan tlangvâl chu a kaltîr a, “Hêng thu hi mi hrilh tih tu hnênah mah sawi suh ang che,” a ti tlat a." 
Acts23:23 Sipai za hotu pahnih a ko va, “Kaisari-ah zânin dâr kuaa kal tûrin sipai zahnih leh sakawr chungchuang mi sawmsarih leh fei keng mi zahnih buatsaih rawh u." 
Acts23:24 Tin, Paula chuanna tûr sakawrte buatsaih bawk ula, him takin Ramawptu Felika hnên in thlen tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts23:25 Hetiang hian lehkha a ziak a. 
Acts23:26 “Klaudia Lusian ramawptu zahawm ber Felika chibai a bûk e. 
Acts23:27 He mi hi Juda-ten an man a, an thah dâwn laiin sipaite hruaiin ka zuk kal a, Rom mi a ni tih ka hriatin ka chhan chhuak a." 
Acts23:28 Tin, tihhlum an duh chhan hriat ka duh a, an Sanhedrin hmaah ka hruai a." 
Acts23:29 An Dân engahte emaw hêk a ni tih ka hmu a; nimahsela, thihna khawp meuh emaw, tânna khawp meuh emaw eng mah a tih ka hre thei si lo." 
Acts23:30 Juda-ten thah tumin an phiar ru tih miin mi hrilh veleh i hnênah ka rawn tîr ta nghâl a ni: a hêktute pawh a chunga thu pawi an neih apiang i hnêna sawi tûrin ka hriattîr tawh e,” tiin." 
Acts23:31 Chutichuan, sipaite chuan thupêk angin a zân a zânin Paula chu an hruai a, Antipatri khua an thleng a." 
Acts23:32 A tûkah chuan sakawr chunga chuang mite chu Paula hruai zêl tûrin an kal a, sipai dangte chuan an kîrsan a, kulhbîng lamah an haw leh ta a." 
Acts23:33 Anni chuan Kaisari chu an thleng a, Ramawptu hnênah lehkha chu an pe a, Paula pawh a hmaah an dintîr a." 
Acts23:34 Ramawptu chuan a chhiar zawhin, khawi lama mi nge a nih a zâwt a, Kilikia rama mi a ni tih a hre ta a." 
Acts23:35 “Nangmah hêktute an lo thlen hunah i thu ka ngaihtuah ang,” a ti a; Heroda ina daha vên tûr thu a pe a." 
Acts24:1 Ni nga hnuah chuan puithiam lalber Anania leh upa ṭhenkhatte chu ukil pakhat Tertula hruaiin an lo thleng a, Paula chu Ramawptu hmaah an khing ta a." 
Acts24:2 Paula an koh chhuah hnu chuan Tertula chuan an khinna thu a han sawi ta a: “Felik zahawm ber, nangma zârah thlamuang takin rei tak kan lo awm ta a, i finna avângin he rama mite tân hian thil ṭha lo tak tak te chu," 
Acts24:3 kawng tinrêngin hmun tinah siam ṭhat a lo ni ta hi ṭha kan ti a, kan lâwm takmeuh a ni." 
Acts24:4 I tân ninawm ka nih loh nân tawi têin ka han sawi ang e, khawngaih taka min ngaihthlâksak tûrin ka ngên a che." 
Acts24:5 He pa hi mi hnawksak tak, ram tina Juda zawng zawng zînga buaina tichhuaktu, Nazaret pâwl hotu ber a ni tih kan hria a." 
Acts24:6 Tempul pawh tihbawlhhlawh a tum a, kan man ta a ni." 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Nangmah ngeiin chhâl la, kan hêkna zawng zawng hi a hnên aṭangin i hre chiang thei ang,” a ti a." 
Acts24:9 Juda-te pawhin a hêkna chu an lo thlâwp a, ‘chutiang chu a ni’ an lo ti a." 
Acts24:10 Ramawptu chuan thu sawi tûra a han mitmei veleh Paula chuan, “He chite rorêltuah hian kum tam tak i ṭan tawh avângin ngaihṭha takin ka thiam thu ka sawi dâwn a ni." 
Acts24:11 Jerusalem-a Pathian be tûra ka han kal chu ni sâwm leh ni hnih lo liam a la ni lo tih i hre thei ang. 
Acts24:12 Tempulah emaw, sunagog-ah emaw, khawpui khawi laiah mah mi ka hnial leh buaina siam tûra mi ka fuihpawrh tu man an hre lo." 
Acts24:13 Tûna an mi hêkna pawh hi a bulbâl i hnêna sawi tûr eng mah an hre hek lo vang. 
Acts24:14 Thil pakhat ka hrilh ang che. ‘Pâwl hrang,’ an tih Kawng thu angin min thlahtute Pathian ka be ṭhîn a, Dân leh zâwlneite Lehkhabu ziak zawng zawng ka ring tho va." 
Acts24:15 Pathian ka ring a, mi fel leh fel lote thawhlehna a awm ka ring bawk a; chu chu anmahni ngei pawhin an ring ve si a." 
Acts24:16 Chuvângin, eng lai pawha Pathian leh mihring hmaa sawisêl kai lo, chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang neih ka tum hrâm hrâm ṭhîn a ni." 
Acts24:17 “Kum tam tak ka thang bo hnuah, ka chipuite chhawmdâwlna pe tûr leh inthawina hlân tûrin Jerusalem-ah ka han kal a." 
Acts24:18 Chutianga ka ti lai chu Tempulah mi hmu a; mahse, mipui punkhâwmna a awm lo va, buaina a awm hek lo." 
Acts24:19 Asia rama mi Juda ṭhenkhat an awm ve a, chûngte chuan ka chunga thu pawi an neih chuan hetah lo kalin i hmaah mi hêk rawh se." 
Acts24:20 A nih loh leh heta lo kalte hian Sanhedrin hmaa ka din lai khân eng nge ka tihsual an sawi tûr a ni; 
Acts24:21 an hmaa ka din laia he thu kam khat, ‘Mitthi thawhlehna thu-ah vawiin hian in hmaah chhâlin ka awm a nih hi,’ ka tih kha a nih nghâl loh chuan,” a ti a." 
Acts24:22 Felika chuan Kawng thu chu a lo hre hle tawh a, “Sipai hotu lalber Lusia a lo thlen thlâk hunah i thu ka la ngaihtuah ang e,” a ti a, an thu chu a dah ta rih a." 
Acts24:23 Paula chu zalên deuhva awmtîra, a ṭhianten a rawng an bâwlsak pawh khap lova vêng tûrin sipai za hotu chu thu a pe a." 
Acts24:24 Tin, ni eng emaw zât hnuah Felika chu a nupui Drusili, Juda mi hruaiin a lo kal a, Paula chu a kohtîr a, Krista Isua rinna thu a sawi chu a ngaithla a." 
Acts24:25 Thiam chantîrna thu te, insûm theihna thu te, rorêlna lo awm tûr thu te Paulan a sawi lai chuan Felika chuan hlauhawm a ti hle a, “Kal leh ta rih la, hun remchâng ka neih hunah ka la rawn ko vang che,” a ti a." 
Acts24:26 Paulan tangka a pêk a beisei tel bawk a; chuvângin, a ko fo va, a be ṭhîn a ni." 
Acts24:27 Kum hnih a vei hnu chuan Felika chu Porkia Festan a thlâk a. Felika chuan Juda-te tihlâwm a duh a, Paula chu lung inah a hnutchhiah ta a." 
Acts25:1 Festa chuan ram a awp aṭanga ni thum hnuah chuan Kaisari aṭangin Jerusalem-ah a han kal a. 
Acts25:2 Puithiam lalte leh Juda-te chuan Paula nêna an thubuai chu an lo hrilh a. 
Acts25:3 “Khawngaih takin Jerusalemah han hruaitîr rawh,” tiin an lo ngên a, kawng laka lo chân rûka thah an tum a ni." 
Acts25:4 Festa chuan, “Paula chu Kaisari lung inah a awm reng a, kei pawh ka haw thla thuai dâwn a," 
Acts25:5 sualna a neih chuan in hotuten mi zui thla sela, hêk rawh se,” a ti a." 
Acts25:6 An zîngah chuan ni riat emaw, ni sâwm emaw vêl a châm a. Kaisari-ah a haw thla leh ta a. A tûkah chuan rorêlna ṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu a, Paula chu a hruaitîr a." 
Acts25:7 A lo thlen chuan Jerusalem aṭanga Juda lo chhukte chu a vêlah an ding a, thu lian fe fe tam takin an hêk a; mahse, an hêknate chu a dik a ni tih an finfiah thei si lo." 
Acts25:8 Paula chuan a thiam thu a sawi ve a, “Juda-te Dân ka bawhchhe lo va, Tempul ka tibawlhhlawh lo va, Kaisara pawi eng mah ka sawi hek lo,” a ti a." 
Acts25:9 Festa chuan Juda-te lakah tlâktlum a duh a, Paula hnênah chuan, “Jerusalem-a chhohva ka hmaa in thu hi rem i duh em?” a ti a." 
Acts25:10 Paula erawh chuan, “Kaisara rorêlna ṭhutthlêng hmaah ka ding a, hetah ngei hian rêlsak tûr ka ni. Juda-te chungah thil eng mah ka tisual lo tih nangmah ngeiin chiang takin i hria a." 
Acts25:11 Thil sual ka tiha, thihna khawp meuh thil ti ka nih chuan thih ka hnial lo ve. Nimahsela, hêngho mi hêkna hi engmahlo mai a nih si chuan, anni lâwm nân an hnênah tu man mi pe tûr a ni lo. Kan thu hi Kaisara hnêna thlen ka ngên e,” a ti a." 
Acts25:12 Festa chuan a rorêlpuite a biakrâwn hnu chuan, “Kaisara hnêna thlen i duh chuan Kaisara hnênah kal ang che,” a ti a." 
Acts25:13 Ni eng emaw zât a ral hnu chuan Lal Agripa leh Berniki chu Kaisari-ah Festa lâwm tûrin an lo kal a. 
Acts25:14 Ni tam tak an châm a, Festa chuan Paula chungchâng thu chu lal a hrilh a, “Felika khân mi tâng pakhat a hnutchhiah a," 
Acts25:15 Jerusalem-a ka han kalin Juda Puithiam lalte leh an upaten a thu chu mi lo hrilh a, thiam loh chantîr tûrin mi lo ngên a." 
Acts25:16 Kei chuan an hnênah, ‘Mi tu mah, amah hêktute nên inhmatawna an inchhâl hmaa thiam loh chantîr mai chu Rom sawrkâr dân a ni lo ve,’ ka ti a." 
Acts25:17 Hetah an lo chhuk a, muang lovin a tûkah rorêlna ṭhutthlêngah ka ṭhu a, chu mi chu ka kohtîr a." 
Acts25:18 A hêktute chu a kiangah an ding a, ka rin ang he huin eng mah thu pawi an sawi ta mang si lo va." 
Acts25:19 Anmahni sakhaw thu leh mi pakhat thi tawh, Paulan a nung leha a sawi, Isua chungthu-ah an buai a lo ni lek a." 
Acts25:20 Keiin chûng thu chu ka ngaihtuah thiam zâwng pawh niin ka hre lo va, Jerusalem-a han kala, an thu chu han rêlsak a duh leh duh loh ka zâwt a." 
Acts25:21 Nimahsela, Paulan amah ṭha taka vên leh an thu Lalber hnêna thlen a ngên ta zâwk a. Chuvângin, Kaisara hnêna ka tirh theih hma chu vêng ṭha tûrin thu ka pe a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts25:22 Agripa chuan Festa hnênah, “Kei pawh chu mi thu sawi chu ngaihthlâk ka duh asin,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Naktûkah i ngaithla dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Acts25:23 A tûkah chuan Agripa leh Berniki chu ropui takin an lo kal a, thusawina inah an lût a, sipai hotu liante leh khuaa mi pawimawh deuh deuhte pawh an tel ve a. Festa thupêkin Paula chu an rawn hruai lût a." 
Acts25:24 Festa chuan, “Lal Agripa leh heta kan zînga awm zawng zawngte u, Juda mipui zawng zawngten ‘Nung tlâk a ni lo ve,’ tia an au va, Jerusalem-ah leh heta a chungchâng thu ka hnêna an sawi chu he mi in hmuha hi a ni." 
Acts25:25 Nimahsela, kei chuan thihna khawp meuh eng mah a tih ka hmu lo va, amahin Lalber hnêna thlen a duh avângin tirh ka tum ta a ni." 
Acts25:26 Amaherawhchu, Lalber hnêna thlen tûr thu mumal tak eng mah ziak tûr ka hre si lo va; chuvângin, in hmaah ka rawn hruai chhuak a ni; Lal Agrip, i hnêna han hruai bîk deuh ka ni a, chhâl a nih hnua eng emaw ziak tûr ka hriat theih nân." 
Acts25:27 Amah an hêkna chiang taka ziak lova lalber hnêna mi tâng tirh chu âwmin ka hre si lo va,” a ti a." 
Acts26:1 Agripa chuan Paula hnênah, “I thiam thu i sawi thei e,” a ti a. Chu veleh Paula chuan a kut a phar a, a thiam thu a sawi ta a." 
Acts26:2 “Lal Agrip, vawiinah hian i hmaah Juda-te mi hêkna zawng zawnga ka thiam thu ka sawi dâwn avângin vânnei ka inti hle mai." 
Acts26:3 Juda-te khawsak dân leh an inkhin ṭhin dânte i hriat êm avângin vânnei ka inti lehzual a ni. Chuvângin, dawhthei taka ka thu mi ngaihthlâksak tûrin ka ngên a che." 
Acts26:4 Ka tleirâwl tirh aṭang tawhin ka chipuite zîngah leh Jerusalem-a ka awm dân chu a tîr ata Juda-te zawng zawngin an hria e. 
Acts26:5 An sawi duh chuan hmân aṭanga kan sakhaw pâwl khermei ber Farisai zînga mi ka nih te pawh an hria ang. 
Acts26:6 Min thlahtute hnêna a thutiam kha Pathianin a hlen ka beisei thu-ah tûnah hian rorêlna hmaah ka ding a nih hi. 
Acts26:7 Chu thutiam chu hmuh beiseiin kan hnam sâwm leh pahnihte chuan a chhûn a zânin ṭhahnemngai takin rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a ni. Aw, Lal Agrip, chutiang beiseina avâng chuan Juda-te hian mi hêk a ni." 
Acts26:8 “Nangni hian engtizia nge Pathianin mitthite a kaihthawh in rin loh? 
Acts26:9 Kei ngei pawhin Nazaret Isua hming kalh zâwnga theihtâwp chhuah tûr niin ka lo inngai a. 
Acts26:10 Chutiang chuan Jerusalem-ah ka ti ṭhîn a, puithiam lalte hnên aṭanga thu lain mi thianghlimte zînga mi tam tak tân inahte ka khung a, tihhlum an tum pawhin ka remtihpui bawk ṭhîn." 
Acts26:11 Sunagog tinah Isua sawichhiattîr tumin ka hrem fo va, an lakah ka kawlh êm êm a, ram dang khaw thleng thlengin ka tiduhdah ṭhîn." 
Acts26:12 “Chutiang ti tûr chuan puithiam lalte hnên aṭanga thu hmu leh an thupêk kengin Damaska ka pan a. 
Acts26:13 Tichuan, Lal Agrip, kawnga kan kal lai chuan chhûn laiah vân aṭanga êng, ni aia êng ka hmu a, chu chuan kei leh ka kalpuite chu min rawn chhun a." 
Acts26:14 Leiah kan tlu ta vek a, awin Hebrai ṭawngin, ‘Saula, Saula, engati nge mi tihduhdah? Chhunna tiang khen hi i tân a na thlâwn mai mai a ni,’ mi rawn tiin ka hria a." 
Acts26:15 “Kei chuan, ‘Lalpa, tu nge i nih?’ ka ti a. Lalpa chuan, ‘Isua, i tihduhdah hi ka ni." 
Acts26:16 Tho la, i kein ding rawh; ka rawngbâwltu atâna ruat tûr chein i hnênah ka rawn inlâr a ni. Mi hmuh thu leh thil ka la entîr tûr che hi mite i hrilh tûr a ni." 
Acts26:17 Juda-te leh Jentail-te hnênah ka tîr ang che a, an lak ata ka chhan chhuak ang che." 
Acts26:18 Kei mi rin avânga an sualte ngaihdam an nih theih nân leh, mi thianghlimte zînga rochan an neih ve theihna tûrin. An mit tivârtu tûr te, thim ata eng lama hawi kîrtîr tûr leh Setana thuhnuai ata Pathian lama hawi kîrtîr tûra ruat i ni e,’ mi ti a." 
Acts26:19 “Chuta ṭang chuan, Lal Agrip, vân inlârna chu ka zâwm ta a." 
Acts26:20 Tichuan, Damaska mite hnêna sawi ṭanin, Jerusalem-a mite hnênah te, Judai rama mi zawng zawng leh Jentail-te hnênah sima Pathian lam an hawia, an sim takzet a ni tih a lan nâna thil an tihna tûrin thu ka hril ṭhîn a ni." 
Acts26:21 Chumi avâng chuan Tempula ka awm laiin Juda-ten mi man a, mi thah an tum a." 
Acts26:22 Nimahsela, Pathianin mi ṭanpui avângin vawiin thleng pawh hian mi lian leh mi tête hnêna thu hril tûrin ka la ding thei a ni. Zâwlneite leh Mosian thil lo thleng tûr an sawi bâk eng mah ka sawi lo." 
Acts26:23 ‘Krista chuan a tuar ang a, mitthi zîng ata thawh hmahruaitu a ni ang a, Juda-te leh Jentail-te hnênah êng thu a hriattîr ang,’ tia an sawi loh hi chu eng mah dang ka sawi lo,” a ti a." 
Acts26:24 Chutianga thiam thu a sawi lai chuan Festa chu ring takin a au va, “Paula, i â ta a ni e, i zir tam hi i ât phah a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts26:25 Nimahsela, Paula chuan, “Festa zahawm ber, ka â lo asin; thu dik tak leh thu fing tak ka sawi zâwk a ni." 
Acts26:26 Hêng thil hi lal pawhin a hria e, a hnênah pawh huai takin ka sawi hi; a hriat loh pakhat mah a awm lo tih ka hria; hêng thil hi a rûka tih a ni si lo va." 
Acts26:27 Lal Agrip, zâwlneite thu i ring em? I ring tih ka hria e,” a ti a." 
Acts26:28 Agripa chuan Paula hnênah, “Rei lo te chhûnga Kristiana mi siam i tum a ni maw?” a ti a." 
Acts26:29 Paulan, “Rei se, rei suh se, nang chauh ni lovin, vawiina ka thu ngaithlatute zawng zawng pawh hi keimah anga awm tûrin Pathian hnênah ka dîl a ni, kawl erawh hi chu bun ve lovin,” a ti a." 
Acts26:30 Tichuan, lal te, Ramawptu te, Berniki te leh an ṭhutpuite chu an tho va." 
Acts26:31 An kal hrang a, an inbia a, “He mi hian thihna khawp emaw, tânna khawp emaw eng mah zawng a tih loh hi,” an ti a." 
Acts26:32 Agripa chuan Festa hnênah, “He mi hian Kaisara hnêna thlen dîl lo sela chuan chhuah mai theih a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts27:1 Tin, Itali rama lawnga kal tûra min tih veleh, Paula leh mi tâng dang ṭhenkhatte chu Augasta Sipai pâwl an tiha mi sipai za hotu Julia kutah an hlân a." 
Acts27:2 Adramuteno khaw lawng, tuifinriat kama Asia ram khuate tlawh tûrah chuan kan chuang a, kan kal ta a; Makedonia rama Thesalonika khaw mi Aristarka pawh a tel ve a." 
Acts27:3 A tûkah chuan Sidon khua kan thleng a, Julia chuan Paula chu a tiṭha hle a, a ṭhiante hnêna lênga a châkkhai lam te a phalsak a." 
Acts27:4 Chuta ṭangin lawng chuan kan kal zêl a, thliin a ni lo zâwnga min nem avângin Kupra thliarkâr phên thli ûp lamah kan kal a." 
Acts27:5 Kilikia ram leh Pamfulia ram dep tuipui kan pelh hnuin, Lukia rama Mura khua kan thleng a." 
Acts27:6 Chutah chuan sipai za hotu chuan Aleksandria khaw lawng, Itali rama kal tûr a hmu a, chu lawngah chuan min chuantîr a." 
Acts27:7 Ni rei tak zawi zawiin kan kal a, harsa takin Nido khaw zâwn kan thleng hrâm a. A lêt zâwnga thliin min nem avângin Kret thliarkâr phên thli ûp lamah kan kal kual a. Kret thliarkâr hmâwr zum Salmoni an tih chu kan pêl a." 
Acts27:8 Harsa takin vaukam kan hrût a, hmun pakhat, lawng chawlh hmun Mawi, an tih chu kan thleng a, chu chu Lasai khaw kianga awm a ni." 
Acts27:9 Ni rei fe kan châm hnu chuan Chawnghei hun a pêl ta bawk a, lawnga kal zêl a hlauhawm hle tawh avângin anni chu Paulan thu a râwn a," 
Acts27:10 an hnênah, “Pute u, tûna kan kal zêl chuan chhiatna nasa tak kan tâwk dâwn tih ka hria; lawng leh a bungraw phurh chauh ni lovin, keini lawnga chuangte tân pawh boral a hlauhawm a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts27:11 Nimahsela, sipai za hotu chuan Paula thu sawi ai chuan lawngpu leh lawng neitu thu chu a awih ta zâwk a." 
Acts27:12 Thlasik tuar nân chu lawng chawlhna chu a remchân loh avângin mi tam zâwkin kal chhuaha, Foiniki khua thlen hrâm a, chuta thlasik tuar chu an duh a. Foiniki khua chu Kret thliarkâra lawng chawlhna pakhat a ni, chhimthlang leh hmârthlang hawi zâwnga awm a ni." 
Acts27:13 Chhim thli a lo tleh hiau hiau va, an duh ang tak an hmu ta emaw an ti a, thîrchakai chu an khai chhuak a, Kret thliarkâr chu a kam hnaih thei ang berin kan hrût a." 
Acts27:14 Nimahsela, rei lo tê-ah khawmual lam aṭangin thlipui na tak a lo tleh chhuk ta phut a, chu thli chu Eurakulo an vuah a." 
Acts27:15 Lawng chu a rawn chhêm vir nawk a, thli lam hawia kar her rual ni ta hek lo, a duh duha len tûrin kan awm ta a, min lên min lên ta mai a." 
Acts27:16 Thliakâr tê tak tê, Kauda an tih phên thli ûp lamah min lên a, harsa tak chungin lawnglêng chu kan hum thei hrâm a." 
Acts27:17 Lawngah an khai chhuak a, lawng chu hruiin an phuar ta tlat a. Libua kam ṭiaudûpa min len luh an hlauh avângin lawng puanzâr chu an tihniam a; tichuan, min lên min lên leh ta a." 
Acts27:18 Thli leh tuifâwn chuan min vawrh reng avângin, a tûkah chuan lawng bungraw phurh chu an paih ṭan ta a." 
Acts27:19 Ni thum ni chuan anmahni kut meuhvin lawng thawmhnaw pawh an paih chhuak leh ta a. 
Acts27:20 Ni rei tak, ni pawh, arsi pawh a lang lo va, thli lah chuan nasa takin min nuai reng a, dam rêng kan inbeisei tawh lo." 
Acts27:21 Chaw ei lova ni tam tak an awm hnuin Paula chu an zîngah a ding a, “Pute u, ka thu kha awihin Kret thliarkâr aṭang khân chhuak lo ila chuan hetiang hrehawmna leh hlohnate hi kan tâwk lo tûr." 
Acts27:22 Nimahsela, tûnah hian thlamuang taka awm tûrin ka ngên a che u. In zîngah tu mah in thi lo vang, lawng erawh hi chu a chhe dâwn a ni." 
Acts27:23 A ta ka ni a, a rawng ka bâwl ṭhin, Pathian chuan vântirhkoh pakhat nizân khân a rawn tîr a, ka kiangah a lo ding a," 
Acts27:24 ‘Paula, hlau suh, Kaisara hmaah i ding tûr a ni. Ngai teh, lawnga i zinpuite zawng zawng kha nangmah avângin Pathianin a hum dâwn a ni,’ mi rawn ti a." 
Acts27:25 Chuvângin pute u, thlamuang takin awm rawh u. Pathian ka ring a, mi hrilh ang chu a thleng ngei ang." 
Acts27:26 Thliarkâr khawiah emaw min lên chhuak tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Acts27:27 A zan sâwm leh zan li zânah chuan thliin Mediteranean tuipuiah chuan min lên zêl a, zanlai vêlah chuan lawng miten khawmual eng emaw thleng dâwnin an inhria a." 
Acts27:28 Tichuan, tui thûk lam an teh a, hlam sawmhniha thûk a lo ni a, rei lo te hnuah an teh leh a, hlam sâwm leh pangaa thûk a ni ta a." 
Acts27:29 Lung chhe hmuna min len chhuah an hlauh avângin lawng mei lamah chuan thîrchakai pali an thlâk a, khawvâr hlân an nghâkhlel hle a." 
Acts27:30 Lawng mite chuan lawng hnâr lama thîrchakai thlâk tûr ni âwm takin lawnglêng chu tuifinriatah an thlâk a, lawng chu tlânsan an tum a ni." 
Acts27:31 Chu veleh, Paula chuan sipai za hotu leh sipaite hnênah chuan, “Hêngho hi lawnga an awm reng loh chuan in him thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Acts27:32 Tichuan, sipaite chuan lawnglêng hruite chu an zai chat a, an len botîr ta a." 
Acts27:33 Khawvâr dâwn ṭêpah Paula chuan lawnga mi zawng zawng chu chaw ei tûrin a ngên a, “Vawiin hi eng mah ei lova in awm ni sâwm leh ni lina a lo ni ta a." 
Acts27:34 Chuvângin, chaw ei tûrin ka ngên a che u, in nunna tûr a ni e; in zînga tu ma samzai pakhat tê mah a boral lo vang,” a ti a." 
Acts27:35 Chûng thu a sawi zawh chuan chhang a la a, an zaa hmaah chuan Pathian hnênah lâwmthu a sawi zawhin a phel a, a ei ṭan ta a." 
Acts27:36 Tichuan, an za-in thlamuang takin an ei ta a." 
Acts27:37 Lawnga mi chu kan vaiin zahnih leh sawmsarih leh paruk kan ni a. 
Acts27:38 An ei kham vek hnu chuan lawng tizâng tûrin an buh phurhte chu tuipuiah an paih chhuak leh ta a. 
Acts27:39 Khua a lo vâr chuan khawi lai vaukam nge an thlen an hre lo va, litengsâwla ṭiaupho an hmuhin lawng chu a theih chuan ṭiauphova khalh chhuah an tum a." 
Acts27:40 Thîrchakai hruite chu an zai chat a, tuipuiah an hnutchhiah ta a; chumi rual chuan a kar herna phuarnate chu an phelh a, hma lam puanzâr chu thli chhêm tûr zâwngin an tisâng a, ṭiaupho chu an pan ta a." 
Acts27:41 Nimahsela, tuizangkhauh pahnih intawhnaah kan lût a, lawng hnâr lam chu a insu bûr ta tlat a, tihchêt rual lohvin a tâng ta a; tuifâwn a nasat êm avângin lawng mei lam pawh chu a keh ṭan ta a." 
Acts27:42 Sipaite chuan tânghote chu thah vek an rawt a, tui hleuh kaite an awm ang a, an tlân bo vang tih an hlau va ni." 
Acts27:43 Nimahsela, sipai za hotu chuan Paula chhanhim a duh a, an thil rawt chu a khap a; tui hleuh thiam apiang chu tuipuia zuang thlaa khawmuala lo kai hmasa tûr leh," 
Acts27:44 mi dang zawng chu thingphel chungah emaw, lawng keh them chungah emaw kai tûrin thu a pe ta a. Chutiang chuan kan za-in khawmualah him takin kan kai ta vek a." 
Acts28:1 Kan kai zawh chuan thliarkâr chu Meliti a ni tih kan hre ta a. 
Acts28:2 Chu thliarkâra mite chuan min lo khawngaih êm êm a. Ruah a sûr avâng leh a vawh êm avângin meipui an chhêm a, kan za-in min lo lâwm a." 
Acts28:3 Paulan thing têl khat a fawm a, meiah a tuah a, a sat avângin rûl a lo chhuak a, a kutah a zem ta tlat a." 
Acts28:4 Chuta mite chuan a kuta rûl bet reng an hmuh chuan, “He mi hi tualthat a ni phawt mai, tuifinriat aṭangin tlân chhuak mah sela, dik taka Rorêltua chuan a nun a awih tawh lo a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Acts28:5 Nimahsela, ani chuan rûl chu meiah a thing thla a, engtin mah a awm ta chuang lo va." 
Acts28:6 Anni chuan a vûn emaw, thâwklehkhata a tlûka a thih nghâl emaw an ring a. Rei fe an nghâk a, eng mah a ti lo tih an hmuh chuan an rilru an lamlêt a, “Pathian a nih hi,” an ti leh ta zâwk a." 
Acts28:7 Chumi kiang lawkah chuan chumi thliarkâr lal Poplia huan a awm a. Ani chuan min lo lâwm a, ni thum lai lâwm takin min thleng a." 
Acts28:8 Poplia pa chu khawsik leh santên veiin a lo mu reng a. Paula chuan a en a, a luah kut nghatin a ṭawngṭai a, a tidam ta a." 
Acts28:9 Chumi hnu chuan, chu thliarkâra mi dang na nei apiang chu an lo kal a, an dam ta a." 
Acts28:10 Anni chuan nasa takin min chawimawi a, kan kal leh dâwn pawh chuan kan mamawh apiang lawngah an lo dah a." 
Acts28:11 Thla thum hnuah chuan lawng pakhat, thlasik laia chu thliarkâra lo châm tawh chuan kan kal leh ta a. Chu lawng chu Diaskuro an vuah a, Aleksandria khaw lawng a ni." 
Acts28:12 Surakus khua kan thleng a, ni thum kan châm a." 
Acts28:13 Chuta ṭang chuan lawngin kan kal kual a, Regium khua kan thleng a. Ni khat hnuah chhim thli a lo tleh a, a tûk lehah Puteoli khua kan thleng a." 
Acts28:14 Chutah chuan unaute kan hmu a, an hnêna kâr khat châm tûrin min ngên a, chutiang chuan Rom khua kan thleng ta a ni." 
Acts28:15 Rom khuaa unaute chuan kan chanchin an hriat veleh, ‘Appia Dâwr’ leh ‘Khualbûk Pathum’ thlengin min hmuak tûrin an lo kal a. Paulan chu mite chu a hmuhin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu a sawi a, a thlamuan phah ta hle a." 
Acts28:16 Rom kan thlen chuan Paula chu sipai vên chunga amaha a awm an phalsak a. 
Acts28:17 Ni thum hnuah chuan Paulan chuta Juda hotute chu a ko khâwm a, an lo kal chuan an hnênah, “Unaute u, kan mite chungah emaw, min thlahtute Dân lakah emaw eng mah ka tisual lo chung pawhin, Jerusalem-ah mi man a, Rom sawrkâr kutah mi hlân a." 
Acts28:18 Anni chuan mi chhâl a, thihna khawp meuh eng mah ka tihsual an hmuh loh avângin mi chhuah an tum a." 
Acts28:19 Nimahsela, Juda-ten an hnial tlat avângin Kaisara hnêna thlen lo thei ka ni ta lo va ni; Mahse, ka chipuite hêk tûra ti ka ni awzâwng lo ve." 
Acts28:20 Chuvâng chuan, hmuh leh biak che u duhin ka ko khâwm che u a ni; Israel-ten an beisei ṭhin, kha mi avâng khân he khaidiat hi ka bun a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Acts28:21 Anni chuan, “Judai ram aṭangin i chanchin sawina lehkha eng mah kan hmu lo va, unaute zînga mi tu mahin i chanchin a chhe lam emaw, a ṭha lam emaw sawi tûr an lo kal hek lo." 
Acts28:22 He pâwl hi hmun tinah sawichhiat niin kan lo hria a, i ngaih dân pawh hriat kan duh e,” an ti a." 
Acts28:23 Tichuan, ni an tiam a, chumi ni chuan a awmna inah mi tam takin an rawn pan a, zîng aṭangin zân thlengin Pathian ram thu a sawi a, a hrilh fiah a; Mosia dân bu leh zâwlneite lehkhabu aṭangin Isua chungchâng anmahni awihtîr tumin a hrilh a." 
Acts28:24 A ṭhenin a thu sawi chu an ring a, a ṭhenin an ring lo va." 
Acts28:25 An thu a inhmu ta lo va, Paulan thu a sawi zawh chuan an chhuak ta a. A thu sawi chu hei hi a ni: “Thlarau Thianghlimin zâwlnei Isaia kâa in thlahtute hnêna a sawi kha a dik ngawt mai," 
Acts28:26 ‘He chite hnênah hian kal la, va sawi rawh. In ngaithla in ngaithla ang a, a ngaihna in hre si lo vang. In en in en ang a, in hmu fuh si lo vang." 
Acts28:27 He mite thinlung hi a lo chawlawl ta a, An bengte an chhu ngawng a, An maimitchhîng bawk a, Chuti ni lo se an mitin an hmu ang a, an bengin an hria ang a, An thinlungin an hre bawk ang a, An hawi kîr leh anga, Anmahni ka lo tidam tûr!’ a tih kha." 
Acts28:28 “Pathian chhandamna chu Jentail-te hnênah pêk a ni tih hre rawh u; anni zawngin ngaih pawh an ngaithla ang,” a ti a." 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Kum hnih pumhlûm Paula chu ama in luahah chuan a awm a, a hnêna lo lêng apiang a lo lâwm a." 
Acts28:31 Pathian ram thu a hrilh a, Lalpa Isua Krista thu huai takin mi a zirtîr a, tu man an khap lo." 
Romans1:1 Paula, Isua Krista bawih, tirhkoh atâna koh, Pathian Chanchin Ṭha hril tûra tihhrana chuan:" 
Romans1:2 chu Chanchin Ṭha chu Pathianin a zâwlneite hmangin a lehkha thianghlimah a lo tiam tawh a. 
Romans1:3 A Fapa, kan Lalpa Isua Krista thu chu tisa lam chhui chuan Davida thlaha piang a ni a," 
Romans1:4 thianghlimna thlarau lamah erawh chuan; mitthi zîng ata ropui taka kaihthawh a nihna chuan Pathian Fapa a nihzia a tilang chiang a; 
Romans1:5 amah avâng chuan Pathianin hnam tin zînga mite ringa awihtîr tûrin tirhkoh nihna chanvo min hlân a ni. 
Romans1:6 Nangni pawh chutianga Krista mite ni tûra koh in ni si a. 
Romans1:7 Pathianin a duh tak, a mi thianghlim ni tûra a koh Rom khuaa mite chibai ka bûk a che u. Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
Romans1:8 Ringtu in nih thu ram tina a than tâk huai huai avângin Isua Krista zârah nangmahni avângin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi hmasa a ni. 
Romans1:9 Ka ṭawngṭainaahte chuan ka hre reng ṭhîn che u a, tih tak meuhva a Fapa Chanchin Ṭha rawng ka bâwl Pathian chu mi hriatpuitu a ni." 
Romans1:10 A remtih zâwng a nih chuan tûn ṭumah tal ka rawn tlawh theihna tûr che uin Pathian ka dîl ṭhîn a ni. 
Romans1:11 In ngheh lehzual nân thlarau lam thilpêk dawntîr tûr che uin hmuh che u ka chak êm êm a ni," 
Romans1:12 kei leh nangni hi rinnaa kan inchâwm tawna, kan inṭanpui tawn theihna tûrin." 
Romans1:13 Unaute u, rawn tlawh che u ka tum fo va; mahse, rem lohna a awm leh ṭhîn a ni tih in hriat ka duh a ni. Jentail dang zînga ka hmuh ṭhin angin in zîngah pawh rah hmuh ve ka beisei." 
Romans1:14 Grik mite leh Awze mite, mi fing leh mi mâwlte hnênah bat ka nei a;" 
Romans1:15 chuvângin, a ni, nangni Rom khuaa awmte hnênah pawh Chanchin Ṭha hi hril ka châk êm êm ni." 
Romans1:16 Chanchin Ṭha hi ka zahpui si lo va, tu pawh a ring apiangte chhandam nâna Pathian thiltihtheihna a ni si a; Juda-te tân a ni phawt a, Jentail-te tân pawh a ni leh a." 
Romans1:17 Hetah hian rinna avâng chauhva Pathianin mi thiam a chantîr dân a lo lang ta a ni, “Rinna avânga thiam chang chu a nung ang,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans1:18 Vân ata Pathian thinurna chu mihring, an sakhaw ngaihsak lohna leh suahsualna avânga thutak dodâl tlattute chungah chuan a lo lang a ni." 
Romans1:19 Pathian chanchin hriat theih tûr chi chu mihringte hnênah a lang reng a, chu chu Pathian ngeiin a tihlan a ni." 
Romans1:20 A nihna, mita hmuh theih loh, a chatuan thiltihtheihna leh a Pathianzia chu khawvêl siam tirh ata a thil siamahte chuan chiang taka hmuh theihin a lang a. Phatna tûr rêng an nei lo." 
Romans1:21 Pathian zawng an hria a ni; Pathian ang erawh chuan an chawimawi lo va, lâwmthu pawh an hrilh hek lo; an ngaihtuahna a khawlo zo va, an rilru lawilo tak chu a thim zo ta a ni." 
Romans1:22 Fing an inti nâ a, an â hle si a ni." 
Romans1:23 Thi thei lo Pathian ropuina chu thi thei mihring te, sava te, ke pali nei te leh rannung lim ang lekah an chantîr a." 
Romans1:24 Chuvângin, an thinlung châkzâwng thil bawlhhlawhte ti tûrin Pathianin a hawisan a, zahpuiawm takin an awm ta a ni." 
Romans1:25 Pathian thutak aiin dâwt an thlang a, a siamtu chu biak aiin a siama chu biain a rawng an bâwl ta zâwk a. A siamtu chu chatuana fakin awm rawh se. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Chûng avâng chuan a ni Pathianin zahthlâk taka an hur phalin a hawisan tâk ni; an hmeichhiate chu an awm dân phung pêlin an khawsa a; 
Romans1:27 an mipate lah hmeichhe hman dân pangngai bânsanin, hurin an inît tawn a, mipa leh mipa mawi lo takin an khawsa a. Anmahni taksa ngeiah an sual rah chu an hmu a ni." 
Romans1:28 Tichuan, Pathian hriatna dik chu an thlah tâk avângin an ngaihtuahna khawlo tak anga awm tûrin Pathianin a hawisan a, an tih loh tawp tûr pawh an ti ta a ni." 
Romans1:29 Dik lohna chi tinrêngin an lo khat ta a, sualna te, duhâmna te leh suahsualna te, îtsîkna te, tual thah te, in erna te, inbumna te leh inhuatna tein an khat a." 
Romans1:30 An inrêl a, an insawichhia a, Pathian an hua a, an intivei a, an chapo va, an uang a, thil ṭha lo thar an chîng chhuak zêl a; an nu leh pate an zah lo va," 
Romans1:31 pawisak an nei lo va, lainatna lah an nei hek lo." 
Romans1:32 Chutiang thil titute chu Pathianin a ruat ang ngeia thi tlâk an ni tih hre reng chungin, an ti lui zêl a, a ti vete pawh an ngaisâng lehnghâl a ni." 
Romans2:1 Aw mihring, tu pawh ni la, mi dang thiam loh chantîr thei i ni bîk hlei nêm, mi i thiam lohna ngei chu nang pawhin i ti ve tho si a, mahni leh mahni thiam loh inchantîr mai i ni." 
Romans2:2 Chutiang ti mite chu Pathianin thiam loh a chantîr chuan a tidik a ni tih kan hria; 
Romans2:3 nangin i tih ṭhin ang tite i thiam loh si chuan, Pathianin a demna che chu pumpelh i inring em ni?" 
Romans2:4 A nih loh leh, simtîr che a duh avângin Pathian chuan ngilnei takin a nghâk ṭhîn che tih hre lovin, ṭhatna a ngahzia leh a dawhtheihzia leh a entheihzia chu i ngainêp em ni?" 
Romans2:5 I luhlul leh i thinlung khauh avângin thinurna ni, dik taka Pathianin ro a rêlna ni atân chuan mahni tân hremna chhêk khâwl lek i ni asin." 
Romans2:6 Pathian chuan mi tin an thiltih ang zêlin a rêlsak dâwn si a. 
Romans2:7 Ropuina te, chawimawina te leh boral theih lohna te zawnga thil ṭha ti fan fante chu chatuan nunna a pe ang;" 
Romans2:8 nimahsela, mahni hma chauh siala, thutak hnara, thil dik lo zâwm zâwkte chungah chuan Pathian thinurna leh thinrimna a lo thleng ang." 
Romans2:9 Thil sual ti apiangte tân hrehawmna te, lungngaihna te a awm dâwn - Juda-te tân a awm phawt ang a, Grik mite tân pawh a awm ang;" 
Romans2:10 thil ṭha ti apiangte erawh chuan Pathian hnên aṭangin ropuina te, chawimawina te leh thlamuanna te an dawng ang. Juda-ten an dawng phawt ang a, Grik mite pawhin an dawng ang." 
Romans2:11 Pathianin mi duhsak bîk a nei si lo va. 
Romans2:12 Dân hnuaia awm loten thil sual an tih chuan Dân lovin an thi ang: Dân hnuaia awmten thil sual an tih chuan Dân angin an chungthu rêl a ni ang. 
Romans2:13 Dân hriat vâng ni lovin, zawma zawm vâng zâwkin Pathian hmaah chuan thiam chan theih a ni." 
Romans2:14 Jentail-te chuan Dân chu an hre ve lo na a, Dân thu tum chu an pianpui ze phung remzâwng a nih avângin an ti a, Dân chu an hnêna pêk ni ve lo mah se, Dân nei ang an ni." 
Romans2:15 An chhia leh ṭha hriatnaah thiam inchantîr leh inchantîr loh nachâng an inhriat dân aṭang hian Dân thupêk chu an thinlungah a inziak a ni tih a lang. 
Romans2:16 Pathianin Isua Krista hmanga mihringte thurûk a ngaihtuah ni-ah chuan Chanchin Ṭha ka hril ang hian a rêl dâwn a ni. 
Romans2:17 A nih, nang, Juda mi i inti a; Dân chu i rinchhan a, Pathian chu i chhuang hle a:" 
Romans2:18 Pathian duhzâwng pawh i hria a. Dân i hriat avângin a chhia leh a ṭha pawh i hria a; 
Romans2:19 mitdelte hruaitu, thima awmte tâna êng," 
Romans2:20 mi mâwlte hruai fing theitu, naupangte zirtîrtu ber ni-ah i inngai ṭhîn; hriat tûr leh thutak zawng zawng chu Dân thu-ah hian a awm vek tih i ring a." 
Romans2:21 Mi dang ka zirtîr e i ti a, engati nge mahni i inzirtîr si loh? Ru lo tûrin mi i zirtîr a, nangin i ru si maw?" 
Romans2:22 Uire i khap a, nang i uire si em ni? Milem haw hle siin milem biakna Tempul i rawk duh si maw?" 
Romans2:23 Dân chu chhuang hle siin, Dân chu bawhchhiain Pathian i tihmingchhe ṭhîn maw?" 
Romans2:24 “Nangmahni avângin Pathian hming chu Jentail-te zîngah sawichhiat a ni,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans2:25 Dân zâwm la chu i serh tan pawh kha a sâwt hle tûr; Dân i bawhchhiat si chuan serh tan loh ang chiah i ni a. 
Romans2:26 Serh tan lohvin Dân a zawm si chuan serh tan anga ngaih a ni dâwn lâwm ni? 
Romans2:27 Nangnin serh in tan a, Dân thu ziak pawh in nei a; mahse, Dân thu chu in bawhchhe si, Jentail, tisa serh tan lohte chuan Dân thu chu an zâwm tlat zâwk si a, thiam loh an chantîr dâwn che u a ni." 
Romans2:28 A lang maia Juda mi ni chu Juda mi tak tak a ni lo va, tisa maia serh tan chu serh tan tak tak a ni bawk hek lo;" 
Romans2:29 amaherawhchu, chhûng rila Juda mi ni chu Juda tak tak chu a ni a, serh tan tak tak pawh chu thinlung lamah a ni, lehkhaa ziak maiah ni lovin, thlarau lamah a ni zâwk. Chutiang mi chu mihringin chawimawi lo mah se, Pathianin a chawimawi ang." 
Romans3:1 Chuti chu Juda mi nih a sâwtna a awm chuang em ni? Serh tan pawh eng nge a hlâwkna? 
Romans3:2 Kawng tinah hlâwk tak a ni. A hlâwkna ber chu Pathian thute kawltîr an nihna hi a ni. 
Romans3:3 Mi ṭhenkhatte rinawm lo ta sela, engtin nge ni ta ang? Anni rinawm lohna chuan Pathian rinawmna chu a tibo dâwn em ni?" 
Romans3:4 Tibo suh e; mi zawng zawng dawthei ni vek mah se, Pathian zawng a dik ngei tûr a ni: “Nangin thu i sawi huna thiam i chana, Rorêlsaka i awm huna i hneh theih nân,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans3:5 Kan dik lohna chuan Pathian dikzia a tihlan chian lehzual si chuan, engtin nge kan ngaih ang? Mihring takin sawi ila - Pathianin thinurna a rawn lantîr hian a tidik lo kan ti dâwn em ni?" 
Romans3:6 Ti teh suh e, chuti ni se Pathian chuan engtin nge khawvêl ro a rêl theih ang?" 
Romans3:7 A nih loh leh, dawthei ka nihna hian Pathian a ropui nâna Pathian dikzia a tihlan chian lehzual si chuan, engati nge mi suala mi la chhiar cheu vang?" 
Romans3:8 Mi ṭhenkhatin, “ ‘Thil ṭha a lo chhuah theih nân thil sual i ti ang u,’ a ti e,” ti-a min sawichhiat ang khân, thil sual kan ti mai dâwn em ni? Chûng mite chu thiam loh chang awm rêng an ni." 
Romans3:9 A nih leh keini Juda-te hi kan ṭha bîk em ni? Ṭha bîk teh suh e. Juda-te leh Grik-te chu sual bawiha awm vek kan ni tih kan sawi fiah tawh kha: 
Romans3:10 ‘Tu mah mi fel rêng an awm lo, Pakhat mah an awm lo;" 
Romans3:11 Tu mah hrethiam rêng an awm lo, Pathian zawng rêng an awm hek lo." 
Romans3:12 An pêng bo ta vek a, an khawlo zo ta a; Tu mah thil ṭha ti rêng an awm lo, pakhat mah an awm lo." 
Romans3:13 An hrawk chu thlân inhawng a ni a, an leiin bumna thu an sawi a, an hmui aṭangin rûl tûr a chhuak a," 
Romans3:14 An kâ chu ânchhia leh thu khain a khat a. 
Romans3:15 Thisen chhuah tûrin an pên chak a," 
Romans3:16 An kalna apiangah chhiatna leh lungngaihna an thlen a. 
Romans3:17 Thlamuanna kawng an hre hauh lo va," 
Romans3:18 Pathian ṭih nachâng rêng an hre hek lo,’ tia ziak ang khân." 
Romans3:19 Dân thute chu Dân hnuaia awmte chunga hman tûr a ni tih kan hria, tu man eng mah an sawi theih lohna tûr leh khawvêl hi Pathian rorêla a awmna tûrin." 
Romans3:20 Dân zawm ṭhat avângin tu mah Pathian hmaah thiam chang pha an awm lo; Dân avângin miin thil sual an tih an inhre fiah ṭhîn a ni. 
Romans3:21 Tûnah zawng Dân hman ngai lova mi thiam a chantîr dân Pathian chuan a rawn tilang ta: Dân leh zâwlneite thu pawhin chu chu a sawi kha a ni. 
Romans3:22 Isua Krista an rin avângin tu pawh a ring apiangte chu Pathianin thiam a chantîr a ni, danglamna rêng a awm lo," 
Romans3:23 mi zawng zawngin thil sual an ti vek a, Pathian ropuina chu an chang thei ta lo va ni." 
Romans3:24 Nimahsela, Isua Krista tlanna zârah Pathian chuan a khawngaihna avâng chauhvin chûng mite chu a thlâwnin thiam a chantîr ta," 
Romans3:25 Pathianin ani chu a thisen rin avânga sual thupha chawina ni tûrin a ruat a, mi thiam a chantîr dân tilang tûra ti a ni." 
Romans3:26 A dawhtheihna avângin tûn hma lam sualte chu Pathianin a haider a; amah chu a dik a, Isua ringtute chu thiam a chantîr tih tifiah tûrin tûnlai hunah hian mi thiam a chantîr dân chu a rawn tilang ta a nih hi." 
Romans3:27 Chuti chu chhuan tûr rêng kan nei em ni? Nei suh e! Eng vângin maw? Thiltih vângin maw? Ni lo ve, rinna avâng a ni zâwk." 
Romans3:28 Dân zawm vâng ni lovin rinna avângin miin thiam an chang kan ti a ni. 
Romans3:29 Pathian chu Juda-te ta bîk em ni? Jentail-te ta pawh a ni lo vem ni? Ni e, Jentail-te ta pawh a ni asin." 
Romans3:30 Pathian chu pakhat a ni a, serh tanho chu an rinna avângin thiam a chantîr ang a, serh tan lohho pawh an rinna avâng bawkin thiam a chantîr ang." 
Romans3:31 Chuti ni se, rinna kan sawi pawimawh avângin Dân chu eng mah lovah kan dah ta tihna em ni? Ni suh e; Dân chu kan ṭan zâwk a ni." 
Romans4:1 Chuti ni se, tisa lama min thlahtu Abrahama thu kha engtin nge kan sawi tâk ang le?" 
Romans4:2 Thiltih avânga thiam chantîr ni se, Abrahama khân chhuan tûr a nei mahna, amaherawhchu, Pathian hmaah chhuan tûr a nei hauh lo." 
Romans4:3 Lehkha Thu-in eng nge a sawi kha? “Abrahama chuan Pathian a ring a, chu a rinna avâng chuan thiam chantîr a ni,” a ti a." 
Romans4:4 Hna thawktu hlawh chu khawngaih thilpêk a ni lo va, bat anga ngaih a ni zâwk." 
Romans4:5 Mi sual thiam chantîrtu chu miin a rina, thil tih vâng ni lova thiam chantîra a awm hian, a rinna avângin thiam a chang kan ti a ni." 
Romans4:6 Thiltih vâng ni lova Pathianin thiam a chantîrte nihlawhzia Davida pawhin hetiang hian a sawi: 
Romans4:7 ‘An bawhchhiatnate ngaihdamsaka awma, an sualte thai bova awmte chu an va nihlawh êm!" 
Romans4:8 Lalpan sual neia a ruat loh chu an nihlawh e,’ tiin." 
Romans4:9 Chu malsâwmna chu serh tan tân chauh nge serh tan lohte tân pawh? “Abrahaman a rinna avângin thiam a chang,” tih a ni kan ti a." 
Romans4:10 A serh tan hma thu nge a serh tan hnu thu? Engtia ngaih tûr nge? A serh tan hnu ni lovin, a serh tan hma thu a ni zâwk." 
Romans4:11 A serh tan hmaa a rinna avâng ngeiin Pathianin thiam a chantîr tih entîr tûrin serh a tan chauh zâwk a ni. Tichuan, serh tan lo mah se rinna avânga Pathianin thiam a chantîrte tân chuan Abrahama chu an thlarau lam pa a ni." 
Romans4:12 Serh tante pa pawh a ni, serh tan an nih mai vâng ni lovin, kan pa Abrahaman serh a tan hmaa a rin ang bawka rinna an neih avângin a ni." 
Romans4:13 Dân zawm vâng ni lovin, rinnaa thiam chantîr a nih avâng zâwkin Pathian chuan Abrahama hnênah amah leh a thlahte chuan khawvêl hi an rochung dâwn a ni tih thu a tiam a ni." 
Romans4:14 Dân zawm hi roluahtu nihna ni se, rinna hi thil lothlâwn mai a ni ang a, thutiam pawh chu eng mah a ni lo tihna a ni ang." 
Romans4:15 Dân chuan thinurna chu a hring a, Dân awm lo sela bawhchhiatna pawh a awm dâwn si lo." 
Romans4:16 Abrahama thlah zawng zawng tân, Dân zâwmtute chauh ni lovin, ama rin anga ringtute tân Pathian thilthlâwnpêk a nihzia tilang tûrin rinna avângin a ni, Abrahama hnênah thu a tiam ni," 
Romans4:17 ‘chi tam tak paah ka siam ta che,’ tih ziak ang khân, a rin Pathian, mitthite tinung lehtu, thil awm lote awmtîrtu hmuhah chuan; ani chu kan zavaia pa a ni." 
Romans4:18 Beisei tûr a awm loh pawhin beiseiin a ring tlat a; tichuan, chi tam tak pa a lo ni ta, ‘I thlahte chu khiti zât khi an la ni ang,’ tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans4:19 Kum za dâwn lai a ni tawh a, a taksa ngaihtuah chuan mitthi ang mai a ni tawh a, Sari pawh chu fa nei rual a ni tawh lo tih a hre reng chungin, a rinna a chuai chuang lo va," 
Romans4:20 rinna tlachhamin Pathian thutiam chu a ringhlel lo va, a rinna a chak tial tial a; tichuan, Pathianin a chawimawi ta zâwk a ni." 
Romans4:21 Thutiamtu chuan a tiam tawh chu a hlen thei ngei ang tih a ring tlat a. 
Romans4:22 Chuvâng chuan alâwm, a rinna avânga thiam chantîr a ni an tih ni." 
Romans4:23 Hei hi ama chungthu sawina atân maia ziak a ni lo. 
Romans4:24 Keiniho, kan Lalpa Isua mitthi zîng ata kaithotu ringtute, rin vânga thiam chang tate tân pawh hian ziak a ni." 
Romans4:25 Isua chu kan bawhchhiatnate avângin tihhlum a ni a, thiam kan channa tûra kaihthawh a ni bawk." 
Romans5:1 Tichuan, rin vânga thiam kan chan tâk avângin, kan Lal Isua Krista zârah Pathian nên inremin kan awm ta." 
Romans5:2 Amah avâng vêk chuan tûna kan awmna, khawngaihna hnuaiah hian, rinnain kan lût ta a, Pathian ropuina kan la ṭâwm tûr beiseina avângin kan lâwm bawk a ni." 
Romans5:3 Chu bâkah kan hrehawmnaah pawh kan lâwm zêl a ni; hrehawmna chuan chhelna a hring ṭhîn a," 
Romans5:4 chhelna pawh chuan nghehna a hring a, nghehna chuan beiseina a hring tih kan hre si a." 
Romans5:5 Chu beiseina chuan min tibeidawng lo va. Thlarau Thianghlim min pêk hmangin kan thinlungah hian Pathian chuan a hmangaihna chu a rawn leih ta si a. 
Romans5:6 Eng mah ti thei lo kan nih lai khân a hun takah Krista chu mi sualte tân a lo thi ta si a. 
Romans5:7 Mi fel tâna thih chu tu tân pawh a har hle ang, mi ṭha tân erawh chuan thih ngam an awm mial mahna." 
Romans5:8 Amaherawhchu, Pathianin min hmangaihzia a lanna chu - mi sual kan nih reng laiin Krista kan tân zu thi a!" 
Romans5:9 A thisen avâng chuan Pathianin thiam min rawn chantîr ta a; thinurna lak ata chu ama zârah min va chhan chhuak dâwn êm! 
Romans5:10 Hmêlma kan nih lai maha a Fapa thihna azâra Pathian nên kan inrem tawh si chuan, Pathian nêna inrema kan awm hnu phei chuan, Krista nunna avângin chhandam kan va ni dâwn tehlul êm!" 
Romans5:11 Chu chauh chu a ni lo, tûna inremna min petu kan Lalpa Isua Krista zârah chuan Pathianah kan lâwm bawk a ni." 
Romans5:12 Khawvêlah hian mi pakhat avângin sual a lo lût a, sual avâng chuan thihna a lo awm ta a. Tichuan, khawvêl mihring zawng zawng hi thihna chuan a fan chhuak ta a ni, mi zawng zawngin thil sual an tih avângin." 
Romans5:13 Dân a awm hma pawhin khawvêlah sual a awm tawh; mahse, Dân a awm loh avângin sual chu suala ngaih a ni lo." 
Romans5:14 Nimahsela, Adama hun aṭanga Mosia hun thlengin, mi zawng zawng chungah Adaman Pathian thupêk awih lova thil sual a tih tâk anga sual ti ve lote chungah pawh thihna chuan thu a nei a. Adama chu lo kal tûra nên tehkhin a ni." 
Romans5:15 Nimahsela, Pathian thilthlâwnpêk chu Adama sual nên chuan inang lo tak a ni - kha mi pakhat sual avâng khân mi tam tak an thi a: Pathian khawngaihna leh mi pakhat, Isua Krista avânga a thilthlâwnpêk chu tam takin an dawng thung a ni." 
Romans5:16 Pathian thilpêk leh mi pakhat sual chu inang lo tak a ni sual pakhat avângin thiam loh channa a lo awm a; amaherawhchu, sual tam tak avângin khawngaiha thiam channa a lo awm ta." 
Romans5:17 Mi pakhat, mi mal sualna avânga khawvêlah hian thihnain ro a rêl ta a nih si chuan, mi pakhat bawk, Isua Krista avângin, Pathian khawngaihna nasa tak leh a thilthlâwnpêk thiam channa dawngtute chuan, nun changin ropui takin ro an rêl ngei ang." 
Romans5:18 Tichuan, mi pakhat sual avângin mi zawng zawng thiam loh chantîr an ni a, chutiang bawkin mi pakhat dik avângin mi zawng zawng thiam changin an nung thei ta a ni." 
Romans5:19 Mi pakhat thu awih lohna avâng khân mi tam tak mi sual an ni ta a, chutiang bawkin mi pakhat thuawihna avângin mi tam tak mi dik an ni ang." 
Romans5:20 Sual a lan chian lehzual theih nân Dân a lo awm a; nimahsela, sual a nasat poh leh khawngaihna a nasa lehzual ṭhîn a." 
Romans5:21 Tichuan, sual chuan thihnain ro a rêl a; kan Lalpa Isua Krista zâra chatuan nun kan neih theih nân Pathian khawngaihna chuan thiam chantîrnain ro a rêl ta a ni." 
Romans6:1 Eng nge kan sawi tâk ang le? Khawngaihna chu a pun nasat theih nân kan sual lui zêl dâwn em ni? 
Romans6:2 Dâwn suh e, keini sual thihsan tawhte chu sualah engtin nge kan la chên reng theih ang?" 
Romans6:3 Krista Isuaa baptisma chang apiangte chu a thihnaah baptis-in kan awm zêl tih in hre lâwm ni? 
Romans6:4 Baptisma kan chanin a hnênah phûmin kan awm ve a, a thihna chu kan ṭâwmpui a ni; chutiang bawkin, Pain mitthi zîng ata ropui taka Krista chu a kaihthawh ang khân, keini pawh nun tharin kan lêng tawh ang." 
Romans6:5 Keini pawh amah nên inzawma, a thih anga kan thih ve chuan, amah a tho leh ang bawkin amah nêna inzawmin keini pawh kaihthawhin kan awm ve ang." 
Romans6:6 Sual bawiha kan awm tawh loh nân sual pu taksa hi tihlum tûrin, kan mihring hlui chu a hnênah khenbehin a awm tawh tih kan hre si a." 
Romans6:7 Thi tawh chu sual lakah a fihlîm a ni. 
Romans6:8 Tin, Krista hnêna kan thih ve tawh chuan, a hnênah kan nung ve bawk ang tih kan ring a ni." 
Romans6:9 Krista chu mitthi zîng ata kaihthawhin a awm a, a thi leh dâwn tawh lo tih kan hria, thihna chuan a chungah thu a nei tawh lo." 
Romans6:10 A thihna chu sual lama thih hlen vang vangna a ni a, a nunna chu Pathian hnêna nun hlenna a ni." 
Romans6:11 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawh sual lama thi tawhah inngai ula, Krista Isuaah Pathian lama nungah inngai rawh u." 
Romans6:12 Tichuan, in tisa châkna zawmtîr tûr che uin in taksa thi theiah chuan sual hi lal suh se." 
Romans6:13 In taksa pêng a enga mah thil ṭha lo tih nân sual hmantîr tawh suh u; mitthi zîng ata nung leh angin Pathian hnênah inhlân ula, in taksa pêngte pawh chu ama hnênah felna hriamhrei atân pe zâwk rawh u." 
Romans6:14 Sual chuan in chungah thu a nei dâwn tawh si lo; Dân thuhnuaia awm lova, khawngaihna thuhnuaia in awm tawh zâwk avângin." 
Romans6:15 Engtin nge ni ta ang le? Dân thuhnuaia awm lova, khawngaihna thuhnuaia kan awm tâk zâwk avângin kan sual zêl dâwn em ni? Sual zêl lul lo ve." 
Romans6:16 Tu hnênah pawh a thu awih tûra in intukluh tawh chuan, a thu in awiha bawih chu in ni - sual bawihah a nih chuan thihna, thuawihna bawihah a nih chuan thiam channa a ni ang tih in hre lo vem ni?" 
Romans6:17 Sual bawih in ni tawh a; mahse, an hlan chhâwn che u Chanchin Ṭha zirtîrna thu in dawn chu thinlung takzeta in zawm avângin," 
Romans6:18 sual bawih ata chu tihchhuah in ni a, dikna bawih in lo ni ta. Chuvângin, Pathian hnênah lâwmthu awm rawh se." 
Romans6:19 In taksa chak lohzia hriain, mihring takin thu ka sawi a ni - in taksa pêngte chu tûn hmaa bawlhhlawh leh bawhchhiatna bawihah, bawhchhe tûrin in pe ṭhîn ang khân, tûnah zawng dikna bawihah thianghlima nung tûrin pe thung tawh rawh u." 
Romans6:20 Sual bawih in nih lai khân dikna lakah in fihlîm a. 
Romans6:21 Tûna in zahpui tâk, thil in lo tih ṭhinte kha, in hlâwkpui em? Chûng chuan a tâwpah thihna a thlen si a." 
Romans6:22 Tûnah zawng sual lakah tihfihlîm in ni a. Pathian bawihah in luh tâk avângin chatuan nun chang tûra tihthianghlim in ni ta e. 
Romans6:23 Sual man chu thihna a ni si a; Pathian thilthlâwnpêk erawh chu kan Lalpa Krista Isuaah chuan chatuan nunna a ni. 
Romans7:1 Unaute u, Dân in hre hlawm bawk a, ka sawi hi in hai lo vang chu, Dân chuan mi an dam chhûng chauh an chungah thu a nei a ni lâwm ni?" 
Romans7:2 Nupui chu a pasal dam chhûng zawng a pasalah Dân chuan a phuar bet a; mahse, a pasal a thih chuan a pasal lama Dânin a phuarna chu phelhin a awm ṭhîn." 
Romans7:3 A pasal dam laiin mi dang a neih chuan a uire a ni a; a pasal thih hnuah erawh chuan Dân phuarna lak ata chu a fihlîm a, mi dang nei mah se uire a ni tawh lo." 
Romans7:4 Chutiang bawk chu a ni, ka unaute u: Krista taksa pêngte in nih tâk avângin Dân chu in thihsan tawh a. Pathian tân rah kan chhuah theihna tûrin tûnah zawng mi dang ta, mitthi zîng ata kaihthawha ta chu kan ni e." 
Romans7:5 Kan mihring hlui nuna kan khawsak lai kha chuan kan châkna sual, Dânin a chawh thawh khân, kan taksaah a thawk a, thihna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Romans7:6 Tûnah zawng, min phuar ṭhîntu kha kan thihsan tawh a, Dân lakah kan fihlîm tawh: Dân thu ziak hlui ang mai ni lovin, Thlarau dân tharin rawng kan bâwl zâwk a ni." 
Romans7:7 Eng nge kan sawi tâk ang le? Dân chu sual em ni? Ni suh e. Amaherawhchu, Dânin mi hriattîr lo se sual hi ka hre lo vang. Dân chuan “Awt suh,” ti lo se, awh hi ka hre lo vang." 
Romans7:8 He thupêk hi remchânga hmangin sual chuan keimahah hian awhna chi tinrêng a chawk tho va. Dân awm lo sela chu sual hi thil thi mai a ni. 
Romans7:9 Hmânah chuan Dân tel lovin ka nung ṭhîn a; mahse, thupêk chu a lo awm a, sual chu a lo harh a," 
Romans7:10 kei chu ka thi ta a. Nunna tûra thupêk chu ka tân thihna a lo ni ta. 
Romans7:11 Sual chuan thupêk chu remchânga hmangin mi bum a, mi tihlum ta a ni." 
Romans7:12 Dân zawng a thianghlim a ni, thupêk pawh a thianghlim a, a dik a, a ṭha a ni." 
Romans7:13 A nih loh leh, thil ṭha chuan kan tân thihna a rawn thlen a ni maw? Thlen suh e. Sual zâwk hian a ni; sual a nihzia tilang tûrin thil ṭha hmangin ka tân thihna a rawn thlen a, thupêk avângin sual râpthlâkzia chu a lo lang fiah ta a ni." 
Romans7:14 Dân chu thlarau lam thil a ni tih kan hria; kei erawh chu mihring mai, sual bawiha hralh tawh ka ni." 
Romans7:15 Ka chêt dân hi ka hrethiam lo ve; tih ka duh chu ti lovin, ka huatzâwng chu ka ti zâwk tlat ṭhîn." 
Romans7:16 Ka tih duh loh zâwng ka tih hian Dân chu a ṭha ka tihpui ve tihna a ni. 
Romans7:17 Tichuan, keimah hi zawng a titu tak ka ni lo, keimaha sual chêng hi a ni zâwk." 
Romans7:18 Keimah mihringah hi zawng thil ṭha eng mah a awm lo tih ka hria, thil ṭha tih duhna nei ṭhîn mah ila ka ti thei si lo." 
Romans7:19 Ka tih duh thil ṭha chu ti lovin, ka duh loh thil sual chu ka ti zâwk ṭhîn." 
Romans7:20 Ka tih duh loh zâwng chu ka tih ṭhin si chuan, a titu chu keimah tak hi ka ni tawh lo tihna a ni a, keimaha sual awm hi a ni zâwk." 
Romans7:21 Hetiang hi thil awm dân a ni tih ka hre chhuak ta; Thil ṭha tih ka duh na a, thil sual ka ti leh mai ṭhîn." 
Romans7:22 Ka mihring chhûngril chuan Pathian Dân chu a lâwm a; 
Romans7:23 nimahsela, ka taksaah hian thawktu, dân danglam tak a awm tih ka hria; chu chuan ka chhûngril ṭha tihzâwng dân chu a do va, sual dân ka taksaa thawk ṭhîn bawihah mi siam ṭhîn a ni." 
Romans7:24 Mi khawngaihthlâk ka va han ni tak êm! He thihna taksa lak ata hi tuin nge mi chhan chhuak ang? 
Romans7:25 Pathianin le! Kan Lalpa Isua Krista zârah ani chu fakin awm rawh se. Tichuan, ka thinlung chhûngril tak chuan Pathian Dân a zâwm a, ka taksa hi chuan sual dân a zâwm thung a ni." 
Romans8:1 Chutichuan, tûnah zawng Krista Isuaa awmte tân chuan, thiam loh chantîrna rêng a awm tawh lo." 
Romans8:2 Krista Isuaa nunna Thlarau dân chuan sual leh thihna dân ata chu min tichhuak tawh si a. 
Romans8:3 Tisa a chak loh avânga Dânin a tih theih hauh loh chu Pathianin a rawn ti ta; mihring tisa sual ang puin, a Fapa ngei chu sual thawi nân Pathianin a rawn tîr a, tisaa sual awm chu thiam loh a chantîr ta;" 
Romans8:4 tisa dâna awm tawh lo, thlarau dâna awm tawh keimahniah hian Dânin a phût chu hlena a awm theih nân." 
Romans8:5 Tisa dâna awmte chuan tisa lam thilte an duh a, thlarau dâna awmte erawh chuan Thlarau lam thilte an duh ṭhîn." 
Romans8:6 Tisa lam thil duh chu thihna a ni si a, Thlarau lam thil duh erawh chu nunna leh thlamuanna a ni." 
Romans8:7 Tisa duhzâwng chuan Pathian a do va, Pathian Dân a zâwm si lo va, zawm pawh a zâwm thei hek lo:" 
Romans8:8 chuvângin, tisa duhzâwng anga awmte chuan Pathian an tilâwm thei lo." 
Romans8:9 Pathian Thlarau chu in hnêna a chên chuan tisa mi in ni tawh lo va, Thlarau mi in ni tawh zâwk a ni. Tu pawh Krista Thlarau nei lo chu ama mi an ni lo." 
Romans8:10 Tin, Krista chu nangmahnia a awm chuan in taksa chu sual vânga thi ni mah se, thiam chantîr in nih tawh avângin in thlarau erawh chu a nung a ni." 
Romans8:11 Mitthi zîng ata Isua kaithotu Thlarau chu nangmahnia a awm chuan, mitthi zîng ata Krista kaithotu chuan nangmahniah a thlarau chêntîrin, in taksa thi thei chu a tinung ang." 
Romans8:12 Chuvâng chuan, unaute u, bat kan nei, tisa dâna tisa taka nung tûr chuan a ni lo." 
Romans8:13 Tisa dâna in awm chuan in thi ngei ang: amaherawhchu, in taksa châk zâwng thil sual tihte Thlarauva in tihhlum chuan in nung ang." 
Romans8:14 Pathian Thlarau hruaia awm apiangte chu Pathian fate an ni e. 
Romans8:15 In Thlarau dawn chu bawih anga hlauva awmtîr leh tûr che u ni lovin, fa-a siam tûr che u Thlarau a ni zâwk e; chuvâng chuan, “Abba, Ka Pa” tiin kan au chhuak ṭhîn a ni." 
Romans8:16 Chu Thlarau ngei chuan keimahni thlarau nên inkawpin, Pathian fate kan nih min hriattîr a." 
Romans8:17 Pathian fate kan nih chuan a roluahtute kan ni, Krista tuarna kan ṭâwmpui si chuan a ropuina pawh kan ṭâwmpui ngei dâwn a ni." 
Romans8:18 Tûna tuarnate hi nakîna kan tân ropuina tihlan tûr nên chuan tehkhin thamah ka ruat si lo. 
Romans8:19 Thil siam zawng zawngte chuan Pathianin a fate a tihlan hun an nghâkhlel êm êm a ni. 
Romans8:20 Thil siamte chu anmahni duh vâng ni lovin, a siamtu thu avângin chhiatna tâwk tûra tih an ni; amaherawhchu, beisei tûr a la awm;" 
Romans8:21 thil siamte chuan chhiatna bawih ata tihchhuaha awmin Pathian fate zalênna ropui chu an ṭâwm ve dâwn a ni. 
Romans8:22 Thil siam zawng zawng chu tûn thlengin nau vei rûm angin an rûm tih kan hria. 
Romans8:23 Chu chang a ni lo, keini Thlarau rah hmasa dawngtute ngei pawh hi, a fa-a min siam hun, kan taksa tlanna tûr chu, nghâkhlelin kan rûm a ni." 
Romans8:24 Chu beiseina avâng chuan chhandam kan ni si a; amaherawhchu, hmuh tawh reng beiseina chu beiseina a ni lo ve. A hmuh tawh reng chu tu nge la beisei fo?" 
Romans8:25 Kan hmuh loh chu kan beisei erawh chuan kan nghâk fan fan ṭhîn a ni. 
Romans8:26 Chuvângin, Thlarau pawh chuan kan chak lohnaah min pui ṭhîn. Engtia ṭawngṭai tûr nge tih pawh kan hre si lo va. Thlarau chuan rûm sawi hleih theih lohvin min ṭawngṭaisak ṭhîn a ni." 
Romans8:27 Mi thinlung enfiahtu Pathian chuan, Thlarau sawi tum chu eng nge ni tih a hria; Thlarau chuan Pathian duhzâwng ang zêlin min ṭawngṭaisak si a." 
Romans8:28 Pathian hmangaihtu, ama ruat anga a kohte tân chuan, an ṭhatna tûrin engkimin a thawhsak ṭhîn tih kan hria;" 
Romans8:29 a hriat lâwkate chu ama Fapa ang taka awm tûrin a ruat lâwk si a; tichuan, Fapa chu unau tam tak zînga fa u ber a lo ni tawh ang." 
Romans8:30 Tin, a ruat lâwkate chu a ko va, a kohvate chu thiam a chantîr a, thiam a chantîrte chu a ropuina a chantîr bawk a." 
Romans8:31 Chûng thu-ah chuan eng nge kan sawi tâk ang? Pathian kan lama a ṭan chuan tuin nge min do thei ang? 
Romans8:32 Ama Fapa ngei pawh zuah lova, kan zaa tâna petu chuan engkim a thlâwnin min pe tel lo vang em ni?" 
Romans8:33 Pathian mi thlante chu tu nge hêk ngam ang? Pathian chu thiam chantîrtu a ni si a. 
Romans8:34 Tu-in nge thiam loh chantîr ang? Krista Isuan maw? Ani chu kan tân a thi chauh pawh ni lovin, a tholeh a, Pa Pathian ding lama awmin min sawisaktu a ni a." 
Romans8:35 Krista hmangaihna ata chu engin nge min ṭhen thei ang? Hrehawmnain emaw, mangannain emaw, tihduhdahnain emaw, ṭâmin emaw, saruaknain emaw, khandaihin emaw min ṭhen thei dâwn em ni?" 
Romans8:36 “Nangmah avângin nilêngin thah mai hmabâkin kan awm a, berâm talh tûr anga dah kan ni,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans8:37 Thei suh e! Chûng zawng zawngah chuan min hmangaihtu avângin ropui taka ngamtu kan ni. 
Romans8:38 Eng mahin - thihna te, nunna te, vântirhkoh te, lalna te, thil awm sa te, thil lo la awm tûr te, thiltihtheihna te," 
Romans8:39 sânna te, thûkna te, thil siam dang rêng rêng te pawhin, kan Lalpa Krista Isuaa awm Pathian hmangaihna ata chu min ṭhen thei lo vang tih ka hre chiang a ni." 
Romans9:1 Kristaah chuan thu dik tak ka sawi a ni; ka daw lo ve: Thlarau Thianghlim zârah ka chhia leh ṭha hriatna pawhin a hre chiang. 
Romans9:2 Ka rilru nasa takin a hrehawm a, ka lungngaihna pawh a reh thei lo." 
Romans9:3 Ka unaute, tisa lama ka chipuite aiah hian ânchhia dawngin Krista hnên ata tihhran ni ila ka ti hial ṭhîn." 
Romans9:4 Israel mi an ni a, fa nihna te, ropuina te, thuthlung te, Dân te, rawngbâwl hna te, Pathian thutiam te an chang a." 
Romans9:5 Thlahtute chu an pute an ni a, tisa lam chhui chuan Krista ngei pawh chu an chipui a ni; engkim chunga awm Pathian chu chatuana fakin awm rawh se. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Pathian thu chu a thlâwn ta tihna zawng a ni hauh lo; Israela thlah zawng zawng Israel mi an ni vek lo ve. 
Romans9:7 Abrahama thlah zawng zawng pawh a fate an ni vek hek lo. “Isaka-ah hian i thlahte chhui an ni ang,” Pathianin a tih zâwk kha." 
Romans9:8 Tichuan, tisa lama a fate chu Pathian fate an ni chuang kher lo, Pathian thutiam avânga a fate erawh chu Abrahama thlah dik taka ngaih an ni." 
Romans9:9 “Tûn ang hunah hian ka lo kal ang a, Sari chuan fapa a nei ang,” ti-a tiam a nih kha." 
Romans9:10 Chu chang chu a ni hlei nêm: mi pakhat, min thlahtu Isaka lakah Rebeki chuan phîr a pai a," 
Romans9:11 naute pian hma, a chhia emaw, a ṭha emaw an tih theih hma khân Pathianin a duhzâwng angin pakhat zâwk a thlang a ni tih a lang:" 
Romans9:12 thiltih avâng ni lovin, a kotu duhzâwng avâng zâwkin Rebeki hnênah, “A upa zâwkin a naupang zâwk rawng a bâwl ang,” a tih kha." 
Romans9:13 “Jakoba ka hmangaih a, Esauva erawh chu ka hua,” tih ziak a ni bawk." 
Romans9:14 Chuti a nih si chuan eng nge kan sawi tâk ang? Pathianah dik lohna a awm em ni? Awm lo ve. 
Romans9:15 Ani chuan, “Ka khawngaih apiang chu ka khawngaih ang a, zah ka ngaihna chung apiangah zah ka ngai ang,” tia Mosia hnêna a sawi kha." 
Romans9:16 Chuvângin, mihring duh thu emaw, thiltih emaw ni lovin, Pathian khawngaihnaah a innghat zâwk a ni."
