Romans9:17 Lehkha Thu-in Farawa hnênah, “He mi avâng ngawt hian ka tungding che a ni, nangmaha ka thiltihtheihna ka entîr theihna tûr leh, khawvêl zawng zawnga ka hming a than theih nân,” a ti si a." 
Romans9:18 Tichuan, Pathian chuan a duh apiang a khawngaih ṭhîn a, a duh apiang pawh a tiluhlul ṭhîn a ni." 
Romans9:19 “Chuti chu Pathianin engati nge mi a la dem cheu vang? A duhzâwng chu tu nge dodâl thei awm?” in ti a ni thei e. 
Romans9:20 Aw mihring, Pathian hnial veitu chu tu nge maw i nih le? Thilsiam chuan a siamtu hnênah, “Engati nge hetianga mi siam?” a ti ang em ni." 
Romans9:21 Bellei tlang khat aṭangin bêl hlu deuh te, hlu lo deuh te siam tûrin bêlvawtu chuan bellei chungah thu a nei lo vem ni?" 
Romans9:22 Chutiang chuan Pathianin a ti ṭhîn; a thinur leh a thiltihtheihna chu lantîr duh mah se, a thinurna dawngtu bêl, tihboral mai tûrte chu a dawh hrâm hrâm a;" 
Romans9:23 tin, a khawngaihna bêl, a ropuina chang tûra a buatsaih keiniho hnênah hian ropuina nasa tak a rawn tilang thung a ni." 
Romans9:24 Juda-te zîng ata chauh ni lovin, Jentail-te zîng ata a koh chhuahte hi chutiang bêlte chu kan ni." 
Romans9:25 Hosea lehkhabuah hetianga a sawi kha: “Ka mi ni ngai lote chu ‘Ka mite,’ ka ti ang a, Hmangaihngailohvi chu ‘Hmangaihi,’ ka ti ang." 
Romans9:26 ‘Ka mite in ni lo ve,’ an tihna hmunah ngei chuan Pathian nung fate vuah in ni ang,” tiin." 
Romans9:27 Isaia pawh khân Israel mite thu aupuiin, “Israel mite chu tuifinriat ṭiau zâtin tam mah sela, a bâng tlêm tê chauh chhandam an ni ang." 
Romans9:28 Lalpa chuan lei chunga a rorêlna tûr chu a hlen thuai dawn si,” a tih kha." 
Romans9:29 Isaia vêkin, “Engkim Lalpa chuan a chi thlah min lo zuahsak suh sela chuan, Sodom khua ang kan ni tawh ang a, Gomora khua ang mai kan ni tawh ang,” tia a lo sawi lâwk ang khân." 
Romans9:30 Eng nge kan sawi tâk ang le? Jentail thiam chan tum lêm lote chu thiam chantîr an lo ni ta, rinna avânga thiam chantîrna chu." 
Romans9:31 Dân zâwma thiam chan tum Israel-te zâwk chuan Dân ang chuan thiam an chang zo ta lo. 
Romans9:32 Eng vâng nge ni? Rinna lova thiltiha hmuh an tum vâng a ni a, Tlûkna lungah chuan an tlu ta a ni." 
Romans9:33 “Ngai teh, Zion-ah chuan inchhuiha tlûkna lung, Insuta tlûkna lungpui ka dah a, Tu pawh amah ring apiang chu An mualpho lo vang,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans10:1 Unaute u, ka chipuite chu chhandam ni se tih hi ka duhthusâm leh Pathian hnêna ka dîl ber ṭhin a ni." 
Romans10:2 Pathian tân ṭhahnem an ngaih nasatzia ka hria, hre chiang lovin ṭhahnem an ngai a ni." 
Romans10:3 Pathianin mi thiam a chantîr dân chu an hrethiam lo va, anmahni kawng an zawh tlat a, Pathianin thiam a chantîr dân hnuaiah an intulût duh lo." 
Romans10:4 A ring apiangte thiam chantîra an awm theihna tûrin, Krista chu Dân tibângtu a ni si." 
Romans10:5 Mosia chuan Dân zawm avânga thiam chan chungchâng thu heti hian a ziak: “Dân zâwmtu chu a nung ang,” tiin." 
Romans10:6 Rinna avânga thiam chan chungchâng thu erawh chu, “ ‘Tu nge vânah lâwn ang?’ (Chu chu chung lam ata tu nge Krista hruai chhuk ang, tihna a ni) emaw," 
Romans10:7 ‘Tu nge leilâwtah chhuk ang?’ (chu chu, mitthi khua ata tu nge Krista hruai chhuak ang, tihna a ni) emaw, in rilruin ti suh u,” a ti a." 
Romans10:8 “Thu chuan a hnaih a che, i kâah leh i thinlungah a awm,” a ti zâwk a ni. ‘Thu’ tih chu rinna thu kan hril hi a ni." 
Romans10:9 I kâin Isua chu Lalpa a ni tih i ṭana, mitthi zîng ata Pathianin a kaitho tih i thinlunga i rin chuan, chhandam i ni ang." 
Romans10:10 Thinlunga ring chu thiam chantîr an ni a, kâa ṭan chu chhandam an ni bawk a." 
Romans10:11 Lehkha Thu-in, “A ring chu tu mah an mualpho lo vang,” a ti a ni." 
Romans10:12 Juda nih emaw, Grik nih emaw danglamna a awm chuang lo; Lalpa pakhat chu an zaa Lalpa a ni a; amah lamtu apiangte tân chuan engkim a ngah a ni." 
Romans10:13 “Tu pawh Lalpa hming lam apiang chhandam an ni ang,” tih a ni si a." 
Romans10:14 An rin lohva chu engtin nge an lam theih ang? An hriat lohva chu engtin nge an rin theih ang? Hrilhtu an awm si loh chuan engtin nge an hriat ang? 
Romans10:15 Tirh an nih si loh chuan tu nge hril ang? “Thil ṭha chanchin rawn hriltute ke chu a va mawi êm!” tih ziak ang khân. 
Romans10:16 Nimahsela, Chanchin Ṭha chu an za-in an awih vek lo. Isaia ngei pawhin, “Lalpa, kan thu sawi tuin nge ring?” a ti si a." 
Romans10:17 Tichuan, rinna chu thu hril an hriat avângin a lo awm a, thu hril chu Isua Krista thu hi a ni." 
Romans10:18 A nih leh, an bengin an hre ngai lo vem ni? Hria e a! “An thâwm chu ram tinah a thang a, an thu chu kâwlkil thlengin a thang chhuak ta,” tih a ni." 
Romans10:19 A nih leh Israel miten an hre ve lo vem ni? “Chi-a sawi tham lohte chu ka thîktîr ang che u a, Chi fing lote avângin ka tithinur dâwn che u a ni,” tiin Mosia chuan a sawi hmasa a." 
Romans10:20 Isaia chuan a sawi huai lehzual a: “Mi zawng lote chuan mi hmu a, Mi lam lote hnênah ka inhriattîr a,” a ti a." 
Romans10:21 Israel-ho chungchâng thu-ah erawh chuan, “Mi tihmawh leh hel hmangho tân Nilêngin ka bân ka phar ṭhîn,” a tih kha." 
Romans11:1 A nih leh, Pathian chuan a mite chu a paih thla kan ti dâwn em ni? Paih thla suh e. Kei ngei pawh Israel mi, Abrahama thlah, Benjamin hnam ka ni si a." 
Romans11:2 Pathianin a mi hriat lâwkate chu a paih thla lo ve. Elija chanchin Lehkha Thua chuang kha in hre lo vem ni? Ani chuan Israel mite chungthu Pathian hnênah a thlen a: 
Romans11:3 “Lalpa, i zâwlneite an tihlum a, I maichâmte an tichim a, Keimah chauh hi ka la awm a, Kei pawh mi tihhlum an tum a ni,” tiin." 
Romans11:4 Pathianin engtin nge a chhân kha? “Baala hmaa ṭhingṭhi ngai lo mi sângsarih keima tân ka la zuah reng a ni,” tiin a chhâng a nih kha." 
Romans11:5 Tûnah pawh chutiang bawk chuan Pathianin a khawngaihna avânga a thlan chhuahte chu tlêm tê chauh an ni. 
Romans11:6 A khawngaihna avânga thlan chhuah an nih chuan, an thiltih vâng a ni thei lo; chuti ni se khawngaihna chu khawngaihna a ni thei lo vang." 
Romans11:7 Engtin nge ni ta ang le? Israel-te chuan an zawn chu an hmu lo va, Pathian thlan tlêm tê chauhvin an hmu, mi dang zawng zawng chu an chawlawl zo vek ta a ni." 
Romans11:8 “Pathianin vawiin thlengin rilru muthlu a pe a, hmu thei lo mit leh hre thei lo beng nên,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans11:9 Tin, Davida chuan, “An ruai siam chu an tân thang leh fal ni sela, Tlûkna leh thungrulhna ni rawh se!" 
Romans11:10 An hmuh theih loh nân an mit chu thim sela, Rit phurin kûl reng rawh se,” a ti bawk a." 
Romans11:11 A nih leh an tlûk avângin an chhe hlen dâwn em ni? Chhe hlen suh e, an tlûk avângin Jentail-te hnênah chhandamna a lo thleng a, Israel-te awh tûra lo thleng a ni." 
Romans11:12 Tichuan, an tlûkna mah khawvêl tihhausakna a niha, an tlâkhniamna mah Jentail-te hausakna a nih bawk si chuan, an lo tel kim hun chuan eng ang tak ni ang maw!" 
Romans11:13 Nangni Jentail-te hnênah thu ka sawi a nih hi. Kei hi Jentail tâna tirhkoh ka nih avângin ka rawngbâwl hna hi ka ngai ropui a ni; 
Romans11:14 ka chipuite ka thîktîr che u a, a ṭhen tal ka chhandam theihna tûrin." 
Romans11:15 Anmahni paihthlâkna mah khawvêl hi Pathian ṭhiana siam lehna a nih si chuan, anmahni lawm luh lehna chu thihna ata nun lehna a ni dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Romans11:16 Chhang hmeh lai hlâwm ata sawh thlâk hmasak ber chu serh thianghlim a nih chuan, a hlâwm pum pawh serh thianghlim a ni; tin, thing pawh a zung a thianghlim chuan a zârte pawh a thianghlim a ni." 
Romans11:17 Oliv thingzâr ṭhenkhat chu sât thlain, nangni oliv suakte chu oliv kûngah chuan zawm in ni a; zung ṭha chu in ṭâwm ve ta a." 
Romans11:18 Zâr dangte lakah chuan inchhuang mah ula, a zung châwmtu in ni lo, a zungin a châwm zâwk che u a ni." 
Romans11:19 Tin, nangin, “Zawma ka awmna tûr zârte chu sah thlâk a ni alâwm,” i ti ang e." 
Romans11:20 I ti dik e; an rin loh avângin sah thlâk an ni a, nang chu i rin avângin zawm i ni. Chapo mai teh suh, hlau zâwk rawh." 
Romans11:21 Pathianin zâr takte chu a zuah si loh chuan nang pawh a zuah bîk lo vang che. 
Romans11:22 Pathian ṭhatzia leh a ṭihbaiawmzia hi ngaihtuah teh; tlute tân a ṭihbaiawm a, a ṭhatnaa i awm reng chuan, nanga tân zawng a ṭha a ni; i awm reng loh chuan nang pawh sah thlâk i ni ve mai ang." 
Romans11:23 Tin, anni pawh ring lova an awm reng loh chuan zawmin an awm leh ang, Pathianin anni chu a zawm leh thei si a." 
Romans11:24 Nang oliv suak ata sah chhûm mah, pianphung pângngai ang lova oliv thing ṭhaa zawm i nih si chuan, oliv zâr dik tak chu oliv thing dikah chuan zawm a va awlsam zâwk dâwn êm!" 
Romans11:25 Unaute u, he thurûk hi in hriat loh ka duh si lo; chutilo chu, fing tâwk in lo inti dah ang e; Jentail-te an tel kim hma chu Israel mi ṭhenkhatte chungah chawlawlna a lo thleng rih a ni, tih hi." 
Romans11:26 Chumi hunah chuan a ni, Israel mi zawng zawng chhandam an nih dâwn ni. “Zion aṭangin Chhandamtu chu a lo chhuak ang a, Jakoba hnên ata suahsualna a ti bo vang.”" 
Romans11:27 ‘Chu chu an hnêna ka thuthlun tûr chu a ni, An sualte ka lâk bo hunah chuan,’ tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans11:28 Chanchin Ṭha an hnâwl avângin Juda-te chu Pathian hmêlma an ni a; nangni chan a ṭhat phah a; mahse, Pathianin a thlan avângin thlahtute azârah a ṭhian duh takte an ni tho." 
Romans11:29 Pathianin mal a sâwm tawh leh a thlan tawh chu sût leh theih a ni lo. 
Romans11:30 Hmânah chuan Pathian thu in awih lo va, tûnah zawng annin an awih loh avângin a khawngaihna in dawng ta a;" 
Romans11:31 chutiang bawkin, tûnah nangnin khawngaihna in dawn avângin, anni pawhin khawngaihna an dawn ve theih nân tûnah hian an awih rih lo a nih hi." 
Romans11:32 An zavaia chungah a khawngaihna a lantîr duh avângin Pathian chuan mi zawng zawng awih lohnaah a khung khâwm a ni. 
Romans11:33 Pathian hausakzia, a finna leh a hriatna chu a va thûk êm! A rorêl dân chu hriat phâk rual loh, a kawngte chu chhui theih rual loh a ni!" 
Romans11:34 “Lalpa rilru chu tu nge hriaa, tu nge a remruatsaktuah ṭang tawh?" 
Romans11:35 A rulh leh tûra a hnêna thil pe tu nge awm ngai le?” 
Romans11:36 Thil zawng zawng hi amah aṭanga lo awm, amah avâng leh ama tâna awm a ni. A hnênah chatuanin ropuina chu awm rawh se; Amen." 
Romans12:1 Chuvângin, unaute u, Pathian khawngaihna avâng hian, inthawina nung leh thianghlim, Pathian lawm tlâk ni tûrin, in taksa chu a hnêna hlân tûrin ka ngên a che u, chutiang chu in rawngbâwl dân tûr tak a ni e." 
Romans12:2 Tûnlai khawvêl awm dân ang hi ṭâwm suh u; in nun phung chu, in rilru tihthara awmin, tihdanglam ni vek rawh se; tichuan, Pathian duhzâwng, ṭha leh lawm tlâk leh ṭhat famkim chu in hrethiam thei ang." 
Romans12:3 Pathian mi pêk khawngaihna avâng hian in zînga tu mah inngaihlu lutuk lo tûrin ka ngên a che u. Pathianin mi tin hnêna rinna a pêk ang zêlin mahni phu tâwk rilru pu rawh u. 
Romans12:4 Taksa pum khatah pêng hrang tam tak kan nei a, pêng zawng zawngin thawh hrang an nei ṭheuh;" 
Romans12:5 chutiang bawkin keini pawh tam tak ni mah ila, Kristaah chuan taksa pumkhat kan ni a, kan za hian taksa pêng anga inzawm tawn ṭheuh kan ni." 
Romans12:6 Khawngaihna min pêk ang zêlin thilthlâwnpêk hrang hrang kan dawng ṭheuh a ni; thu hril lam a nih chuan, kan rinna ang zêlin hril ila," 
Romans12:7 rawngbâwl lam a nih chuan, ṭhahnemngai takin bâwl ila, zirtîr lam a nih chuan zirtîr ila;" 
Romans12:8 mi thlamuan tûr a nih chuan theihtâwp chhuah ila; petu chuan phal takin pe sela, rorêltu chuan taima takin rêl sela, puih ngai puitu chuan hlim takin pui rawh se." 
Romans12:9 Hmangaihna chu vervêkna tel lovin ni rawh se. Sual chu hua ula, a ṭha chu pawm tlat rawh u." 
Romans12:10 Unau inlainat angin inlainat tawn ula, inchawimawi tawn uar rawh u." 
Romans12:11 Inthlahdul hauh lovin rilru phûr takin Lalpa rawng chu bâwl rawh u. 
Romans12:12 Beiseina chuan tilâwm che u sela, tihduhdah in tuar pawhin chhel takin tuar ula, eng lai pawhin ṭawngṭai rawh u." 
Romans12:13 Unau tlachhamte chu chhawmdâwl ula, mikhual lawm chîng rawh u." 
Romans12:14 A tiduhdahtu che u chu malsâwm ula, ânchhia lawh suh u." 
Romans12:15 Lâwmte chu lâwmpui ula, ṭapte chu ṭahpui rawh u." 
Romans12:16 Angkhat vekin inen ula, intivei suh u, mi tête pâwl zâwk rawh u." 
Romans12:17 Sual chu sual vêkin thungrûl lo ula, mi zawng zawng ngaiha mawi ngaihtuah zâwk rawh u." 
Romans12:18 Nangni chuan in theihtâwpin mi zawng zawng nên inrem tum rawh u. 
Romans12:19 Duh takte u, phuba la suh ula, Pathian thinurna kian zâwk rawh u. “ ‘Phuba rêng rêng keima lâk tûr a ni, keiman ka thungrûl ang,’ Lalpan a ti,” tih ziak a ni si a." 
Romans12:20 Chuvângin, i hmêlma a rilṭâm chuan ei tûr pe rawh, a tuihâl chuan in tûr pe rawh; chutianga i tih chuan a zak êm êm dâwn a ni." 
Romans12:21 Sual ngam chein awm suh la, ṭhatnain sual chu ngam zâwk rawh." 
Romans13:1 Mi tinin an chunga rorêltute thu an awih tûr a ni. Pathian ruat lohvin rorêltu an awm thei lo; tûna rorêltute pawh hi Pathian ruat an ni asin. 
Romans13:2 Tichuan, rorêltu dodâl chuan Pathian ruat a dodâl a ni; dodâltu chuan ama chungah hremna a thlentîr ang." 
Romans13:3 Rorêltu chu thil ṭha titu tân a hlauhawm lo, thil sual titu tân erawh chuan a hlauhawm a ni. Rorêltu hlau lova awm i duh em? Thil ṭha ti la, a fak i hlawh ang." 
Romans13:4 I ṭhatna tûra Pathian rawngbâwltu a ni si a. Thil sual i tih erawh chuan hlau rawh, khandaih chu a keng mai mai lo a nia. Pathian rawngbâwltu a ni a, thil sual titute chunga Pathian hremna kengkawhtu a ni." 
Romans13:5 Chuvângin, hrem hlauh vâng mai ni lovin, i chhia leh ṭha hriatna avâng pawhin a thu i zâwm tûr a ni." 
Romans13:6 Chutiang a nih avâng chuan chhiah pawh in chawi ṭhîn; thuneitute chuan an hna ṭha taka an thawh chuan Pathian rawng an bâwl a ni si a. 
Romans13:7 Pêk tûra ruat apiangte hnênah pe ula, lei man pêk tûr a nih leh pe ula, chhiah chawi tûr a nih leh chawi ula, ṭih tûr chu ṭih ula, pawisak tûr chu pawisa rawh u." 
Romans13:8 Inhmangaih tawnna ngawt lo chu tu ma eng mah ba suh u; mahni mihringpui hmangaihtu chuan Dân a zawh famkim tawh a ni. 
Romans13:9 Hêng, “Uire suh, tual that suh, ru suh; awt suh” tih leh thupêk dang rêng rêngte hi, “Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte i hmangaih tûr a ni,” tih hian a khai khâwm vek si a." 
Romans13:10 Hmangaihnain vêngte a tikhawlo ngai lo va; chuvângin, hmangaihna hi Dân zawh famkimna a ni." 
Romans13:11 Tûnlai thil awmzia hi in hria e; muhîl thawhharh a hun takzet tawh a, tûnah chuan kan rin tirh lai ai khân chhandam kan nihna tûr ni chu a hnai zâwk tawh a ni." 
Romans13:12 Zân hi a ral lek lek tawh a, khua a vâr dâwn ta; chhûn ênga awmte angin mawi takin khawsa ila, thim thiltih chu paihin, êng thuamin i inthuam ang u." 
Romans13:13 Zu in buai leh ruia awm lovin, hur leh inngaih hmanga awm lovin, insual leh inîtsîka awm hek lovin." 
Romans13:14 Lalpa Isua Krista chuan inthuam zâwk ula, in tisa châkna puitlin tum rêng rêng suh u." 
Romans14:1 Rinnaa mi chak lo chu, a ngaih dân hnial tum kher lovin lâwm rawh." 
Romans14:2 Mi pakhatin engkim ei hi thiangin a ring a, mi chak lo erawh chuan thlai chauh a ei a." 
Romans14:3 Engkim ei mi chuan a ei lo chu hmusit suh se; a ei lo pawhin a ei mi chu sawisêl suh se, Pathianin ani chu a lâwm tho a ni." 
Romans14:4 Mi dang chhiahhlawh lo sawisêltu chu tu nge maw i nih le? A din ngheh emaw, a tlûk emaw chu ama pu thu thu a ni. A ding nghet ngei ang; Lalpa chuan a din chhuahtîr thei si a." 
Romans14:5 Tin, mi dangin ni khat hi ni dang aiin a ngaihlu bîk a, mi dangin ni zawng zawng hi inang ṭheuhvin a ngai thung a. Mi tinin mahni ngaih dân bulfûk mumal neih tûr a ni." 
Romans14:6 Ni pakhat serh bîktu chuan Lalpa chawimawi nân a serh a ni; engkim eitu chuan, Pathian hnêna lâwmthu sawi zeta ei a nih avângin Lalpa chu a chawimawi a ni. Ei lama insûm mi pawh chuan Pathian hnêna lâwmthu a sawi tho avângin Lalpa chawimawi nân a ti a ni." 
Romans14:7 Tu mah mahni tâna nung kan ni lo va, tu mah mahni tâna thi kan ni hek lo;" 
Romans14:8 kan nun chuan Lalpa tân kan nung a ni a, kan thih pawhin Lalpa tân kan thi a ni; chuvângin, kan nun pawhin, kan thih pawhin Lalpa ta kan ni." 
Romans14:9 Tichuan, mi nung leh mitthi Lal a nih theih nân Krista chu a thi a, a nung leh ta a ni." 
Romans14:10 Engtizia nge nangin i unaupa i sawisêl mai? Engati nge nang pawh i unaupa chu i hmuhsit mai? Pathian rorêlna ṭhutthlêng hmaah chuan kan la ding ṭheuh dâwn asin: 
Romans14:11 “Minunga chu ka ni, Mi tinrêng ka hmaah an ṭhingṭhi ang a. Lei tinrêngin Pathian ka nih an puang ang,’ Lalpan a ti,” tih ziak a ni." 
Romans14:12 Tichuan, kan za-in Pathian hmaah mahni chanchin kan sawi ṭheuh dâwn a ni." 
Romans14:13 Tichuan, insawisêl chîng tawh suh u, tu pawhin mahni unau tlûkna tûr emaw, lungnihlohna tûr emaw siam loh tum zâwk rawh u." 
Romans14:14 Lalpa Isuaah chuan thil rêng rêng amah ngawtah chuan thiang lo eng mah a awm lo tih ka hre chiang a ni; amaherawhchu, thil ṭhenkhat chu, thiang lova ngaitu tân chuan a thiang lo a ni mai." 
Romans14:15 I englo ei avânga i unau rilru a nat chuan, hmangaihna kawng i zawh tawh lo va ni. A thih ai Kristan a thihsaka chhiatna chu i thil eiin thlen suh." 
Romans14:16 Ṭha in tih zâwng chu mi sawichhiat lam chi ni suh se. 
Romans14:17 Pathian ram chu ei leh in lam thu a ni si lo va, Thlarau Thianghlim zâra thiam channa te, remna te, lâwmna te a ni zâwk e." 
Romans14:18 Chutianga Krista rawngbâwltu tawh phawt chu Pathian lâwmzâwng mi a ni a, mihring fak pawh a hlawh ṭhîn." 
Romans14:19 Tichuan, inremna tûr leh intihsâwt tawnna tûr thilte chu i ûm ang u." 
Romans14:20 I thil ei avângin Pathian hnathawh tichhe suh. Thil engkim ei hi thian zawng a thiang a ni; mahse, mi dang tlûk theihna thil ei erawh chu a ṭha lo." 
Romans14:21 Sa ei te, zu in te, unau tlûk theihna tûr thil rêng rêng tih hi chîn loh a ṭha a ni." 
Romans14:22 I rin dân chuan ring mai la, Pathian nêna in inkâr thu a ni. Mahni rin ang zâwng tia, inthiam lohna nei lo chu a nihlawh e." 
Romans14:23 Inthiam lo chunga ei chuan thiam loh a chang reng tawh a ni; a rin dân anga ti a nih loh avângin. Eng pawh rinna lova tih chu sual a ni. 
Romans15:1 Keini mi chak zâwkte hian mahni lâwmna zawng lovin, chak lo zâwkte chu an chak lohnaah kan ṭanpui tûr a ni." 
Romans15:2 Intihsâwt tawn nân mahni vêngte tilâwmin an tâna ṭha tih i tum ṭheuh vang u. 
Romans15:3 Krista pawhin mahni lâwmna a zawng si lo, “Nangmah chêksawlhtute chêksawlhna chu ka chungah a tla ta,” tih ziak ang khân a tuar zâwk a ni." 
Romans15:4 Lehkha Thua lo ziak tawh rêng rêng chu min zirtîr tûra ziak a ni, thu ziak aṭanga chhelna leh thlamuanna kan dawn azâra beiseina kan neih theih nân." 
Romans15:5 Tin, chhelna leh thlamuanna petu Pathian chuan, Krista Isua thu angin rilru hmunkhat puttîr che u sela," 
Romans15:6 thinlung hmun khat pua thukhat vuain, kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pa leh Pathian chu in fak za thei dâwn nia." 
Romans15:7 Pathian ropuina tûrin Krista chuan a lâwm che u ang khân inlâwm tawn rawh u. 
Romans15:8 Ka hrilh a che u, Pathian rinawmzia tihchian nân thlahtute hnêna a thutiam hlenin, Krista chu serh tanho rawngbâwltuah a lo awm a." 
Romans15:9 Jentail-te pawhin a khawngaihna avânga Pathian an chawimawi theihna tûrin: “Tichuan, Jentail-te zîngah ka fak ang chia, I hming fakin ka zai ang,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Romans15:10 Hetiang hian a ti bawk, “Jentail-te u, a mite nên lâwm rawh u.”" 
Romans15:11 Hetiang pawh hian a ti: “Jentail zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Ama mite zawng zawng pawhin fak rawh se.”" 
Romans15:12 Isaia pawhin heti hian a ti: “Jesaia zung zâm chu a awm ang a, Jentail-te lal tûrin a lo chhuak ang. Amahah Jentail-te chuan an beiseina an nghat ang.”" 
Romans15:13 Thlarau Thianghlim thiltihtheihna azârah beiseinaa in khah theihna tûrin, beiseina hnâr Pathian chuan in rin avângin lâwmna leh thlamuanna tinrêngin vûr che u rawh se." 
Romans15:14 Ka unaute u, nangniho hi ṭhatnaa khat, finna tinrêng ngaha, inzirtîr tawn thei tûr in nih ka ring tlat a;" 
Romans15:15 amaherawhchu, thil ṭhenkhat hriat nawntîr tûr che uin ka rawn ziak tho va. Jentail-te tâna thawk tûra Pathianin Krista rawngbâwl hna mi rawn hlan hi chhuangin ka ziak huai hle nghe nghe a." 
Romans15:16 Jentail-te chu Thlarau Thianghlima Pathian hnêna lawm tlâka inthawina atân hlan tûrin Chanchin Ṭha hril hi ka puithiam hna a ni si a. 
Romans15:17 Krista Isuaah chuan Pathian rawng ka bâwl hi ka chhuang hle a ni. 
Romans15:18 Jentail-te awihtîr tûra thu leh thiltihte, chhinchhiahna leh thil mak tihtheihnate leh Thlarau Thianghlim thiltihtheihnatea Kristan keimah hmanga a thiltihte lo chu eng mah ka sawi ngam si lo. Jerusalem aṭangin Illurikon leh a chhehvêl thlengin Krista Chanchin Ṭha chu hmun tinah ka hril vek tawh." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 Mi dang lungphûm chunga rem chho ka nih loh nân, Krista la hriat lohna hmun apiangah Chanchin Ṭha puan hi ka duh dân a ni si a:" 
Romans15:21 “A chanchin la hril ngai lohnaa mite chuan An hmu ang a, La hre ngai lote chuan an hria ang,” tih ziak ang khân hril ka tum zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Romans15:22 Chuvâng chuan a ni, in hnêna lo kal ka ṭhulh leh ṭhin ni." 
Romans15:23 Tûnah erawh chuan hêng lai ramah hian kalna tûr ka nei ta lo va; kum tam tak chhûng rawn tlawh che u ka châk tawh bawk nên; 
Romans15:24 Spain ram kal pahin lo kal ka inbeisei a, nangni nên inpâwl kham tê tê ila, kal ka tumna lama mi thlah ka beisei bawk a ni." 
Romans15:25 Tûnah tak hi chuan mi thianghlimho rawngbâwl tûrin Jerusalem khuaah ka kal rih dâwn. 
Romans15:26 Makedonia leh Akaia rama mite chuan phal takin Jerusalem khuaa mi thianghlimho zînga retheite tân thawhlâwm an thawh a. 
Romans15:27 Phal taka ti an ni; amaherawhchu, an lakah bat an nei ve rêng a ni; Jentail-ten an thlarau lam thilte an ṭâwmpui chuan, khawvêl lam thilah anmahni chhawmdâwl ve thung âwm rêng an ni." 
Romans15:28 Chu chu ka tiha, thawhlâwm chu an hnêna ka hlan fel hnuah, nangmahni tlawhin Spain ramah ka kal zêl ang." 
Romans15:29 Tin, in hnêna ka lo kal hun chuan Krista malsâwmna famkim nên ka lo kal ang tih ka hria." 
Romans15:30 Unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista leh Thlarau Thianghlim zâra in hmangaihnain Pathian hnêna mi ṭawngṭaipui ngat ngat tûrin ka ngên a che u." 
Romans15:31 Judai rama ring lote laka ka him theih nân te, ka rawngbâwlna hi Jerusalem-a mi thianghlimte tân thil lâwmawm tak a nih theih nân te," 
Romans15:32 rilru hlim taka ka lo kal theiha, Pathianin rem a tih chuan kan intihharh tawn theih nân te mi ṭawngṭaisak rawh u." 
Romans15:33 Remna Pathian chu in zaa hnênah awm rawh se. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kan farnu, Foibi, Kenkriai kohhrana rawngbâwltu hi," 
Romans16:2 Lalpa hminga mi thianghlimte tih âwm rênga lo lâwm tûr leh, puih a ngaihna apianga lo pui tûrin ka duh che u a ni. Amah pawh hi mi tam tak puitu a lo ni ṭhîn a, kei ngei pawh hi mi pui a ni." 
Romans16:3 Priski leh Akuila, Krista Isuaa ka hnathawhpuite kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:4 Anni chuan ka nun chhanhim nân thih pawh an huam kha; kei chang ni lovin, Jentail kohhran zawng zawng pawh an chungah an lâwm a ni." 
Romans16:5 An ina kohhran inkhâwmho kha chibai ka bûk e. Ka duh tak Epainata, Asia rama Krista ring hmasa bera kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:6 Mari, in tân rim taka thawktu kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:7 Andronika leh Junia, ka chipui leh ka tânpuite kha, chibai ka bûk e; anni chu tirhkohte zînga hmingthang tak an ni a, kei aia Krista ring hmasa an ni." 
Romans16:8 Ampliata, Lalpaa ka duh tak kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:9 Kristaa ka thawhpui Urbana leh ka duh tak Stakua kha chibai ka bûk e. 
Romans16:10 Kristaa mi tak, Apelia kha chibai ka bûk e. Aristobula chhûngte chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:11 Ka chipui Herodiana kha chibai ka bûk e. Narkisa te chhûng zînga mi Lalpaa awmte kha chibai ka bûk e. 
Romans16:12 Trufaini leh Trufosi, Lalpaa thawk rim ṭhînte kha, chibai ka bûk e. Duh tak Persi, Lalpa tâna rim taka thawk ṭhîn kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:13 Lalpa hnaa mi langsâr tak Rufa leh a nu, ka nu ve bawk kha, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:14 Asunkrita te, Flegona te, Hermea te, Patroba te, Herma te, an hnêna unau awmte nên, chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:15 Filologoa leh Juli nên, Nirea leh a farnu nên, Olumpa nên, an hnêna mi thianghlim awm zawng zawng nên chibai ka bûk e." 
Romans16:16 Fawh thianghlimin inchibai tawn ula, Krista kohhran hian chibai kan bûk bawk a che u." 
Romans16:17 Unaute u, zirtîrna thu in dawn kalh zâwnga in zînga inṭhenna leh tlûkna chawk chhuaktute lakah fîmkhur ula, anni chu hawisan tûrin ka ngên a che u." 
Romans16:18 Chutiang mite chuan kan Lalpa Krista rawng an bâwl lo va, mahni pumpui rawngbâwl mai an ni. An ṭawng hmang thiam leh kam ṭhatin mi mâwlte chu an bum ṭhîn." 
Romans16:19 Chanchin Ṭhaa in nghehzia hi mi tin hriat a ni; chuvângin, kei pawh in chungah ka lâwm a ni. Thil ṭha lama finga, sual lama in fihlîm ka duh a ni." 
Romans16:20 Remna Pathian chuan Setana chu in ke hnuaiah a rahbehtîr thuai dâwn che u a ni. Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnênah awm rawh se. 
Romans16:21 Ka hnathawhpui Timothea leh ka chipui Lukia te, Jasona te, Sosipatera te hian chibai an bûk a che u." 
Romans16:22 Kei, Tertia, he lehkha ziaktu hian, Lalpa hmingin chibai ka bûk a che u." 
Romans16:23 Ka thlen in-pa, kohhran inkhâwm thlengtu Gaia hian, chibai a bûk a che u. Khaw sum enkawltu Erasta leh a unaupa Kuarta pawhin chibai an bûk a che u." 
Romans16:24 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in zaa hnênah awm rawh se. Amen. 
Romans16:25 Pathian chu i chawimawi ang u; Ani chuan Isua Krista thu, Chanchin Ṭha kan hrilh leh tûn hnua thu ril inthup lo inpuang ta ang hian, in rinnaah nghet takin a dintîr thei che u a ni." 
Romans16:26 Tûnah zawng chu thu inthup ṭhîn chu Zâwlneite Lehkhaah a lo lang a, tu pawhin an rina an awih theihna tûrin, chatuan Pathian thupêk anga hnam tin zînga hriattîr a ni ta." 
Romans16:27 Pathian awm chhun, finga chu, Isua Krista avângin chatuanin ropui rawh se. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paula, Krista Isua tirhkoh ni tûra Pathian duhzâwng anga koh leh, kan unaupa Sosthena chuan," 
1Corinthians1:2 Korinth khuaa Pathian kohhran awm, mi thianghlim ni tûra koh, Krista Isuaa tihthianghlim leh hmun tina kan Lalpa Isua Krista, (anni leh keini Lalpa) hming lam zawng zawng chibai kan bûk e." 
1Corinthians1:3 Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. 
1Corinthians1:4 Pathianin Krista Isuaa khawngaihna a pêk che u avâng hian in chungthu-ah ka Pathian hnênah eng lai pawhin lâwmthu ka sawi ṭhîn. 
1Corinthians1:5 Amahah chuan kawng tinrêngin tihhausak in ni a, thu-ah leh hriatna tinrêngah in ṭhang zêl a," 
1Corinthians1:6 Krista thu kan hril khân nangmahniah zung a kai nghet ta a; 
1Corinthians1:7 tichuan, kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo lan in nghah chhûng hian thlarau lam thilpêk eng mah in tlachham lo va." 
1Corinthians1:8 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista nia sawisêlbova awm tûrin a tâwp thlengin a tinghet ang che u. 
1Corinthians1:9 A Fapa, kan Lalpa Isua Krista pâwlnaa ko lûttu che u Pathian chu a rinawm a ni." 
1Corinthians1:10 Unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista hmingin ka ngên a che u, in zîngah inṭhenna awm lovin thukhat vua ula, rilru thuhmun leh ngaih dân hmun khat neiin awm khâwm rawh u." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ka unaute u, in zîngah inngeih lohna a awm tih Kloii chhûngten mi rawn hrilh a." 
1Corinthians1:12 Chu chu ka han sawi ang e: “Kei Paula pâwl ka ni, kei Apolova pâwl ka ni, kei Kifa pâwl ka ni, kei Krista pâwl ka ni,” mi tinin in tih hi." 
1Corinthians1:13 Krista chu ṭhenin a awm em ni? In tân Paula chu khenbeh a ni em ni? A nih loh leh Paula hmingin baptisma in chang em ni? 
1Corinthians1:14 Krispa leh Gaia lo chu in zîngah tu mah ka baptis loh avângin ka lâwm a ni. 
1Corinthians1:15 Tuten emaw ka hminga baptisma chang angin an sawi dah ang che u. 
1Corinthians1:16 Stefana chhûngte pawh ka baptis tak e. Chûng mite tih loh chu mi dang ka baptis emaw ka hre lo. 
1Corinthians1:17 Krista chuan baptis tûrin mi tîr lo va, Chanchin Ṭha hril tûrin mi tîr zâwk a ni si a. Thufing hmanga hril tûrin mi tîr lo, chutilo chu Krista kraws hi engmah lovah an ngai dah ang e." 
1Corinthians1:18 Kraws thu chu boral mêkte tân chuan thu âtthlâk a ni, keini chhandam mêkte tân erawh chuan Pathian thiltihtheihna a ni." 
1Corinthians1:19 ‘Mi fing finna ka tiboral ang a, Mi thiam thiamna chu ka hnâwl bâwk ang,’ tia ziak a ni." 
1Corinthians1:20 Mi fing chu khawiah nge? Dân hremi chu khawiah nge? Tûnlai thila hnial thiam chu khawiah nge? Pathianin khawvêl finna hi thil âtthlâkah a siam ta a ni lâwm ni? 
1Corinthians1:21 Pathian finna chu hei hi a ni, khawvêlin finna hmanga Pathian an hriat theih loh hnuin, kan thu hril âtthlâk hmanga ringtute chhandam hi: chu chu Pathian lâwmzâwng tak a ni si a." 
1Corinthians1:22 Juda-te chuan chhinchhiahna thil mak an phût kher a. Grik-te lahin finna ngawt an zawng a; 
1Corinthians1:23 Keini erawh chuan Krista khenbeh thu kan hril a ni, chu chu Juda-te tân chuan dâltu a ni a, Jentail-te tân thil âtthlâk a ni." 
1Corinthians1:24 Nimahsela, Juda pawh ni se, Grik pawh ni se, kohte tân chuan Krista chu Pathian finna leh thiltihtheihna a ni." 
1Corinthians1:25 Pathian âtna chu mihring finna aiin a fing zâwk a, a chak lohna pawh mihring chakna aiin a chak zâwk si a." 
1Corinthians1:26 Unaute u, a koh dân che u hi ngaihtuah teh u, in zînga tam tak hi tisa lama mi fing in ni lo va, mi thiltithei tak pawh in ni lo va, mi ropui chhûng zînga mi pawh in ni hek lo." 
1Corinthians1:27 Nimahsela, Pathian chuan khawvêl mite ngaiha thil âte chu mi fingte tihmualpho nân a thlang a, khawvêla thil chak lote chu thil chakte tihmualpho nân a thlang bawk a;" 
1Corinthians1:28 tin, thil awm sate paihthlâk nân khawvêl thil mâwl leh hmusitawmte, thil awm lote nên lam Pathianin a thlang a." 
1Corinthians1:29 Chuvângin, Pathian hmaah chuan tu mah inchhuang thei an awm lo vang." 
1Corinthians1:30 Nangni zawng, Pathian zârah, Krista Isuaah chuan in awm ta a; ani chu Pathian hnên ata kan tân finna te, thiam chantîrna te, tihthianghlimna te leh tlanna te a lo ni ta a;" 
1Corinthians1:31 tichuan, an ziak angin, “Chhuan tûr duh chuan Lalpa chu chhuang rawh se.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Kei zawng unaute u, Pathian thu ril puang tûra in hnêna ka lo kal khân, thu thiam bîk leh fing bîk angin ka lo kal loh kha." 
1Corinthians2:2 In zînga ka awm chhûngin Isua Krista leh Krawsa khenbeh a nih thu chauh lo chu eng dang mah hria nih ka tum loh kha. 
1Corinthians2:3 In zîngah chak lo takin, hlau leh khûr chungin ka awm a," 
1Corinthians2:4 ka thu sawiah leh thu hrilah thu sawi tlawr leh thu fing hmang lovin, Thlarau leh a thiltihtheihna tilang zâwngin ka sawi zâwk ṭhîn a ni;" 
1Corinthians2:5 mihring finnaa innghat lova, Pathian thiltihtheihnaa in innghah zâwk nân." 
1Corinthians2:6 Puitling zîngah zawng thu fing kan sawi ṭhîn, tûnlai mite finna hi a ni lo va, an hotu, tlâwm mai tûrte finna lah a ni bawk hek lo." 
1Corinthians2:7 Thu fing inthup kan sawi hi Pathian thu ril, kan ropuina tûra leilung pian hmaa Pathianin a lo ruat lâwk tawh chu a ni." 
1Corinthians2:8 Chu chu he khawvêl rorêltu tu mahin an hre lo, hria sela ropuina Lalpa chu an khêngbet lo tûr." 
1Corinthians2:9 Lehkha Thu-in: “Mita la hmuh ngai loh, benga la hriat ngai loh, Mihring rilrua lût ngai lo, amah hmangaihtute tâna Pathianin a buatsaihsak chu,” a tih kha kan hril zâwk a ni." 
1Corinthians2:10 Chûng chu kan hnênah Pathianin Thlarauvin a rawn puang ta a; a ni, Thlarau chuan engkim, Pathian rilru thûk pawh a hre vek a." 
1Corinthians2:11 Mihring rilru chhûngril chu amaha awm thlarau chauh lo chuan tuin nge hria? Chutiang bawkin Pathian rilru chhûngril pawh Pathian Thlarau ngawt lo chuan tu man an hre lo. 
1Corinthians2:12 Khawvêl thlarau kan dawng lo va, Pathian Thlarau, Pathian hnêna mi kan dawng zâwk a ni, Pathian thilthlâwnpêkte kan hriat theih nân." 
1Corinthians2:13 Mihring finna an inzirtîr ṭhin chu hmang lovin, Thlarau zirtîrna hmangin thu kan sawi zâwk a, thlarau mite hnênah thlarau lam thil kan sawi fiah ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians2:14 Tisa mi chuan Pathian Thlarau lam thil eng mah a lâwm lo, a tân chuan âtthlâk mai a ni, thlarau chauhva hriat theih a nih avângin a hre thei lo." 
1Corinthians2:15 Thlarau mi erawh chuan thil engkim a thliar thiam a; ani lah chu tu man an hrethiam pha si lo. 
1Corinthians2:16 Lalpa rilru chu tu nge hriaa, amah chu zirtîr thei? Keini zawngin Krista rilru kan pu a ni." 
1Corinthians3:1 Unaute u, thlarau mite hnêna sawi angin in hnênah thu ka sawi thei lo va; tisa mi, Krista rinnaa nausênte hnêna sawi angin ka sawi zâwk ṭhin kha." 
1Corinthians3:2 In la ei theih loh avângin chaw rum ni lovin, hnute tuiin ka châwm ṭhîn che u a; tûn thleng pawhin in la ei theih loh hi." 
1Corinthians3:3 In la tisa mi hle a ni. In zîngah inîtsîkna leh inerna a awm chhûng chuan tisa mi, mihring taka la khawsa in ni tihna a ni lo vem ni?" 
1Corinthians3:4 In zîngah, “Kei Paula pâwl ka ni, kei chu Apolova pâwl ka ni,” tite in la awm chhûng chuan in tisa mi hle tihna a ni lo vem ni?" 
1Corinthians3:5 A nih leh Apolova chu tu nge a nih? Paula pawh chu tu nge a nih? In rin theihna tûra rawngbâwltu mai an ni asin; chu pawh chu Lalpan a pêk ang zêlin an thawk a ni. 
1Corinthians3:6 Keiin ka phun a, Apolovan tuiin a châwm a; nimahsela, Pathianin a ṭhantîr a ni." 
1Corinthians3:7 A ṭhantîrtu Pathian chauh lo chu, a phuntu leh tuia châwmtu chu eng mah an ni lo." 
1Corinthians3:8 A phuntu leh tuia châwmtu chu hna thuhmun thawk an ni. An thawhrim dân athuin lâwmman an hmu ve ve ang. 
1Corinthians3:9 Pathian tâna thawk dûn kan ni si a, nangni hi Pathian thlawhhma chu in ni e. Pathian in sak chu in ni bawk." 
1Corinthians3:10 Pathianin khawngaihna min pêk hmangin, in satu themthiam remhre tak angin a lungphûm ka phûm a, chumi chungah chuan mi dangin an rawn sa a; amaherawhchu, an sak dân hmangah fîmkhur ṭheuh rawh se." 
1Corinthians3:11 Lung rem tawh sa lo chu tu man lungphûm dang an phûm thei ta lo, chu lungphûm chu Isua Krista hi a ni." 
1Corinthians3:12 Chumi chungah chuan miin rangkachakin emaw, tangkaruain emaw, lungmantamin emaw, thingin emaw, hnimin emaw, buhpâwlin emaw in sa sela," 
1Corinthians3:13 mi tin hna thawh ṭhat leh ṭhat loh dân a la lang fiah ang; Krista ni chuan a la tilang dâwn si a, meia a inlâr dâwn avângin. Mei chuan mi tin hnathawh chu a fiah ṭheuh vang." 
1Corinthians3:14 Tu in sak pawh a kan loh chuan, chu mi chuan lâwmman a hmu ang a;" 
1Corinthians3:15 tu in sak pawh a kan chuan, chu mi chuan a chân ang, amah tak erawh chu chhanhim a ni hrâm ang, mei kan hnu ang maiin." 
1Corinthians3:16 Pathian chênna in chu in ni tih leh Pathian Thlarau nangmahniah a chêng reng tih in hre lo vem ni? 
1Corinthians3:17 Mi tu pawhin chu in chu an tihkhawloh chuan, Pathianin anni chu a tikhawlo ve ang; Pathian chênna in chu a thianghlim si a, chu in chu in ni e." 
1Corinthians3:18 Tu man mahni inbum suh se. In zînga tu pawh he khawvêl ngaiha fing nia a inhriat chuan, a lo fin tak tak theih nân â phawt rawh se;" 
1Corinthians3:19 he khawvêl finna hi Pathian ngaihin âtthlâk a ni si a. “Ani chuan mi fingte chu anmahni fin vervêknain a âwk a,” tih ziak a ni si a." 
1Corinthians3:20 “Lalpa chuan mi fingte ngaihtuahna chu engmah lo mai a ni tih a hria,” tih a ni bawk." 
1Corinthians3:21 Chuvângin, tu man mihringte hi chhuang suh se, engkim hi in ta vek a ni si a;" 
1Corinthians3:22 Paula emaw, Apolova emaw, Kifa emaw, khawvêl emaw, nunna emaw, thihna emaw, tûn hun emaw, nakin hun emaw, azain in ta a ni." 
1Corinthians3:23 Nangni pawh Krista ta in ni a, Krista pawh chu Pathian ta a ni." 
1Corinthians4:1 Keini hi Krista rawngbâwltu, Pathian thu ril enkawltua ngaih tûr kan ni a." 
1Corinthians4:2 Enkawltu atâna ruatte chu an rinawm phawt tûr a ni. 
1Corinthians4:3 Nangnin emaw, mi dangin emaw min fiahna hi engah mah ka ngai lo va, keimah lah ka infiah ngai hek lo;" 
1Corinthians4:4 eng mah indemna tûr ka hre si lo, sawisêlbo ka ni tihna zawng a ni lêm lo, mi fiahtu chu Lalpa a ni zâwk." 
1Corinthians4:5 Chutichuan, Lalpa lo kal leh hma loh chu, a hun lovah tu mah sawisêl suh u, chutih hunah chuan thima thuhrûkte chu a rawn tilang ang a, mi tinin mahni phu tâwkah Pathian fak an hlawh ṭheuh vang." 
1Corinthians4:6 Unaute u, hêng thu, “Thu ziak chu khûm suh u,” tih hi in zir theih nân kei leh Apolova hi in entawn atân ka han intârlang a ni, tu mahin pakhat chhuanga pakhat in thlauhthlâk loh nân." 
1Corinthians4:7 Tu-in nge mi dang aia danglam bîkah siam che? A thlâwna in dawn tih loh eng nge in neih? Chuti a nih si chuan i dawn ni lo ang maia engtizia nge i uanpui le? 
1Corinthians4:8 In hnianghnâr ta a ni maw? In hausa ta hle mai maw? Kan tel lovin in lal ta hle em ni? Lal tak tak ula kan va ti êm, in zârah kan han lal ve tûr!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Pathian hian keini tirhkohte hi thi tûra ruatte ang maiin lei leh vâna vântirhkohte leh mi zawng zawngin ennawma an en huai huai atân, a hnuhnûng berah min dah niin ka hre ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians4:10 Keini zawng Krista avângin mi â kan ni a, nangni erawh chu Krista zârah mi fing in ni. Keini kan chak lo va, nangni in chak thung a, keini chu miten min hmusit a, nangni zawng an ngaisâng che u a ni." 
1Corinthians4:11 Tûn thleng pawh hian rilṭâm leh tuihâlin kan awm a, silhfên kan tlachham a, mi kut kan tuar a, kan vâkvai a." 
1Corinthians4:12 Kuta rim taka thawkin ei kan zawng a, miin ânchhia min lawhin mal kan sâwm thung a, min tihduhdah leh chhel takin kan tuar a." 
1Corinthians4:13 Min chêksawlh leh ṭha takin kan chhâng a. Tûn thleng pawh hian khawvêl bawlhhlawh chhêk khâwm hnâwmhnawk ang leka ngaih kan ni. 
1Corinthians4:14 Hêng hi in zah nâna ziak ka ni lo, ka fa duh takte anga zilh nân che u ka ziak a ni." 
1Corinthians4:15 Krista lama kaihruaitu che u a sîng têl nei mah ula, pa zawng pakhat chauh in nei, kei hi Kristaa in pa, Isua chanchin Ṭhaa rawn hringtu che u ka ni." 
1Corinthians4:16 Chuvângin, mi entawn tûrin ka ngên a che u." 
1Corinthians4:17 Hei vâng hian ka fa duh tak, Lalpaa mi rinawm Timothea chu in hnênah ka rawn tîr a ni; ani chuan hmun tina Kohhran kan zirtîr ṭhin anga Isua Kristaa ka khawsak dân a rawn hriat nawntîr ang che u." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kei in hnêna lo kal leh lo tûr ang hrimin ṭhenkhat chu in uang hle a ni. 
1Corinthians4:19 Lalpan rem a tih chuan ka rawn tlawh thuai dâwn a che u; chutih hunah chuan hêng mi uangte hian eng nge an sawi, tih mai ni lovin, eng thiltihtheihna nge an neih tehrêng ka rawn hria ang." 
1Corinthians4:20 Pathian ram chu thu maiah a innghat lo va, thiltihtheihnaah a innghat zâwk a ni." 
1Corinthians4:21 A eng nge in duh? Talhfiak nêna ka lo kal nge in duh, thuhnuairawlh tak leh hmangaihna rilru nên?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Jentail-te pawhin an duh loh inngaihna bawlhhlawh in zîngah a awm tih thu a thang nasa hle a ni, mi pakhatin a pa nupui a neih kha!" 
1Corinthians5:2 Pawi ti hle tûr in ni a, engati nge in la uan theih cheu? In zîng ata chutiang titu chu hnawh chhuah tûr a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Tisain in zîngah awm lo mah ila, thlarauvin ka awm a, chutiang titu chungchâng chu in zînga awm angin kan Lalpa Isua hmingin ka ngaihtuah fel tawh." 
1Corinthians5:4 In inkhâwmnaah kei thlarauva in zînga tel ve angin, Lalpa Isua thuneihna hmangin," 
1Corinthians5:5 Lalpa Ni-a a thlarau chhandama a awm theih nân, a tisa tiboral tûrin Setana pe rawh u." 
1Corinthians5:6 In uanna hi a ṭha lo ve. Dawidim tlêm têin chhang hlâwm a pumin a fan chhuak thei tih in hre lâwm ni? 
1Corinthians5:7 Dawidim tel lo chhang in lo niha, chhang hlâwm thar hlak in lo nih theih nân dawidim hlui chu thian fai rawh u. Kan Kalhlên kûtna tûr Krista ngei chu hlanin a awm tawh si a." 
1Corinthians5:8 Chutichuan, i kût ang u, dawidim hlui, nun chhia leh sual dawidim telh chhang nên ni lovin, thianghlimna leh dikna telh chhang nên i kût zâwk ang u." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ka lehkhaah khân inngaih hmangte pâwl lo tûrin ka ti che u a. 
1Corinthians5:10 Khawvêl mi, inngaih hmang te, duhâm te, rûkru te leh milem biate kawmserh tûr ka tihna a ni lo; chuti ni se, khawvêl in chhuahsan a ngai dâwn si a." 
1Corinthians5:11 Ringtu, unau zînga tel si, inngaih hmang emaw, duhâm emaw, milem bia emaw, mi hau hmang emaw, zu heh emaw, rûk hmang emaw pâwl lo tûrin, an zîngah ei pawh ei lo tûrin ka ti zâwk che u a nih kha." 
1Corinthians5:12 Pâwn lam mite thu chu keia rêl tûr em ni? Pathianin a rêlsak tûr a ni lâwm ni? Chutiang mi sual chu in zîng ata hnawt chhuak rawh u. 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 In zînga miin ringtu dang laka thubuai a neihin, ringtute hnêna thlen lovin, engtizia nge ring lote hnêna a thlen ngam?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Ringtute chuan khawvêl ro an rêl dâwn tih in hre lâwm ni? Khawvêl rorêlsaktu tûrte in nih si chuan, thil tê tham pawh ngaihtuah tlâk lo in ni em ni?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Tûn dam chhûng thil chu sawi loh, vântirhkohte chungthu pawh kan la rêl dâwn tih in hre lo vem ni?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Dam chhûng khawsak thu rêl tûr in neihin, kohhrana enga maha ngaih lohte in rêltîr dâwn em ni?" 
1Corinthians6:5 A va zahthlâk âwm ve! Unau kâra thu rem thei mi fing pakhat tal in zîngah an awm lo vem ni? 
1Corinthians6:6 Chutia ring lo mite rem atân ringtuin a unau a khin tâk? 
1Corinthians6:7 Thubuai nangmahni zînga in nei ṭhîn hi, Kristian nunah in tling lo let dêr tihna a ni. Engah nge a tlâwm zâwk nih in hreh? A tuar zâwk nih pawh engah nge in hreh?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Chutih ahnêkin mahni unaute pawi khawihtu leh chhuhsaktu in la ni ta zâwk mah a. 
1Corinthians6:9 Mi dik lote chuan Pathian ram an chang thei dâwn lo tih in hre na nge? Bumin awm suh u, inngaih hmang te, milem bia te, uire te, mi hur te, mawngkawhur te," 
1Corinthians6:10 rûk hmang te, duhâm te, zu ruih chîng te, mi deu chîng te, hlêprûk chîng te chuan Pathian ram an luah lo vang." 
1Corinthians6:11 In zînga ṭhenkhat chutiang mi chu in ni ṭhîn a; nimahsela, Lalpa Isua Krista hmingah leh kan Pathian thlarauvah chuan tlen fai in ni a, tihthianghlim in ni a, thiam chantîr in ni tawh." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ka tân engkim a thiang a; mahse, a ṭangkai vek lêm lo, ka tân engkim thiang mah se eng bawihah mah ka inphal lo." 
1Corinthians6:13 Chaw hi pum tân a ni a, pum pawh chu chaw tân a ni; nimahsela, Pathianin a la tiboral ve ve dâwn. Taksa hi inngaih nân a ni lo va, Lalpa tân a ni zâwk, Lalpa pawh chu taksa tân a ni." 
1Corinthians6:14 Pathianin Lalpa chu a kaitho va, keini pawh chu a thiltihtheihna chuan min kaitho ve ang." 
1Corinthians6:15 In taksa chu Krista taksa pêng a ni tih in hre lo vem ni? Krista taksa pêng lain nawhchizuar pêngah ka siam dâwn em ni? Siam lul lo ve! 
1Corinthians6:16 Miin nawhchizuar a zawm chuan taksa pumkhat an ni ta tih in hre na nge? “An pahnih chuan tisa pumkhat an ni tawh ang,” tih ziak a ni asin." 
1Corinthians6:17 Lalpa zawmtu erawh chu amah nên thlarau pumkhat an ni. 
1Corinthians6:18 Inngaihna sual hi bânsan rawh u. Thil sual dang eng pawh miin an tih chuan, an taksa pâwn lam thil a ni a; inngaihna erawh hi chu mahni taksa chunga thil tihsualna a ni." 
1Corinthians6:19 In taksa hi, ‘in chhûnga awm Pathian hnên aṭanga in hmuh Thlarau Thianghlim chênna in a ni tih in hre na nge? Mahni ta pawh in ni tawh hlei nêm," 
1Corinthians6:20 mana lei in ni tawh asin; chuvângin, in taksa hian Pathian chawimawi rawh u." 
1Corinthians7:1 In thu han ziak chungchângah chuan: Mipain hmeichhia khawih loh a ṭha. 
1Corinthians7:2 Amaherawhchu, inngaihna a awm ṭhin avângin mipain nupui bîk nei ṭheuh sela, hmeichhia pawhin pasal bîk nei ṭheuh rawh se." 
1Corinthians7:3 Pasalin a nupui hnêna a tih tûr chu ti sela, chutiang bawkin nupui pawhin a pasal hnêna a tih tûr chu ti ve rawh se." 
1Corinthians7:4 Nupui chuan ama taksa chungah thu a nei lo va, a pasalin a nei zâwk a ni; chutiang bawkin pasal pawhin ama taksa chungah thu a nei lo va, a nupuiin a nei zâwk a ni." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ṭawngṭai tûra in inpêk theih nân rei lo tê atân rem in tih dun chauh loh chuan, a tua mah intidâwng suh u; chumi hnuah chuan in awm dân pangngaiin awm leh thuai ula, chuti lo zawng insûm zawh loh avângin Setanan a thlêm dah ang che u." 
1Corinthians7:6 Amaherawhchu, a thu pe zâwnga sawi ka ni lo va, a phal zâwnga sawi ka ni zâwk e." 
1Corinthians7:7 Mi zawng zawng keimah ang hian awm vek se ka duh a; mahse, mi tinin Pathian hnên ata thilpêk bîk kan dawng ṭheuh va, pakhatin kawng khatin, a dangin kawng dangin." 
1Corinthians7:8 La innei lote leh hmeithaite chu keimah angin awm sela a ṭha. 
1Corinthians7:9 An insûm theih loh erawh chuan nupui pasal nei mai rawh se, hur aiin inneih a ṭha zâwk si a." 
1Corinthians7:10 Innei tawhte chu ka thu ni lovin, Lalpa thupêk ka hrilh a che u - nupui chuan a pasal ṭhen suh se." 
1Corinthians7:11 A ṭhen vêk chuan mi dang nei tawh suh se, a nih loh leh a pasal nên an inrem leh tûr a ni; pasal pawhin a nupui ma suh se." 
1Corinthians7:12 Mi dang hnênah chuan Lalpa thu ni lovin, keimahin sawi tûr ka nei. Ringtuin ring lo mi nupuiah nei sela, a nupui chuan a hnêna awm zêl a duh chuan ṭhen suh se." 
1Corinthians7:13 Ringtu hmeichhia pawhin ring lo mi nei sela, a pasal chuan a hnêna awm zêl a duh chuan a ṭhen kher tûr a ni lo." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ring lo pa chu a nupui zârah tihthianghlim a ni a, ringlo nu pawh a pasal zârah tihthianghlim a ni bawk. Chuti ni suh se, in fate chu an thianghlim lo vang; nimahsela, an thianghlim a ni." 
1Corinthians7:15 Amaherawhchu, ring lo zâwkin ṭhen a duh chuan ṭhen mai rawh se; chutiang thilah tawh chuan ringtu chu, a hmei a pain phuar in ni lo ve; Pathian erawh chuan inrem tûrin a ko che u a ni." 
1Corinthians7:16 Nute u, in pasalte in chhandam dawn lo tih engtin nge in hriat? Pate u, in nupuite in chhandam dâwn lo tih engtin nge in hriat?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Mi tin hi Lalpan an hnêna a sem ang ṭheuh leh, Pathianin a koh laia an awm dân ang ṭheuhvin awm zêl rawh se; chutianga awm tûrin kohhran zawng zawng ka hrilh ṭhîn a ni." 
1Corinthians7:18 Serh tan tawh koh an awm chuan tihbo tum suh se, serh tan loh koh an awm chuan tan suh se." 
1Corinthians7:19 Serh tan hi eng mah a ni lo va, tan loh pawh eng mah a ni hek lo, a pawimawh chu Pathian thupêk zawm hi a ni." 
1Corinthians7:20 Mi tin koh an nih laia an dinhmun ngaiah awm rawh se. 
1Corinthians7:21 Bawih i nih laiin koh i ni em? Engto tehchiam suh; chhuak thei i nih erawh chuan chhuak mai rawh. 
1Corinthians7:22 Bawih, Lalpa koh chu, Lalpa bawih chhuah a ni; bawih ni lo Lalpa koh chu, Krista bawih a ni." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mana lei in ni tawh e, mihring bawihah awm tawh suh u." 
1Corinthians7:24 Unaute u, mi tin kohva in awm laia in dinhmun ngaiah ṭheuh Pathianah awm rawh u." 
1Corinthians7:25 Nula leh tlangvâl chungchâng thu-ah chuan Lalpa thupêk eng mah ka nei lo va; amaherawhchu, a ngilneihna azâra Lalpa ngaiha rinawm ka nih hi chhuangin ka ngaih dân ka sawi a ni." 
1Corinthians7:26 Hun harsain min nan tâk avângin mahni awm pangngai anga awm mai ṭha ka ti. 
1Corinthians7:27 Nupui nei i nih chuan ṭhen tum suh, nei lo i nih chuan nupui zawng suh." 
1Corinthians7:28 Nupui i neih pawhin thil i tisual lo ve; nula pawhin pasal a neih chuan thil a tisual lo. Amaherawhchu, nupui pasal neiten harsatna tam tak an tâwk ang, keiin chûng chu pumpelhtîr che u ka duh a ni." 
1Corinthians7:29 Unaute u, hun a tawi tâk êm avângin hei hi ka ti a ni; tûn chinah chuan nupui neite chu nei lo angin," 
1Corinthians7:30 lusûnte chu sûn lo angin, lâwmte chu lâwm lo angin, leitu chu nei lo angin," 
1Corinthians7:31 khawvêl thila inhmangte chu inhmang lo angin awm sela ka duh a ni. He khawvêl awm dân hi a boral mêk a ni. 
1Corinthians7:32 Lungkham nei lova in awm ka duh a ni. Nupui nei lo chuan Lalpa tilâwm tûrin Lalpa hna a engto va. 
1Corinthians7:33 Nupui nei erawh chuan a nupui tihlâwm nân khawvêl thil a engto va," 
1Corinthians7:34 a rilru a phîr ṭhîn. Pasal nei lo hmeichhia leh nula thianghlim chuan an taksa leh an thlarau vawng thianghlim tûrin Lalpa hna chauh an engto va; pasal nei erawh chuan a pasal tihlâwm nân khawvêl thil a engto ṭhîn. 
1Corinthians7:35 Hei hi in tâna sâwt tûr a nih avângin ka sawi a ni; khuahkhirh ka tum che u a ni lo ve, mawi taka in awm theih nân leh Lalpa rawngbâwl tûra in inpumpêk theihna tûrin ka sawi zâwk a ni." 
1Corinthians7:36 Mi tu pawhin a nupui hual lakah tidik lova a inhriata, lêngṭûl mai tûr a niha, inneih ṭûla a hriat bawk si chuan, a duh ang chuan ti sela, nei mai rawh se, thil a tisual lo ve." 
1Corinthians7:37 Amaherawhchu, nupui nei lo tûra nawr luih ni lova, ama duh thu ang ngeia neih loh tum tlat thei a nih chuan, a duh anga a tih chu a ṭha a, a nupui hual a nei lo chu a ti ṭha e." 
1Corinthians7:38 Chutichuan, a nula hual nupuia neitu chuan a ti ṭha e, nei lotu chuan a ti ṭha lehzual a ni." 
1Corinthians7:39 Nupui chu a pasal dam chhûng chuan phuar a ni a; a pasal a thih erawh chuan a duh apiang a nei thei ang; amaherawhchu, Lalpaa awm mi a ni tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians7:40 Nei lova a awm ngaia a awm zêl chu a nihlawh zâwk ka ring. Kei pawh Pathian thlarau neiah ka inngai a ni. 
1Corinthians8:1 Milem biakna thil ei thu chu: Kan za-in ‘hriatna’ kan nei ṭheuh tih kan hria a, chutiang ‘hriatna’ chuan mi a tichapo ṭhîn a, hmangaihna erawh chuan mi a siam ṭha ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians8:2 Tu pawhin thil hria nia a inngaih chuan a hriat tûr ang a la hre lo va ni. 
1Corinthians8:3 Miin Pathian a hmangaih erawh chuan Pathian mi hriat a ni. 
1Corinthians8:4 Chutichuan, milem biakna thil hlan ei thu-ah chuan - khawvêlah hian milemte hi eng mah an nih lohzia leh, Pathian pakhat chauh lo chu a dang rêng rêng an awm lohzia kan hria." 
1Corinthians8:5 Vânah emaw, leiah emaw pathian anga ngaih tam tak an awm thei a, chutiangin pathian tam tak leh lalpa tam tak an awm rêng a ni." 
1Corinthians8:6 Nimahsela, keini tân zawng Pathian pakhat chauh, Pa, engkim siamtu chu a awm a; keini pawh ama tâna awm kan ni; tin, Lalpa pakhat chauh, Krista chu a awm bawk a; thil engkim hi ama zâra siam a ni a, keini pawh ama zâra awm kan ni." 
1Corinthians8:7 Amaherawhchu, chu hriatna chu mi zawng zawngin an nei vek lêm lo, tûn thlengin mi ṭhenkhat milem be ṭhang an nih avângin an thil ei chu milem hnêna inthawina anga ngaiin an ei ṭhîn a; an chhia leh ṭha hriatna a chak si lo va, bawlhhlawhin an inhre ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians8:8 Eng pawh ni se, kan thil ei hian Pathian mit min tluntîr chuang lo; ei lo mah ila kan chhe chuang lo va, ei mah ila kan ṭha chuang hek lo." 
1Corinthians8:9 Amaherawhchu, fîmkhur rawh u, in zalênna hi engti kawngin emaw rinnaa chak lote tân tlûkna a lo ni hlauh dah ang e." 
1Corinthians8:10 Nang, chutiang hriatna nei, milem biakna ina i chaw ei lai, mi, a chhia leh ṭha hriatna chak lovin hmu ta che sela, milem hnêna thil hlante ei a ngam phah ve dâwn lâwm ni?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Chuti a nih chuan i hriatna chu ringtu chak lo tân chhiatna a ni ang asin; ani tân pawh Krista chu a thi si a. 
1Corinthians8:12 Chutianga unaute chunga in tihsuala, an chhia leh ṭha hriatna chu a chak loh nâk alaia, in hliam lehnghâl chuan Krista chunga thil tisual in ni." 
1Corinthians8:13 Chuvângin, ei leh inin ka unau a tihtlûk si chuan, ka unau chu ka tihtlûk loh nân kumkhuain sa rêng ka ei tawh lo vang." 
1Corinthians9:1 Zalên ka ni lo vem ni? Tirhkoh ka ni lo vem ni? Kan Lalpa Isua ka hmu tawh a ni lâwm ni? Nangni pawh hi Lalpaa ka hnathawh rahte chu in ni lâwm ni? 
1Corinthians9:2 Mi dangte tân tirhkoh ni kher lo mah ila, nangni tân zawng ka ni. Lalpa mi in ni hi tirhkoh ka nih chhinchhiahna chu a ni." 
1Corinthians9:3 Mi sawisêltute chu hetiang hian ka chhâng ṭhîn: 
1Corinthians9:4 Ei leh in tûr kan phût thei lo bîk em ni? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tirhkoh dangte leh Lalpa unaute leh Kifa te angin zinnaah Kristian hmeichhia kan hruai thei lo bîk em ni? 
1Corinthians9:6 Kei leh Barnaba hi kut hna thawka inchâwm chawp tûr kan ni bîk em ni? 
1Corinthians9:7 Mahni inchâwma sipaia ṭang tu nge awm? A rah ei si lovin tu nge grep huan siam ngai? A hnute ei si lovin tu nge ran vulh ngai? 
1Corinthians9:8 Hêng hi mihring thlîr dân aṭanga sawi ka ni lo ve. Dân thu pawhin hêng hi a sawi lo vem ni? 
1Corinthians9:9 Mosia Dânah chuan, “Bâwngpain buh a chîl laiin a hmui phuar suh,” tih ziak a ni. Pathianin bâwng tân chauh em ni a sawi?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Kan tâna sawi a ni zâwk lâwm ni? Ni e, kan tâna ziak a ni. Lei lettu chuan beisei neiin let sela, buh chîltu pawhin chan neih ve beiseiin chîl rawh se." 
1Corinthians9:11 Keinin in zîngah thlarau lam thil tuhin, in hnên ata tisa lam thil seng tel ta pawh ni ila, hlâwk ta lua kan ni bîk dâwn em ni?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Mi dangten in laka chutiang an phût theih chuan keini chuan thei lehzual tûr kan ni lâwm ni? Phût thei mah ila kan phût ngai lo. Krista Chanchin Ṭha chu kan dâl loh nân, engkim chhel takin kan tuar hrâm hrâm zâwk ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians9:13 Tempula rawngbâwltuten tempula thil hlante an ei a, maichâma inthawina hlântute pawhin an thil hlan aṭangin chan an nei ve tih in hre lâwm ni?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Chutiang bawkin Chanchin Ṭha hi Chanchin Ṭha hriltute ei hmuh nân Lalpan a ruat a ni. 
1Corinthians9:15 Mahse, kei chuan a enga mah hi ka chhawr lo, ka chunga chutiang in tih nân hei hi ziak ka ni lo; ka chhuan hi eng mah lova mi siamsak ai chuan ka tân thih a ṭha zâwk." 
1Corinthians9:16 Chanchin Ṭha hril mah ila, chhuang thei ka ni lo, tihmâkmawh ka chungah a innghat a ni. Chanchin ṭha hi hril lo ila ka chung a va pik dâwn êm!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Mahni duh thu-a hril ni ila, hlawh pawh ka nei ang chu, mahni duh thu-a hril ka nih si loh chuan Chanchin Ṭha enkawl hna mi pe a ni mai ang." 
1Corinthians9:18 Eng nge ka hlawh tâk ang le? Chanchin Ṭha hriltu ka nih avânga ka phût theih phût lova a thlâwna Chanchin Ṭha ka hril theihna hi a ni. 
1Corinthians9:19 Tu ma bawih ni lo mah ila, a tam thei ang ber ka lâk theih nân mi tin bawihah ka insiam ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians9:20 Tichuan, Juda-te ka lâk theih nân Juda-te zîngah Juda mi angin ka awm a; Dân hnuaia awm ni lo mah ila, Dân hnuaia mite ka lâk theih nân Dân hnuaia awm angin ka khawsa ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians9:21 Dân nei lote ka lâk theih nân an zîngah Dân nei lo angin ka awm ṭhîn, Pathian dân zâwm lo ni si lovin, Krista dân zâwm tlat siin." 
1Corinthians9:22 Mi chak lote ka lâk theih nân an zîngah chak lo angin ka awm ṭhîn. Chutiang chuan, eng emaw ti tala mi ṭhenkhat ka chhandam theih nân mi tin zîngah kawng hrang hrangin ka awm ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians9:23 Chanvo ka neih ve theih nân Chanchin Ṭha avângin engkim ka ti ṭhîn. 
1Corinthians9:24 Intlânsiakho chu theihtâwp chhuahin an tlân ṭhîn a; mahse, pakhat chauhvin lâwmman a hmu ṭhîn tih in hre lâwm ni? Chutiang chuan lâwmman hmu ngei tûrin tlân rawh u." 
1Corinthians9:25 Intlânsiaknaa tel tûrte chu kawng engkimah an insûm ṭhîn, chawimawina lukhum chhe mai thei hmu tûrin an bei a, keini erawh chuan chawimawina lukhum chhe thei lo hmu tûrin kan bei a ni." 
1Corinthians9:26 Chutiang tak chuan kei pawh pan nei rânin ka tlân a, boruak mai hnek lovin keimah ka inhnek ṭhîn," 
1Corinthians9:27 ka taksa hi ka sawi zawi a, ka thunun a; chutilo chuan, mite hnêna Chanchin Ṭha hriltu ni siin kei hi hnâwlin ka awm hlauh dah ang e." 
1Corinthians10:1 Unaute u, min thlahtute chunga thil thlengte kha hre reng rawh u; an za-in chhûm hnuaiah an awm a, tuifinriat Sen pawh an kai vek a," 
1Corinthians10:2 an vaiin chhûmah leh tuifinriatah Mosia zui tûra baptis an nih kha. 
1Corinthians10:3 An za-in thlarau lam chaw thuhmun an ei a," 
1Corinthians10:4 an za-in thlarau lam in tûr thuhmun an in bawk a, anmahni châwmtu thlarau lam lungpuia mi tui an in ṭheuh kha; chu lungpui chu Krista hi a ni." 
1Corinthians10:5 Chuti chung pawhin an zînga tam zâwk chungah Pathian a lungni lo va, thlalêrah khân an tlûk hlum kha." 
1Corinthians10:6 Thil sual tih an châk anga kan châk ve loh nân chûng chu min zirtîrtu tûr a lo ni. 
1Corinthians10:7 An zînga ṭhenkhatin milem an bia ang khân milem be suh u, “Mipui chu ei leh in tûrin an ṭhu a, lâm tûrin an tho leh a,” tia ziak ang khân." 
1Corinthians10:8 An zînga ṭhenkhat an inngai ang khân i inngai ve suh ang u, ni khatah mi sînghnih leh sângthumin an thih phah kha." 
1Corinthians10:9 An zînga ṭhenkhatin Lalpa an fiah ang khân i fiah ve suh ang u, rûlin a chuk hlum ṭeuh kha." 
1Corinthians10:10 An zînga ṭhenkhat Pathian laka an phunnawi ang khân phunnawi suh u, tiboraltuin a tihboral hlawm kha." 
1Corinthians10:11 Chûng an thil tawhte chu mi dang zilh nân a ni a; keini, hun tâwpa chêngte min zirtîrtu atân ziak a ni bawk." 
1Corinthians10:12 Tichuan, tu pawh ding nghet nia inhria chu a tlûk loh nân fîmkhur rawh se." 
1Corinthians10:13 Fiahna in tawh ṭhin hi mi tawh bâk a awm chuang lo. Pathian chu a rinawm a, in tawrh theih aia nasa fiahna in chungah a thlentîr lo vang, in do zawh theih nân fiahna lo thlen rualin pumpelhna kawng a siamsak zâwk ang che u." 
1Corinthians10:14 Chuvângin, ka duh takte u, milem biak hi hawisan rawh u." 
1Corinthians10:15 Thil chinchâng hre rual in ni bawk a, ka thu hi ngun takin ngaihtuah teh u." 
1Corinthians10:16 Malsâwmna no laa, malsâwmna kan sawi ṭhin hi Krista thisen kan ṭâwmpuina a ni lo vem ni? Chhang kan phel hi Krista taksa kan ṭâwmpuina a ni lo vem ni?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Chhang chu tlang khat a ni angin, keini hi tam tak ni mah ila, taksa pumkhat kan ni, chhang tlang khata mi kan chang ṭheuh si a." 
1Corinthians10:18 Pianna lama Israel-te hi ngaihtuah teh u, inthawina sa eitute chuan maichâm nên inkûngkaihna an nei lo vem ni?" 
1Corinthians10:19 He thu-ah hian eng nge sawi ka tum le? Milem hnêna thil hlan chuan hlutna a nei tih leh, milem pawh chuan takna a nei ka tihna em ni?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Ni suh e, Jentail-te inthawina chu Pathian hnênah ni lovin, ramhuai hnênah a ni tih thu ka sawi a ni. Nangni zawng ramhuai nêna inkûngkaihna in neih ka duh lo va ni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Lalpa no leh ramhuai no in in kawp thei lo vang; Lalpa chawhlui leh ramhuai chawhlui in kîl kawp thei hek lo vang. 
1Corinthians10:22 Lalpa chu kan tithinur dâwn zâwk em ni? Ani aiin kan chak zâwk em ni? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Eng pawh tih a thiang,” in ti maw? Tih vek chu a ṭha lêm si lo. “Engkim tih a thiang,” in ti maw? Engkim tihin mi a siam ṭha hek lo." 
1Corinthians10:24 Tu pawhin mahni ṭhatna tûr mai zawng lovin mi dang ṭhatna tûr zawng zâwk rawh se. 
1Corinthians10:25 Sa dâwra an zawrh tawh phawt chu dilchhût taka eng mah zâwt lovin ei mai rawh u. 
1Corinthians10:26 Lei leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi Lalpa ta a ni e. 
1Corinthians10:27 Ring lo miin chaw eia an sâwm che ua, kal in duh si chuan, dîlchhût taka zâwt lovin an hlui apiang che u chu ei mai rawh u." 
1Corinthians10:28 Amaherawhchu, tuin emaw, “Hei hi chu inthawina thil a ni,” tia a hrilh che u chuan, a hrilhtu che u avâng leh chhia leh ṭha hriatna avângin ei suh ang che u;" 
1Corinthians10:29 in chhia leh ṭha hriatna thu ka sawi lo va, mi dang chhia leh ṭha hriatna thu ka sawi zâwk a ni. A nih leh, ka zalênna chu mi dang ngaih dânin a dîpdâl tûr em ni?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Lâwm taka ka eia, a chunga lâwmthu ka sawina thilah hian engah nge sawichhiat ka nih ang?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Chutichuan in ei emaw, in in emaw, thil in ti emaw, in tih apiangah Pathian ropuina tûr hlîrin ti rawh u." 
1Corinthians10:32 Juda te, Grik te leh Pathian kohhran te ngaihmawh zâwngin awm suh u;" 
1Corinthians10:33 kei pawhin mahni hlâwkna zawng lovin, chhandam an nih theih nân mi tam tak ṭhatna zawng zâwkin, kawng tinrênga mi dang ka tilâwm ṭhîn ang hian." 
1Corinthians11:1 Keiin Krista ka entawn ang hian nangni pawhin mi entawn ve rawh u. 
1Corinthians11:2 Engkimah mi hriat reng ṭhin avâng leh pawm zêl tûr thu ka hrilh che u ang taka in awm avângin ka fak a che u. 
1Corinthians11:3 Hei hi in hriat ka duh: Mipa tawh phawt lu chu Krista a ni a, hmeichhe lu chu mipa a ni a, Krista lu chu Pathian a ni." 
1Corinthians11:4 Mipa, lukhum khum chunga ṭawngṭai emaw, thu hril emaw apiang chuan an lu an timualpho a ni;" 
1Corinthians11:5 hmeichhia, lukhum khum lova ṭawngṭai emaw, thu hril emaw apiang pawhin an lu an timualpho a ni, chutiang chu meh kâwn nên thuhmun reng a ni." 
1Corinthians11:6 Hmeichhiain lukhum a khum duh loh chuan mêt law law rawh se. Amaherawhchu, hmeichhe tân lu meh leh ziah kâwn a zahthlâk si chuan lukhum khum rawh se." 
1Corinthians11:7 Mipa erawh chu Pathian anpui leh ropuina tilangtu a nih avângin lukhum khum tûr a ni lo; hmeichhia erawh chu mipa ropuina tilangtu a ni. 
1Corinthians11:8 Mipa hi hmeichhia aṭanga siam a ni lo va, hmeichhia erawh chu mipa aṭanga siam a ni." 
1Corinthians11:9 Mipa hi hmeichhe tâna siam a ni lo va, hmeichhia erawh chu mipa tâna siam a ni." 
1Corinthians11:10 Tichuan, vântirhkohte avângin hmeichhiain an lu-ah mipa thuneih chhinchhiahna an khum tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians11:11 Nimahsela, Lalpaah chuan hmeichhia hi mipa tel lo chuan an awm thei lo va, mipa pawh hmeichhe tel lovin an awm thei hek lo." 
1Corinthians11:12 Hmeichhia hi mipa aṭanga siam a ni ang bawkin, mipa hi hmeichhe laka piang a ni si a; nimahsela, engkim hi Pathian aṭanga chhuak vek a ni." 
1Corinthians11:13 Ngaihtuah teh mah u, hmeichhia lukhum khum lova Pathian hnêna ṭawngṭai chu a âwm rêng rêng em ni?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Mipain sam sei a neih chuan a tân thil zahthlâk a ni tih in rilru pianpui pawhin in hre lâwm ni? 
1Corinthians11:15 Hmeichhiain sam sei a neih erawh chuan amah chawimawitu a ni, a sam chu amah khuh nân pêk a ni si a." 
1Corinthians11:16 Eng pawh ni sela, hei hi in hnial a nih pawhin, keinin emaw, Pathian kohhranten emaw chutiang kawngah dân kan nei lo ve." 
1Corinthians11:17 He zirtîrna zawm thu-ah erawh hi chuan ka fak thei lo va che u, in inkhâwm hi ṭhatpui ahnêkin in chhiat phah zâwk si a." 
1Corinthians11:18 A hmasa berin, Kohhranho in inkhâwmnaah inṭhenna a awm ṭhîn tih ka lo hria a, rin pawh ka ring deuh bawk a ni." 
1Corinthians11:19 In zînga mi dik takte an lan chian theih nân, ngaih dân hrang nei an awm chu a âwm rêng a ni." 
1Corinthians11:20 Hei vâng hian in inkhâwmna chu Lalpa Zanriah kîlna chi a ni lo; 
1Corinthians11:21 mi tinin mahni zanriah tûr in rawn keng a, mahniin in ei a, ṭhenkhat an ril a ṭâm a, ṭhenkhat an rui a." 
1Corinthians11:22 Chutianga ei leh inna tûr mahni in in nei ṭheuh a ni lâwm ni? A nih leh, Pathian Kohhran hmusitin nei lote chu tihzah in tum em ni? Eng nge ka sawi tâk ang? Ka fak dâwn che u em ni? He thu-ah hi zawng ka fak thei lo va che u." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ka thu hrilh chhâwn che u hi, Lalpa hnên ata ka dawn asin; khatia, mantîra a awm zâna, Lalpa Isuan chhang a lâka, lâwmthu a sawi zawha, a phela," 
1Corinthians11:24 “Hei hi ka taksa a ni, in tân a ni e, mi hriat reng nân heti hian ti ṭhîn rawh u,” a tih kha." 
1Corinthians11:25 Chutiang bawkin, an ei zawhah, no pawh chu a la a, “He no hi ka thisena thuthlung thar chu a ni, in in apiangin mi hriat reng nân ti ṭhîn rawh u,” a tih kha." 
1Corinthians11:26 Chu chhang chu in eia, no chu in in apiangin, a lo kal leh hma loh zawng, Lalpa thihna chu in puang ṭhîn a ni." 
1Corinthians11:27 Chuvângin, tu pawh tlâk lo chunga Lalpa chhang hi eia, a no hi in apiang chuan Lalpa taksa leh thisenah thiam loh an chang ang." 
1Corinthians11:28 Tichuan, mi tin mahni infiah ṭheuh sela, chutiangin chhang chu eiin no chu in rawh se." 
1Corinthians11:29 A ei leh intu chuan Lalpa taksa awmzia a hriat loh chuan mahni chunga rorêlna thlen tûrin a eiin a in a ni. 
1Corinthians11:30 Hemi avâng hian in zînga tam tak in chak lovin in bawrhsâwm a, in muhîl a ni." 
1Corinthians11:31 Mahni inenfiah hmasa ṭhîn ila chuan rorêlsakin kan awm lo tûr. 
1Corinthians11:32 Rorêlsaka kan awm pawhin, khawvêl mite nên thiam loh kan chan ve loh nân Lalpan min thunun ṭhîn a ni." 
1Corinthians11:33 Chutichuan, ka unaute u, Lalpa Zanriah kîl tûra in inkhâwmin innghâk ṭhîn rawh u." 
1Corinthians11:34 Rilṭâm an awm chuan inah ei zet rawh se; tichuan, in inkhâwm chu thiam loh in chan phah dâwn lo nia. Thil dang erawh chu ka lo kal hunah ka rawn tifel ang." 
1Corinthians12:1 Unaute u, Thlarau lam thilpêk thu hi in hriat loh ka duh lo ve." 
1Corinthians12:2 Jentail mi in nih lai khân milem ṭawng thei hlei lo lamah an hruai bo ṭhîn che u tih in hria e. 
1Corinthians12:3 Chuvângin, hei hi ka hriattîr a che u: Pathian Thlarauvah chuan tu mahin, “Isua chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se,” an ti thei lo va, Thlarau Thianghlimah lo chuan, “Isua chu Lalpa,” an ti thei bawk hek lo." 
1Corinthians12:4 Tin, thilpêk chi hrang hrang a awm a, chûng chu Thlarau pakhata mi a ni." 
1Corinthians12:5 Rawngbâwlna chi hrang hrang pawh a awm a, Lalpa pakhat tân a ni;" 
1Corinthians12:6 thiltihtheihna pawh chi hrang hrang a awm a, Pathian pakhat hnêna mi a ni, mi tin hnêna thiltihtheihna pe ṭhîntu chu." 
1Corinthians12:7 Sâwt tlânna tûrin mi tin hnênah Thlarau inhriattîrna chu a lo thleng ṭheuh va. 
1Corinthians12:8 Thlarau zârah mi ṭhenkhat hnênah thu fing sawi theihna pêk a ni a, mi dang hnênah chu Thlarau vêkah chuan thu hriat theihna pêk a ni a;" 
1Corinthians12:9 mi dang hnênah chu Thlarauvah bawk chuan rinna pêk a ni a, chu Thlarau vêkah chuan mi dang hnênah tihdam theihna pêk a ni a," 
1Corinthians12:10 mi dang hnênah thil mak tih theihna pêk a ni a, mi dang hnênah thu hril theihna pêk a ni a, mi dang hnênah Thlarau dik leh dik lo hriat theihna pêk a ni a, mi dang hnênah ṭawnghriatloh chi hrang hrang pêk a ni a, mi dang hnênah ṭawnghriatloh hrilh fiah theihna pêk a ni." 
1Corinthians12:11 Hêng zawng zawng hi Thlarau pakhat hnathawh vek a ni a, a duh ang takin mi tin hnênah thilpêk chi hrang hrang a pe a ni." 
1Corinthians12:12 Taksa hi pakhat a ni a, pêng tam tak a nei a; taksa pêng zawng zawng chu tam hle mah se, taksa pakhat a ni ang hian, Krista pawh chutiang chu a ni." 
1Corinthians12:13 Kan za-in Juda kan ni emaw, Grik kan ni emaw, bawih kan ni emaw, ni lo emaw, pumkhata awm tûrin Thlarau pakhata baptis kan ni a, Thlarau pakhat min intîr ṭheuh bawk a ni." 
1Corinthians12:14 Taksa hi pêng khat chauh ni lovin, pêng tam tak a ni zâwk a." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ke hian, “Kut ka nih loh avângin taksaa tel ka ni lo ve,” ti ta sela, chumi avâng chuan taksaa tel lo a ni chuang lo." 
1Corinthians12:16 Beng hian, “Mit ka nih loh avângin taksaa tel ka ni lo ve,” ti ta sela, chumi avâng chuan taksaa tel lo a ni chuang lo." 
1Corinthians12:17 Taksa pum pui hi mit ni ta vek sela, engtin nge ri kan hriat ang? Beng ni ta vek sela, engtin nge rim kan hriat ang?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Pathianin pêng hrang hrang hi taksaah hian ṭûl a tihna apiangah a dah a ni. 
1Corinthians12:19 An vaiin pêng khat chauh ni ta sela, taksa a awm thei dâwn em ni?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Pêng hrang hrang tam tak awm mah se, taksa chu pumkhat a ni." 
1Corinthians12:21 Tichuan, mit hian kut hnênah, “Ka mamawh lo va che,” a ti thei lo; lu pawhin ke hnênah, “Ka mamawh lo va che,” a ti thei hek lo." 
1Corinthians12:22 Taksa pêng chak lo zâwka langte hi an pawimawh zâwk a ni. 
1Corinthians12:23 Kan taksa pêng hmuhsitawm deuhva kan ngaihte hi, chûng ngei chu kan ngai pawimawh a, nasa takin kan chei ṭhîn a, a lang mawi lote chu kan cheimawi zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
1Corinthians12:24 Kan pêng mawi zâwkte chu chei pawh a ngai hlei nêm. Pathianin taksa hi a rem khâwm a, sitawm deuhte chu a chawimawi zâwk a," 
1Corinthians12:25 taksaah inhranna a awm lohva, a pêng hrang hrangte an inngaihtuah tawn theih nân a rem khâwm a ni." 
1Corinthians12:26 Pêng pakhatin a tuar chuan pêng zawng zawngin an tuar ve vek a, pêng pakhat chawimawi a nih chuan pêng zawng zawng pawh an lâwm ve vek a ni." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nangniho hi Krista taksa chu in ni a, a pêngte in ni ṭheuh bawk a ni." 
1Corinthians12:28 Pathianin a kohhranah hêng mite hi a dah a: a pakhatnaah Tirhkohte, a pahnihnaah Zâwlneite, pathumnaah Zirtîrtute, a dawtah thil mak ti theite, a dawt lehah tihdamna thilpêk neite, mi ṭanpui peihte, rorêl thiamte, ṭawnghriatloh chi hrang hrang neite." 
1Corinthians12:29 An za-in tirhkoh an ni vek em ni? An za-in zâwlnei an ni vek em ni? An za-in zirtîrtu an ni vek em ni? An za-in thil mak an ti thei vek em ni? 
1Corinthians12:30 Tihdam theihna thilpêk an dawng vek lo va, ṭawnghriatlohvin an ṭawng vek lo va, a hrilh fiah theihna an dawng vek hek lo." 
1Corinthians12:31 Thlarau thilpêk pawimawh zâwkte chu dawn châk hle rawh u. Kawng ṭha ber ka han entîr ang che u. 
1Corinthians13:1 Mihring ṭawngte leh vântirhkoh ṭawngtein thu sawi thei mah ila, hmangaihna ka neih si loh chuan, dâr ri ang emaw, dârbenthek ri ang emaw chauh ka ni ang." 
1Corinthians13:2 Thu hril theihna neiin, thu ril zawng zawng leh hriat tûr zawng zawng hre vek mah ila, tlâng sawn theihna khawpa rinna nasa nei mah ila, hmangaihna ka neih si loh chuan eng mah ka ni lo vang." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ka neih zawng zawng mi retheite tân pe vek mah ila, hâl tûrin ka taksa pawh inpe mah ila, hmangaihna ka neih si loh chuan ka tân eng mah a ni lo vang." 
1Corinthians13:4 Hmangaihnain a dawhthei a, ngil a nei bawk ṭhîn; hmangaihnain a îtsîk lo va, a infak lo va, a uang lo va," 
1Corinthians13:5 mawi lo takin a che lo va, mahni hma a sial ngai hek lo; a thinur duh lo va, thil sual a hre reng ngai hek lo:" 
1Corinthians13:6 hmangaihna chu thil dik lovah a lâwm lo va, thutak erawh chu a hlimpui ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians13:7 Engkim a tuar hrâm hrâm a, rinnain a khat a, a beisei tlat a, engkim a tuar chhuak ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians13:8 Hmangaihna hi eng tikah mah a dai lo vang; thuhrilnate erawh hi chu tihbân a la ni ang a; ṭawnghriatlohte pawh a la bo vang a, hriatnate pawh hi a la tâwp dâwn a ni." 
1Corinthians13:9 A ṭhen chauh kan hria a, a ṭhen chauh kan hril rih a ni." 
1Corinthians13:10 A famkim a lo thlen hunah erawh chuan a ṭhen chauhva kan hriat hi a famkim tawh ang. 
1Corinthians13:11 Ka naupan lai khân naupang ṭawngin ka ṭawng a, naupang rilru ka pu a, naupang ngaihtuah dân angin thil ka ngaihtuah ṭhîn; ka lo puitlin hnu erawh hi chuan naupang tih dân chu ka bân tawh." 
1Corinthians13:12 Tûnah zawng dârthlalanga lang riai ruai ang chauhvin kan hmu rih a, nakinah erawh chuan inhmatawnin ka hmu tawh ang. Tûnah zawng a ṭhen chauh kan hre rih a, nakinah chuan Pathianin min hre chiang ang hian kan la hre chiang ve ang." 
1Corinthians13:13 Tichuan, hêng thil pathum - rinna te, beiseina te leh hmangaihna te hi a awm reng dâwn, hêngahte hian a ropui ber chu hmangaihna hi a ni." 
1Corinthians14:1 Hmangaihna hi ûm zêl rawh u; thlarau lam thilpêkte chu dawn châk zêl bawk ula, thu hril theihna neih phei chu châk lehzual rawh u." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ṭawnghriatlohva thu sawitu chuan mi dang hnêna sawi lovin Pathian hnêna sawi a ni a, tu man a thu sawi awmzia an hre thei lo, Thlarauvah thurûk a sawi a ni." 
1Corinthians14:3 Thuhriltu erawh chuan mite hnênah thu a sawi a, a tisâwt a, a fuih a, a thlamuan ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ṭawnghriatlohva thu sawitu chuan ama tâna sâwt tûr a sawi ṭhîn a, thuhriltu erawh chuan kohhran tâna sâwt tûr a sawi ṭhîn." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ṭawnghriatloh nei vek ula ka ti hle, thu hril theihna phei chu nei vek ula ka ti lehzual a ni. Kohhran hlâwkpui tûra hrilh fiahsaktu an awm si loh chuan ṭawnghriatloh neite ai chuan thuhrilna neite chu an ṭangkai zâwk a ni." 
1Corinthians14:6 Unaute u, tûnah in hnênah lo kal ila, ṭawnghriatlohvin thu rawn sawi ta ila, thu ka puang emaw, ka hriattîr che u emaw, ka hril emaw, ka zirtîr che u emaw a nih si loh chuan in tân a hlâwk dâwn em ni?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Ri thei, nunna nei lo, hêng phênglâwng leh ṭingṭangte pawh hi awmze nei lova an tum chuan eng hla nge an sak tu nge hre thei ang?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Tawtawrâwt pawh mumal neia an ham loh chuan tu nge râl do tûrin insiam ang? 
1Corinthians14:9 Chutiang bawkin ṭawnghriatlohva in thu sawi chu hriat mai theih a nih si loh chuan tu nge hrethiam ang? Ṭawng mai mai in ni ang asin. 
1Corinthians14:10 Khawvêlah hian ṭawng chi hrang hrang a tam hle a ni thei e, awmze nei lo pakhat mah a awm lo." 
1Corinthians14:11 A thu sawi awmzia ka hriat si loh chuan ani chu ka tân ram dang mi ang a ni dâwn a, kei pawh a tân ram dang mi ka ni bawk ang." 
1Corinthians14:12 Tichuan, thlarau thilpêk dawn châk zêl ula, Kohhran tihphuisuina tûr thlarau thilpek in ngah theih nân zawng rawh u." 
1Corinthians14:13 Chuvangin, ṭawnghriatloh neite chuan a hrilh fiah theihna dîl rawh se." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ṭawnghriatlohva ka ṭawngṭai chuan ka thlarau chu a ṭawngṭai ngei na a, ka ngaihtuahna erawh chu ka hmang lo." 
1Corinthians14:15 Engtin nge ni ta ang le? Thlarauvin ka ṭawngṭai ang a, ngaihtuahna hmangin ka ṭawngṭai bawk ang. Fakna hla pawh thlarauvin ka sa ang a, ngaihtuahna hmangin ka sa bawk ang." 
1Corinthians14:16 Thlarauvin lâwmthu sawi ta ila, ringlote ṭhutnaa ṭhute chuan i thu sawi awmzia an hre dâwn si lo va, engtin nge i lâwmthu sawiah ‘Amen,’ an tih theih ang?" 
1Corinthians14:17 I lâwmthu sawi ṭawngṭaina chu a ṭha hle a ni thei e; mahse, mi dang a tisâwt si lo." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nangni aia ṭawnghriatloh ka hman tam zâwk avângin Pathian chungah ka lâwm hle a ni; 
1Corinthians14:19 mahse, Kohhran inkhâwmnaah chuan mi dang zirtîr nân ṭawnghriatlohva thu sîngkhat sawi aiin ngaihtuahna hmanga thu panga lek sawi ka duh zâwk." 
1Corinthians14:20 Unaute u, naupang takin thil ngaihtuah suh u; sual lamah chuan nausên ang ni ula, ngaihtuahnaah erawh chuan puitling takin awm rawh u:" 
1Corinthians14:21 “ ‘Ṭawnghriatloh hmang mite hmuiin He mite hnênah hian thu ka sawi ang a, Chuti pawhin an ngaithla lo vang,’ Lalpan a ti,” tiin Lehkha Thu-ah te ziak a ni." 
1Corinthians14:22 Chutichuan, ṭawnghriatloh hi ringlo mite tân chhinchhiahna a ni a, ringtute tân zawng a ni ve lo; chutiang bawkin thu hril hi ringtute tân chhinchhiahna a ni a, ringlote tân zawng a ni ve lo." 
1Corinthians14:23 Kohhran pum pui inkhâwmnaah in vaiin ṭawnghriatlohvin thu lo sawi ta ula, la hre lote emaw, ringlo emaw lo lut ta sela, in â ta emaw an ti dâwn lâwm ni?" 
1Corinthians14:24 In za-in thu lo hril ta ula chu, ringlo emaw, hre lo emaw lo lût ve te chu in thu chuan a khawih ang a, an sualzia a hriattîr ang." 
1Corinthians14:25 An thinlunga thurûkte chu tihlan a ni ang a, Pathian chibai bûkin an bawkkhup ang a, “In zîngah Pathian a lo awm takzet a ni,” tiin an puang zâwk ang." 
1Corinthians14:26 Unaute u, inkhâwmnaah hla nei te, zirtîrna nei te, thu puan tûr nei te, ṭawnghriatlohva ṭawng ṭûl te, hrilhfiahna nei te in awm si chuan engtia tih tûr nge ni ang? Kohhran siam ṭha zâwnga tih tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ṭawnghriatlohva thu in sawiin mi pahnih pathum bâkin thu sawi suh se, a indawtin sawi sela, pakhatin hrilh fiah rawh u," 
1Corinthians14:28 hrilhfiahtu an awm loh chuan inkhâwmnaah chuan ngawi mai sela, a fâlin Pathian hnênah sawi rawh se." 
1Corinthians14:29 Thu hril pawh pahnih pathum chauhvin hril sela, mi dangin chîk takin lo ngaithla rawh se." 
1Corinthians14:30 A ngaithlatute zîngah thu puan tûr nei an awm chuan a sawi hmasatu chu ngawi rawh se. 
1Corinthians14:31 A indawtin thu hril ṭhîn ula; tichuan, mi tinin zir tûr in nei thei ang a, mi tin in thlamuan thei ang." 
1Corinthians14:32 Thuhriltute thuhril theihna thlarau chu an thuhnuaiah a awm a ni; 
1Corinthians14:33 Pathian chu buaina Pathian a ni lo va, remna Pathian a ni zâwk. Kohhran tina Pathian mi thianghlimte tih dân angin," 
1Corinthians14:34 Kohhran inkhâwmnaah hmeichhiate chu ngawi reng rawh se, thu an sawi ve phal a ni lo ve. Dân buin a sawi angin thu an zâwm zâwk tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians14:35 Thil hriat duh an neih chuan in lamah an pasalte zâwt rawh se. Hmeichhe tân Pathian kohhran inkhâwmnaa thu sawi hi a zahthlâk si a. 
1Corinthians14:36 Pathian thu hi nangmahni aṭanga chhuak em ni? A nih leh, in hnênah chauh em ni a lo thlen?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Tu pawhin zâwlnei emaw, thlarau mi emaw nia an inngaih chuan in hnêna ka lehkha hi Lalpa thupêk a ni tih lo hre rawh se." 
1Corinthians14:38 Tu pawhin an pawisak loh chuan ngaihsak suh u. 
1Corinthians14:39 Chutichuan, ka unaute u, thu hril hi châk hle ula, ṭawnghriatlohva thu sawi pawh khap suh u." 
1Corinthians14:40 Amaherawhchu, engkim fel tak leh awmze nei taka tih tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians15:1 Unaute u, in hnêna Chanchin Ṭha ka rawn hril in lo pawm a, in innghah tâkna kha ka hriattîr leh che u a ni." 
1Corinthians15:2 Chanchin Ṭha ka hrilh che u ngei kha in pawm reng chuan chhandam in ni ang a, in pawm reng loh chuan in rinna chu a thlâwn a ni ang." 
1Corinthians15:3 Hêng hi ka thu dawn pawimawh ber ka hrilh chhâwn che u kha a ni; Krista chu Lehkha Thu ang zêlin kan sualte avângin a thi a," 
1Corinthians15:4 phûmin a awm a, Lehkha Thu angin ni thum ni-ah kaihthawh a ni a;" 
1Corinthians15:5 Petera hnênah a inlâr a, Sâwmpahnihte hnênah pawh a inlâr a;" 
1Corinthians15:6 chumi hnuah, ṭum khatah, unau zanga aia tam hnênah a inlâr leh a, chûng zînga a tam zâwk chu an la dam a, ṭhenkhat erawh chu an muhîl ta." 
1Corinthians15:7 Jakoba hnênah a inlâr leh a, chumi hnuah chuan tirhkoh zawng zawng hnênah a inlâr leh bawk a." 
1Corinthians15:8 A tâwp berah chuan, kei, a hun lova piang ang mai hnênah pawh a rawn inlâr a." 
1Corinthians15:9 Kei zawng, tirhkoh zînga tê ber ka ni, Pathian kohhran ka tihduhdah avângin tirhkohva vuah tlâk pawh ka ni lo." 
1Corinthians15:10 Nimahsela, Pathian khawngaihna avângin ka nih nih ka ni ta. A khawngaihna mi pêk hi a thlâwnin a awm lo ve, tirhkoh dangte aiin ka thawk nasa zâwk asin; nimahsela, keia thawh a ni lo va, ka hnêna awm Pathian khawngaihna thawh a ni zâwk." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tichuan, kei pawhin, anni pawhin khati khân kan hril ṭhîn a, nangni pawhin chu ngei chu in ring ta a." 
1Corinthians15:12 Krista chu mitthi zîng ata kaih thawh a nih thu kan hril a, in zînga ṭhenkhatin engati nge mitthi thawhlehna a awm lo in tih theih?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Mitthi thawhlehna a awm si loh chuan Krista pawh kha kaihthawh a ni lo vang. 
1Corinthians15:14 Krista kha kaihthawh a nih si loh chuan kan thu hril hi dâwt a ni ang a, dâwt ring lek in ni bawk ang." 
1Corinthians15:15 Pathianin Krista chu mitthi zîng ata a kaitho tih kan hril a, mitthi thawhlehna a awm si loh chuan Krista pawh kaihthawh a ni lo vang a, Pathian chungchâng thu-ah dâwt kan sawi a ni bawk ang." 
1Corinthians15:16 Mitthite kaihthawh an nih loh chuan, Krista pawh kha kaihthawh a ni bîk lo vang." 
1Corinthians15:17 Krista chu kaihthawh a nih si loh chuan in rinna hi eng mah a ni lo va, in sualnaah in la awm reng a ni ang." 
1Corinthians15:18 Chuti a nih chuan Kristaa muhîl tate pawh kha an boral ta a ni ang. 
1Corinthians15:19 Kristaa beisei kan neih hi tûn dam chhûng atân chauh ni ta se, mi zawng zawnga khawngaihthlâk ber kan ni ang." 
1Corinthians15:20 Mahse, Krista chu mitthi zîng ata kaihthawh a ni takzet a ni, mitthite thawh hmahruaitu a ni." 
1Corinthians15:21 Mihring avângin thihna a lo awm a, mihring avâng vêkin thawhlehna pawh a lo awm a ni." 
1Corinthians15:22 Adama-ah mi zawng zawng an thi ang khân, Kristaah mi zawng zawng tihnun leh an ni dâwn." 
1Corinthians15:23 Amaherawhchu, mahni hun ṭheuhvah a ni ang. Thawh hmahruaitu Krista chu a tho hmasa a, a dawtah, a lo kal leh hunah, ama mite." 
1Corinthians15:24 Chumi zawhah tâwpna chu a lo thleng ang. Rorêlna te, thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna zawng zawng te a tihbo hunah Pa, Pathian hnên ngeiah Ram chu a hlân ang." 
1Corinthians15:25 Pathianin hmêlma zawng zawng a hneha, a ke hnuaia a dah vek hma chu Krista chuan ro a rêl dâwn si a." 
1Corinthians15:26 Hmêlma hnuhnûng ber tihbova awm tûr chu thihna hi a ni. 
1Corinthians15:27 Pathianin, “Engkim a ke hnuaiah a dah,” tih a ni. Heta, ‘engkim’ tihah hian, Krista ke hnuaia engkim dahtu Pathian chu a tel ve lo tih a lang chiang a." 
1Corinthians15:28 A hnuaia engkim dah a nih hnuah, amah, Fapa ngei chu, a hnuaia engkim dahtu Pathian hnuaiah dah a ni ang a; Pathian chu engkima chungnung ber a ni tawh ang." 
1Corinthians15:29 A nih leh, thawhlehna hi awm lo ni se, engah nge mitthi puala baptisma an chan ang? Mitthite kaihthawh an nih dâwn si loh chuan engati nge an puala baptisma an chan ṭhin?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Eng vângin nge keini pawh hi dârkâr tin thih hlauhthâwnawma kan awm? 
1Corinthians15:31 Unaute u, kan Lalpa Krista Isuaa ka chhuan êm che u avângin, ni tin thihna ka hmachhawn tih ka hrilh che u a nih hi." 
1Corinthians15:32 Mihring tih dân angin Efesi khuaa sakawlhte kha sual ka nih chuan ka tân eng nge sâwt ang? Mitthite kaihthawh an nih dâwn loh chuan, “I eiin i in ang, natûkah kan thi mai dâwn si a,” an tih ang hian i awm ve mai ang u hmiang." 
1Corinthians15:33 Hruai bovin awm suh u, “Ṭhian sualin nungchang ṭha an tikhawlo ṭhîn,” tih a ni." 
1Corinthians15:34 Harh fîm ula, thil sual ti tawh suh u. Ṭhenkhat chuan Pathian hriatna rêng in neih loh hi, hei hi in zahna tûrin ka sawi a ni." 
1Corinthians15:35 ‘Engtin nge mitthite chu kaihthawh an nih ang? Eng ang taksa nge an put ang?’ tiin in zâwt a ni thei e.
