1Corinthians15:36 Chu chu zawhna âtthlâk tak a ni. Leia chi in tuh pawh hi a thih zet loh chuan a ṭo ngai hlei nêm. 
1Corinthians15:37 Buh chi emaw, thil dang chi emaw in tuh a ni thei e, in chi tuh chu a kûng lo la awm tûr chu a ni lo va, a fang mai a la ni." 
1Corinthians15:38 Pathianin a duh angin kûng a siamsak a, thlai chi hrang hrangin kûng chi hrang hrang an nei a ni." 
1Corinthians15:39 Tisa zawng zawng hi tisa chi khat a ni hek lo, mihring tisa a dang a, ran tisa a dang a, sava tisa a dang a, sangha tisa pawh a dang a ni." 
1Corinthians15:40 Vân taksa a awm a, lei taksa pawh a awm bawk a; vân taksa ropui dân leh lei taksa ropui dân pawh a inang lo." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ni hian ama ropuina a nei a, thlain ropuina hran a nei a, arsi pawhin ropuina hrang a nei, arsi hrang hrang ropui dân pawh a inang lo." 
1Corinthians15:42 Mitthi thawhlehna pawh chutiang bawk chu a ni ang. Ṭawih thei kha phûm a ni a, ṭawih thei lova kaihthawh a ni ang a," 
1Corinthians15:43 hmuhsitawm tak kha phûm a ni a, ropui taka kaihthawh a ni ang; chak lo tak kha phûm a ni a, thiltithei taka kaihthawh a ni ang." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kan phûm kha mihring lam taksa a ni a, kaihthawha awm tûr chu thlarau lam taksa a ni. Mihring lam taksa a awm chuan thlarau lam taksa pawh a awm ang." 
1Corinthians15:45 Lehkha Thu chuan, “Mihring hmasa ber Adama chu mi nung a lo ni ta a,” a ti a; Adama hnuhnûng ber chu nunna petu Thlarau a ni." 
1Corinthians15:46 Thlarau lam a hmasa lo va, mihring lam a awm hmasa a, chumi hnuah thlarau lam a lo awm chauh a ni." 
1Corinthians15:47 Mihring hmasa chu leia siam, leia mi a ni a, mihring pahnihna chu vâna mi a ni." 
1Corinthians15:48 Leia siamte chu leia siama ang kha an ni a, vâna mite erawh chu vâna mi ang kha an ni." 
1Corinthians15:49 Leia siama ang kha kan nih angin vâna mi ang kha kan la ni ang. 
1Corinthians15:50 Unaute u, tisa leh thisen hian Pathian ram chu a luah thei lo va, ṭawih thei hian ṭawih thei lo chu a luah dâwn lo tih ka sawi a ni." 
1Corinthians15:51 Thu ril ka hrilh dâwn che u hi: Kan za-in kan muhîl vek lo vang a; nimahsela, tawtawrâwt hnuhnûng ber rîk hunah chuan thâwklehkhatah, mitkhapkâr lovah tihdanglam kan ni vek ang. Tawtawrâwt chu a lo rîk hun chuan mitthite chu ṭawih thei lova kaihthawh an ni ang a, keini pawh tihdanglam kan ni ang." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Ṭawih thei hi ṭawih thei lovah a chang ang a, thi thei hi thi thei lovah a chang tûr a ni." 
1Corinthians15:54 Chutianga ṭawih thei hi ṭawih thei lova a chana, thi thei hi thi thei lova a chan hunah chuan he Lehkha Thu: “Thihna chu hnehnain a lem zo ta." 
1Corinthians15:55 Aw thihna, khaw nge i hnehna chu? Aw thihna, khawiah nge i tûr chu?” tih hi a lo thleng tawh ang." 
1Corinthians15:56 Thihna tûr chu sual hi a ni a, sual thiltihtheihna chu Dân hi a ni." 
1Corinthians15:57 Mahse, kan Lalpa Isua Krista zâra hnehna min petu Pathian hnênah lâwmthu awm rawh se." 
1Corinthians15:58 Chutichuan, unau duh takte u, tihchêt rual lohvin ding nghet ula, in thawhrimna chu a thlâwn dâwn lo tih hriain Lalpa hna ṭhahnemngai takin thawk rawh u." 
1Corinthians16:1 Mi thianghlimte tâna thawhlâwm thu-ah chuan Galatia rama kohhrante ka hrilh angin ti ve ang che u. 
1Corinthians16:2 Pathianni apiangin in zînga tu pawhin malsâwmna in dawn ang zêlin dah khâwl ṭheuh ula, ka lo kal hunah thawhlâwm khawn a ngaih loh nân." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ka lo kal hunah in thil pêkte chu Jerusalem-a kalpui tûrin in mi rinzâwngte chu lehkha keng chuan ka kaltîr ang. 
1Corinthians16:4 Ka kal ve a ṭûl chuan kan kal ho dâwn nia. 
1Corinthians16:5 Makedonia ram ka fan hnuin ka rawn tlawh ang che u; Makedonia ram fan a ṭûl tho si a. 
1Corinthians16:6 In hnênah rei tak ka châm mai thei, thlasik chhûng zawng pawh a ni mai thei e; tin, nangnin ka kal leh zêlna tûrah pawh min pui dâwn nia." 
1Corinthians16:7 Tûna kal paha hmuh zawk che u mai chu ka duh tâwk lo va, Lalpan rem a tih chuan rei tak in hnêna châm theih ka inbeisei a ni." 
1Corinthians16:8 Efesi khuaah hian Pentikos ni thlengin ka châm rih ang. 
1Corinthians16:9 Dodâltu tam tak awm mah se, hetah hian hlâwk taka rawngbâwl theihna remchâng a inhawng reng a ni." 
1Corinthians16:10 Tin, Timothea hi in hnên a lo thlen hunah, in zîngah inthlahrung lovin awmtîr ang che u, keimah ang bawka Lalpa hna ṭhahnemngai taka thawktu a nih hi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Chuvângin, tu man lo ngainêp suh u. Ka hnênah hlim taka a lo kîr leh theih nân lo ṭanpui ang che u; unau dang ruala a lo thlen ka beisei a ni." 
1Corinthians16:12 Unaupa Apolova erawh chu unau dangte ruala in hnêna lo kal tûrin ka ngên chiam a; mahse, tûnah chuan a duh rih lo tlat a, hun remchâng dangah a lo la kal ngei ang." 
1Corinthians16:13 Inring rengin awm ula, rinnaah ding nghet ula, huai tak leh chak takin awm rawh u." 
1Corinthians16:14 In tih apiang chu hmangaihnaa tih ni zêl rawh se. 
1Corinthians16:15 Stefana te chhûng kha Akaia rama ring hmasa an ni a, mi thianghlimte rawngbâwl hnaah an inpe zo tih in hria e;" 
1Corinthians16:16 chutiang mite leh an thawhpuite leh an rawngbâwlpuite thu chu zâwm zêl rawh u. 
1Corinthians16:17 Tin, Stefana te, Fortunata te, Akaika te lo kal hian mi tilâwm hle a ni; anni hian in awm loh pawh lang lovin mi siam a," 
1Corinthians16:18 in rilru an tiharh ang khân kei pawh mi tiharh a, hetiang mite hi ngaihlu rawh u." 
1Corinthians16:19 Asia ram kohhrante hian chibai an bûk a che u. Akuila leh Priskili leh an ina kohhran inkhâwmte hian Lalpa hmingin chibai an bûk mawlh mawlh a che u. 
1Corinthians16:20 Unau zawng zawngte pawh hian chibai an bûk a che u; fawh thianghlimin inchibai tawn rawh u. 
1Corinthians16:21 Hei hi, kei Paulan, keima kut ngeia chibai ka bûkna che u a nih hi." 
1Corinthians16:22 Tu pawh, Lalpa hmangaih lo chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se. Lalpa chu a lo kal e." 
1Corinthians16:23 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnênah awm rawh se. 
1Corinthians16:24 Krista Isuaah chuan ka hmangaihna in zaa hnênah awm rawh se. 
2Corinthians1:1 Pathian duhzâwnga Krista tirhkoh Paula leh kan unaupa Timothea chuan, Korinth khuaa Pathian kohhran leh Akaia ram pum puia mi thianghlim awm zawng zawng chibai kan bûk e." 
2Corinthians1:2 Pathian, kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians1:3 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pa leh Pathian, khawngaihnaa khat, thlamuanna petu Pa Pathian hnênah chuan lâwmthu i sawi ang u." 
2Corinthians1:4 Pathianin min thlamuannain hrehawm tinrêng tuarte kan thlamuan ve theih nân, ani chuan kan hrehawm tuar zawng zawngah min thlamuan ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians1:5 Krista tuar anga kan tuar tam poh leh Krista zâra kan thlamuanna chu a pung ṭhîn a," 
2Corinthians1:6 Kan tuarna hi in thlamuanna tûr leh in chhandamna tûr a ni. Kan thlamuanna hi nangni pawhin hrehawm kan lo tuar tawh ang chu chhel tak leh thlamuang taka in tuar ve theihna tûr a ni. 
2Corinthians1:7 Hrehawm min tuarpuitu in ni angin thlamuanna min chanpuitu tûr pawh in ni tih kan hria e; chuvângin, in chungah beiseina nghet tak kan nei a ni." 
2Corinthians1:8 Unaute u, Asia rama hrehawm kan tuar kha in hriat loh kan duh lo ve; khatia tuar zawh rual loh phurritin min delh a, dam rêng kan inbeisei tawh lohzia kha." 
2Corinthians1:9 Thi ngei tûra tih niin kan inhria a; mahse, mahni inring lova, mitthi kaithotu Pathian chu kan rin zâwkna tûr a lo ni a." 
2Corinthians1:10 Chutia thih hlauhawm taka kan awm chu min chhan chhuak a, min chhan chhuak leh bawk ang a; min la chhan chhuak zêl ang tih kan ring tlat a ni." 
2Corinthians1:11 Ṭawngṭaiin min ṭanpui ula, mi tam tak ṭawngṭaina avângin khawngaihna kan dawng ang a, keimahni avângin mi tam takin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu an la sawi ang." 
2Corinthians1:12 Hei hi ka chhuang a ni: Mihring finna vâng ni lovin, Pathian finna vâng zâwkin Pathian hmuhah nun tlang leh rilru ngîl tak puin mi zîngah kan awm ṭhîn a, nangni zîngah phei chuan chutiangin kan awm lehzual ṭhîn tih ka chhia leh ṭha hriatna pawhin mi hriatpui a ni." 
2Corinthians1:13 Kan lehkhaah khân, in chhiara in hriatthiam loh tûr eng mah kan ziak lo va, in la hriatthiam vek ka ring." 
2Corinthians1:14 Tûnah in la hrethiam vek lo na a, Lalpa Isua Nî-a kan chhuan tûr in ni ang bawkin in chhuan tûr kan ni asin." 
2Corinthians1:15 Chu chu ka rin tlat avângin hlâwkna thuah hnih in chan theih nân tlawh hmasak phawt che u ka tum a," 
2Corinthians1:16 chuta ṭangin Makedonia ram ka fang zêl ang a, chumi zawhah Makedonia aṭanga Judai ram pana ka kal pahin rawn tlawh leh che u ka tum a, ka kalna tûra min puih ka beisei a ni." 
2Corinthians1:17 Hei hi ka tum dân chu a ni a, tum mumal nei lo ka ni em ni? A nih loh leh mihring taka a chânga, “Ni e, ni e,” tia a châng leh, “Ni lo ve, ni lo ve,” ti mai mai ka ni em ni?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Pathian chu a rinawm avângin in hnêna kan thu pawh a chânga, “Ni e,” a chânga, “Ni lo ve,” tih ang hi a ni lo." 
2Corinthians1:19 Kei leh Silvana leh Timothean in hnêna a chanchin kan hril, Isua Krista, Pathian Fapa chu, “A ni,” leh “A ni lo,” a ni kawp ve si lo. Chutih ahnêkin amahah chuan “A ni,” tih chauh a awm." 
2Corinthians1:20 Pathian thutiam zawng zawng chu amahah chuan, “A ni,” tih vek a ni; chuvângin, keimahni avânga Pathian a ropuina tûrin Isua Krista zârah, “Amen,” kan ti ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians1:21 Kristaa keini leh nangni min tichaktu leh min serh hrangtu chu Pathian a ni. 
2Corinthians1:22 A ta-a min chhinchhiahtu leh kan thinlunga zakhamna Thlarau min petu pawh Pathian bawk a ni. 
2Corinthians1:23 Ka nunna chhâlin thuhretu atân Pathian ka lam a ni, nangmahni zuah tûr che uin a ni Korinth khuaa ka lo kal tâk loh ni." 
2Corinthians1:24 In rinna chungah intihlal kan tum lo ve, in lâwmna atân nangni nên kan thawk tlâng a ni zâwk, rinnaa ding in ni si a." 
2Corinthians2:1 Chuvângin, in thin tina tûr chuan in hnênah lo kal leh tawh lo ila ka ti ta a ni." 
2Corinthians2:2 Keiin in thin ka tihnat si chuan, nangni ka tihnatte vêk lo chuan tu nge mi tilâwm ang?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ka lo kal huna mi tilâwmtu tûrten ka thin in tihnat loh nân kha lehkha kha ka rawn thawn che u a ni, ka lâwmna chu in za-in mi lâwmpui ve ka ring tlat a ni." 
2Corinthians2:4 Mittui tam tak tla chungin, rilru mangang leh hrehawm ti chungin, in thin tina tûr ni lovin, ka hmangaihzia che u in hriat theihna tûrin ka rawn thawn a nih kha." 
2Corinthians2:5 Lungngaihna thlentu hian kei chang mi tilungngai a ni lo, eng emaw chenah in za-in a tilungngai che u a ni ti ila, ka uar lutuk lâwng chu maw." 
2Corinthians2:6 Mi tam zâwkin hetianga in hrem hi a tâwk e. 
2Corinthians2:7 Tichuan, khawngaih ula, thlamuan tawh zâwk rawh u; chuti lo zawng, lungngaih lutuk vângin a beidawng dah ang e." 
2Corinthians2:8 Amah chu in hmangaih a ni tih lantîr tûrin ka ngên a che u," 
2Corinthians2:9 Kawng tinrêngah thu in awihin fiah in dâwl tih ka hriat theih nân lehkha kha ka rawn thawn che u a ni. 
2Corinthians2:10 Tu pawh in ngaihdam apiang kei pawhin ka ngaidam ve a; tu pawh ka lo ngaihdam a, eng pawh ka lo ngaihdam tawh chu nangmahni avângin Krista hmaa ngaidam ka ni;" 
2Corinthians2:11 chutilo zawng, Setanan min dinchan khalh dah ang e, a tum chu kan hai si lo va." 
2Corinthians2:12 Krista Chanchin Ṭha hril tûra Troas khua ka thlen khân, Lalpa chuan rawngbâwlna kawng mi hawnsak na a," 
2Corinthians2:13 ka unaupa Tita ka hmuh loh avângin ka mangang êm êm a; tichuan, anni chu chibai ka bûk a, Makedonia ramah ka kalsan leh ta zâwk a ni." 
2Corinthians2:14 Nimahsela, Pathian hnênah lâwmthu awm rawh se. Ani chuan Krista zâra hnehtu kawng zawhnaah min hruai zêl a; Krista hriatna rimtui hmun tina lên chhuahtîrtuah min hmang a ni." 
2Corinthians2:15 Chhandam mêkte leh boral mêkte tân Pathian hnêna Krista rimtui hlan chu kan ni. 
2Corinthians2:16 Boral mêkte tân chuan thihna tûra thih theihna rimchhia kan ni a, chhandam mêkte tân erawh chuan nunna tûra nun theihna rimtui kan ni. Chûng atân chuan tu nge tling ang?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Mi tam takin Pathian thu hi sumdâwn nân an hmang angin keini zawngin kan hmang ve lo ve; Pathian tirhin, Pathian hmuhah, Kristaah chuan tihtakzetin thu kan sawi zâwk ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians3:1 Mahni insawimawi kan ṭan leh ta em ni? A nih loh leh, mi dangte ang bawkin sawimawina lehkha kan rawn ken emaw, in hnên ata kan lâk emaw a ṭûl ta em ni?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nangni hi kan lehkha, kan thinlung chhûnga ziak, mi tin hriat leh chhiar chu in ni asin." 
2Corinthians3:3 Nangni hi Krista lehkha, keimahni min ziaktîr, lehkhatuia ziak ni lo, Pathian nung Thlarauva ziak, lung phêka ziak ni lo, tisa thinlung phêka ziak chu in ni tih a lang chiang a ni." 
2Corinthians3:4 Krista zârah chutiang tak chuan Pathian kan ring a ni. 
2Corinthians3:5 Keimahni ngawt chuan kan tlin lo va, keimahni tih anga sawi tûr eng mah a awm hek lo, kan tlin theihna chu Pathian min pek a ni zâwk." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ani chuan Thuthlung Thar rawngbâwl tlâkah min siam a, chu chu Dân, hawrawpa ziak ang kha a ni lo ve; Thuthlung Thar, Thlarauva ziak chu a ni zâwk. Dân, hawrawpa ziak khân thihna a thlen a, Thlarauva ziak erawh chuan nunna a thlen a ni." 
2Corinthians3:7 Mosia hmêl êng, reh leh mai tûr pawh Israel faten an en reng ngam loh khawpin a ropui a; lunga hawrawpa ziak, thihna thlentu rawngbâwlna mah khati taka ropui a nih chuan," 
2Corinthians3:8 Thlarau rawngbâwlna chu a ropui lehzual dâwn lâwm ni? 
2Corinthians3:9 Thiam loh chantîrna rawngbâwlna mah a ropui chuan, thiam chantîrna rawngbâwlna chu a va ropui dâwn êm!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Chumi kawngah chuan, ropui taka kha, a aia ropui zâwk daih a lo awm tâk avângin a ropui reng tawh lo ve." 
2Corinthians3:11 Reh leh ta mai mah kha chuti taka ropui a nih chuan, awm hlen tûr chu engti takin ropui ang maw!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Chutiang beiseina chu kan neih avângin keini zawng kan huai êm êm a ni. Mosia tih ang khân kan ti lo ve. 
2Corinthians3:13 Ani chuan a hmêl êng a reh thlenga Israel faten an en reng loh nân, hmaikhuhnain a hmai a khuh a." 
2Corinthians3:14 An rilru pawh a chawlawl a ni, vawiin thleng hian Thuthlung Hlui bu an chhiar apiangin chu khuhna chuan a la khuh reng a ni: Kristaah chauh chu khuhna chu lâk bo a ni." 
2Corinthians3:15 Tûn thlengin Mosia lehkhabu an chhiar apiangin chu khuhna chuan an thinlung chu a la khuh reng a ni. 
2Corinthians3:16 Nimahsela, Lalpa Isua lam an hawi hun apiangah chu khuhna chu lâk bo a ni tawh ang." 
2Corinthians3:17 Lalpa chu Thlarau a ni a, Lalpa Thlarau awmna apiangah zalênna a awm ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians3:18 Chutichuan, keini, hmai khuh lohva awm zawng zawng hian Lalpa ropuina chu kan lantîr a, ropuina aṭanga ropui deuh deuh atân ama anpuia awm tûrin tihdanglam kan ni - chu chu Lalpa tih a ni a, ani chu Thlarau a ni." 
2Corinthians4:1 Chutichuan, khawngaihna zâra he rawngbâwl hna hi kan hmuh avângin kan zâm lo ve." 
2Corinthians4:2 Thil zahpuiawm, a rûka an tih ṭhinte chu kan hnâwl a. Fin vervêk thawhin Pathian thu a dik lo zâwnga sawi kan chîng ve hek lo. Thutak kan târlang a, Pathian hmaah mi tin chhia leh ṭha hriatna mittlunga awm kan tum zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kan Chanchin Ṭha hril hi khuh a nih pawhin, boral mêkte tân chauh khuh a ni ang." 
2Corinthians4:4 Krista chu Pathian anpui ngei a ni a; mahse, Krista ropuina Chanchin Ṭha êng chu hmu lo tûrin tûnlai khawvêl pathian hian ring lote rilru mit chu a tihdelsak a ni." 
2Corinthians4:5 Keimahni chanchin kan hril lo va, Isua Krista chu Lalpa a nih thu kan hril zâwk ṭhîn, keini pawh Isua avânga in bawih kan nih thu kan hril bawk ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians4:6 Pathian ropuina Isua Krista hmêla lo lang chu kan hriat chian theih nân, “Thimah êng lo awm rawh se,” titu Pathian chuan kan thinlungte hi a chhun êng ta a ni." 
2Corinthians4:7 Nimahsela, he thiltihtheihna ropui tak hi keimahnia chhuak ni lovin, Pathiana chhuak a ni zâwk tih a lan chian theih nân, chu ro chu hlumbêlah kan vawng a ni." 
2Corinthians4:8 Kawng tinrêngah nêk chêpin kan awm a, nêk beh zawng kan ni si lo; tihmanganin kan awm a, kan bei a dawng hek lo;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tihduhdahin kan awm a; mahse, kalsan kan ni si lo; vuak thlûkin kan awm a; mahse, tihhlum zawng kan ni lo." 
2Corinthians4:10 Isuaa nunna chu kan taksaah hian a lan theih nân, a thihna pawh kan taksaah hian kan pu reng a ni." 
2Corinthians4:11 Isua nunna chu kan taksa thi theiah hian a lan theih nân, keini nungdama awmte pawh hi Isua avânga thi tûra tih kan ni fo a ni." 
2Corinthians4:12 Chutichuan, keimahniah hian thihnain a thawk ṭhîn a, nangmahniah erawh chuan nunnain a thawk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians4:13 Lehkha Thu-in, “Ka ring a, chuvângin ka sawi a ni,” a ti a; chutiang rinna thinlung chu puin keini pawhin kan ring a, thu kan sawi ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians4:14 Lalpa Isua kaithotu chuan keini pawh Isua nên min kaitho ve ang a, nangniho nên a hmaah min dintîr dâwn tih kan hria." 
2Corinthians4:15 Hêng zawng zawng hi in ṭhatna tûr a ni a; tichuan, mi tam tak zîngah Pathian khawngaihna a pung ang a, Pathian ropuina tûrin lâwmthu sawina pawh nasa takin a pung ang." 
2Corinthians4:16 Chumi avâng chuan kan zâm lo ve, kan pâwn lam mihring hi awngrawp telh telh mah sela, kan chhûng lam mihring chu ni tin siam tharin a awm zâwk a ni." 
2Corinthians4:17 Rei lo te chhûnga kan hrehawm tuar nêp tak hian chatuan ropuina, khaikhin rual loh khawpa nasa chu min siamsak a ni." 
2Corinthians4:18 Thil hmuh theihte chu kan thlîr lo va, thil hmuh theih lohte chu kan thlîr zâwk si a. Thil hmuh theihte chu a ral mai dâwn a, thil hmuh theih lohte erawh chu chatuanin a awm ang." 
2Corinthians5:1 Leia kan taksa hi tihchhiat ni mah sela, taksa hlun, kuta siam ni lo, chatuana awm tûr, Pathian buatsaih chu kan nei dâwn tih kan hre si a." 
2Corinthians5:2 Tûnah hi zawng vâna kan awm huna taksa ropui kan neih tûr chu neih thuah châkin he taksaah hian kan rûm ṭhîn a nih hi. 
2Corinthians5:3 Chutiang taksa kan neih hunah chuan saruakin kan awm lo vang. 
2Corinthians5:4 He lei taksaa kan awm chhûng hian thawpikin kan rûm ṭhîn, he taksa hi chân kan duh vâng a ni lo va, vân taksa neih thuah kan châk vâng a ni; tichuan, thi thei hi nunnain a lem zo tawh ang." 
2Corinthians5:5 Pathian ngei chuan chumi atân chuan min buatsaih a, a zakham nân Thlarau min pe a ni." 
2Corinthians5:6 Chutichuan, taksaa kan awm chhûng hian Lalpa hnênah kan la awm rih lo mai a ni tih hriain, huai takin kan awm fo ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians5:7 Hmuh theih hian min hruai lo va, rinnain min hruai zâwk a ni." 
2Corinthians5:8 Huai takin kan awm a, amaherawhchu, taksaa awm lova Lalpa hnêna awm kan thlang zâwk." 
2Corinthians5:9 Chuvângin, taksain kan awm emaw, awm lo emaw, ama lâwmzâwng mi nih kan tum tlat ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians5:10 Kan vaiin Krista rorêlna hmaah kan lang vek dâwn si a, he dam chhûnga kan thil tih man, a chhia emaw, a ṭha emaw, kan hmuh ṭheuh theih nân." 
2Corinthians5:11 Tichuan, Lalpa hlauhawmzia hriain, ring tûrin mite kan thlêm ṭhîn a ni; Pathian chuan min hre fai vek a, nangni pawhin in thinlung tak chuan min hriat chian ka ring." 
2Corinthians5:12 In hnênah kan insawimawi leh ta a ni lo; thinlung lam ni lo, pâwn lam thil mai chhuangtute chu in chhân theih nân, keimahnia chhuan tûr ṭha kan hrilh che u a ni." 
2Corinthians5:13 Kan lo â a nih pawhin Pathian tân a ni a, kan lo fing a nih erawh chuan in tân a ni." 
2Corinthians5:14 Krista hmangaihna chuan min hneh khawp a, heti hian kan ngaihtuah: mi zawng zawng tân mi pakhat a thi a; chuvângin; mi zawng zawng thi an lo ni;" 
2Corinthians5:15 tichuan, a nungte chu anmahni tâna nung tawh lovin, an tâna thi-a tholeha tân an nun tawh zâwk nân, mi zawng zawng tân a thi a ni." 
2Corinthians5:16 Chuvângin, tûn chinah chuan tisa takin tu mah kan en tawh lo. Hmânah tisa takin Krista chu lo hre ṭhîn mah ila, tûnah zawng chutiangin kan ngai tawh lo ve." 
2Corinthians5:17 Mi tu pawh Kristaa an awm chuan thilsiam thar an lo ni a, thil hluite chu an ral a, ngai teh, an lo thar ta." 
2Corinthians5:18 Hêng zawng zawng hi Pathian tih vek a ni: ani chuan Krista zârah amah nên inremin min awmtîr a, inremna rawngbâwl hna chu min pe a." 
2Corinthians5:19 Chutichuan, Pathianin Kristaah khawvêl hi amah nên a inremtîr a, an bawhchhiatnate chu bawhchhiatnaah a chhiar tawh lo va, chu inremna thu puan hna chu kan kovah a nghat ta a ni." 
2Corinthians5:20 Chuvângin, Krista aiawha palai kan ni a: Pathianin keimahni min hmangin a ngên a che u, “Pathian nên lo inrem rawh u,” tiin, Krista aiawhin kan ngên a che u." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ama zârah Pathian ṭhatna kan lo chan ve theih nân, sual rêng rêng hre lo chu, keimahni avângin Pathianin sualah a siam a ni." 
2Corinthians6:1 Pathian khawngaihna in dawn chu ṭangkaipui ngei tûrin, keini amah thawhpuitute hian kan ngên a che u:" 
2Corinthians6:2 “A hun takah ka ngaithla che a, Chhandamna ni-ah ka ṭanpui che,” a ti si a. Ngai teh u, tûn hi a hun tak chu a ni a, tûn hi chhandamna ni chu a ni." 
2Corinthians6:3 Kan rawngbâwl hna hi miten an dem loh nân an ngaimawh zâwng eng mah kan ti lo. 
2Corinthians6:4 Kan tih apiangah Pathian rawngbâwltute ni âwm rêngin mi mittlungin kan awm zâwk ṭhîn. Tihduhdahna te, hrehawm te, nêkchêp te chhel takin kan tuar a." 
2Corinthians6:5 Vuak kan tuar a, lung inah kan tâng a, tlâng chîl kan tâwk a, mutmu pawh tuah thei lovin kan thawk rim a, chaw kan tlachham a;" 
2Corinthians6:6 thianghlimnaah te, hriatnaah te, ṭhatnaah te, ngilneihnaah te, Thlarau Thianghlimah te, hmangaihna tak takah te," 
2Corinthians6:7 thu dik sawiah te, Pathian thiltihtheihna kan hman dânah te, Pathian rawngbâwltute ni âwm rêngin kan awm a: felna râlthuam chu ding lam leh vei lama kengin kan ṭang ṭhîn." 
2Corinthians6:8 Ngaih ropui kan hlawh a, ngaih nêp kan hlawh bawk a; min fak a, min dem bawk a; thu dik kan sawi a, bumtu-ah min ngai bawk si;" 
2Corinthians6:9 tu khaw hriat tham kan ni lo va; mahse, mi tinin min hre bawk si. Thi ang kan ni a; mahse, kan nung si; thunun kan tâwk a, tihhlum kan ni si lo;" 
2Corinthians6:10 lungngaihna kan tawhin lâwmna tûr kan nei zêl si; pachhe hle mah ila mi dang kan tihausa si; eng mah kan nei lo va, engkim kan ta a ni bawk si." 
2Corinthians6:11 Aw Korinth mite u, thinlung inhawng takin in hnênah thu kan sawi hi." 
2Corinthians6:12 Eng mah zêp kan nei lo va, nangmahni in inhawng lo a ni zâwk e." 
2Corinthians6:13 Fate hnêna thu sawi angin sawi ta ila, nangni pawh keimahni angin inhawng ve rawh u." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ring lo mite thurualpui suh u. Dikna leh sualnain inṭâwm theih eng mah an nei lo, êng leh thim pawh a inkawp thei em ni?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Krista leh Beliara pawhin inlaichînna eng nge an neih? Ringtu leh ring lovin eng nge chan dun an neih? 
2Corinthians6:16 Pathian Tempul leh milemte pawhin eng nge inzawmna an neih? Keini zawng Pathian nung Tempul kan ni si a. Pathianin, “Anmahniah ka awm ang a, ka chên chilh ang; An Pathian ka ni ang a, anni pawh ka mite an ni ang,” a tih ang khân." 
2Corinthians6:17 Chuvângin, “ ‘An zîng ata lo chhuak ula, a hrangin awm rawh u, Thil bawlhhlawh pawh khawih suh u,’ Lalpan a ti.” Chutichuan, “ ‘Ka lâwm ang che u a," 
2Corinthians6:18 In tân Pa ka ni ang a, Nangni pawh ka tân fanu fapa in ni ang,’ Lalpa Engkimtitheia chuan a ti.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Chutichuan, duh takte u, chu thutiam chu kan neih avângin, taksa leh thlarau lam bawlhhlawhna zawng zawng ata intifai ila, Pathian ṭihin thianghlimnaah chuan i puitling ang u." 
2Corinthians7:2 In thinlungah hmun mi kian rawh u, tu pawi mah kan khawih ngai lo va, tu mah kan tichhe ngai lo va, tu mah kan bum ngai hek lo." 
2Corinthians7:3 Thiam loh chantîr tûr che uin chu chu ka sawi lo va; ka hrilh tawh che u angin kan thinlungah in awm tlat a, nangni nên chuan thih tlân emaw, dam tlân emaw kan huam asin." 
2Corinthians7:4 In zîngah ka tlângnêl êm êm a, ka chhuang hle bawk che u a, ka thlamuang êm êm a ni; hrehawm tinrêng kan tuarnaah pawh lâwmin ka khat bawk a ni." 
2Corinthians7:5 Makedonia ram kan lo thlen pawh khân kan hah a dam chuang lo; hrehawm tinrêng kan tâwk zâwk a, pâwn lamah min bei an awm a, chhûng lamah hlauhthâwnnaten min chîm bawk a." 
2Corinthians7:6 Nimahsela, mi chanhaite thlamuantu Pathian chuan Tita lo thleng hmangin min thlamuan ta a." 
2Corinthians7:7 A lo thlen vâng chauh ni lovin, nangmahni avânga a thlamuanna pawh chuan min thlamuan bawk a ni; min ngaihzia te, min tuarpuizia te, kan tâna ṭhahnem in ngaihzia te min hrilh a, chu chuan mi tithlamuang lehzual a ni." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ka lehkha khân in thin a tina tih ka lo hriatin ka inchhîr hman deuh va; mahse, kha lehkha khân rei lo te chauh a tina che u tih ka lo hriat leh thuai avângin ka inchhîr leh ta lo ve." 
2Corinthians7:9 Tûnah chuan ka lâwm ta, in thin ka tihnat vâng ni lovin, pawi in tih avânga in sim ta hi ka lâwmna chu a ni zâwk; chutianga in tuar chu Pathian duhzâwng a ni si a; keimahni avângin eng mah in chân hek lo." 
2Corinthians7:10 Pathian duhzâwng anga lungngaihna hian chhandamna tûra simna a thlen a, inchhîrawm lo tak a ni. Mihring taka lungngaihna erawh chuan thihna a thlen ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ngai teh u, Pathian duhzâwng anga in lungngaihna hian ṭhahnem a va ngaih nasattîr che u êm! In dikzia tihlan duhna te, sual huatna leh sual tih hlauhna te in nei ta a; min ngaihna te, ṭhahnemngaihna te, mi sual hrem duhna te in neih thar tâk hi! Tûnah chuan he thilah hian in inhnamhnawih ve lo tih nangmahni ngeiin in tilang chiang ta." 
2Corinthians7:12 In hnêna ka lehkhathawn kha thil sual titu avâng emaw, a tihsual tuartu avâng emawa ziak ka ni lo va, Pathian mit hmuha kan tân ṭhahnem in ngaihzia nangmahni ngeiin in hmuhchhuah theih nân ka ziak a ni zâwk." 
2Corinthians7:13 Chuvângin, kan thlamuang ta a ni; Tita lâwmna avângin kan hlim lehzual a, in za-in a rilru in tihahdam êm êm a ni." 
2Corinthians7:14 Tita hnênah hian ka chhuang hle ṭhîn che u a, ka tisual lo ve; thu dik tak in hnênah ka sawi ṭhîn a, Tita hnêna kan chhuang che u pawh hi kan lo tidik e." 
2Corinthians7:15 Tin, in zaa a thu in awihzia te, hlau leh khûr chunga amah in lo lawm dân te hre rengin a lainat lehzual che u a ni." 
2Corinthians7:16 Kawng tinrêngah ka rin ngam tâk che u avângin ka lâwm a ni. 
2Corinthians8:1 Unaute u, Pathianin Makedonia rama Kohhrante khawngaihna a pêk thu hi kan hrilh duh che u a ni." 
2Corinthians8:2 Hrehawm nasa taka fiah an ni chungin an lâwm ta êm êm a, an pachhe hle chung pawhin an thilphal êm êm a ni." 
2Corinthians8:3 An neih tlin tâwk an pe mai ni lovin, an tlin tâwk aia tam daih an pe tih ka hriatpui a ni. Chu chu anmahni duh thu ngeia ti an ni a." 
2Corinthians8:4 Mi thianghlimte chhawmdâwlna tûr rawngbâwl hnaah hian tel ve mi dîl chiam a," 
2Corinthians8:5 chu chu kan lo beisei phâk loh a ni; Lalpa hnênah anmahni an inhlân phawt a, chumi hnuah Pathian duhzâwng angin kan hnênah an intulût a." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tichuan, hmâna a lo tih ṭan tawh, in zînga chhawmdâwlna thawhlâwm khawn chu, rawn ti zo nghâl tûrin Tita hi ka ngên a." 
2Corinthians8:7 Rinnaah te, thu-ah te, hriatnaah te, ṭhahnemngaih ṭûlna tinrêngah te, min hmangaihnaah te, kawng engkimah hma in hruai ṭhîn ang khân, he hmangaihna rawngbâwl hnaah pawh hian ṭhahnemngaih chhuah rawh u." 
2Corinthians8:8 Thu pe zâwnga ti ka ni lo va, thil pêk lama mi dang thathozia enin in hmangaihna tak leh tak loh a lan fiah nân ka sawi a ni." 
2Corinthians8:9 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna ngahzia chu in hria e; a retheihna avânga in lo hausak theih nân, hausa hle mah se, nangmahni avâng ngeiin a lo retheih tâk kha." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ka ngaih dân ka han sawi ang e, nikuma in tih ṭan kha tûnah ti zo ula in tân a ṭha ang. A tih tum hmasa ber chauh in ni lo va, a ṭan hmasa ber pawh in nih kha." 
2Corinthians8:11 A tîra in inhuam ang khân, in neih dân ang zêla pein ṭhahnemngai takin tûnah hlen chhuak rawh u le." 
2Corinthians8:12 Miin a neih loh pui ni lovin, a neih aṭanga phal taka pêk a nih chuan a lâwmawm a ni." 
2Corinthians8:13 Mi dang chhâwk zân nân nangni hah ula ka ti a ni lo, inchhâwk tawn a ṭûl thu ka sawi a ni." 
2Corinthians8:14 Tûnah nangnin in ngah lai hian an tlâkchhamna in phuhrûksak a, anni pawhin an ngah ve hunah in tlâkchhamna an la phuhrûksak ve ang che u; tichuan, in inchhâwk tawn dâwn a ni." 
2Corinthians8:15 “A chhar tam chuan a nei tam chuang lo va, a chhar tlêm lahin a tlachham hek lo,” tih ziak ang khân." 
2Corinthians8:16 In tâna ka ṭhahnemngaihna ang, Tita thinlunga dahtu Pathian hnênah lâwmthu awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians8:17 Ani chuan kan ngen avâng mai ni lovin, a ṭhahnemngaihna avâng zâwkin, ama thu ngeiin in hnênah lo kal a tum ta a." 
2Corinthians8:18 A rual hian unau pakhat kan rawn tîr ve a, ani hi Chanchin Ṭha hril thu-ah Kohhranho zawng zawngin an fak hle a ni." 
2Corinthians8:19 Chu chauh pawh a ni lo va, Lalpa ropui nâna ṭhahnemngai taka he chhawmdâwl rawngbâwl hna thawka kan zinpui atân Kohhranten an thlan chhuah a ni." 
2Corinthians8:20 Chutiang chuan miten phal taka an pêk, tam tham tak hi kan buaipuinaah dem kai loh hrâm hrâm kan tum a ni." 
2Corinthians8:21 Lalpa hmuha mawi chauh ni lovin, mihring hmuha mawi pawh kan ngaihtuah bawk tûr a ni." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tin, kan unaupa pawh hi an rualin kan rawn tîr bawk a ni; ani pawh hian ṭhahnem a ngaihzia kawng tam takah a tilang fo tawh a; tûnah phei chuan a rin êm che u avângin lo kal a châk lehzual a ni." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tita hi chu ka ṭhian leh in rawng mi bâwlpuitu a ni a, kan unaute pawh hi kohhran palai an ni a, Krista ropuina an nih hi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kohhranten hmangaihna in neihzia hi an hmuha, kan fakna che u hi a dikzia an hriat theih nân an chungah in hmangaihna lo lantîr ang che u." 
2Corinthians9:1 Mi thianghlimte rawngbâwlsak thu hi in hnêna ziak tam a ngai lo ve," 
2Corinthians9:2 ṭanpui in peihzia ka hre si a. “Nikum khân Akaia ram chu an inpuahchah tawh,” tiin, nangmahni chhuang takin Makedonia rama mite ka hrilh ṭhîn a, in ṭhahnemngaihna chuan mi tam tak a tiharh ta a." 
2Corinthians9:3 He thilah hian ka fak sual loh nân che u leh ka sawi ang ngeia in lo inpeih theih nân unaute hi ka rawn tîr a ni. 
2Corinthians9:4 Makedonia rama mite kan rualin lo kal ve ta sela, in la inpeih lo tih an rawn hmuh chuan, kan rin tehlul che u vei nên, in tân chauh ni lovin, kan tân pawh a zahthlâk hle dâwn asin." 
2Corinthians9:5 Thawhlâwm in tiam tawh sate kha lo ching fel diam tûrin unaute hi rawn tirh hmasak ṭûlin ka hria a; in lo inpeih chuan in thil pêkte chu lâk luihsak che u ang ni lovin, nangmahni thu ngeia pêk a ni tih a lang chiang dâwn a ni." 
2Corinthians9:6 Hre rawh u, hetiang kawngah hian tuh tlêm chuan a seng tlêm ang a, tuh tam erawh chuan a seng tam ang." 
2Corinthians9:7 Mi tinin an rilrua an tum sa ang chu ui lovin, tih luih ang ni hek lovin pe ṭheuh rawh se; Pathian chuan lâwm taka petu a ni a hmangaih ni." 
2Corinthians9:8 Pathian chuan in mamawh thil ṭha tinrêng a pe ṭeuh thei che u a, in mamawh aia tam pawh thil ṭha in tih theih nân a pêk belhchhah thei che u a ni:" 
2Corinthians9:9 “A sem darh a, tlachhamte a pe a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a pângngai reng a ni,” tih ziak ang khân." 
2Corinthians9:10 Tuh atâna chi petu leh ei atâna chaw petu chuan chi a pe ṭeuh vang che u, a ṭhantîr ang a, in thilphalna rah chu a tipung bawk ang." 
2Corinthians9:11 Kawng tinrênga thilphal hle tûrin a tihausa ang che u; tin, keimahni hmanga in thil pêk vâng hian Pathian hnênah lâwmthu an la sawi ang." 
2Corinthians9:12 In chhawmdâwl rawngbâwl hna hian mi thianghlimte mamawh a phuhrûksak chauh ni lovin, Pathian hnêna lâwmthu sawina pawh nasa takin a tipung bawk ang." 
2Corinthians9:13 He in rawngbâwl hna hian Krista Chanchin Ṭha in pawma in zawmzia te, an tân leh mi dang zawng zawng tân in thilphalzia te a tilang a, chu chuan Pathian a chawimawitîr ngei ang." 
2Corinthians9:14 Anni pawhin Pathian khawngaihna in dawn nasat êm avâng hian duhsak takin in tân an ṭawngṭai ngei ang. 
2Corinthians9:15 A thilpêk sawi hleih theih loh avâng hian Pathian hnênah lâwmthu awm rawh se. 
2Corinthians10:1 “Hmaichhana nêm tak, râlkhata paukhauh tak si,” in tih kei Paula ngei hian, Krista thuhnuairawlhna leh nunnêmna chhâlin ka ngên a che u." 
2Corinthians10:2 Tisa taka khawsaa mi puhtute chungah khauh takin ka awm ngam dâwn tih ka inhre si a, ka lo kal hunah chutianga ka awm a ṭûl loh nân ka ngên a che u." 
2Corinthians10:3 Khawvêla awm zawng kan ni ngei e; mahse, khawvêl rilru pua bei kan ni lo." 
2Corinthians10:4 Indona hriamhrei kan hman hi khawvêl thil a ni lo va, kulhpui ṭhiat theihna Pathian hriamhrei thiltithei tak a ni zâwk." 
2Corinthians10:5 An ṭanhmun kan ṭhiatsak zêl a, Pathian hriatna kawng chapo taka dodâltu apiang kan tudawl a, ngaihtuahna tinrêng Krista bawihah kan siam bawk a ni." 
2Corinthians10:6 Tin, thu in awih zân hnuah a la awih lote chu hrem tûrin kan inpeih reng a ni." 
2Corinthians10:7 A lan dân aṭang maiin thil in thlîr a. Tu-in emaw Krista ta ni bîkah a inruat chuan inngaihtuah nawn teh se; Krista ta a ni ang bawkin keini pawh kan ni ve asin. 
2Corinthians10:8 In chhiatna tûr ni lo, nangmahni tundin nâna Lalpan thuneihna mi pêk hi ka lo chhuang lutuk deuh pawh a ni ang e; mahse, ka inzahpui lo ve." 
2Corinthians10:9 Lehkhathawna nangmahni tihṭhaih tumah mi ngai suh u. 
2Corinthians10:10 “A lehkha thute chu a ritin a khauh va, amah kan hmuh meuh chuan pa awmnêm tê, a thu sawi lah sitawm tak a ni si,” tite in awm a." 
2Corinthians10:11 Chutianga ngaitute chuan hei hi hre rawh se; in hnêna kan lo kal hmaa lehkhathawna ka rawn sawi ang tak khân, kan lo kal hunah pawh kan rawn ti ang." 
2Corinthians10:12 Mahni insawimawi ṭhenkhatte zîngah chuan kan inchhiar tel ve ngam lo, anni nên kan inteh ngam hek lo. Mahni inteh nân bi an inthliah chawp a, chu chuan mahni leh mahni an inteh a, a va âtthlâk êm!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Keini zawng kan thawhna hmuna mite bâk kan chhuang dâwn lo, Pathianin ri min khamsak chhûnga mi chauh kan chhuang zâwk ang, nangni pawh a huam tel si che u a." 
2Corinthians10:14 Kan bial chin in nih avângin Krista Chanchin Ṭha in hnênah kan rawn thlen a, a piah lamah kan kal loh kha." 
2Corinthians10:15 Kan bial piah lama mi dang thawh kan uanpui lo ve. In rinna a lo ṭhang ang a, thil ropui zâwk in zîngah tih a la ni ang, kan bial pawh a zau zêl ang tih kan beisei." 
2Corinthians10:16 Tichuan, in ram piah lamah pawh Chanchin Ṭha chu kan la hril zêl ang; amaherawhchu, mi thawh sa chu kan uanpui lo vang." 
2Corinthians10:17 A chhuang apiangin Lalpa chu chhuang rawh se. 
2Corinthians10:18 Mahni insawimawite chu ngaihsân tûr an ni lo va; Lalpan a chawimawite chu ngaihsân tûr an ni. 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka â deuh a nih pawhin mi dawhtheih ka duh hle, dawh pawh mi dawhthei hle e." 
2Corinthians11:2 Pasal pakhat, Krista chu ka hualsak tawh che u a, a hnêna nula thianghlim anga ka hlan theihna tûr che uin, Pathian thîkthu a chhiat avângin asin in lakah kei pawh ka thîkthu a chhiat." 
2Corinthians11:3 Rûlin Evi ngamthlêma a bum ang khân, Krista lama in rilru thianghlim leh mawi tak kha eng emaw ti mai maiin an tikhawlo vang tih ka hlau a ni." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kan hril ṭhin ni lo Isua dang hrila lo kal kha in lo lâwm thei a. Thlarau dang in chan ngai loh chu in pawm thei a, in pawm tawh ang ni lo Chanchin Ṭha dang pawh in ngaithei zêl mai maw!" 
2Corinthians11:5 Chûng ‘tirhkoh lian’ in tihte pawh chu eng kawngah mah tluk loh ka inring lo asin. 
2Corinthians11:6 Thu sawi thiam ve lo mah ila hriatna lamah chuan ka duai bîk lo tih in hnênah kawng tinrêngin, eng hunah pawh ka tihlan ṭhin kha." 
2Corinthians11:7 A nih loh leh, chawisân in nih theih nân mahni indah hniama Pathian mi pêk Chanchin Ṭha a thlâwna ka hrilh che u khân, thil sual ka ti a lo ni maw?" 
2Corinthians11:8 In zînga rawng ka bâwl theih nân Kohhran dang ka pûr a ṭûl a. 
2Corinthians11:9 In hnêna ka awm lai khân ka tlâkchham thu-ah tu mah ka tihautak lo che u, ka mamawh chu Makedonia ram aṭanga unau lo kalten mi rawn pe zêl a ni; tihhautak loh che u ka tum tlat ṭhîn a, ka tum zêl bawk ang." 
2Corinthians11:10 Keimaha Krista thutak awm chu ṭanchhanin ka sawi a ni; Akaia ram chhûnga he ka thil chhuan hi tu man mi tihtâwpsak thei lo vang. 
2Corinthians11:11 Eng vângin maw? Ka hmangaih loh che u vâng em ni? Pathianin ka hmangaihzia che u chu a hria alâwm. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kan thawh ang chiaha thawk nia insawi duhten chhuan tûr eng mah an neih loh nân ka tih ṭhin ang hi ka ti zêl dâwn. 
2Corinthians11:13 Chûng mite chu tirhkoh tak ni lo, mi bum tuma thawk, Krista tirhkohva insiam chawpte an ni." 
2Corinthians11:14 Chu chu a mak lo ve. Setana meuh pawh êng tirhkohvah a insiam chawp ṭhîn asin. 
2Corinthians11:15 Chuvângin, Setana rawngbâwltute chu felna rawngbâwltu anga insiam chawp a har lo ve, an tâwpna tûr erawh chu an thiltihin a la tilang ang." 
2Corinthians11:16 Han sawi zêl ila, mi â angah mi lo ngai lo ula, mi ngai a nih pawhin mi â angin mi lo en mai ula, ka han uang ve hlek teh ang." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ka sawi hi Lalpa mi sawitîr zawng a ni lo ve, mi â angin ka thil chhuan hi ka sawi dâwn a ni." 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tam takin khawvêl thil an uanpui ṭhîn a, kei pawhin ka han uanpui ve teh ang." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nangni zawng in fing a, mi â-te pawh lâwm takin in dawh thiam a." 
2Corinthians11:20 Miin bawihah siam che u sela, ei zo che u sela, bum che u sela, hmusit che uin in hmaiah bêng che u mah se in dawh zêl thei a." 
2Corinthians11:21 Chutianga kan lo ti ve ngam lo chu a zahthlâk hle mai. Â takin han sawi ta ila: Tu pawhin eng pawh an ngam apiang kei pawhin ka ngam asin. 
2Corinthians11:22 Hebrai mi an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni. Israel mi an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni; Abrahama thlahte an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni. 
2Corinthians11:23 Krista rawngbâwltute an ni maw? Â takin han sawi ta ila, ka ni lehzual - a thawk rim hlei hlei ka ni a, tân inah te ka tâng zing zâwk a, vuak lah ka tuar tam zâwk daih a, thih mai theihna pawh ka tâwk tam zâwk." 
2Corinthians11:24 Juda-te tih dân angin vawi khata vawi sawmli tling lo vuak ṭum nga ka tuar a," 
2Corinthians11:25 ṭum thum tiangin mi vua a, ṭum khat lungin mi dêng a, ṭum thum lawng chhiat ka tâwk a, ni khat leh zan khat tuifinriatah ka hmang a." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ka zinna lamah luia hlauhawm te, suamhmang laka hlauhawm te, ka chipuite laka hlauhawm te, Jentail-te laka hlauhawm te, khawpuia hlauhawm te, thlalêra hlauhawm te, tuipuia hlauhawm te, unau derte laka hlauhawm te ka tâwk fo va;" 
2Corinthians11:27 thawk rimin ka buai a, mut pawh hmu lovin vawi tam tak ka awm a, rilṭâm leh tuihâl ka tuar a, sin tûr nei lovin khaw vâwt ka tuar a." 
2Corinthians11:28 Hêng bâkah hian, Kohhranho zawng zawng ka ngaihtuahna, ni tin mi delh rengtu a awm bawk." 
2Corinthians11:29 Mi chak lote ka tuarpui lo ngai em ni? Mi an tlûkin ka vei lo ngai em ni? 
2Corinthians11:30 Chhuang tûr ka nih vêk chuan ka chak lohzia tilangtute hi a ni ka chhuan zâwk dâwn. 
2Corinthians11:31 Pathian, Lalpa Isua Pa chuan dâwt ka sawi lohzia a hria. Amah chu chatuana fakin awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians11:32 Damaska khuaah erawh kha chuan lal Areta hnuaia rorêltu chuan mi man tumin Damaska khua chu a vêntîr a; 
2Corinthians11:33 mahse, kulh bang tukverh aṭang chuan bâwmin mi thlâk thla a; tichuan, a kut ata ka chhuak ta a ni." 
2Corinthians12:1 Sâwt chuang lo mah se, ka han uang ve teh ang. Ka hnêna Lalpa inlârna leh a thu puan ka han sawi zêl teh ang." 
2Corinthians12:2 Kum sâwm leh pali a ni ta, Kristaa awm mi pakhat ka hria - chu mi chu vân thumna meuhva hruai chhohvin a awm a, a hringhrânin a ni nge ni lo tih erawh chu ka hre lo, Pathianin a hria." 
2Corinthians12:3 Chu mi ngei chu Paradis-ah hruai chhohvin a awm a, a tak nge zêl tih chu ka hre lo, Pathianin a hria; chu mi chuan mihringte sawi thian loh leh sawi hleih theih loh thu a hria tih ka hria." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Chutiang mi chu ka chhuang dâwn; nimahsela, ka chak lohnate lo chu mahni ka inchhuang dâwn lo." 
2Corinthians12:6 Inchhuang duh pawh ni ila âtthlâk a ni lo vang, thu tak tak ka sawi si a; mahse, ka insûm ang, chutilo chuan, mi hmuh ang leh ka laka thu an hriat ang aiin mi ngai ropui zâwk dah ang e." 
2Corinthians12:7 Thil mi hriattîr chu a ropui êm vânga ka inngaihhlut luattuk loh nân ka tisaah hian hlîng mi pe a, chu chu Setana tirhkoh, ka inngaihhlut loh nâna mi kap reng tûr chu a ni." 
2Corinthians12:8 Chu chu mi lâk kiansak tûrin vawi thum Lalpa ka dîl a. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ani chuan, “ka khawngaihna i tân a tâwk e, ka thiltihtheihna hi chak lohnaah asin tihpuitlina a awm ṭhin,” mi ti a. Chuvângin, Krista thiltihtheihna chu keimaha a chên theih nân ka chak lohnate hi lâwm takin ka chhuang tawh zâwk ang." 
2Corinthians12:10 Krista avâng chuan chak lohnaah te, tihduhdahnaah te, harsatnaah te ka lâwm ṭhîn a ni; ka chak loh veleh ka lo chak leh ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians12:11 Mi â ang mai ka nih tâk hi, nangnin â lo thei lovin mi siam a ni; dik tak chuan nangni hi asin mi sawimawitu tûrte chu. Eng mah ni lo mah ila, eng kawngah mah ‘tirhkoh lian’ in tihte chu ka tluk lo bîk lo ve." 
2Corinthians12:12 Tirhkoh ka nih chhinchhiahna chu chhinchhiahna te, thil mak te, thil ropui tak tak te kawng tinrênga dawhthei taka in zînga ka tih ṭhin kha a ni." 
2Corinthians12:13 Eng kawngah nge kohhran dangte aia ka ngaihnêp zâwk che u? Ka tihhautak loh vâng che u kha em ni? Ka lo tidik lo a nih chuan mi ngaidam rawh u. 
2Corinthians12:14 Ngai teh u, tûn hi in hnêna lo kal ka inpeih vawi thumna a ni. Ka tihautak lo vang che u, in thil neih ka ngiat lo, nangmahni hi a ni ka duh ber chu. Faten nu leh pa tân an khâwlsak ngai lo va, nu leh paten fate tân an khâwlsak zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians12:15 Kei zawng, in thlarau tân lâwm takin ka inhmangral ang a, ka inpe zo vek ang. Ka hmangaih nasat êm che u avângin mi hmangaih nêp dâwn em ni?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ka tihhautak lohzia che u kha in hria a; mahse, depde taka bumtu che u ka lo ni maw?" 
2Corinthians12:17 In zînga ka rawn tirh tu emaw tal hmangin in lak aṭanga hlâwkna ka nei em ni? 
2Corinthians12:18 Tita chu in hnêna lo kal tûrin ka ngên a, ama rualin unau pakhat ka rawn tîr bawk a. Tita chuan hlâwk phah nân a hmang che u em ni? Rilru hmun khat pua thawk dûn, hniakhnung inzui chiah kan ni lâwm ni?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Mahni insawi thiamah mi lo ngai ṭhîn a ni maw? Pathian hmuhin Kristaah thu kan sawi ṭhîn a ni a. Duh takte u, engkim hi nangmahni siam ṭhat nân ka ti ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ka lo kal hunah ka tum angin ka rawn hmu lo vang che u a, kei pawh in tum angin min hmu lo vang tih ka hlau va ni; inhauna te, inîtsîkna te, thinurna te, inerna te, insawichhiatna te, inrêlna te, chapona te, buaina te in zîngah ka la rawn hmu fo vang a," 
2Corinthians12:21 ka lo kal leh hunin in hmaah ka Pathianin mi timualpho vang a, tûn hma lama thil sual tite, an thil bawlhhlawh tih - inngaih te, hur te sim si lo mi tam tak avângin ka ṭap dah ang tih ka hlau bawk a ni." 
2Corinthians13:1 Tûn hi in hnêna ka lo kal vawi thumna tûr a ni. “Thuhretu pahnih emaw, pathum emaw kâ aṭang chauhvin thubuai rêng rêng tihfel tûr a ni,” tih a ni a." 
2Corinthians13:2 In hnêna ka lo kal vawi hnihnaah khân thil sual titute leh mi dang zawng zawng hnênah ka sawi lâwk tawh a, in zîngah awm rih lo mah ila, ka hrilh lâwk a che u; ka lo kal hun chuan thil sual titute chu ka zuah lo vang." 
2Corinthians13:3 Keimah mi hmangin Krista chuan thu a sawi a ni tih fiahna in zawn chu in la hmu ang. Krista chu in zînga a hna thawhah a duai lo va, thil nasa taka titheitu a nih zâwk kha." 
2Corinthians13:4 Nimahsela, ani chu chak lohna avângin khenbeh a ni a, Pathian thiltihtheihna avângin a nung leh ta a ni. Keini pawh amahah chuan kan chak lo va; nimahsela, in tâna kan rawngbâwlnaah Pathian thiltihtheihna avângin amah nên thil kan ti ve thei ang." 
2Corinthians13:5 Rinnaah chuan in awm emaw, mahni infiah ula, mahni inchhin ṭhîn rawh u. Krista Isua chu nangmahniah a awm tih hriatna in nei lâwm ni? Inhriatna in nei lo a nih chuan a lem mai in la ni." 
2Corinthians13:6 Keini erawh chu a lem mai kan ni ve lo tih in hriat ka beisei. 
2Corinthians13:7 Thil sual eng mah in tih loh nân Pathian hnênah kan ṭawngṭaisak ṭhîn che u a ni; hlawhtling bîk nia kan lan theihna tûr a ni lo, hlawhchham angin lang mah ila thil ṭha in tih theihna tûrin kan dîl zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Corinthians13:8 Thutak ṭan tûr lo chuan a do zâwngin eng mah kan ti thei si lo va. 
2Corinthians13:9 Keini kan chak loh pawhin nangni in chak chuan kan lâwm ṭhîn asin. Hei hi kan dîl bawk ṭhîn - in ṭhat zâwk zêlna tûr hi. 
2Corinthians13:10 Tichhe tûr che u ni lovin, siam ṭha tûr zâwkin Lalpan thuneihna min pe a, in hnêna ka lo kal huna chu thuneihna chu ka lek vak a ṭûl loh nân ka lo kal hmain hêng thu hi ka ziak a ni." 
2Corinthians13:11 Unaute u, dam takin u le; insiam ṭha ula, ka ngenna che u hi pawisa ula, rilru hmun khat pu ula, inrem takin awm rawh u; tichuan, hmangaihna leh remna Pathian chuan a awmpui ang che u." 
2Corinthians13:12 Fawh thianghlimin chibai inbûk rawh u. 
2Corinthians13:13 Mi thianghlim zawng zawngte hian chibai an bûk a che u. 
2Corinthians13:14 Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna te, Pathian hmangaihna te, Thlarau Thianghlim pâwlna te chu in zaa hnênah awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:1 Kei Paula, tirhkoh, mihring tirh ni lo, mihring ruat pawh ni lo, Isua Krista leh mitthi zîng ata amah kaithotu Pa Pathian ruata hian," 
Galatians1:2 kan hnêna unau awm zawng zawngte nên hian, Galatia rama kohhrante chibai kan bûk a che u." 
Galatians1:3 Pathian, kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:4 Pathian, kan Pa duhzâwng zâwmin, tûn hun ṭha lo laka min chhan chhuak tûr leh kan sualte min tlen faisak tûrin, Krista chu amah a inpe ta si a." 
Galatians1:5 Pathian hnênah chuan ropuina chatuan chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Krista khawngaihnaa kotu che u chu kalsanin, ‘Chanchin Ṭha’ chi dang in pawm leh ta thut mai hi mak ka va ti êm!" 
Galatians1:7 Chanchin Ṭha chi dang a awm lo asin, nangmahni tibuaitute khân Krista Chanchin Ṭha tihdanglam an tum mai a ni zâwk." 
Galatians1:8 Keini pawh ni ila, vân ata lo chhuk vântirhkoh pawh ni sela, kan hrilh tawh che u ni lo, ‘Chanchin Ṭha’ an rawn hrilh che u chuan ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:9 Ka hrilh tawh che u a, tûnah pawh ka hrilh nawn leh a che u: in pawm tawh ni lo, ‘Chanchin Ṭha’ dang rawn hrilhtu apiang che u chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:10 Tûnah hian mihring nge tihlâwm ka tum Pathian? Mihring lâwmzâwng sawi tum angin ka lo lang ṭhîn em ni? Mihring tihlâwm tum ni ila Krista bawih ka ni lo vang. 
Galatians1:11 Unaute u, ka hrilh a che u, Chanchin Ṭha ka hril hi mihring laka chhuak a ni lo." 
Galatians1:12 Tu hnên aṭang maha dawng ka ni lo va, tu man mi zirtîr hek lo; Isua Krista ngei chuan ka hnêna a puan a ni." 
Galatians1:13 Juda fîr ka nih laia ka awm dân in hria e, Pathian Kohhran nasa takin ka tiduhdah a, nuai bo ka tum ṭhîn a nih kha." 
Galatians1:14 Kan sakhaw biakna lama thlahtute thu hlan chhâwn vawn chungchângah pawh ka rualpui Juda-te zîngah a firfiak ber ka ni ṭhîn. 
Galatians1:15 Nimahsela, Pathian chuan ka nu pum chhûng aṭangin mi serh hrang a, a khawngaihnain mi ko ta a." 
Galatians1:16 Jentail-te zînga a Chanchin Ṭha ka hril theih nân a Fapa chu ka hnêna rawn puan ṭha a tih thu mi hriattîr lai khân mi dang tu mah ka râwn lo; 
Galatians1:17 ka nih ve hmaa tirhkoh lo ni tawh Jerusalem-a mite hnênah ka kal hek lo. Arabia ramah ka kal ta daih zâwk a; tin, Damaska khuaah ka lo kîr leh ta chauh a ni." 
Galatians1:18 Kum thum hnuah erawh chuan Jerusalem-ah Kifa hmêlhriat tûrin ka han kal a, a hnênah ni sâwm leh panga ka châm a." 
Galatians1:19 Nimahsela, Lalpa unau Jakoba tih loh chu tirhkoh dangte tu mah ka hmu lo." 
Galatians1:20 Ka thu ziak hi a dik a ni, Pathian hmaah pawh ka daw lo ve." 
Galatians1:21 Chumi hnu chuan Suria leh Kilikia ramah te ka kal leh ta a. 
Galatians1:22 Judai rama Kristian Kohhrante phei chuan mi la hmêlhriat lo va," 
Galatians1:23 “Hmâna min tiduhdahtu khân rinna thu nuai bo a tum ṭhin kha a hril ve ta thung,” tih thâwm chauh an hria a;" 
Galatians1:24 ka chunga thil thleng avângin Pathian an fak a. 
Galatians2:1 Kum sâwm leh pali a vei hnuin Barnaba nên Jerusalem-ah kan han kal leh a, Tita pawh kan hruai bawk a." 
Galatians2:2 Pathianin mi tirh avânga kal ka ni. Hruaitu lian deuh deuhte chauh a fâlin ka hmu a, Jentail-te hnêna Chanchin Ṭha ka tlângaupui ṭhin hi ka hrilh hlawm a, tûn hma leh tûna ka rawngbâwl zêlna hi hahthlâk thlâwn mai a nih lohna tûrin." 
Galatians2:3 Nimahsela, ka mi hruai Tita pawh chu Grik mi a ni na a, serh an tan luihtîr chuang lo." 
Galatians2:4 Ringtu der, Isua Kristaa zalênna kan neih enthla tûra an zînga lût ru vete erawh chuan bawiha luhtîr leh min tum a." 
Galatians2:5 Amaherawhchu, Chanchin Ṭha thu dik chu in tân an tihdanglam loh nân an thu chhe tê pawh zawm kan duh lo." 
Galatians2:6 Hruaitu pawimawh nia langte chu an nih tak tak leh tak tak loh ka tân a dang chuang lo, Pathianin pâwn lam lan dân mai a ngaisâng lo ve, hêng mite ngei pawh hian sawi tûr eng mah an nei chuang lo." 
Galatians2:7 Neih ahnêkin Petera chu serh tante zînga Chanchin Ṭha hrilh hna kawltîr a ni ang bawkin, serh tan lohte hnêna Chanchin Ṭha hrilh hna ka hnênah kawltîr a ni tih an hmu a." 
Galatians2:8 Serhtante tâna tirhkoh ni tûra Petera thuamtu chuan, Jentail-te tâna tirhkoh ni tûrin kei pawh mi thuam a ni." 
Galatians2:9 Tichuan, kohhran bana an ngaih ber Jakoba te, Kifa te leh Johana te pawh chuan he chanvo ka dawn hi an hmuhin, thawk ho kan nih entîr nân Barnaba nên inpâwlna kut ding lam min pe ta zâwk a; keinin Jentail-te zîngah rawng kan bâwl ang a, anniin serh tante zîngah." 
Galatians2:10 An zînga retheite erawh chu hre reng tûrin mi phût a, chu lah chu ka lo tum sa rêng a ni si a." 
Galatians2:11 Tin, Kifa chu Antiokei khuaa a lo kal lai khân demawm takin a awm a, a langin hmai chhanah ka khak a." 
Galatians2:12 Jentail-te zîngah chaw a ei ve ṭhîn a; mahse, Jakoba tirh mi ṭhenkhat Jentail serhtantîr tumtute chu a hlau va, an lo thlen hnu chuan a tîm a, a inthiarfihlîm ta a." 
Galatians2:13 Juda dangte pawh chuan a tih dân chu an zui ve a, Barnaba meuh pawh an tih dân chuan a hruai kawi ta a." 
Galatians2:14 An thiltih dân chu Chanchin Ṭha thu nên a inhmeh lo tih ka hmuhin, an zaa hmaah Kifa hnênah chuan, “Nang Juda i ni a, Juda anga awm lovin Jentail-te angin i han khawsa a, chuti chung chuan engtizia nge Jentail-te chu Juda mi anga awmtîr i tum?” ka ti a." 
Galatians2:15 Keini zawng Juda mi rênga piang kan ni a, ‘Jentail mi sual,’ an tih ṭhinte kan ni lo." 
Galatians2:16 Amaherawhchu, Dân zawm vâng ni lovin, Isua Krista rin avâng chauhvin miin Pathian hmaah thiam an chang thei a ni tih kan hria; Dân zawm vâng ni lova, Krista rin avânga Pathian hmaa thiam kan chan theih nân, keini ngei pawh hian Kristaah chuan rinna kan nghat a ni. Tu man Dân zawm avângin Pathian hmaah thiam an chang zo lo vang." 
Galatians2:17 Krista rin avânga Pathian hmaa thiam chan tum keiniho hi, ‘Jentail mi sualte ang chiaha ngaih kan nih si chuan, Krista chuan sual rawng a lo bâwl tihna em ni?’ Ni awkawng lo ve." 
Galatians2:18 Ka lo ṭhiat tawh Dân vêk chu din thar leh ka tum si chuan, a bawhchhetu ka ni tih a chiang a ni." 
Galatians2:19 Kei chuan Dân avângin Dân chu ka thihsan tawh a ni; Pathian lama ka nun theih nân Krista hnênah krawsa khenbeh ka ni tawh. 
Galatians2:20 Keima nun pangngaia nung ka ni tawh lo va; keimahah hian Krista chu a nung tawh zâwk a ni. Tûna tisaa ka nung hi, mi hmangaiha ka tâna nun petu, Pathian Fapa ringa nung ka ni." 
Galatians2:21 Pathian khawngaihna hi ka hnâwl dâwn lo. Dân zawm avânga Pathian hmaa thiam chan theih a nih chuan, Krista thihna hi a thlâwn mai a ni ang." 
Galatians3:1 Aw Galatia rama mi â-te u, tu nge dawi che u? In mit ngeia hmu ve ang maia chiangin Krista khenbeh thu hrilh in nih kha." 
Galatians3:2 Min hrilh teh u, Thlarau in dawn kha Dân in zawm vâng nge, Chanchin Ṭha in hriata in rin tâk vâng?" 
Galatians3:3 Chuti êma â in lo ni maw? Thlarauva ṭan tawh siin tisa thilah in tâwp dâwn em ni? 
Galatians3:4 In chunga thil thleng zozai kha engmah lo mai mai em ni? Ni âwm lo tak le! 
Galatians3:5 Phal taka thlarau pe che ua, in zînga thil mak ti ṭhîntu Pathian khân, Dân in zawm avânga ti nge a nih, Chanchin Ṭha in hriat in awih tâk avângin?" 
Galatians3:6 “Abrahama chuan Pathian a ring a, thiam changah pawm a ni ta,” tih ang khân a ni zâwk asin." 
Galatians3:7 Abrahama fa dik takte chu ringtute hi an ni tih hre ta che u. 
Galatians3:8 Tin, Lehkha Thu chuan Jentail-te pawh rinna avângin Pathian chuan thiam a chantîr dâwn tih a lo hmu lâwk a; tichuan, Abrahama hnênah, “Nangmahah chuan hnam tin malsâwmin an awm ang,” tiin Chanchin Ṭha chu a lo hril diam tawh a ni." 
Galatians3:9 Tichuan, Abrahaman a rin anga ring ve apiangin malsâwmna chu an dawng ta a ni." 
Galatians3:10 Dân zawm innghah nâna hmangte chu ânchhe dawng mai an ni; “Dân lehkha thu-a chuang zawng zawng zâwma ti vek lo chu ânchhe dawng an ni,” tih ziak a ni si a." 
Galatians3:11 Dân zawm avângin Pathian hmaah tu mah thiam chang zo an awm lo tih a chiang a ni, “Rinna avânga thiam chang chu a nung ang,” tih a ni si a." 
Galatians3:12 Dân chuan, “Thupêk zâwm vektu chu a nung ang,” a ti mai a, rinna a sawi tel lo." 
Galatians3:13 “Thinga khai chu ânchhe dawng a ni,” tia ziak ang khân, Krista chuan kan tân ânchhia chu phurin, Dân ânchhe lak ata min chhan chhuak ta a." 
Galatians3:14 Tichuan, Pathianin Abrahama mal a sâwmna chu Jentail-te hnênah Kristaah chuan a lo thleng ta a, keini hian Thlarau pêk tiam chu rinna avângin kan lo dawng ta a ni." 
Galatians3:15 Unaute u, entîr nân mihring tih dân han sawi ta ila - Miten thu an lo thlun fel tawh chuan, mihring thuthlung mai a ni nain tu man an phelh leh ngai lo, belh pawh an belh ngai lo." 
Galatians3:16 Abrahama leh a chi thlah hnênah chauh Pathianin thu a tiam a nih kha; mi tam tak chungchâng a sawi lo, chi thlahte ti lovin, mi mal thu sawiin, “I chi thlah,” a ti zâwk a ni, chu mi chu Krista hi a ni." 
Galatians3:17 Ka sawi tum chu hei hi a ni - Kum zali leh sawmthum hnua dân lo awm ta khân Pathian thuthlun chu a ṭhiat chuang lo, a thutiam pawh chu a tidanglam chuang hek lo." 
Galatians3:18 Dân zawm avângin roluahtu nih theih se, Pathian thutiam vâng a ni lo vang; Pathian erawh chuan a thutiam avângin a ni Abrahama hnênah roluahtu tûr a pêk tâk ni." 
Galatians3:19 Chuti ni se, Dân hi engati nge pêk a nih? Bawhchhiatna hi eng ang tak nge tih tilang tûrin vântirhkohte palaia hmangin pêk a ni; Abrahama hnêna Fa a tiam kha a lo lan hma atân chauh a ni." 
Galatians3:20 Mi pakhat tân palai awm a ṭûl lo ve, Pathian chu pakhat chauh a ni si." 
Galatians3:21 Chuti ni se, Pathian thutiam hi Dân hian a kalh em ni? Kalh teh suh e! Mi tinung thei Dân pêk ni sela, chu Dân zawm avâng chuan Pathian hmaah tu pawh thiam chan theih a ni ang chu." 
Galatians3:22 Nimahsela, Lehkha Thu chuan, “Engkim hi sual thuhnuaiah a awm tawh,” a ti a; tichuan, Isua Krista rin avânga dawn tûr thiltiam chu a ring apiangte hnêna pêk a ni." 
Galatians3:23 Rinna thu a lo thlen hma kha chuan Dânin mi a khuahkhirh a; 
Galatians3:24 rinna thu tihlan fiah a nih hma chuan min kaihruai a. Tin, rinna avânga thiam kan chan theihna tûrin" 
Galatians3:25 Dân chu Krista lama min kaihruaitu a ni a; mahse, rinna thu chu a lo thlen tâk avângin kaihruaitu hnuaiah kan awm tawh lo ve." 
Galatians3:26 Tichuan, Krista Isua in rinna avângin in za-in Pathian fate in ni ta;" 
Galatians3:27 Kristaa baptisma chang apiangte chu Krista chuan in inthuam ta a ni. 
Galatians3:28 Juda leh Jentail, bawih leh bawih lo, mipa leh hmeichhia a awm chuang tawh lo, Isua Kristaah chuan in za-in pumkhat in ni." 
Galatians3:29 Krista mi in nih tawh chuan Abrahama thlahte in ni, thutiam anga roluahtu tûrte chu." 
Galatians4:1 Ka sawi tum chu han sawi zêl ila: Fapa chu ro zawng zawng khâwmtu tûr ni mah se, naupang a la nih chhûng chu a neitu tak a ni chungin bawih ang leka cheibâwl a ni;" 
Galatians4:2 a pa hun tiam a thlen hma chu enkawltute hnuaiah a awm ṭhîn. 
Galatians4:3 Keini pawh chutiang chuan kan awm - naupang kan nih lai khân khawvêl zirtîrna dik lo hnuaiah bawih kan ni a. 
Galatians4:4 A hun tak a lo thlen meuh chuan Pathianin a Fapa chu a rawn tîr a. 
Galatians4:5 Ani chu Dân hnuaia awmte min tlan tûr leh fapa dinhmuna min dintîr tûrin, hmeichhe laka piangin Dân hnuaiah a rawn seilentîr a." 
Galatians4:6 Fa in ni tih a chian nân Pathian chuan a Fapa Thlarau chu kan thinlung chhûngah a rawn tîr a, “Abba, ka Pa,” tiin a au chhuak ṭhîn." 
Galatians4:7 Tichuan, bawih in ni tawh lo va, fa in ni ta zâwk a, fa in nih chuan Pathian zâra roluahtu tûrte in ni." 
Galatians4:8 Tûn hma khân Pathian in la hre ngai lo va; chuvângin, an pianphung rêng pawha Pathian ni hlei lote bawihah in awm ṭhin kha." 
Galatians4:9 Tûnah zawng Pathian in lo zawm ta a - Pathianin a zawm ta che u tih tûr a ni zâwk mah ang chu; engtizia nge khawvêl zirtîrna dik lo mai mai, eng mah ni hlei lote lam in hawia, an bawih nih leh in duh tâk mai?" 
Galatians4:10 Ni te, thla te, hun te, kum te serh bîk in neih leh tâk hi!" 
Galatians4:11 In tân tha ka sêng thlâwn ang tih ka hlau a ni. 
Galatians4:12 Unaute u, keimah anga awm tûrin ka ngên a che u, nangmahni ang maiin kei pawh ka awm a, tu man mi tihchhiat ngai loh kha." 
Galatians4:13 In hnêna Chanchin Ṭha ka rawn hril hmasak ṭum kha ka bawrhsâwm vâng a ni tih in hria e; 
Galatians4:14 ka taksa chu in tân buaipuiawm tak ni mah se, mi hmusit lo va, mi ten hek lo; Pathian vântirhkoh ang maiin, Isua Krista ni hial âwmin mi lo lâwm a." 
Galatians4:15 Theih ni phei se in mitte kher chhuakin mi pêk in huam tih ka hria; nihlawh in intih tehlul nên, engtizia nge ni ta?" 
Galatians4:16 In hnêna thu dik tak ka sawi avângin in hmêlma ka ni ta em ni? 
Galatians4:17 Mi dodâltute hian a ṭha lam zâwnga rawn ngaihsak che u an ni lo va, lâk hran che ua, anmahni in hlutsak an duh vâng mai a ni." 
Galatians4:18 In zînga ka awm loh pawhin a ṭha lam zâwnga rawn ngaihsak che u mi dang an awm phawt chuan a lâwmawm zêl e. 
Galatians4:19 Naute u, Krista anna in neih hma chu nau veiin ka vei leh che u hi." 
Galatians4:20 Tûnah in zînga chêng ni ila ka va ti êm, ka aw ki pawh a dang tûr! A tihngaihna tak ka hre lo va che u." 
Galatians4:21 Dân hnuaia awm duhte u, mi hrilh rawh u, Dân thu chu in hre lo vem ni?" 
Galatians4:22 “Abrahama chuan fapa pahnih a nei a, pakhat chu bawihnu fa, pakhat chu chhûngpuinu fa,” tih ziak a nih kha." 
Galatians4:23 Bawihnu fa chu mihring dân pangngai anga hrin a ni a, chhûngpuinu fa erawh chu Pathian thutiam vânga hrin a ni." 
Galatians4:24 Hêng hi tehkhinna a ni; chûng nu pahnihte chu thuthlung pahnih entîrna an ni - pakhat chu Sinai tlâng aṭanga lo chhuak kha a ni a, chu chu Hagari a ni a, a fa hrinte chu bawih an ni." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari chu Arabia rama Sinai tlâng entîrna a ni a; tûnlai Jerusalem khua nên angkhat a ni, a chhûnga chêngte nên bawih an ni hlawm si a." 
Galatians4:26 Chung lam Jerusalem erawh chu bawih a ni lo, chu chu keini nu hi a ni:" 
Galatians4:27 “Nang ching, fa hrin nei lo, lâwm la, Nang nau vei ngai lo, hlim takin au rawh, Pasal nei ai chuan hrin nei lo nu chuan Fa a ngah zâwk si a,” tih ziak ang khân." 
Galatians4:28 Tichuan, unaute u, Isaka ang bawka Pathian thutiam fate in ni." 
Galatians4:29 Mihring dân pangngai anga hrin khân Thlarau thiltihtheihnaa hrin chu a tiduhdah ang khân tûnah pawh a nih zêl hi. 
Galatians4:30 Lehkha Thu-ah engtia ziak nge ni kha? “Bawihnu chu a fapa nên hnawt chhuak rawh, bawihnu fapa chuan chhûngpuinu fapa chu ro a luahpui tûr a ni lo,” tih a nih kha." 
Galatians4:31 Tichuan, unaute u, bawih fa kan ni lo va, chhûngpuinu fate kan ni." 
Galatians5:1 Krista chuan min zalêntîr ta a, in zalênnaah hian ding tlat ula, bawih nghâwngkawl bât leh tawh suh u." 
Galatians5:2 Ngai teh u, kei Paula ngei hian ka hrilh a che u - serh in tan chuan Krista chu in hlâwkpui lo tawp ang." 
Galatians5:3 Serh tan apiang hnênah hei hi ka sawi duh a ni - Dânin a phût zawng zawng chu an ti law law tûr a ni. 
Galatians5:4 Dân zawm avânga thiam chan tumte u, Krista hnên ata in intan fithla a, khawngaihna chu in chhuahsan ta a ni." 
Galatians5:5 Keini zawng Thlarau zârah rinna avânga thiam channa chu beiseiin kan nghâkhlel takmeuh a ni. 
Galatians5:6 Isua Kristaa kan awm phawt zawngin serh tan emaw, tan loh emaw a danglam chuang lo; hmangaihnaa thuam rinna hi a pawimawh ber mai." 
Galatians5:7 Hma in sâwn ṭhat ṭhin vei nên, tu ber kherin nge thutak tlûksan tûra hruai bo ta che u!" 
Galatians5:8 He hruai kawina hi a kotu che u laka chhuak a ni lo ve. 
Galatians5:9 Dawidim tlêm têin chhang hlâwm lian pui pawh a fan chhuak thei tih a ni. 
Galatians5:10 Lalpa pakhata awm za kan nih avângin rilru hrang in la put loh kei chuan ka ring tlat a ni; nangmahni chawk buaitu chu tu pawh ni se, hrem a la tuar ang." 
Galatians5:11 Unaute u, kei hian serh tan a ṭûl tiin lo hril ṭhîn ila, engah nge mi tihduhdah ang? Chuti ni se, kraws thu kan hril hian buaina a siam lo tûr." 
Galatians5:12 Nangmahni tibuaitute hi in zîng ata intan fithla law law ang hmiang. 
Galatians5:13 Unaute u, nangni zawng zalênna nei tûra koh in ni a, in zalênna hi tisa tâna remchângah hmang lul suh u; inhmangaih tawnin rawng inbâwlsak zâwk rawh u." 
Galatians5:14 “Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte pawh hmangaih rawh,” tih thu kam khat hi in zawm chuan Dân zawng zawng in zâwm a ni mai." 
Galatians5:15 Ran ang maia inbeih leh intihnat in chîn chuan fîmkhur rawh u, in intiboral tawn mai dah ang e." 
Galatians5:16 Ka sawi tum chu hei hi a ni: Thlarauvah awm ula, tisa châkna chu in zâwm tawp lo vang." 
Galatians5:17 Tisa duhzâwng chuan thlarau lam thil a kalh tlat a, Thlarau lahin tisa lam thil chu a kalh tlat bawk a, an inkalh tawn tlat avângin in tih duh eng mah in ti thei ṭhîn lo va ni." 
Galatians5:18 Thlarau hruaia in awm zawngin Dân hnuaiah in awm lo ve. 
Galatians5:19 Tisa mite thiltih chu a lang chiang a ni - inngaihna te, bawlhhlawhna te, hurna te," 
Galatians5:20 milem biakna te, dawi te, inhuat te, innghirngho te, thîkna te, thinchhiat te, mahni hmasial te, intihdarh te, inṭhen te," 
Galatians5:21 inîtsîk te, zu ruih chîn te, zu hmuna nuam tâwl te leh chutiang chi chu. Chutiang ti mite chuan Pathian ram an luah tawp lo vang tih ka hrilh tawh che u angin ka hrilh nawn leh a che u." 
Galatians5:22 Thlarau rah zawng hmangaihna te, lâwmna te, remna te, dawhtheihna te, ngilneihna te, ṭhatna te, rinawmna te," 
Galatians5:23 nunnêmna te, insûm theihna te a ni. Chutiang kalh zâwng Dân a awm lo ve." 
Galatians5:24 Isua Kristaa awmte chuan an tisa châkna te leh duhna te chu an khêngbet tawh a ni. 
Galatians5:25 Thlarauva nung kan nih tawh chuan Thlarau hruai ang zêlin i awm ang u. 
Galatians5:26 Incho tawna, inîtsîk tawnin mahni i inngaihlu suh ang u." 
Galatians6:1 Unaute u, miin sual a ti lai phâwk ula, nangni thlarau mite chuan chu mi chu dimdawi takin tundin leh tum ṭhîn rawh u; nangni pawh mahni invêng ṭha ṭheuh ula, thlêmna in tâwk ve dah ang e." 
Galatians6:2 Phur inchhâwk tawn ṭhîn ula; tichuan, Krista dân chu in zâwm a ni ang." 
Galatians6:3 Eng mah ni si lo, mi lian tak nia inngai chu mahni a inbum mai a ni." 
Galatians6:4 Mi tinin mahni thiltih enfiah ṭheuh zâwk rawh se, mi dang nêna inteh lovin, mahni thawh tâwk tê têah lâwmna tûr in nei thei ang;" 
Galatians6:5 mi tinin mahni pual phur kan nei ṭheuh si a. 
Galatians6:6 Zirtîrna thu dawngtu chuan a zirtîrtu chu thil ṭha a neih ang ang pe ve rawh se. 
Galatians6:7 Bumin awm suh u, Pathian chu ngaihnêp rual a ni lo ve. Miin a tuh chu a seng leh ngei dâwn a ni." 
Galatians6:8 Mahni tisa lam tâna tuhtu chuan tisaa mi chhiatna a seng ang a, Thlarau lam tâna tuhtu erawh chuan Thlarauva mi chatuan nunna a seng dâwn si a." 
Galatians6:9 Thil ṭha tih i ning suh ang u, kan inthlahdah loh zawngin a hun takah kan la seng ngei dâwn e." 
Galatians6:10 Chutichuan, remchâng kan hmuh apiangin mi tin hnênah thil ṭha ti ila, rinnaa kan chhûngte chungah phei chuan i uar zual ang u." 
Galatians6:11 En teh u, hawrawp hraw pui puia ziak hi keima ziak ngei a nih hi." 
Galatians6:12 Tisa lama intih hmêl mawi tumte chuan serh tan luihtîr che u an tum a, Krista kraws avânga tihduhdah an tuar loh nân an ti a ni." 
Galatians6:13 Serh tante pawh hian Dân chu an zâwm kim bîk hlei nêm. In taksaa chhinchhiahna awm chu an uanpui theih nân serh tantîr che u an tum a ni. 
Galatians6:14 Kei zawng, kan Lalpa Isua Krista kraws chauh lo chu chhuan tûr rêng ka nei lo, chu krawsah chuan khawvêl hi ka tân khenbeh a ni a, kei pawh khawvêl tân khenbeh ka ni." 
Galatians6:15 Miin serh an tan nge tan lo a pawimawh lo, siamtharna hi a pawimawh ber chu a ni." 
Galatians6:16 He thu zâwmtu zawng zawng chungah remna leh zahngaihna awm rawh se, Pathian Israel-te chungah pawh." 
Galatians6:17 Tûn chinah tu mahin mi tibuai tawh suh se, ka taksaa ser awmte hi Krista bawih ka nih chhinchhiahna a nih hi." 
Galatians6:18 Unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnênah awm rawh se. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pathian duhzâwnga Krista Isua Tirhkoh Paula chuan, mi thianghlim Efesi khuaa awm, Krista Isua mi rinawmte chibai ka bûk e." 
Ephesians1:2 Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. 
Ephesians1:3 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pa leh Pathian chu i fak ang u. Ani chuan Krista zârah vân hmunahte khian thlarau lam malsâwmna tinrêngin mal min sâwm a. 
Ephesians1:4 Thianghlim leh sawisêlbova a hmaa kan awm theih nân leilung pian hma khân hmangaihnain Kristaah min thlang tawh a. 
Ephesians1:5 Ama duhzâwng leh a tum dân ang taka Isua Krista zâra a fa ni tûrin min lo ruat lâwk tawh bawk a. 
Ephesians1:6 Duh taka zâra a khawngaihna thil thlâwnpêk ropui tak min pêk avângin i fak ang u. 
Ephesians1:7 Krista thisena tlan kan ni, kan bawhchhiatnate ngaihdamna chu. A khawngaihna chu a va thûk êm!" 
Ephesians1:8 Chu khawngaihna chu fing tak leh remhre takin min vûr ta ṭeuh a ni. 
Ephesians1:9 Kristaa a ruat lâwk tawh ang taka tih a tum thurûk chu min hriattîr ta. 
Ephesians1:10 A hun taka Kristaa tihhlawhtlin tûra Pathian thil rêl lâwk chu engkim, vâna thil awm te, leia thil awm te Kristaa fâwk khâwm hi a ni." 
Ephesians1:11 Ama remruat ang taka thil engkim tihlawhtlingtu duh dân ang ngeiin Krista zârah a mite ni tûrin keini hi min ruat lâwk a, min thlang chhuak tawh a ni." 
Ephesians1:12 Keini Kristaa beiseina nghat hmasate hi a ropuina tilangtu tûr kan ni. 
Ephesians1:13 Amahah chuan thutak, in chhandamna Chanchin Ṭha chu, in lo hria a, Krista chu in ring ve ta a; tichuan, Thlarau Thianghlim tiam chuan nangni pawh a chhinchhiah ta che u a ni." 
Ephesians1:14 In Thlarau dawn kha a ta ni tûra min tlanna avânga kan rochan tûr zakhamna a ni. A ropuina chu fakin awm rawh se. 
Ephesians1:15 Chuvângin, kei pawhin Lalpa Isua in rinna leh mi thianghlim zawng zawng in hmangaihna ka lo hriatin," 
Ephesians1:16 ka ṭawngṭainaahte ka hre reng ṭhîn che u a, nangmahni avângin bâng lovin lâwmthu ka sawi ṭhîn." 
Ephesians1:17 Kan Lalpa Krista Isua Pathian, ropuina Pa chuan, finna leh hriatthiamna thlarau pe che u rawh se." 
Ephesians1:18 Tichuan, in thinlung mitte tihvârin awm sela, eng beisei tûrin nge a koh che u tih te, mi thianghlimte nêna in rochan tûr a khâwl tamzia te," 
Ephesians1:19 keini ringtua a chakna thahrui thiltihtheihna tâwp chin nei lova a thawh nasatzia te in hre thei ang. 
Ephesians1:20 Chu chakna chuan Krista chu mitthi zîng ata a kaitho va, vân hmunahte a ding lamah a ṭhuttîr a;" 
Ephesians1:21 lalna te, thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna te, rorêlna zawng zawng te chungah, he khawvêl leh khawvêl lo la awm tûra hming sak zawng zawng chung daihah a dah ta a ni." 
Ephesians1:22 ‘A ke hnuaiah chuan engkim a dah ta a, ani chu lu ber atân kohhran hnênah a pe ta a ni." 
Ephesians1:23 Kohhran chu Krista taksa a ni, engkim engkima tifamkimtu famkimna chu." 
Ephesians2:1 Hmânah chuan in bawhchhiatnate leh in sualte avângin thi in ni a. 
Ephesians2:2 Chutih lai chuan he khawvêl dân ang hian in khawsa a, boruaka thuneitute lal, awih lote chunga tûna thawk mêk thlarau thu thu-a in awm kha." 
Ephesians2:3 An zîngah chuan keini pawh kan tel vek a, kan tisa châkzâwng ûmin kan tisa duhzâwng leh ngaihtuahzâwng kan ti ṭhîn a, mi dangte ang bawkin Pathian thinurna tuar tûr rênga piang kan nih kha." 
Ephesians2:4 Nimahsela, Pathian khawngaihna chu a nasain, a mi hmangaihna chu a thûk êm a," 
Ephesians2:5 kan bawhchhiatnate avânga thi kan nih lai khân Krista nên min tinung ta hlawm a. A khawngaihna avânga chhandam in ni. 
Ephesians2:6 Krista Isuaah chuan min kaithovin, vân hmunahte min ṭhuthotîr ta a." 
Ephesians2:7 Krista Isuaa kan chunga a ngilneihna hian hun lo thleng leh zêl tûr atân pawh khawngaihna a ngah nasatzia a rawn tilang ta a ni. 
Ephesians2:8 Rinna avânga khawngaihnaa chhandam in ni, chu chu in thawh chhuah a ni lo, Pathian thilpêk a ni." 
Ephesians2:9 Thil ṭha tih avângin a ni lo, chuti ni se miin an chhuang dah ang e." 
Ephesians2:10 Krista Isuaah chuan thil ṭha ti tûrin min siam a, a kut chhuak ngei kan nih tâk hi, thil ṭha tih chu kan awm dân tûra Pathian buatsaih lâwk a ni." 
Ephesians2:11 Nangni hi piannaa Jentail, tisa kuta serhtanten ‘serh tan loh’ an tih ṭhin che u kha;" 
Ephesians2:12 khatih lai khân Krista in la nei lo va, Israel chhûngkaw lakah mi hrang in ni a, Pathian thutiamah thuthlung pâwna mi in ni bawk a, khawvêlah hian beiseina rêng nei lo leh Pathian tak hre lova in awm kha hre reng rawh u." 
Ephesians2:13 Tûnah erawh chuan Krista Isuaah, nangni hmâna hla taka awmte kha, Krista thisen chuan tihhnaih in ni ta." 
Ephesians2:14 Krista chu kan inremna a ni. Ani chuan Jentail-te leh keini Juda-te hi pumkhatah min siam a, min daidang ṭhîn intaina bang chu a tisa khân a tibo ta." 
Ephesians2:15 Dân thupêkte leh tih tûr awmte chu a titâwp a, keini leh nangni hi amahah chuan mihring thar, pumkhatah min siam a, inremna a rawn thlen ta a." 
Ephesians2:16 Krawsah chuan intaina chu a tibo va, Jentail-te leh Juda-te chu pumkhata lo awmin, Pathian nên kan inrem ta a." 
Ephesians2:17 A lo kal khân hla taka awm nangni hnênah remna Chanchin Ṭha a hril a, hnai zâwka awm keini hnênah pawh remna Chanchin Ṭha bawk chu a hril a." 
Ephesians2:18 Ama zârah Thlarau hmun khatin Pa hnênah kan lût thei ve ve ta a ni. 
Ephesians2:19 Tichuan, tûnah hian ram dang mi leh mikhual châm mai in ni tawh lo va, mi thianghlimte nên chuan tualkhat leh Pathian chhûngkua in ni ta zâwk a." 
Ephesians2:20 Tirhkohte leh zâwlneite lungphûm chunga rem in ni, chu lungphûma a kil lung pawimawh ber chu Krista Isua hi a ni." 
Ephesians2:21 Chu in chu a pumin amahah chuan rem khâwm a ni a, Lalpa tân Tempul thianghlim a lo ni ta a ni." 
Ephesians2:22 Nangni pawh amahah chuan mi dangte nên, Thlarauva Pathian chênna in atân rem khâwm in ni." 
Ephesians3:1 Hemi avâng hian nangni Jentail-te tâna Krista Isuaa mi tâng, kei Paula hian ka ṭawngṭaisak che u a ni." 
Ephesians3:2 A khawngaihna avângin Pathianin in tân he hna hi thawk tûrin mi ruat tih in hre tawh châwk ang a. 
Ephesians3:3 Ka sawi hlek tawh ang khân Krista thurûk chu inlârnaa hriattîr ka ni a. 
Ephesians3:4 Ka thu ziak in chhiar ngun chuan chu Krista thu ril chu ka hriat chianzia pawh in hre thei ang. 
Ephesians3:5 A tirhkoh thianghlimte leh zâwlneite hnênah Thlarauvin tûna a hriattîr ang hian, tûn hma chuan he thu ril hi mihringte a la hriattîr ngai lo;" 
Ephesians3:6 Chanchin Ṭha avângin Krista Isuaah chuan Jentail-te pawh, Israel-te nên ro luah tlâng tûr leh pumkhata awm tûr leh chhûng khat, thutiam dawng ho tûr an nih thu hi." 
Ephesians3:7 Pathian khawngaihna thilpêk mi dawntîr avâng hian, a thiltihtheihna hmangin chu Chanchin Ṭha rawngbâwltua siam chu ka ni." 
Ephesians3:8 Kei hi mi thianghlim zawng zawng zînga tê ber ni mah ila, Jentail-te hnênah Krista hausakna chhui chhuah rual loh chu puang tûrin a khawngaihnain mi ruat a; Pathian engkim siamtu hnêna chatuan ata thuhrûka awm, he a remruat lâwk hi mi zawng zawng hnêna tilang tûra ruat ka ni." 
Ephesians3:9  
Ephesians3:10 Pathian finna ngahzia hi, kohhran avâng hian, vân hmuna lalte leh thuneitute hnênah tûnah hriattîr a ni ta. Chatuan ata rem a lo ruat tawh ang ngei chu kan Lalpa Isua Kristaah a rawn tihlawhtling ta a." 
Ephesians3:11  
Ephesians3:12 Kristaah chuan, amah kan rin avângin nêl tak leh ngam takin Pathian kan pawh thei ta a ni." 
Ephesians3:13 Chutichuan, in tâna ka tuarnate avânga zâm lo tûrin ka ngên a che u, in ropuina tûr a ni e." 
Ephesians3:14 Hemi avâng hian Pa, lei leh vâna chhûngkaw tinrêng hming chawi chhana hmaah chuan" 
Ephesians3:15 ṭhingṭhiin ka kûn ṭhîn a ni. 
Ephesians3:16 A thlarau zârah in chhûng lam nun tihchak nân a ropuina nasa tak ata thiltihtheihna pe che u sela," 
Ephesians3:17 rinna avângin Krista chu in thinlungah chêng sela, hmangaihnaah zung kaiin phun ngheh in ni dâwn nia." 
Ephesians3:18 Tichuan, mi thianghlim zawng zawng nên a hmangaihna zauzia te, seizia te, sânzia te, thûkzia te chiang takin in hre tlâng thei ang." 
Ephesians3:19 Krista hmangaihna hriat sên rual loh chu in hria ang a, Pathian famkimna tinrênga tihkhah in lo ni ang." 
Ephesians3:20 Chutichuan, keimahnia thawk ṭhîn thiltihtheihna hmanga, kan dîl leh kan ngaihtuah phâk aia nasa zâwka ti theitu hnênah ngei chuan," 
Ephesians3:21 eng lai pawhin Kohhranah leh Krista hnênah ropuina chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 A kohna che u phua awm tûrin kei, Lalpa avânga tâng hian ka ngên a che u." 
Ephesians4:2 Kawng tinrêngah inngaitlâwm leh thuhnuairawlh takin awm ula, inphahhniam takin hmangaihna nên indawh tawn rawh u." 
Ephesians4:3 Inrem taka awm hovin Thlarauva inpumkhatna hi vawng tlat rawh u. 
Ephesians4:4 Beisei hmun khat nei tûra koh in ni ang bawkin, taksa pakhat leh Thlarau pakhat chauh a awm a." 
Ephesians4:5 Lalpa pakhat, rinna hmun khat, baptisma hmun khat," 
Ephesians4:6 mi zawng zawng Pa, Pathian pakhat chauh a awm a ni. Ani chu engkim chungah a awm a, engkim a fang chhuak a, engkimah a awm bawk a ni." 
Ephesians4:7 Tichuan, Krista khawngaihna thilthlâwnpêk chu tâwk a tih ang zêlin min pe ṭheuh a ni." 
Ephesians4:8 Lehkha Thu-ah pawh: “Chung lama a chhoh khân Râl a man tâkte tam tak chu salah a hruai a, Mihringte hnênah pawh thilpêk a sem,” tih a nih kha." 
Ephesians4:9 (Chung lama chho tih hi eng tihna nge? Lei hmun hnuai berah a lo chhuk hmasa tihna a ni. 
Ephesians4:10 Engkim a tihfamkim theih nân, lo chhuka ngei kha vân chung daiha han chho leh ta-a chu a ni.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Tichuan, mi ṭhenkhat chu tirhkoh atân, ṭhenkhat zâwlnei atân, ṭhenkhat Chanchin Ṭha hriltu atân, ṭhenkhat kohhran enkawltu leh zirtîrtu atân a ruat a." 
Ephesians4:12 Chutiang chuan mi thianghlimte tihpuitlin nân rawngbâwl hna thawk tûr leh Krista taksa tiṭhanglian tûrin a ruat a ni. 
Ephesians4:13 Chu chu kan zaa rinna hmun khat kan vawna, Pathian Fapa hriatna kan neiha, mi puitling, Krista famkimna tluka mi famkim kan lo nih theihna tûr a ni." 
Ephesians4:14 Fing vervêka thiam taka mi hruai bo an tumna, zirtîrna chi tinrênga lehlam lehlama hruai kawi theih naupangchhia ang kan ni tawh lo vang a," 
Ephesians4:15 hmangaihnaa thu dik sawiin, engkimah Krista lamah kan ṭhang lian thei ang; Krista chu Lu a ni si a." 
Ephesians4:16 Taksa pum chu amahah a innghat a, tha leh zungin a phuar khâwm a, taksa pêng tin chu an tih tûr ang ti ṭheuhvin an ṭhang tlâng a, hmangaihnain an inchâwm lian ṭhîn a ni." 
Ephesians4:17 Chutichuan, hei hi ka sawi duh a, Lalpa hmingin ka hrilh a che u; rilru mumal nei lo Jentail-te awm dân angin awm ve tawh suh u." 
Ephesians4:18 An rilru a thim zo va, hriatna an nei lo va, an thinlung an tihchawlawl tawh avângin Pathian nunna lak ata ṭhenin an awm ta." 
Ephesians4:19 Zah nachâng pawh an hre tawh lo va, suahsualnaah an inpumpêk a, duhâm takin thil bawlhhlawh tinrêng an ti a." 
Ephesians4:20 Nangni zawng Krista zirtu in ni a, chutianga awm ve tûr in ni lo." 
Ephesians4:21 A thu in zawma, thutak, Kristaa awm kha zirtîr in nih takzet chuan," 
Ephesians4:22 tisa châknain a tihkhawloh tawh in awm dân hmasa, mihring hlui kha hlîp rawh u." 
Ephesians4:23 In rilru leh thinlung chu tihthar ni sela," 
Ephesians4:24 thutaka chhuak, dikna leh thianghlimnaa Pathian anga siam mihring thar chuan inthuam rawh u." 
Ephesians4:25 Chutichuan, dâwt sawi bânsan ula, Krista taksa pêng kan nih ṭheuh avângin mahni ṭhenawmte chu thu dik chauh hrilh rawh u." 
Ephesians4:26 Thinrim mah ula, thil sual ti suh u, ni tlâk thleng thlengin thinrim suh u." 
Ephesians4:27 Diabola chu hun remchâng pe suh u. 
Ephesians4:28 Rûkhmang chuan ru tawh suh se, tlachham hnêna pêk tûr a neih theih nân mahni kut ngeia hna thawkin rim zâwk rawh se." 
Ephesians4:29 Ṭawng mawi lo rêng rêng hmang suh u, mi siam ṭha thei tûr chauh in ka aṭangin chhuak rawh se; chutichuan, a ngaithlatute tân a lâwmawm bawk ang." 
Ephesians4:30 Pathian Thlarau Thianghlim chu tilungngai suh u, tlanna ni atân ama ta ngei in nihzia Pathianin a chhinchhiahna che u a ni e." 
Ephesians4:31 Huatna te, thinurna te, tauhna te, ânna te, sawichhiatna zawng zawng te nangmahni aṭangin paih bo rawh u, sualna zawng zawng nên." 
Ephesians4:32 Inkhawngaih tawnin inlainat tawn ula, Pathianin Kristaa a ngaidam che u ang hian inngaidam tawn rawh u." 
Ephesians5:1 Chutichuan, Pathian fa duh takte in nih avângin a awm dân latute ni rawh u." 
Ephesians5:2 Kristan min hmangaiha, Pathian lâwmzâwng thilpêk leh thilhlan rimtui ni tûrin kan tân a inpe ang khân hmangaihna nei ve rawh u." 
Ephesians5:3 Mi thianghlimte tih dân tûr ni âwm rêngin inngaihna te, bawlhhlawhna te, duhâmna te in zîngah lam pawh lam ri suh u." 
Ephesians5:4 Zahmawh te, ṭawng mawi lo leh fiamthu tenawm sawi te hi in tân a mawi lo va ni, lâwmthu sawi chîng zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:5 Inngaih chîng te, mi bawlhhlawh te, mi duhâm te (chu chu milem bia tihna a ni) - chûng mite chuan Krista leh Pathian ramah chuan chan tûr rêng an nei lo tih hre rawh u." 
Ephesians5:6 Chûng thil a nêp zâwnga sawitute chuan bum che u suh se, chûng thil avâng chuan Pathian thinurna chu awih lo mite chungah a thleng dâwn a ni." 
Ephesians5:7 Chuvângin, anmahni chu kâwm hlek suh u." 
Ephesians5:8 Hmânah khân thim in ni a, tûnah erawh chuan Lalpaah êng in lo nih tâk hi, ênga awmte ni âwm rêngin awm rawh u." 
Ephesians5:9 Êng chu ṭhatna te, felna te leh thutak tinrêngin a rah chhuak ṭhîn." 
Ephesians5:10 Lalpa lâwmzâwng chu eng nge ni tih hriat fiah tum zâwk rawh u. 
Ephesians5:11 Tin, thima awmte thiltih ṭangkai lovah chuan tel ve hauh suh u, a dik lohzia tilang ṭhîn zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:12 A rûka an thil tih ṭhinte chu a sawi pawh a zahthlâk si a. 
Ephesians5:13 Eng pawh êngin a chhun chuan a nihna a lang chiang ṭhîn, tihêna awm tawh chu a lo êng ve ṭhîn a ni." 
Ephesians5:14 Chuvângin, Lehkha Thu-ah pawh: “Nang muhîl, harh la, Mitthi zîng ata tho rawh, Krista chuan a chhun êng ang che,” tih a nih kha." 
Ephesians5:15 Chutichuan, in khawsak dânah fîmkhur hle rawh u, mi â-te anga awm lovin, mi fingte angin awm zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:16 Hun ṭha lo taka awm kan nih avângin in hun chu hmang ṭha rawh u. 
Ephesians5:17 Chuvângin, â takin awm suh ula, Lalpa duhzâwng eng nge ni tih hriatthiam tum zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:18 Uain ruih chîng tawh suh u, chhiatna bul a ni e, Thlarauvin khat zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:19 Fakna hla te, Pathian hla te leh thlarau lam hla te chuan inbe ṭhîn ula, in thinlung takin Lalpa fakna hla sa-in zai rawh u." 
Ephesians5:20 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista hmingin eng lai pawhin engkimah Pa Pathian hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u. 
Ephesians5:21 Krista ṭihtute in nih avângin intulût tawn rawh u. 
Ephesians5:22 Nute pawhin Lalpa thu an awih angin mahni pasalte thu an awih tûr a ni. 
Ephesians5:23 Krista chu ama taksa, Kohhran chhandamtu a ni a, Kohhran lû a ni ang hian pasal chu nupui lû a ni." 
Ephesians5:24 Krista hnênah Kohhran a intulût angin, nupuite pawh engkimah an pasalte hnênah intulût rawh se." 
Ephesians5:25 Pate u, Kristan kohhran a hmangaih ang hian in nupuite hmangaih ve rawh u." 
Ephesians5:26 Kohhran chu thu leh tuia sil faia tithianghlim tûrin Krista chu amah a inpe a," 
Ephesians5:27 Kohhran ropui tak, zûr lo, kaidum awm lo leh chutiang thil bawlhhlawh kai lo, thianghlim leh hmêlhem lo ama tân din tûrin a inpe a ni." 
Ephesians5:28 Pasalte chuan mahni taksa an hmangaih angin mahni nupuite an hmangaih tûr a ni. Mahni nupui hmangaihtu chuan amah a inhmangaih a ni. 
Ephesians5:29 Tu mân mahni taksa an lungten ngai lo, Kristan kohhran a châwma a duat ang hian an duat zâwk ṭhîn;" 
Ephesians5:30 keini pawh a taksa pêngte kan ni si a.
