Ephesians5:31 Lehkha Thu-ah chuan, “Chumi avâng chuan mipain a nu leh pa a thlah ang a, a nupui a vuan ang; tichuan, an pahnihin tisa pum khat an lo ni tawh ang,” tih a ni." 
Ephesians5:32 Hei hi thu ril thûk tak a ni, kei chuan Krista leh a kohhran thu a sawina niin ka hria." 
Ephesians5:33 Eng pawh ni se, in zînga tu pawhin mahni a inhmangaih ang bawkin mahni nupui hmangaih ṭheuh rawh se, nupui pawhin a pasal a zah thiam tûr a ni." 
Ephesians6:1 Naupangte u, Lalpaah chuan in nu leh in pate thu zâwm rawh u, chu chu thil dik tak a ni." 
Ephesians6:2 “I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,” tih hi thupêk zînga tiam tel nei hmasa ber a ni." 
Ephesians6:3 “I tân a ṭha ang a, leiah hian i dam rei bawk ang,” tih a nih kha." 
Ephesians6:4 Tin, nangni pate u, in fate tithinur suh ula, Lalpa zirtîrnaah leh thununnaah enkawl zâwk rawh u." 
Ephesians6:5 Bawihte u, Krista thu in zâwm angin rilrua tihtakzetin, hlau leh khûr chungin tisaa in pute thu zâwm rawh u." 
Ephesians6:6 Mihring tihlâwm tumtute ang maia an hmuh lai chauhva thawk lovin, Krista bawih ni âwm rêngin rilru takin Pathian duhzâwng ti ula," 
Ephesians6:7 mihring rawngbâwl mai ni lovin Lalpa rawngbâwl in nih zâwk avângin hlim takin thawk ṭhîn rawh u. 
Ephesians6:8 Bawih pawh, bawih lo pawh, mi tinin an thil ṭha tih lâwmman Lalpa hnên ata an hmu ṭheuh dâwn tih in hre si a." 
Ephesians6:9 Tin, nangni hotute u, chutiang bawkin an chungah ti ve rawh u. In bawihte nêna in hotu, thlei bîk nei lo chu, vânah a awm tih hre rengin invau chîng suh u." 
Ephesians6:10 A tâwp berah chuan Lalpa leh a chakna aṭang chuan thiltihtheihna la ṭhîn rawh u. 
Ephesians6:11 Diabola thlêmna in dan theih nân Pathian râlthuam kimin inthuam rawh u. 
Ephesians6:12 Mihring râl do kan ni lo ve, lalna te leh thuneihna te, he khawvêl thim chunga rorêltute leh vân hmuna thlarau sual awmte kan do a nih zâwk hi." 
Ephesians6:13 Chuvângin, Pathian râlthuam kim chuan inthuam ula, ni ṭha lo a thlen hunah hmêlma in dang tlat thei ang a, in dan zawhah pawh in ding reng thei ang." 
Ephesians6:14 Tichuan, nghet takin ding ula, thutaka in kâwng hrêngin, dikna chu âwmphawah ha rawh u." 
Ephesians6:15 Remna Chanchin Ṭha puang tûra inpeih rengna chu pheikhawkah bun ula," 
Ephesians6:16 mi sualpa thal alh theite chu in tihmih zêl theih nân rinna hi phawah hmang rawh u. 
Ephesians6:17 Chhandamna chu lukhumah hmang ula; Thlarau khandaih, Pathian thu chu pai rawh u." 
Ephesians6:18 Ṭawngṭai fo ula, Pathian chu in mamawh apiang dîl ula, Thlarau hruai ang zêlin eng hunah pawh ṭawngṭai rawh u. In ṭawngṭainaah chuan mi thianghlim zawng zawng tân bâng lovin dîl rawh u." 
Ephesians6:19 Chanchin Ṭha thu ril huai taka puang tûra thu ka dawn theih nân kei pawh mi dîlsak ula. 
Ephesians6:20 Chanchin Ṭha palai lung in tâng ka ni a, ka sawi tûr huai taka ka sawi theih nân min dîlsak ang che u." 
Ephesians6:21 Lalpaa unau duh tak leh rawngbâwltu rinawm tak Tukika hian, ka chanchin in hriat theih nân engkim a hrilh ang che u." 
Ephesians6:22 Ka chanchin hrilh tûr che u leh thlamuan tûr che uin ani hi ka rawn tîr a ni. 
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata remna te, hmangaihna te leh rinna te chu unaute hnênah awm rawh se." 
Ephesians6:24 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista chuai lova hmangaihtu zawng zawng hnênah khawngaihna awm rawh se. 
Philippians1:1 Paula leh Timothea, Krista Isua bawihte chuan, Krista Isuaa mi thianghlim Filipi khuaa awm zawng zawng leh, Kohhran hotute leh rawngbâwltute chibai kan bûk e." 
Philippians1:2 Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. 
Philippians1:3 In chanchin ka ngaihtuah apiangin ka Pathian hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi ṭhîn a," 
Philippians1:4 eng hunah pawh in zavaia tân ka ṭawngṭai apiangin hlim takin ka ṭawngṭai ṭhîn a ni," 
Philippians1:5 in hriat tirh ni aṭangin tûn thlenga Chanchin Ṭha hril hna mi thawhpui ṭhin avângin. 
Philippians1:6 Nangmahnia he thil ṭha tichhuaktu chuan Krista Ni-a a puitlin thlengin a thawh zêl ka ring tlat a ni. 
Philippians1:7 Ka ngai êm êm ṭhîn che u a, Pathianin he chanvo mi pêk Chanchin Ṭha tâna ka beihnaah te, tihngheh hna ka thawhnaah te leh ka kawl bunah te min ṭanpuitu in nih avângin ka thinlungah in awm reng a, in zaa chungah chutiang rilru pu âwm rêng pawh ka ni." 
Philippians1:8 Krista Isua rilru ka ṭâwmpui avângin in zain ka ngai êm êm che u a ni tih Pathianin a hria. 
Philippians1:9 In hmangaihna chu hriatnaah te, thil hmuh fiah thiamna tinrêngah te ṭhang liana a pun deuh deuh theih nân ka ṭawngṭai a ni." 
Philippians1:10 Tichuan, thil ṭha bîkte chu in thlang thiam ang a, Krista Nî-ah chuan thianghlim leh sawisêlbo in lo ni ang a," 
Philippians1:11 Pathian ropui nân leh fak nân Krista zâra felna rah chuan in lo khat dâwn nia. 
Philippians1:12 Unaute u, ka thil tuarte kha chanchin Ṭha tihdarhna tûr a lo ni ta hlauh zâwk tih in hriat ka duh a ni." 
Philippians1:13 Ka kawl bunte hi Krista vâng a ni tih lal in vêngtuho leh mi dang zawng zawng pawhin an hre ta. 
Philippians1:14 Unau tam zâwkte pawhin ka kawl bun avângin Lalpa an ring nghet sauh va, hlau lovin Pathian thu pawh an hril ngam ta." 
Philippians1:15 Mi ṭhenkhat chuan îtsîkna leh elrelna avângin Krista thu an hril ve ṭhîn a, ṭhenkhat erawh chuan rilru ṭha takin an hril ṭhîn." 
Philippians1:16 Chanchin Ṭha ṭan tûra ruat ka nih hriain hmangaih avânga hril an ni; 
Philippians1:17 ṭhenkhat zawngin ti tak tak lovin, inerna avâng leh ka chungthu hi rip zual se an tih avânga hril an ni." 
Philippians1:18 A pawi lo ve, a derin emaw, a takin emaw, engti kawng emaw tala Krista thu hrilh a ni hi a lâwmawm e, ka lâwm zêl ang." 
Philippians1:19 Min ṭawngṭaisakna avâng leh Isua Krista Thlarau ṭanpuina avângin chhan chhuah ka ni dâwn tih ka hre si a. 
Philippians1:20 Ka duhthusâm ber leh ka beisei tlat chu, engah mah ka mualpho lohva, huai taka eng hunah pawh, tûn ṭumah ngei pawh hian, damin emaw, thîin emaw ka taksaa Krista chawimawi hi a ni." 
Philippians1:21 Kei zawng Krista tâna nung ka ni a, thi mah ila ka tân chuan a hlâwk zâwk ang." 
Philippians1:22 Dam zêl ila ṭangkaina ka la nei dâwn bawk si a; a eng nge thlan zâwk tûr ka hre lo. 
Philippians1:23 A ngaihna tak pawh ka hre lo ve, kal chhuaha Krista hnêna awm châkna ka nei a, chu chu a ṭha zâwk tih ka hria." 
Philippians1:24 Amaherawhchu, nangmahni avângin la dam reng a ṭûl bawk si." 
Philippians1:25 In zaa rinna tiṭhang tûr leh in lâwmna tipung tûrin ka dam zêl dâwn tih ka hria. 
Philippians1:26 Ka lo kal leh hunah chuan keimah avângin Krista in la fak lehzual dâwn a ni. 
Philippians1:27 Mi dangte nêna in khawsak ho dân chu Krista Chanchin Ṭha nên inmawi phawt sela, ka lo kal emaw, kal lo emaw, thlarau hmun khata ding nghetin, rilru hmun khat puin Chanchin Ṭha rinna chu in ṭan tlâng tih ka hre thei ang. Tichuan, dotute chu engti kawng maha hlau lovin huai takin awm ula; chu chu an hneh dawn lo che u a, in hneh zâwk dâwn tih tichiangtu a ni ang. Chu chu Pathian tih a ni si a." 
Philippians1:28  
Philippians1:29 Krista ring tûr chauh ni lovin, a tâna tuar tûr pawhin rawngbâwl hna hi in chang a ni si." 
Philippians1:30 Indona ka tawh in hmuh ṭhin, tûnah pawh ka tâwk zêl tih in hriat ang kha in tâwk ve ta a nih hi." 
Philippians2:1 Krista zârah thlamuanna in nei ta a, a hmangaihna chuan a tilâwm che u a, Thlarau pâwlna in chang a, inlainatna leh inkhawngaihna in nei ta a." 
Philippians2:2 Chuvângin, lungrual taka inhmangaih tawnin, inthuruala rilru hmun khat puin, ka lâwmna tikim rawh u." 
Philippians2:3 Mahni hmasial tak leh inngaihlu taka eng mah ti lovin, tu pawhin inngaitlâwm takin mi dangte ṭha zâwkah dah rawh u." 
Philippians2:4 Mahni ṭhatna tûr chauh zawng lovin, mi dang ṭhatna tûr pawh zawng rawh u." 
Philippians2:5 Krista Isua rilru ang hi nangni pawhin pu zêl rawh u. 
Philippians2:6 Ani chu Pathian anpui ni mah sela, Pathian tluka awm chu tum tlat tûrah a ngai lo va," 
Philippians2:7 mahni intitlâwmin bawihah a insiam a, mihringa lo piangin mihring a lo ni ngei na a," 
Philippians2:8 a inngaitlâwm a, thi khawp hialin thu a zâwm a, krawsah a thi ta a." 
Philippians2:9 Chuvâng chuan, Pathianin ani chu a chawimawi nasa ta ber a, hming zawng zawnga hming chungnung ber a pe ta a." 
Philippians2:10 Tichuan, Isua chawimawiin mi tin, vâna mi te, leia mi te, lei hnuaia mi te a hmaah an ṭhingṭhi ang a," 
Philippians2:11 Pa Pathian ropui nân mi tinrêngin, “Isua Krista chu Lalpa a ni,” tiin an puang ang." 
Philippians2:12 Tichuan, ka duh takte u, ka awm laia ka thu in awih ang khân, tûna ka awm loh hlân pawh hian in awih lehzual a ṭûl a ni. Pathian hlau leh ṭih tak chungin in chhandamna tifamkim tûrin thawk zêl rawh u." 
Philippians2:13 Ama duhzâwng tih tum tûr leh ti thei tûra nangmahnia thawktu chu Pathian a ni si a. 
Philippians2:14 Phunnawi lo leh hnial lovin engkim ti rawh u. 
Philippians2:15 Tûnlai mi bengtla lo leh tihmawhte zîngah hian Pathian fa, sual nei lo, nun tlang, sawisêlbo in nih theihna tûr leh, khawvêl tiêngtute in nih theihna tûrin," 
Philippians2:16 nunna thu chu vuan zêl rawh u; tichuan, Krista Nî-ah chuan ka chhuan tûr in ni ang a, ka tlân thlâwn lova, ka thawkrim thlâwn lo tih a lang dâwn nia." 
Philippians2:17 In rinna rawngbâwlna leh inthawinaah chuan kei hi hlanin awm dâwn pawh ni ila ka lâwm ang, nangni pawh ka lâwmpui bawk ang che u." 
Philippians2:18 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawh lâwm ula, mi lâwmpui bawk rawh u." 
Philippians2:19 In chanchin hriaa ngaihṭha taka ka awm theih nân, Lalpa Isuan rem a tih chuan in hnênah Timothea rawn tirh thuai theih ka inbeisei." 
Philippians2:20 Tihtakzeta kei anga ngaihtuah ve che u chu ani chauh hi a ni. 
Philippians2:21 Mi dang zawngin Isua Krista tân ngaihtuah lovin, mahni tân an zawng si ṭhîn a." 
Philippians2:22 Ani erawh hi chu a ṭangkaizia in hre tawh a, pa leh fa thawk dûn angin Chanchin Ṭha rawng kan bâwl dun ṭhin kha." 
Philippians2:23 Chutichuan, ka chanchin tûr ka hriat veleh ani hi ka rawn tirh nghâl theih ka beisei." 
Philippians2:24 Lalpan rem a tih chuan keimah ngei pawh hi lo kal thuai theih ka inring. 
Philippians2:25 Tin, ka unaupa, ka sipaipui, ka rawngbâwlpui, ka mamawh phuhrûk tûra in rawn tirh Epafrodita hi in hnêna rawn tirh ṭûlin ka hria." 
Philippians2:26 In za-in a ngai êm êm che u a, a na tih in lo hria chu pawi a ti hle a ni." 
Philippians2:27 Thih ngama nâ zawng a ni ngei a; mahse, Pathianin a khawngaih a, ani chang ni lovin, kei mi khawngaih pawh a ni bawk ang chu, lungngaih lehzualna tâwk lovin mi siam ta a." 
Philippians2:28 Chutichuan, amah in lo hmuha in lâwm nân leh, ka mangan a reh theih nân ani hi ka rawn tîr vat a ni e." 
Philippians2:29 Ani hi Lalpa hmingin hlim takin lo lâwm ula, hetiang mi hi ngaihlu rawh u." 
Philippians2:30 Nangmahni ngeiin kuta min ṭanpui phâk si loh avângin thih dâwn lovin Krista hna a thawk a, a thih phah ṭhelh nghe nghe a ni." 
Philippians3:1 A tâwp berah chuan ka unaute u, Lalpaah lâwm rawh u. Thu pângngai bawk ziak leh ṭhin hi keia tân ninawm a ni lo va, in tân a sâwt bawk si a." 
Philippians3:2 Ui lakah te, thil ṭha lo titu lakah te, serh tan uarho lakah te fîmkhur rawh u." 
Philippians3:3 Keini Pathian Thlarau zâra Pathian bia leh Krista Isua chhuanga, pâwn lam thila innghat lote hi serh tan dik tak kan ni zâwk si a." 
Philippians3:4 Duh ila chuan kei pawhin pâwn lam thil chhuan tûr chu ka nei asin. Miin pâwn lam thil chhuang theia an inhriat chuan kei ka inhre lehzual a ni. 
Philippians3:5 Ni riat nia serh tan, Israel thlaha mi, Benjamina chia mi, Hebrai nu leh pa kâra piang ka ni. Dân zawm lamah chuan Farisai ka ni a," 
Philippians3:6 ṭhahnemngaih lamah lah kohhran tiduhdahtu ka ni a. Dânin a phût ang hlen thu-ah pawh sawisêlbo ka ni. 
Philippians3:7 Nimahsela, chûng thil, ka tâna hlâwk tûr apiangte chu, Krista avângin hlohna zâwkah ka ngai a ni." 
Philippians3:8 Chu chang a ni lo, ka Lalpa Isua Krista hriatna hlu tak avângin thil engkim hi hlohnaah ka ngai a; Krista chu ka neih theih nân leh amah nên pumkhat kan nih theih nân, amah avângin engkim ka chân ta vek a, chûng chu bawlhhlawh ang lekah ka ngai a ni." 
Philippians3:9 Thiam chang ka nihna chu Dân zawm vâng ni lovin, Krista rin vâng zâwk a ni a, rin vânga Pathian hmaa thiam channa chu." 
Philippians3:10 Ka thil duh chu Krista hriat te, a thawhlehna thiltihtheihna chan te, a tuar anga tuar te, a thihna ṭâwmpui te hi a ni." 
Philippians3:11 Tichuan, mitthi thawhlehna chu ka chang ve dâwn si a." 
Philippians3:12 Hêng hi ka chang tawh ka ti lo ve, famkim tawh pawh ka inti hek lo; Krista mi man chhan chu tihlawhtling ngei tûrin ka la bei zêl zâwk a ni." 
Philippians3:13 Unaute u, hlawhtling tawhah ka inngai lo ve, thil pakhat erawh chu ka ti ṭhîn, thil kal tawhte chu theihnghilha, hma lam thilte chu thlîr zâwkin," 
Philippians3:14 Krista Isuaa Pathian chung lam kohna lâwmman chu hmu tûrin, tiam chin lam chu ka pan ngat ngat a ni." 
Philippians3:15 Tichuan, keini puitling tawhte hian chutiang rilru chu i pu ang u. Ngaih dân dang nei in awm a nih pawhin Pathianin a la tihfiahsak ang che u." 
Philippians3:16 Eng pawh ni se, kan thlen chin aṭang khân hma i sâwn zêl ang u." 
Philippians3:17 Unaute u, ka awm dân hi zir zêl rawh u. Entawn tûr keini min nei a, kan awm dân anga awmte chu en berah neih rawh u." 
Philippians3:18 An khawsak dâna Krista kraws hmêlma tam tak an awm tih ka hrilh fo che u kha, tûnah pawh ṭap chungin ka hrilh nawn leh a che u." 
Philippians3:19 Chûngho tâwpna chu chhiatna a ni. Ei tûr hi pathianah an neih a, zahpui tûr thilte chu an la chhuang ta zâwk a, khawvêl thil chauh an ngaihtuah a ni." 
Philippians3:20 Keini zawng vân khua-leh-tui kan ni si a, min chhandamtu Lalpa Isua Krista vân aṭanga lo kal tûr chu nghâkhlel takin kan thlîr a ni." 
Philippians3:21 Engkim a thuhnuaia dah theitu chuan kan taksa tlâwm tak hi ama taksa ropui anga awm tûrin a thiltihtheihna chuan a tidanglam dâwn a ni. 
Philippians4:1 Chuvângin, ka unau duh tak leh ngaih êm êm, ka lâwmna leh mi chawimawitu duh takte u, chutiang chuan Lalpaah ding nghet rawh u:" 
Philippians4:2 Lalpaa rilru hmun khat pu tûrin Euodii leh Suntuki kha ka ngên e. 
Philippians4:3 A ni, nang, ka nghâwngkawl bahpui rinawm tak, khâng hmeichhiate kha ṭanpui tûrin ka sâwm a che; anni chuan, Klemena leh Nunna Bû-a hming chuang dangte nên Chanchin Ṭha hrilh hnaah mi thawhpui nasa si a." 
Philippians4:4 Lalpaah chuan lâwm fo rawh u, ka sawi nawn leh ṭhîn ang, lâwm rawh u." 
Philippians4:5 In dawhtheihzia mi zawng zawng hriat ni rawh se. Lalpa chu a hnai e. 
Philippians4:6 Engah mah mangang suh u, eng thilah pawh ṭawngṭaiin, in mamawh chu Pathian hnênah thlen ula, lâwmthu hril zêl chungin dîl rawh u." 
Philippians4:7 Tichuan, mihring hriat sên rual loh Pathian thlamuanna chuan, in thinlung leh in rilrute chu Krista Isuaah chuan a vênhimsak ang che u." 
Philippians4:8 A tâwp berah chuan unaute u, a dik leh zahawm apiang, a fel leh thianghlim apiang, a duhawm leh thangmawi apiang, a ṭhata, fak tlâk a nih phawt chuan, chûng chu ngaihtuah rawh u." 
Philippians4:9 Ka hnên aṭanga in thil zir leh dawn te, in thil hriat leh hmuhte kha ti zêl rawh u. Tichuan, thlamuanna Pathian chuan a awmpui ang che u." 
Philippians4:10 In mi ngaihtuahzia tûn hnaia in rawn tihlan leh theih tâk avângin Lalpaah chuan ka lâwm takmeuh a ni. Chutiang tih chu in tum reng a, remchâng in la hmu rih lo mai a ni." 
Philippians4:11 Ka tlâkchham thu sawi zawng ka ni lo ve; eng ang pawhin awm ila lungawi ka zir tawh si a. 
Philippians4:12 Rethei taka awm dân ka thiam a, hausa taka awm dân pawh ka thiam bawk a; engkimah tlai leh rilṭâma awm dân, hausa leh retheia awm dân thurûk ka zir tawh." 
Philippians4:13 Mi tichaktu avângin eng pawh tâwk tûrin chakna ka nei ta a ni. 
Philippians4:14 Eng pawh ni sela, ka mangannate mi lo hriatpui ṭhîn hi in ti ṭha e." 
Philippians4:15 Tin, Chanchin Ṭha ka hrilh ṭan laia Makedonia ka chhuahsan hnu khân nangni Filipi-ho chauh lo chuan kohhran dang pakhat mahin sum hman tûr mi ngaihtuahpui an awm lo tih in hria e," 
Philippians4:16 Thesalonika khuaa ka awm lai pawhin ka tlâkchham phuhrûk tûrin vawi khat chang ni lovin, vawi hnih lai thilpêk mi rawn thawn kha." 
Philippians4:17 Thil pêk ka zawng lo ve, in tâna thlarau lam rah tûr chu ka zawng zâwk a ni." 
Philippians4:18 In thilpêk zawng zawng ka lo dawng a, ka ngah ta e. Epafrodita kuta in thil rawn thawnte pawh ka lo hmu a, ka phuisui ta e. Chu chu thilhlan rimtui pawm tlâk, Pathian lâwm zawng a ni." 
Philippians4:19 Ka Pathian chuan Krista Isuaa a hausakna ropui tak aṭangin in mamawh tinrêng a pe ang che u. 
Philippians4:20 Kan Pathian leh kan Pa chu chatuanin ropui rawh se. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Mi thianghlim zawng zawng Krista Isua hmingin chibai ka bûk e. Ka hnêna unau awmte hian chibai an bûk a che u. 
Philippians4:22 Mi thianghlim zawng zawngin chibai an bûk a che u, Kaisara ina awmte hian an bûk deuh bîk a che u." 
Philippians4:23 Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnênah awm rawh se. 
Colossians1:1 Paula, Pathian duhzâwng anga Krista Isua Tirhkoh leh kan unaupa Timothea chuan," 
Colossians1:2 Kolosa khuaa mi thianghlim awm Kristaa unau rinawmte chibai kan bûk e. Pathian kan Pa hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. 
Colossians1:3 In tân kan ṭawngṭai apiangin Pathian, kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pa chu lâwmthu kan hrilh ṭhîn." 
Colossians1:4 Krista Isua in rin tâk thu te, mi thianghlim zawng zawng in hmangaih tâk thu te kan lo hria a;" 
Colossians1:5 Chanchin Ṭha thutak in hriat aṭanga beiseina in lo neih tâk vâng a ni a, chu beiseina chu in tân vânah dah ṭhat a ni." 
Colossians1:6 In hnêna Chanchin Ṭha a lo thlena, Pathian khawngaihna chu in hriat chian ni aṭanga thil awm dân ang khân khawvêl ram tinah Chanchin Ṭha chuan rah chhuahin a darh ta." 
Colossians1:7 Kan tâna Krista rawngbâwltu rinawm Epafra, kan bawihpui duh tak, Chanchin Ṭha hrilhtu che u hian," 
Colossians1:8 Thlarau zâra hmangaihna in neih thu hi min hrilh a ni. 
Colossians1:9 Chumi avâng chuan thlarau lam finna leh hriatthiamna tinrênga a duhzâwng in hriat famkim theih nân, in chanchin kan hriat ni aṭangin ṭawngṭai leh dîlsak che u kan bâng lo." 
Colossians1:10 Lalpa mi ni tlâka a lâwmzâwng in niha, hnathawh ṭha tinrênga rah chhuahin, engkima Pathian hriatnaa in ṭhan len theih nân kan dîl ṭhîn a ni." 
Colossians1:11 A thiltihtheihna ropui tak aṭanga chhuak chakna chuan kawng tinrênga chhelna leh dawhtheihna nei tûrin a tichak ang che u. 
Colossians1:12 Tichuan, mi thianghlimte nên a ram ênga rochan nei ve tlâka siamtu che u Pathian chu hlim takin lâwmthu in hrilh thei ang." 
Colossians1:13 Ani chuan thim thuneihna laka min chhan chhuakin, a Fapa hmangaih taka ramah chuan min hruai lût ta a." 
Colossians1:14 Fapaah chuan tlan chhuah kan ni a, kan sualte ngaihdam a ni ta." 
Colossians1:15 Krista chu hmuh theih loh Pathian anpui, thil siam zawng zawng hmahruaitu a ni." 
Colossians1:16 Amahah chuan engkim, vâna awm te, leia awm te, hmuh theih te, hmuh theih loh te siam a ni a; lalṭhutthlêng te, rorêlna te, lalna te, thuneihna te, engkim hi amah avânga siam a ni a, ama ta tûra siam a ni bawk." 
Colossians1:17 Ani chu engkim awm hmain a awm a, amahah chuan engkim a innghat bawk a ni." 
Colossians1:18 Ani chu kohhran lu a ni a, kohhran hi a taksa a ni bawk; ani chu engkim bul a ni a, engkima chungnung ber a nih theih nân mitthi zîng ata thawhlehna hmahruaitu a ni." 
Colossians1:19 Amahah Pathian nihna famkim a awm hi Pa duhzâwng a ni. 
Colossians1:20 Krista avângin engkim Amah nên a inremtîr leh a, krawsa a Fapa thisen chuan remna a siam a, Krista avâng chuan leia awmte leh vâna awmte chu Amah nêna inremna a siam ta." 
Colossians1:21 Nangni pawh hmânah chuan Pathian lakah mikhual in ni a, thil sual in ngaihtuaha in tih ṭhin avângin hmêlma in ni a." 
Colossians1:22 Tûnah zawng a Fapa, tisaa lo chang thihna avângin a hmaah thianghlim, hmêlhem lo leh sawisêlbova in awm theih nân Pathianin Amah nên a inremtîr ta che u a ni." 
Colossians1:23 Tichuan, rinnaah awm reng ula, nghet taka dingin Chanchin Ṭha in hriat avânga beiseina in neih tâk kha tawlh bosan suh u. Chanchin Ṭha chu vân hnuaia thil siam tinrêng hnênah hrilh a ni ta, kei Paula hi chumi rawngbâwltu chu ka ni." 
Colossians1:24 Nangmahni avânga ka tuarnaah tûnah hian ka lâwm a ni. A taksa, kohhran tâna Krista tuar bâkte chu ka tisain ka chhunzawm zêl a ni si a." 
Colossians1:25 Pathian thu leh a remruat in hnêna kim taka puang tûrin Pathianin hna mi pe a, kohhran rawngbâwltuah kei hi mi siam a ni." 
Colossians1:26 Mi zawng zawng laka a lo thup kumkhua ṭhin thurûk kha, tûnah hian a mi thianghlimte hnênah a tilang ta." 
Colossians1:27 Chûng mite hnênah chuan hnam tin tâna a thurûk ropui leh hlu tak chu Pathianin hriattîr a duh rêng a ni; chu thurûk chu Krista, nangmahnia awm, ropuina beisei chhan chu a ni." 
Colossians1:28 Krista thu chu mi zawng zawng hnênah kan hril a, Kristaa kan puitlin ṭheuh theih nân finna tinrêngin mi tin kan zirtîrin kan kaihruai ṭhîn a ni." 
Colossians1:29 Chumi ti tûr chuan Krista chakna, keimahnia thawk ṭhîn chu hmangin kan bei a, rim takin kan thawk a ni." 
Colossians2:1 Nangni leh Laodikei khuaa mi leh tisaa ka hmêl hmu lote pawhin, engti kauva rimin nge in tân ka thawh ṭhin in hriat ka duh a ni." 
Colossians2:2 An thinlung a thlamuan theih nân hmangaihnaa an insuih khâwma, kawng tinrênga thinlungah hriat chianna an ngaha, Pathian thurûk, Krista chu, an hriat theih ka duh a ni." 
Colossians2:3 Kristaah chuan finna leh hriatthiamna ro hlu zawng zawng chu a inphûm si a. 
Colossians2:4 Tu man, thu dik ni âwm taka lang, dik si lova an bum mai loh nân che u hei hi ka sawi a ni." 
Colossians2:5 Tisain in hnênah awm lo mah ila, thlarau zawngin in zîngah ka awm a, in invawn felzia leh Krista rinnaa in nghehzia ka hmuhin ka lâwm a ni." 
Colossians2:6 Chutichuan, Krista Isua chu Lalpaa in pawm tâk avângin amahah awm rawh u." 
Colossians2:7 Amahah chuan zung kaiin inrem chho ula, zirtîrna in dawn ang khân rinnaah chuan ding nghet ula, lâwmthu sawi uar rawh u." 
Colossians2:8 Fîmkhur rawh u, Krista aṭanga chhuak ni lo, khawvêl zirtîrna ramhuai aṭanga chhuak, khawvêl finna an tih, mihring inzirtîr chhâwn mai mai hmangin tuten emaw an bum dah ang che u." 
Colossians2:9 Kristaah chuan Pathian famkimna tinrêng chu taksain a awm si a. 
Colossians2:10 Ani chu lalna leh thuneihna zawng zawng lu a ni a, amahah chuan nangni pawh tihfamkim in ni." 
Colossians2:11 Amahah serh tan in ni ta, kuta tisa vun tan ni lovin, Kristaah chuan serh tan in ni." 
Colossians2:12 Baptisma-ah chuan a hnênah phûm ve in ni a, mitthi zînga ata amah kaithotu Pathian thiltihtheihna rin avângin amahah chuan kaihthawh in ni." 
Colossians2:13 In bawhchhiatnate leh tisaa serh tan loh in nih avângin thi in ni a; nimahsela, Krista nên a tinung ta che u a; kan bawhchhiatna zawng zawng min ngaidam ta a," 
Colossians2:14 thupêk, kuta ziak, min dâl ṭhîntu, zawm kan bat si chu a thai chhia a, krawsah chuan khêngbetin a tibo ta." 
Colossians2:15 Krawsah chuan boruaka rorêltute leh thuneitute chu hnehin, chûngte chu mipui hmuhah chiang takin a tilang ta." 
Colossians2:16 Chutichuan, ei leh in thu-ah emaw, kût hman thu-ah emaw, thla thar kût hman thu-ah emaw, sabat serh thu-ah emaw tu man thu neihsak che u suh se." 
Colossians2:17 Chûng chu thil lo la awm tûr hlimthla mai a ni, a tak chu Krista hi a ni." 
Colossians2:18 Taksa ngaihnêp tûr, vântirhkohte pawh biak tûr tia, inlârna danglam bîk hmua insawi, tisa tak rilru pua, engmahlova inhâmpuarho hi in chungah thu neihtîr suh u." 
Colossians2:19 Lû, Krista chu, an vuan tawh lo. Amahah chuan taksa pum hi tha leh ruangâma phuar khâwmin châwm a ni a, Pathian duhzâwng angin taksa pum chu a ṭhang ṭhîn a ni." 
Colossians2:20 Khawvêl zirtîrna dik lote chu Kristaah in thihsan tawh si chuan, engtizia nge khawvêl mi la ni fo anga," 
Colossians2:21 ‘tawk suh, tem suh, dek suh,’" 
Colossians2:22 tia mihring thil an intuk chawp leh phuah chawp hnuaia in kûn leh tâk mai? Chûngte chu hman zawha ral mai thil a ni. 
Colossians2:23 Hêng vântirhkoh biak tih te, taksa ngaih nêp tihte hi ṭha âwm takin a lang a; mahse, tisa châkna hneh tûrin a ṭangkai si lo." 
Colossians3:1 Krista hnênah kaihthawh in ni ta a; chuvângin, Pathian ding lama Krista ṭhutnaa awm, chung lam thilte chu zawng rawh u." 
Colossians3:2 Chung lam thilah in rilru nghat tlat ula, lei lam thilah chuan nghat suh u." 
Colossians3:3 In thi tawh a, in nunna chu Krista hnênah Pathianin a vawng ṭha a ni." 
Colossians3:4 In nunna bul, Krista chu, a lo lan hunah nangni pawh a hnênah ropui takin in lang ve ang." 
Colossians3:5 In khawvêl nun sual - inngaihna te, bawlhhlawhna te, hurna te, châkna sual te, duhâmna te (chu chu milem biakna a ni) hêngte hi tihlum rawh u." 
Colossians3:6 Chûng thil avâng chuan ring lote chungah Pathian thinur a lo thleng dâwn a ni. 
Colossians3:7 Hmânah chuan nangni pawh chutiang chuan in awm a, in duhzâwng ber a ni ṭhîn a." 
Colossians3:8 Tûnah zawng thinrim te, thinchhiat te, inhuat te bânsan ula, insawichhiat te leh zahmawh sawi te in ka aṭangin chhuak suh se." 
Colossians3:9 Dâwt inhrilh tawn chîng suh u, mihring hlui chu a thiltihte nên in hlîp tawh a;" 
Colossians3:10 mihring thar chuan in inthuam tawh si a; Pathian hre chiang tûrin chu mihring thar chu a siamtu anga awm tûra siam tharin a awm mêk a ni. 
Colossians3:11 Chu nun tharah chuan Grik leh Juda, serh tan leh tan loh, awzia leh hnam dang mi, bawih leh bawih lo a awm theih loh, Krista chauh hi engkim a ni a, engkimah a awm a ni." 
Colossians3:12 Chutichuan, Pathian mi thlan, mi thianghlim leh duh takte ni âwm rêngin, thinlung taka inlainatna te, ngilneihna te, inngaihtlâwmna te, thuhnuairawlhna te, dawhtheihna te chuan inthuam rawh u." 
Colossians3:13 Indawh tawn ula, mi dang laka thu pawi in neih pawhin inngaidam tawn rawh u, Lalpan a ngaidam che u ang bawk hian ngaidam ve rawh u." 
Colossians3:14 Chûng zawng zawng chungah chuan hmangaihna inbel ula, chu chu engkim rem taka phuar khâwm theitu a ni." 
Colossians3:15 Kristaa chhuak remna chuan in thinlungah ro rêl rawh se, taksa pumkhata awm tûra koh in ni si a. Lâwm nachâng hre bawk rawh u." 
Colossians3:16 Krista thu chu, a hausakna zawng zawng nên nangmahniah chêng rawh se. Fakna hla te, Pathian hla te, Thlarau lam hla te nên finna tinrêngin inzirtîr ula, infuih tawn rawh u. In thinlung taka Pathian chawimawiin hlim takin zai rawh u." 
Colossians3:17 Krista zâra Pathian hnêna lâwmthu hril chungin in tih apiang, thu sawiah emaw, thiltihah emaw, Lalpa Isua hmingin ti vek rawh u." 
Colossians3:18 Nute u, in pasalte thu awih rawh u, chu chu Lalpa mite tih âwm rêng a ni si a." 
Colossians3:19 Pate u, in nupuite khawngaih ula, an lakah sual suh u." 
Colossians3:20 Naupangte u, engkimah in nu leh pate thu zâwm rawh u, chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng a ni si a." 
Colossians3:21 Pate u, in fate tithinur suh u, an beidawng dah ang e." 
Colossians3:22 Bawihte u, engkimah in pute thu zâwm ula, mihring tihlâwm tumtute anga an hmuh lai chauhva thawk lovin, thinlung taka Lalpa ṭih chungin an hmuh lohvah pawh thawk rawh u." 
Colossians3:23 In tih apiangah mihring rawngbâwl ang ni lovin, Lalpa rawngbâwl ang zâwkin tih tak zetin ti ang che u." 
Colossians3:24 Lâwmman atân ro luah tûr Lalpa hnên aṭangin in hmu dâwn tih hre reng rawh u. Lalpa Krista rawng in bâwl a ni e. 
Colossians3:25 Thil dik lo titute chuan thil dik lo an tih man an hmu ang, Pathian chuan tu mah a thlei bîk si lo." 
Colossians4:1 Hotute u, nangni pawhin vânah Hotu in nei tih hriain, in bawihte chungah dik tak leh ṭha takin engkim ti rawh u." 
Colossians4:2 Ṭawngṭai fan fan ula, in ṭawngṭainaah lâwmthu hril chungin ngaihven rawh u." 
Colossians4:3 Keini pawh min ṭawngṭaisak rawh u, Pathianin a thu hrilna kawng min hawnsak nân te, ka lung in tân chhan, Krista thu ril puan hi ka chhunzawm theih nân te," 
Colossians4:4 ka sawi tûr ang taka ka sawi theih nân te mi ṭawngṭaisak bawk rawh u. 
Colossians4:5 Ring lote lakah fing takin awm ula, in hun chu hmang ṭha rawh u." 
Colossians4:6 Eng lai pawhin ṭha tak leh hawihhâwm takin ṭawng ṭhîn ula; tichuan, mi tin engtia chhân tûr nge in hre thei dâwn nia." 
Colossians4:7 Lalpaa ka bawihpui, rawngbâwltu rinawm tak, kan unau duh tak Tukika hian ka chanchin zawng zawng a rawn hrilh ang che u." 
Colossians4:8 Kan chanchin in hriata, rilru hlim taka in awm theih nân ka rawn tîr a ni." 
Colossians4:9 Ama rual hian nangmahni mi, unau duh tak Onesima, ringtu nghet tak hi ka rawn tîr ve a. Hêng lam chanchin hi an rawn hrilh vek ang che u." 
Colossians4:10 Kan tânpui Aristarka hian chibai a bûk a che u. Marka, Barnaba tupa pawh hian chibai a bûk a che u (Ani hi in hnêna a lo kal hun chuan lo lâwm tûrin ka hrilh tawh che u kha)." 
Colossians4:10 Kan tânpui Aristarka hian chibai a bûk a che u. Marka, Barnaba tupa pawh hian chibai a bûk a che u (Ani hi in hnêna a lo kal hun chuan lo lâwm tûrin ka hrilh tawh che u kha)." 
Colossians4:11 Isua, Justa an tih hian chibai a bûk a che u. Juda Kristiante zîngah chuan anni pathum chauh hi Pathian ram tâna min thawhpuitu an ni a, min tithlamuang hle a ni." 
Colossians4:12 Epafra, nangmahni mi, Krista Isua bawih hian chibai a bûk a che u. A ṭawngṭai apiangin nghet taka in dina, in lo puitlina, Pathian duhzâwng anga ringtu tak in nih theih nân ṭhahnemngai takin a dîlsak ṭhîn che u a ni." 
Colossians4:13 Nangniho tân te, Laodikei khuaa mite leh Hierapolis khuaa mite tân ani hian a thawk nasa êm êm tih kei pawhin ka hria a ni." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, daktor duh tak leh Dema hian chibai an bûk a che u." 
Colossians4:15 Laodikei khuaa unau awmte leh Numfii leh a ina kohhran inkhâwm kha chibai min bûksak ang che u. 
Colossians4:16 Ka lehkha hi in zînga in chhiar zawhah Laodikei kohhran chhiartîr ve ula, chutiang bawkin Laodikei kohhran lehkha pawh kha lo chhiar ve ang che u." 
Colossians4:17 Tin, Arkipa hnênah khân, “Rawngbâwl hna Lalpa hnên ata i dawn kha hlen tûrin fîmkhur rawh,” ti ang che u." 
Colossians4:18 Kei Paulan hei hi keima kut ngeia chibai ka bûkna che u a nih hi, ka kawl bunte hi hre reng rawh u. Khawngaihna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paula, Silvana leh Timothea chuan, Thesalonika khuaa Pa Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista kohhran chibai kan bûk e. Khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Nangniho avâng hian Pathian hnênah lâwmthu kan hril ṭhîn; kan ṭawngṭainaah te chuan bâng lovin in hming kan lam a. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Rinna avânga ṭan in lâk dân te, hmangaihna avânga in thawhrimzia te, kan Lalpa Isuaa beiseina in nghah nghehzia te hi kan Pa Pathian hmaah kan hre reng ṭhîn a ni." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Unaute u, Pathianin a hmangaih che u a, ama tân a thlang chhuak che u tih kan hria." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Chanchin Ṭha in hnêna kan rawn thlen lai khân thu mai mai ni lovin, thiltihtheihna nên, Thlarau Thianghlim nên ring tlat chungin kan rawn sawi a nih kha; in zîngah eng angin nge in tân kan awm tih pawh in hria." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Kan awm dân leh Lalpa awm dân latute in lo ni ta a, hrehawm tam tak tuar chungin, Thlarau Thianghlima lâwmna nên thu chu in pawm ta a." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Chutichuan, Makedonia leh Akaia rama ringtu zawng zawng tân entawn in ni a," 
1Thessalonians1:8 Makedonia leh Akaia ramah Lalpa thu tûnah nangmahni aṭangin a darh mai ni lovin, hmun tinah Pathian in rin thu a thang ta a; chuvângin, keinin eng mah kan sawi a ṭûl ta lo." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Kan rawn tlawh che u ṭuma min lo lawm dân te, milem kalsana Pathian nung leh dik tak rawngbâwl tûra Pathian lam in lo hawi tâk thu te," 
1Thessalonians1:10 A Fapa Isua, mitthi zîng ata a kaihthawh, thinur lo thleng tûr laka min chhan chhuaktu chu, vân aṭanga a lo kal nghâka in awm thu te an sawi huai huai a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Unaute u, in hnêna kan lo kal kha a thlâwn lo tih nangmahni ngeiin in hria e." 
1Thessalonians2:2 In hriat angin Filipi khuaah khân zahthlâk taka sawisak tuar mah ila, dodâlna tam tak kârah in hnêna Chanchin Ṭha hril tûrin kan Pathianin min tihuai ta hlauh zâwk a nih kha." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kan thu hrilh che u hi thu dik lo emaw, thu bawlhhlawh emaw, bumna thu emaw a ni lo va." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Chanchin Ṭha kawltîr tlâka Pathianin min ruat ang ngeiin, mihring tilâwm tûr ni lovin, kan thinlung fiahtu Pathian tilâwm tûr zâwkin thu kan hril thîn a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Eng lai mahin mi kan fak der ngai lo va, duhâm khuh nân thu kan sawi ngai hek lo tih in hria, Pathian pawhin a hria." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Mi min fak kan phût lo va, nangnin emaw, mi dangin emaw min fak kan ngiat hek lo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Krista tirhkoh kan nih avângin in tân hautak zet ni thei mah ila, nuin a fate a duat angin kan duat zâwk che u kha." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Chuti taka kan ngainat che ua, kan hmangaih êm êm che u avângin, Pathian Chanchin Ṭha chauh ni lovin, keimahni nun lam pawh pêk hial che u kan peih kha." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Unaute u, kan thawh hahzia leh rimzia kha in hria e, in zîngah tu mah kan tihhautak lohna tûrin a chhûn a zâna hna rim taka thawk chungin Chanchin Ṭha kan hrilh ṭhin che u kha." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Thianghlim leh fel leh demawm lo takin ringtute lakah kan awm ṭhîn tih hretute nangni in ni a, Pathian pawhin min hriatpui a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Pain a fate chunga a tih angin in zaa chungah kan ti ṭhîn tih in hria. 
1Thessalonians2:12 A ram leh a ropuina chang ve tûra kotu che u Pathian mi ni tlâka awm tûrin kan ngênin kan fuihin kan hriattîr ṭhîn che u a nih kha. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Hemi avâng hian bâng lovin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu kan sawi bawk ṭhîn, kan thu rawn hril in pawm lai khân, mihring thu anga pawm lovin, Pathian thutak pawma in pawm zâwk avâng khân. Pathian thu ngei a ni rêng a, nangni ringtuteah pawh a thawk bawk a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Unaute u, nangni pawh Judai rama Pathian kohhranho Krista Isuaa awmte ang in ni, annin Juda-te laka an tuar angin nangni pawhin in mite lakah in tuar kha." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Chûng Juda-te chuan Lalpa Isua leh zâwlneite an that a, keini pawh min tiduhdah a, Pathian an tilâwm lo va, mi dang pawh dodâl loh an nei lo." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Jentail-te chhandam an nih vena tûra Chanchin Ṭha an hnêna kan hrilh min khap a, an sual vâwrtâwp an thleng a, Pathian thinurna an chungah a lo thleng ta nge nge a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Unaute u, thinlung lamah ni lovin, taksa lamah hun eng emaw chhûng kan inṭhen rih a; chuvângin, in hmêl hmuh leh kan châk takmeuh a, hmuh tum che uin kan bei nasa a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Rawn tlawh che u kan tum ṭhîn a, kei Paula ngei pawh hian vawi hnih vawi thum ka tum tawh a; mahse, Setanan min dâl ṭhîn a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Kan Lalpa Isua lo kal leh hunah, a hmaa hmuh kan beisei tûr, kan hlimna tûr, chawimawina chhuanawm kan khum tûr chu nangni lo tu dang nge ni ang?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Nangni hi kan ropuina tûr leh kan hlimna tûr chu in ni asin. 
1Thessalonians3:1 In chanchin hre lova awm kan theih tâk loh avângin keini chauh hi Atheni khuaah awm hnufual ila ṭha kan ti a; 
1Thessalonians3:2 tichuan, kan unaupa Timothea, Krista Chanchin Ṭha hrila Pathian rawng kan bâwlpui hi in rinna tinghet tûr leh," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hêng tihduhdahnate avânga in zînga mi tu mah in nghîn loh nân fuih tûr che u-in kan rawn tîr a ni. Nangni pawhin hêng hi kan tuar ngei tûr a ni tih in hriat kha. 
1Thessalonians3:4 In hnêna kan awm lai khân tihduhdahna kan tuar dâwn tih kan hrilh lâwk che u kha, chutiang ngei chuan a lo thleng ta tih in hria e." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Rinnaa in ngheh zêl leh zêl loh hre lova awm reng kan theih loh avângin Timothea kha kan rawn tîr a ni; thlêmtuin thlêm thlu che u-in, kan hna thawh a thlâwn mai dah ang e tih hlauva rawn tîr kan ni." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Timothea chu in hnên ata a lo thleng leh ta a, chanchin lâwmawm tak, in rin nghehzia te, hmangaihna in ngahzia te, keinin hmuh che u kan châk êm êm ang bawka min hmuh in châk ve thu te, eng lai pawhin min hre reng a ni tih te min rawn hrilh a." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Chuvâng chuan, unaute u, in rinna a ngheh avângin kan manganna leh kan hrehawmna zawng zawngah thlamuang takin kan awm thei ta a ni." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Lalpaa in ngheh zêl avâng hian tûnah chuan kan tân dam man a awm ta e. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Nangmahni zâra Pathian hmaa kan hlimna zawng zawng avâng hian a hnênah lâwmthu hrilh kan va ba nasa êm! 
1Thessalonians3:10 In hmêl kan hmuh theihna tûr leh rinna lama in tlâkchham kan phuhrûksak theihna tûr che uin Pathian hnênah chhûn leh zân ṭhahnemngai takin kan dîl ṭhîn a ni. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Kan Pa Pathian ngei leh kan Lalpa Isua chuan in hnêna kan lo kalna tûr kawng min siamsak rawh se. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Kan hmangaih che u ang taka nasaa in inhmangaih theih nân leh mi zawng zawng in hmangaih theih nân, in hmangaihna chu Lalpan tiṭhangin tihpunsak che u rawh se." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Tichuan, kan Lalpa Isua chuan, a mi thianghlim zawng zawng nên a lo kal hunah, Pathian kan Pa hmaah chuan thianghlim leh sawisêlbova awm thei tûrin in thinlung tinghet rawh se." 
1Thessalonians4:1 A tâwp berah chuan unaute u, Pathian tilâwm zâwnga nun dân kan hnên aṭanga in dawn ang khân in awm a, chutianga awm zêl tûrin Lalpa Isua hmingin kan ngên che u a, kan fuih bawk a che u." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Lalpa Isua thuneihna hmangin eng thu nge kan pêk che u in hria e. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Hei hi Pathian duhzâwng chu a ni - in thianghlim hi; inngaih bânsan rawh u. 
1Thessalonians4:4 In zînga mi tu pawhin mahni taksa vawng thiamin, thianghlim leh chawimawi tlâkin vawng ṭheuh ula." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Pathian hre lo Jentail-te angin tisa châknaah tlu lût suh u. 
1Thessalonians4:6 He thilah hian tu man a unau bumin a lakah thil ṭha lo ti suh se; chutiang titute chungah chuan Lalpan phuba a la ang tih kan hrilhin kan hriattîr tawh che u kha. 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pathian chuan bawlhhlawh taka nung tûr ni lovin, thianghlim taka nung tûrin min ko zâwk a ni." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Chuvângin, he thu pawisa lo chuan mihring a pawisa lo a ni lo va, Thlarau Thianghlim petu che u Pathian chu a pawisa lo a ni zâwk e." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Unaute inhmangaihna thu chu in tân ziak a ngai lo ve, Pathianin nangmahni ngei inhmangaih tawn a zirtîr si che u a." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Chutiangin, Makedonia rama unau zawng zawng chungah pawh in tih ṭhin kha. Unaute u, chu hmangaihna chu ngah lehzual tûrin kan ngên a che u." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Kan hrilh tawh che u ang khân, ngawi renga in kuta mahni hna thawh uar rawh u." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Chutichuan, pâwn lam mite hmuhah mawi takin in khawsa thei ang a, eng mah tlâkchham in nei lo vang." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Unaute u, beiseina rêng nei lo mi dangte anga in lungngaih loh nân muhîlte chanchin in hriat loh kan duh lo ve." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Isua a thi a, a tho leh tih kan ring si a, chutiang bawk chuan Isuaa muhîl tawhte pawh Pathianin ama rualin a rawn hruai ve ang." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Lalpa thuin hei hi kan hrilh a che u: Keini Lalpa lo kal thlenga nungdama lo la awm rengte hian muhîl tawhte chu kan lehkhalh tawp lo vang. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Lalpa ngei chu thu pe au âw nên, vântirhkoh ropui ber aw nên, Pathian tawtawrâwt ri nên vân aṭangin a lo chhuk ang a, Kristaa thi tawhte chu an tho hmasa ang." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Chumi hnuah chuan keini nungdama la awm rengte hi, boruakah Lalpa hmuak tûrin, anmahni rualin chhûm zîngahte khian lâk chhohvin kan awm ang a, Lalpa hnênah kan awm kumkhua tawh ang." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tichuan, hêng thute hian lo inthlamuan tawn ṭhîn rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Amaherawhchu, unaute u, a hun leh a ni thute ziaksak in ngai lo ve." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Lalpa Nî chu zâna rûkru lo kal angin a lo thleng dâwn tih nangmahni ngeiin chiang takin in hre si a. 
1Thessalonians5:3 “A him e, a muanawm e,” an tih laiin hmeichhe nau vei angin chhiatna an chungah a lo thleng thut ang a, an pumpelh tawp lo vang." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Unaute u, nangni erawh chu thimah in awm loh avângin chumi ni chuan rûkru angin a nang lo vang che u." 
1Thessalonians5:5 In vaiin êng fate leh ni fate in ni vek si a. Zâna mi kan ni lo va, thima mi kan ni hek lo." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Chuvângin, mi dangte angin i muhîl suh ang u khai, mengin i ngaihven zâwk ang u." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Muhîlte chu zânah an muhîl ṭhîn a, zu ruite pawh zânah a ni an ruih ṭhin." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Keini zawng chhûna mi kan nih avâng hian, rinna leh hmangaihna âwmphaw chu ha-in, chhandam beiseina chu lukhuma hmangin, harhfîm takin i awm zâwk ang u." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pathianin thinurna tuar tûr ni lovin, kan Lalpa Isua Krista zâra chhandam ni tûrin min ruat zâwk a ni." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Kan dam emaw, kan thi emaw, amah nên kan nun tlân theih nân ani chu kan tân a thi si a." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Chuvângin, inthlamuan tawnin, intichak tawn rawh u, in tih fo ṭhin ang hian." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Unaute u, in tân rim taka thawktu, Lalpaa nangmahni enkawltute leh zilhtute chu hre reng tûrin kan ngên a che u." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Anni chu an hna thawh avânga ngaisâng êm êmin hmangaih ula, inngeih dial dial rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Tin, unaute u, ka ngên a che u, mi dâwngdahte zilh ula, mi beidawngte chu thlamuan ula, mi chak lote ṭanpui ula, mi zawng zawng dawhthei rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Tu sual mah suala thungrûl lo tûrin fîmkhur ula, eng lai pawha thil ṭha intihsak tawn zâwkin mi zawng zawng chungah thil ṭha ti zêl rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Lâwm fo ula," 
1Thessalonians5:17 bâng lovin ṭawngṭai ula," 
1Thessalonians5:18 engkimah lâwmthu hril fo rawh u. Hei hi Krista Isuaah chuan Pathianin in tih a duh chu a ni. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Thlarau chu timit suh u. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Thuhrilte pawh hmusit suh u. 
1Thessalonians5:21 A enga pawh chu fiah hmasa ula, a ṭha chu pawm tlat ula," 
1Thessalonians5:22 a ṭha lo apiang tlânsan rawh u. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Remna Pathian ngei chuan in pumin tithianghlim che u sela, kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo kal hunah chuan in thlarau leh in rilru leh in taksa a puma sawisêlbovin awmtîr rawh se." 
1Thessalonians5:24 A kotu che u chu a rinawm a, tih pawh a ti ngei ang." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Unaute u, min ṭawngṭaisak rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Unau zawng zawng kha kut vuanin chibai mi bûksak ṭheuh rawh u. 
1Thessalonians5:27 He lehkha hi unau zawng zawng hriata chhiar tûrin Lalpa hmingin ka ngên a che u. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnênah awm rawh se. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paula, Silvana leh Timothea chuan Thesalonika khuaa Pathian kan Pa leh kan Lalpa Isua Krista kohhran chibai kan bûk e." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Unaute u, nangmahni avângin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu hril fo tûr kan ni a, chu chu kan tih âwm rêng a ni. Rinnaah in ṭhang chak êm êm a, in zaa in inhmangaih tawnna pawh a thûk tial tial bawk a." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Tihduhdahna leh hrehawm tinrêng chhel taka in tuara, rinnaa in nghehzia leh in chhelzia te hi kohhranhote zîngah kan chhuang ṭhîn a ni." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Pathian ram avânga tuar in ni a, chuta lût tlâk in nih theih nân Pathian rorêl dikzia tihlanna in nih hi." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Pathian chuan dik takin thil a ti ṭhîn a, tihrehawmtu che u chu hrehawmnain a thungrûl ve ang." 
2Thessalonians1:7 Lalpa Isua chu vân aṭanga ama vântirhkoh thiltithei takte nên meialh zînga a lo lan hunah, nangni hrehawm tuarte hi a rawn chawlhtîr ang che u, keini pawh min chawlhtîr ang." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Pathian hre lote leh kan Lalpa Isua Krista Chanchin Ṭha ring duh lote chungah phuba a la ang. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Chûngte chu Lalpa hma ata leh a thiltihtheihna ropui tak lak ata kumkhaw chhiatnaah chuan paih an ni ang a. 
2Thessalonians1:10 A mi thianghlim, amah ringtute hnên aṭanga ropuina leh chawimawina dawng tûra a lo kal nî chuan hrem an ni ang. In hnêna kan thu hril in lo rin avângin nangni erawh chu chûng ringtute zîngah chuan in tel ve ang." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Hemi avâng hian Pathianin a kohna che u phua in awm theihna tûr leh, ṭhat in duhna zawng zawng leh rinna avânga in thiltihte chu, a chaknaa a tihfamkimsak theihna tûr che uin, bâng lovin kan ṭawngṭaisak ṭhîn che u a ni." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Tichuan, kan Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna zârah, kan Lalpa Isua hming chu in zîngah chawimawi a ni ang a, nangni pawh ama zârah chawimawi in ni ang." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo kal lehna leh a hnêna kan inkhâwmna tûr thu-ah chuan:" 
2Thessalonians2:2 Thlarauva sawi emaw, thu hril emaw, kan lehkha ni âwm emaw ṭanchhana “Lalpa Nî chu a thleng reng tawh,” tih thu thang avânga in rilru tinghîng leh tibuai lo tûrin ka ngên a che u." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Tu man eng kawng mahin hruai bo che u suh se. Pathian laka helna chu a lo thlena, Dânbawhchhepa, Boraltûra chu a lo lan zet hma chuan chu Nî chu a lo thleng dâwn si lo va." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ani chuan miten pathiana an neih, an biak apiangte chu dovin an aia ropuiah a indah ang a, Pathian Tempul meuhva ṭhuin Pathianah a inchhâl ang." 
2Thessalonians2:5 In hnêna kan awm lai khân chûng thu chu kan hrilh ṭhin che u kha in hre reng lâwm ni? 
2Thessalonians2:6 A hun taka a lo lan theihna tûrin tûnah engin nge dâl rih in hria e. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Dân bawhchhiatna chuan tûnah pawh a rûkin a thawk mêk a ni; nimahsela, a dâltu chu lâk bo a nih hma chuan a lo lang mai lo vang." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Chutih hunah chuan Dânbawhchhepa chu a lo lang ang a; mahse, ani chu Lalpa Isuan a rawn tihlum ang a, a lo kal lehna ropui takah chuan a rawn tiboral ang." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Dânbawhchhepa chu Setana chakna nên a lo kal ang a, thiltihtheihna tinrêngin thil mak leh chhinchhiahna lem a ti ang." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Chûng boral tûrte chu dik lo takin kawng tinrênga bum an ni ang a, anmahni chhandam thei tûr Chanchin Ṭha thutak chu an lawm loh avângin." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Chuvângin, dâwt an rin theihna tûrin Pathianin an zîngah bumna hri a lêntîr a." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Thutak ring lova dik lohna lâwm zâwkte zawng zawngin thiam loh an chang vek dâwn a ni. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Unau, Lalpa duh takte u, nangmahni avângin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu hril fo tûr rêng kan ni; Thlarauva tihthianghlimin, thutak ring tûr leh rah hmasa atân chhandam tûrin Pathianin a thlang che u a ni." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Chumi atân chuan kan Lalpa Isua Krista ropuina chang ve tûrin kan Chanchin Ṭha hril hmangin a ko che u a ni. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tichuan, unaute u, ding nghet ula, kan thuhrilah leh lehkhathawna kan zirtîr ṭhin kan thu hlan chhâwn che u kha pawm tlat rawh u." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Tichuan, kan Lalpa Isua Krista ngei leh Pathian kan Pa, min hmangaihtu, a khawngaihna avânga kumkhaw thlamuanna leh beiseina ṭha min petu chuan," 
2Thessalonians2:17 in rilru thlamuan sela, thil ṭha tinrêng in tih leh in sawiah tichak zêl che u rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:1 A tâwp berah chuan, unaute u, min ṭawngṭaisak rawh u. Lalpa thu chu in zîngah ropui tak leh chak taka a darh ang khân a darh zêl theihna tûr leh," 
2Thessalonians3:2 mi dik lo leh mi sualte laka kan him theihna tûrin. Mi zawng zawngin an la ring si lo. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Lalpa erawh chu a rinawm a, ani chuan a tichak che uin mi sual lakah chuan a vêng him ang che u." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Thu kan pêk che u angin in ti a, in tih zêl pawh Lalpaah chuan kan ring tlat a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Lalpa chuan in thinlungte chu Pathian hmangaihna hre lehzual tûr leh Krista anga dawhtheihna nei tûrin kaihruai rawh se. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Unaute u, kan hnên aṭanga zirtîrna an dawn anga awm lo unau, dâwngdah taka awm zawng zawng laka inthiarfihlîm tûrin kan Lalpa Isua Krista hmingin thu kan pe a che u." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nangmahni ngeiin kan tih dân zir tûr in nih in hria a, in zîngah dâwngdah takin kan awm ngai loh kha." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Tu chaw mah a thlâwnin kan ei ngai lo va, in zînga mi tu mah kan tihhautak lohna tûr che uin chhûn leh zân hah tak leh rim takin hna kan thawk ṭhîn a nih kha." 
2Thessalonians3:9 In mi châwm kan phût theih loh vâng a ni lo va, in mi entawn atân tiin kan thawk zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:10 In hnêna kan awm lai khân, “Hna thawk peih lo tawh phawt chuan ei pawh ei suh se,” tiin kan hrilh ṭhin che u kha." 
2Thessalonians3:11 In zînga ṭhenkhat an dâwngdah a, mahni hna thawk si lovin mi hnaa inrawlh an chîng tih kan lo hria a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Chutiang mite chu thawk mawlh mawlha mahni thawh chhuah ring tûrin Lalpa Isua Krista hminga thu pein kan fuih a ni. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Unaute u, nangni zawngin thil ṭha tih ning suh u." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Tu pawhin he lehkhathawna kan thu sawi hi an zawm duh loh chuan chhinchhiah bîk ula, kawm serh rawh u, an zah theihna tûrin." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Amaherawhchu, hmêlma ang chuan ngai lo ula, unau angin zilh zâwk rawh u." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Remna Lalpa ngei chuan kumkhuain kawng tinrêngah remna pe che u sela, Lalpa chu in zaa hnênah awm rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kei Paulan keima kut ngeia chibai ka bûkna che u a nih hi. Hetianga ka ziak hi ka lehkhathawn apiang chhinchhiahna a ni. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna in zaa hnênah awm rawh se. 
1Timothy1:1 Kei Paula, min chhandamtu Pathian leh kan beisei innghahna Krista Isua thupêk anga Krista Isua tirhkoh hian," 
1Timothy1:2 rinnaa ka fa tak tak Timothe, chibai ka bûk a che. Pa Pathian leh Krista Isua kan Lalpa hnên ata khawngaihna te, zahngaihna te, remna te i hnênah awm rawh se." 
1Timothy1:3 Makedonia rama ka kal dâwn laia ka ngen ang che khân Efesi khuaa awm zêl tûrin ka ngên leh a che. Mi ṭhenkhat thurin dik lo zirtîr ṭhînte kha khap la," 
1Timothy1:4 khâng thawnthu leh thlahtute chhui vak vak kha bântîr rawh, inhnialna a titam mai mai a, rinna vânga hriat ṭhin, Pathian thiltum chu mi a hriat fiahtîr chuang si lo." 
1Timothy1:5 Thinlung thianghlim, chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang leh rinna dik tak aṭanga chhuak hmangaihna chu a lo pun zâwk theih nân he thu hi ka pe che a ni." 
1Timothy1:6 Ṭhenkhat chuan chu chu an pênsan a, inhnialna sâwt lo lamah an lût ta a." 
1Timothy1:7 Dân zirtîrtu berah an inngai a, an thu sawi awmzia leh ngam taka an thil sawi ṭhinte chu an hre tak tak si lo." 
1Timothy1:8 Dân hi a hmanna tûr taka hman a nih chuan a ṭha tih kan hria," 
1Timothy1:9 mi ṭhate chunga lek tûr a ni lo tih hriat tûr a ni: Dân pawisa lo te leh luhlul te, sakhaw ngaihsak lo leh mi sual te, serh leh sâng nei lo leh bawlhhlawh te, nu leh pa thattu te leh tual that te," 
1Timothy1:10 inngaih chîng te leh mawngkawhur te, mihring rûk chîng te leh dawthei te, dâwta chhechham chîng te leh," 
1Timothy1:11 fak tlâk Pathianin puan tûra mi kawltîr Chanchin Ṭha ropui kalha zirtîr chîng te chunga lek tûr a ni. 
1Timothy1:12 Mi tichaktu, rin tlâka mi ngaia he hna atâna mi ruattu Krista Isua, kan Lalpa chu lâwmthu ka hrilh a ni;" 
1Timothy1:13 tûn hma khân a sawichhetu, tiduhdahtu leh hmusittu lo ni mah ila, ringtu ka la ni lo va; hre lova ti ṭhîn ka nih avângin ka chungah zah a ngai êm êm ṭhîn a," 
1Timothy1:14 kan Lalpa khawngaihna chuan Krista Isuaa rinna leh hmangaihnain mi vûr khat ta zâwk a. 
1Timothy1:15 Krista Isua chu mi sualte chhandam tûrin khawvêlah a lo kal tih hi a dikin a va pawm tlâk êm! Kei hi an zînga sual ber ka ni. 
1Timothy1:16 Mahse, hemi avâng hian khawngaihna ka dawng, Krista Isua chuan ka chunga a dawhtheihzia a tilang hmasa hi, tûn hnu pawha amah ringtu apiangin, chatuan nun an nei thei dâwn tih entîrna a lo ni." 
1Timothy1:17 Lalber, chatuan mi, thi thei lo, mita hmuh theih loh, Pathian tak chauh hnênah chuan chawimawina leh ropuina chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka fapa Timothe, hêng thupêk hi ka kawltîr a che; zâwlneiten i chungchâng an sawi lâwk kha hre reng la, chûng thu chu hmangin indona ṭha chu bei rawh;" 
1Timothy1:19 rinna leh chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang vawng tlat ang che; mi ṭhenkhatten an chhia leh ṭha hriatna an hnâwl a, an rinna chu a keh chhe zo ta." 
1Timothy1:20 Chûng mite zîngah chuan Humenaia leh Aleksandara pawh an tel a, Pathian pawi sawi an sim nân thunun an ngai a, Setana ka pe ta a ni." 
1Timothy2:1 Ka chah duh hmasak ber che chu thil dîlna te, ṭawngṭaina te, dîlsakna te, lâwmthu hrilhna te mi zawng zawng tân hlân ula," 
1Timothy2:2 Pathian ngaihsak leh zahawma awmin thlamuang taka kan khawsak ho dial dial theih nân lalber leh thuneitu zawng zawng pawh dîlsak rawh u; 
1Timothy2:3 chu chu min chhandamtu Pathian hmuhin a ṭha a, a lâwmzâwng a ni." 
1Timothy2:4 Ani chuan mi zawng zawng chhandama awmah leh thutak hria atân a duh si a. 
1Timothy2:5 Pathian pakhat chauh a awm a, Pathian leh mihring inkârah palai pakhat chauh a awm bawk, mihring Krista Isua chu." 
1Timothy2:6 Mi zawng zawng tlan nân ani chu a inpe a, chhandamna thu chu hun a tih takah a rawn puang ta." 
1Timothy2:7 Kei hi, Jentail-te hnêna chu rinna thu chu puang tûr leh thutak zirtîrtu leh tirhkoh atân ruat ka ni; he ka thu sawi hi thutak a ni a, dâwt a ni lo ve." 
1Timothy2:8 Tichuan, in inkhâwmna apiangah mipaho chuan tihtakzetin, thinur chung leh ringhlel chunga ti lovin kut thianghlim pharin ṭawngṭai rawh se." 
1Timothy2:9 Hmeichhia pawh a mawi tâwk leh inchawih tâwkin inchei sela, sam chei lêrh te, rangkachaka inchei te, tuikeplung ṭhi awrh te, puan man tam inbel te chîng suh se." 
1Timothy2:10 Pathian ngaihsak hmeichhiate tih âwm rêng, thil tih ṭhatein inthuam zâwk rawh se." 
1Timothy2:11 Hmeichhiate chuan ngawi rengin, thu awih takin thil an zir tûr a ni." 
1Timothy2:12 Hmeichhiain an zirtîr te, mipa chunga thu an neih te ka phal lo, ngawih an chuh tûr a ni." 
1Timothy2:13 Adama chu Evi ai chuan siam hmasak a ni a," 
1Timothy2:14 buma awm kha Adama a ni lo va, hmeichhia kha a ni buma awm leh bawhchhetu chu." 
1Timothy2:15 Amaherawhchu, rinnaah te, hmangaihnaah te, thianghlimnaah te, mawi taka an awm reng phawt chuan fa hrin avângin chhandam an ni ang." 
1Timothy3:1 Tu pawh kohhran hotu hnathawh duh chuan hna ṭha thawh a duh a ni tih hi a dik a ni. 
1Timothy3:2 Tichuan, kohhran hotu ni tûr chu sawisêlbo, nupui pakhat nei, insûm thei, rilru fîm, mi zahawm, mi inphal leh zirtîr thiam a ni tûr a ni." 
1Timothy3:3 Zu in chîng lo, kut thlâk mai chîng lo, mi nunnêm, inrem duh mi leh tangka sum ngaina lo mi a ni tûr a ni;" 
1Timothy3:4 zahawm taka chhûngkaw khawsak rêla, fate kîlkawi thiam mi a ni bawk tûr a ni;" 
1Timothy3:5 mahni chhûngkaw rêl fel thiam si lo chuan engtin nge Pathian kohhran a enkawl theih ang? 
1Timothy3:6 Ring thar mi ni suh se, chuti lo chu a chapo vang a, Diabola angin thiam loh a chang ve dah ang e." 
1Timothy3:7 Pâwn lam mite ngaihsân a ni bawk tûr a ni; tichuan, hmingchhiat hlawhin Diabola thangah a âwk dâwn lo nia." 
1Timothy3:8 Chutiang bawkin kohhran rawngbâwltute pawh mi zahawm, mi rilru nghet an ni tûr a ni, zu heh leh bawlhhlawh taka hlêp duh mi an ni tûr a ni lo;" 
1Timothy3:9 chhia leh ṭha hriatna thianga rinna thu ril chelh tlat mi an ni tûr a ni. 
1Timothy3:10 En fiah hmasak phawt tûr an ni a, mi tling tâwk an nih chuan rawng an bâwl chauh tûr a ni." 
1Timothy3:11 Hmeichhiate pawh chutiang bawkin mi zahawm, mi rêl chîng lo, insûm thei, kawng engkima mi rinawm an ni tûr a ni." 
1Timothy3:12 Rawngbâwltute chu nupui pakhat nei, fate leh chhûngkaw enkawl thiam mi an ni tûr a ni." 
1Timothy3:13 Rawng bâwl ṭhate chu an chan a ṭha tial tial ang a, Krista Isua rinnaah pawh an huai telh telh ang." 
1Timothy3:14 He lehkha ka ziak lai hian lo kala hmuh thuai che ka inbeisei reng a; 
1Timothy3:15 mahse, ka lo tlai palh tâkin Pathian chhûngkua, Pathian nung kohhran, thutak kengkawhtute chu eng anga awm tûr nge an nih i hriat theih nân ka han ziak a nih hi." 
1Timothy3:16 Kan sakhaw thurûk rilzia hi hnial rual a ni lo ve: Ani chu tisa puin a lo lang a, Thlarauvin a dikzia a tilang a, Vântirhkohte pawhin an hmu a, hnam tin zîngah puan darh a ni a, khawvêl puma miin an ring a, Ropui taka lâk chhoh a ni ta." 
1Timothy4:1 Hun hnuhnûngah chuan miten rinna thu hi an la hawisan ang a, thlarau dik lo hruai bovin, ramhuai laka chhuak zirtîrna dik lo chu an la awih zâwk dâwn tih thlarauvin chiang takin a sawi." 
1Timothy4:2 Chûng thu theh darhtute chu chhia leh ṭha hriatna del, thîr linga deh châr ang, mi dawthei an ni." 
1Timothy4:3 Inneih te leh thil ṭhenkhat ei te an khap a. Thutak hre tawh ringtute erawh chuan lâwmthu sawi chunga ei atân Pathian siam a ni tih an hria. 
1Timothy4:4 Pathian thil siam tinrêngte hi a ṭha a, eng mah duh loh tûr a ni lo;" 
1Timothy4:5 lâwmthu sawi chunga dawn mai tûr a ni, Pathian thu leh ṭawngṭainaa hlan thianghlim vek a ni tawh si a." 
1Timothy4:6 Hêng kaihhruainate hi unaute hrilh la, Krista Isua rawngbâwltu ṭha in ni dâwn nia; rinna thu leh zirtîrna ṭha i zawm ṭhin khân thlarau lamah a ṭhan lentîr zêl bawk ang che." 
1Timothy4:7 Thawnthu dukdak lo mai mai chu hawisan la, thlarau lam thilah insawizawi rawh." 
1Timothy4:8 Taksaa insawizawi hi a sâwt ngawt mai, thlarau lama insawizawina erawh chu kawng engkimah a ṭangkai a, tûn dam chhûng leh nakin hun atân a sâwt êm êm a ni." 
1Timothy4:9 He thu hi a dik a, pawm tlâk a ni." 
1Timothy4:10 Pathian nung chu kan beisei innghahna a nih tâk avângin kan thawk rim a, kan bei nasa a ni. Ani chu mi zawng zawng tân chhandamtu a ni a, ringtute tân a ni ber nghe nghe." 
1Timothy4:11 Hêng thu hi pe la, zirtîr zui zêl rawh." 
1Timothy4:12 I naupan avâng maiin tu man ngainêp che suh se, thu sawiah te, chêtziaah te, hmangaihnaah te, rinnaah te, thianghlimnaah te ringtute entawn tlâkin awm ang che." 
1Timothy4:13 Ka lo kal hma chu vântlâng zînga Pathian thu chhiar te, thu hril te, zirtîr te lo uar rawh." 
1Timothy4:14 Upahovin i chunga kut an nghah laia zâwlneite sawi anga thlarau lam thilpêk i dawnte kha thlahthlam suh. 
1Timothy4:15 Hmang zui zêl la, tuina berah neih la; tichuan, mi tinin i ṭhan zêlzia an hmu dâwn nia." 
1Timothy4:16 I thil tih leh i zirtîrah fîmkhur hle la, hêng hi ti zêl la, nangmah leh i thu ngaithlatute i chhandam dâwn nia." 
1Timothy5:1 Upa zâwkte chu hau suh la, mahni pa anga enin a ngenin ngên zâwk ang che; naupang zâwkte chu nau angin en la," 
1Timothy5:2 Pitarte chu nu angin en la, nulate chu thianghlim takin farnu angin en ang che." 
1Timothy5:3 Mahni chauhva awm hmeithaite chu zah la; 
1Timothy5:4 tu leh fa nei hmeithaite chu, an tu leh fate chuan Pathianin chhûngkaw mawhphurhna a pêk chu hlen chhuah zir phawt sela, anmahni châwm liantu chu châwm ve thung rawh se, chu chu Pathian lâwm zâwng a ni." 
1Timothy5:5 Châwmtu nei lo, mahni chauhva hmeithai chuan, Pathian chauh rinchhan tûr a nei a, ṭanpuina dîlin a chhûn a zân a ṭawngṭai ṭhîn." 
1Timothy5:6 Hmeithai leplêrh tak erawh chu, a dam lai pawhin mitthi mai a ni." 
1Timothy5:7 Hêng kaihhruainate hi hrilh la, sawisêlbovin awm rawh se." 
1Timothy5:8 Mahni chhûngte, in khata awmpui ngei châwm duh lo an awm chuan, rinna hi an phatsan ta tihna a ni, ringlo mi aiin an sual zâwk." 
1Timothy5:9 Kum sawmruk la tling lo chu hmeithai zîngah ziak tel suh; pasal pakhat chauh nei, thil ṭha tih kawnga fak kai, fate lo enkawl tlei tawh, mikhual chunga ṭha, mi thianghlimte ke sil ṭhîn, mi mangang ṭanpui peih, thil ṭha tih kawnga inpe mi an ni bawk tûr a ni." 
1Timothy5:10  
1Timothy5:11 Hmeithai la nula deuhte chu telh suh, an châkna avângin Krista hawisana pasal neih an duh leh si ṭhîn a," 
1Timothy5:12 an thu lo tiam tawh an bawhchhiat avângin sawisêl an kai ṭhîn. 
1Timothy5:13 Chu lovah pawh, mi ina an lên kualna lamah dâwngdah an zir a, dâwngdah mai pawh ni lovin mi rêl an chîng a, thu veivir an hrât a, an sawi loh tûr tûr an sawi ṭhîn." 
1Timothy5:14 Chuvângin, hmeithai la nula deuhte chuan pasal nei leh se ka ti a ni, fate neiin chhûngkua enkawl sela, hmêlmaten min sawichhiatna tûr rêng an nei dâwn lo nia." 
1Timothy5:15 Ṭhenkhat chu Setana zuiin an pêng sual tawh a ni. 
1Timothy5:16 Ringtu hmeichhiain, an chhûngkaw zîngah hmeithai nei se a châwm tûr a ni; mahnia hmeithaite chauh kohhranin an enkawl theih nân kohhran chu phurrit siamsak suh se." 
1Timothy5:17 Kohhran upa, mi hruai thiam, thu hril leh zirtîr lama taima bîkte chu a leh hniha chawimawi tlâk an ni." 
1Timothy5:18 Lehkha Thu-in, “Bâwngpain buh a chîl laiin a hmui phuar suh; hna thawktu chu hlawh hmu tlâk a ni,” a ti a." 
1Timothy5:19 Upa an hêkna chu thuhretu pahnih emaw, pathum emaw tal an awm loh chuan pawm suh." 
1Timothy5:20 Thil tisual ngeite chu vântlâng hmaah zilh rawh, mi dang pawhin an hlauh theih nân." 
1Timothy5:21 Pathian leh Krista Isua leh a vântirhkoh thlante hmaah thu ka pe a che: ngaih dân nei sa lovin, hleih nei lovin hêng thu hi kengkawh ang che." 
1Timothy5:22 Rawngbâwltu tûr nemngheh hmanhmawh lutuk suh la, mahni invawng thianghlim rawh." 
1Timothy5:23 Tui chauh in tawh lo la, na i nei fo si a, i pum nawm nân uain tlêm in ṭhîn ang che." 
1Timothy5:24 Mi ṭhenkhat sualna chu a langsâr a, thiam loh chantîr nghâl theih a ni; ṭhenkhat sualna erawh chu rei fe hnuah lo chuan a lang nghâl mai lo." 
1Timothy5:25 Chutiang bawkin thiltih ṭha chu a langsâr a, langsâr lo mah se, thup reng theih a ni chuang lo." 
1Timothy6:1 Chhiahhlawh, bawih nghâwngkawl bâtte chuan an pute chu kawng engkimah an zah tûr a ni, chuti lo chu Pathian hming leh kan zirtîrna hi sawichhiat a ni dah ang e." 
1Timothy6:2 Bawih, Kristian pu neite chuan rinnaa unau an nih denchhenin an pute chu an ngainêp tûr a ni lo, ṭha lehzualin rawng an bâwlsak zâwk tûr a ni; an rawngbâwlsakte nên rinna leh hmangaihnaa chhûngkhat an ni si a. Hêng hi i zirtîra, i fuihna tûr chu a ni." 
1Timothy6:3 Tu pawh kan Lalpa Isua Krista thutak leh sakhaw zirtîrna thu dik chu kalha zirtîrna danglam zirtîr chu," 
1Timothy6:4 mi â, intivei tak, eng mah hre si lo an ni; sawihnâwm tûr zawn thiam tak, inhnial châk hliah hliah, inîtsîkna te, innghirnghona te, Pathian pawi sawi te leh thu inchuh tâwpintai nei lo chawk chhuaktu an ni;" 
1Timothy6:5 rilru chhe tawh, thu dik man pha tawh lo, sakhua hi hausak nâna hman tumte an ni." 
1Timothy6:6 Mahni ta-a lungawite tân chuan sakhaw mi nih hi a hlâwk êm êm rêng a ni. 
1Timothy6:7 Khawvêlah hian eng mah kan luhpui lo va, eng mah kan chhuahpui thei dâwn bawk hek lo." 
1Timothy6:8 Ei tûr leh silh tûr kan neih chuan kan tân a tâwk a ni. 
1Timothy6:9 Hausak duh mite chu thlêmnaah an lût a, duhâmna âtthlâk, thang hlauhawm takah chuan an âwk a, an chhiat phah a, an boral ṭhîn a ni." 
1Timothy6:10 Tangka sum ngainat hi sual tinrêng bul a ni, sum ngah an tumna lamah ṭhenkhat chuan rinna hi an pênsan a, lungngaih sawi sên lohvin mahni an intina ta a ni." 
1Timothy6:11 Nang, Pathian mi, chûng chu tlânsan la, dikna te, sakhaw ngaihsakna te, rinna te, hmangaihna te, dawhtheihna te, nunnêmna te neih tum tlat zâwk rawh." 
1Timothy6:12 Rinna hlu tak hi ṭanin theihtâwp chhuah ang che; chatuan nun chu vuan tlat la, chumi chang tûr chuan koh i ni a, hretu tam tak hmaah rinna hi i pawm thu i puan kha." 
1Timothy6:13 Engkim nunna hnâr, Pathian leh Krista Isua, Pontia Pilata hmaa hlau hlek lova thu dik ṭan tlattu hmaah chuan," 
1Timothy6:14 i tih tûra ruat chu rinawm taka ti tûrin thu ka pe a che. Kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo lan leh hma chu bawlhhlawh kai lo leh sawisêlbovin awm rawh. 
1Timothy6:15 Fak tlâk Pathian, engkim chunga thu neitu awm chhun, lalberte Lalber, lalte Lal chuan a hun takah Krista chu a rawn lantîr dâwn si a." 
1Timothy6:16 Amah chauh hi thi thei lo, hnaih theih rual loh ênga chêng, tu ma la hmuh loh leh hmuh theih loh ni bawk chu a ni, a hnênah chuan chawimawina leh thiltihtheihna chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Khawvêl mi hausate chu inchhuang lo tûrin hrilh la, sum rin tlâk loh rin chhan tum lova engkim kan hman atâna min petu Pathianah innghat zâwk tûrin fuih rawh." 
1Timothy6:18 Thil ṭha ti tûr te, thil ṭha tiha hausa tûr te, phal taka mi dangte sem ve chîng tûr tein fuih bawk rawh." 
1Timothy6:19 Tichuan, nakin atân ro hlu tak an insiamsak a ni ang a, nunna tak tak chu an chang dâwn nia." 
1Timothy6:20 Aw Timothe, i kova innghat hi vawng fimkhur hle ang che, ‘hriatna dik’ tia an chhâl, dik si lo, thu inkalh si, khawvêl mi tam takin an khûkpui ṭhin lakah khân inthiarfihlîm rawh;" 
1Timothy6:21 ṭhenkhat chuan an zâwm ve a, rinna kawng aṭangin an bo ta a ni. Pathian khawngaihna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
2Timothy1:1 Kei Paula, Kristaa nunna tiam puang tûra Pathian duh zâwnga Krista Isua tirhkoh hian," 
2Timothy1:2 ka fapa duh tak Timothe, chibai ka bûk a che. Pa Pathian leh kan Lalpa Krista Isua hnên ata khawngaihna te, zahngaihna te, remna te i hnênah awm rawh se." 
2Timothy1:3 Min thlahtute tih anga chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang taka a rawng ka bâwl Pathian hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi a ni. A chhûn a zânin ka ṭawngṭainaah te ka hre reng ṭhîn che a," 
2Timothy1:4 i mittuite pawh ka hre reng a, hlim êm êma inhmuh leh ka châk ngei mai." 
2Timothy1:5 I rinna takzia pawh ka hre reng ṭhîn, i pi Loisii neih, i nu Euniki pawhin a neih bawk kha nang pawhin i nei ta zêl a ni tih ka hria." 
2Timothy1:6 Chumi avâng chuan i chunga kut ka nghah laia Pathian thilpêk i dawn kha chhêm alh reng tûrin hrilh nawn che ka duh a ni. 
2Timothy1:7 Pathian Thlarau kan chan hian min tidawih lo va, chakna te, hmangaihna te, mahni inthunun theihna te min pe zâwk a ni." 
2Timothy1:8 Kan Lalpa thu hi puan zak suh, amah avânga lung in tâng pawh hi min zahpui hek suh; Pathian chakna ringin Chanchin Ṭha avânga hrehawm tuar ve huam zêl zâwk rawh." 
2Timothy1:9 Kan thiltih avâng ni lovin, ama tum dân a nih zâwk avângin khawngaihnain min chhandam a, thianghlim taka nung tûrin min ko va ni. Krista Isuaah chuan leilung pian hma daih khân a khawngaihna chu min lo pe tawh a;" 
2Timothy1:10 mahse, tûnah hian, min chhandamtu Krista Isua a lo kal khân, chu chu tihlan a ni ta chauh a ni. Ani chuan thihna chu a hneh ta a, Chanchin Ṭhaah hian nunna leh thih theih lohna a rawn tilang ta a ni." 
2Timothy1:11 Kei hi chumi thu puang tûra tirhkoh leh zirtîrtu atân ruat ka ni. 
2Timothy1:12 Chuvâng chuan alâwm tûnah pawh hetianga ka tuar ni; mahse, ka zak lo ve; ka rina chu ka hria, a hnêna ka kawltîr chu, chumi Nî atân chuan a vawng him thei tih ka hre chiang a ni." 
2Timothy1:13 Ka hnên aṭanga i hriat ṭhin zirtîrna dik kha zawm berah neih la, Krista Isuaa rinnaah leh hmangaihnaah chuan chêng tlat rawh." 
2Timothy1:14 I kova innghat, thilpêk ropui tak kha, keimahnia chêng ṭhîn Thlarau Ṭhianghlim hmangin vawng ṭha tlat bawk rawh." 
2Timothy1:15 Asia rama mite khân, Fugela leh Hermogena te chenin mi hawisan ta tih i hria e." 
2Timothy1:16 Lalpa chuan Onesifora te chhûng chu khawngaihna pe rawh se; ani chuan mi tihlim êm êm a ni, lung in tâng ka nih hi mi zahpui lo va," 
2Timothy1:17 Rom khua a lo thlen veleh mi rawn zawng chhuak vang vang a ni. Efesi khuaah pawh min puih nasatzia i hre chiang a," 
2Timothy1:18 Lalpa chuan chumi Nî-ah chuan a khawngaihna chu dawntîr rawh se. 
2Timothy2:1 Ka fapa, Krista khawngaihna hian tichak che rawh se." 
2Timothy2:2 Mi tam tak hriata ka zirtîrna i ngaihthlâkte kha zirtîr chhâwng zêl thei tûr nia i mi rin tâwkte hnênah hrilh chhâwng zêl ang che. 
2Timothy2:3 Krista sipai rinawm angin hrehawm mi tuarpui ve rawh. 
2Timothy2:4 Sipai chu a hotu tilâwm tûrin khawvêl thil dangah a inhnamhnawih ngai lo. 
2Timothy2:5 Intlânsiak mi pawh dân ang taka a tlân loh chuan lâwmman a hmu thei lo vang. 
2Timothy2:6 Lo lamah pawh a thawk hahtu chuan rah hmasa a chang tûr a ni. 
2Timothy2:7 Ka sawi hi ngaihtuah ngun la, Lalpan kawng engkimah hriatthiamna a pe ang che." 
2Timothy2:8 Chanchin Ṭha ka hril ṭhin, Isua Krista, Davida thlaha mi, mitthi zîng ata tholeh ta-a thu kha hre reng rawh." 
2Timothy2:9 Chu Chanchin Ṭha avâng chuan hrehawm ka tuar a, mi sual ang maia khaidiata phuar ka ni, Pathian thu erawh chu phuar rual a ni lo." 
2Timothy2:10 Krista Isuaa awm, chhandamna chu, chatuan ropuina nên an chan theih nân thlante avângin hêng zawng zawng hi ka tuar a ni." 
2Timothy2:11 He thu hi a dik a ni: A thihna kan ṭâwm ve chuan, A nunna pawh kan ṭâwm ve ang." 
2Timothy2:12 Kan tuar ve chuan ro kan rêlpui ve ang. Kan phat erawh chuan min phat ve ang. 
2Timothy2:13 Rinawm lo mah ila, Ani zawng a rinawm reng a, a thu a sût ve ngai lo." 
2Timothy2:14 Hêng thu hi hriattîr rawh, Pathian hmingin hrilh la, thu inchuha inhnial ṭhin hi bânsan rawh se, sâwtna a awm lo va, ngaithlatute a tikhawlo mai mai a ni." 
2Timothy2:15 Nang chuan Pathian lâwmzâwng mi, hna thawktu, mahni hna zahpui lo, thutak chu dik taka hmang thiamtu nih tum tlat ang che." 
2Timothy2:16 Khawvêl mite thu dukdak lo chu hawisan rawh, chu chuan Pathian ngaihsak lohna lamah mi a hruai si ṭhîn." 
2Timothy2:17 Pânchhia angin an thu zirtîr chu a darh ṭhîn; an zîngah Humenaia leh Fileta kha a bulpui an ni. 
2Timothy2:18 Thutak chu an pênsan a, ‘thawhlehna chu a awm daih tawh,’ an ti a, mi ṭhenkhat rinna pawh an pheh chhiatsak tawh a ni." 
2Timothy2:19 Pathian thutak lungphûm erawh chu a nghîng chuang lo, “Lalpan a mite a hria,” tih leh “Lalpa hming lamtute chuan sual an kalsan tûr a ni,” tih ziak a chuang." 
2Timothy2:20 In ropui taka bungbêlte pawh chu rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam a ni vek lo va, thinga siam te, hluma siam te pawh a ni a, a ṭhen a hlu deuh va, a ṭhen a hlu lo deuh va." 
2Timothy2:21 Hêng thil ṭha lo ka sawite laka inthiarfihlîm mi chu hmanraw hlu, in Neitupa tân hman tlâk, sil fai diam, hna ṭha tinrêng thawh nâna hman mai theih tûra inpeih reng ang hi a lo ni ang." 
2Timothy2:22 Tleirâwl châkna te hawisan la, thinlung thianghlim taka Lalpa lamtute nên dikna te, rinna te, hmangaihna te, remna te ûm rawh." 
2Timothy2:23 Hêng inhnialna sâwt lo leh âtthlâk hi hawisan rawh, innghirnghona a tichhuak mai mai a ni." 
2Timothy2:24 Lalpa chhiahhlawh chuan inhau a chîng tûr a ni lo, mi lainat thei, zirtîr thiam, mi dawhthei a ni zâwk tûr a ni;" 
2Timothy2:25 amah kalhtute pawh dawhthei takin a kilkawi tûr a ni, thutak hre tûrin Pathianin an rilru a lamlêttîr mai thei a," 
2Timothy2:26 Diabola thanga âwk, a duh zâwng a tihtîr ṭhinte chu lo chhuakin an lo harh leh mahna." 
2Timothy3:1 Ni hnuhnûngah chuan hun khirh tak a lo thleng dâwn tih hre rawh. 
2Timothy3:2 Mi, mahni hmasial te, tangka ngaina te, inchhuang te; intivei te, Pathian pawi sawi hrât te, nu leh pa thu awih lo te, lâwm nachâng hre lo te, thianghlim lo te," 
2Timothy3:3 pianpui hmangaihna nei lo te, huaikawm bâwl te, rêlchhiat chîng te, insûm thei lo te, nunrâwng te, ṭha hua te," 
2Timothy3:4 dâwta hêk chîng te, pawisak nei lo te, chapo te, Pathian aia mahni nuam tih zâwng ngaihtuahtu te," 
2Timothy3:5 a langa intisakhaw mi viau, chhûng lama takna nei si lo te an lo awm ang - chûng mite chu hawisan rawh." 
2Timothy3:6 An zînga ṭhenkhat phei chu mi inahte an lêng an lêng ang a; hmeichhe chak lo anmahni rit phur, châk zâwng apiang ûm ruai," 
2Timothy3:7 eng pawh zir peih viau, thutak hre thei bawk si lote chu an hîp ang." 
2Timothy3:8 Jannia leh Jambrian Mosia an dodâl ang khân thutak an dodâl ang; an rilru a khawlo zo tawh a, rinnaah lah tihtlâk an ni tawh lo." 
2Timothy3:9 Chûng bâk chu eng dang han ti thei tûr an ni lo, Jannia leh Jambria te ang bawk khân miten an âtzia an hai lo vang." 
2Timothy3:10 Nang zawngin ka zirtîrna te, ka awm dân te, ka thiltum te, ka rinna te, ka dawhtheihna te, ka hmangaihna te leh ka chhelzia te i hria a." 
2Timothy3:11 Antiokei-ah te, Ikonion-ah te leh Lustra khuaah te tihduhdahna leh harsatna tam tak ka chunga lo thleng te, tihduhdahna ka tuar nasatzia leh chûng ata chu Lalpan mi chhan chhuah thu te kha i hria e." 
2Timothy3:12 Tu pawhin Krista Isua nun mawi tak anga nun an tum phawt chuan tihduhdah an ni ngei ang. 
2Timothy3:13 Mi sualte leh tihdertute erawh chu an chan a chhe tial tial ang a, mi dang bum ṭhîn mah se anmahni ngei pawh bum an ni ang." 
2Timothy3:14 Nang erawh chuan, i zir tawh, i pawm ngheh tawh kha chelh tlat rawh, tu nge zirtîr che i hre si a. I naupan têt ata Lehkha Thianghlim chu i hre bel êm êm a, Krista Isua rin avânga chhandam ni tûra finna pe thei che a ni tih i hria." 
2Timothy3:15  
2Timothy3:16 Pathian thâwkkhum Lehkha Thu zawng zawng hi intihdik nân te, insiamṭhat nân te, nun dân dik inzirtîr nân te a ṭangkai êm êm a ni." 
2Timothy3:17 Chutianga hmang chuan a ni Pathian mi chu hman tlâk a lo niha, thil ṭha tinrêng ti thei tûra thuam a lo nih ṭhin ni." 
2Timothy4:1 Pathian leh Krista Isua, mitthi leh mi nung rorêltu tûra hmaah, a lo kal lehna leh a ram chhâlin thu ka pe a che." 
2Timothy4:2 Thu chu hril rawh, hun ṭhaah emaw, ṭha lovah emaw bei zêl rawh; dawhthei taka zirtîr chungin an dik lohna kawhhmuh la, zilh la, fuih rawh." 
2Timothy4:3 Zirtîrna dik ngaithla ṭha duh lovin an duh zâwng chauh ngaithlain, an bengverh zâwng zirtîrtute chauh an sâwm khâwm hun a la thleng dâwn." 
2Timothy4:4 Thu dik an bengkhawn lo vang a, thawnthu mai mai an tuipui ang." 
2Timothy4:5 Nang zawng engkimah inthunun la, tuar fan fan rawh; Chanchin Ṭha hril hna hi thawk zêl la, i rawngbâwl hna kha hlen rawh." 
2Timothy4:6 Kei zawng hlan tûra tih ka ni tawh, khawvêl ata ka kal chhuah hun a thleng ta." 
2Timothy4:7 Intihsiakna ṭha chu ka zo tawh a, ka tlânna tûrah ka tlân chhuak a, rinna chu ka vawng reng a ni;" 
2Timothy4:8 tûnah chuan thiam channa, chawimawina lukhum chu dawn chauh ka hmabâk tawh a ni; chu chu rorêltu dik Lalpa chuan, chumi ni-ah chuan min pe ang, keimah mai ni lovin, a lo lan hun nghâkhleltu zawng zawngte pawh a pe ang." 
2Timothy4:9 Ka hnêna lo kal thuai han tum hrâm teh. 
2Timothy4:10 Dema chuan tûnlai khawvêl a ngainat avângin Thesalonika khaw lamah mi kalsan ta. Kreska pawh Galatia ramah a kal a, Tita chu Dalmatia ramah a kal bawk a." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka chauhvin mi awmpui a ni. Marka kha rawngbâwl kawnga mi puitu ṭha tak a ni a, rawn hruai ang che." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka chauhvin mi awmpui a ni. Marka kha rawngbâwl kawnga mi puitu ṭha tak a ni a, rawn hruai ang che." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukika kha Efesi khuaah ka tîr ta. 
2Timothy4:13 I lo kal hun chuan Troas khuaa Karpa hnêna ka kawrfual hnutchhiah kha han la la, ka lehkhabu nên, savun lehkhate phei kha chu han keng ngei ang che." 
2Timothy4:14 Dâr chhûng mi Aleksandara khân ka pawi a khawih nasa hle a, Lalpan a thiltih ang zêlin a la thungrûl ang chu." 
2Timothy4:15 A lakah khân nang pawh fîmkhur hle ang che, kan thu a dodâl nasa êm êm a ni." 
2Timothy4:16 Thiamthu ka sawi hmasak ṭum chuan tu mah mi ṭantu an awm lo, min tlânsan vek a, (a mawh chu phur hlawm suh se)." 
2Timothy4:17 Lalpa erawh chuan mi awmpui a, mi tichak a, Jentail zawng zawng hriat tûrin Chanchin Ṭha chu ka puang kim ta; sakeibaknei ka ata chhan chhuah ka ni ta a." 
2Timothy4:18 Lalpa chuan thil ṭha lo tinrêng lak ata mi chhan chhuak zêl ang a, him takin a vânram chu min thlen ang. Chatuan chatuanin ropuina chu a hnênah awm rawh se. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Priskili leh Akuila te leh Onesifora chhûngte kha chibai ka bûk e. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasta chu Korinth khuaah a awm ta reng a. Trofima chu a dam loh avângin Mileto khuaah ka kalsan ta. 
2Timothy4:21 Thlasik hmain lo kal tum hrâm ang che. 
2Timothy4:22 Eubula te, Pudea te, Lina te, Klaudii te leh unau zawng zawngten chibai an bûk a che. Lalpa chu i hnênah awm rawh se. Khawngaihna in zaa hnênah awm rawh se." 
Titus1:1 Kei Paula hi, Pathian chhiahhlawh leh Isua Krista tirhkoh, Pathian mi thlante rinnaa kaihruai tûr leh" 
Titus1:2 sakhaw lam thu dik, chatuan nun beiseina chu hriattîr tûra ruat ka ni." 
Titus1:3 Daw ngai lo Pathian chuan chu chu leilung pian hmain a lo tiam tawh a, ama thu ang ngeiin ṭha a tih hun takah a rawn tilang ta a, min Chhandamtu Pathian thupêk anga chu Chanchin Ṭha puan hna chu kawltîr ka ni." 
Titus1:4 Kan pawm tlân rinna avânga ka fa tak tak Tita, chibai ka bûk a che. Pa Pathian leh min chhandamtu Krista Isua hnên ata khawngaihna leh remna i hnênah awm rawh se." 
Titus1:5 Thil tihfel bâk tifel tûrin Kret thliarkârah ka hnutchhiah che a, thu ka pêk che ang khân khaw tinah upate ruatsak rawh." 
Titus1:6 Upate chu sawisêl kai lo, nupui pakhat nei an ni tûr a ni; an fate pawh ringtu, nawmsakbâwl lama sawisêl kai lo leh luhlul lo ni rawh se." 
Titus1:7 Kohhran hotu chu Pathian chhûngkaw enkawltu a ni a, sawisêl kai lo mi ni rawh se; mahni thu duh, thinram, zu rui mi, kut thlâk hmang, bawlhhlawh taka hlêp duh mi ni suh se." 
Titus1:8 Mi inphal, thil ṭha duh, insûm thei, mi ngîl, mi thianghlim, mahni inthunun thei ni rawh se." 
Titus1:9 Kan inzirtîrna thu rinawm tak hi man fuhtu a ni bawk tûr a ni; tichuan, zirtîrna dik a zirtîr thei ang a, hnialtute a timualpho thei bawk dâwn nia." 
Titus1:10 Mi tam tak thunun ngai, pâwt mai mai, mi bum chîng an awm ṭeuh kha, chûngte chu serh tanho zînga mi an ni deuh ber;" 
Titus1:11 an kâ huhsak tûr a ni; a chhûng chhûngin mite an chawk buai a, sum hmuh beiseiin zirtîr loh tûr tûr an zirtîr a." 
Titus1:12 Kret mi, anmahni zâwlnei pakhat ngei pawhin, “Kret thliarkâr mite hi mi dawthei, ram sakawlh ang, thatchhe si, vir tak si an ni,” a tih hi thu dik tak a ni." 
Titus1:13 Chuvângin, rinna dik an neih theih nân na takin zilh rawh." 
Titus1:14 Juda-te thawnthu mai mai leh thutak hawisan tawhte thu zâwm tawh suh se. 
Titus1:15 Mi thianghlimte tân zawng engkim hi a thianghlim a, mi bawlhhlawhte leh rinna nei lote tân erawh chuan eng mah hi thianghlim aram a awm lo; an thinlung leh an chhia leh ṭha hriatna chenin a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Titus1:16 Pathian hriaah an inngai a; mahse, an thiltihin a zir si lo; mi luhlul leh ngeiawm tak an ni a, thil ṭha eng atân mah an tlâktlai tawh lo." 
Titus2:1 Nang erawh chuan zirtîrna dik i zirtîr zêl tûr a ni. 
Titus2:2 Putarte chu insûm thei, zahawm, inthunun thei, rin dân dik, hmangaihna nei mi leh mi dawhthei ni tûrin fuih rawh." 
Titus2:3 Chutiang bawkin pitarte pawh an chêt dâna Pathian ṭih mi ni tûrin fuih la, mi rêl hmang, uain heh mi ni suh se; thil ṭha zirtîr chîng sela," 
Titus2:4 la nula deuhte chu an pasalte leh an fate hmangaih te," 
Titus2:5 insûm theih te, thianghlim te, in chhûnga khawsak ṭhat te, ngilneih te leh pasal thu awih te zirtîr rawh; tichuan, Pathian thu hi sawichhiat a ni dâwn lo nia." 
Titus2:6 Chutiang bawkin tlangvâlte pawh mahni inthunun tûrin fuih rawh. 
Titus2:7 Nang phei chu thil ṭha tinrêng tih kawngah entawn tlâk takin awm la, zahawm tak leh tihtakzetin mite zirtîr ṭhîn la," 
Titus2:8 ṭawngkam mawi, sawisêl tûr awm lo chu hmang ṭhîn ang che; tichuan, hnialtuten min sawichhiatna tûr rêng rêng an nei lo vang a, an zak zâwk dâwn nia." 
Titus2:9 Bawihte chu kawng engkimah an pute hnênah intulût rawh se; an lâwm zâwngin awm sela, an chhâng lêt ve tûr a ni lo," 
Titus2:10 an ei rûksak tûr a ni bawk lo; kawng engkimah rin tlâk takin an awm zâwk tûr a ni; tichuan, kan Pathian min chhandamtu zirtîrna thu hi engkimah a hlutzia an tilang dâwn a ni." 
Titus2:11 Mi zawng zawng chhandam an nih theih nân Pathian khawngaihna chu tihlan a lo ni ta a. 
Titus2:12 Tûnlai hunah hian Pathian ngaihsak lohna leh khawvêl lam thil bânsan te, mahni invawng fela, dik taka awma sakhaw ngaihsak nun te min zirtîr a." 
Titus2:13 Kan Pathian ropui leh min chhandamtu Isua Krista ropui taka a lo lanna ni lâwmawm kan beisei hi tihhlawhtlin a nih hun kan nghâk a ni. 
Titus2:14 Amah ngei chu kan tân a inpe a, bawhchhiatna tinrêng lak ata min tlan chhuak a, ama mi atân min tithianghlim a, thil ṭha tih châkna min pe a ni." 
Titus2:15 Hêng thu hi i hrilh tûr a ni; fuih la, thunei takin zilh rawh. Tu man ngainêp che suh se." 
Titus3:1 I mite chu rorêltute leh thuneitute thu awih tûr leh, thil ṭha tinrêng tih inpeih reng tûrin hrilh rawh." 
Titus3:2 Tu pawi mah sawi suh se; zâwldawhin mi zawng zawng lakah nunnêm tak leh hawihhâwm takin awm rawh se. 
Titus3:3 Hmânah chuan keini pawh mâwl tak, luhlul tak, hruai bova awm, châkna leh nawmsakna chi tinrêng bawiha awm kan ni a, mi îtsîka elrelin kan khawsa a; huatthlala tak, inhuat tawn chîng mi kan ni ṭhîn." 
Titus3:4 Amaherawhchu, min chhandamtu Pathian ngilneihzia leh mi a hmangaihzia a lo lan khân," 
Titus3:5 keinin thil kan tih ṭhat vâng ni lovin, a khawngaihna avângin min chhandam ta a, siamtharnaa sil fai leh Thlarau Thianghlima siam thar kan ni ta a." 
Titus3:6 Min chhandamtu Isua Krista zârah kan chungah hian a thlarau chu a rawn leih ta chiam a; 
Titus3:7 tichuan, khawngaihna avânga thiam min chantîrin, chatuan nun beiseina roluahtute kan ni thei ta a ni." 
Titus3:8 He thu hi a dik a ni. Pathian ringtute chuan thil ṭha tih duhna rilru an put zêl theih nân hêng thu hi uar tûrin ka duh che a ni; chu chu a ṭha a, tu tân pawh a ṭangkai a ni." 
Titus3:9 Inhnialna âtthlâk te, thlahtu chhui vak vak te, Dân thu-a inhnial luai luai te kalsan rawh; ṭangkaina a nei lo va, sâwtna a awm hek lo." 
Titus3:10 Inṭhendarhna tichhuaktu chu vawi hnih khat zilh la, ngaihven zui duh suh;"
