Titus3:11 chutiang mi zawng rilru kawi chhe pu tawh an ni tih i hria a, an tisual a ni tih pawh an inhre reng a ni." 
Titus3:12 Artema emaw Tukika emaw i hnêna ka rawn tirh veleh nang chuan Nikopoli khuaah mi rawn pan thuai ang che, chutah chuan thlasik chhûng zawng awm ka tum a ni." 
Titus3:13 Zena, dânhremi leh Apolova chuan, an zin kawnga eng mah an tlâkchham loh nân i theihtâwpin ṭanpui ang che." 
Titus3:14 Kan mite chu thil ṭha tiin inhmang ṭhîn rawh se, inthlahdah mai mai lovin hetiang thil ṭûl mamawh lo awm ṭhîn hi an phuhrûk thei tûr a ni." 
Titus3:15 Ka hnêna awm zawng zawng hian chibai an bûk a che u. Rinnaa kan ṭhiante kha chibai ka bûk e. In zaa hnênah khawngaihna awm rawh se. 
Philemon1:1 Paula, Krista Isua avânga tâng leh kan unaupa Timothean kan thawhpui duh tak Filemona te," 
Philemon1:2 kan farnu Afii te, kan sipaipui Arkipa te leh i ina inkhâwm ṭhîn kohhran mîte chibai kan bûk e." 
Philemon1:3 Kan Pa Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnên ata khawngaihna te, remna te in hnênah awm rawh se." 
Philemon1:4 Ka ṭawngṭainaah te ka hre reng ṭhîn che u. 
Philemon1:5 I rinna thu leh Lalpa Isua leh mi thianghlimte i hmangaihzia ka hriatin Pathian hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi a ni. 
Philemon1:6 Rinna avânga inpâwlhona kan neih tâkna hian Kristaah chuan malsâwmna tinrêng kan dawnte hriatthiamna a tihthûk zual zêl ka beisei e. 
Philemon1:7 Unaupa, i hmangaihna thu ka hriatin ka lâwm êm êm a, mi thianghlimte thinlung pawh i chawh phûr thar tâk avângin ka thla a muang ta huai mai." 
Philemon1:8 Hei vâng tak hian Kristaa unau kan nihnaah i tih âwm ti tûrin thu pe ngam che mah ila," 
Philemon1:9 i hmangaihna hriain, kei putar Paula, tûna Krista Isua vânga mi tâng hian, a ngenin ka ngên zâwk dâwn che a ni." 
Philemon1:10 Ka fapa Onesima, tân ina ka hrin tân hian ka ngên che a ni." 
Philemon1:11 Tûn hma khân i tân hman tlâk loh ni ṭhîn mah se, tûnah zawng ka tân a ṭangkai a, i tân pawh a ṭangkai tawh ang." 
Philemon1:12 Ka duhsakna thinlung zawng zawng nên i hnênah hei ka han tîr kîr e. 
Philemon1:13 Chanchin Ṭha avânga ka tân chhûng hian i aia min pui tûrin awmpui zêl ka duh hle a; 
Philemon1:14 mahse, rem i tih loh zâwng eng mah tih ka duh lo; min hmangaihna chu nangmah aṭanga puak chhuak ngei ni se ka duh avângin ani hi hrên luihsak che ka duh lo va ni." 
Philemon1:15 Eng emaw chhûng a tlân bosan che hi kumkhuaa i hnêna a ngam hlen tawhna ai a ni ngei ang. 
Philemon1:16 Tûnah zawng, bawih ang ni tawh lovin, bawih aia hlu tak, unau duh tak a ni tawh e; ka tân a duhawm êm êm a, i tân pawh tisa lamah leh Lalpaah a duhawm lehzual ngei ang." 
Philemon1:17 Chuvâng chuan, i thawhpui nia mi ngaih takmeuh chuan keimah ang maiin ani hi lo lâwm ang che." 
Philemon1:18 I lakah tihdik loh emaw, bat emaw a neih chuan ka rulh atân lo dah la." 
Philemon1:19 Kei, Paula hian keima kut ngeia ziakin ka rûl ang ka tih hi, nangmah ngei ka hnênah i inbat ve thu sawi tum phei zawng ka ni lo ve." 
Philemon1:20 Tichuan, unaupa, Lalpa avângin he thil hi min tihsak la, Kristaah chuan ka thinlung tilâwm rawh." 
Philemon1:21 Ka ngenna che hi a hlawhtlin ngei beisei tlatin ka ziak a nih hi, ka beisei aia nasa mahin i tih ka ring nghe nghe." 
Philemon1:22 In ṭawngṭainate chu chhân a niha, in hnêna lo chhuah ka inbeisei a, thlenna tûr in mi lo ngaihtuahsak ang che." 
Philemon1:23 Epafra, Krista Isuaa ka tânpui hian chibai a bûk a che." 
Philemon1:24 Ka thawhpui Marka te, Aristarka te, Dema te leh Luka te hian chibai an bûk a che." 
Philemon1:24 Ka thawhpui Marka te, Aristarka te, Dema te leh Luka te hian chibai an bûk a che." 
Philemon1:25 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in zaa hnênah awm rawh se. 
Hebrews1:1 Tûn hma hun zawng khân kawng tinrêngin Pathian chuan kan pi pute hnênah zâwlneite hmangin thu a sawi ṭhîn a; 
Hebrews1:2 tûn hun hnuhnûngah hian kan hnênah Fapain thu a rawn sawi ta thung a ni; Ani chu a ro zawng zawng luahtuah a ruat a, amah hmangin lei leh vân hi a siam a, Ani chu a ropuina êng leh" 
Hebrews1:3 a zepui putu a ni bawk; engkim hi a thiltihtheihnain a khai ding a, sual faina kawng a siam hnuin Chungnungbera ding lamah khian a han ṭhu ta a." 
Hebrews1:4 Vântirhkohte hming aia hming ropui a nei ta a; tichuan, anni ai chuan a ropui zâwk a ni." 
Hebrews1:5 Vântirhkoh zînga tu hnênah nge, “Nang zawng ka Fapa i ni e, vawiin hian Fapaah ka nei ta che,” emaw, “A tân Pa ka ni ang a, Ka tân fapa a ni ang,” a tih ngai le?" 
Hebrews1:6 Fa tîra erawh chu khawvêla a rawn tirh khân, “Pathian vântirhkoh zawng zawngin ani chu chibai bûk rawh se,” a tih kha." 
Hebrews1:7 Vântirhkoh chungchâng a sawi chuan, “Vântirhkoh chu thli-ah a chantîr a, A rawngbâwltute chu meialhah a chantîr,” a ti a." 
Hebrews1:8 Fapa thu a sawi erawh chuan heti hian a ti: “Aw Pathian, i lalṭhutthlêng chu a awm kumkhua ang. I ram rorêlna chu rorêlna dik a ni." 
Hebrews1:9 Felna i ngaina a, dik lo i hua a, Chuvângin, Pathian, i Pathian chuan I ṭhiante aiin duhsakna hriak a thih ta bîk che a ni.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Heti pawh hian a ti bawk: “Aw Lalpa, a tîrah nangin lei hi i siam a, Vânte pawh khi i kutchhuak a ni." 
Hebrews1:11 Chûngte chu an la boral ang a, Nang erawh chu i awm reng ang. Chûng zawng zawngte chu silhfên angin an la hlui ang a," 
Hebrews1:12 Puan angin i zial ang a, Silhfên angin i la thlâk ang. Nang zawng i ngai reng a, Kin ni i nei lo vang.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Vântirhkoh zînga tu hnênah nge, “Ka ding lamah lo ṭhu rawh, I hmêlmate I ke nghahchhanah ka han siam ang e,” a tih ngai?" 
Hebrews1:14 Vântirhkoh zawng, thlarau chhandamna changtute rawngbâwlsak tûra tirh an ni lâwm ni?" 
Hebrews2:1 Chuvângin, kan thu dawnte kha kan pawisa lehzual tûr a ni, chuti lo zawng kan tawlh bo hlauh dah ang e." 
Hebrews2:2 Vântirhkoh hmanga thu sawi mah a ngheh êm êma, a bawhchhetu leh pawisa lotu rêng rêng an phu tâwka hrem an nih zêl si chuan," 
Hebrews2:3 heti kauva chhandamna pawimawh hi kan thlahthlam vaih chuan, engtin nge hrem kan pumpelh theih tehlul ang? Chu chhandamna chu Lalpa ngeiin a rawn puang hmasa a, a thu dawngtute khân min nemnghehsak a." 
Hebrews2:4 Pathian meuh pawhin chhinchhiahna te, thil mak te leh thiltih ropui tak te tiin, Thlarau Thianghlim thilpêk chu ṭûl a tih ang zêla semin a rawn nemnghet bawk a ni." 
Hebrews2:5 Khawvêl lo la awm tûr chu vântirhkohte thuhnuaiah a dah lo tih kan sawi a nih hi. 
Hebrews2:6 Tu emaw chuan hetiang hian khawiah emaw a sawi: “Mihring hi eng nge maw a niha, i hriat reng ṭhin ni? Mihring Fapa pawh hi eng nge maw a niha, i ngaihtuah ṭhin ni?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ani chu vântirhkohte aia hnuaiin i siam rih a, Ropuina leh chawimawina i khumtîr a," 
Hebrews2:8 a ke hnuaiah engkim i dah a,” tiin. “A ke hnuaiah engkim i dah,” tih hian engkim takmeuh a huam a ni; amaherawhchu, tûnah engkim a hnuaia awmin kan la hre rih lo." 
Hebrews2:9 Nimahsela, Isua, “Vântirhkohte aia hnuaia siam rih” chu thihna tuar avânga ropuina leh chawimawina khumtîr a ni ta tih kan hmu, Pathian khawngaihna azârah mi tin tân thihna a temsak ta a ni." 
Hebrews2:10 A ropuina chang ve tûra fa tam tak hruai lûttu, an chhandamna siamtu, a zâra engkim awma, a tâna engkim awm bawka tân chuan, tuarnate avânga tihfamkima a awm chu a âwm rêng a ni." 
Hebrews2:11 Tithianghlimtu leh tihthianghlimte chu Pa thuhmun aṭanga chhuak an ni; chuvângin, anniho chu ‘unaute,’ tih a zak lo ve:" 
Hebrews2:12 “Ka unaute hnênah i hming ka lam ang a. Kohhran zîngah i fak hla ka sa ang,” a ti a." 
Hebrews2:13 “Amahah ka rinna ka nghat ang,” pawh a ti a. “En teh, kei leh Pathian mi pêk naupangte hi,” a ti bawk." 
Hebrews2:14 Naupang a tihte hi tisa leh thisen nei an ni a, ani pawh chutiang chu a lo ni ve ta a ni." 
Hebrews2:15 Tichuan, thihna chunga thuneitu Diabola chu, a thihna avângin a titlâwm a, dam chhûnga thih hlau rêng rênga awm ṭhîn, hlauhna bawiha tângte chu a chhuah ta a ni." 
Hebrews2:16 A rawn ngaihsakte hi vântirhkoh an ni lo, Abrahama thlahte an ni a rawn ngaihsakte chu." 
Hebrews2:17 Chuvâng chuan, min lainattu, Pathian tâna Puithiam lalber rinawm tak, mi zawng zawng sual thuphachawina hlântu ni tûr chu, kawng engkima a unaute anga a lo awm a ṭûl rêng a ni." 
Hebrews2:18 Amah ngei chu thlêmna tuar chhuak tawh a nih avângin thlêmna tuarte pawh a ṭanpui thei a ni. 
Hebrews3:1 Chuvâng chuan, unau thianghlim, vân kohna chang vete u, kan thurina Tirhkoh leh Puithiam lalber, Isua chu ngaihtuah rawh u." 
Hebrews3:2 Pathian chhûngkaw pum pui tân Mosia a rinawm ang bawkin ani pawh a ruattu tân a rinawm a. 
Hebrews3:3 Chhûngkaw dintu chu a chhûngte aiin an chawimawi zâwk ang hian, Isua pawh Mosia aia ropuina nasa zâwk hmu tlâk a ni." 
Hebrews3:4 Chhûngkaw tin hi tu din emaw an ni vek a; engkim dintu chu Pathian a ni. 
Hebrews3:5 Mosia chu chhiahhlawh niin Pathian chhûngkaw pum pui tân a rinawm a, Pathian thu sawi puang chhâwngtu a ni a." 
Hebrews3:6 Krista erawh chu Fapa niin Pathian chhûngkaw tân a rinawm a ni; keini hi a chhûngte chu kan ni, kan beiseina ngaihṭhatthlâk tak leh chhuanawm tak hi kan chelh tlat phawt chuan." 
Hebrews3:7 Chutichuan, Thlarau Thianghlimin heti hian a ti: “Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan Thlalêra mi fiah lai," 
Hebrews3:8 Hel lai nî ang khân In thinlung tikhauh suh u. 
Hebrews3:9 Kum sawmli chhûng in pi puten Ka thiltihte hmu chungin mi chhin a, mi fiah bawk a." 
Hebrews3:10 Chuvângin, chu chhuanho chungah chuan ka thinur ta a, An rilruin a hruai pêng a, Ka kawng pawh an hre ta lo; ka ti a." 
Hebrews3:11 Thinur taka ka tiam tâk ang khân Ka chawlhnaah an luh ka phal lo vang,” tiin." 
Hebrews3:12 Unaute u, fîmkhur rawh u, chuti lo chuan Pathian nung tlûksan tûrin tu thinlungah emaw rin lohna sual a lo lût dah ang e." 
Hebrews3:13 ‘Vawiin,’ tih a nih chhûng hian in zînga tu mah suala an tlûka, an thinlung an tihkhauh loh nân nî tin infuih tawn zâwk rawh u." 
Hebrews3:14 A tîra kan rinna kha a tâwp thlenga kan vawn tlat phawt chuan Krista ṭâwmpuitute kan ni asin. 
Hebrews3:15 ‘Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan, hel lai ni ang khân In thinlung tikhauh suh u,’ tih a ni a." 
Hebrews3:16 A nih leh tute nge hre reng chunga hel kha? Aigupta ram aṭanga Mosia hruai chhuahte kha an ni lo vem ni? 
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawmli chhûng khân tute chungah nge a lungnih loh kha? Thil sual titute, thlalêra tlu hlum tate chungah khân a ni lo vem ni?" 
Hebrews3:18 Thu awih lote chungah chauh lo chuan tu hnênah nge a chawlhnaa lût lo tûra thu a tiam le? 
Hebrews3:19 Chutichuan, an rin loh avângin an lût ve thei ta lo tih kan hria." 
Hebrews4:1 A chawlhnaa luh theihna thutiam a la din reng chhûng hian in zîngah tlai lutuk ta nia inngai in awm hlauh vang tih a hlauhawm a nia. 
Hebrews4:2 Annihovin Chanchin Ṭha an hriat ang bawkin keini pawhin kan hre ve ta a. Anni chuan rinnaa ngaithlatute an rem loh avângin an thu dawn chu an sâwtpui lo va ni. 
Hebrews4:3 Keini ringtute hi a chawlhnaa lût tate chu kan ni; Pathianin lei leh vân a siam zawh khân a hna a chawlhsan nâ a, ‘Thinur taka ka tiam tâk ang khân, Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lût lo vang,’ a la ti reng a ni." 
Hebrews4:4 Ni sarih ni thu-ah chuan, ‘Pathianin a hna thawh zawng zawng ni sarih niin a chawlhsan ta a,’ tiin khawiah emaw ziak a nih kha." 
Hebrews4:5 ‘Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lût lo vang,’ tih thu-ah hian a ṭhen lût tûr an awm tihna a ni." 
Hebrews4:6 Chanchin Ṭha hre hmasate khân an rin loh avângin an lût thei ta lo va. 
Hebrews4:7 Kan sawi tâk, ‘Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan in thinlung tikhauh suh u,’ tih hi Davida sawitîrin kum tam tak hnuah Pathian chuan ni dang, ‘vawiin’ a tih chu a rawn ruat leh ta a ni." 
Hebrews4:8 Josua khân ‘chawlhnaah’ chuan hruai lût ni se, Pathianin hun dang a ruat leh lo vang." 
Hebrews4:9 Chuvângin, Pathian mite tân chawlhna hun dang a la awm dâwn a ni." 
Hebrews4:10 Pathianin a hnathawh a chawlhsan ang bawkin Pathian tiam chawlhna changte chu an thawhrimna ata an la châwl dâwn. 
Hebrews4:11 Rin loh avânga an tlu ang khân tu mah kan tlûk ve loh nân, chu chawlhnaa lût tûr chuan theihtâwp i chhuah ṭheuh vang u." 
Hebrews4:12 Pathian thu chu a nung a, thil a ti thei a, khandaih hriam tawn eng anga hriam ai pawhin a hriam zâwk a, ruhtuah leh thlîng te, nunna leh thlarau inzawmnate a phel hrang thei a, rilrua ngaihtuah leh tumte pawh a hre nghâl thei a ni." 
Hebrews4:13 A mit hmuha lang lo thil siam rêng rêng a awm lo. Kan chanchin kan sawina tûra mit hmuhah chuan engkim hi saruak leh inhawng sa a ni vek zâwk a ni. 
Hebrews4:14 Tichuan, vânahte kal tlang tawh Puithiam lalber ropui tak, Isua, Pathian Fapa chu, kan neih avângin kan thurin hi i vuan tlat ang u." 
Hebrews4:15 Kan Puithiam lalber neih hi kan chak lohnate min hriatpui pha lo a ni lo va, keimahni ang bawka kawng tinrênga thlêmna tâwk tawh, sual si lo chu a ni." 
Hebrews4:16 Chutichuan, puih kan ngaih hun taka zahngaihna leh khawngaihna kan hmuh theihna tûrin, khawngaihna lalṭhutthlêng chu huai takin i hnaih ang u." 
Hebrews5:1 Puithiam lalberte chu mihring zîng ata thlan chhuah an ni ziah ṭhîn, mihring tân Pathian lama rawngbâwl tûra ruat an ni a, thilpêkte leh sual tâna inthawinate hlân tûra tih an ni." 
Hebrews5:2 Anni pawh chu chak lohna hual vêla awm ve bawk an nih avângin, hre lote leh bawhchhiate an dîm thiam ṭhîn." 
Hebrews5:3 Chuvângin, mi dangte tân sual thawina an hlansak ang bawkin, anmahni tân pawh an hlân ngei tûr a ni." 
Hebrews5:4 Tu man hetiang inchawimawina hi mahni an inkhumtîr ngai lo va, Arona anga Pathian kohte chauhvin an khum zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Hebrews5:5 Chutiang bawkin, Krista pawh chu mahni inchawimawiin Puithiam lalberah a insiam lo. “Nang zawng ka Fapa i ni e. Vawiin hian fapaah ka neih ta che,” titu khân a ruat zâwk a ni." 
Hebrews5:6 Hmun dangah pawh, “Nang zawng Melkisedeka puithiamna ang chi-a chatuan puithiam i ni e,” a ti bawk." 
Hebrews5:7 Ani chuan a tisa put lai nite khân thihna laka amah chhan theitu hnênah nasa taka au leh mittui tla chunga dîlin a ṭawngṭai a. Pathian a ṭih ṭhin avângin a dîlna chu ngaihthlâk a ni ta a. 
Hebrews5:8 Fapa meuh pawh ni mah sela, a thil tuarahte chuan thu awih a zir ta a." 
Hebrews5:9 Tihfamkima lo awmin, a thu awih zawng zawngte tân chatuan chhandamna bulpui a lo ni ta." 
Hebrews5:10 Tichuan, Melkisedeka puithiamna ang chî-a Puithiam lalberah Pathianin a ruat ta a ni." 
Hebrews5:11 Chu mi chungchângah chuan sawi tûr tam tak kan nei a, in la mâwl êm avângin hrilh fiah pawh a harsa a ni." 
Hebrews5:12 A hun ngaihtuah chuan zirtîrtu ni tawh hial âwm in ni na a. Pathian thu chu a bul rêt aṭanga zirtîr in ngai leh ta a ni. Chaw tak ni lovin hnutetui in la mamawh a nih hi. 
Hebrews5:13 Hnute hne laite chu nausên an la nih avângin chaw tak, felna thu chu an la ei thei lo." 
Hebrews5:14 Chaw tak erawh chu puitling tân a ni. Chûngte chuan a chhia leh a ṭha thliar thiam tûrin an rilru an sawizawi tawh a ni. 
Hebrews6:1 Chutichuan, Krista chungchânga zirtîrna thu mâwl tê tê chu sawi tawh lovin puitlin lam i pan ang u; thiltih sâwt lo bânsan thu te, Pathian rin thu te," 
Hebrews6:2 baptisma thu te, kut nghah thu te, mitthi thawhlehna thu te leh chatuan rorêl inzirtîrna thu te sawi nawn sawi nawn tawh lovin." 
Hebrews6:3 Pathianin rem a tih chuan chu chu tih kan tum a ni. 
Hebrews6:4 Tihêna awm tawh, vân thilpêk tema, Thlarau Thianghlim pawh chang ve tawh," 
Hebrews6:5 Pathian thu tuina leh khawvêl lo la awm tûr thiltihtheihna tem tawh zeta," 
Hebrews6:6 tlûksan leh tate chu sim tûra hruai kîr leh rual an ni tawh lo; anmahni ngeiin Pathian Fapa chu khêngbet nawn lehin an timualpho va ni. 
Hebrews6:7 Lo, a chunga ruahtui tla ṭhîn lo dawnga, a neitu tâna thlai ei tlâk chhuah ta chu Pathianin mal a sâwm ṭhîn." 
Hebrews6:8 Amaherawhchu, hnim leh hlîngte chauh chhuah chu mâkin a lo awm a, ânchhe dawn hmabâk a lo ni a, a tâwpah hâl a tâwk ṭhîn." 
Hebrews6:9 Duh takte u, chutiang thu chu sawi mah ila nangni zawng in dinhmun a ṭhat zâwka, chhandam in nih ngei ka ring tlat a ni." 
Hebrews6:10 In thil tih ṭhin, tûnah pawh in la tih zêl ṭhin, a hming vânga hmangaihna in lantîr te leh, mi thianghlimte rawng in bâwlsak ṭhin te hi theihnghilh mai tûrin Pathian chu mi fel lo a ni lo ve." 
Hebrews6:11 Tu pawhin in beiseina hi a thlen famkim hma chuan taihmâk in chhuah zêl ka duh êm êm a ni. 
Hebrews6:12 Dâwngdah lova ring tlat leh dawhthei taka nghâk fan fan ṭhîn, Pathian thutiam changtute anga in awm kan duh a ni." 
Hebrews6:13 Pathianin Abrahama hnêna thu a tiam lai khân, a aia ropui zâwk chhâl tûr an awm loh avângin amah leh amah inchhâlin thu a tiam a." 
Hebrews6:14 “Matheilovin mal ka sâwm ang chia, ka tipung ngei ngei ang che,” tiin." 
Hebrews6:15 Tichuan, Abrahama chuan a nghâk fan fan a, Pathian thiltiam chu a dawng ta a." 
Hebrews6:16 Mihringte chuan anmahni aia ropui zâwk chhâlin chhia an chham ṭhîn, chutiang chhechham chuan thu inchuh a titâwp a, a tinghet ṭhîn a ni." 
Hebrews6:17 Pathian pawhin a thutiam a sût loh tûrzia entîr nân thutiam dawng tûrte hnênah mahni inchhâl meuhvin a nemnghet a. 
Hebrews6:18 Sût leh mai mai loh chi hêng thil pahnih - thutiam leh mahni inchhâlna avâng hian, Pathian chu daw rual a ni lo ve. Chuvângin, keini, a hnêna tlânte hian him nân kan hmaa beiseina chu thlamuang takin kan chelh thei a ni." 
Hebrews6:19 Chu beiseina chu kan nun thîrchakaiah kan nei a, rinawm leh nghet tak a ni; Hmun Thianghlim Berah a inthlung lût a." 
Hebrews6:20 Chutah chuan kan tân, kan hmahruaitu Isua a lût tawh a, Melkisedeka puithiamna ang chi-a chatuan Puithiam lalber a ni ta." 
Hebrews7:1 Chu Melkisedeka chu Salem khaw lal a ni a, Pathian Chungnungbera puithiam a ni bawk. Ani chuan Abrahama, lalho that lo haw kha a lo hmuak a, mal a sâwm a." 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahama chuan ani chu a râllâk sum zawng zawng aṭang chuan sâwma pakhat a pe a. A hming awmzia hi ‘Felna lal’ tihna a ni phawt a. Salem lal a nih bawk avângin ‘Remna lal’ tihna a ni bawk. 
Hebrews7:3 Ani chu pa nei lo, nu nei lo, thlahtu chhui tûr awm lo, a awm ṭan ni leh a nun tâwp ni sawi tûr awm lo a ni a; Pathian Fapa ang mai a ni a, puithiam a ni reng a ni." 
Hebrews7:4 Thlahtu Abrahaman a rallâk sum zawng zawng aṭanga sâwma pakhat a pêka chu a ropuizia hi ngaihtuah teh u. 
Hebrews7:5 Puithiam hna chelhtu Levia thlahte chuan Dân thu angin an unau Israel mite, Abrahama thlah ve thote lakah sâwma pakhat lâk tûr thu an hmu a." 
Hebrews7:6 Levia thlahte zînga tel ve si lo Melkisedeka chuan, Abrahama hnên aṭangin sâwma pakhat a la a, thutiam dawngtu Abrahama chu mal a sâwm a." 
Hebrews7:7 Hnial rual lohvin a tê zâwk chu a ropui zâwkin mal an sâwm ṭhîn a ni. 
Hebrews7:8 Puithiamte thu-ah chuan, thi thei mihringten sâwma pakhat an dawng a, Melkisedeka thu-ah erawh chuan nung renga an sawi chuan sâwma pakhat chu a dawng a ni." 
Hebrews7:9 Tin, Levia, sâwma pakhat dawngtu ngei pawh khân Abrahama kutin Melkisedeka hnênah sâwma pakhat a pe tih theih a ni," 
Hebrews7:10 Melkisedekan a lo hmuah lai khân Levia chu a pu Abrahama ṭhalbea awm a ni si a. 
Hebrews7:11 Chutichuan, Levia thlahte puithiam hna nêna inthlunga Dân hi pêk a ni a; chûng avânga famkim theih ni ta sela, Arona puithiamna ang chî ni lo, Melkisedeka puithiamna ang chi-a puithiam dang awm a ngai dâwn em ni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Puithiam hna kalhmang thlâk a nih tâk si chuan Dân pawh chu thlâk a ngai rêng a ni. 
Hebrews7:13 A chanchin kan sawia hi maichâm rawngbâwlna khawih ve ngai lo hnam zînga mi a ni. 
Hebrews7:14 Kan Lalpa chu Mosian puithiam thu a sawi laia sawi tel ve ngai loh Juda hnama mi a nih chiang takin kan hria. 
Hebrews7:15 Puithiam chi dang, Melkisedeka ang chi, mihring Dân anga puithiam ni ve satliah lo," 
Hebrews7:16 tihchhiat rual loh nunna thu-a ruat a lo awm ta hian kan thu chu a tifiah lehzual a ni. 
Hebrews7:17 Lehkha Thu chuan: “Melkisedeka puithiamna ang chî-a chatuan puithiam i ni e,” a ti a." 
Hebrews7:18 Thupêk hmasa chu a chak lo va, a hman tlâk loh avângin hnâwl a ni ta a." 
Hebrews7:19 Dân chuan eng mah a tipuitling thei si lo. Beiseina ṭha zâwk, Pathian min hnaihtîrtu chuan a rawn thlâk ta a ni." 
Hebrews7:20 Hming chhâl meuhva a rawn thlâk a ni, puithiam dangte chu chutianga ruat an ni ve si lo." 
Hebrews7:21 Ani erawh hi chu hming chhâl meuhva ruat a ni, a ruattu chuan a hnênah: “Lalpan hming a chhâl, A lamlêt tawh lo vang, Nang zawng chatuan atân puithiam i ni e,” a tih kha." 
Hebrews7:22 Tichuan, chu thuthlung, Isua ngeiin a nemngheh chu a va ropui êm!" 
Hebrews7:23 Danglamna a la awm: Thihna avângin an puithiamna hna an chhunzawm kumkhua thei lo va; chuvângin, mi tam tak puithiamah siam an ni." 
Hebrews7:24 Ani erawh hi chu a nun reng avângin a puithiamna chu thlâk theih lohvin a nghet ta a ni. 
Hebrews7:25 Tichuan, Amaha Pathian hnêna kalte chu eng ang pawh a chhandam thei reng a, an tân Pathian hnêna ngensak tûrin a nung reng si a." 
Hebrews7:26 Chutiang chî Puithiam lalber chuan kan mamawh a phuhrûk zo êm êm a ni; a thianghlim a, pawi a sawi lo va, a hmêlhem lo va, mi sualte lakah a fihlîm a, vân aia sângah tûnah chawimawi a ni ta." 
Hebrews7:27 Puithiam lalberte chuan nî tin mahni sual tân inthawina an hlân ṭhîn a, chumi zawhah mipuite sual tân an hlân ve leh ṭhîn a; ani erawh hi chuan chutianga ti ve lovin mahni a inhlân a, mi zawng zawng tân inthawina chu ṭum khatah, kumkhua atân a hlân tlingtla ta a ni." 
Hebrews7:28 Dân chuan Puithiam lalber ni tûrin mihring chak lo tê tê a ruat ṭhîn a. Dân awm hnu daiha hming chhâla thutiam chuan Fapa, chatuan atân tihfamkim tawha chu, Puithiam lalberah a rawn ruat ta a ni." 
Hebrews8:1 Tichuan, kan thu sawi tum ber chu: chutiang Puithiam lalber chu kan nei ta tih hi a ni. Vânahte khian Ropuibera lalṭhutthlêng ding lamah a han ṭhu a." 
Hebrews8:2 Hmun Thianghlim leh biakbûk tak tak, mihring sak ni lo, Lalpa sak zâwkah chuan rawng a han bâwl ta a ni." 
Hebrews8:3 Puithiam lalber te chu thilpêkte leh inthawinate hlân tûra ruat an ni a. Chuvângin, ani pawh hian eng emaw tal hlan tûr a neih a ngai a ni." 
Hebrews8:4 Leiah hian la awm reng sela, puithiam hna rêng a thawk lo vang, Dân anga thilpêk hlântu tûrte an awm reng si a." 
Hebrews8:5 Mosian biakbûk a sak dâwn laiin Pathianin a sak dân tûr a hrilh a, “Tlânga a lem ka entîr ang chiah che khân engkim i siam tûr a ni tih hre reng rawh,” a tih ang khân hêngho rawngbâwlna hi vân thil lem leh hlimthla mai a ni." 
Hebrews8:6 Tûna ani rawngbâwlna neih tâk hi zawng, thutiam ropui zâwkah a innghat a, thuthlung ṭha lehzual a rawn thlen ang bawk hian, an rawngbâwlna ai chuan a ropui zâwk êm êm a ni." 
Hebrews8:7 Thuthlung hmasa kha sawisêlbo ni ta sela, thlun nawn a ngai lo tûr." 
Hebrews8:8 Anmahni demin hetiang hian a sawi a nih zâwk kha: “Ngai teh u, nite a lo thleng dâwn,” Lalpan a ti. “Israel chhûngte leh Juda chhûngte chu Thuthlung thar ka siampui ang." 
Hebrews8:9 An pi pute Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah laia, An kutte ka chelh nia, An hnêna ka thlun ang kha ni lovin, Ka thuthlungah chuan an awm reng loh avângin Anmahni ka ngaihsak ta lo va ni,” Lalpan a ti." 
Hebrews8:10 “Chûng nîa Israel chhûngte hnêna thu ka thlun tûr chu hei hi a ni: An rilruah ka Dânte ka dah ang a. An thinlungah ka ziak bawk ang, An Pathian ka ni ang a, ka mite an ni bawk ang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Hebrews8:11 “Tu mahin ‘Lalpa chu hre rawh u,’ tiin, Mahni khuate leh unaute an inzirtîr tawh lo vang. A tê ber aṭangin a lian ber thlengin An za-in mi hre vek tawh dâwn a ni." 
Hebrews8:12 An bawhchhiatnaahte zah ka ngai ang a, An sualte pawh ka hre reng tawh lo vang,” tiin." 
Hebrews8:13 Thuthlung thar a sawi tâk avângin thuthlung hmasa chu a tihlui ta a, lo upaa hlui ta chu a bo thuai dâwn a ni." 
Hebrews9:1 Thuthlung hmasaah pawh khân rawngbâwl dân tûr leh rawngbâwlna tûr Hmun Thianghlim, leia mi chu ruat a ni a." 
Hebrews9:2 Biakbûk an sa a, a tawntirhah chuan khâwnvâr dahna te, dawhkân, chhangdah awmna te a awm a, chu chu Hmun Thianghlim an ti a." 
Hebrews9:3 Puanzâr pahnihna chhûngah chuan biakbûk Hmun Thianghlim Ber an tih chu a awm a. 
Hebrews9:4 Chutah chuan rimtui hâlna rangkachak maichâm te, Thuthlung Bâwm rangkachak tia luan te a awm a. Thuthlung Bâwm chhûngah chuan mana dahna rangkachak bêl te, Arona tiang chawr te, thuthlung ziakna lung phêk te a awm a." 
Hebrews9:5 A chungah chuan ropuina cherub-te an awm a, sual thuphachawina hmun chungah chuan an thla an zâr a. Chûng thute zawng tûnah a kip a kawiin kan sawi hman lo vang." 
Hebrews9:6 Chutianga rem chu a ni a, puithiamte chu biak bûk tawntirhah chuan an puithiam rawngbâwl hna thawkin nî tin an lût ṭhîn a." 
Hebrews9:7 A dawttuah erawh chuan Puithiam lalber chauh, kum khatah vawi khat, thisen keng ngeiin a lût ṭhîn, chu chu ama tân leh mipuiten hre lova an tihsual thawi nân a hlân ṭhîn a ni." 
Hebrews9:8 Hêng thil rem dân aṭang hian biakbûk tawntirh hi a la awm chhûng chu, Hmun Thianghlim Bera luhna kawng chu a la inhawng rih lo va ni tih Thlarau Thianghlim chuan min kawhhmuh a ni." 
Hebrews9:9 Hêngte hi tûn hun entîrna a ni: hêng dân anga thil hlante leh inthawina hlante hian a hlântu mipuite thinlung chu a tifamkim thei lo; 
Hebrews9:10 chûng chu ei leh in, insil dân hrang hrang, tisa lam thil mai mai a ni a, Siamṭhatna hun thlen hmaa hman tûra tih chauh a ni." 
Hebrews9:11 Krista erawh chu thil ṭha tûna lo thleng taahte Puithiam lalber a ni ta a, a rawngbâwlna biakbûk pawh chu, mihring sak a ni lo va, he khawvêla thilsiam ang pawh hi a nih loh avângin a ropuiin a famkim zâwk a ni." 
Hebrews9:12 A thisen hlan pawh chu kêlpa leh bâwngtuaite thisen ni lovin, ama thisen ngei a ni a, Hmun Thianghlimah chuan vawi khat lûtin chatuan atâna tlanna a siam ta." 
Hebrews9:13 Kêlpate leh bâwngpate thisen leh bâwngla vâp, mi bawlhhlawhte chunga theh mahin, an tisa thiang khawpa anmahni a tihthianghlim theih si chuan," 
Hebrews9:14 Krista thisen chuan a va tithianghlim zo dâwn êm! Ani chu chatuan thlarau zârah thilhlan hmêlhem lo atân Pathian hnênah amah a inhlân a, a thisen chuan Pathian rawng bâwl tûrin thiltih sâwt lo lakah kan chhia leh ṭha hriatna a tithianghlim ta." 
Hebrews9:15 Hemi avâng hian Krista chu thuthlung thar palai a ni; thuthlung hmasa bawhchhiatnate laka mite a tlan chhuah theihna tûra a lo thih tâk avângin, kohte chuan chatuan roluah tûr tiam chu an chang ta a ni." 
Hebrews9:16 Thurochhiah pawh hi a chhiahtu a thi tawh nge la thi lo fiah hmasak a ṭûl ṭhîn; 
Hebrews9:17 a chhiahtu a la dam chhûng chuan hman theih a la ni rih lo va, a thih hnu chauhva hman tûr a ni." 
Hebrews9:18 Chuvângin, thuthlung hmasa pawh kha thisena tihngheh a nih kha." 
Hebrews9:19 Dân thu-a thupêk tinrêng Mosian mipuite a hrilh lai khân, bâwngpatuai thisen chu tui nên, sâpsen nên, husop nên a la a, lehkhabu zial leh mipui zawng zawng chu a theh a." 
Hebrews9:20 “Hei hi in zawm tûr Pathianin in hnêna a pêk thuthlung tihnghehna thisen a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Hebrews9:21 Tin, biakbûk leh rawngbâwlna hmanrua zawng zawng pawh chutiang bawkin thisen chuan a theh a." 
Hebrews9:22 Dân thu ang chuan engkim deuhthaw mai hi thisena tihthianghlim tûr a ni a, thisen chhuah lovin ngaihdamna a awm thei si lo." 
Hebrews9:23 Chutichuan, vân thil anpuite mah chutianga tihthianghlim chu a ṭûl a, vân thil tak takte phei chu chûng aia inthawina ṭha zâwka tihthianghlim a ṭûl ngei tûr a ni." 
Hebrews9:24 Kuta sak hmun tihthianghlim, a tak anpuiah chuan Krista chu a lût a ni lo ve, vânah khian a han lût zâwk a, tûnah kan aiawhin Pathian hmaah a han ding ta a ni." 
Hebrews9:25 Puithiam lalber chu mahni thisen ni lo, ran thisen kenga kum tin Hmun Thianghlima a lût ṭhîn ang hian ani chu mahni inhlân nawn fo tûrin a lût ve hek lo." 
Hebrews9:26 Chuti ni suh sela leilung pian tirh aṭang khân vawi tam tak a tuar tûr a ni. Nimahsela, tûn hun tâwpah hian sual tihreh nân amah inhlân tûrin vawi khat a lo lang ta a ni." 
Hebrews9:27 Mihring tân vawi khat thih ruat a ni, chumi hnuah rorêlna a awm ang." 
Hebrews9:28 Chutiang bawkin Krista pawh chu mi tam tak sualte la bo tûrin ṭum khat hlan a ni tawh a. Sualte la bo tûr ni tawh lovin, amah lo nghâktute chhandamnaa hruai lût tûrin a lo kal leh dâwn a ni." 
Hebrews10:1 Dân chuan thil ṭha lo awm tûrte hlimthla, a tak ni lo, a lem chauh a ken avângin, kum tina inthawina pângngai an hlan fote chuan a hlântute chu engtin mah a tifamkim thei lo va ni." 
Hebrews10:2 Tifamkim thei sela, inthawina hlântute hi tihthianghlim an nih tawha, suala inhriatna an neih tawh si loh chuan inthawina hlan an bânsan daih tawh dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Hebrews10:3 Chutih ahnêkin he inthawina hian an sual tih kum tin a hriat nawntîr ṭhîn a ni. 
Hebrews10:4 Kêlpa leh bâwngpate thisen chuan sualte tibo thei rual a ni lo. 
Hebrews10:5 Chuvângin, khawvêla a lo luh lai khân heti hian a ti: Inthawina leh thilhlan i duh lo va, Ka tân taksa mi buatsaihsak zâwk a." 
Hebrews10:6 Pum hâl inthawina leh sual tâna inthawina I lâwm hek lo. 
Hebrews10:7 Chu veleh, keiin, “Aw Pathian, ngai teh, lehkhabu ziala ka chanchin an ziak ang khân I duhzâwng ti tûrin ka lo kal e,” ka ti a." 
Hebrews10:8 A hmasaa, ‘Inthawina te, thilhlan te, pum hâl inthawina leh sual tâna inthawinate i duh lo va, i lâwm hek lo,’ tih hi Dân thupêk ang taka inthawina hlan ṭhin kha a ni." 
Hebrews10:9 “Chu veleh, ngai teh, i duhzâwng ti tûrin ka lo kal e,” a tih leh tâk hi, inthawinain a rawn thlâk ta tihna a ni." 
Hebrews10:10 Isua Krista chuan Pathian duhzâwng anga, kumkhua atân ṭum khat a taksa a hlan avângin tihthianghlim kan ni ta a ni." 
Hebrews10:11 Puithiamte chuan dingin kâwla ni chhuak chhiara rawngbâwlin inthawina pângngai an hlân fo va; mahse, chûng inthawina chuan engtin mah sual a tibo thei si lo." 
Hebrews10:12 Ani erawh hi chu, chatuan atân sual thawina vawi khat a hlan hnuin, Pathian ding lamah a han ṭhu ta a." 
Hebrews10:13 A hmêlmate a ke nghahchhana siam an nih hun chu a nghâk ta a ni. 
Hebrews10:14 Vawi khat a inhlanna khân a tihthianghlimte chu chatuan atân a tifamkim ta a ni. 
Hebrews10:15 Thlarau Thianghlim pawhin heti hian min hriattîr: 
Hebrews10:16 “Chûng nia an hnêna ka thuthlun tûr chu hei hi a ni,” Lalpan a ti: “An thinlungah ka Dânte ka dah ang a, An rilruah ka ziak bawk ang,” tia a sawi hnu khân," 
Hebrews10:17 “An sualte leh an bawhchhiatnate ka hre reng tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Hebrews10:18 Tichuan, sualte ngaihdam a nih tawh si chuan sual tâna thil hlan a ngai tawh lo." 
Hebrews10:19 Tichuan, unaute u, Isua thisen zârah Hmun Thianghlim Bera luhna kawng thar leh nung," 
Hebrews10:20 daidanna puanzâr kal tlangna kawng chu min hawnsak ta a, chu puanzâr chu a taksa kha a ni." 
Hebrews10:21 Tichuan, Pathian chhûngte tân Puithiam Ropui tak kan neih avângin" 
Hebrews10:22 sual inthiam lohna rilru sil faisaka awma, kan taksa pawh tuifîma bual faiin, thinlung tak leh rinna nghet tak nên Pathian chu i hnaih ang u." 
Hebrews10:23 Beiseina thurin kan pawm hi nghîng lovin i chelh tlat ang u. A tiamtu chu a rinawm si a. 
Hebrews10:24 Hmangaihna ngah tûr leh thil ṭha ti tûra inchawhthawh dân i ngaihtuah ang u. 
Hebrews10:25 Ṭhenkhatin inkhâwm thlahthlam an chîng angin chîng ve lo ila, i infuih zâwk ang u; ni chu a lo hnai ta tih in hriat avângin i uar lehzual ang u." 
Hebrews10:26 Thutak hriatna kan neih tawh hnu pawha kan sual luih zêl si chuan, sualte la bo thei inthawina a awm tawh dâwn lo va;" 
Hebrews10:27 rorêlna leh amah dodâltute tiboral tûr Pathian thinurna mei, thlaphâng taka nghah ngawt loh chu hmabâk dang kan nei lo." 
Hebrews10:28 Mosia Dân pawisa lotute chu thuhretu pahnih pathum thuin khawngaihna tel miah lova tihhlum an ni ṭhîn. 
Hebrews10:29 Pathian Fapa rap beta, thuthlung thisen, amah tihthianghlimna chu thil narâna ruata, khawngaihna Thlarau sawichhetu chu nasa lehzuala hrem tûrah in ngai lo vem ni?" 
Hebrews10:30 “Phuba rêng rêng keima lâk tûr a ni, keimân ka thungrûl ang,” tih leh “Lalpan a mite a ngaihtuah ang,” titu hi kan hre si a." 
Hebrews10:31 Pathian nung kut tuar chu râpthlâk tak a ni. 
Hebrews10:32 Hmâna tihêna in awm hnua hrehawm nasa tak in tuar lai nite kha hre reng rawh u. 
Hebrews10:33 A chângin vântlâng ennawm atân hmuhsit leh tihduhdah in tuar a, a châng phei chuan chutiang tuarte tuarna chu in ṭâwmpui ve a." 
Hebrews10:34 Kawlbunte chu in lainat a, in thil neih an lâksak che u pawhin lâwm takin in tuar a; thil ṭha zâwk, awm hlen tûr chu in nei tih in hriat avângin." 
Hebrews10:35 Chutichuan, in huaina kha hloh suh u, lâwmman ropui tak a nei dâwn a ni." 
Hebrews10:36 Pathian duhzâwng ti tûr leh a thiltiam dawng tûr chuan in chhel a ngai a ni. 
Hebrews10:37 Rei lo tê-ah lo kal tûra chu a lo kal dâwn, a muang lo vang." 
Hebrews10:38 Rin vânga thiam ka chantîr chu a nung ang, a hnungtawlh erawh chuan ka rilruin amahah lâwmna rêng a nei lo vang." 
Hebrews10:39 Keini zawng boral tûra tawlh kîr thei kan ni tawh lo va, nunna hum tûra rinna chelh tlattute kan ni zâwk e." 
Hebrews11:1 Rinna hi kan beiseite hriat chianna, thil kan hmuh lohte hriatfiahna a ni." 
Hebrews11:2 Rinna thu-ah hian upate kha an fakawm a ni. 
Hebrews11:3 Khawvêl hi Pathian thu-a siam a nih leh, lang lo aṭangin hmuh theihte hi a lo awm ta tih rinnain kan hmu a ni." 
Hebrews11:4 Abela chuan rinnain Kaina inthawina hlan aia hlu Pathian hnênah a hlân a, a thilhlan chu a lo pawm a, Pathian hmuha mi dik nih a hlawh ta a. Thi tawh mah se rinna avângin thu a la sawi ta zêl a ni." 
Hebrews11:5 Enoka chu rinna avângin thihna tem lova lâk bo a ni a. Pathianin a lâk bo avângin hmuh tûr a awm ta lo. Lâk bo a nih hma khân Pathian a tilâwm tih Lehkha Thu-in a sawi. 
Hebrews11:6 Rinna lo chuan Pathian tihlâwm rual a ni lo. Tu pawh Pathian hnêna lo kal chuan Pathian chu a awm ngei a, amah zawngtute tihlawhtlingtu a ni tih an ring tûr a ni." 
Hebrews11:7 Nova chuan thil lo thleng tûr chungchânga hrilhlâwkna a dawn chu a ngai pawimawh êm êm a, rinnain an chhûngkaw him nân lawng a tu a. Chu chuan khawvêl thiam loh a chantîr a, rinna avânga thiam chantîr a lo ni ta." 
Hebrews11:8 Abrahama chuan a rochun tûr rama kal tûra Pathian kohna chu rinnain a zâwm a, a kalna lam tûr pawh hre lovin a thawk chhuak a." 
Hebrews11:9 Ram tiamah chuan, mi rama châm ang maiin, rinnain a châm ta reng a, thutiam thuhmun a dawnpui tûr, Isaka leh Jakoba nên, puan inah an khawsa a." 
Hebrews11:10 Pathian ruahman leh din, lungphûm nghet tak nei khawpui chu Abrahama hian a nghâk ta reng a." 
Hebrews11:11 Sari ngei pawh a ching a, upa lutuk tawh mah se Abrahama chuan rinnain chi thlah theihna a dawng a, thutiam chu a ring tlat a." 
Hebrews11:12 Tichuan, thi ang mai ni tawh mah se he mi pakhat aṭang hian chi thlah, vâna arsi anga tam, tuifinriat kama ṭiau chhiar sên loh zât an lo chhuak ta a ni." 
Hebrews11:13 Hêngho hi rinna neiin an thi a, thil tiam chu an chang rih lo na a, hla tak aṭangin an lo hmu phâk a, an hlut êm êm a. Leiah hian mikhual leh zin châm mai an ni tih an inhria." 
Hebrews11:14 Chutiang mai an nih hriate chuan mahni ram hlun tûr chu an zawng zâwk tih an tilang. 
Hebrews11:15 An chhuahsan ram kha lungkham ni se kîr lehna hun remchâng an hmu thei ngei ang. 
Hebrews11:16 Ram ṭha lehzual, vâna awm chu an ngai zâwk a ni. Tichuan, Pathian pawhin an Pathian nih a zak lo va, an tân khua lam a lo buatsaih tawh a ni." 
Hebrews11:17 Abrahama chuan, fiaha a awm lai khân a fapa neih chhun Isaka chu rinnain inthawi nân a hlân a." 
Hebrews11:18 Thutiam dawngtu a ni a, “Isaka-ah hian i thlahte chhui an ni ang,” tih ni mah se," 
Hebrews11:19 Pathian chuan mitthi pawh a kai tho thei ang tih ringin a hlân ta a, thi hnu dam leh ang maiin a hmu kîr leh ta ngei rêng a." 
Hebrews11:20 Rinnain Isaka chuan thil lo la awm tûrahte Jakoba leh Esauva mal a sâwm a. 
Hebrews11:21 Jakoba chuan a thih hma khân Josefa fapate chu rinnain mal a sâwm ve ve a, a tiang rinchhana kûnin Pathian chibai a bûk a." 
Hebrews11:22 Josefa chuan a thih a lo hnaih khân Aigupta ram ata Israel thlahte an lo chhuah tûr thu sawiin, rinnain a ruang phûm dân tûr a hrilh a." 
Hebrews11:23 Mosia a pian khân nau hmêlṭha tak a ni tih an hmuhin, a nu leh pain thla thum chhûng rinnain an thukru a, lal thupêk pawh an hlau lo." 
Hebrews11:24 Mosia chuan, a lo puitlin hnu khân, Farawa fanua fapaa vuah a duh lo va," 
Hebrews11:25 rei lo te atâna sual nawmna chen ai chuan, Pathian mite nêna tihduhdahna tuar rinnain a thlang ta zâwk a." 
Hebrews11:26 Aigupta ram hausakna zawng zawng ai chuan Krista an hmusitna chu ro hlu zâwkah a ngai a, lâwmman a dawn tûr chu a thlîr tlat a:" 
Hebrews11:27 Lal thinur pawh hlau lovin Aigupta ram chu rinnain a chhuahsan a, Hmuhtheihlohva chu a hmuh avângin chhel takin a tuar a." 
Hebrews11:28 Rinnain Kalhlên Kût a din a, Tiboraltua khân an fa tîrte a khawih loh nân kawngka biangah thisen a thehtîr a." 
Hebrews11:29 Rinnain Tuipui Senah khân leichâra kal ang maiin an kal kai a. Aigupta miten kai ve an tum khân an tla hlum ta vek si a. 
Hebrews11:30 Rinnain Jeriko kulh chu ni sarih an hual a, a chim ta a." 
Hebrews11:31 Nawhchizuar Rahabi chuan rinnain enthlatute kha lâwm takin a lo thleng a, ring lotute zîngah a boral ve ta lo." 
Hebrews11:32 Ka la sawi zêl dâwn em ni? Gideona te, Baraka te, Samsona te, Jeftha te, Davida te, Samuela te leh zâwlneite chanchin sawi dâwn ila hunin mi daih dâwn si lo." 
Hebrews11:33 Chûngte chuan rinnain ram te an la a, thil dik an ti a, thiltiam te an dawng. Sakeibaknei khâ te an tihchihsak a," 
Hebrews11:34 meialh hluah hluahte an timit a, khandaiha thah an pumpelh a, chak lo tê ni mah se tihchak an ni a, indonaah chak tak an ni a, hmêlma kulh an tichim a." 
Hebrews11:35 Hmeichhiaten an chhûngte thi lo nung leh an lo lâwm a, a ṭhenin tihduhdah an tuar a, thawhlehna nun hlun an neih theih nân chhan chhuah pawh an duh lo." 
Hebrews11:36 Ṭhenkhatin tihnawmnah leh vuak an tuar a, a ṭhen khaidiata hlina tân ina khung an ni a." 
Hebrews11:37 Ṭhenkhat lunga den an ni a, ṭhenkhat thingzainaa zai bun an ni a, a ṭhen berâm leh kêl vun sinin an vâkvai a, tihduhdahin rethei takin hrehawm an tuar a." 
Hebrews11:38 Chûng mite tân chuan khawvêl hi awmna tlâk a ni lo, thlalêrah te, tlângah te, pûkah te, khuarkhurumah te an vâk an vâk ṭhîn." 
Hebrews11:39 Chûng zawng zawng chuan an rinna avângin fak lo hlawh tawh mah se, thil tiam chu an chang lo va." 
Hebrews11:40 Pathian chuan kan tân thil ṭha lehzual a lo buatsaih tawh a, keini leh anni a ruala tihfamkima kan awm theihna tûrin a lo rêl a ni." 
Hebrews12:1 Chutichuan, chhûmpui nasa tak ang thlîrtuten min hual vêl avângin, min tihnawk thei apiang leh sual min tibuai ṭhînte chu hlîpin, kan hmaa intlânsiaknaah hian chhel takin i tlân zêl ang u." 
Hebrews12:2 Isua, kan rinna innghahna bul leh tifamkimtu chu i en tlat ang u. Ani pawhin a hmaa lâwmman awm avâng chuan, mualphona chu ngainêpin krawsah chhel takin a tuar a, Pathian lalṭhutthlêng ding lamah chuan a han ṭhu ta a ni." 
Hebrews12:3 Chutianga mi sualten an dodâlna zawng zawng a tuar chhuah dânte kha ngaihtuah ula; tichuan, in beidawng lo vang a, in chau dâwn lo nia." 
Hebrews12:4 Sual dovin thisen chhuak khawpin in la ṭang lo ve. 
Hebrews12:5 Fate anga zilhna che u thu kha in theihnghilh ta em ni? “Ka fa, Lalpa thununna chu ngainêp suh la, A zilhhauva i awmin hnual hek suh." 
Hebrews12:6 Lalpa chuan a hmangaih chu a thunun ṭhîn a, Fa a lawm apiang chu a vaw ṭhîn,” tih a nih kha." 
Hebrews12:7 Thununna chu tuar hrâm hrâm rawh u, fate chunga tih angin Pathianin in chungah a ti a nih hi. Pa thunun loh fa tu nge awm ngai le?" 
Hebrews12:8 Faten an hlawh ṭhin Pa thununna chu in hlawh ve loh chuan, fa tak ni lovin sâwn in ni ang asin." 
Hebrews12:9 Min thununtu pa kan nei ṭheuh va, kan zah êm êm si a. Kan nunna tûrin thlarau lama Pa thununna hnuaiah kan kûn lehzual tûr a ni dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Hebrews12:10 Kan paten ṭha an tih angin rei lo tê chu min thunun ṭhîn ngei tak a, ani erawh chuan a thianghlimna kan chan ve theih nân, kan ṭhatna tûrin min thunun zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Hebrews12:11 Thununna rêng rêng hi tuar lai chuan thil lâwmawmah a ngaih theih loh va, hrehawm tak a ni; mahse, insawizawi hnuah chuan rah thlamuanawm tak a chhuah a, mi a siam ṭha ṭhîn." 
Hebrews12:12 Chutichuan, in kut awm mai maite hna thawhtîr ula, in khûp zâwi tawhte chu tichak leh ula," 
Hebrews12:13 kebai sa chu pelhsawlh lova a dam zâwk theih nân in kawngte timâm rawh u. 
Hebrews12:14 Mi zawng zawng nêna inremna leh thianghlimna ûm rawh u; chumi tel lo chuan tû man Lalpa an hmu thei lo vang. 
Hebrews12:15 Pathian khawngaihna tû man an tlûksan loh nân te, in zîngah mi tibuai leh tibawlhhlawh thei rilru chhia a lo chhuah loh nân te fîmkhur ula;" 
Hebrews12:16 inngaih chîng te, Esauva anga mi puithu lote tu mah in awm loh nân fîmkhur bawk rawh u. Esauva chuan a fa tîr nihna chu chaw vawi khat eiah a hralh kha." 
Hebrews12:17 Chumi hnu chuan a malsâwmna dawn tûr chu a duh leh pawhin hnâwlin a awm ta a, mittui nên ngên mah se tihdanglamna hun a awm tawh lo tih in hriat kha." 
Hebrews12:18 In tlâng thlen hi Sinai tlâng ang a ni lo ve; Sinai tlâng zawng khawih theih a ni a, chu tlâng chu meialh chhuahna, thim chhah mupin a khuh, thlipui tlehna," 
Hebrews12:19 tawtawrâwt rîk ruai ruaina, au thâwm nasa tak awmna a ni. Chu aw hriate chuan thu dang sawi zêl lo tûrin an ngên a." 
Hebrews12:20 “Sa pawhin tlâng chu a khawih chuan lunga den hlum tûr a ni,” tih thupêk chu an zo lo va." 
Hebrews12:21 A hlauhawm êm avângin Mosia pawhin “Hlauvin ka khûr,” a tih hial kha." 
Hebrews12:22 Tûnah zawng Zion tlâng Pathian nung khawpui, vân Jerusalem-ah, vântirhkoh sâng tam tak te," 
Hebrews12:23 fa tîr kohhran, vâna hming chuang te, mi tin rorêlsaktu Pathian leh tihfamkim tawh mi fel thlarau te inkhâwmpuina hmaah in ding ta a," 
Hebrews12:24 Abela thisen aia ṭha zâwka thu sawi thei thisen thehtu Isua, thuthlung thar palai hnên in lo thleng ta a nih hi." 
Hebrews12:25 Thu rawn sawitu hi in lo hnar hlauh dah ang e, fîmkhur rawh u. Leia an hnêna thu sawitu lo hnarte mah khân hrem an pumpelh si loh chuan, vân aṭanga thu rawn sawitu kan lo hawisan hlauh chuan hrem kan pumpelh lo lehzual ang." 
Hebrews12:26 Chutih lai chuan a aw khân lei a nghawr nghîng a, tûnah zawng, “Vawi khat chu lei mai ni lovin, vân pawh ka tinghîng leh dâwn,” tiin a tiam a ni." 
Hebrews12:27 “Vawi khat chu” tih hi thilsiamte chu tihnghîna sawn bo an ni ang a, tihnghîn theih lohte chauh an awm reng dâwn tihna a ni." 
Hebrews12:28 Tichuan, ram tihnghîn theih rual loh kan chan avângin i lâwm ang u, zah tak leh ṭih tak chungin a lâwm zâwngin Pathian rawng i bâwl ang u." 
Hebrews12:29 Kan Pathian hi mi kâng ral thei mei a ni si a. 
Hebrews13:1 Unau inhmangaihna hi uar zêl rawh u. 
Hebrews13:2 Mikhual chungah ṭhat chuh ula, chutiang tiin ṭhenkhatten hre lovin vântirhkohte an thleng asin." 
Hebrews13:3 Lung in tângte chu tâng ve angin hre reng ula, hrehawm tuarte pawh tisaa awm ve bawk in nih avângin hre reng rawh u." 
Hebrews13:4 Inneih hi mi zawng zawngin chawimawi tûr a ni a, nupa chu rinawm tawn rawh se. Inngaite leh uirete chu Pathianin a ngaihtuah dâwn si a." 
Hebrews13:5 Sum ngaina mi ni lo ula, in thil neih tâwkah lungawi rawh u. Amah ngeiin, “Engtikah mah ka thlahthlam lo vang che a, kal pawh ka kalsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti si a." 
Hebrews13:6 Chuvângin, “Lalpa chu mi ṭanpuitu a ni a, ka hlau lo vang, Mihringin eng nge min tih theih ang?” kan ti ngam a ni." 
Hebrews13:7 In hotute, Pathian thu lo hrilhtu che u chu hre reng ula, an lo khawsak dân ngun taka ngaihtuahin an rin dân zir rawh u." 
Hebrews13:8 Isua Krista chu niminah nên, vawiinah nên, kumkhua pawhin a pângngai reng a ni." 
Hebrews13:9 Zirtîrna chi dang dang leh mak tak tak hruai bovin awm suh ula, Pathian khawngaihna, chhûng lam nun min tichak theitu dawn hi, ei leh in dân kawnga khermei ai chuan a ṭha zâwk a, chutianga khermeite chuan an sâwtpui chuang si lo." 
Hebrews13:10 Tempula rawngbâwltuten keini maichâmah chuan an ei ve a thiang lo. 
Hebrews13:11 Puithiam lalberin ran thisen chu sual thawi nâna hlan tûrin Hmun Thianghlim Berah a luhpui a; mahse, ran ruangte chu kulh pâwnah an hâl ṭhîn." 
Hebrews13:12 Chuvângin, Isua pawhin, ama thisen ngeia mite a tihthianghlim theih nân khawpui pâwnah a lo tuar ta a ni." 
Hebrews13:13 Chutichuan, amah an hmuhsitna chu phurin, a hnênah kulh pâwnah i kal chhuak ang u." 
Hebrews13:14 Leiah hian kan tân khaw hlun a awm lo va, khaw lo la awm tûr kan zawng zâwk a ni." 
Hebrews13:15 Chutichuan, ama zâra fakna inthawina chu Pathian hnênah i hlân fo vang u, a hming kan ṭan apiangin fakna inthawina chu kan hlân ṭhîn a ni si a." 
Hebrews13:16 Nimahsela, thil ṭha tih leh inṭanpui tawn hi theihnghilh suh u, chu chu Pathian lâwmzâwng inthawina chu a ni." 
Hebrews13:17 In hotute thu awih ula, an thu thuin awm rawh u. Mutmu pawh tuah thei lovin in thlarau nun an vênsak che u a, Pathian hnêna in chungchâng sawitu tûr an ni. An thu in awih chuan hlim takin an thawk ang a, in awih loh chuan hrehawm ti takin an thawk ang, chu chu in tân a sâwt hek lo vang," 
Hebrews13:18 Mi ṭawngṭaisak fo rawh u; eng lai pawhin thil ṭha tih kan duh avângin chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang tak kan nei tih kan inhria. 
Hebrews13:19 In hnênah Pathianin mi tirh kîr leh thuai theih nân min ṭawngṭaisak tûrin ka ngên chiam a che u. 
Hebrews13:20 Berâmpu ropui, kan Lalpa Isua chu mitthi zîng ata hruai chhuaktu remna Pathian chuan, chatuan thuthlunna thisen avâng chuan" 
Hebrews13:21 a duhzâwng ti thei tûrin thil ṭha tinrêngin thuam famkim che u sela, Isua Krista zârah a lâwmzâwng ang taka awm tûrin min siam sela, Krista hnênah chuan chatuanin ropuina awm rawh se. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Unaute u, he fuihna thu hi ngai thei hrâm hrâm tûrin ka ngên a che u, ka lehkhathawn che u hi tawi tê chauh a nih hi." 
Hebrews13:23 Kan unaupa Timothea kha lung in ata an chhuah ta tih lo hre rawh u, a lo thlen hman chuan ka rualin ka rawn hruai ang." 
Hebrews13:24 In hotu zawng zawng leh mi thianghlim zawng zawng kha chibai mi bûksak ang che u. Itali rama mite hian chibai an bûk a che u. 
Hebrews13:25 In zaa hnênah khawngaihna awm rawh se. 
James1:1 Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista bawih Jakoba hian, hnam sâwm leh hnam hnih khawvêla pêm darhte chu chibai ka bûk e." 
James1:2 Ka unaute u, fiahna tinrêng in tawh hunin thil lâwmawmah ngai vek rawh u." 
James1:3 In rinna fiaha a awm hian tuarchhel in zir a ni tih in hre si a. 
James1:4 Chhel taka tuarna hian, tlin lohna laite siam ṭhain mi a tipuitling a, a tifamkim ṭhîn." 
James1:5 In zîngah tu pawhin finna a tlâkchham chuan, mi zawng zawng hnêna hau lova phal taka pe ṭhîntu Pathian chu dîl rawh se, pêk a ni ang." 
James1:6 Amaherawhchu, rinna neiin, ringhlel hauh lovin dîl rawh se; ringhleltu chu thliin tuifinriat a chhêma a tihfâwn ang hi a ni si a." 
James1:7 Chutiang mi rilru mumal lo, a thiltih eng maha nghet lo chuan Lalpa hnên ata eng mah hmuh inring suh se." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Unau rethei tak chu chawisâna a awmin lâwm sela," 
James1:10 hausa pawh tihtlâwma a awmin lâwm bawk rawh se, hnim pâr angin a hausakna chu a ral mai dâwn si a." 
James1:11 Ni a lo chhuak a, thli lum a lo tlehin hnim chu a tivuai a, a pâr chu a tla a, a mawina a lo chuai ṭhîn. Chutiangin mi hausa pawh a sum buaipui chungin a boral dâwn a ni." 
James1:12 Fiahna tâwka ding nghet tlat chu a nihlawh e, fiaha a awm hnuin Lalpan amah hmangaihtute pêk a tiam, chawimawina lukhum, nunna chu, a chang dâwn si a." 
James1:13 Tu man thlêmna an tawhin, “Pathianin min thlêm alâwm maw le,” ti suh se. Pathian chu sual tûra thlêm rual a ni lo, amah lahin mi a thlêm ngai bawk hek lo." 
James1:14 Mi tin hi mahni châkna suala thlêm an ni ṭheuh zâwk a, chu chuan a hîpin a hruai bo ṭhîn a ni." 
James1:15 Chu châkna chuan no a pai a, sual a hring a, a lo puitlin chuan thihna a hring ṭhîn." 
James1:16 Ka unau duh takte u, bumin awm suh u." 
James1:17 Thilpêk ṭha tinrêng leh thilpêk famkim tawh phawt chu chung lam aṭanga lo kal, êng siamtu Pa hnên ata lo chhuak a ni. Amah chu a danglam ngai lo va, inher danglamin vânglai leh mang lai a nei lo va, thimah min awmtîr ngai lo." 
James1:18 A thilsiamte zînga rah hmasa atân ama duh ang takin thutakah min hring a ni. 
James1:19 Ka unau duh takte u, hêng hi hre rawh u. Mi tinin ngaihthlâk lam uar sela, sawi lam chuh lovin dawh thei rawh se;" 
James1:20 mihring thinurna hi Pathian felna tihlanna kawng a ni si lo. 
James1:21 Chuvângin, thil tenawm chi tin leh sual tinrêng paih bo ula, in thinlunga Pathian thu tuh, chhandam thei che u chu, thuhnuairawlh takin pawm rawh u." 
James1:22 Thil tih awm si lova thu ngaihthlâk ngawt tâwka ngaiin mahni inbum hek suh u. 
James1:23 Tu pawh thu ngaithlatu ni-a zâwm si lo chu, darthlalanga mahni hmêl entu ang a ni." 
James1:24 Ngun takin a inen a, a kal sawn hnu chuan eng ang hmêl pu nge a nih a theihnghilh leh mai si a." 
James1:25 Amaherawhchu, tu pawh dân famkim, min tizalêntu chu bih nguna, chutianga awm renga, ngaithlaa, theihnghilh leh mai lova, a zawma zâwmtu ngei chu a thiltih apiangah a hmuingîl ang." 
James1:26 Tu pawh sakhaw mi tak nia inngaia, a lei vêng hneh si lo chu mahni inbum a ni a, a sakhua chu engmahlo mai a ni." 
James1:27 Kan Pa Pathian mit hmuha sakhaw biak dân thianghlim leh sual tel lo chu hei hi a ni: fahrah leh hmeithaite an hrehawm laia kana, khawvêl bawlhhlawh kai lova invawn ṭhat hi." 
James2:1 Ka unaute u, kan Lalpa ropui tak Isua Krista ringtute chuan hleih nei suh u." 
James2:2 In sunagog-ah mi rangkachak zungbun buna kawr ṭha tak ha lo lût sela, mi rethei kawr chhe tak ha lo lût bawk sela;" 
James2:3 kawr ṭha ha chu in lo ngaihsaka, “Nang chu ṭhutna ṭhaah hian ṭhu rawh,” in tiha, mi rethei hnênah chuan, “Nang chu saw tah sâwn ding rawh,” emaw, “Ka ke bul chhuatah hian ṭhu rawh,” emaw in tih si chuan," 
James2:4 hleih in nei a, in thlîr dân rilru a sual hle a ni lâwm ni?" 
James2:5 Ka unau duh takte u, ngaithla teh u, khawvêl ngaiha mi retheite hi rinnaa hausa tûr leh, amah hmangaihtute hnêna a ram tiam chang atân Pathianin a thlang lo vem ni?" 
James2:6 Nangni zawngin mi retheite chu in zah lo va. Mi hausate hi nangmahni hnehchhiahtute leh rorêlna ina hnûk lût ṭhîntu che u an ni lâwm ni? 
James2:7 Hming duhawm tak in put chu sawichhetute an ni lâwm ni? 
James2:8 “Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vêngte i hmangaih tûr a ni,” tih Lehkha Thua chuang Dân ropui ber hi in zawm chuan in ti ṭha e;" 
James2:9 Hleih in neih erawh chuan thil sual in ti a ni e, Dân bawhchhetute in ni." 
James2:10 Tu pawhin Dân zâwm vek mah se, pakhat pawh a bawhchhiat si chuan a zavaia bawhchhia a ni." 
James2:11 “Uire suh,” titu chuan, “Tual that suh,” a ti bawk si a; uire lo mah la, tual i thah si chuan Dân bawhchhia i ni tho mai." 
James2:12 Tichuan, Dân, min zalêntîrtu hmanga rêlsak tûr kan ni tih inhriain thu sawi ula, thil ti bawk rawh u." 
James2:13 Khawngaihna tel lova thil titu chu khawngaihna tel lova rêlsak a ni ang, mi khawngaih thei erawh chuan rorêlna hlauh tûr a nei lo." 
James2:14 Ka unaute u, miin, “Rinna ka nei,” ti sela, a thiltihah tilang si lo sela, eng nge a sâwtna? Chutiang rinna chuan a chhandam thei ang em?" 
James2:15 Unaupa emaw, farnu emaw saruak leh rilṭâmin awm sela," 
James2:16 in zînga tuin emaw, “Thlamuang takin kal ta la lum tak leh puar takin awm ang che,” ti sela, a taksa tâna mamawh chu a pêk si loh chuan eng nge a sâwtna?" 
James2:17 Chutiang bawkin thil tih tel lova rinna chauh hi chuan awmzia a nei lo va ni. 
James2:18 “A ṭhenin an ring a, a ṭhenin thil an ti a ni mai alâwm,” tia ṭang an awm thei e. A nih leh, thil tiha tilang si lova rinna i neih theih dân min entîr ta che, keiin rinna ka nei tih ka thiltihin ka entîr ang che." 
James2:19 Pathian pakhat chauh a awm tih i ring maw? I ti ṭha e, ramhuaite pawhin chu chu an ring a, an khûr ṭhîn asin." 
James2:20 Mi â pa, rinna hi thiltih tel lo chuan eng mah a ni lo tih i hre duh maw?" 
James2:21 Min thlahtu Abrahama kha a fapa Isaka, maichâma a hlan lai khân, a thiltih avânga thiam chantîr a ni lâwm ni?" 
James2:22 A rinna leh a thiltih chu a ṭang kawp a, a thiltih chuan a rinna chu a tifamkim ta tih i hria e." 
James2:23 Lehkha Thu, “Abrahaman Pathian a ring a, a rin avâng chuan thiam changah pawm a ni ta,” tih chu a thleng a, Pathian ṭhiana vuah a ni ta a." 
James2:24 Miin thiltih avângin thiam an chang a, rinna avâng chauh chuan a ni lo tih in hre ta." 
James2:25 Chutiang chuan Rahabi, nawhchizuar pawh khân, mi tirhte chu a lo lâwm a, kawng dangah a hâwntîr a, a thiltih avâng khân thiam a chang a ni lâwm ni?" 
James2:26 Taksa hi thlarau tel lo chuan thi a ni angin, thil tih tel lo chuan rinna pawh hi thi a ni." 
James3:1 Ka unaute u, zirtîrtu nih tum vek kher suh u, zirtîrtute hi mi dangte aia khirh zâwka rorêlsak kan la ni dâwn tih in hre si a." 
James3:2 Kan za-in thil tam tak kan tisual fo ṭhîn. Tu pawh a thu sawia tisual ngai lo mi chu mi puitling a ni a, chutiang mi chuan an taksa pum pawh an thunun thei ṭhîn." 
James3:3 Kan thu awihtîr tûrin sakawr kâah thîrbarh kan barh a, an taksa pum pawh kan duhnaah kan hertîr ṭhîn." 
James3:4 Lawngte pawh lian hle mah se, thli na takin a chhêm kal lai pawhin a khalhtuin a duhna lam lamah a tihherna tê tak têin a kaltîr thei a ni." 
James3:5 Chutiang bawkin lei pawh hi taksa pêng tê tak tê a ni na a, uang thei tak a ni. Mei si tê tak têin ramngaw zau pui a tikâng te hi ngaihtuah teh u." 
James3:6 Lei pawh hi mei ang a ni a, khawlohna tinrênga khat, kan taksaa tel, kan taksa nun tibawlhhlawhtu a ni a, kan khawsak dân zawng zawng hremhmun meia tihrehawmtu a ni." 
James3:7 Ramsa leh sava tinrêng te, rannung leh sangha tinrêng te hi khawi ngam theih an ni a, mihringin an khawi ngam bawk ṭhîn." 
James3:8 Lei erawh hi chu tu man an khawi ngam thei lo, khuahkhirh theih loh sual, thihna tûra khat a ni." 
James3:9 Chu chuan kan Pa, Lalpa chu kan fak a, kan mihringpui, Pathian anpuia siamte ânchhia kan lawh bawk a." 
James3:10 Kâ pakhat aṭangin fakna leh ânchhia a chhuak ṭhîn. Ka unaute u, chutiang tûr a ni lo ve." 
James3:11 Tui hna pakhat aṭangin tui tui leh tui lo a chhuak ngai em ni? 
James3:12 Ka unaute u, theipui kûngah oliv a rah ngai em ni? Grep hruiah pawh theipui a rah thei em ni? Chi khur aṭangin zo tui thiang a lo chhuak thei hek lo." 
James3:13 In zîngah finna leh hriatthiamna nei an awm em? Chêt dân mawi leh thil ṭha tihin thiam tak leh thuhnuairawlh takin lantîr rawh se. 
James3:14 In thinlungah îtsîkna thûk tak leh mahni hmasialna in neih rûk si chuan, thu dik kalha in finna uanpuiin dâwt sawi suh u." 
James3:15 Chutiang finna chu chung lam aṭanga chhuak a ni lo va, ramhuai laka chhuak a ni zâwk, a khawvêl a, a thlarau lo va ni." 
James3:16 Îtsîkna leh mahni hmasialna awmnaah chuan buaina leh sualna chi tinrêng a awm ṭhîn. 
James3:17 Chung lam aṭanga finna lo chhuak chu a hmasa berah a thianghlim a, a dawtah a nêlawm a, a nunnêm a, a tihnuam bawk a; khawngaihnain a khat a, rah ṭha a chhuah ṭhîn; hleih a nei lo va, a vervêk hek lo." 
James3:18 Remna siamtuten remna zawnga chi an tuh chu thil ṭhain a rah ṭhîn. 
James4:1 In zînga indona leh insualna te hi khawi aṭanga lo chhuak nge ni? Nawmchen in duhna, in thinlung chhûnga indona thlen ṭhîntu aṭangin a ni lo vem ni?" 
James4:2 In awt a, in nei si lo; tual in thah phah a; in ît a, in nei thei bawk si lo, in inhauvin in insual phah a; Pathian hnênah in thlen loh avângin in duhzâwng chu in nei lo va;" 
James4:3 in dîl pawhin in dîl dân a dik loh avângin in hmu lo, nuamtâwl nân hman in tum si a." 
James4:4 Uirete u, khawvêl ṭhian nih hi Pathian hmêlma nihna a ni tih in hre lo vem ni? Khawvêl ṭhian nih duh apiang chu Pathian hmêlmaah a insiam a ni." 
James4:5 Lehkha Thu-in, “Keimahnia a thlarau a dah hian min duh hliah hliah zia a entîr a ni,” a tih hi a sawi satliah mai niin in ring em ni?" 
James4:6 Khawngaihna min vûr tam zâwk mah lehnghâl asin. Chuvângin, “Pathianin chapote a dodâl a, Inngaitlâwmte erawh chu a khawngaih ṭhîn,” tih a ni." 
James4:7 Chuvângin, Pathian hnênah intulût ula, Diabola erawh chu dodâl rawh u; tichuan, a tlânsan ang che u." 
James4:8 Pathian hnaih rawh u, ani pawhin a hnaih ang che u. Mi sualte u, in kutte sil fai ula, mi vervêkte u, in thinlung tithianghlim rawh u." 
James4:9 Mangang ula, lungngai ula, ṭap rawh u; in nuih lungngaihah chang sela, in hlim nguiah chang rawh se." 
James4:10 Lalpa hmaah chuan inngaitlâwm ula; tichuan, a chawisâng ang che u." 
James4:11 Unaute u, insawichhe tawn suh u. Tu pawh a unau sawichhia emaw, dem emaw chuan Dân a sawichhia a, Dân a dem a ni; Dân i dem chuan, Dân zâwmtu i ni lo va, rorêltu i ni zâwk e." 
James4:12 Dân petu leh rorêltu pakhat chauh a awm - chhandam theia tiboral theitu chu; nang, ṭhenawmte dem veitu chu tu nge maw i nih le?" 
James4:13 Ngaithla teh u, nangni, “Vawiinah nge, naktûkah nge ni ang, khawii khuaah emaw kan kal ang a, chutah chuan kum khat kan va sumdâwng ang a, kan hlêp ṭeuh mai ang,” titute u;" 
James4:14 naktûkah in nunna chu eng angin nge a awm dâwn tih pawh in hre si lo. Chhûm, rei lo tê lo langa, ral leh ta mai ang lek hi in ni si a." 
James4:15 “Lalpan rem a tih chuan kan dam ang a, chumi khami chu kan ti ang,” in ti zâwk tûr a ni." 
James4:16 Tûnah zawng chapo takin in uang a. Chutianga chapo taka awm chu sual a ni. 
James4:17 Chutichuan, thil ṭha tih tûr hriaa ti si lo chu a sual a ni." 
James5:1 Nangni mi hausate u, ngaithla teh u, in chunga hrehawm lo thleng tûr avâng hian ṭap ula, chiau vawng vawng rawh u." 
James5:2 In hausaknate a chhe zo ta a, in puante pawh thîmin a ei zo ta." 
James5:3 In rangkachak leh tangka pawh a lo tuiêk zo va, a tuiêk chu in thiam lohzia lantîrtu a ni ang a, meiin thil a kâng ral angin in tisa chu a ei zo vang. Ni hnuhnûngah hian ro in khâwlkhâwm a nih hi." 
James5:4 Ngai teh u, in lova thawktute hlawh in hrênsakte chu an au va, buh sengtute au thâwm chu Engkim Lalpa beng a thleng ta." 
James5:5 Leiah hian nuamsa tak leh nuamtâwlin in awm a, inthah rûnpui ni atâna inchâwm thau mai in nih hi." 
James5:6 Mi Diktaka chu thiam loh in chantîr a, in that a, ani chuan a dodâl loh che u kha." 
James5:7 Chutichuan, unaute u, Lalpa lo kal hma zawng chhel takin awm rawh u. Lo neituin a lo aṭanga rah seng tûr a nghah dân hi en rawh u; ruah hmasa leh ruah hnuhnûng a nghâk fan fan ṭhîn." 
James5:8 Nangni pawh chhel takin awm ula, rilru nghet tak pu rawh u; Lalpa lo kal lehna a hnai tawh si a." 
James5:9 Unaute u, thiam loh changa in awm loh nân innghirngho suh u. Ngai teh u, rorêltu chu kawngka bulah a awm reng tawh a ni." 
James5:10 Unaute u, Lalpa hminga thu sawitu zâwlneiten tihduhdahna chhel taka an tuar dân kha entawn atân hmang rawh u." 
James5:11 Chhel taka tuartu chu nihlawh kan ti a ni. Joba tuarchhelzia in hria a, Lalpan a tâwpa a tih dân kha in hria e. Lalpa chu zahngaihna leh khawngaihnain a khat si a." 
James5:12 Ka unaute u, eng pawh ni se, chhia zawng chham suh u, vân emaw, lei emaw, thil dang chhâlin emaw chhia chham suh u, ‘ni’ in tih chu ‘ni’ ti mai ula, ‘ni lo’ in tih chu ‘ni lo’ ni mai rawh se; chutichuan, thiam lohvin in awm dâwn lo nia." 
James5:13 In zîngah vânduaina tâwk an awm em? Ṭawngṭai rawh se. Hlim an awm em? Fak hla sa rawh se. 
James5:14 In zîngah damlo an awm em? Kohhran upa kohtîr sela, annin Lalpa hminga hriak hnawihin a tân ṭawngṭai rawh se;" 
James5:15 ring tlata ṭawngṭaina chuan damlo chu a tidam ang a, Lalpan a kaitho vang; thil a lo tihsual tawh pawh ngaihdam a ni ang." 
James5:16 Chutichuan, in sualte thupha chawi tawn ula, inṭawngṭaisak rawh u; tichuan, tihdamin in awm dâwn nia. Ṭhahnemngai taka mi dik ṭawngṭaina chuan thil ropui tak a thawk thei a ni." 
James5:17 Elija chu keimahni anga mihring ve mai bawk a ni a, ruah sûr loh nân ṭhahnemngai takin a ṭawngṭai a, kum thum leh thla ruk chhûng lei chungah ruah a sûr ta lo va." 
James5:18 A ṭawngṭai leh a, vân ata ruah a lo sûr a, lei aṭangin thlaite a lo thar leh ta a." 
James5:19 Ka unaute u, in zînga tu emaw thutak aṭangin pêng bo sela," 
James5:20 mi sual, a kawng bona ata hruai kîr lehtu chuan thihna ata a thlarau a chhandam ang a, sual tam tak a khuh bosak bawk ang tih hre rawh u." 
1Peter1:1 Petera, Isua Krista tirhkoh chuan, Pathian mi thlan, Ponto ram te, Galatia ram te, Kapadokia ram te, Asia ram te leh Bithunia rama awm darh tate chibai ka bûk e." 
1Peter1:2 Pa Pathian hriat lâwk anga thlan, Isua Krista thu awih tûr leh a thisena tlen fai tûra Thlarau Tihthianghlim in in ni a, in chungah khawngaihna leh remna tihpunin awm rawh se." 
1Peter1:3 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pathian leh Pa chu fakin awm rawh se. Isua Krista chu mitthi zîng ata kai thovin, beiseina nung nei tûrin a zahngaihna ropui tak chuan min tinung leh ta a." 
1Peter1:4 Ro chhe thei lo, hmêlhem lo leh chuai thei lo luah tûr kan ni ta, chu ro chu in tân vânah dah ṭhat diam a ni." 
1Peter1:5 Amah in rin avângin chhandamna buatsaih sa, hun hnuhnûnga tihlan a nih thlengin Pathian thiltihtheihna chuan a vawng ang che u." 
1Peter1:6 Fiahna tinrêng in tawha, in mangan pawhin hlim takin awm rawh u." 
1Peter1:7 In rinna fiahna tûr a ni, rangkachak chhe thei mah meia fiah a ni a, a aia hlu zâwk, in rinna chu, fiah tûr a ni asin; tichuan, Isua Krista a lo inlâr hunah fakna te, ropuina te, chawimawina te in hlawh ang." 
1Peter1:8 Amah hmu lo pawhin in hmangaih a, tûnah hian ani chu hmu rih lo mah ula in ring a, hlimna nasa tak, sawi hleih theih lohvin in khah hi;" 
1Peter1:9 in rinna rah, in thlarau chhandamna chu, in hmuh mêk avângin." 
1Peter1:10 He chhandamna chungchâng hi zâwlneiten ngun taka zawngin an chhui a, in chunga Pathian thilpêk, khawngaihna lo thleng tûr chu an lo sawi lâwk a ni." 
1Peter1:11 Anmahnia Krista thlarau awm chuan, Krista tuarna leh a hnua chawimawia a awm tûr thu a hriat lâwktîr a, eng hunah nge a lo thlen anga, engtia lo thleng tûr nge tih hriat an tum ṭhin a ni." 
1Peter1:12 Anmahni tân ni lo, nangmahni tân rawng an bâwl a ni tih hriattîr an ni a. Vân aṭanga tirh, Thlarau Thianghlim ṭanpuia in hnêna Chanchin Ṭha hriltute khân chu chu an hrilh tâk che u kha. Chûng thil chu vântirhkohte pawhin bih an châk a ni." 
1Peter1:13 Chuvângin, rilru inpeih diamin inring reng ula, Isua Krista a lo lan huna khawngaihna a rawn kensak tûr che u chu beisei tlat rawh u." 
1Peter1:14 Fa thuawihte angin awm ula, tûn hma, in hriat loh laia in châknate ang khân awm suh u." 
1Peter1:15 A kotu che u a thianghlim angin nangni pawh in chêt dân zawng zawngah lo thianghlim zâwk rawh u. 
1Peter1:16 “Kei ka thianghlim si a, nangni pawh in thianghlim tûr a ni,” Lehkha Thu-in a ti si a." 
1Peter1:17 Hleih nei lova mi tin an thiltih ang zêla ngaihtuahsaktu chu Pa-ah in neih chuan, he leia in châm chhûng hian amah ṭih takin khawsa rawh u." 
1Peter1:18 In thlahtute aṭanga in dawn chhâwn, nun dân âtthlâk tak ata chu, thil chhe thei tangka leh rangkachaka tlan in ni lo va," 
1Peter1:19 Berâmno hmêlhem lo leh bawlhhlawh kai lo, Krista thisen hlua tlan in ni zâwk tih in hre si a." 
1Peter1:20 Ani chu leilung pian hmaa ruat lâwk a ni a, tûn hun hnuhnûngah hian in tân a lo lang ta a ni." 
1Peter1:21 Mitthi zîng ata kaithotu leh ropuina petu Pathian chu amah avângin in ring ta a; tichuan, Pathian chu in rinna leh beiseina innghahna ber a lo ni ta." 
1Peter1:22 Thutak in zawm avângin in rilru in tithianghlim a, unaute tihtakzetin in hmangaih ta a, thinlung takin inhmangaih tawn rawh u." 
1Peter1:23 Chi chhe thei lakah ni lovin, chi chhe thei lo Pathian chatuan thu nung laka piangthar in nih kha." 
1Peter1:24 ‘Mi zawng zawng hnim hring ang an ni, an ropuinate pawh hnim pâr ang a ni; Hnim chu a vuai a, a pâr chu a tla a," 
1Peter1:25 Lalpa thu erawh chu chatuanin a awm reng,” tih a ni. Chu ngei chu a ni Chanchin Ṭha an hrilh che u kha." 
1Peter2:1 Chutichuan, sual chi tinrêng bânsan rawh u, inbum te, vervêk te, îtsîk te, insawichhiat zawng zawng te bânsan ula;" 
1Peter2:2 nausên piang hlim angin thlarau lam hnutetui eng mah pawlh loh chu châk rawh u, chutiang ring chuan in ṭhang lian thei ang a, chhandam in ni dâwn nia." 
1Peter2:3 “Lalpa ṭhatna chu tem teh rêng u,” tih ziak ang khân." 
1Peter2:4 Amah chu pan rawh u. Ani chu lung nung, mihringte hnâwl, Pathian thlan, hlu tak chu a ni." 
1Peter2:5 Tichuan, nangni pawh lung nung ang ni vein thlarau lam in atân rem khâwm ni ve rawh u. Chutah chuan Isua Krista zâra Pathian pawm tlâk, thlarau lam inthawina hlântu, puithiam thianghlim in lo ni ang." 
1Peter2:6 Lehkha Thu-in, “En teh, lung hlu tak ka thlan, A kil lungphûm chu Zion-ah ka dah ta, Amah ring chu tu mah an mualpho lo vang,” a ti si a." 
1Peter2:7 Nangni ringtute tân chuan lung hlu tak a ni, ring lote tân erawh chuan, “In satute lung duh loh, a kil lung pawimawh ber." 
1Peter2:8 Mite inchhuih tlûkna lung, Insut tlûkna lungpui chu,” a ni ve thung. Thu chu an awih loh avângin an tlu a, chutianga awm tûr rênga ruat an ni." 
1Peter2:9 Nangni zawng hnam thlan, Lalpa puithiam, hnam thianghlim, Pathian ta bîk, ama êng mak taka lût tûra thim ata ko chhuaktu che u thiltih ropui puang tûr in ni." 
1Peter2:10 Pathian mi in la ni ngai lo va, Tûnah zawng in nih tâk hi: Khawngaih in la hlawh ngai lo va, Tûnah zawng in hlawh tâk hi." 
1Peter2:11 Duh takte u, khual zin, mi rama awm in nih avângin, thlarau do ṭhîn tisa châknate lakah chuan inthiarfihlîm tûrin ka ngên a che u." 
1Peter2:12 Jentail-te zîngah mawi takin khawsa ula, thil sual tia an puh che u pawhin in thil tih ṭhatte anmahni ngeiin an hmu ang a, Pathianin a tlawh hunah che u amah an chawimawi thei ang." 
1Peter2:13 Lalpa avângin mihring dâna thuneitute hnênah intulût rawh u; thuneitu sâng ber, lalber thu chu awih ula," 
1Peter2:14 thil sual titute hrema, thil ṭha titute chawimawi tûra a ruat ramawptute thu pawh awih rawh u." 
1Peter2:15 Eng mah hre lote thu sawi âtthlâk chu thil ṭha tiha tidang tûrin Pathianin a duh a che u. 
1Peter2:16 Zalêna awm tûrin, in zalênna chu sual thup nâna hmang lova, Pathian bawihte anga awm zâwk tûrin a duh che u a ni." 
1Peter2:17 Mi zawng zawng zah ula, unaute hmangaih ula, Pathian ṭih ula, lalber chu chawimawi rawh u." 
1Peter2:18 Nangni chhiahhlawhte u, in pute thu awih ula, a ṭha leh a ngilneite chauh ni lovin, a ṭha lote pawh zah rawh u:" 
1Peter2:19 Miin Pathian duh zâwng nia a hriat tlat avânga a tuar kher loh tûr hrehawm a tuar chuan Pathian lâwmzâwng a ni. 
1Peter2:20 In sual avânga in tuarin, chhel takin tuar mah ula in tân hmingṭhatna eng nge awm? Thil ṭha in tih pawha kut in tuar erawh chuan Pathian lâwmzâwng a ni." 
1Peter2:21 Hetianga awm tûr hian koh in ni, Krista pawh khân in tân a tuar a, a hniakhnung in zui theih nân entawn tûr a hnutchhiah che u kha." 
1Peter2:22 Ani chuan thil sual eng mah a ti lo va, a kâah bumna thu a chhuak hek lo." 
1Peter2:23 Hau a nih pawhin a hau lêt lo va, a tuar laiin a vau lêt hek lo, dik taka rorêl ṭhîntu hnênah chuan a inkawltîr zâwk a ni." 
1Peter2:24 Sual thihsana felna neia kan nun theih nân, amah ngeiin thingah khân a taksain kan sualte a phur a; a hliamte chuan tihdam in ni ta." 
1Peter2:25 Berâm angin kawng in bo tawh a, tûnah zawng in thlarau Vêngtu leh Hotu hnênah chuan in lo kîr leh tâk hi." 
1Peter3:1 Chutiang bawkin nangni nute u, in pasalte thu awih rawh u; chutichuan, an zîngah Pathian thu awih lo an awm pawhin, thu hrilh kher ngai lovin in chêt dân chuan a hneh mai ang," 
1Peter3:2 anmahni ngeiin ṭih tak chunga in chêt dân thianghlim chu an hmu dâwn si a. 
1Peter3:3 Pâwn lam incheina - sam chei lêrh te, rangkachak ṭhi awrh te, silhfên ṭha inbeltea inchei mawi tum lovin," 
1Peter3:4 thinlung aṭanga mize dik, rilru thuhnuairawlh leh nunnêm, inthuamna chhe thei lo chuan inchei zâwk rawh u, chu chu Pathian mit hmuhin a hlu êm êm a ni." 
1Peter3:5 Chutiang chuan hmasâng hmeichhe thianghlim, Pathiana beiseina nghatte kha, an pasalte thu awihnain an inchei ṭhîn a ni." 
1Peter3:6 Sari chuan Abrahama thu a awih a, “Ka Lalpa,” tia a ko ang khân; thil ṭha in tih chuan Sari fate in ni ang; hlauh tûr rêng in nei lo ve." 
1Peter3:7 Nangni pate u, chutiang bawkin nupa in nihnaah in nupuite dimdawi rawh u, chak lo zâwk an nih avâng leh Pathian khawngaihna thilpêk, nunna chu, chanpuitu che u an nih hriain zah thiam rawh u. Tichuan, in ṭawngṭaina dâltu eng mah a awm dâwn lo nia." 
1Peter3:8 A tâwp berah chuan, in za-in rilru hmun khat pu ula, inlainatin unau angin inhmangaih tawn ula, inkhawngaih tawnin thuhnuairawlh takin awm rawh u;" 
1Peter3:9 sual sualin thungrûl suh ula, ânchhia pawh ânchhiaa thungrûl lovin, malsâwm hlauh zâwk rawh u; malsâwmna dawng tûrin asin Pathianin a koh che u." 
1Peter3:10 Lehkha Thu-in, “Dam thlahlela, hlim ni hmêl hmuh duh chuan Sual lakah a lei vêng ṭha sela, A hmui pawh bumna thu sawi lo tûrin vêng rawh se." 
1Peter3:11 Sual hawisanin thil ṭha ti rawh se, Remna zawngin ûm zêl rawh se." 
1Peter3:12 Lalpa mit chu mi felte chungah a fu a, An ṭawngṭaiin a beng a lo dawh ṭhîn. Thil ṭha lo titute chungah erawh chuan Lalpa hmêl chu a dur ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
1Peter3:13 Thil ṭha tih lama ṭhahnem in ngaih chuan tu nge in chungah thil ṭha lo ti ang? 
1Peter3:14 Thil dik in tih avânga in tuar chuan vânneihthlâkah ngai rawh u. Tu mah hlau suh ula, mangang hek suh u." 
1Peter3:15 Krista chu zah ula, in thinlungah lalah neih rawh u. In beisei zâwt apiang che u chhâng tûrin inpeih sa reng rawh u." 
1Peter3:16 Nimahsela, thuhnuairawlh leh hawihhâwm takin, chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang tak neiin ti ang che u; tichuan, Kristaa in awm dân ṭha sawi hnâwmtute chu tihzahin an awm dâwn nia." 
1Peter3:17 Pathian remtiha tuar in nih rau rau chuan, thil sual tih avânga tuar ai chuan thil ṭha tih avânga tuar chu a ṭha zâwk." 
1Peter3:18 Krista pawh kan sualte avângin vawi khat a thi a, Pathian hnêna hruai theihna tûr che uin, mi dik chu mi dik lote tân a thi a ni. Tisaah tihhlum a ni a, thlarauvah erawh chuan tihnunin a awm." 
1Peter3:19 Ani chuan tân ina awm thlaraute hnênah thu a zuk hril a. 
1Peter3:20 Chûngte chu Nova lawng tuk chhûnga Pathianin dawhthei taka a nghah laia, awih duh lote thlarau kha an ni. Lawngah chuan, mi tlêm tê, pariat lek, tuia chhandam an ni." 
1Peter3:21 Chumi anpui baptisma hian, Isua Krista thawhlehna avângin tûnah a chhandam ta che u a ni; baptisma chu taksaa bawlhhlawh silfaina mai a ni lo, chhia leh ṭha hriatna thiang taka Pathian hnêna thu tiamna hi a ni zâwk." 
1Peter3:22 Isua Krista chu vânah kalin Pathian ding lamah a awm a, vântirhkohte thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna te a thuhnuaiah an awm ta." 
1Peter4:1 Kristan taksaa a tuar avângin nangni pawh chutiang rilru chu pu ve rawh u; tisaa tuar tawh chuan sual a bânsan ṭhîn; 
1Peter4:2 tisaa a dam chhûng chu mihring châknate ûm tawh lova Pathian duhzâwnga a awm tawh zâwk theih nân. 
1Peter4:3 Jentail-te duhzâwng tih nân, tûn hma hun in hman zozai kha a tâwk ta e; hurnaah te, taksa châknaah te, uain hehnaah te, zu hmun hlimnaah te, zu in honaah te, milem biakna tenawm takah te in inhman ṭhin kha." 
1Peter4:4 Tûnah an nawmsak bâwl anga in bâwl ve tâk loh avâng hian mak an ti a, an sawichhe ta che u a ni." 
1Peter4:5 Mi nung leh mitthite ngaihtuah tûra inpeih sa hnênah chuan an chanchin anmahniin an la sawi ang. 
1Peter4:6 Hemi avâng hian mitthite hnênah pawh Chanchin Ṭha hril a ni, mi dangte ang bawka an chungthu rêl a niha, Pathian hmaa thlarauva an nun theih nân." 
1Peter4:7 Thil zawng zawng tâwp hun chu a hnai ta a, in ṭawngṭai theih nân rilru fîm tak puin invawng fel rawh u." 
1Peter4:8 Thil dang zawng aiin thinlung taka inhmangaih tawn uar rawh u, hmangaihnain sual tam tak a khuh si a." 
1Peter4:9 Phunnawi lovin inmikhual tawn rawh u. 
1Peter4:10 Pathian khawngaihna thilpêk tam tak enkawltu ṭhate angin Thlarau lam thilpêk in dawn apiang chu rawng inbâwlsak tawn nân hmang rawh u. 
1Peter4:11 Tu pawhin thu an sawi chuan Pathian thu ngei sawi rawh se, rawngbâwltu pawhin Pathianin chakna a pêk angin bâwl rawh se; chutichuan, Isua Krista avângin Pathian chu engkimah chawimawiin a awm thei ang, ropuina leh thiltihtheihna chatuanin a ta a ni si a. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Duh takte u, fiahna na tak in zînga lo thleng hi thil mak tak lo thleng taah ngai suh u." 
1Peter4:13 Krista tuarna ṭâwmpuitute in nih avângin lâwm zâwk ula, ropui taka a lo lan hun chuan hlim leh lâwmin in la khat dâwn a ni." 
1Peter4:14 Krista hminga hau in nih chuan in nihlawh e, thlarau ropui tak, Pathian thlarau chu, nangmahniah a chêng tihna a ni." 
1Peter4:15 In zîngah tu mahin tual thah avâng emaw, rûkrûk avâng emaw, thil sual tih avâng emaw, mi tibuaitu nih avângin emaw tuar suh se." 
1Peter4:16 Kristian in nih avânga tuar in nih chuan in zak tûr a ni lo, Krista hming in put avângin Pathian chawimawi zâwk rawh u." 
1Peter4:17 Rorêlna chu ṭan a hun ta a, Pathian chhûngte aṭangin ṭan a ni ang. Keimahniah ṭan a nih si chuan, Pathian Chanchin Ṭha thu awih lote chu engtin tak awm ang maw!" 
1Peter4:18 Lehkha Thu-in, “Mi dikte mah chhandam hrâm an nih chuan, sakhaw ngaihsak lo mi sualte chu, engtin tak awm ang maw,” a tih ang khân." 
1Peter4:19 Chutichuan, Pathian remtih anga tuarte chuan thil ṭha ti zêlin an thlarau chu Siamtu rinawm tak hnênah kawltîr rawh se." 
1Peter5:1 In zînga kohhran upate chu, kei upa ve bawk, Krista tuarnate hmutu leh ropuina lo lang tûr chan ve beiseitu hian ka fuih e." 
1Peter5:2 In zînga Pathian berâmte chu enkawl ṭha rawh u, tihluih ngai lovin Pathian duh anga châk taka tiin, hlêp beisei vâng ni lovin, rawngbâwl duhna rilru puin enkawl rawh u." 
1Peter5:3 In hote chungah intilal suh ula, pâwlhote entawn tlâk ni zâwk rawh u." 
1Peter5:4 Tichuan, Berâm vêngtu Lalber a lo lan hunah chawimawina lukhum ropui chul thei lo chu in dawng ang." 
1Peter5:5 Chutiang bawkin nangni ṭhalaite u, upate thu awih rawh u. In za-in thuhnuairawlhnaa inthuamin rawng inbâwlsak rawh u. “Pathianin chapote a dodâl a, inngaitlâwmte erawh chu a khawngaih ṭhîn,” tih a ni si a." 
1Peter5:6 Chuvângin, a hun takah chawimawia in awm theih nân Pathian kut chak tak hnuaiah inphahhniam ula," 
1Peter5:7 in manganna zawng zawng ama chungah nghat vek rawh u; a ngaihtuah êm êm che u a ni. 
1Peter5:8 Ngaihven ula, fîmkhur rawh u; in hmêlma Diabola chu, sakeibaknei rûm ṭhîn angin ei tûr zawngin a phî ruai ṭhîn." 
1Peter5:9 Rinnaah hian ding nghet tlat ula, amah chu do rawh u. Khawvêl hmun danga in unaute pawhin chutiang bawk chu an tuar tih in hre si a." 
1Peter5:10 Rei lo tê in tuar hnuin, Kristaa a chatuan ropuina chang tûra kotu che u, khawngaihnaa khat Pathian chuan a rawn tungding ang che u a, siam ṭhaa tichakin a tinghet ang che u." 
1Peter5:11 Ama hnênah chuan thiltihtheihna kumkhuain awm rawh se. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Unaupa, mi rinawm a ni tih ka hriat Silvana kutah hian he lehkha tawi tê hi ka rawn thawn che u a ni. Hei hi Pathian khawngaihna chu a ni tih hriattîr tûr che u leh chutah chuan ding nghet tlat tûra ka fuihna che u a ni." 
1Peter5:13 Babulon kohhran, nangmahni ang bawka thlan hian chibai an bûk a che u; ka fapa Marka pawhin a bûk a che u." 
1Peter5:13 Babulon kohhran, nangmahni ang bawka thlan hian chibai an bûk a che u; ka fapa Marka pawhin a bûk a che u." 
1Peter5:14 Krista hmangaihnaa kut invuanin chibai inbûk rawh u. Nangni Kristaa awm zawng zawngte hnênah remna awm rawh se. 
2Peter1:1 Isua Krista bawih leh tirhkoh Simon Petera chuan, min chhandamtu Isua Krista zârah leh kan Pathian felna zârah rinna kan neih ang nei vete chibai ka bûk e." 
2Peter1:2 Pathian leh kan Lalpa Isua in hriatnaah khawngaihna leh remna in chungah tihpunin awm rawh se. 
2Peter1:3 A ropuina leh ṭhatna chang ve tûra min kotu kan hriat tâk avânga Pathian ṭiha kan nun theih nân, Pathian thiltihtheihna chuan kan mamawh engkim min pe ta." 
2Peter1:4 Tichuan, thilpêk a tiam, ropui tak leh hlu tak chu min pe ta a; chuvâng chuan, khawvêl sual châkna, min tichhe thei lak ata in chhuak a, Pathian zia in ṭâwmpui thei ta a ni." 
2Peter1:5 Hei vâng hian theihtâwp chhuahin, in rinnaah chuan ṭhatna telh ula, in ṭhatnaah chuan hriatna," 
2Peter1:6 in hriatnaah chuan mahni inthununna, mahni inthununnaah chuan chhelna," 
2Peter1:7 in chhelnaah chuan inserh thianghlimna, inserh thianghlimnaah chuan unaute lainatna, unaute in lainatnaah chuan hmangaihna belh rawh u." 
2Peter1:8 Chûng chu in neiha, a pun zêl chuan kan Lalpa Isua Krista in hriatnaah taima tak leh ṭangkai takah a siam ang che u." 
2Peter1:9 Chûng thil nei lote chu mitdel, khaw hawi tawi, an tûn hma sual sil faisak an ni tih theihnghilh tâte an ni." 
2Peter1:10 Tichuan, unaute u, a kohna leh a thlanna che u hi tilang tûrin theihtâwp chhuahin nghet takin ding rawh u; chutianga dingte chu eng lai mahin an tluchhe lo vang." 
2Peter1:11 Tichuan, kan Lalpa leh Chhandamtu Isua Krista chatuan ramah lâwm takin an luhtîr ang che u." 
2Peter1:12 Chuvângin, thutak in hriatah khân nghet takin awm tawh mah ula, hêng thu hi hriat nawntîr fo che u ka duh a ni." 
2Peter1:13 He taksa ka put chhûng hi chuan hriat nawntîr ṭhin che u hi ka tih tûrah ka ngai. 
2Peter1:14 Kan Lalpa Isua Kristan mi hrilh angin he ka taksa hi ka chhuahsan thuai tawh dâwn tih ka hria. 
2Peter1:15 Ka chhuahsan hnuah pawh, eng lai pawha hêng hi in hriat reng theihna kawng siamsak tûr che uin theihtâwp ka chhuah dâwn a ni." 
2Peter1:16 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista chu thiltihtheihna nên a lo kal leh tûr thu kan hrilh lai che u khân, thawnthu phuahchawp mai mai hrilh che u kan ni lo ve, a ropuina chu mit ngeia hmutute kan ni." 
2Peter1:17 Pa Pathian hnên ata chawimawina leh ropuina a dawn lai khân, Ropuibera hnên aṭangin âw a lo chhuak a, “Hei hi ka Fapa, ka Duhtaka chu a ni, a chungah ka lâwm êm êm a ni,” a rawn ti a." 
2Peter1:18 Chu âw, vân aṭanga lo chhuak chu, keini pawhin tlâng thianghlima a hnêna kan awm lai khân kan hre ve a ni." 
2Peter1:19 Zâwlneite thu lo puan tawh kha a dik ngei tih keini pawhin kan pawm nghet sauh va, nangni pawhin, Vârparh Arsi a lo lan hma chuan, khawvâr hma, zân thima khâwnvâr êng angin, chu thu chu in thinlungah êntuah hmang ula a ṭha ang." 
2Peter1:20 Lehkha Thu-a hrilhlâwkna thute hi mahni ngaih dân maia hrilh fiah tûr a ni lo tih hre hmasa phawt ula," 
2Peter1:21 hrilhlâwkna rêng rêng hi mihring thu-a chhuak a ni si lo va, Thlarau Thianghlim hruaiin Pathian hnên ata an sawi zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Peter2:1 Kan mite zîngah zâwlnei der an awm ṭhîn ang khân nangni zîngah pawh zirtîrtu dik lo an lo awm dâwn; mi tichhe thei zirtîrna dik lo an rawn pu lût ru ang a; an Lalber, anmahni tlantu chu phatsanin mahni chhiatna rang takin an thlentîr ang." 
2Peter2:2 An awm dân tenawm tak chu miten an chîng ve ang a, anmahni avâng chuan thutak kawng hi sawichhiat a ni ang." 
2Peter2:3 Sum an hmuh theih nân duhâm takin an thu phuah chawp chuan sumdâwnna atân an hmang ang che u; nimahsela, an chunga rorêl tawh sa chu a awm mai mai lo vang, chhiatna chuan muhîl lovin a châng reng a ni." 
2Peter2:4 Vântirhkohten thil sual an tih lai khân Pathianin a zuah lo, hremhmunah a paih a, Rorêl Ni nghâk tûrin khuarkhurum thimah chuan an awm ta a ni." 
2Peter2:5 Hmânlai khawvêl pawh a zuah lo, khawvêl sual tak chunga tui a lêttîr pawh khân, Nova - felna thupuangtu leh mi dang serh leh sâng nei pasarih chauh a nih kha a chhan chhuah ni." 
2Peter2:6 Sodom leh Gomora khua pawh vaivutah a chantîr a, serh leh sâng nei lote a hrem dân tûr entîr nân a tichhe vek a nih kha." 
2Peter2:7 Lota, mi sualte awm dân pawiti êm êm ṭhîntu erawh chu a chhan chhuak a," 
2Peter2:8 chu mi ṭha tak chu an zînga khawsa ve ṭhîn a ni a, an thil sual tih a hmuh leh a hriatte chuan a thin a tina êm êm ṭhîn." 
2Peter2:9 Lalpa chuan amah ṭihtute chu tuarna laka chhan chhuah dân leh rorêl Ni a lo thlen hma pawha mi sual hrem dân a hria. 
2Peter2:10 An taksa châkna bawlhhlawh anga awmte leh Pathian thuneihna hmusittute lek phei chu hrem dân a hre lehzual. Hêng zirtîrtu dik lote hi an ât huai a, an chapo va, vân mi ropuite pawh khi sawichhiat an hlau lo." 
2Peter2:11 Anni aia chak leh thiltithei zâwk vântirhkohte pawhin, Lalpa hmaa hêng mi ropuite chungchâng hi an sawiin ṭawng chhia an hmang ngai lo." 
2Peter2:12 Mahse, hêngho hi ngaihtuahna nei lo, ramsa, mana tihhlum mai tûra lo piangte ang hi an ni, an hriatthiam loh apiang an sawichhia a, ramsa te anga tihhlum an ni dâwn." 
2Peter2:13 An sual man chu an tuar ang. Nilêng lênga nuamtâwl chîng mi an ni a, mi tenawm leh mi bawlhhlawh, in zînga inzep an ni a, in ruai ṭhehnaa an lo tel hian an bum che u a ni." 
2Peter2:14 An mitin uire tûr an melh reng a, sual tih an kham thei lo. Mi rilru nghet lote an bum a, duhâm dân an thiam hle, ânchhe dawng an ni." 
2Peter2:15 Kawng dik chu an pênsan a, an bo ta. Bosora fapa Balaama kawng an zawh ta. Ani chuan thil sual tih hlâwk berin a ring a;" 
2Peter2:16 mahse, a bawhchhiatnaah chuan zilhhauvin a awm ta a, sabengtung ṭawng thei lo chu mihring angin a lo ṭawng a, zâwlneipa âtna chu tihtâwpsak a ni ta." 
2Peter2:17 Hêng mite hi tuikhur hna kang chat leh chhûm, thlipui len vêl mai mai ang chauh hi an ni, thim chhah mup chu an awm nân ruat a ni." 
2Peter2:18 Thu âtthlâk pâwr tak takin an sawi a, an khawvêl nun dân dik lo bânsan hlimte chu tisa châkna hmangin an bum a."
