2Peter2:19 Zalênna pêk an tiam a; mahse, anmahni pawh chu an thil chîn ṭha lo bawih an ni reng si a; tu pawh mai hi anmahni hnehtu bawih an ni ṭhîn." 
2Peter2:20 Kan Lalpa leh min chhandamtu Isua Krista hriatna avânga khawvêl sual kalsantute chu suala an inhnamhnawiha an tlûk leh chuan, a tîra an awm dân ai khân an awm dân hnuhnûng chu a chhe zâwk ṭhîn." 
2Peter2:21 An hnêna thupêk thianghlim hre tawh zeta hawisan leh site chuan felna kawng hi lo hre lo law law se an tân a ṭha zâwk tûr. 
2Peter2:22 An awm dân aṭang hian hêng thufing dikzia hi a lang chiang hle: “Ui chuan a luak a ei leh a,” tih leh “Vawkpui bual fai chu chirhdiakah a inbual leh a,” tihte hi." 
2Peter3:1 Duh takte u, vawi hnih lehkha ka rawn thawnna che u a ni ta. In hriat tawh sa hriat nawntîr che uin nangmahniah rilru thianghlim chawk harh tûrin vawi hnih ka han thawn che u a ni." 
2Peter3:2 Zâwlnei thianghlimte thu leh Lalpa leh Chhandamtu thupêk, in tirhkohten hmâna an hrilh che u kha, hre reng rawh u." 
2Peter3:3 Ni hnuhnûngah chuan hmusittute, mahni châkna ang zêla awmte an lo chhuak ang tih hre hmasa rawh u. Hmusit êm êmin," 
2Peter3:4 “Lo kal leh a tiam kha engtin nge ni ta? Min thlahtute an thi zo ta a, thilsiam ṭan tirh ata engkim a ngai rengin a la awm a ni lâwm ni?” an la ti ang." 
2Peter3:5 Hmânlaiin Pathian thu-a vânte khi siam a nih te, lei chu tui ata siam chhuah a nih te, tui leh tui inkâra dah a nih te," 
2Peter3:6 tuilêt lai khân khawvêl hlui chu, chu tui chuan a chîma a tihchhiatte kha an haider lui a." 
2Peter3:7 Sakhaw pawisa loho chungchâng rêl hun leh tihboral huna meia kâng ral tûrin tûna lei leh vân pawh hi Pathian thuin a khêk a ni. 
2Peter3:8 Duh takte u, hei hi theihnghilh suh u, Lalpa tân chuan ni khat hi kum sângkhat ang a ni a, kum sângkhat pawh hi ni khat ang a ni." 
2Peter3:9 Ṭhenkhat rin dân angin Lalpa hi a thutiam hlen kawngah a muang lo ve; in tân a dawhthei a nî zâwk; tû ma boral a duh lo va, mi zawng zawngin an sual an sima, a hnêna an kîr a duh vâng zâwk a ni." 
2Peter3:10 Lalpa Nî chu rûkru angin a lo thleng ngei dâwn. Chumi nî-ah chuan thâwm ring tak nên vân khi a boral ang a, vâna arsite khi a kâng ral vek ang; lei pawh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng nên a boral vek ang." 
2Peter3:11 Hêngte hi chutianga chhe vek tûr a nih si chuan nangniho kha mi eng ang tûr nge in nih? 
2Peter3:12 Pathian ni tiam nghâkhlel taka in thlîr reng lai hian mi thianghlim, Pathian tâna inpe mi in ni tûr a ni. Chumi ni-ah chuan vân khi a kâng ral ang a, arsite pawh an tuiral ang." 
2Peter3:13 Nimahsela, Pathian tiam, lei thar leh vân thar, a chhûnga dikna awmna chu kan nghâk a ni." 
2Peter3:14 Tichuan, duh takte u, hêng thil in nghah lai hian Pathian hmaa thianghlim leh sawisêlbova awm tûrin theihtâwp chhuah ula, amah nên inrem rawh u." 
2Peter3:15 Lalpa dawhtheihna hi chhandam in nih theihna hun remchângah ngai ula. Pathianin finna a pêk angin kan unaupa duh tak Paula pawhin hêng thu hi a ziak ṭhîn a ni. 
2Peter3:16 A thu ziak ṭhenkhat chu hriatthiam a har hle, eng mah zir lo leh mi nghet loten Lehkha Thu dang an ngai kawi ang bawkin an ngai kawi a, mahni chhiatna an thlen ṭhîn a." 
2Peter3:17 Duh takte u, nangni zawngin in hre tawh a, fîmkhur rawh u; chuti lo zawng pawisak nei loten an hruai bo vang che u a, in nghet ṭha lai in tlu hlauh dah ang e." 
2Peter3:18 Kan Lalpa leh chhandamtu Isua Krista hriatnaah te, khawngaihnaah te ṭhang lian zêl rawh u. A hnênah chuan tûn aṭanga chatuan thlengin ropuina awm rawh se. Amen." 
1John1:1 A tîr aṭanga awm, kan benga kan hriat, kan mita kan hmuh, ngun taka kan en, kuta kan khawih, nunna thu chu kan ziak a ni." 
1John1:1 A tîr aṭanga awm, kan benga kan hriat, kan mita kan hmuh, ngun taka kan en, kuta kan khawih, nunna thu chu kan ziak a ni." 
1John1:2 Chu nunna chu a lo lang a, kan hmu ta a, kan puang a, Pa hnêna awm chatuan nunna kan hnêna lo lang ta chu kan hrilh che u a ni." 
1John1:2 Chu nunna chu a lo lang a, kan hmu ta a, kan puang a, Pa hnêna awm chatuan nunna kan hnêna lo lang ta chu kan hrilh che u a ni." 
1John1:3 Nangnin min pâwl ve theih nân kan hmuh leh kan hriat chu kan hrilh che u a, chu kan inpâwlna chu Pa leh Fapa Isua Krista nêna kan inpâwlna a ni si a." 
1John1:3 Nangnin min pâwl ve theih nân kan hmuh leh kan hriat chu kan hrilh che u a, chu kan inpâwlna chu Pa leh Fapa Isua Krista nêna kan inpâwlna a ni si a." 
1John1:4 Kan lâwm a famkim theih nân hêng thu hi kan ziak a ni. 
1John1:4 Kan lâwm a famkim theih nân hêng thu hi kan ziak a ni. 
1John1:5 Thuchah a hnên ata kan hriat kan hrilh chhâwn che u chu hei hi a ni: Pathian chu êng a ni a, amahah chuan thim rêng a awm lo tih hi." 
1John1:5 Thuchah a hnên ata kan hriat kan hrilh chhâwn che u chu hei hi a ni: Pathian chu êng a ni a, amahah chuan thim rêng a awm lo tih hi."

3John1:15 Thlamuanna i hnênah awm rawh se. Kan ṭhiante hian chibai an bûk a che. Kan ṭhiante kha an hming lam ṭheuhvin chibai mi bûksak ang che. 
Jude1:1 Isua Krista bawih leh Jakoba unau Juda chuan, Pa Pathian khawngaihna leh Isua Krista vênhimnaa awm, kohte chu chibai ka bûk e." 
Jude1:2 Khawngaihna te, remna te, hmangaihna te in chungah tihpunin awm rawh se. Zirtîrna dik lo chungchâng (2 Pet. 2:1-17)" 
Jude1:3 Duh takte u, chhandamna kan dawn tlân chungchâng hi in hnêna ziak ka châk êm êm ṭhîn a; Pathianin a mi thianghlimte hnêna rinna thu vawi khat a kawl nghehtîr tawh hi ṭan tlat tûra fuih tûr che uin in hnênah ziak lo thei ka ni ta lo." 
Jude1:4 In zîngah sakhaw pawisa lo mi tute emaw an inzep lût ru a, Pathian khawngaihna thu hi an hurna sawi mawi nân an hmang a, kan hotu leh Lalpa neih chhun Isua Krista an pawm duh hek lo, chûng mite chu thiam loh chang tûra ruat daih tawh an ni." 
Jude1:5 In hriat tawh sa vek ni mah se, hêng hi han hriat nawntîr che u ka duh a ni. Lalpan Aigupta ram aṭangin Israel mite a chhan chhuak a; mahse, an zînga ring lotute chu a tihboral leh tâk dân te," 
Jude1:6 Vântirhkohte pawh an awmna chhuahsana, an hna tlânsante chu, an chungthu Rorêlna Ni ropuia ngaihtuah atân, chatuan khaidiata phuarin thim hnuaia dah an nih thu te," 
Jude1:7 chutiang bawka Sodom leh Gomora khuate pawh, an kiang vêl khuate nên, hurna bawlhhlawhah an inpumpêk avânga mi dangte zilh lâwk nân kumkhaw meia hrem an nih thu te kha." 
Jude1:8 Hêng mite pawh hi chutiang bawkin an che ṭhîn a ni. Zêl an hmu chawp a, an taksa an tibawlhhlawh a, thuneitu an pawisa lo va, vân mi ropuite an sawichhe ṭhîn." 
Jude1:9 Mikaela, vântirhkoh chungnung ber meuh pawhin, Diabola nên Mosia ruang chungchânga an inhnial lai khân, ṭawng chhiain a hau duh lo va, “Lalpan hau che rawh se,” a ti mai zâwk a ni." 
Jude1:10 Hêng mite erawh hi chuan an hriatthiam loh apiang an sawi chhe ṭhîn a; ngaihtuahna nei lo ramsaten an pianpui hriatna an zui ang maia anni pawh hian an zui avângin anmahni a tichhia a ni. 
Jude1:11 An va khawngaihthlâk tak êm! Kaina kawng chu an zawh a, tangka ûmin Balaama sualna kawngah an tlân a, Kora angin an hel a, an boral ve ta!" 
Jude1:12 Chûngho chu hmangaihna ruai in ṭheh tihmêlhemtu an ni, zak lovin an kîl ve a. Mahni chauh an inngaihtuah a, chhûm ruahtui pai lo, favâng thing rah lo, a zung chawpa tlu kar vek tawh ang;" 
Jude1:13 tuifinriat invawrh phuan, mahni inmualpho, arsi vâkvai, chatuan thim chhah mup khêksakte ang chu an ni." 
Jude1:14 Adama thlah kal zêl pasarihna, Enoka chuan hêng mite chungchâng hi a lo hril lâwk a, “En teh u, Lalpa chu a mi thianghlim sâng tam tak nên a lo kal e." 
Jude1:15 Sakhaw pawisa lo zawng zawngten Pathian ṭih lova an thil tih zawng zawng leh, amah dodâla thu khauh tak tak an sawi zawng zawng chungchângah, sakhaw pawisa lo mi sualte thiam loh chantîr tûr leh mi zawng zawng chunga rorêl tûrin a lo kal dâwn a ni.”" 
Jude1:16 Chûng mite chuan phunnawi leh mi sawisêl chauh an hrât a, anmahni châkna sual chauh an ûm a, pâwr tak takin an uang a, hlâwkna ûmin mi tlawn an peih êm êm a." 
Jude1:17 Duh takte, u, nangni zawngin kan Lalpa Isua Krista tirhkohten thu an hril lâwk kha hre reng rawh u." 
Jude1:18 “Hun hnuhnûngah chuan, nuihsantute, sakhaw ngaihsak lova mahni châkna ang zêla khawsate an lo la awm ang,” tia an hrilh che u kha." 
Jude1:19 Chûngho chu inṭhenna tichhuaktu, tisa mi, Thlarau nei lote an ni." 
Jude1:20 Duh takte u, nangni zawng in rinna thianghlim takah chuan mahni inrem chho tlat ula; Thlarau Thianghlima ṭawngṭaiin," 
Jude1:21 Pathian hmangaihnaah chuan invawng ṭha ula, chatuan nun nân kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu nghâk rawh u." 
Jude1:22 Ringhlelte chu khawngaih ula," 
Jude1:23 ṭhenkhat mei ata chhan chhuah ngaite chu hnûk chhuak thuai rawh u; ṭhenkhat chu hlau chungin khawngaih ula, an tisa bawlhhlawh kai silhfênte chu ten rawh u." 
Jude1:24 Tlu lo tûra vêng thei che u, a ropuina hmaa sawisêlbo leh hlim êm êma dintîr thei che u," 
Jude1:25 Pathian awm chhun, min chhandamtu hnênah chuan, kan Lalpa Isua Krista zârah, ropuina te, lalna te, thiltihtheihna te, thuneihna te, hun kal tawh zawng zawng ata tûnah leh chatuan thlengin awm zêl rawh se. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Isua Krista thupuan hi thil lo thleng thuai tûr, a bawihte hriat atân Pathian pêk a ni; chu chu Isuan Vântirhkoh tîrin, a bawih Johana hnênah a hrilh lâwk a;" 
Revelation1:2 ani chuan Pathian thu leh Isua thu a dawn ang ang chu a puang ta a ni. 
Revelation1:3 He lehkhabu chhiartu leh a chhûnga hrilh lâwkna thute lo bengkhawna zâwmtute chu an nihlawh e, hun a thleng ṭêp si a." 
Revelation1:4 Johana chuan Asia rama kohhran pasarihte chibai a bûk e. Awm mêka leh awm tawha leh lo kal tûra leh a lalṭhutthlêng hmaa thlarau pasarih leh," 
Revelation1:5 Isua Krista, thuhretu rinawm, mitthi zînga tho hmasa ber, leia lalte chunga hotu hnên aṭangin khawngaihna leh remna in hnênah awm rawh se. Min hmangaiha, a thisena kan sualte min sil faisaktu," 
Revelation1:6 lala min siama, a pa Pathian tân puithiama min siamtu hnênah, ama hnên ngeiah chuan ropuina leh thuneihna chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Ngai teh, chhûm zîngah a lo kal e, mit tinrêngin an hmu ang, amah chhuntute ngei pawhin an hmu ang. Khawvêla hnam tinrêngin amah an ṭah bawk ang: Ni e. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 “Kei Alfa leh Omega chu ka ni,” Lalpa Pathian, Engkimtitheia, awm mêka leh awm tawha leh lo kal tûra chuan a ti." 
Revelation1:9 Kei Johana, in unau, Isua avânga tihduhdahna chhel taka tuarpuitu che u leh, a lalna ṭâwmpuitu che u hi, Pathian thu avâng leh Isua thu ka hril avângin Patmos an tih thliarkârah ka awm a." 
Revelation1:10 Lalpa ni-ah chuan thlarauvin ka lo awm a. Tawtawrâwt ri ang maia ring ka hnung lamah aw ka hria a. 
Revelation1:11 “I thil hmuh hi lehkhabuah ziak la, kohhran pasarih - Efesi kohhran te, Smurna kohhran te, Pergamos kohhran te, Thuatira kohhran te, Sardis kohhran te, Filadelfia kohhran te leh Laodikei kohhran te thawn rawh,” a ti a." 
Revelation1:12 Mi betu hmuh tuma ka han lehhawi chuan, rangkachak khâwnvâr zâr sarih ka hmu a," 
Revelation1:13 chûng zîngah chuan mihring ang, kelêr thlenga kawrfual ha rangkachak kâwnghrên hrêng ka hmu a;" 
Revelation1:14 a sam chu sahmul vâr tak ang, vûr ang maia vâr a ni a, a mit chu meialh ang a ni." 
Revelation1:15 A ke chu dâr tle mi, meia rawh thianghlim ang a ni a, a aw chu tuifinriat ri hum hum ang hi a ni." 
Revelation1:16 A kut ding lamin arsi pasarih a keng a, a ka aṭangin khandaih hriam tawn hriam tak a lo chhuak a, a hmêl chu ni sat vânglai tak anga êng a ni." 
Revelation1:17 Ani chu ka hmuh veleh thi ang maiin a ke bulah ka tlu ta a. A kut ding lam ka chungah a rawn nghat a, “Hlau suh, Hmasabera leh Hnuhnûngbera," 
Revelation1:18 Minunga chu ka ni, ka thi a; nimahsela, ngai teh, tûnah zawng chatuana nung tûrin ka lo tho leh ta a; thihna leh mitthi khaw chabite ka nei a ni." 
Revelation1:19 I thil hmuh tâkte, thil awm mêk leh thil lo thleng tûrte chu ziak rawh." 
Revelation1:20 Ka kut ding lama arsi pasarih leh, rangkachak khâwnvâr zâr sarih i hmuhte awmze ril chu hei hi a ni: Arsi pasarih hi kohhran pasarih tirhkohte an ni a, khâwnvâr zâr sarih hi kohhran pasarihte an ni,” a ti a." 
Revelation2:1 “Efesi khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah heti hian ziak rawh: ‘A kut ding lama arsi pasarih kenga, rangkachak khâwnvâr dahna pasarih zînga vei veia khân heti hian a ti:" 
Revelation2:2 I thiltihte ka hria, i thawhrimzia te, i chhelzia te, mi sual i ngaihtheih lohzia te, tirhkoh ni si lo tirhkoh invuahte chu i fiah a, a der an nih i hriat tâk thu te ka hria." 
Revelation2:3 I chhel êm êm a, ka hming avângin i tuar a, i beidawng lo va." 
Revelation2:4 Nimahsela, demna che ka nei: a tîra mi hmangaih ang khân mi hmangaih ta lo." 
Revelation2:5 I tlûksan tâk kha ngaihtuah teh; sim la, a tîra i tih ang kha ti leh rawh. Chutilo zawng, i hnênah ka lo kal ang a, i sim loh chuan a awmna ata i khâwnvâr chu ka sawn daih ang." 
Revelation2:6 Nikola-ho thil tih, ka huatzâwng i haw ve hi erawh chu i ti ṭha e." 
Revelation2:7 Thlarauvin kohhranho hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. A hnehtu apiang chu Pathian paradis-a awm nunna thing rahin ka châwm ang.’ 
Revelation2:8 “Smurna khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Hmasabera leh Hnuhnûngbera, thi-a nung leh ta-a khân heti hian a ti:" 
Revelation2:9 I tuarnate ka hria, i pachhe na a, i hausak si hi. Juda ni lo Juda inti, Setana sunagog-a miten an sawichhiat dân che pawh ka hria." 
Revelation2:10 I thil tuarte chu hlau suh. Ngai teh, in zînga mi ṭhenkhat chu tân ina khungin, Diabola chuan a fiah dâwn a che u, ni sâwm chhûng in tuar ang. Thih thlengin rinawm takin awm zêl la, chawimawina lukhum, nunna chu ka pe ang che." 
Revelation2:11 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. A hnehtu apiang thih hnihna chuan eng mah a tih lo vang.’ 
Revelation2:12 “Pergamos khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Khandaih hriam tawn neia chuan heti hian a ti: 
Revelation2:13 Setana lalṭhuthlêng hûnna hmunah i awm tih ka hria; mahse, ka hming i ṭan tlata, ka thuhretu rinawm Antipa, Setana awmna hmuna an thah lai pawh khân, mi rinna i thlah chuang lo va." 
Revelation2:14 Amaherawhchu, tlêmin demna che ka nei: In zîngah mi ṭhenkhat Balaama zirtîrna vuan tlat in awm. Ani chuan Balaka chu Israel fate hruai sual dân a zirtîr a, Israel fate chu milem biakna sa ei tûr leh inngaihna suala tlu tûrin a hruai a." 
Revelation2:15 Chutiang bawkin, in zîngah Nikola zirtîrna vuan tlat in awm a." 
Revelation2:16 Sim ula, chutilo chuan in hnênah ka lo kal thuai dâwn, chûng thil titute chu ka kâa khandaih hian ka rawn bei ang." 
Revelation2:17 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. A hnehtu apiang mana thuhrûk ka pe ang a, lungvâr ka pe bawk ang; chu lungah chuan mi dang tu ma hriat loh, a dawngtu chauh hriat tûr hming thar a chuang a ni.’" 
Revelation2:18 “Thuatira khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Pathian Fapa, meialh ang mit nei, dâr tle mi ang ke neia chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Revelation2:19 I thil tihte ka hria, mi hmangaihzia te, i rinawmzia te, i rawngbâwl dân te, i dawhtheihzia te, a tîr aia tûna thil i tihṭhat zâwk tâkzia te ka hria." 
Revelation2:20 Amaherawhchu, demna che ka nei; kha hmeichhia, Jezebeli, zâwlneia inchhâl kha i ngaihtheih avângin. Ani chuan ka bawihte milem biakna sa eia inngaih chîng tûrin a zirtîr a, a hruai bo va." 
Revelation2:21 A sim nân hun ka pe a, inngaih a chîn a thlah chuang lo." 
Revelation2:22 Ngai rawh, khumbetin ka nattîr dâwn, an thil chîn an sim loh chuan a uirepuite pawh nasa takin ka timangang ang." 
Revelation2:23 Amah zuitute pawh ka tihlum ngei dâwn; tichuan, kohhranten mite thinlung leh rilru hre vektu ka ni tih an hria ang. In thil tih ang zêl ṭheuhvin ka rûl ang che u." 
Revelation2:24 ‘Thuatira khaw mi dangte erawh zawngin he zirtîrna hi in zâwm ve lo va, ‘Setana thu ril’ an tihte pawh in pawm ve loh avângin phurrit ka belhchhah lo vang che u, ka ti a ni." 
Revelation2:25 Ka lo kal leh hma chu in thil neih sa kha vawng tlat rawh u. 
Revelation2:26 A tâwp thlenga ka duh zâwng ti tlattu, hnehtu chu Jentail-te chunga thuneihna ka pe ang." 
Revelation2:27 An chungah thîrtiang hmangin ro a rêl ang a, hlumbêl angin a vaw sawm ang." 
Revelation2:28 Pa hnên ata ka dawn vârparh arsi chu ka pe bawk ang. 
Revelation2:29 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se.’ 
Revelation3:1 “Sardis khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Pathian Thlarau pasarih leh arsi pasarih neia chuan heti hian a ti. 
Revelation3:2 I thil tihte ka hria; thi reng siin nunga i than hi; intiharh la, i thil neih thi lek lekte chu tinung leh rawh. I thiltihte chu ka Pathian mit tlung zo a awm lo va ni." 
Revelation3:3 Tichuan, an zirtîr che leh i thu dawnte kha hre rengin zâwm la, i sual kha sim rawh. I harh loh erawh chuan rûkru angin ka lo kal ang a, i hnên ka lo thlen hun i hre lo dah ang e." 
Revelation3:4 Sardis khuaa mi ṭhenkhat erawh chu an thawmhnaw tibawlhhlawh lo an awm, chûng chu kawrfual vâr ha-in ka hnênah an lêng ve ang, chutianga awm tlâk chu an ni si a." 
Revelation3:5 Hnehtute chuan chutiang chuan kawrfual vâr an ha ang a, nunna bua an hming chuang chu ka thai bo lo vang. Ka Pa leh vântirhkohte hmaah anni chu ka ṭan ang." 
Revelation3:6 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se.’ 
Revelation3:7 “Filadelfia khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Thianghlima leh Dika, Davida chabi neia, tu ma khâr theih loh tûra kawngkhâr hawnga, tu ma hawn theih loh tûra khâra chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Revelation3:8 I thiltihte ka hria, chakna tlêm tê chauh i nei na a, ka thu i vawng tlat a, tu ma khâr theih loh tûr i hmaah kawngka ka hawng a." 
Revelation3:9 Tin, Setana sunagog-a mi, mi dawthei, Juda ni si lova Juda intite chu hruaiin i hmaah ka rawn kûntîr dâwn; nang hi ka hmangaih chu i ni tih an hre tawh ang." 
Revelation3:10 Chhel taka awm tûra thu ka pêk che i vawn avângin leia chêng zawng zawng fiah nân khawvêl puma hremna lo thlen hunah kei pawhin ka humhim ang che. 
Revelation3:11 Ka lo kal thuai dâwn e, i thil neih sa kha vawng tlat la; tichuan, tu man chawimawina lukhum i chan tûr chu an chhuhsak lo vang che." 
Revelation3:12 A hnehtu apiang chu ka Pathian Tempul banah ka phun ang a, chuta ta chu sawn an ni tawh lo vang. Pa Pathian hming anmahniah chuan a chuang ang a, Pathian khawpui Jerusalem thar, ka Pathian hnên ata lo chhuk hming leh ka hming thar chu anmahniah ka ziak bawk ang." 
Revelation3:13 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se.’ 
Revelation3:14 “Laodikei khaw kohhran tirhkoh hnênah pawh heti hian ziak rawh: ‘Amena, Thuhretu rinawma leh Dika, Pathian thil siam zawng zawng bula chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Revelation3:15 I thiltihte ka hria, i vâwt lo va, i lum hek lo; i vawh emaw, i lum emaw ka duh a ni." 
Revelation3:16 Vawt si lo, lum pep pup chauh i nih avângin ka kâ ata ka chhâk chhuak ang che." 
Revelation3:17 ‘Ka hausa a, engkim ka ngah a, tlâkchham ka nei lo,’ i ti vei a; rethei khawngaihthlâk, pachhia, mitdel leh saruak mai i ni tih i inhre si lo." 
Revelation3:18 Tichuan, i hausak theih nân rangkachak meia rawh thianghlim ka hnên aṭanga lei tûrin ka râwn a che. I saruak zahpuiawm tak khuh tûrin i hâk atân kawr vâr lei la, i hmuh theih nân mit na damdawi lei bawk rawh." 
Revelation3:19 Ka hmangaihte chu ka zilhin ka thunun ṭhîn; chuvângin, ka thu awih la, sim rawh." 
Revelation3:20 Ngai teh, kawngkhâr bula dingin ka kik hi, tu pawh ka aw hriaa kawng mi hawnsaktu hnênah chuan ka lût ang a, zanriah ka ei ang a, ani pawhin ka hnênah a ei bawk ang." 
Revelation3:21 A hnehtute apiang ka lalṭhutthlêngah ka ṭhuttîr ang a; kei pawhin ka hneha, ka Pa bulah a lalṭhutthlênga ka ṭhu ang hian." 
Revelation3:22 Thlarauvin kohhrante hnêna thu a sawi hi hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se.’ ” 
Revelation4:1 Chûng hnu chuan ka han en a, vâna kawngka inhawng ka hmu a, tawtawrâwt ri ang aw, mi bia ka hriat tawh khân, “Hetah hian lo chho la, tûn hnua thil lo awm ngei tûr ka entîr ang che,” mi ti a." 
Revelation4:2 Thlarauvin ka awm ta nghâl a. Vânah chuan lalṭhutthlêng a lo awm a, tah chuan mi pakhat a ṭhu a." 
Revelation4:3 A hmêl chu Jaspi leh Sardion lung ang a ni a, lalṭhutthlêng vêlah chuan Samaragdin lung rawng ang chhimbâl a zâm kual a." 
Revelation4:4 Lalṭhutthlêng hual chuan lalṭhutthlêng dang sawmhnih leh pali a inhûng a, tah chuan upa sawmhnih leh pali an ṭhu a, a vârin an inthuam a, rangkachaka siam chawimawina lukhum an khum bawk a." 
Revelation4:5 Lalṭhutthlêng aṭang chuan kâwl a phe a, aw te, khawpui te a lo ri chhuak dur dur a. Lalṭhutthlêng hmaah chuan meichher pasarih a alh hluah hluah a, chûng chu Pathian thlarau pasarihte an ni." 
Revelation4:6 Lalṭhutthlêng hma lamah chuan tuifinriat ang dârthlalang, krustal lung anga fîm a awm bawk a. A laia lalṭhutthlêng vêlah chuan hnung lam leh hma lam mita khat, thilnung pali an ding kual a." 
Revelation4:7 Thilnung pakhatna chu Sakeibaknei ang a ni a, thilnung pahnihna chu bâwngpa ang a ni a, thilnung pathumna chu mihring hmêl ang pu a ni a, thilnung palina chu mupui thlâwk lai ang a ni." 
Revelation4:8 Thilnung palite chuan thla paruk an nei ṭheuh va, an pâwn lam leh an chhûng lam chu mitin a khat bawk a: “Lalpa Pathian, Engkimtitheia, awm tawha leh awm mêka leh lo kal tûra chu a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e,” tia auvin chhun leh zân an châwl lo." 
Revelation4:9 Thilnung palite chuan lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu, chatuana nung renga chu an chawimawia, an faka, lâwmthu an hrilh apiangin," 
Revelation4:10 lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a hmaah chuan upa sawmhnih leh palite chu an bawkkhup a, chatuana nung renga chu chibai an bûk ṭhîn a." 
Revelation4:11 Lalṭhutthlêng hmaah chuan an lu-a chawimawina lukhum chu an dah a, “Nang, kan Lalpa leh kan Pathian, Ropuina te, chawimawina te, Thiltihtheihna te nei tlâk i ni e, Thil engkim i siam a, I thuin an lo awm a, din chhuah an lo ni,” an ti a." 
Revelation5:1 Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a ding lamah chuan, pâwn lam leh chhûng lama ziak lehkhabu zial, chhinchhiahna pasariha châr tlat ka hmu a." 
Revelation5:2 Vântirhkoh thiltithei tak ka hmu bawk a, “Tu nge lehkhabu zial hi hawnga, a chhinchhiahnate hi phelh tlâk awm?” tiin ring takin a tlângau va." 
Revelation5:3 Lehkhabu zial chu phelha, a chhûng en thei vânah tu mah an awm lo va, leiah leh lei hnuaiah pawh tu mah an awm hek lo." 
Revelation5:4 Lehkhabu zial chu phelha en tlâk tu mah an awm loh avâng chuan ka ṭap ta zawih zawih a. 
Revelation5:5 Upa zînga pakhat chuan, “Ṭap teh suh, ngai teh, Juda hnama sakeibaknei, Davida thlaha mi khân chhinchhiahna chu phelh tûr leh, lehkhabu zial chu pharh tûrin a hneh ta,” a ti a." 
Revelation5:6 Tin, thilnung pali leh upaho ṭhut hual, a laia lalṭhutthlêngah chuan, Berâmno talh tawh ni âwm tak ding ka hmu a. Berâmno chuan mit pasarih leh ki pasarih, lei hmun tina tirh chhuah ṭhin, Pathian thlarau pasarih chu a nei a." 
Revelation5:7 Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a ding lama lehkhabu zial chu la tûrin a lo kal a. 
Revelation5:8 A han lâk chuan thilnung palite leh upa sawmhnih leh palite chu Berâmno hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a, perhkhuang leh rangkachak berhbu, rimtui mi thianghlimte ṭawngṭainaa khat chu an keng ṭheuh va," 
Revelation5:9 hla thar an sa a: “Nang, lehkhabu zial chu laa, a chhinchhiahna phelh tlâk i ni e. I thi a, i thisenin hnam tin, ṭawng tin, mi tin leh Jentail-te, Pathian tân i lei a;" 
Revelation5:10 Lalah te, kan Pathian tân puithiamah te i siam a. Lei chungah an lal ang,” tiin." 
Revelation5:11 Ka en reng a, lalṭhutthlêng leh thilnung leh upaho din huala vântirhkoh rual, a sînga sîng, a sânga sâng rual tam tak aw ka hria a, ring takin an au va," 
Revelation5:12 “Berâmno talh tawha chu, Thiltihtheihna te, hausakna te, finna te, chakna te, chawimawina te, Ropuina te, fakna te dawng tlâk a ni e,” an ti a." 
Revelation5:13 Thil nung tinrêng, vâna mi te, leia mi te, lei hnuaia mi te, tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng te au thâwm ka hre bawk a, “Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a leh Berâmno chuan fakna te, chawimawina te, ropuina te, Thiltihtheihna te chatuanin nei rawh se,” an ti a." 
Revelation5:14 Thilnung palite chuan, ‘Amen,’ an lo ti a, upate pawh chuan bawkkhupin chibai an bûk a." 
Revelation6:1 Berâmno chuan chhinchhiahna pasarih zînga pakhat a phelh lai chu ka hmu a, thilnung pali zînga pakhat chuan khawpui ri ang maia auvin, “Lo chhuak rawh,” a tih ka hria a." 
Revelation6:2 Ka han en a, sakawr vâr ka hmu a, a chunga chuang chuan thalngul a keng a, chawimawina lukhum an khumtîr a, hneh zêl tûrin hnehtu chu a chhuak ta a." 
Revelation6:3 Chhinchhiahna pahnihna a han phelh a, thilnung pahnihna chuan, “Lo chhuak rawh,” a tih ka hria a." 
Revelation6:4 Ka han en a, sakawr dang, a sen a lo chhuak a. A chunga chuang chu insâmpui a thlen theih nân lei ata remna lâk bo theihna an pe a, khandaih lian pui mai an pe bawk a." 
Revelation6:5 Chhinchhiahna pathumna a han phelh leh a, thilnung pathumna chuan, “Lo chhuak rawh,” a tih ka hria a. Ngai teh, kan han en chuan sakawr dum ka hmu a. A chunga chuang chuan a kutin bûkna a keng a." 
Revelation6:6 Thilnung palite zîng aṭanga chhuak ni âwm tak aw ka hria a, “Ni khat hlawhin buhpui kg. khat, ni khat hlawhin barli kg. Thum; uain leh hriak chu khawih tel suh,” tiin." 
Revelation6:7 Chhinchhiahna palina a han phelh a, thilnung palina chuan, “Lo chhuak rawh,” a tih ka hria a." 
Revelation6:8 Ka han en a, ngai teh, sakawr dâng ka hmu a, a chunga chuang hming chu Thihnaa a ni a, Mitthikhuaan a rawn zui a. Ngûnhnâm te, ṭâm te, hri te, ram sakawlh te hmanga tihlum tûrin lei hmun li-a ṭhena hmun khat chunga thuneihna an pe a." 
Revelation6:9 Chhinchhiahna pangana a han phelh a, Pathian thu avâng leh an thu hrilh avânga thah, mi thianghlimte thlarau chu maichâm hnuaiah ka hmu a." 
Revelation6:10 Anni chu aw ring takin an au va, “Aw Lalpa ropui, mi thianghlim leh mi dik tak, engtikah nge lei mite chunga ro i rêl anga, kan thisen phuba chu min lâksak dâwn?” an ti a." 
Revelation6:11 Kawrfual vâr an pe ṭheuh va, an bawihpuite leh an unaute, anmahni ang bawka thah an nih hma chu lo nghâk rih tûrin an hrilh ta bawk a." 
Revelation6:12 Chhinchhiahna parukna a han phelh chuan lîr a nghîng ta chiam a, sahmul puan dum ang maiin ni a lo thim a, thla chu thisen angin a sen bawk a." 
Revelation6:13 Thlipuiin theipui hel a nuai ṭîl ang maiin arsite chu leiah a tla chum chum a. 
Revelation6:14 Vân chu lehkhabu anga zial bo a ni a, tlângte leh thliarkâr zawng zawng chu sawn an ni ta vek a." 
Revelation6:15 Tichuan, leia lalte, hotute, sipai hotute, mi hausa leh mi thiltitheite leh mi dang, bawih leh bawih lote pawh chu pûkah te, tlânga lungpui phênah te an biru a." 
Revelation6:16 Tlâng leh lungpui te hnênah chuan, “Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a mit hmuh ata leh Berâmno thinurna lak ata min delh ula, min khuh rawh u." 
Revelation6:17 An thinurna râpthlâk tak chu a lo thleng ta si a, tu nge tuar zo vang?” an ti a." 
Revelation7:1 Chûng hnuah chuan lei kil li-ah vântirhkoh pali ding ka hmu a, lei chungah te, tuifinriat chungah te, thing chungah te thli a tleh loh nân thli palite chu an chelh tlat a." 
Revelation7:2 Vântirhkoh dang, Pathian nung chhinchhiahna keng, khawchhak lama lo chhuak ka hmu bawk a; lei leh tuifinriat tihchhiat theihna an pêk vântirhkoh palite chu ring takin a han au va," 
Revelation7:3 “Kan Pathian bawihte chala kan chhinchhiah zawh hma chu lei te, tuifinriat te, thing te eng mah tih suh u,” tiin." 
Revelation7:4 Israela fa, hnam sâwm leh pahnih zînga mi an chhinchhiah zât chu, mi nuaikhat leh sîngli leh sângli an ni tih an sawi ka hria; hetiangin:" 
Revelation7:5 Juda hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Reubena hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Gada hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih," 
Revelation7:6 Asera hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Naftalia hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Manasea hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih," 
Revelation7:7 Sumeona hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Levia hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Isakara hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih," 
Revelation7:8 Zebuluna hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Josefa hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih, Benjamina hnama mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih." 
Revelation7:9 Chûng hnuah chuan mipui nasa tak tu ma chhiar sên loh, Jentail-te leh hnam tin, mi tin, ṭawng tina mi ka hmu a, tûmkaute kenga kawrfual vâr ha-in lalṭhutthlêng leh Berâmno hmaah chuan an ding a." 
Revelation7:10 Ring takin an au va: “Chhandamna chu kan Pathian Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu leh Berâmno hnêna mi a ni,” an ti a." 
Revelation7:11 Vântirhkoh zawng zawng chu lalṭhutthlêng leh upate leh thilnung palite hualin an ding a, lalṭhutthlêng hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a, Pathian chibai an bûk a:" 
Revelation7:12 Amen, Fakna te, ropuina te, finna te, Lâwmthu sawina te, chawimawina te, thiltihtheihna te leh Chakna te kumkhuain kan Pathian ta a ni, Amen,” an ti a." 
Revelation7:13 Upa zînga pakhat chuan, “Hêng kawrfual vâr hate hi tute nge ni-a, khawi lam aṭanga lo kal nge an nih?” tiin mi zâwt a." 
Revelation7:14 Kei chuan ka chhâng a, “Ka pu, nangin i hre zâwk ang,” ka ti a. Ani chuan, “Hêng mite hi hrehawm nasa tak ata chhuak hote kha an ni a, an puante su faia, an silhfênte Berâmno thisena tivâr tate an nih hi." 
Revelation7:15 Chuvâng chuan, Pathian lalṭhutthlêng hmaah an awm a, a tempulah chuan a chhûn a zânin a rawng an bâwl ta a ni: Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu-a chuan an chungah a puan in a zârsak dâwn si a." 
Revelation7:16 An rilṭâm leh tawh ngai lo vang a, an tuihâl tawh hek lo vang, ni sa an tuar ngai tawh lo vang a, khaw lumin a tihrehawm tawh hek lo vang." 
Revelation7:17 Lalṭhutthlêng laia awm Berâmno chu anmahni vêngtu a ni ang a, nunna tuikhurah te chuan a hruai ang. Pathian chuan an mit ata mittui zawng zawng a hru fai ang,” a ti a." 
Revelation8:1 Tin, chhinchhiahna pasarihna a han phelh chuan dâr chanve lai vân chu a reh ta ṭhup a." 
Revelation8:2 Pathian hmaa vântirhkoh pasarih ding ka hmu a, tawtawrâwt pasarih an pe a." 
Revelation8:3 Vântirhkoh dang, rangkachak berhbu keng, lalṭhutthlêng hmaa rangkachak maichâmah chuan a lo kal a, mi thianghlimte ṭawngṭaina belhchhah nân rimtui hâl tûr an pe ṭeuh va." 
Revelation8:4 Vântirhkoh kuta rimtui hâl khu chu mi thianghlim ṭawngṭainate nên chuan Pathian hmaah a khu chho ta a. 
Revelation8:5 Vântirhkoh chuan berhbu chu a la a, maichâma meiling chu a khatin a rût a, leiah a paih thla a. Tichuan, khawpui a ri a, aw a lo chhuak a, kâwl a lo phe a, lîr te a lo nghîng ta dur dur a." 
Revelation8:6 Tin, vântirhkoh pasarihte chuan tawtawrâwt an kente chu hâm tûrin an insiam a." 
Revelation8:7 A hmasa ber chuan a han hâm a, rial leh mei, thisen nêna inpawlh leiah a tla ta chiam mai a. Lei hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat leh thing hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu a kâng ral a, hnimhring zawng zawng pawh a kâng ral vek bawk a." 
Revelation8:8 Vântirhkoh pahnihna chuan a han hâm ve a, thil eng emaw, tlâng lian pui kâng hluah hluah ang hi tuifinriatah an paih thla a." 
Revelation8:9 Tuifinriat hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu thisenah a chang ta a, tuifinriata nungcha awm zawng zawng hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu an thi a, lawngte pawh hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu a chhe ta a." 
Revelation8:10 Vântirhkoh pathumna chuan a han hâm ve a; arsi lian tak, meichher anga alh hluah hluah hi vân aṭangin a tla a, lui zawng zawng hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khatah leh tuikhurahte chuan a tla a." 
Revelation8:11 Chu arsi hming chu ‘Khâ’ a ni. Chu chuan tui hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu a tikhâ a, a khâk tâk êm avângin a in tam tak chuan an thih phah ta a." 
Revelation8:12 Vântirhkoh palina chuan a han hâm ve leh a; ni hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat, thla hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat, arsi pawh hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu a chhia a, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu a thim ta a; ni pawhin a ênna hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat a hloh va, zân pawhin chutiang bawkin." 
Revelation8:13 Ka han en a, vânlaizâwlah mupui a lo thlâwk duai duai a, ring takin a hrâm tuar tuar a, “Vântirhkoh pathumten an tawtawrâwt an ham hun chuan leia chêngte tân a va râpthlâk dâwn êm! A va râpthlâk dâwn êm! A va râpthlâk dâwn êm!” a ti a." 
Revelation9:1 Tin, Vântirhkoh pangana chuan a han ham ve a, vân aṭanga leia tla arsi ka hmu a. A hnênah chuan leilâwt chabi an pe a." 
Revelation9:2 Leilâwt chu a han hawng a, a kua aṭang chuan meikhu ang mai a lo khu chhuak ngut ngut a, meikhu lo chhuak avâng chuan ni leh boruak a thim zo ta a." 
Revelation9:3 Meikhu aṭang chuan khau rual leiah an lo chhuak a, leia khawmualkaikuang thiltihtheihna ang thiltihtheihna an pe a." 
Revelation9:4 An chala Pathian chhinchhiahna pu lo mihringte sawisak an phal a; leia hnim rêng rêng, thlai te, thing te erawh chu tichhe lo tûrin an hrilh a." 
Revelation9:5 Chhinchhiahna pu lote chu an tihhlum mai an phalsak lo, thla nga chhûng tihnat chauh an phalsak a; khawmualkaikuang angin an seh a na a ni." 
Revelation9:6 Chûng ni-ah chuan miten thihna an zawng ang a, an hmu si lo vang; thih an châk ang a; mahse, thihna chuan a tlân bosan ang." 
Revelation9:7 Khau lan dân chu indona atân sakawr an thuam ang hi a ni; an lu-ah chuan rangkachaka siam chawimawina lukhum ang hi a awm a, mihring hmêl ang an pu a;" 
Revelation9:8 hmeichhe sam anga sei sam an nei a, an hâ chu sakeibaknei hâ ang a ni;" 
Revelation9:9 phuhlip, thîr-phaw ang an nei a, an thla zâp thâwm chu sakawr-tawlailîr tam tak indonaa tlân ri dur dur ang hi a ni." 
Revelation9:10 Mei an nei bawk a, khawmualkaikuang angin mi an seh thei a, an seh chu thla nga chhûng a na a ni." 
Revelation9:11 An lal chu leilâwt huai a ni a, Hebrai ṭawnga a hming chu ‘Abadona’ a ni, Grik ṭawng chuan ‘Apoluona,’ a ni, chu chu ‘Tiboraltua,’ tihna a ni." 
Revelation9:12 Thil râpthlâk pakhat chu a liam ta a, hêng zawhah hian thil râpthlâk dang pahnih a lo la awm dâwn." 
Revelation9:13 Vântirhkoh parukna chuan a han hâm ve leh a; Pathian hmaa rangkachak maichâm ki pali aṭang chuan aw ka hria a; 
Revelation9:14 tawtawrâwt keng vântirhkoh parukna hnênah chuan, “Eufretis luipuia vântirhkoh pali phuarte khu chhuah rawh,” a ti a." 
Revelation9:15 Tichuan, he kum, he thla, he ni leh dârkâra mihring hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat that tûra buatsaih vântirhkoh palite chu an chhuah ta a." 
Revelation9:16 An sipai sakawr chungchuang mite chu vaibêlchhetak hnih an ni tih mi sawi ka hria. 
Revelation9:17 Tin, inlârnaah chuan sakawr leh a chungchuangte chu hetiang hian ka hmu: mei anga sen, huakintho lung anga dumpâwl, kât anga êng âwmphaw an nei a; chûng sakawr lu chu sakeibaknei lu ang a ni a, an kâ aṭang chuan mei te, meikhu te, kât te a chhuak sung sung a." 
Revelation9:18 An kâ aṭanga hremna lo chhuak mei te, meikhu te, kât te avâng chuan mihring hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu an thi a." 
Revelation9:19 Chûng sakawr thiltihtheihna chu an kâah leh an meiah a awm; an mei chu rûl ang a ni a, lu an nei a, chu chuan mi an tina ṭhîn a ni." 
Revelation9:20 Hêng hremna tihhlum bâk mihringte hian anmahni thilsiam biak an sim chuang lo; rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, lung te leh thinga an milim siam - eng mah hmu thei lo, eng mah hre thei lo, kal pawh kal thei hlei lote biak leh ramhuai biak an bâng chuang lo." 
Revelation9:21 Tual thah an chîn te, an dawi hman te, an hurna te, an rûkrûk te an sim hek lo." 
Revelation10:1 Tin, Vântirhkoh dang, thiltithei tak, vân aṭanga lo chhuk ka hmu a, chhûmin a inthuam a, a lu-ah chhimbâl a zâm a, a hmêl chu ni ang a ni a, a kete pawh chu mei ban ang a ni." 
Revelation10:2 Lehkhabu zial te tak tê inphelh sa hi a keng a. A ke ding lamin tuifinriat a rap a, a vei lam chuan khawmual a rap a." 
Revelation10:3 Sakeibaknei hâhum anga ringin a au va, a han au chuan khawpui ri pasarihte chuan aw an chhuah a." 
Revelation10:4 Khawpui ri pasarihte thu sawi chu ka han ziak dâwn a, vân aṭangin aw ka hre ta a, “Khawpui ri pasarihte thu sawi kha zêp tlat la, ziak suh,” mi rawn ti a." 
Revelation10:5 Tuifinriat leh khawmual kârin Vântirhkoh chu a ding a, a kut ding lam chu vân lamah a phar a," 
Revelation10:6 chatuana nunga, vân leh a chhûnga awm te, lei leh a chhûnga awm te leh tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awm te siamtu hming chhâlin a chham a, “A rei tawh lâwng," 
Revelation10:7 vântirhkoh pasarihnain a tawtawrâwt a ham hun chuan Pathian thurûk, a bawih zâwlneite hnêna a puan chu, a lo thleng tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Revelation10:8 Vân aṭanga aw ka hriat khân mi rawn be leh a, “Tuifinriat leh khawmual kâra ding vântirhkoh kuta lehkhabu zial inphelh sa saw va la rawh,” a ti a." 
Revelation10:9 Vântirhkoh hnênah chuan ka kal a, lehkhabu zial tê chu ka va dîl a. Ani chuan, “La la, ei rawh, i pumah chuan a kha ang a, i kâah erawh chuan khawizu angin a thlum ang,” a ti a." 
Revelation10:10 Vântirhkoh kuta lehkhabu zial chu ka la a, ka ei a; ka kâah chuan khawizu angin a thlum a, ka han lem a, ka pumah chuan a kha ta êm êm a." 
Revelation10:11 Ka hnênah, “Mi te, Jentail te, ṭawng hrang hrang te leh lal tam takte hnênah Pathian thu i puang leh tûr a ni,” mi ti a." 
Revelation11:1 Tin, luang tlâwn, tehna tiang ang hi mi pe a, “Tho la, Pathian tempul leh maichâm chu teh la, a chhûnga betute pawh chhiar rawh;" 
Revelation11:2 Tempul hung chhûng kawtlai erawh chu kân la, teh tel suh; Jentail-te hnêna pêk a ni tawh si a, Jentail-ten khawpui thianghlim chu thla sawmli leh pahnih chhûng an rapbet ang." 
Revelation11:3 Nimahsela, chûng ni sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmruk chhûng chuan ka thuhretu pahnihte chu saiip sinin thu ka sawitîr ang." 
Revelation11:4 Hêng mite hi, oliv thing pahnih leh khâwnvâr pahnih, lei Lalpa hmaa ding ṭhînte chu an ni." 
Revelation11:5 Anni chu tihnat tuma an hmêlmaten an beih phawt chuan an kâ aṭanga mei lo chhuak chuan a kâng ral ṭhîn. 
Revelation11:6 Thu an hril chhûng chuan ruah sûr loh nân vân an khâr thei a, tuite pawh thisenah an chantîr thei a, an duh hun hunah leiah hri tinrêng an lêntîr thei bawk a ni." 
Revelation11:7 Thu an hril zawhah leilâwt aṭanga lo chhuak sakawlh chuan anni chu a do vang a, a hneh ang a, a tihlum ang." 
Revelation11:8 An ruang chu khaw ropui kawtlaiah chuan a lum reng ang a. Chu khawpui chu thlarau lama thlîr chuan Sodom leh Aigupta vuah a ni, an Lalpa an khenbehna khua chu." 
Revelation11:9 An ruang chu mi tinrêng, hnam tinrêng leh ṭawng tinrêng hmangte leh Jentail-te chuan ni thum leh a chanve chhûng an en huai huai ang a, phûm an awih lo vang." 
Revelation11:10 Hêng zâwlnei pahnihte hi an hnawksak êm ṭhin avângin an thi chu leia chêngte chuan an lâwm ang a, intihhlimna an siam ang a, thilpêkte an inpe tawn ang." 
Revelation11:11 Ni thum leh a chanve hnu chuan Pathian hnên ata nunna thaw an chhûngah a lût a, an ding chhuak ta mai a; a entute chuan an hlau ta êm êm a." 
Revelation11:12 Vân aṭanga aw ring tak an hria a, “Hetah hian lo chho rawh u,” a rawn ti a; tichuan, chhûm zîngah vânah an chho ta a, an hmêlmate chuan an thlîr reng a." 
Revelation11:13 Chutih lai tak chuan lîr nasa takin a nghîng a, khawpui hmun sâwma ṭhen hmun khat chu a chim chhe ta a, lîrnghîng avâng chuan mi sângsarih an thi a; a la damte chuan an hlauh avângin, vân Pathian chu an chawimawi a." 
Revelation11:14 Thil râpthlâk pahnihna chu a liam ta a, thil râpthlâk pathumna chu a lo thleng thuai dâwn." 
Revelation11:15 Vântirhkoh pasarihna chuan a han hâm a, vâna ring taka aute chuan, “Lei leh vân hi kan Lalpa leh a Mesia ram a lo ni ta. Ani chu chatuanin a lal tawh ang,” an ti a." 
Revelation11:16 Tin, Pathian lalṭhutthlêng hmaa ṭhu, upa sawmhnih leh palite chuan bawkkhupin Pathian chibai an bûk a," 
Revelation11:17 “Lalpa Pathian Engkimtithei, awm mêk leh awm tawh, I thiltihtheihna ropui tak chu hmangin ro i rêl tâk avângin Kan fak a che." 
Revelation11:18 Jentail-te chu an thinur ta a, Mahse, i thinurna ni a lo thleng ve ta a, Mitthite chunga i rorêl ni chu. I bawih, i zâwlneite, mi thianghlimte, Milian mitê, i hming ṭihtute, Lâwmman i pêk hun leh Lei tichhetute i tihchhiat ve hun chu A thleng ta a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Revelation11:19 Vâna Pathian tempul chu an hawng a, tempul chhûnga thuthlung bâwm chu a lo lang a; kâwl a lo phe a, aw a lo chhuak a, khawpui a lo ri a, lîr a lo nghîng a, rial te a lo tla ta dur dur a." 
Revelation12:1 Vânah chhinchhiahna thil mak tak, hmeichhia - nî-a inthuam, a ke hnuaia thla awm, arsi sâwm leh pahnih chuang chawimawina lukhum khum a lo lang a." 
Revelation12:2 Nau a pai a, a vei a, a rûm a rûm a." 
Revelation12:3 Vânah chhinchhiahna mak tak, Dragon sen lian pui, lu sarih leh ki sâwm nei, a lu-ah chawimawina lukhum pasarih khum a lo lang leh a." 
Revelation12:4 A mei chuan vâna arsi hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat a hâwl a, leiah a hêm thla vek a. Nau a hrin veleha lo dawlh mai tûrin hmeichhe nau vei hmaah chuan a awm ta rûn a." 
Revelation12:5 Jentail-te chunga thîrtianga rorêl tûr fapa a hring a, a fa chu Pathian leh a lalṭhutthlêng hmaah chuan lâk chhoh a ni ta a." 
Revelation12:6 Tin, hmeichhia chu Pathianin a buatsaihsak, thlalêrah chuan a tlân bo ta a, chutah chuan ni sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmruk chhûng an châwm dâwn a ni." 
Revelation12:7 Tin, vânah chuan indona a lo awm a, Mikaela leh a ho vântirhkohte chuan Dragon chu an bei a, Dragon leh a hote chuan an bei lêt ve a;" 
Revelation12:8 mahse, Dragon chuan a hneh ta lo va, vânah chuan an leng ve ta lo va." 
Revelation12:9 Dragon lian pui, rûlpui tar, Diabola leh Setana an tih, khawvêl pum bum ṭhîntu chu an paih chhuak a, a hote nên chuan leiah an paih thla ta a." 
Revelation12:10 Tichuan, vânah ring taka au ka hria a, “Tûnah zet chuan kan Pathianin min chhan chhuak ta, a thiltihtheihzia te, a lalzia te, a Mesia thuneihzia te a lo lang ta. Kan Pathian hmaa dinga, a chhûn a zâna kan unaute hêk ṭhîntu chu vân ata paih thlâk a nih tâk hi." 
Revelation12:11 Berâmno thisen ṭana thu dik an pawm tlat avângin hnehtu an ni a, nun châna thih huam rêng an ni." 
Revelation12:12 Vân te leh a chhûnga chêngte u, lâwm rawh u. Lei leh tuifinriatte u, Diabola chu in hnênah a lo chhuk tâk avângin in chung a pik e, hun tlêm tê chauh a nei tih a hriat avângin a thinur êm êm a ni,” tiin." 
Revelation12:13 Dragon chuan leia paih thlâk a nih a han hriat chuan fapa hringtu hmeichhia kha a ûm ta a. 
Revelation12:14 Hmeichhia chu rûlpui hmuh phâk loh thlalêrah, a awmna tûra a thlawh luh theih nân mupui lian tak thla khing hnih an pe a; chutah chuan kum thum leh a chanve an châwm ang." 
Revelation12:15 Rûlpui chuan a kâ aṭangin hmeichhe lên bo tûr lui tui anga tam tui a pik chhuak ta puat puat a. 
Revelation12:16 Mahse, hmeichhia chu leiin a lo chhan a, a kâ a âng a, Dragon kâ aṭanga lui lo luang chhuak chu a lem zo ta vek a." 
Revelation12:17 Hmeichhe chungah chuan Dragon chu a thinur ta êm êm a, a thlah la awmte, Pathian thupêk zâwma, Isua thu rinawm taka puang ṭhîntute chu do tûrin a thawk chhuak a." 
Revelation12:18 Dragon chu tuifinriat kamah chuan a ding ta a. 
Revelation13:1 Tuifinriat aṭang chuan sakawlh lo chhuak ka hmu a, ki sâwm leh lu sarih a nei a, a ki-ahte chuan lallukhum sâwm an târ bawk a, a lu-ahte chuan Pathian sawichhiatna hming a chuang ṭheuh va." 
Revelation13:2 Ka sakawlh hmuh chu keite ang a ni a, a ke chu savawm ke ang a ni a, a kâ chu sakeibaknei kâ ang a ni. Dragon chuan sakawlh chu a thiltihtheihna te, a lalṭhutthlêng te, a thuneihna nasa tak te chu a pe a." 
Revelation13:3 Sakawlh lu pakhat chu thihpui khawp hialin a hliam a; thihpui khawp hiala hliam chu a dam leh ta mai a. Khawvêl mi zawng zawngin mak an ti a, an zui huai huai a." 
Revelation13:4 Sakawlh hnêna thuneihna a pêk avâng chuan mi tinin Dragon chu chibai an bûk a. Sakawlh pawh chu chibai an bûk bawk a, “Sakawlh ang hi tu nge awm? Tu nge do thei ang?” an ti a." 
Revelation13:5 Pathian huatthu chaltlai taka sawia, thla sawmli leh pahnih chhûng duh tâwka a chêt an phalsak a." 
Revelation13:6 Tichuan, Pathian a sawichhe ta a, a hming te, a tempul te, vâna chêng zawng zawng te a sawichhe ta buan buan a." 
Revelation13:7 Mi thianghlimte a do leh a hneh phal a ni a, hnam tin, mi tin, ṭawng tin leh Jentail-te chunga thuneihna pêk a ni bawk a." 
Revelation13:8 Lei leh vân siam hmaa talh tawh Berâmno Nunna Lehkhabua hming chuangte chauh lo chuan khawvêla mi zawng zawngin amah chu an be dâwn a ni. 
Revelation13:9 Tu pawh hriat theihna beng nei chuan ngaithla ngun rawh se. 
Revelation13:10 Sala tâng tûr chu salah an tâng ang a, khandaiha thi tûr chu khandaihin an thi ang; hetah hian mi thianghlimte chu chhel tak leh rinawm taka an awm a ṭûlzia a lang." 
Revelation13:11 Tin, sakawlh dang, berâm ki ang ki pahnih nei, Dragon anga thâwm na, lei aṭanga lo chhuak ka hmu a," 
Revelation13:12 sakawlh hmasa thuneihna nasa tak chu a hmaah a lek ta a; sakawlh, thihpui khawp hial hliam dam leh kha, lei leh a chhûnga mi zawng zawng a biak luihtîr ta a." 
Revelation13:13 Sakawlh pahnihna chuan thil mak a ti ṭeuh va, mi tin hmuhah vân ata mei te leiah a ko thla a," 
Revelation13:14 sakawlh hmasa hminga thil mak tam tak a tih phalsak a nih avângin leia mi zawng zawng a bum a; sakawlh, khandaih hliam tuar dam leh ta-a lim chu a dintîr a." 
Revelation13:15 Sakawlh lim chu a lo ṭawng theihna tûr leh, sakawlh lim be duh lo apiang a tihhlum theihna tûrin sakawlh lim tihnun theihna thu pêk a ni a." 
Revelation13:16 Sakawlh chuan mi zawng zawng, milian leh mitê, hausa leh rethei, bawih leh bawih lo te pawh an kut ding lamah emaw, an chalah emaw chhinchhiahna a nemsak a;" 
Revelation13:17 chuvângin, sakawlh hming emaw, a hming tlukpui nambar emaw chhinchhiahna pu lo chuan tu mahin thil an leiin an hralh thei lo vang." 
Revelation13:18 Hetah hian fin a ṭûl hle. Chhût thiam chuan sakawlh nambar chu chhût rawh se, mihring nambar a ni si a, a zât chu zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk a ni." 
Revelation14:1 Tin, Zion tlângah chuan Berâmno ding ka hmu a, a hming leh a Pa hming an chala ziak mi nuaikhat leh sîngli leh sângli a bulah an ding a." 
Revelation14:2 Vân aṭang chuan tuifinriat ri ang leh khawpui ri dur dur ang thâwm ka hria a, ka thâwm hriat chu ṭingṭang tum miten an ṭingṭang an tum ri ang a ni." 
Revelation14:3 Lalṭhutthlêng hmaah, thilnung palite leh upate hmaah chuan hla thar an sa a, lei ata tlan chhuahte mi nuaikhat leh sîngli leh sângli chauh lo chuan chu hla chu an hre ve thei lo." 
Revelation14:4 Chûng mite chu hmeichhe laka intibawlhhlawh lo, invawng thianghlim, Berâmno kalna apianga zuitute an ni, mihring zîng ata thlan chhuah, Pathian leh Berâmno tân rah hmasate an ni." 
Revelation14:5 Dâwt an sawi ngai lo va, hmêlhemna an nei hek lo." 
Revelation14:6 Vânlaizâwlan vântirhkoh dang pakhat thlâwk ka hmu a, leia chêng zawng zawng, Jentail te, hnam tinrêng te, ṭawng tinrêng te leh mi tinrêng te hnêna chatuan Chanchin Ṭha puang tûra thlâwk a ni." 
Revelation14:7 Ring takin a au va, “Pathian ṭih ula, chawimawi rawh u, a rorêl hun chu a lo thleng ta si a; vân te, lei te, tuifinriat te leh tuihna te siamtu chu chibai bûk rawh u,” a ti a." 
Revelation14:8 Vântirhkoh dang, a pahnihna chuan a rawn zui a, “A tlâwm ta, Babulon khaw ropui, a hurna uain, hnam zawng zawng Pathian thinurna intîr ṭhîntu chu a tlâwm ta,” a ti a." 
Revelation14:9 Vântirhkoh dang, a pathumna chuan anni chu a rawn zui a, ring takin, “Tu pawh sakawlh leh a lim chu biaa, an chalah emaw, an kutah emaw a chhinchhiahna chuang tawh phawt chuan," 
Revelation14:10 Pathian thinrimna uain fîr, a thinurnaa khat no chu an in ang a, vântirhkoh thianghlimte leh Berâmno hmaah chûng mite chu mei leh kâtin a kâng ang." 
Revelation14:11 Anmahni hremna mei chu chatuanin a khu chho vang; sakawlh leh a lim betute leh a hming putute hremna chuan tâwpintai a nei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Revelation14:12 Hetah hian mi thianghlim, Pathian thupêk avânga Isua ring tlattute tân chhel a ṭûlzia a lang." 
Revelation14:13 Vân aṭanga aw ka hria a: “Ziak rawh, tûn aṭangin mitthi, Lalpaa thite chu an nihlawh e,” a rawn ti a. Thlarau chuan, “Ni e, an thawhrimnate chu an chawlhsan tawh ang, an thiltihte chuan a zui dâwn si a,” a lo ti a." 
Revelation14:14 Tichuan, ka han en a, chhûm vâr ka hmu a, a chungah chuan mihring ang hi a ṭhu a, chu chuan rangkachaka siam chawimawina lukhum a khum a, a kutin favah hriam tak a keng bawk a." 
Revelation14:15 Tempul aṭang chuan vântirhkoh dang a lo chhuak a, chhûm chunga ṭhu hnênah chuan ring takin, “I favah kha phawrh la, ât rawh; buh seng a hun ta, leia buh khu a ngui ta e,” a ti a." 
Revelation14:16 Tichuan, chhûm chunga ṭhu chuan a favah chu leiah a thlâk a, leia buh chu a seng ta a." 
Revelation14:17 Vâna tempul aṭangin vântirhkoh dang a lo chhuak a, ani pawh chuan favah hriam tak a pai a." 
Revelation14:18 Vântirhkoh dang, mei chunga thuneitu, maichâm aṭangin a lo chhuak bawk a, ring takin a au va, “I favah hriam tak kha phawrh la, leia grep khu a hmin tawh a, zu seng rawh,” a ti a." 
Revelation14:19 Tichuan, vântirhkoh chuan favah chu leiah a thlâk a; leia grep rah bâwrte chu a hlep khâwm a, grep sâwrkhur thûk tak, Pathian thinurna khurah chuan a vawm lût a." 
Revelation14:20 Khawpui pâwna uain sâwrkhurah chuan grep chu a rap sâwr ta a; khur aṭang chuan thisen, sakawr thîrbarh chîm phaa thûk, km. zathum leh pasariha thui a luang ta ngûk ngûk a." 
Revelation15:1 Tin, vânah chhinchhiahna dang mak tak leh ropui tak ka hmu a: Vântirhkoh pasarihin hremna hnuhnûng pasarih an rawn keng a, chûng hremnaah chuan Pathian thinrimna a thleng kim ta a ni." 
Revelation15:2 Mei nêna inpawlh ni âwm tak tuifinriat, dârthlalang ang ka hmu a. Sakawlh leh a lim leh a hming nambar hnehtute chu ka hmu bawk a. Pathian ṭingṭang kengin dârthlalang tuifinriat kamah chuan an ding a." 
Revelation15:3 Pathian bawih Mosia leh Berâmno hla an sa: “Lalpa Pathian, Engkimtithei, I thiltihte chu a ropuiin a va mak êm! Hnam tin Lalber, i kawngte chu a felin a dik a ni." 
Revelation15:4 Lalpa, tu nge ṭih lo vang che-a, I hming chawimawi lo vang? Nang chauh hi mi thianghlim chu i ni, Hnam zawng zawng i hmaah lo kalin chibai an bûk ang che. I thiltih dikzia tihlan a ni ta si a,” tiin." 
Revelation15:5 Chumi hnu chuan ka han en a, vânah, tempul hmun thianghlim ber chu a lo inhawng a," 
Revelation15:6 hremna pasarih keng vântirhkoh pasarihte chu tempul aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a; puan zai sîn vâr tle sût an sin a, rangkachak hruiin an âwm an hrêng a." 
Revelation15:7 Chatuana nung reng Pathian thinrimnaa khat rangkachak berhbu pasarih chu, thilnung palite zînga pakhat chuan vântirhkoh pasarihte chu a pe a." 
Revelation15:8 Tempul chu Pathian ropuina leh a thiltihtheihna khu chuan a khat ta mup a, vântirhkoh pasarihte ken hremna pasarih chu a zawh hma chuan tu mah tempulah chuan an lût thei lo." 
Revelation16:1 Tempul aṭanga lo chhuak aw ring tak chuan vântirhkoh pasarihte hnênah, “Kal ula, Pathian thinrimna berhbu pasarihte chu leiah leihbaw rawh u,” a tih ka hria a." 
Revelation16:2 A hmasa ber chu a kal a, a berhbu chu leiah a leihbua a; tichuan, sakawlh leh a chhinchhiahna pute leh a lim betu mihringte tân pânchhia na takah a chang ta a." 
Revelation16:3 A pahnihna chuan a berhbu chu tuifinriatah a leihbua a; tichuan, thisen, mitthi thisen ang maiah a chang ta a; tuifinriata nungcha awm zawng zawng chu an thi zo ta a." 
Revelation16:4 A pathumna chuan a berhbu chu luiahte leh tuikhurahte a leihbua a, thisenah a lo chang ta a." 
Revelation16:5 Tui vântirhkoh chuan, “Awm mêk leh Awm tawh, Nang, mi thianghlim, ro i rêl dik ngei mai;" 
Revelation16:6 mi thianghlimte leh zâwlneite thisen chhuahtute chu thisen i intîr ve tâk thung hi; in âwm rêng an ni,” a tih ka hria a." 
Revelation16:7 Maichâm aṭang chuan, “Ni e, Lalpa, Pathian Engkimtithei, i rorêlna chu a dikin a fel a ni,” tih aw ka hre bawk a." 
Revelation16:8 A palina chuan a berhbu chu ni-ah a leihbua a; ni chu mei saa mihringte em uh an phalsak a. 
Revelation16:9 Tichuan, mei sa-in mite chu a em ût ta a; mahse, chûng hremna chunga thuneitu Pathian hming chu an sawichhia a, an sim lo va, amah an fak duh hek lo." 
Revelation16:10 A pangana chuan a berhbu chu sakawlh lalṭhutthlêngah a leihbua a, a ram chu a lo thim ta vek a; an na tuar chu an ṭhen tlawk tlawk a." 
Revelation16:11 An pân vei leh an na tuar avâng chuan vân Pathian chu an sawichhia a, an thiltihte chu an sim chuang lo." 
Revelation16:12 A parukna chuan a berhbu chu Eufretis luipuiah chuan a leihbua a, a tui chu a kang ta a; khawchhak lam aṭanga lal lo kal tûrte tân kawng a inhawng ta a ni." 
Revelation16:13 Tin, Dragon kâ aṭang te, sakawlh kâ aṭang te, zâwlnei der kâ aṭangtea lo chhuak thlarau bawlhhlawh pathum, chungu ang ka hmu bawk a. Chûng chu ramhuai thlarau an ni a, thil mak pawh an ti ṭhîn." 
Revelation16:14 Pathian Engkimtitheia ni ropuia indonaa hruai khâwm tûrin khawvêl lal zawng zawng hnênah an kal a. 
Revelation16:15 Ngai teh u, rûkru angin ka lo kal e, inringa inchei peih diama awm chu a nihlawh e, saruaka a awm miten an hmuha a zah loh nân." 
Revelation16:16 Hebrai ṭawnga Harmegadon an tih hmunah an rawn hruai khâwm a. 
Revelation16:17 A pasarihna chuan a berhbu chu boruakah a leihbua a, tempula lalṭhutthlêng aṭang chuan aw ring tak a lo chhuak a, “A zo ta,” tiin." 
Revelation16:18 Kâwl a phe a, aw a lo chhuak a, khawpui a ri dur dur a, lîr na takin a nghîng a, mihring awm china lîrnghîng azawngah a la na ber." 
Revelation16:19 Khaw ropui chu hmun thumah a lo phel a, Jentail khawpuite a chim a, Babulon khaw ropui chu Pathianin a hre reng a, a thinurna no chu a intîr ta a ni." 
Revelation16:20 Thliarkâr zawng zawng a bo va, tlângte pawh hmuh tûr a awm tawh lo." 
Revelation16:21 Vân aṭangin rial lian pui pui, kg. sawmnga dâwn laia rit, mihring chungah a tla a. Riala hremna avâng chuan Pathian chu miten an sawichhia a, hremna chu a na êm êm mai si a." 
Revelation17:1 Berhbu pasarih keng Vântirhkoh pasarihte zînga pakhat chu a lo kal a, mi rawn bia a, “Hawh teh, tui tam tak chunga ṭhu, nawhchizuar hmingthang tak chunga rorêlna chu ka hmuhtîr ang che." 
Revelation17:2 Leia lalte chuan an tawmpui ṭhîn a, leia chêngte pawh a hurna zu chuan a hrai rui ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Revelation17:3 Tichuan, Thlarauvin thlalêrah mi hruai a, sakawlh senlâr chunga chuang hmeichhia ka hmu a. Sakawlh taksa pumah chuan Pathian huatzâwng hming a chuang buai a, lu sarih leh ki sâwm a nei." 
Revelation17:4 Hmeichhia chu puan senduk leh senlârin a inthuam a, rangkachak ṭhi te, lungmantam te, tuikeplung tein a inchei a. A kutin thil tenawm leh a hur bawlhhlawhnaa khat rangkachak no a keng a." 
Revelation17:5 A chalah chuan awmze rûk nei, ‘Babulon khaw ropui, khawvêl nawhchizuarte nu, mi tenawmte nu,’ tih a chuang a." 
Revelation17:6 Chu nu chu mi thianghlimte thisen leh Isua avânga martarte thisena a rui ka hmu a. Amah ka han hmuh chuan mak ka ti êm êm a. 
Revelation17:7 Vântirhkoh chuan, “Engati nge mak i tih? He nu leh a phurtu sakawlh lu sarih leh ki sâwm nei thurûk chu ka hrilh ang che." 
Revelation17:8 Sakawlh i hmuh hi a awm tawh zet a, a awm leh ta lo va; leilâwt aṭangin a lo chhuak leh ang a, boralnaah a lût leh mai dâwn. Lei leh vân siam hmaa Nunna bu-a hming ziak loh leia chêngte chuan, sakawlh chu a awm tawh zet a, a awm leh ta lo va, a lo awm leh tûr chu mak an ti ang." 
Revelation17:9 Hei hi hriatthiam a ṭûl hle. Lu sarih chu hmeichhe ṭhutna tlâng sarih a ni a, lal pasarih an ni bawk." 
Revelation17:10 Panga chu an thi tawh a, pakhat chu a la awm a, a dang erawh chu a la awm rih lo; a lo awm hunah pawh rei lo tê chauh a awm ang." 
Revelation17:11 Sakawlh, awm tawh zeta awm leh ta lova chu a pariatna a ni, pasarihte zînga mi kha a ni bawk; mahse, tihboral a ni ang." 
Revelation17:12 ki sâwm i hmuh kha lal sâwm, la lal ve lote an ni, anni chuan dârkâr khat chhûng chauh sakawlh nên lal anga thuneihna an nei ang." 
Revelation17:13 Inthurualin an thuneihna leh an thiltihtheihna chu sakawlh hnênah an pe ang. 
Revelation17:14 Anni chuan Berâmno chu an do vang a; mahse, Berâmno chuan a hneh ang: a hnung zuitu, a kohva a thlan, mi rinawmte nên chuan anni chu an hneh ang, ani chu lalte Lal, lalberte Lalber a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Revelation17:15 Ka hnênah a sawi zêl a, “Nawhchizuar ṭhutna tui tam tak i hmuh kha mi te, mipui te, Jentail-te leh ṭawng hrang hrang te an ni." 
Revelation17:16 I sakawlh hmuh leh a ki sâwmte chuan nawhchizuarnu chu an hua ang a, a silhfên an hlîp vek ang a, saruakin an hnutchhiah ang. A sa chu an ei ang a, meiah an rawh ral ang." 
Revelation17:17 Pathianin a thiltih tum ti tûrin an rilru a hneh a, Pathian thu a thlen kim hma chu sakawlh hnênah an lalna pêk an remti tlâng a ni." 
Revelation17:18 I hmeichhe hmuh kha, khawpui ropui, leia lalte chunga lal chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Revelation18:1 Chûng hnuah chuan vântirhkoh dang vân aṭanga lo chhuak ka hmu leh a. Thuneihna nasa tak a nei a, a ropuina chuan lei pum pui a ên a." 
Revelation18:2 Ring takin, “A tlâwm ta, Babulon khaw ropui chu a tlâwm ta. Ramhuaite chênna, thlarau bawlhhlawhte inkulhna leh sava bawlhhlawh tenawm tinrêng tawm khâwmna hmun a lo ni ta." 
Revelation18:3 A uirena, thinurna uain chu Jentail-ten an in a, leia lalte chuan ani chu an tawmpui a, a nawmsak bâwlna chu leia sumdâwngtuten an hausak phah ṭhîn,” tiin a au va." 
Revelation18:4 Vân aṭanga aw dang ka hre leh a: “Ka mite u, chhuahsan rawh u, A sualnaahte tel ve suh u, hremna hi in tuar ve dah ang e." 
Revelation18:5 A sualna chuan vân a tawng a, Pathianin a thil sual tih chu a hre reng a ni." 
Revelation18:6 In chunga a tih ang chiahin a chungah ti ve ula, a thiltih zawng zawng a lêtin thungrûl rawh u. In tûra a buatsaih leh hniha tak a novah chuan chhûnsak rawh u." 
Revelation18:7 A intihropui leh a nawmsak bâwl ang hu tuarna leh lungngaihnain thungrûl rawh u. ‘Lalnuah ka ṭhu a, hmeithai ka ni lo ve, lu ka sûn ngai lo ve,’ a ti rilru vei a." 
Revelation18:8 Chuvâng chuan, ni khat chhûng maiin hremna a tuar dâwn, thih te, lusûn te, ṭâm te, meia hâl ral te a tuar bawk ang. Thiam loh chantîrtu chu Lalpa Pathian Chaka a ni,” tiin." 
Revelation18:9 Leia lal, amah uirepuitu, nawmsak bâwlpui ṭhîntute chuan a kâng khu an hmuh chuan an ṭap ang a, khawpui chu an ṭah ang." 
Revelation18:10 A hremna chu tuar ve an hlauh avângin hla takah an thlîr ang a, “E heu! A va râpthlâk êm! Babulon khaw ropui leh chak tak chu, Dârkâr khat chhûng lekin a chhiat tâk hi!” an ti ang." 
Revelation18:11 Leia sumdâwngtute pawhin an ṭah ang a, amah an sûn ang; tu man an zawrh sumte an leisak ta si lo." 
Revelation18:12 Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, lungmantam te leh tuikeplung te, puan zai sîn te, puan senlâr leh duk te, maimaw puan te, thing rimtui chi hrang hrang te, saingho te, dâr te, thîr te leh sailungvâra siam thil chi hrang tinrêng te," 
Revelation18:13 thakthîng te, mawsawla te, beraw te, mura te, rimtui hâl chi te, uain leh oliv hriak te, chhangphut leh a hûm te; sebâwng leh berâm te, sakawr leh tawlailîr te, bawih te leh mihring nunna an zawrh ṭhin te chu tu man an leisak tawh lo." 
Revelation18:14 Sumdâwngtute chuan, “I thei duhzâwng, i châk ṭhinte kha a awm ta lo; i ropuina leh i mawina zawng zawng a bo ta, i nei leh ngai tawh hauh lo vang,” an ti a." 
Revelation18:15 Chutianga sumdâwng mi, khawpuia sumdâwnga intihausate chuan a hremna tuar chu tuar ve an hlauh avângin hla takah an ding a:" 
Revelation18:16 “E heu! A va râpthlâk êm! Khawpui ropui, puan zai sîn, senduk leh senlâra inthuama, Rangkachak ṭhi te, lungmantam te leh tuikeplung tea Inchei ṭhîn chu!" 
Revelation18:17 Dârkâr khat chhûng lekin a hausakna a ral tâk vek hi!” an ti a. Lawng hotu te leh a chhûnga khualzin te, lawng khalhtu te leh tuifinriata hna thawktu te pawh hla takah an ding a." 
Revelation18:18 A kâng khu an hmuh chuan an au va, “He khua ang khawpui ropui dang a awm dâwn em ni?” an ti a." 
Revelation18:19 An lu-ah vaivut an phul a, an ṭah a, “E heu! A va râpthlâk êm! Tuifinriat lawng zawng zawng chu, He khawpui hausak zâra hausa an ni a, dârkâr khat chhûng lekin A ram tâk hi!” an ti a." 
Revelation18:20 Aw vân te, mi thianghlim te, tirhkoh te, zâwlnei te u, a chhiat tâk avângin lâwm rawh u; in chunga a thil tihte avângin Pathianin a hrem ta a nih hi." 
Revelation18:21 Vântirhkoh chak tak hian chhangphut râwtna lung tiat zeta lian lung a la a, tuifinriatah a paih a, “Babulon khaw ropui chu hetiang hian vawm pil a ni ang a, tu man an hmu leh tawh hauh lo vang." 
Revelation18:22 Ṭingṭang te, phênglâwng te, tawtawrâwt te I chhûngah an tum ri dâwn tawh lo. Thil tinrêng siam thiam hmuh tûr tu mah an awm lo vang a, Buh her thâwm hriat tûr a awm hek lo vang." 
Revelation18:23 Khâwnvâr êng hmuh tûr a awm lo vang a, Mo leh a pasal hlim thâwm hriat tûr a awm hek lo vang. I sumdâwngtute khawvêl milian an ni a, I dawiin Jentail-te i bum si ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Revelation18:24 Mi thianghlim te, zâwlnei te leh leia an thah zawng zawng thisen a chhûngah chuan chhuah a ni ṭhîn." 
Revelation19:1 Chûng hnuah chuan vânah mipui nasa tak aw ang ka hria a: “Haleluia, chhandamna te, ropuina te, thiltihtheihna te kan Pathian ta a ni." 
Revelation19:2 A rorêl chu a dik a, a ṭha a ni, Nawhchizuar hmingthang, a hurnaa khawvêl tibawlhhlawhtu chu, Thiam loh a chantîr ta. A bawihte thisen a chhuahsak ṭhin avângin phuba a la ta a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Revelation19:3 “Haleluia, a kâng khu chu chatuanin a chho vang,” an ti leh a." 
Revelation19:4 Upa sawmhnih leh pali leh thilnung palite chu an bawkkhup a, lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu Pathian chu chibai an bûk a, “Amen, Haleluia,” an ti a." 
Revelation19:5 Tin, lalṭhutthlêng ata aw lo chhuak chuan, “Nangni a chhiahhlawh, milian leh mitê, amah ṭihtute u, kan Pathian hi fak rawh u,” a rawn ti a." 
Revelation19:6 Mipui nasa tak aw ang, tuifinriat ri hum hum ang, khawpui ri hluah hluah ang thâwm ka hria a: “Haleluia, Lalpa kan Pathian Engkimtitheia chuan ro a rêl e." 
Revelation19:7 Hlimin lâwm ila, i chawimawi ang u, Berâmno nupui neih a hun tâk hi; A nupui tûr pawh a inpeih tawh a," 
Revelation19:8 Puan zai sîn vâr tle takin an thuam ta. Puan zai sîn chu mi thianghlimte thil ṭha tihte hi a ni,” tiin." 
Revelation19:9 Tin, ka hnênah, “Ziak rawh, Berâmno nupui neihna ruai ṭheh tûra sâwmte chu an nihlawh e,” a ti a. “Hêng thute hi Pathian thu dik a ni,” a ti bawk a." 
Revelation19:10 A ke bula bawkkhupin chibai ka bûk ta a. Ka hnênah, “Khatin ti suh, nang leh Isua thu pawmtu, i unaute nêna in bawihpui mai ka nih hi. Pathian chibai bûk zâwk rawh, Isua thu rawn hril hi thuhriltîrtu thlarau a ni,” a ti a." 
Revelation19:11 Tin, vân a lo inhawng a, sakawr vâr ka hmu a, a chunga chuang hming chu “Rinawma leh Dika” a ni, dik taka rorêlin râl a bei ṭhîn a ni." 
Revelation19:12 A mit chu meialh ang a ni a, a lu-ah chuan lallukhum tam tak a khum a, tu ma hriat ve loh amah chauhvin a hriat hming ziak a pu a." 
Revelation19:13 Kawr, thisena hnim a ha a, a hming chu ‘Pathian Thu-a’ a ni." 
Revelation19:14 Vân sipai rual puan zai sîn vâr tle taka inthuamte chuan sakawr chunga chuangin a hnung an zui a. 
Revelation19:15 A kâ aṭang chuan khandaih hriam tawn hriam tak a lo chhuak a, chu chuan Jentail-te a hneh ang a, thîrtiangin an chungah ro a rêl ang. Amah hi a ni Pathian Engkimtitheia thinurna nasa tak uain sâwrna khura rap sâwrtu tûr chu." 
Revelation19:16 A kawrah leh a malpuiah chuan hming “Lalte Lal, Hotute Hotu,” tih a chuang." 
Revelation19:17 Tin, vântirhkoh pakhat ni-a ding ka hmu a, vânlaizâwla sava thlâwk ṭhîn zawng zawng hnênah ring takin, “Pathian ruai ropui ṭheh tûrin lo kal rawh u;" 
Revelation19:18 lal sa te, sipai hotu sa te, mi huai sa te, sakawr leh a chungchuang sa te, bawih leh bawih lo, milian leh mitê, an zavaia sa in ei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Revelation19:19 Sakawlh leh lei lalte chu an sipaite nên chuan sakawr vâr chunga chuang leh a sipaite bei tûrin an kal khâwm ka hmu a. 
Revelation19:20 Sakawlh chu an man a, a mit hmuha thil mak ti ṭhîn zâwlnei der pawh chu an man a. Chu Zâwlnei chuan a thil tih makin sakawlh nambar pute leh a lim betute chu a bum ṭhîn a ni. An pahnih chuan a nung chungin kâta kâng meidîlah chuan an paih ta a." 
Revelation19:21 Sakawr chunga chuang kâ aṭanga khandaih lo chhuak chuan mi dangte pawh chu thah an ni a; savate chuan an sa chu puar takin an ei ta a. 
Revelation20:1 Tin, vân aṭanga Vântirhkoh pakhat lo chhuk ka hmu a, leilâwt chabi leh khaidiat lian tak a keng a." 
Revelation20:2 Dragon, Rûlpui Tar, Diabola leh Setana chu a man a, kum sâng tâng tûrin a phuar a;" 
Revelation20:3 kum sâng a ral hma chu hnamte a bum tawh loh nân leilâwtah chuan a thlâk a, a kalh khum a, a châr hnan ta a. Chumi hnuah erawh chuan rei lo tê an chhuahtîr leh ang." 
Revelation20:4 Tin, Lalṭhutthlêng ka hmu a, a chunga ṭhute chu ro an rêltîr a. Isua thu an hril avâng leh Pathian thu avânga lu tante thlarau ka hmu a, sakawlh leh a lim be ve lo, an chalah emaw, an kutah emaw a chhinchhiahna awm ve lote thlarau ka hmu bawk a. Chûng chu an lo nung leh a, Krista hovin kum sâng ro an rêl ta a." 
Revelation20:5 Mitthi dangte erawh chu kum sâng a ral hma chuan an nung leh ve rih lo. Hei hi thawhlehna hmasa chu a ni. 
Revelation20:6 Thawhlehna hmasaa telte chu an thianghlimin an nihlawh e. Thih hnihna chuan an chungah thuneihna a nei tawh lo. Pathian leh a Krista tân puithiam an ni ang a, a hovin kum sâng an lal ang." 
Revelation20:7 Kum sâng a ral hnu chuan a tânna ata Setana chu an chhuah ang a," 
Revelation20:8 lei kil li-a Jentail-te, Gog leh Magog chu a rawn bum ang a, indonaah a hruai khâwm ang; an tam lam chu tuifinriat kama ṭiauvaivut anga tam an ni." 
Revelation20:9 Lei pum dâpin an lo chho va, mi thianghlimte kulh leh a khawpui duh tak chu an hual a; mahse, vân ata mei a lo sûr a, anni chu a kâng ral ta a." 
Revelation20:10 Anmahni bumtu Diabola chu, Sakawlh leh zâwlnei der awmnaah, kâta kâng meidîlah chuan an paih a, chutah chuan a chhûn a zânin hrem an tuar kumkhua tawh ang." 
Revelation20:11 Lalṭhutthlêng vâr ropui tak leh a chunga ṭhu ka hmu a, a hma ata lei leh vân an tlân bo va, hmuh tûr a awm tawh lo." 
Revelation20:12 Mitthite, milian leh mitê, lalṭhutthlêng hmaa ding ka hmu, lehkhabu zialte an pharh a; tin, lehkhabu zial dang, nunna bu an pharh ka hmu bawk a; mitthite chu chûng lehkhabua an thiltih ziak ang zêl chuan an chungthu rêl a ni a." 
Revelation20:13 Tuifinriat chuan a chhûnga mitthite chu a chhuah a, thihna leh mitthi khua pawh chuan mitthi an kawlte chu an chhuah bawk a; mi tin an thiltih ang zêlin an chungthu rêl a ni ta a." 
Revelation20:14 Thihna leh mitthi khua chu meidîlah an paih a. 
Revelation20:15 He meidîl hi thih hnihna chu a ni. Tu pawh Nunna bu-a an hming an hmuh loh chu meidîlah chuan an paih a. 
Revelation21:1 Tin, vân thar leh lei thar ka hmu a, vân hmasa leh lei hmasa chu a awm tawh lo va, tuifinriat pawh a awm tawh hek lo" 
Revelation21:2 Khaw thianghlim, Jerusalem thar chu, mo pasal nei tûra inchei diam anga inpeih, Pathian hnên ata vân aṭanga lo chhuk ka hmu a." 
Revelation21:3 Lalṭhutthlêng ata aw ring tak ka hria a, “Ngai teh, Pathian chênna chu mihring zîngah a lo awm ta: An zîngah a chêng ang a, a mite an ni ang. Pathian ngei chu an hnênah a awm ang a, an Pathian a ni bawk ang." 
Revelation21:4 An mit ata mittui zawng zawng a hru hul ang a, Thih a awm leh tawh lo vang. Lu sûn te, ṭah te, nat te pawh a awm tawh hek lo vang. Thil hluite chu a liam ta a,” a ti a." 
Revelation21:5 Lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu chuan, “Ngai teh, thil engkim ka siam thar e,” a ti a. “Ziak rawh, hêng ka thute hi a rinawmin a dik a ni,” a ti leh a." 
Revelation21:6 Ka hnênah, “A lo thleng ta, kei Alfa leh Omega, a bul leh a tâwp ka ni. Tuihâl apiang hnênah nunna tuikhura mi a thlâwna in tûr ka pe ang." 
Revelation21:7 A hnehtute chuan hêng hi an chang dâwn: An Pathian ka ni ang a, ka tân fapa an ni bawk ang." 
Revelation21:8 Mi dawihzep te, ring lo te, tenawm te, tual that te, inngaih chîng te, dawithiam te, milem bia te leh dawthei zawng zawng te chan tûr erawh chu kâta kâng meidîl a ni, chu chu thih hnihna chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Revelation21:9 Tin berhbu pasarih, hremna hnuhnûng pasariha khat keng vântirhkoh pasarih zînga pakhat chu ka hnênah a lo kal a, “Lo kal teh, Berâmno nupui, a mo chu ka lo entîr ang che,” mi ti a." 
Revelation21:10 Thlarauvin tlâng lian pui sâng takah mi hruai a, Jerusalem, khawpui thianghlim chu Pathian hnên ata vân aṭanga lo chhuk mi entîr a." 
Revelation21:11 Pathian ropuina a khum a, a ên dân chu lungmantam jaspi lung, krustal anga fîm a ni." 
Revelation21:12 Kulh bang chhah tak, sâng tak a nei a, kawngkhâr sâwm leh pahnih a awm a, kawngkhârte chu vântirhkoh sâwm leh pahnihin an vêng a; chûng kawngkhârahte chuan hming ziak a awm - Israel fa hnam sâwm leh pahnihte hming chu." 
Revelation21:13 Chhak lamah kawngkhâr pathum, hmâr lamah kawngkhâr pathum, chhim lamah kawngkhâr pathum, thlang lamah kawngkhâr pathum a awm ṭheuh va." 
Revelation21:14 Khawpui kulh bang chuan innghahna lungphûm sâwm leh pahnih a nei a, chutah chuan Berâmno tirhkoh sâwm leh pahnihte hming a chuang bawk a." 
Revelation21:15 Mi betu chuan khawpui leh a kawngkhârte leh kulh bang teh nân rangkachaka siam tehna tiang a keng a. 
Revelation21:16 Khawpui chu kil li nei, a dung lam leh a vâng lam inbial a ni a, tiang chuan a han teh a. Km. sânghnih leh zali a sei a ni. A dung leh a vâng leh a sân lam chu a inchen vek a." 
Revelation21:17 A kulh bang chu mihring tehna hmangin vântirhkoh chuan a han teh a, metar sawmruka chhah a ni." 
Revelation21:18 A kulh bang atân jaspi lung an hmang a, khawpui chu dârthlalang anga fîm rangkachak thianghlima din a ni." 
Revelation21:19 Khawpui kulh bang lungphûm chu lungmantam chi hrang hrang a ni a, lungphûm pakhatna chu jaspi lung a ni a, a pahnihna chu safir lung a ni a, a pathumna chu kalkedon lung a ni a, a palina chu smaragdin lung a ni a," 
Revelation21:20 a pangana chu sardonuk lung a ni a, a parukna chu sardoni lung a ni a, a pasarihna chu kruso lung a ni a; a pariatna chu berul lung a ni a, a pakuana chu topaz lung a ni a, a sâwmna chu krusopras lung a ni a, a sâwm leh pakhatna chu huakintho lung a ni a, a sâwm leh pahnihna chu amethus lung a ni." 
Revelation21:21 Kawngkhâr sâwm leh pahnihte chu tuikeplung sâwm leh pahnih, tlang khat ṭheuhva siam a ni. Khawpui kawtlai chu rangkachak thianghlim dârthlalang anga fîm a ni." 
Revelation21:22 Khawpui chhûngah chuan tempul ka hmu lo. Lalpa Pathian Engkimtitheia leh Berâmno chu an tempul a ni. 
Revelation21:23 Khawpui ên tûrin ni leh thla a ngai lo, Lalpa ropuina chuan a ên a, an khâwnvâr chu Berâmno a ni." 
Revelation21:24 Jentail-te chu a êngah chuan an lêng ang a, leia lalte pawhin an ropuina an rawn luhpui ang." 
Revelation21:25 A kawngte chu chhûnah an khâr ngai lo vang a, zân a awm tawh hek lo vang." 
Revelation21:26 Jentail-te chuan an ropuina leh chawimawina an rawn luhpui ang. 
Revelation21:27 Thil bawlhhlawh eng mah a lo lût thei hek lo vang a, thil tenawm tite leh dâwt chîngte an lo lût thei hek lo vang; Berâmno nunna bu-a hming chuangte chauh an lût thei ang." 
Revelation22:1 Tin, nunna lui mi entîr a; krustal anga fîm a ni, Pathian leh Berâmno lalṭhutthlêng aṭangin a lo luang chhuak a," 
Revelation22:2 khawpui lai taka kawtthlêrah chuan a luang tlang a, a kam tuakah chuan nunna thing, rah chi hrang sâwm leh pahnih nei a awm, thla tin a rah a, a hnahte chu hnam tin tihdamna a ni." 
Revelation22:3 Ânchhe dawng thil eng mah a awm tawh lo vang; tah chuan Pathian leh Berâmno lalṭhutthlêng a inhûng ang a, a bawihte chuan a rawng an bâwl ang a," 
Revelation22:4 a hmêl an hmu reng ang; an chalah chuan a hming a chuang bawk ang. 
Revelation22:5 Zân a awm tawh lo vang a, khâwnvâr leh ni êng an ngai tawh hek lo vang, Lalpa Pathian chuan a ên dâwn si a, chatuan chatuanin an lal tawh ang." 
Revelation22:6 Ka hnênah, “Hêng thute hi a rinawmin a dik a ni, Lalpa Pathian, zâwlneitea thu sawitu chuan thil lo thleng thuai tûr a bawihte entîr tûrin vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a ni." 
Revelation22:7 Ngai teh, ka lo kal thuai dâwn e; he lehkhabua hrilhlâwkna thu zâwmtute chu an nihlawh e,” a ti a." 
Revelation22:8 Hêng hretu leh hmutu hi kei Johana hi ka ni. Ka hriata ka han hmuh chuan hêng thil mi entîrtu vântirhkoh ke bulah chuan chibai bûk tûrin ka bawkkhup a. 
Revelation22:9 Ani chuan “Khatin ti suh, kei chu i bawihpui, zâwlneite leh he lehkhabu thu zâwmtute bawihpui ve mai ka nih hi, Pathian chibai bûk zâwk rawh,” mi ti a." 
Revelation22:10 Ani chuan ka hnênah, “He lehkhabua hrilhlâwknate hi zêp suh, a hun a lo thleng ṭêp a ni." 
Revelation22:11 Mi sualte chu sual zêl sela, mi bawlhhlawhte chu bawlhhlawh zêl sela, mi ṭha chu ṭha zêl sela, mi thianghlim pawh thianghlim zêl mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
Revelation22:12 Ngai teh, ka lo kal thuai dâwn e; mi tin an thiltih ang zêla pêk tûrin lâwmman ka hnênah a awm." 
Revelation22:13 Kei hi Alfa leh Omega, hmasa ber leh hnuhnûng ber, a bul leh a tâwp chu ka ni." 
Revelation22:14 An puan su faite chu an nihlawh e, khawpui chhûnga lûtin nunna thinga mi an ei thei dâwn si a." 
Revelation22:15 Ui te, dawithiam te, inngaih chîng te, tual that te, milem bia te, dâwt sawi chîng leh ngaina zawng zawngte erawh chu a pâwnah an awm ang." 
Revelation22:16 “Kei Isua hian, kohhrante hêng thu hrilh tûrin ka vântirhkoh ka rawn tîr a nih hi; Davida zungzâm, a thlah, vârparh arsi êng chu ka ni,” a ti a." 
Revelation22:17 Thlarau leh mo chuan, “Lo kal rawh,” an ti a. A hria apiang pawhin, “Lo kal rawh,” ti ve rawh se. Tuihâl apiang lo kal sela, nunna tui duh apiangin a thlâwnin han in rawh se." 
Revelation22:18 He lehkhabua hrilhlâwkna thu hria apiang ka hriattîr e: miin hêng thute hi an belhchhah chuan, Pathianin he lehkhabua hremna sawite hi a belhchhah ve ang." 
Revelation22:19 Tu pawhin he lehkhabua hrilhlâwkna thute hi an lâk bo chuan, he lehkhabua ziak nunna thinga mi leh khaw thianghlima an chan tûr chu Pathianin a lâksak ve ang." 
Revelation22:20 Hêng thu puangtu hian, “A ni, ka lo kal thuai dâwn e,” a ti a. Amen, Lalpa Isu, lo kal ta che."
